Name: Nação Fluente
Description:
Você sabe como se comunicar em inglês com confiança?
Sente-se à vontade em reuniões internacionais?
Fica tranquilo ao participar de uma entrevista em inglês?
Ou o idioma ainda é uma barreira para você?

Talvez você esteja:
 Frustrado por não conseguir fluência
 Nervoso antes de cada apresentação em inglês
 Evitando oportunidades de carreira internacional
 Perdendo promoções por não dominar o idioma

Se esse é o seu caso, saiba que não é culpa sua.

O método tradicional de ensino de inglês falhou com você. Aqui está o porquê:
1. Não focam na prática real de conversação
2. Ensinaram gramática sem mostrar como usar no dia a dia
3. Prometeram fluência apenas com exercícios escritos
4. Focam na teoria, mas não no uso prático do inglês
5. Os métodos convencionais são lentos e desmotivadores

E agora?
• Você ainda se sente inseguro ao falar
• Sua carreira não avança como deveria
• A ansiedade te impede de participar de reuniões e entrevistas em inglês
• Oportunidades são perdidas porque você não consegue se expressar

Mas há uma solução.

Na Nação Fluente, ajudamos você a dominar o inglês de forma rápida e prática, focada na conversação e em resultados reais. 
Nosso método é projetado para te dar a confiança que você precisa, sem enrolação.

E se você não aprender a se comunicar bem em inglês, outros irão:
• Ficar com as vagas que você sonha
• Conseguir as promoções que você quer
• Viver as experiências que você deseja
• Aproveitar as oportunidades internacionais que poderiam ser suas

Quanto mais rápido você dominar o inglês, mais rápido verá resultados.

Posso te ajudar a alcançar essa fluência de forma prática e com resultados comprovados.

Já ajudamos centenas de alunos a desbloquear o inglês e alcançar seus sonhos.

Está pronto para dar o próximo passo?

Acesse nacaofluente.com e descubra como conquistar a fluência que vai transformar sua carreira.

Name: Kaplan International Languages
Description:
A division of Kaplan Inc, an educational subsidiary of Graham Holdings Company, Kaplan International Languages is a leading provider of international education. 

We offer English, French, and German language courses in 9 countries across the world, catering for all ages and learners, with our Junior Summer Camps from Alpadia Language Schools (part of the Kaplan family), our dedicated 30+ English courses, exam prep courses & more.  

We offer language and university pathway programs, which include tuition, accommodation and social activities. Students travel to study with Kaplan International Languages from over 150 countries around the world through our network of partners and sales offices, as well as directly through our website.

Name: My English School Italia
Description:
My English School è una realtà innovativa orientata all'apprendimento della lingua inglese che pone al centro della didattica le esigenze e i bisogni reali degli interessati. 
L’azienda ha aperto la prima sede a Firenze nel 2011 e, a seguito dell’immediato successo del metodo MySmart English, in breve tempo ha inaugurato altri centri in tutta Italia. Ad oggi, nel Belpaese, è presente in tutte le principali città, in molte di queste con 2 o 3 centri, con numeri importanti e in costante crescita. Nel 2018 ha aperto una scuola all'estero e molte nuove aperture sono previste nei prossimi mesi.
MyES offre non solo corsi di inglese private ma anche corsi di inglese corporate ed è vicina alle aziende nel far sì che il loro investimento si trasformi in abilità e competenze concretamente spendibili in contesti lavorativi reali. I corsi di inglese per aziende My English School sono erogabili anche a distanza e consentono personalizzazione, flessibilità e una vera e propria full immersion in contesti di real life. 

LIVE THE EXPERIENCE! 
My English School garantisce flessibilità organizzativa, insegnanti esclusivamente madrelingua certificati, libertà di frequenza in base alle esigenze e agli orari di ciascuno, l’opportunità di ripetere le lezioni più volte e di recuperare le attività perse.
MySmart English è un metodo didattico basato sull'apprendimento “naturale” e coinvolgente, costantemente aggiornato e che permette fin dall'inizio di determinare modalità e tempi di sviluppo delle competenze linguistiche sulla base del Quadro Comune di Riferimento Europeo per le lingue (CEFR).


MYES
http://www.myenglishschool.it/

Name: CCAA
Description:
O CCAA é uma rede de cursos de idiomas (inglês e espanhol) com mais de 640 franquias em todo o Brasil e presença também nos Estados Unidos, El Salvador e Hungria, somando mais de 210 mil alunos.

Reconhecido pela Associação Brasileira de Franchising (ABF) com o Selo de Excelência em Franchising, certificação que avalia critérios como sustentabilidade, relacionamento, lucratividade e gestão da operação, além de figurar entre as 50 maiores franquias do Brasil, segundo a mesma entidade.

Em 2025, conquistou o bicampeonato do Prêmio Reclame Aqui, na categoria Idiomas – Grandes Operações, e o Prêmio Experience Awards, na categoria Escola de Idiomas, concedido pela SoluCX.

Com uma metodologia de ensino exclusiva, a marca consolidou-se como referência em qualidade e inovação, sendo pioneira em tecnologia educacional no país.

No CCAA, aprender vai além do idioma: é desenvolver habilidades de comunicação para se conectar com o mundo, ampliar horizontes e construir novas oportunidades de crescimento pessoal e profissional.

Precisamos de uma força no inglês ou espanhol?

CCAA. É assim que se fala!

Cursos para todos: a partir de 3 anos de idade, adolescentes e adultos.

Name: easypeasyfluent
Description: Redefining English learning with a modern, practice-first approach. Our dynamic, international team from 15+ countries together with our 30+ certified, native teachers deliver personalized, flexible courses that help students achieve fluency in a way that's fun, engaging, and affordable. Join us on a journey to mastering English and unlock new opportunities!

Name: EC English Language Centres
Description:
Our world-class facilities and outstanding staff have allowed us to evolve into a globally recognised and trusted brand with 25 schools in 7 different countries. Each year the EC teams help over 40,000 students from over 120 countries to learn English and improve their language skills. Our vision is to maintain our growth while helping students from all over the world succeed in a global community.

To achieve our mission, we have created a diverse and highly skilled team of talented people from all around the world. Our cultural diversity, solid teamwork, and passion for what we do have shaped our schools and offices into unique and empowering working environments.

Name: EC English Language Centres Alumni
Description: This group is for alumni of all EC Language Centres, to stay connected with fellow students and hear news and updates from schools.

Name: Full Marks
Description: Take individual language training tailored to your job. Live online language classes with qualified native speakers. Speak more professionally. 24/7.

Name: Academia Europea
Description:
Sé parte de nuestra gran familia políglota.

Desde hace más de 50 años, Academia Europea ha sido el referente número uno en la enseñanza de idiomas en América Latina, transformando vidas y abriendo puertas a un mundo sin fronteras. Con nuestro sistema de enseñanza interactiva IALS, ayudamos a nuestros estudiantes a hablar básicamente otro idioma en tan solo 4 meses, empoderándolos para conquistar nuevas oportunidades académicas, laborales y personales.

Nuestra misión es clara: conectar culturas, romper barreras y convertir a nuestros estudiantes en ciudadanos globales. Contamos con una red de maestros expertos y apasionados que brindan experiencias de aprendizaje personalizadas, ya sea en modalidad presencial o virtual, con herramientas modernas que garantizan resultados.

Estamos presentes en múltiples países de la región, nuestra trayectoria está marcada por la excelencia, la innovación y un compromiso inquebrantable con el éxito de nuestros estudiantes. Día a día, transformamos el futuro de millones de personas, dándoles la confianza de comunicarse en el idioma que necesitan para alcanzar sus sueños.

Academia Europea: más que enseñar idiomas, transformamos vidas.

Name: CEL-LEP
Description: CEL-LEP is one of the largest premium ELT (English Language Teaching) companies in Brazil, based in Sao Paulo. Founded in 1967 and acquired by H.I.G. Capital in 2012, CEL-LEP offers EFL (English as a Foreign Language) courses for kids, teens, and adults in three main operating models: regular units, school-in-school units, and school-in-company units. With 500+ employees, the school serves 15,000 students annually in its 43 branches. CEL-LEP also serves more than 1.000 companies, including 57 of Exame’s 100 largest Brazilian companies.

Name: Sprache&Wissen
Description:
A Sprache&Wissen é uma Edtech Bootstrap de ensino de inglês e alemão, fundada em 2019 pelos irmãos e sócios Ludmila Fonseca e Radamés Fonseca, com faturamento de +R$20.000.000,00 e com Valuation de R$40.000.000,00 em 2025.

O grupo educacional administra a maior escola online de alemão da América Latina e desenvolveu solução inovadora de inglês como benefício corporativo, 100% gratuita para o RH, com 98,9% de satisfação.

O grupo administra as unidades de negócio "Clube de Alemão" - Escola de Alemão, "Punkify" - Escola de inglês, "SWAI" - IA que dá aulas particulares com instrutores virtuais superinteligentes disponíveis 24h/7. "SW Editora" - Livros Didáticos próprios, "Vale-inglês" e "Vale-alemão" - Soluções educacionais B2b e "BRABEN" - rede de networking para profissionais que lidam com benefícios corporativos. Estas BU's irão capacitar 100 mil brasileiros com a fluência funcional no inglês ou alemão até 2030.

Name: Burlington English Italy
Description:
Burlington English Italia fa parte del Gruppo Burlington English, leader nella formazione linguistica con presenza fisica e virtuale in oltre 30 paesi nel mondo. 

La nostra scuola internazionale di inglese online si distingue per il suo metodo, i materiali di studio e la tecnologia innovativa messa a disposizione di tutti i nostri corsisti e costantemente aggiornata per garantire un percorso di apprendimento efficace. 

Burlington English Italia è l’unica scuola di inglese online che unisce lezioni in tempo reale con docenti madrelingua, applicazione mobile per la gestione del corso, software proprietario BE (disponibile 24h ore su 24) sviluppato da un team di linguisti ed educatori che comprende materiali didattici, test, giochi e la tecnologia di riconoscimento vocale SpeechTrainer per migliorare la propria pronuncia con un sistema in grado di riconoscere le difficoltà di pronuncia. 

L’unione di questi tre elementi garantisce il raggiungimento del proprio obiettivo linguistico in tempi rapidi, con semplicità ed efficacia. L’utilizzo del software BE e la frequenza di corsi online con docenti madrelingua qualificati per l’insegnamento e collegati in tempo reale crea un’esperienza unica che garantisce progressi significativi in breve tempo.

Per questo motivo in tutto il mondo già più di 3 milioni di persone hanno scelto di seguire il metodo Burlington English per l’inglese generale o per l’inglese professionale, grazie agli oltre 150 corsi di inglese specialistico per tutte le professioni disponibili nella piattaforma BE con attività didattiche per sviluppare il lessico specifico.

Name: BRASAS English Course
Description:
BRASAS English Course | Ensino de inglês com método exclusivo e resultados comprovados

Desde 1966, o BRASAS oferece um método único de ensino de inglês focado em quem tem o português como língua materna. Com aulas 100% em inglês e professores altamente qualificados, garantimos aprendizado dinâmico, prático e eficiente para alunos de todas as idades e níveis.

Com mais de 40 unidades, estamos presentes nos estados do Rio de Janeiro, Brasília, Minas Gerais, Goiás e Espírito Santo. Já são mais de 22 mil alunos nos cursos presenciais e mais de 1.500 nos cursos online.

Além do curso de inglês e curso de português para estrangeiros, também temos soluções para levar o método de ensino do BRASAS para empresas, escolas e universidades. 

Nossa missão é possibilitar a inserção de nossos alunos na comunidade global através do domínio do inglês.

BRASAS, INGLÊS QUE TRANSFORMA.

Name: Alliance Française Dubai
Description:
L'Alliance Française de Dubaï est le centre culturel français présent à Dubai. Comme  toute Alliance française à travers le monde sa mission est de promouvoir la culture française et la francophonie.

Pour cela l'Alliance française Dubai dispense des cours de langue en français et en arabe pour tous les niveaux et de tous les âges. Plus de 3000 étudiants en profitent chaque année.

Chaque mois une dixaine d'événements culturels sont organisés par l'Alliance française Dubai, regroupant les français résidents à Dubai mais également des Emiriens et des membres de toutes les communautés présentes à Dubai. Vous pouvez retrouver ce programme sur notre site internet : afdubai.org et sur notre page Facebook : Alliance Francaise - Dubai.

L'Alliance française Dubai pense également aux enfants francophones en leur proposant des activités tous les mercredis à la médiathèque ; bricolage, lecture, projection de films, jeux,... Consultez la page Facebook de la médiathèque (https://www.facebook.com/mediatheque.afdubai?fref=ts) ou inscrivez-vous à notre newsletter pour connaître les activités et les horaires.

La médiathèque de l'Alliance française est un lieu privilégier d'échange entre les francophones et les élèves de l'Alliance. Son catalogue est très riche - plus de  14 000 livres en français, 1 340 bandes dessinées,1 600 films, 830 CDs et 40 journaux et magazines -  à emprunter pour votre plus grand plaisir.


Horaires :

Alliance francaise Dubai - Oud Metha : dimanche à mercredi de 9h00 à 20h00 et jeudi et samedi de 9h00 à 17h00
Contact : info@afdubai.org

Alliance française Dubai - DKP: dimanche à mercredi de 10h à 18h et le samedi de 9h à 17h
Contact : infodkp@afdubai.org

Name: Atlas Language School
Description:
Atlas Language School was established in Dublin in 2003 and has grown from a one room school to one of the largest language teaching organisations in Ireland. Each year we teach students across a range of courses and programmes, including Exam Preparation, Executive English, Teacher Training, Work Placements, High School Placement and Group Programmes. In addition we run our highly regarded Atlas Junior programmes in Ireland and the UK.

We feel this rapid growth is a testament to the excellence of our programmes, the dedication of our staff and our commitment to providing an extremely high level of quality to each of our students for every aspect of their stay with us.

Name: International House Cairo
Description:
IH Cairo 
 Teacher Training Hub
 Part of IH World
 Cambridge Assessment English (CELTA & DELTA )
 IDP IELTS Testing Center
 Voxy Partner

International House Cairo (IH Cairo) is part of the International House World Organisation, one of the largest and oldest groups of language schools in the world. IH Cairo offers all learners a well-structured course, a positive and enjoyable learning environment as well as educational support.

IH Cairo is a Teacher Training Hub in Cairo providing CELTA & DELTA Training for Teachers. Also, an IELTS Exams & Certified Language Learning Centre for Young Learners, Adults and Businesses.

Part of IH World; a global network of 160 language schools in over 50 countries.
IH Cairo utilizes the power of Reach Out Academy which was founded in Egypt since 2008.
Certified Voxy Partner in Egypt, KSA, UAE and Malaysia.
IDP IELTS Testing Center.
Authorized by Cambridge Assessment English.

Name: Rockfeller Language Center
Description:
Ser fluente em inglês é poder se expressar exatamente do jeito que você quer. Sem aceitar o “é mais ou menos isso”, porque você sabe o “é isso que eu quero”.  É pensar no que você quer falar, sem precisar pensar em como você vai falar.

A Rockfeller acha mais importante você usar o inglês para se comunicar de verdade do que para apenas saber falar inglês. Por isso, ela é uma escola de inglês comprometida com o ensino do idioma de forma completa e real. Nossos cursos se moldam à rotina e se adaptam à expectativa de cada aluno, atendendo com excelência às diversas necessidades que as pessoas têm quando buscam aprender a falar inglês de verdade.

Sabemos que, para conquistar as oportunidades do mundo, sem medo, sem receios e sem truques, é preciso muito mais do que se matricular em uma escola: é preciso querer ser fluente em inglês. E isso nós sabemos ensinar.

Nosso inglês é para o mundo.

Name: Language Consultants
Description:
Language Consultants Milan — Turning Language into Opportunity.

At Language Consultants Milan, we don’t just teach English — we empower professionals, educators, and organizations to communicate with confidence and clarity in the real world.

⸻

Who we help:
	•	Professionals and international teams needing to excel in English communication
	•	Schools seeking innovative CLIL training and exam preparation
	•	Companies and institutions aiming to upskill their staff

⸻

What we do:
We bridge the language gap that holds people back from reaching their goals — in meetings, presentations, collaborations, and cross-border projects.

⸻

How we do it:
	•	Tailored English training aligned with your needs and goals
	•	Expert teachers with real-world experience
	•	Custom-designed learning paths with measurable outcomes
	•	Innovative digital tools that support progress anytime, anywhere

⸻

How long it takes:
From short intensive courses to long-term training programs, we design learning experiences that fit your schedule and deliver results fast.

⸻

Why choose us:
	•	UNI EN ISO 9001:2015 certified quality
	•	Officially accredited courses recognized by the Italian Ministry of Education (A1–B2) — Carta del Docente compatible
	•	Proven track record with schools, professionals, and businesses across Italy
	•	A unique international footprint with offices in Milan and the UK (Company No. 12210122) for seamless service across borders

⸻

Our trademark, The English Grammar Club, represents our commitment to quality, clarity, and curiosity in every lesson.

Language is power. Let’s put it to work for you.
 Contact us to find out how.

Name: Berlitz UAE
Description:
At Berlitz UAE, we specialize in delivering professional language training designed to help individuals and organizations communicate with confidence and fluency. Whether you’re looking to master Arabic, French, English, Spanish, German, Dutch, Portuguese, Italian, Turkish, Persian, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, or other languages, our internationally recognized programs are tailored to support your goals—both personal and professional.

We offer a comprehensive range of corporate training solutions, soft skills workshops, and language workshops for specialized industries.

Our flexible formats include private, semi-private, and group instruction, along with our exclusive Total Immersion program—ideal for rapid, results-driven learning.

Name: Wall Street English Italia
Description:
Wall Street English è il brand leader nell’insegnamento della lingua inglese. Fondata in Italia nel 1972, in un momento in cui sempre più persone desiderano imparare l’inglese per motivi personali e professionali, l’azienda si è estesa rapidamente in Svizzera e poi in Spagna e nel resto d’Europa.

Oggi Wall Street English è un grande network presente in tutto il mondo.

Il successo della crescita di Wall Street English è dovuto alla combinazione del miglior metodo didattico e dei migliori contenuti formativi con le più innovative tecnologie, allo scopo di rendere l’apprendimento più efficace e veloce ed aiutare gli studenti a raggiungere i propri obiettivi con successo.

Name: PT Lister Teknologi Edukasi
Description:
Lister provides language training tailored to meet business requirements, offering job-focused programs to enhance productivity, promote teamwork, and help individuals reach their full potential.

Since its establishment in 2020, Lister has delivered live language coaching with certified instructors to over 300 corporate clients, and offers a comprehensive collection of specialized courses aimed at addressing essential soft and technical skill gaps.

Name: Utalk
Description:
Utalk nació para ayudar a empresas y profesionales a comunicarse con el resto del mundo. Por eso, podemos traducir tu mensaje, lograr que todo tu equipo de trabajo hable un idioma extranjero o poner todos nuestros conocimientos lingüísticos y culturales al servicio de tu proyecto o empresa para que tu voz se escuche en otros idiomas y se entienda en otras culturas.

Nos esforzamos para ofrecerles a nuestros clientes un enfoque global, una excelente atención al cliente y, sobre todo, servicios de gran calidad... encima nos encanta hacer nuestro trabajo! 

¿Querés comunicarte con el mundo? Contactanos!
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Zoni Language Centers
Description:
Zoni Language Centers was founded in 1991, by Mr. Zoilo C. Nieto. Our teaching methodologies have been backed by research and at the forefront of our work as educators, with only the best leadership backing our goals.

We have classes at all locations in New York at Manhattan, Jackson Heights, Flushing, Brooklyn, Hempstead, in New Jersey at West New York, Passaic, Elizabeth, Newark, Palisades Park, and in Florida at Orlando and Tampa.

Awards, Accreditations & More:
· Zoni Language Centers received Go Global Awards 2022 "Service Innovator of the Year" - a recognition by the International Trade Council comprising of 50 countries where more than 6000 organizations participated.

· Moreover, Zoni Manhattan is an authorized testing centers for the TOEFL iBT and Cambridge ESOL Examinations.

· Zoni is certified by the New York State Education Department, is accredited by CEA.

· We also offer TESL (Teaching English a Second Language) course at our Manhattan campus.

How it works:
· Our student-centered teaching methodology combines the Direct Method, Total Physical Response, the Communicative Approach and Cooperative Learning.

· Students practice and immediately produce language structures and dialogues in a natural and fun classroom setting.

· Classes are available virtually as well as in person.

Zoni is a melting pot of people from different national, cultural, and ethnic backgrounds. Zoni students, faculty and staff come from virtually every nation and culture in the world, enriching the whole community with their perspectives and experiences. We take pride in our success for over the past 30 years emerging as a leader in English language education.

Name: Science Oasis International School
Description:
Science Oasis International School: Shaping Tomorrow’s Leaders

At Science Oasis, we are dedicated to fostering an exceptional learning environment that empowers students to reach their full potential. Our commitment to academic excellence, innovative thinking, and global citizenship prepares students not only to succeed academically but also to lead with responsibility in an ever-changing world. Through our advanced educational programs and state-of-the-art facilities, we inspire curiosity, creativity, and critical thinking, helping our students to develop into visionary leaders and ethical contributors to society.

By nurturing a culture of continuous self-learning and personal growth, Science Oasis ensures that each student has the support and resources to thrive both academically and personally. Together, we are shaping the innovators and changemakers of tomorrow.

Name: DFA - Accredited German Institute
Description:
Since Nov.2012, DFA Institute has been offering German courses at a high level for those who want to master the German language. 
Our team comprises highly qualified and motivated Native & Native-like Teachers who guarantee first-class Education.

We have focused on using innovation in building the technical material and using the most up-to-date techniques in language teaching. 

Due to the demand and the quality we are providing, we decided to expand in Egypt besides our online classes and opened three more branches in different cities in Egypt, where we are managing more than 4500 Students every year.

In 2020, we started to follow the exams' international guidelines and communicate with German universities to get our certificate accredited.

in 2021, our certificate became accredited by one of the best universities in Germany " Goethe university in Frankfurt"
https://www.uni-frankfurt.de/65480053/Deutschkenntnisse
In Jan 2022, we communicated the same with Berlin University in Germany and we became accredited by the university 

in June 2022, we established a separate entity for the exams called "SET - Spracherwerb testen" which is fully responsible for the Exams for our Institutes' students and the external students as well... 

SET is an organization powered by DFA, but has separated examiners, separated rooms for exams " Internal and External" and separated exams versions

Name: Confidential
Description: Confidential Page

Name: BROADWAY INSTITUTE
Description:
Fondé en 2011  , nous sommes Broadway Institute un centre américain et centre d’examen d’examen Accrédité TOEFL . En effet , nous représentons plus de 1500 universités aux USA , UK , Canada et partout au monde .  Notre but est  de rendre facile l’apprentissage de l’anglais  .

Principalement, fondé sur la communication , nous avons opté pour une méthode d’enseignement innovante . Pendant que la méthode d’enseignement classique est sur  la théorie , la notre est plus sur la pratique . 
De ce fait , nous formons pour l’usage de l’anglais en toute circonstance .  Notre méthode consiste à apprendre en situation réelle.  Dans l’intention de rendre accessible à tous le fait  d’apprendre anglais . Ainsi , nous garantissons une expérience unique à nos étudiants dans la poursuite de leur rêve d’apprendre anglais

Name: Speak Up London
Description:
Speak Up London is an award-winning English school located on Oxford Street — right in the heart of London. Accredited by the British Council and trusted by students from 100+ nationalities, we’re proud to offer a truly international learning environment where language and culture come together.

With more than 500 active students, we provide a wide range of courses, including General English, IELTS, CAE, FCE, and Business English. Our experienced teachers are dedicated to helping you achieve your goals through personalised learning and engaging, interactive lessons.

We offer flexible timetables to fit your lifestyle and a variety of free speaking and communication classes to help you build confidence and truly Speak Up!

Conveniently located on Oxford Street, our school is surrounded by London’s best shopping, culture, and entertainment — making your study experience both educational and memorable.

Our reputation is built on student success and satisfaction. Many of our learners recommend Speak Up London to friends and colleagues — a testament to our supportive community and high-quality teaching.

Join our global community of learners, dreamers, and achievers in the heart of London.

Name: ILS - International Language School
Description:
ILS - LA SCUOLA DI LINGUE NEL CUORE DI MILANO - CORSI ONLINE e IN PRESENZA

Dal 1976 I.L.S. opera nel campo della formazione linguistica aziendale e per privati con oltre 60 docenti madrelingua selezionati in base alle qualifiche, alle specializzazioni professionali, all'esperienza nell'affrontare esigenze complesse e alla predisposizione a lavorare in team. I corsi di lingue europee, extra-europee e orientali sono rivolti a tutti coloro che vogliono incrementare le proprie capacità linguistiche in un contesto altamente comunicativo.
I.L.S. propone corsi individuali, corsi di gruppo e corsi d’italiano per stranieri, oltre ad offrire un servizio di preparazione a colloqui di lavoro in lingua.

Corsi di Formazione Aziendale
La Formazione aziendale continua è una prerogativa del successo complessivo delle performance aziendali.
I corsi di formazione aziendale di I.L.S. aiutano il team della tua azienda a consolidare le proprie competenze e a raggiungere gli obiettivi prefissati grazie all'analisi dei bisogni.
Il nostro istituto offre un servizio di consulenza per accedere ai corsi di Formazione Finanziata previsti dai Fondi Paritetici Interprofessionali, come ad esempio Fondir, FBA, FondImpresa, ForTe e altri. ILS è presente in Bacheca Fondir e nei portali di Welfare Aziendale. 
I.L.S. affianca le aziende nelle pratiche di accesso ai fondi e nell'organizzazione dei corsi di lingua. Nel caso l'azienda abbia già ottenuto un piano di formazione finanziata, I.L.S. può proporsi, senza alcun costo aggiuntivo, come attuatore certificato del progetto di formazione linguistica.

Centro Traduzioni e Interpretariato
I.L.S. offre un servizio di traduzione e interpretariato che si avvale di traduttori e interpreti professionisti, con una lunga esperienza nel settore, accreditati presso enti ufficiali e istituzioni di vari paesi. Lingue trattate: europee,  extra-europee ed orientali ( inglese, francese, tedesco, spagnolo, cinese, russo, arabo, portoghese, rumeno, ecc.)

Name: Alliance Française de Montréal
Description: L’Alliance Française de Montréal, organisme à but non lucratif et membre d’un réseau mondial de plus de 829 antennes, est une référence pour l’enseignement du français aux personnes non natives, souvent déjà plurilingues. Son offre de cours, structurée selon le Cadre Européen Commun de Référence pour les Langues (CECRL), s’adresse aux nouveaux arrivants, immigrants et résidents du Québec, avec des formations adaptées à tous les niveaux (de A1 à C2). Dispensés par des enseignants certifiés, ces cours sont disponibles en ligne et en présentiel, dans un cadre moderne et dynamique. Son centre d’examen agréé est un passage incontournable pour ceux qui souhaitent certifier leur maîtrise du français, grâce à des tests et diplômes reconnus internationalement tels que le TEF, le TCF et les diplômes DELF-DALF, utilisés pour des démarches académiques, professionnelles ou d’immigration.

Name: Alianza América
Description:
Desde 2015, Alianza viene revolucionando el aprendizaje del idioma inglés. 
A diferencia de las escuelas tradicionales y antes de la popularización de la enseñanza online, Alianza ya sabía que la modalidad de clases particulares a distancia sería la nueva realidad.
Con esa visión, el instituto se lanzó al mercado con una metodología propia orientada a lograr una mayor inmersión en el idioma, ofreciendo clases individuales y personalizadas,  contenidos prácticos, profesores particulares y cursada totalmente online.

Name: Tesk Training Consultancy
Description: Tesk Training Consultancy provides Soft Skills & Communications Training & English Language Coaching,

Name: The English Studio
Description:
The English Studio is an English language school located right in the heart of London. Our fantastic location in the buzzing British Museum district of the city centre gives our students the perfect platform to discover UK culture, see the sights and have a great student experience while improving their English. 

Our excellent range of courses have helped thousands of students from all over the world achieve fast results with our General English, Business English and IELTS exam preparation courses. As an accredited member of the British Accreditation Council (BAC), The English Studio provides a high quality and learner-centred experience, combining individual attention and professional tuition in a supportive environment.

We are proud to also provide integrated English and activity courses for young learners. Importantly, we want to provide courses at all levels from beginner to advanced. Our goal is always to help our students achieve their personal objectives. These can vary from securing a place at an excellent university or developing their career path.

Looking for a fun and effective way to learn English? Look no further than The English Studio. You will be guided by an experienced and expert team of teachers in classes which are dynamic and engaging with a focus on conversation practice that will help you feel confident speaking English in any situation. We are proud to have taught over 60,000 international students since 1997.



Why choose The English Studio? 

 We want your English language course with us to be a memorable and rewarding experience and a significant contribution to your future success. 

To help you achieve that we: 

 Focus on you as an individual, getting to know you and your learning goals 

 Offer a range of courses and activities designed to help you aim high and shape your own future 

 Promise great value for money with small groups, expert teachers and fast results

Name: Vamos Madrid | Spanish School
Description:
At Vamos Madrid, as a school accredited by the Instituto Cervantes and member of the FEDELE network of schools, we don't want to be just a Spanish language school for you, we want to be your companion in the exciting journey of learning our beautiful language. Beyond the lessons, you will immerse yourself in our culture, our customs and experience Spain in a unique way.

At Vamos Madrid, we not only offer language courses, but we will also help you plan your stay in Spain, from classes to accommodation, we will even be your tour guide! We will turn your Spanish learning into a life experience, where every word you learn will be a window into our rich culture.

If you are looking to immerse yourself in an immersive linguistic and cultural adventure, welcome to Vamos Madrid!

Name: École Québec
Description:
École Québec is a school specializing in teaching Quebec French to those who wish to work, study or immigrate to Quebec.

Founded in 2006 in Brazil, École Québec has created and adapted its "Objectif Québec" methodology for online teaching. Dynamic, intense and strongly focused on communication, Objectif Québec teaches the four fundamental aspects for your "Québec Project" to become a success: language, cultural aspects, shared values and social dynamics. 

As well as being a school, since 2006 we have become a Quebec community that has changed the lives of no less than 4,000 Latin Americans who have become Quebecers and gained Canadian citizenship.

Name: Konect Language Center
Description:
Konect Language Center nació tras una experiencia en donde un profesionista fue mal visto y como incompetente al no poder comunicarse en inglés, y al analizar el sistema y métodos de enseñanza convencional, nuestro fundador decidió crear un sistema especifico para lograr que nuestros estudiantes aprendan a hablar de la manera correcta en inglés.  

Hemos identificado cuales son los principales retos que enfrentan las personas al querer hablar en inglés tales como, falta de fluidez, mala pronunciación, no saben hacer una oración en inglés o no saben que estructura utilizar, no saben identificar auxiliares, falta de vocabulario, intentan traducir todo o simplemente no se tienen confianza al hablar. 

Basado en esto diseñamos un programa 100% conversacional enfocado en metas específicas de cada estudiante o empresa para que al final puedan utilizar esta gran herramienta y no solo poder entender. Nuestra misión como escuela es poder ayudar a la mayor cantidad de personas o empresas a lograr crecer y siempre poner el nombre de México en alto a través de sus personas. 

Con nuestro sistema hemos podido ayudar a empresas como GM, MAGNA, CUMMINS, Parque Industrial Logistik, entre muchas otras, así como a cientos de profesionistas. 

Nuestros cursos empresariales, grupales o personales cuentan con profesores nativos, horarios flexibles, clases activas y dinámicas, vocabulario específico, material técnico, en línea o dentro de sus instalaciones. 

Visita nuestra página www.konectlc.com y permítenos cumplir nuestra misión de ayudarte a lograr realmente dominar el inglés.
Location: San Luis Potosi , San Luis Potosi

Transforme a sua carreira com quem realmente entende sua realidade!

Name: Learn French with Stefan
Description:
Salut, les (futurs) francophones ! Ça va ? 

I am Stefan and I am a French teacher (with University Bachelor and Master degree in French as a Foreign Language, and a PhD student). I spent one year of my Master studies in France at University of Poitiers (France), where I got familiar with French culture. I have worked as a certified examiner for DELF/DALF since 2018. I work at Department of French language and literature at Faculty of Philosophy, University of Niš as a French teacher and a Research trainee.

Since 2020 I have been teaching French online as a freelancer.  

I am communicative and cheerful and we can discuss a lot of topics together in order to improve your French. Since 2013 I have gathered experiences teaching French to children (from 12 to 15), teenagers and adults in public schools in Hungary and Serbia, in private language schools, at University, by working with groups and individuals. In addition to my teaching experience, I am also a certified DELF/DALF examiner and I will be pleased to help you pass your DELF/DALF or other linguistic exams.

For the lessons I will create a personalized program depending on your specific needs and level of language. You can also choose topics for our lessons. I tend to adapt all the lessons to my student's needs. I often discuss with my students about future lessons. And according to their feedback I make some eventual changes.

We can work together to improve all your linguistic competences: Listening Comprehension, Reading Comprehension, Writing and Speaking, as well as Grammar and Pronunciation.

I am using exercises, authentic documents in French, press articles, coursebooks for French as a foreign language, podcasts, videos, quizzes and other tools for the lessons.

I am very flexible and reliable concerning schedule.

A first trial lesson with me is free and it lasts 30 minutes. During that lesson we can discuss your goals and how I can help you achieve them. 

À très bientôt !

Name: Meet Idiomas - Curso de Inglés Online
Description:
En Meet Idiomas, nos dedicamos a proporcionar experiencias de aprendizaje de Inglés Online de alta calidad para estudiantes de todas las edades y niveles de habilidad. Nuestra misión es hacer que el aprendizaje del inglés sea accesible, interactivo y gratificante para todos, brindando programas educativos innovadores y recursos didácticos de vanguardia.

Con un enfoque en la flexibilidad y la conveniencia, nuestros cursos de Inglés Online están diseñados para adaptarse a las agendas ocupadas y los estilos de vida diversos de nuestros estudiantes. Utilizando una combinación de clases en vivo, actividades interactivas y recursos multimediales, ofrecemos un ambiente de aprendizaje dinámico y envolvente que fomenta el progreso y la confianza en el idioma.

En Meet Idiomas, creemos en el poder de la comunidad y la colaboración para impulsar el éxito académico y personal. Nuestra plataforma no solo ofrece oportunidades para mejorar las habilidades lingüísticas, sino también para conectar con otros estudiantes, compartir experiencias y formar amistades duraderas. Unite a nosotros en nuestro viaje hacia el dominio del inglés y descubrí cómo podemos ayudarte a alcanzar tus metas de aprendizaje y crecimiento profesional.

Seguinos en LinkedIn para mantenerte al día con nuestras últimas noticias, eventos y recursos educativos. Esperamos verte pronto en Meet Idiomas!

Name: EasyEnglish. Online
Description:
Academia de Inglés On Line para Adultos de Habla Hispana.                                                                  
Horarios disponibles de Lunes a Domingo. 
Clases de Conversación para Todos los Niveles. 

¿Qué nos diferencia?
Enfoque en la Comunicación Real: En nuestras clases, priorizamos la comunicación efectiva porque estamos convencidos de que la única manera de mejorar el habla es practicándola. La escucha y el habla son habilidades que van de la mano; no solo es esencial aprender a expresarse, sino también entender al interlocutor para mantener una conversación fluida.
 Los estudiantes aprenden a comunicarse en situaciones de la vida real. Llevamos adelante una práctica constante para que puedan hablar y escuchar. Para esto, el vocabulario es muy importante y la gramática se debe explicar de forma clara y simple, pero no debe ser el foco principal.


Objetivos a medida: Cada clase está diseñada con un objetivo comunicativo específico.  Los estudiantes participan en actividades que simulan situaciones reales, como pedir comida en un restaurante, hacer una presentación en el trabajo o mantener una conversación telefónica. El material de clases debe ser lo más relevante posible, enfocado en los intereses y objetivos de cada alumno.


Interacción y Colaboración: Creamos un ambiente ameno, favorable y divertido donde el adulto se sienta cómodo y acompañado por su teacher. Esto permite que el adulto pueda desconectarse de los problemas cotidianos, facilitando así la concentración y la adquisición de los nuevos conocimientos.


Feedback y Retroalimentación: Celebramos cada logro. El refuerzo positivo es esencial para mantener alta la motivación, eliminar el miedo al error y fortalecer la confianza del adulto. El feedback constructivo guía a la mejora contínua.

Name: Teachera Dil Okulu
Description:
HAKKIMIZDA

TEACHERA Dil Okulu olarak, insanların hayatlarında varoluşsal bir öneme sahip olan eğitimin, ülkemizde uygulanmakta olan anlayışını temelden değiştirmek amacıyla 2016 yılında eğitim dünyasına adım attık. 

KİMİZ? 

Yenilikçi yaklaşımlarla dil eğitiminde yeni bir çağ açmayı hedefleyen Teachera Dil Okulu, Türkiye'deki eğitim sistemindeki hatalar ve yanlış uygulamaların tespiti için 6 yıl boyunca Ar-Ge çalışmaları yaptık. Bu çalışmalarımızda, minimum zaman, minimum maliyet ve maksimum performansı sağlayabilecek, dünya standartlarında bir dil eğitimi vermek için uygulanması gereken en iyi yöntemleri belirlemek ve eğitimcileri bu yöntemlere göre yetiştirmek konusunda yoğunlaştık.

NEDEN TEACHERA?

Dil eğitiminde sıkça yapılan hataları tespit ederek, eğitim sistemini ileriye taşıyacak bir anlayışla çalışmalarımızı sürdürdük. Eğitim görülen ortamdan, eğitimciye, eğitim tekniklerinden, eğitim sistemine, müfredattan, pratik uygulamalara kadar dil eğitimini ilgilendiren her unsuru ele aldık ve sürdürdüğümüz AR-GE sürecinin sonunda, özgün bir anlayış, müfredat, metod ve eğitim sistemiyle karşınızdayız.

* Öğretmen Eğitimleri ile Standardize Edilmiş Öğretmen Kalitesi	
* Hedeflerinize uygun optimize edilmiş müfredat
* Özelleştirilmiş eğitim sistemi

TEACHERA'nın yenilikçi yaklaşımlarla dolu özgün eğitim sistemi sayesinde İngilizce, İspanyolca, İtalyanca, Fransızca, Rusça, Almanca ve Arapça dillerinde 23 farklı özelleştirilmiş eğitim programımız bulunmaktadır.

140 yıldır dünyanın çeşitli yerlerinde, farklı öğrenci tiplerinde uygulanan metodların bir çoğunu denedik ve geliştirdiğimiz metodoloji bu tecrübelerin üzerine kurgulandı.
Hedefimiz, öğrencilerimizin hayatlarına değer katmak, dünya standartlarında bir dil eğitimi sunmak.

* 6 Yıl AR-GE
* 7 Farklı Dilde Eğitim
* 23 Özelleştirilmiş Eğitim Programı

Name: FugiCor, LLC d/b/a BetterPears
Description:
In the second book of his Confessions, St. Augustine of Hippo wrote:

Et ego furtum facere volui et feci nulla compulsus egestate nisi penuria et fastidio iustitiae et sagina iniquitatis. Nam id furatus sum, quod mihi abundabat et multo melius…(II, 4.9)

The context is an incident in his youth when in the company of boys given to wickedness, stole pears from a neighbor’s property. As an adult, indeed a Catholic bishop, St. Augustine reflects that he would not have committed this crime and sin if he had kept better company. It was not out of want or hunger that he stole, for at his nearby home he had better pears in abundance.

BetterPears was founded to offer better fruit for the human soul, the wisdom of our betters, in their original words, in the company of good friends.

Con sede en el centro de León, para los leoneses. 

Vita International Agent's es una empresa familiar que se centra totalmente en el futuro de los estudiantes españoles. Patricia es de León, y tras años en Reino Unido regresó a León en 2021 con su marido Remy, natural de Inglaterra, para cumplir sus sueños de dirigir su propio negocio en su ciudad natal.

Nuestra misión es sencilla: proporcionar a estudiantes y profesionales españoles las herramientas necesarias para dominar el inglés y conseguir sus sueños en España, Reino Unido y el resto del mundo. No trabajamos con cantidad, sino con calidad: cada verano trabajamos con grupos pequeños y nos aseguramos de que cada alumno tenga exactamente lo que necesita, y pase un verano que le cambiará la vida. Nuestra prioridad son nuestros clientes, con los que hemos creado esta, cada día más grande, Familia Vita, y nos esforzamos cada día por ofrecer a cada de sus miembros las opciones y oportunidades que necesita.

We specialise in practical, workplace-relevant programmes tailored to the real communication needs of your staff — from technical teams and customer service reps to senior executives presenting to stakeholders.

Whether your goal is to improve internal communication, support international talent, boost performance, or offer a meaningful perk to retain top talent — we deliver training that makes a measurable impact at work.

 What sets us apart:
- Role-specific, workplace-based English training

- CELTA-qualified (or equivalent) instructors with industry experience

Quite often, this involves short courses - or ongoing contracts - designed to equip a BP (British Petroleum) executive for an upcoming presentation, for example, or working with a marketing professional at the Shangri-La hotel in London to better understand the formal press releases she receives.

We partner closely with HR and L&D teams to design flexible, high-quality programmes that support professional development, retention, and global cohesion.

Name: InAcademy Education Centre
Description:
Benvenuti nella scuola dove l'eccellenza linguistica è di casa.

Siamo la scuola di lingue che ridefinisce il concetto di apprendimento linguistico, guidando il cambiamento e anticipando il futuro. La nostra missione è semplice ma audace: aiutarti a conquistare il mondo attraverso le lingue.

Cosa Offriamo:

 Apriamo le tue porte al Mondo: Impara l'inglese, lo spagnolo, l'hindi, il cingalese, il tedesco, l'italiano, il cinese e molte altre lingue chiave per sbloccare opportunità globali.

 Innovazione in Pratica: Abbracciamo la tecnologia e offriamo corsi interattivi, lezioni basate su giochi e apprendimento personalizzato per risultati tangibili.

 Partner per il Successo: Collaboriamo con aziende e professionisti per migliorare la comunicazione globale, sbloccando opportunità di lavoro e di business in tutto il mondo.

 Valori Che Contano: La qualità dell'istruzione e la diversità culturale sono al centro di tutto ciò che facciamo. La tua crescita personale e professionale è la nostra priorità.

 Esplora diverse culture: Imparare una lingua con noi è il primo passo per aprire la tua mente nuovi orizzonti. Scopri un mondo di opportunità e conoscenze a portata di mano.

Unisciti a noi nella creazione del tuo futuro globale. Siamo pronti a guidarti lungo il percorso che ti porterà verso nuovi orizzonti e opportunità. Scopri di più su come possiamo aiutarti a raggiungere il successo linguistico.

Name: International House Team Lingue Catania
Description:
Giga International House – Catania opera nel settore della didattica delle lingue straniere dal 1997 ed è riconosciuta dal Ministero dell’Istruzione con Presa d’Atto n. 2681/1 del 8/2/00. La nostra sede, recentemente ampliata, ristrutturata ed attrezzata secondo le più recenti metodologie didattiche, si trova nel centro storico e commerciale di Catania. 

Gli obiettivi di Giga International House sono la qualità dei servizi e la soddisfazione del cliente e per questo, nel 2000, la scuola si associa ad AISLi, Associazione Italiana Scuole di Lingue, che prevede rigide ispezioni amministrative e didattiche con cadenza triennale.

La scuola è Centro autorizzato per le certificazioni Cambridge English Assessment (IT207). Tutta la gamma d’esami Cambridge English possono essere sostenuti o in modalità Computer based o in modalità Paper based (per esami Young Learners per bambini solo paper based). I certificati Cambridge English sono riconosciuti per l’ammissione alla frequenza della maggior parte delle università straniere e sono validi ai fini dei crediti universitari. Nel 2010 è stata autorizzata Centro CELTA (Certificate in English Language Teaching to Adults), uno tra solo sette centri presenti in Italia.

Giga International House Catania è anche sede e centro di preparazione esami IELTS a Catania e centro monitorato dall’Università per Stranieri di Siena per l’organizzazione di corsi e esame DITALS di I e II livello (insegnamento della lingua italiana a studenti stranieri).

Name: Stevens English Training
Description: Stevens English Training ist die rein englische Sprachschule mit echtem britischem Flair. Mit mehr als 60 Mitarbeitern bieten wir ein umfangreiches Kursangebot: Voll fokussiert auf die englische Sprache und vermittelt von hochqualifizierten Sprachtrainern.

Name: elebe, Spanish school
Description:
elebe is "More than Spanish" but... why?
We are specialists: trained specialist teachers, from Spain and Latin America, help you to immerse yourself in the Spanish world. elebe has developed into the fair Spanish language school in Vienna that attaches importance to the entire Spanish language area.
We are pioneers: our e-learning platform, online since 2011, is constantly updated and improved. Thanks to virtual rooms, interactive games, and a whole team behind it looking after you, it's easy to learn Spanish where and when you have time. 
Our online courses via videoconferencing offer the highest quality, with a team experienced in online teaching and highly motivated to guide and support you towards your language goals. Best of all... virtually anyone with a computer can join! 
Face-to-face students benefit from state of the art classrooms with interactive whiteboards, internet access in the classroom and a teaching team that favours innovative learning methods. This ensures an interactive, media-rich and highly communicative experience. 
We are family-oriented: individual, personal attention and a feel-good atmosphere are a must for us. People are the focus and we pay attention to our quality standards, which we are constantly developing. Through small learning groups, from 4 to a maximum of 8 people, we always achieve the desired learning success.
We are solid: certificates for the Erasmus grant, courses for educational leave or with the AMS, elebe is registered as a recognised educational institution of the Ministry of Education for Adult Education. You can complete any level of learning with an internationally recognised certificate and thus improve your qualifications in the long term. 
We are unique: our creativity knows no limits, we always strive to offer individual solutions. If your desired course is not yet available with us, we will put it together for you.
We are already looking forward to meeting you!

Name: Wizard Viamão
Description:
A Wizard Viamão abriu suas portas em 2011 como uma das escolas pertencentes à maior rede de escolas de idiomas do mundo e líder em ensino de idiomas no Brasil. A empresa Wizard  tem 30 anos de história e, desde 2014, se tornou “Wizard by Pearson“.

Presente em mais de 70 países, +175 anos de história e com sede em Londres (Reino Unido), a empresa britânica Pearson tem a missão de transformar vidas ao fornecer aprendizagem de melhor qualidade e mais acessível.

Está em você a decisão de estudar na escola que faz parte da Pearson, maior empresa de educação do mundo, e que acredita que a educação abre oportunidades para melhores condições de vida e carreira profissional.

Aprenda em nossa escola!

Name: Panagiotopoulou Foreign Language Centre
Description: Φροντιστήριο ξένων γλωσσών Panagiotopoulou Foreign Languages. Διδάσκουμε αγγλικά, γαλλικά και γερμανικά όλων των επιπέδων με σύγχρονα τεχνολογικά μέσα (όπως διαδραστικούς πίνακες). Προετοιμάζουμε τους μαθητές μας για τα αναγνωρισμένα από τον ΑΣΕΠ πιστοποιητικά Cambridge- Michigan- ESB (Αγγλικών), Α1- 2 Delf- Sorbonne μέχρι επίπεδο C2 (Γαλλικά), Α1- C2 Goethe Institut & ÖSD (Γερμανικά). Επίσης, προετοιμάζουμε τους μαθητές μας για το ειδικό μάθημα (ξένες γλώσσες) για τις πανελλήνιες, καθώς και όσους από τους μικρούς μαθητές μας των αγγλικών θέλουν να συμμετάσχουν στις εξετάσεις, προσαρμοσμένες στην ηλικία τους (Α1- Α2) με βασικό κέρδος την εξοικείωσή τους με τις συνθήκες εξετάσεων των μεγαλύτερων αναγνωρισμένων επιπέδων (Β1 έως C2). Το παράρτημά μας βρίσκεται στην οδό Ανδρομέδας 14, Γέρακα (ακριβώς απέναντι από το νεόδμητο 7ο Δημοτικό σχολείο και το 6ο Νηπιαγωγείο Γέρακα).

Name: Stella Language School
Description:
Stella Language School (ステラランゲージスクール) is a small private English school located in North Osaka. We teach a wide range of age group, from preschool students to adults.
Our efforts are aimed towards promoting self-learning and developing our students' confidence and love for foreign languages.

Name: Uzbekistan State World Languages University
Description:
Uzbekistan State University of World Languages (abbreviated as UzSWLU, Uzbek: Oʻzbekiston davlat Jahon Tillari Universiteti; abbreviated as OʻzDJTU) is a public university located in Tashkent, Uzbekistan. Islam Karimov established this university by merging two language institutions in 1992.
The University is organised into 8 faculties: Roman & German Philology, Journalism, Translation Studies, Russian Philology and three English faculties, English Philology faculty and offers bachelor, master degrees in language-related fields.

It has also the main national responsibility for training and requalification ESL teachers, creating and updating language textbooks, teaching methods, strategies in Uzbekistan. In addition to that, the University also maintains its own printing service and coordinates the Centre for Development of Language Teaching Methods.

History
Tashkent Pedagogical Institute of Foreign Languages, established in 1949.
Russian Language and Literature Institute, established in 1963.
In 2007, the University established a lyceum that prepares middle school students to enter the University and also teaches language and humanitarian subjects in depth. Prior to this 2017, the University contained three lyceums, but with the introduction of an eleven-year educational school, this number was reduced to one. This lyceum is located on Bobur Street in Tashkent.

Faculties
UzSWLU mainly focuses on language-related fields and it's divided into 7 faculties. The faculties are listed as follows:

First English language faculty
Second English language faculty
Third English language faculty
Roman and German Philology
Russian Philology
Translation Studies
International Journalism
English Philology faculty

The University has three English faculties but they cover different fields, for example, the first faculty is aimed at training interpreters.

Name: Alive & Speaking
Description: We provide high-level language training to companies and individuals in Barcelona, Madrid, Valencia, Bilbao and Málaga. Our courses are totally tailor made and subsidized through La Fundación Tripartita. Our mission is that when a company or a person needs to learn or perfect languages, the first company they think of is Alive & Speaking.

Name: New Camp Learning Center
Description:
NewCamp Learning Centre, basé à Rabat, est un centre spécialisé dans la formation linguistique et le développement des compétences professionnelles. 

Nous proposons des solutions adaptées pour :

Entreprises : Programmes sur mesure en langues et en formation continue pour développer des équipes performantes dans un contexte globalisé.

Particuliers : Cours pour tous les âges (enfants, adolescents, adultes), préparation aux certifications internationales, et accompagnement personnalisé pour atteindre vos objectifs académiques ou professionnels.

Name: Estude Idiomas
Description: Escola online de francês, inglês, alemão e espanhol.

Name: Studio stranih jezika ELA - Centre for foreign languages ELA
Description:
A language centre with 30 years of successful work, providing language courses and translation services. Our language courses are available in English, Italian, German, French, Russian and Serbian, and can be taken in individual or group settings, either in a classroom or online. We also offer courses for companies, tailored to meet their specific needs.

Our courses prepare students for a variety of international exams, including Cambridge, TOEFL, IELTS, Goethe, CELI, CILS and DELF. We work closely with our students to ensure they are fully prepared for their exams, and our program can be customized to suit the individual needs of each client.

In addition to our language courses, we also offer a range of translation services, including translations for all languages, court translators, and translation of all types of documents and textual files. We also provide simultaneous translations for conferences, seminars and other events.

At Centre for foreign languages ELA, we pride ourselves on providing high-quality language education and translation services. With three decades of experience, we have established ourselves as a trusted provider of language solutions. 

Thank you for considering us for your language needs!

Name: LAIFARI
Description: Som una cooperativa LAIFARI SCCL, LSC en acció amb projectes dedicades a la inclusió de les persones sordes signants de la LSC en la vida cotidiana, per exemple: la qualitat de la LSC, formació, difusió, sensibilització... // Somos una cooperativa LAIFARI sscl, LSC en acción con proyectos dedicados a la inclusión de las personas sordas signantes de la LSC en la vida cotidiana, por ejemplo: la calidad de la LSC, formación, difusión, sensibilización...

Name: iei - inovar | educar | inspirar
Description:
Our live online Portuguese classes for kids are designed specifically for expatriate families who want to give their children the tools to improve integration, develop a positive relationship with the language, and learn about the history and culture of Portugal.
Our online courses for children offer a unique and individualized learning experience, marked by a positive relationship with the Portuguese language. We understand the importance of connection and interaction, which is why our live online classes bring together children, parents, and teachers in a way that creates a sense of community and belonging. Our classes are taught by experienced and qualified teachers who are passionate about education and dedicated to provide an enjoyable and interactive learning experience for children.

Name: Servus Mundo!
Description: Egal ob bei der Arbeit, im Urlaub oder neu in einem Land, Sprachkenntnisse machen das Leben leichter, reicher und bunter. Bei uns lernst Du nicht nur Theorie, sondern auch eine neue Kultur kennen, lieben und verstehen.

Name: The Legal English Hub
Description:
We were founded to provide the immersive legal English training you truly need. Unlike most legal English courses—which offer a broad but superficial overview of different areas of law—our team’s expertise and personalized approach create a learning experience focused on topics that actually matter in your daily professional life. We blend practical simulations, authentic materials, and ongoing feedback to accelerate your learning and deliver real results.

It's Not Just English. It's Legal English.

Fluency in English alone isn’t enough to navigate the international legal landscape with confidence. The real advantage comes from mastering technical vocabulary, precise terminology, and the structures used by legal professionals around the world.

If you want to stand out in the global corporate market, you need strong legal English skills to negotiate contracts, draft documents, and communicate strategically with international clients and colleagues. Our personalized mentorship program is designed to meet your specific needs, providing dynamic, practical learning tailored to the real challenges of corporate law.

Name: Ceyren
Description: Somos líderes en la enseñanza online del inglés, ofreciendo soluciones personalizadas para todos los públicos. Nuestro innovador método, respaldado por más de 10 años de experiencia de nuestros profesores nativos, combina repetición, asociación de imágenes y sonidos, y práctica comunicativa para garantizar un aprendizaje efectivo. En Ceyren, te ayudamos a perfeccionar tus habilidades lingüísticas y alcanzar la certificación que necesitas para destacar en un mundo globalizado.

Name: Italienisch Online Lernen
Description:
Mit Francesca und ihrem Team lernst Du Italienisch auf effiziente und unterhaltsame Art und Weise. Ob alt oder jung, mit oder ohne Vorkenntnisse – wir haben das passende Angebot für Dich!

Online-Sprachkurse: Flexibel und individuell, für Einzelpersonen oder Gruppen. Perfekt, um die italienische Sprache bequem von zu Hause aus zu lernen.

Sprachreisen nach Italien: Tauche ein in die italienische Kultur und Sprache vor Ort. Erlebe Italien authentisch und verbessere gleichzeitig Deine Sprachkenntnisse.

Täglicher Newsletter: Erhalte täglich neue Lektionen und Tipps zum Italienisch lernen direkt in Deinem Postfach. So bleibst Du immer am Ball!

Videokurs: Lerne Italienisch in Deinem eigenen Tempo mit unserem umfassenden Videokurs. Ideal für selbstständiges Lernen, wann und wo Du möchtest.

Lass Dich von unserer Leidenschaft für die italienische Sprache anstecken und entdecke mit uns die Schönheit Italiens!

Name: talktips.tv
Description:
Talktips transforms the way you speak English as a professional.   

Meetings, job interviews, coffee breaks, networking, presentations, client dinners, conferences – wherever it's happening, it's happening in English! So let's get ready. 

Talktips gives communication tools to shape the conversation and make a real impact in English. 

How, exactly? 

FOR TEAMS 
•	Hands-on Workshops 
•	High-impact Trainings

FOR INDIVIDUALS 
•	Online Courses 
•	One-to-one Sessions 

Expect practical tools and strategies; expect to laugh (possibly about your boss); but most importantly: expect to communicate in English with easy confidence and pure professionalism. 

Ready for action? Contact Talktips here, or check out the website to get involved.

Name: Sign2Go Ltd.
Description:
Sign2Go Ltd. provides British Sign Language Level 1 and Level 2 courses with certificates issued upon completion, for all ages. Furthermore, we provide training to organisations on Deaf Awareness which is a part of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI).
Teaching BSL can be provided either online or face-to-face.
We provide consultation to business looking to drive towards diversity, equity, and inclusivity into daily practices with a focus on raising deaf awareness through integrated training and workshops.
If you want to know further information, please email farah@sign2go.co.uk

Name: Bolder Language
Description:
A BOLDER é uma escola de inglês estabelecida nos Estados Unidos, criada para brasileiros que cresceram profissionalmente, mas sentem que o inglês não acompanhou essa evolução.

Você já ocupa uma posição de liderança. Toma decisões. Fecha contratos. Mas quando o inglês entra em cena, a segurança some e a sua autoridade não se traduz.

A BOLDER existe pra corrigir esse descompasso.

Através da metodologia exclusiva F.R.E.E.D., desenvolvemos a fluência funcional, a presença internacional e a confiança de profissionais que precisam se expressar com clareza em reuniões, apresentações e negociações.

Tudo 100% online, com professores que vivem fora do Brasil, respiram o business e sabem o que significa performar em inglês no mundo real.

Nossos alunos são empreendedores, engenheiros, executivos e profissionais de alto desempenho. Eles não querem "aprender inglês". Eles querem se posicionar com autoridade no mercado global.

Executive English. Global presence. Real results.

Name: LangOpp
Description: We offer online and in-person courses for businesses and individuals, along with a digital platform dedicated to personalized support in learning French, English, and Spanish as a second language. We firmly believe that the path to mastering these languages should be as enriching as it is rewarding, and we offer a unique approach focused on immediate communication, adaptability, tangible progress, and guidance. The ideal path to learn a new language in an effective and fun way!

Name: Mastery International School
Description: Mastery International School Riyadh Mastery International Schools Saudi Arabia is an extension of your home, where your little ones feel loved, inspired, and confident as they take their first steps into the world.

Name: ISLV - Institut Supérieur des Langues Vivantes, ULiège
Description:
L'ISLV est chargé d'étudier et de mettre en œuvre la politique générale à suivre en matière de formation en langues des étudiants non-linguistes de l'ULiège, ainsi que des personnels académique, scientifique, et PATO.

Ces cours de langues sont donnés en journée et en soirée, sur le campus du centre-ville et au Sart Tilman, pendant l'année académique et pendant l'été.

Name: Your English with Anna
Description:
At 'Your English With Anna', we are dedicated to providing a holistic language learning experience through our diverse range of products and services. Our interactive online courses are meticulously crafted to cater to learners at every stage of their language journey, from beginners to advanced. Our personalized tutoring sessions offer one-on-one guidance, tailored to your unique learning style and goals.

In addition to courses and tutoring, we offer a treasure trove of engaging language resources including articles, videos, quizzes, and exercises, all designed to make learning both informative and enjoyable. Whether you're aiming to enhance your business communication, academic writing, or conversational skills, we have resources to suit your needs.

Our platform thrives on fostering a sense of community, where learners can interact, share insights, and learn collaboratively. We are dedicated to equipping you with the linguistic tools you need for success, be it in your career, academics, or daily life. Join us at 'Your English With Anna' and embark on a journey towards fluency, confidence, and cross-cultural communication.

Name: Casa da Cultura do Brasil no Canadá
Dutch & Drinks
Description: Certified Dutch Teacher - NT2 professional - in company training - private dutch classes - TIB/TOB - inburgering - owner

Name: Coffee Talk
Description:
Introducing Coffee Talk, the first speaking club in the Balkans. As a digital personal assistant, it empowers you to boost your confidence in speaking English in just 15 minutes a day.

Our team of top-notch teachers will help you overcome your anxiety, gain confidence, speak English fluently, improve your proficiency, overcome your struggles with public speaking, and open new doors to a world without fear.

Meet Nina, the visionary founder behind Coffee Talk. With a mastery of philology and expertise in French, Spanish, and Latin, she embarked on this amazing venture after noticing something interesting - her students seeking conversation classes in English (who likes Latin, right?). For more than a decade, Nina has been a dedicated language educator, refining her skills in various countries like Serbia, Croatia, Romania, France, and Vietnam - an invaluable journey that has shaped her both personally and professionally.

While in Vietnam, Nina realized a game-changing lesson: It doesn't matter how many grammar rules you know; what truly matters is the amount of confidence you possess.

Coffee Talk's unique approach to language learning through voice messages sent at any time and homework tracking helps you improve your overall speaking abilities with personalized feedback and guided support from human teachers. 

In just two years, Coffee Talk has achieved significant success, with 2000+ students benefiting from personalized feedback and guidance, a 40k-strong social media community, and 100+ free speaking workshops conducted so far. Its biggest success to date has been positively impacting the lives of individuals worldwide, helping them improve their personal and professional skills and gain confidence in various situations. 

Coffee Talk is a global brand that unites English learners over coffee - even if it's just for five minutes a day. It goes beyond being a simple tool; it's a community that cultivates values, friendships, and self-confidence.

Name: Oxford College Mita Rende
Description:
L’Oxford College Mita è una scuola di lingue ad alta formazione presente su tutto il territorio nazionale. Le sue numerose sedi vantano la presenza di docenti madrelingua / bilingua altamente specializzati. La sede di Rende (CS) propone un’offerta didattica ricca di corsi per tantissime lingue straniere.

La nostra esperienza didattica si fonda sul metodo N.E.C.M. (New English Communicative Method), un’innovativa metodologia d’insegnamento incentrata sulla comunicazione che consente un rapido e completo percorso di approfondimento.
N.E.C.M. è un metodo inquadrabile nella didattica moderna che punta alla conversazione come primo e necessario approccio con le lingue straniere per passare, solo in seguito, ad un’analisi grammaticale e sintattica delle nozioni acquisite.

Partendo dai sei livelli linguistici stabiliti dal Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR), l’Oxford College Mita ha la possibilità di rilasciare le più importanti certificazioni linguistiche del panorama internazionale.

L’Oxford College Mita, inoltre, ha riscosso un grande successo sul territorio di Rende soprattutto grazie al suo rapporto qualità/prezzo. L’ampia offerta didattica viene proposta a prezzi imbattibili sul mercato e con promozioni dinamiche e convenienti. Prendendo un appuntamento con la direzione sarà possibile avere una consulenza informativa per cercare il corso più adatto alle proprie esigenze. Un’ampia flessibilità negli orari permette a chiunque di poter seguire i corsi senza troppi problemi d’organizzazione.

Name: Communication Academy Community
Description:
About Us:

Communication Academy is a specialized company offering language programs, human development pathways, and business-oriented courses. Since our establishment in 2016, we have been dedicated to fostering personal, professional, and communal growth.

We provide a wide range of:

1- Language courses tailored to diverse needs.
2- Human development programs focused on personal and professional growth.
3- Business-oriented training for skill enhancement in professional settings.

Our Vision:

We believe in a holistic approach to education, combining personal, educational, and community development. Our instructors focus on unlocking individual potential and exploring how personal growth can positively impact communities. By sharing knowledge, experience, and a global perspective, we aim to inspire and support learners to thrive in their educational journeys.

Our Mission:

We empower individuals to make informed choices about their education through interactive, science-based programs. Our comprehensive language and human development courses go beyond skills—they cultivate a global perspective, foster critical thinking, and nurture positive habits. Our goal is to help every learner reach their full potential and create a lasting positive impact on their lives and communities.

Name: Kassi General & Business English
Description:
Aqui, na Kassi General and Business English, somos especializados em capacitar pessoas, profissionais e empresas a se comunicarem em Inglês com confiança, seja no cotidiano ou no ambiente global de negócios. 

Oferecemos aulas personalizadas que atendem tanto às necessidades do Inglês geral quanto para o mundo corporativo.

DIFERENCIAIS
•Excelência: Nosso compromisso é com o desenvolvimento de cada aluno, através da seleção de professores certificados, programas de ensino detalhados com base em metodologias reconhecidas mundialmente.

•Exclusividade: Cada programa é personalizado, garantindo que as aulas atendam às metas individuais ou corporativas, maximizando o aprendizado e a fluência em contextos específicos do dia a dia ou do mercado de trabalho.

•Relevância: Capacitamos nossos alunos com habilidades práticas e aplicáveis ao mundo dos negócios, como a realização de negociações, reuniões internacionais, e-mails corporativos e apresentações, entre outros.

•Foco: Desenvolvemos competências linguísticas com resultados consistentes e mensuráveis, assegurando que nossos alunos e empresas atinjam seus objetivos de comunicação e negócios.

•Metodologia: Nossos programas de ensino são customizados e aliados ao uso de tecnologias educacionais, garantindo um aprendizado adaptado às necessidades de cada aluno ou empresa.

PARA PROFISSIONAIS E EMPRESAS
Oferecemos programas sob medida para empresas, começando com um diagnóstico detalhado da proficiência dos colaboradores em Inglês. A partir disso, implantamos um plano de ensino detalhado e focado nas exigências do ambiente corporativo, com acompanhamento contínuo para garantir o desenvolvimento das competências necessárias para uma comunicação eficiente nos negócios.

NOSSO COMPROMISSO
Oferecer excelência no ensino de Inglês para que nossos alunos dominem o idioma e tenham sucesso em seus desafios pessoais e profissionais no cenário global.

Name: Greenwich Schools
Description:
O Greenwich Schools foi fundado em 1973, com o objetivo de se tornar um Centro de Ensino de Língua Inglesa e outros idiomas para crianças, jovens e adultos, de prática moderna e diferenciada.

O Greenwich é uma ANYWHERE SCHOOL, ou seja, você pode estudar inglês, espanhol e outros idiomas em nossas unidades, em casa, na sua empresa ou ANYWHERE!

Name: Polyhop
Description:
1. Company Overview  
We’re Polyhop, an online language platform dedicated to helping the world speak new languages with confidence. Launched in Switzerland in 2021 as a sub-brand of Rootalky GmbH, Polyhop has been supporting over 10K French learners as well as a diverse global community studying various languages. Our mission is simple: to transform curious learners into confident speakers by offering convenient, personalized online courses and nurturing motivation through genuine human care.

In our live, face-to-face virtual classrooms, you’ll practice real-life conversations and receive immediate, tailored feedback from qualified tutors. Every lesson is carefully designed to help you progress at a pace that suits your goals. Whether you’re aiming to refine your professional skills or simply engage in casual conversations, our approach ensures you move from learning a language to truly living it—all from the comfort of home.

2. Services  (B2C & B2B)
1:1 Live Lessons: Personalized speaking practice with expert native tutors
B2B Solutions: Large-scale learning management, curriculum customization, and data monitoring for corporations or educational institutions
Tutor/Admin Portal: Efficiently manages class schedules, content, and student progress

3. Job Openings 
We are actively recruiting German, French, Korean, and English instructors. If you have native-level (or equivalent) language proficiency and experience in online teaching, please feel free to get in touch!

Why Join Us? 
•100% Remote Work: A flexible environment ideal for remote-based work
•Focus on Collaboration & Skill Development: We encourage continuous learning and professional growth
•Global EdTech Leadership: An opportunity to help learners worldwide and be part of a leading force in global EdTech

For detailed job postings and application information, please visit our official website at https://poly-hop.com/hiring.

Name: ULTF: The University Language Task Force
Description:
The University Language Task Force is your key to learning and using languages in the way that you need them.

The ULTF will connect you with your own personal guru. All of our teachers are professional instructors, writers, translators, professors, and business executives, and have the knowledge and experience that you will need – not only to learn the language but to learn only what you will need most!

Not only that, but our SPECIALIZED LANGUAGE SERVICES can help you with your term papers, essays, and theses in any of the languages we offer!

Many schools are happy to fit everyone into a mold and get the same result out of a hundred different students. That is not what we do. 

Our courses are always made to suit your precise needs so no time or money is wasted on any kind of corporate-imposed curriculum. 

We will help you get the language knowledge you need with a human voice – we do not rely on AI or any robotic sources. 

We offer conversation practice, grammar tutoring, and writing assistance in such classes as: 

•	Language for interviews
•	Business writing and meeting conversation
•	CVs and LinkedIn pages
•	Field-specific jargon: Medical, Legal, Tourism, Cooking, etc. 
•	Writing for term papers
•	Research Assistance 
•	Discreet Ghostwriting 

Ready to level up? Message us today!

Name: David's Methods
Description:
David's Methods powstało z myślą o pokazywaniu każdemu jak można łączyć praktykę angielskiego z samorozwojem.

Kiedy ostatni raz pisałeś swoje myśli po angielsku?

Kiedy robiłeś plan na 2-3 miesiące swoich celów po angielsku?

To nasze autorskie podejście dla osób z ambicjami wykraczającymi poza Polskę.

Biznesom szkolimy prezesów i zespoły.

Młodzież przygotowujemy do myślenia i działania globalnie.

Wyraź się po angielsku i otwórz się na świat.

Name: Klaster* Language and Communication Hub
Description: At Klaster*, we offer language and communication training that gets results – from stronger personal relationships to faster business growth. Our ultimate mission? To break down communication barriers in the workplace and beyond so both students and the wider businesses can thrive.

Name: Fisk Venda Nova
Description:
Uma das maiores redes de ensino do mundo, tem que ter também uma das histórias mais marcantes do mundo.  Há 60 anos nos dedicando ao ensino de idiomas e sendo referência no segmento.
A Fisk vem se destacando como o melhor centro de ensino do Brasil, com cursos dinâmicos, professores atualizados e método de ensino moderno e inovador, além de toda a estrutura de apoio aos alunos e franqueados. 
Atualmente possui cerca de 1.000 unidades em funcionamento espalhadas por todos os estados e pelas principais cidades brasileiras, além de unidades em Angola, Argentina, Japão, Paraguai e Bolívia. 

Nossa unidade localizada em Venda Nova, mantém a  entrega do ensino de qualidade, ajudando você a realizar o sonho de ser fluente em um novo idioma.
Nesses 11 anos de História, ja fizemos parte da vida de +300 alunos, e queremos que você também faça parte dessa família.  

Qual o seu objetivo HOJE?

Name: Fortify Idiomas
Description:
Nossa família desenvolveu um método de estudo para aprendizado de inglês de forma muito prática e rápida. Estamos trabalhando, formando alunos e aprimorando esse método há mais de 25 anos e agora ele é  aplicado de forma online com consistência e praticidade.
