Description:
At BeLingual, we believe that learning is a lifelong journey of growth and discovery. 

We are an online Language education provider UK based that offers practical and interactive programs to develop transferable soft and linguistic skills. Our mission is to provide a first-class education to help individuals and organisations integrate into the globalised world. 

We understand that learning a Language can be daunting, but our approach is focused on building confidence, providing support, and fostering growth. Our team of experts is dedicated to creating engaging and effective learning experiences that cater to the unique needs of our diverse learners.

Whether you're an individual seeking to enhance your skills or a company looking to develop your workforce, BeLingual has the tools and resources to help you succeed. We're passionate about making Language education accessible to everyone because we believe that learning can transform lives and communities for the better.

Join us on this exciting journey of learning and growth, and let's create a world where everyone has the opportunity to reach their full potential.

Description:
Welcome to our LinkedIn page! We are a premier private language school headquartered in the vibrant city of Wrocław, Poland. Since our establishment in March 2019, we have been dedicated to providing top-notch language training services to both corporate clients and individuals.

At our language school, we specialize in equipping company staff with the necessary language skills to excel in today's global business environment. We understand that effective communication plays a crucial role in achieving success, which is why we tailor our training programs to match the specific needs of each company and their respective market sector. Our goal is to empower professionals with the linguistic tools required to thrive in their industry.

In addition to corporate training, we also cater to individual clients, teenagers, and children. We believe that language learning should be a personalized and enjoyable experience for everyone. That's why we take a customized approach, adapting our teaching methods to suit the unique requirements and learning styles of each client and student. 

One of our key strengths is our periodic assessment of progress and reporting. We firmly believe in tracking our students' advancement and providing transparent feedback to ensure continuous improvement. By regularly evaluating their language skills, we help our clients and students stay motivated and achieve their language proficiency goals.

We take great pride in the quality of education we deliver, backed by a team of highly qualified language instructors who possess extensive experience in their respective fields. We constantly stay updated with the latest teaching methodologies and resources to provide the most effective and up-to-date training.

If you're looking to enhance your company's or personal language capabilities, come  connect with us,  unlock your linguistic potential and embark on a rewarding  language learning journey together.

Nossos professores altamente qualificados estão dedicados a ajudá-lo a dominar novos idiomas, enriquecer sua compreensão cultural e prepará-lo para o mundo globalizado de hoje.

O que nos diferencia? Além de oferecermos cursos envolventes e interativos, somos orgulhosamente credenciados pelo TOEIC, a referência internacional em certificação de proficiência em inglês. Nossa abordagem centrada no aluno, combinada com o reconhecimento global do TOEIC, garante que nossos alunos alcancem suas metas linguísticas e profissionais com sucesso.

Na Seidmann Institute, não apenas ensinamos idiomas; cultivamos conexões interculturais, promovemos a comunicação eficaz e capacitamos indivíduos para prosperar em ambientes multiculturais. Junte-se a nós para uma jornada educacional que transformará suas habilidades linguísticas e abrirá portas para oportunidades globais. Vamos juntos construir um futuro onde as fronteiras linguísticas se desvanecem e a comunicação transcende barreiras. #EducaçãoGlobal #CulturaEIdiomas #TOEICCertified #ExcelênciaEducativa

Description:
A American Ways evoluiu e a marca passa agora se chamar CRIS VIEIRA.
Essa transição reflete nosso crescimento e a essência do trabalho que realizamos: uma abordagem humana, próxima e construída por alguém que vive em um contexto multicultural — assim como muitos dos nossos alunos.
A proposta permanece a mesma, mas com um posicionamento mais claro: transformar como brasileiros, e agora também falantes de espanhol, se relacionam com o inglês — com autenticidade, confiança e sem perder a própria identidade.
Este perfil permanecerá ativo como parte da nossa história, mas não será mais atualizado.

Name: Kiswahili Simplified
Description:
Opening Doors to Kiswahili Learners and Teachers. 

Kiswahili Simplified provides engaging resources to make learning Kiswahili a meaningful experience for people everywhere. Our materials are thoughtfully designed to support learners at every stage, from beginners to advanced speakers, with a focus on practical language skills and a deep appreciation of Kiswahili culture.

Explore over 30 episodes of engaging Kiswahili audio and animated content now available on our official YouTube channel. We are also developing an innovative language-learning app that makes mastering Kiswahili both fun and accessible. The app combines animations, comics, and audio stories with interactive games and VR tools to create immersive learning experiences. Strengthen your language skills while deepening your cultural understanding!

We collaborate with leading universities that teach Kiswahili to ensure our content meets high academic standards and suits a variety of learning needs.

Our vision is to connect and inspire a global community of Kiswahili learners and speakers. By working alongside educators, linguists, tourism experts, and cultural specialists, we create materials that not only build fluency but also offer a window into the rich traditions and stories behind the language.

For organizations, educators and tourism experts, partnering with us offers a chance to contribute to a growing international network dedicated to expanding Kiswahili education and cultural exchange worldwide.

Name: Challenge Language Center
Description:
At Challenge Language Center, our vision is to empower individuals with the linguistic skills necessary for professional success, particularly in English and French. We recognize the critical role language proficiency plays in opening doors to employment opportunities, both locally and globally.
In a world that is increasingly interconnected, proficiency in English and French is a valuable asset. These languages serve as bridges to communication, collaboration, and understanding across borders. Mauritania, with its unique cultural landscape and growing economic ties, stands to benefit significantly from a population equipped with the ability to engage effectively in these global languages.
In Mauritania, where job markets are evolving and diversifying, linguistic proficiency is increasingly becoming a key factor in employability. Our vision is to address this need directly by providing high-quality language education that aligns with the demands of the contemporary job market. We aspire to be a catalyst for economic growth by producing a generation of individuals who are not only linguistically skilled but also well-prepared to navigate the complexities of the professional world.
Furthermore, we recognize that the acquisition of language skills is a lifelong journey. Therefore, our vision extends to creating a supportive and continuous learning environment. We envision a community where learners of all ages can access resources, guidance, and opportunities for skill enhancement, ensuring that their language proficiency remains relevant and up-to-date throughout their careers.
As we work towards this vision, we embrace innovation in teaching methodologies and stay abreast of advancements in language education. We aim to leverage technology and interactive learning approaches to make the language acquisition process engaging, effective, and tailored to the needs of our diverse student body.

Name: Eduguru Language Centre
Description:
Located in the heart of Ho Chi Minh City, our language centre specializes in English education with a strong focus on Phonics, IELTS preparation, and public speaking through debate. We are committed to helping students of all ages build a solid foundation in English, whether just starting out or preparing for international exams and academic success.

Our dynamic team of experienced native and Vietnamese teachers brings a balanced and effective approach to language instruction. We combine international teaching standards with local understanding to create a supportive, engaging, and results-driven learning environment.

We currently offer flexible online classes and are expanding our in-person learning options to better serve our growing community of learners. Whether online or offline, our goal is to develop confident, articulate English speakers ready to excel in school, work, and beyond.

Name: Literary And Publications Society (LPS - NEDUET)
Description: Literary & Publication Society (LPS) is one of the ten student-led societies functioning under the Department of Students' Affairs (DSA) at NED University of Engineering and Technology. LPS is an official platform that aims at promoting and encouraging literary and intellectual activities such as reading, writing and performing arts by providing avenues to students to channel their creativity. LPS is currently functional with its three wings including the publications wing, theatre wing and Newspaper wing. It also provides a window through which NEDians and the rest of the world can stay up to date with the happenings at NED. LPS achieves the above objective through its popular publication; NEDian Newspaper, NED's official campus newspaper.

Traduções e interpretações francês<>português;
Programação cultural francófona e angolana.

Em Luanda desde 1969, a Alliance Française de Luanda é uma associação franco-angolana de direito local com fins não lucrativos. Assume três missões numa perspectiva pedagógica bem como cultural:

1 - Ensinar a língua francesa
A Alliance Française de Luanda empenha-se para satisfazer a forte procura de língua francesa exprimida pela população e atender as exigências das empresas e das instituições com as quais está relacionada. Aulas de português e de kimbundu estão também propostas para quem quiser aprender ou aperfeiçoar-se em português e numa das línguas nacionais.

2 - Promover a cultura francesa e as culturas francófonas
Através da mediateca e da nossa programação cultural diversificada, a Alliance Française de Luanda visa incentivar as artes e as culturas do espaço francófono.

3 - Fomentar a diversidade cultural
A missão de cooperação cultural da Alliance Française de Luanda visa valorizar a cultura angolana e o diálogo intercultural, nomeadamente com o apoio à criação. Cada ano, acompanhamos os projectos de artistas nacionais com acções de promoção e apoio técnico à producção.

Name: Polyglot Minds
Description:
Welcome to Polyglot Minds!

Founded in 2017 by Dani Sa, a passionate and experienced polyglot, our language school offers personalized and effective online courses following the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR), covering levels from A1 to C2. Dani, who graduated in Performing Arts from UNICAMP, developed the innovative PONTO Method, based on self-taught learning, and speaks nine languages: Portuguese, English, Italian, Spanish, French, German, Swahili, Mandinka and Arabic.

At Polyglot Minds, we believe that fluency in multiple languages is achievable for everyone, provided there is motivation and an effective method. Our mission is to provide high-quality language education, breaking international barriers and expanding our students' cultural horizons. We offer English, Italian, Spanish, French, German, Arabic, Swahili, Mandinka and Portuguese courses, all held online via Zoom and Google Drive, ensuring flexibility and convenience.

Our team of teachers is carefully selected and trained in the PONTO Method. Everyone has international experience, bringing a rich cultural experience to classes. Want to know more about Polyglot Minds and our courses?

Name: NUEVO LANGUES
Description:
Chez Nuevo Langues, nous croyons qu’apprendre une langue, c’est bien plus qu’acquérir des mots : c’est franchir une étape décisive vers de nouvelles opportunités.

Depuis 2012, nous accompagnons adultes, salariés, particuliers et entreprises dans leurs projets linguistiques. Chaque apprenant arrive avec une histoire : un salarié qui veut évoluer vers un poste international, une entreprise qui souhaite renforcer la communication de ses équipes, un particulier désireux de voyager autrement. Notre rôle est simple : transformer ces ambitions en réussites.

 Notre offre

Formations sur mesure en anglais, français (FLE), espagnol, italien, allemand, arabe, chinois…

Formats adaptés : présentiel, distanciel, blended learning.

Programmes ciblés : communication quotidienne, vocabulaire métier, préparation aux examens, certifications.

 Notre différence
Contrairement à une approche « standard », nous privilégions :

 Un accompagnement personnalisé, pensé autour du rythme et des objectifs de chacun ;

 Une pédagogie active, orientée pratique et mise en confiance ;

 Une équipe de formateurs expérimentés, engagés dans la réussite de leurs apprenants.

 Nos résultats parlent d’eux-mêmes :

+19 951 apprenants formés

93 % de réussite aux certifications

Des centaines d’entreprises accompagnées chaque année

 Notre ADN : l’écosystème NUEVO
En cohérence avec Nuevo Conseil & Formation et Nuevo CFA, nous partageons une mission commune : favoriser la montée en compétences, l’évolution professionnelle et l’épanouissement personnel. Apprendre une langue chez Nuevo Langues, c’est s’offrir bien plus qu’un cours : c’est s’ouvrir un horizon, gagner en confiance et s’outiller pour demain.

 Nuevo Langues : osez franchir la barrière de la langue, et ouvrez le champ des possibles.

Name: Yablo México
Description:
En Yablo creemos que el idioma abre puertas.

 Con sede en Roma Norte, Ciudad de México, Yablo es una escuela bilingüe de clase mundial que ofrece programas de Español, Inglés e 𝗜𝗻𝗴𝗹é𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗡𝗲𝗴𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗼𝘀 para individuos y empresas.

 𝗡𝘂𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮 𝗲𝘀𝗰𝘂𝗲𝗹𝗮:

Yablo proviene de “Ya + hablo”. Representa nuestra misión: que cada estudiante pueda decir con orgullo “Ya hablo inglés de negocios” o “Ya hablo español”. Más que aprender reglas gramaticales, nuestros alumnos ganan confianza para hablar en situaciones reales.

 𝗟𝗼 𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗼𝗳𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗲𝗺𝗼𝘀:

𝗜𝗻𝗴𝗹é𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗡𝗲𝗴𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗼𝘀: diseñado para profesionales y equipos, enfocado en reuniones, negociaciones y comunicación laboral.

𝗜𝗻𝗴𝗹é𝘀 𝗴𝗲𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗹: desde principiante hasta avanzado, impartido por maestros nativos de México, EE.UU. y Reino Unido.

𝗖𝘂𝗿𝘀𝗼𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗘𝘀𝗽𝗮ñ𝗼𝗹: programas de inmersión cultural y clases privadas que combinan idioma y cultura.

𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗰𝗶ó𝗻 𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗽𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗮: programas a la medida para empresas en sectores como negocios, hospitalidad, turismo y fitness.

 𝗖𝗼𝗻 𝗾𝘂𝗶é𝗻 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗮𝗷𝗮𝗺𝗼𝘀:

Hemos colaborado con profesionales y equipos de empresas líderes en México y en el extranjero, ayudándolos a comunicarse con confianza a nivel global.

 𝗠á𝘀 𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝘂𝗻𝗮 𝗲𝘀𝗰𝘂𝗲𝗹𝗮:

Yablo es una comunidad. Nuestros estudiantes participan en actividades culturales, experiencias en la ciudad y foros en línea — construyendo no solo fluidez, sino conexiones significativas.

 𝗡𝘂𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮 𝗺𝗶𝘀𝗶ó𝗻:

Dar a individuos y organizaciones la confianza para crecer a través del idioma.

Name: Shakespeare & Friends - Quality English Online for Business
Description:
Od ponad 20. lat z sukcesem uczymy angielskiego. W tym czasie przez 10 lat prowadziliśmy stacjonarną szkołę językową w Warszawie, współpracowaliśmy z różnymi szkołami językowymi, czy indywidualnymi klientami. W ostatnich latach obserwujemy dynamiczny rozwój usług językowych online, dlatego niniejsza oferta jest odpowiedzią na potrzeby naszych obecnych i przyszłych klientów. 

W szybko zmieniającym się świecie biznesu najważniejsze są dwie rzeczy: skuteczna komunikacja i budowanie relacji.

Rozumiejąc wartość i ograniczoność zasobów, jakimi są czas i uwaga – w erze cyfrowej kultury nadmiaru – wierzymy w siłę prostoty. Nasze podejście w nauczaniu angielskiego opiera się na zasadzie mniej znaczy więcej. Dbamy o to, by nadmiar źródeł nie stawał się przeszkodą. Wystarczy, że świadomie wykorzystasz to, co zaproponujemy Ci na zajęciach – a gwarantujemy Ci sukces językowy. 

Dlaczego my?

Elastyczne podejście – szkolimy (indywidualnie i grupowo) m.in. w następujących obszarach: General & Business English, wystąpienia publiczne, rozmowa o pracę, przygotowanie do egzaminu IELTS General & Academic.

Budowanie relacji – słuchamy naszych klientów, dostrzegamy ich potrzeby i się do nich odnosimy. 

Pragmatyzm – stawiamy na praktyczne umiejętności językowe. Każda lekcja bezpośrednio przyczynia się do poprawy umiejętności komunikacyjnych.

Autentyczna uwaga – dla nas ważne jest skupienie uwagi na Tobie jako człowieku. Widzimy Twoją perspektywę, cele, czy wyzwania zawodowe, z którymi się na co dzień zmagasz. 

Wsparcie motywacyjne – w nauce, także języków obcych, szczególną rolę odgrywa motywacja – niezbędny składnik każdego sukcesu. Pomoże Ci w tym profesjonalny coach, który zadba o to, by ten aspekt nie został pominięty. 

Profesjonalizm – cechują nas m.in. rzetelność, metodyczność, słowność, punktualność. Dbamy o przyjazną atmosferę na zajęciach, a satysfakcja naszych klientów jest dla nas najważniejsza.

Name: A&A Language Center
Description:
La A&A Language Center, nasce con lo scopo di venire incontro alle esigenze di tempo di tutti coloro che decidono di imparare o perfezionare la conoscenza di una o più lingue straniere ma che hanno nel poco tempo a disposizione il loro peggior nemico. Situata nella splendida cornice dell’Aventino, una delle più belle e tranquille zone di Roma, la scuola si trova a due passi dalla metro Piramide  ed è servita da un gran numero di mezzi pubblici. Il mondo dello studio e del lavoro  ormai pretendono la conoscenza di più lingue straniere e la A&A è al passo con le maggiori realtà scolastiche europee. I certificati ottenuti alla fine di ogni corso, in linea con i programmi del CEFR,  sono validi per concorsi pubblici, crediti formativi nella maturità e crediti universitari e nell’ambito della formazione del personale.
I corsi personalizzati di Inglese, Spagnolo, Francese, Tedesco, Portoghese, Russo, Arabo ed Italiano per Stranieri garantiscono il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di apprendimento in tempi molto rapidi. Corsi per tutte le età e per ogni livello.
ORARIO LEZIONI: no-stop dal Lunedì al Venerdì dalle 9.00 alle 20.00 – Sabato dalle 9.00 alle 15.00. 
La scuola è sede d’esame Full Trinity College London n° 8241 e prepara per tutti gli esami internazionali: Cambridge,TOEFL, IELTS, Alliançe Francaise, Cervantes, CILS per l’italiano e Goethe Institut.
L’esperienza ventennale della Direttrice ed il continuo aggiornamento degli insegnanti, fanno della scuola un punto di riferimento importante per tutti gli studenti che desiderano  raggiungere importanti traguardi in minor tempo ed  anche per quelle aziende che desiderano tenere aggiornati i propri dipendenti con corsi formativi  su misura per il proprio personale e per la classe dirigente.

En BE Professional Training, nos esforzamos por ofrecer a nuestros clientes un enfoque en las clases de inglés de negocios personalizadas para que tengan las herramientas que necesitan para convertirse en un activo en sus empresas mediante la optimización de sus habilidades lingüísticas.

Establecida como una start-up, BE Professional Training busca darle al mercado ecuatoriano una ventaja al realizar negocios en inglés.

A través de nuestras diversas modalidades: clases en línea, clases en el sitio (Oficina del cliente), preparación de exámenes, traducciones y más, estamos allanando el camino para que el mercado empresarial ecuatoriano enfrente los desafíos globales que existen en el entorno de trabajo.

Name: HIL Liverpool
Description:
We are HIL Liverpool, part of the Heritage International Languages family of language schools that has been working with students across the world to improve their English and other languages for over 14 years. 

We aspire to offer the best language learning experiences by not only providing a course but real-life situations and context that help students practice and develop the language they are learning accurately and confidently. All this is done in Liverpool, England, an extraordinary city, full of life and culture, making your experience as a whole much more enriching and enjoyable. 

We offer multiple courses here at HIL Liverpool, all taught by our amazing team of experienced teachers and trainers who have all experienced life abroad and have been involved in a variety of language learning environments. We strive to make the process of learning interactive, fun and challenging! Our fantastic courses include:
General English as a foreign language
Exam preparation for IELTS, FCE or CAE exams
Business English
Online classes
Foreign languages
Language camps

As well as this, we also offer free, weekly extra-curricular activities and events that can help students to practise their language skills, make some new friends and have some fun! These vary from games clubs, coffee and conversation and practical language focused workshops amongst many other things.

Our school is based in Toxteth, Liverpool, just a short trip from the city centre. Our facilities include:
Multiple classrooms
Free wifi
A book and DVD lending library

We at HIL are dedicated to building bridges between cultures, languages and communities. We have had the pleasure of teaching thousands of students across the Heritage International Languages family. To find out more about the courses we offer, visit our website.

Name: Zoni language Education
Description:
In today's competitive business landscape, the success of an organization hinges not only on its products or services but also on the people who drive its operations. Recognizing the value of employees and their role as ambassadors of a company's brand is crucial for long-term success. This essay delves into the core principles that guide a business that places its people at the heart of its operations, focusing on commitment, innovation, excellence, integrity, and inclusion.
At the heart of any thriving business is a dedicated and passionate workforce. The organization that understands this fundamental truth and places its people at the forefront is setting the stage for sustainable growth. By recognizing employees as ambassadors of clients' brands, it acknowledges that every interaction, decision, and action taken by individuals within the company reflects not only on them but also on the clients they serve. This recognition establishes a culture where employees take pride in their work and strive to uphold the values and reputation of the brands they represent.
Commitment is the cornerstone of any successful business relationship. Whether it's a commitment to clients, employees, or partners, it must be taken seriously and translated into action. A business that places its people at the heart of its operations ensures that commitments are not mere promises but tangible actions. By walking the talk, the organization builds trust with its stakeholders, fostering strong and enduring partnerships. Clients can rely on the company to deliver on its promises, employees can trust in their growth and development, and partners can count on a reliable ally.
Innovation is a driving force in today's dynamic business world. Companies that seek to thrive cannot afford to remain stagnant; they must constantly seek innovative approaches and be unafraid to challenge the status quo. We create a culture of trust and respect at all levels as well strive to achieve excellence.

Name: GROW Ambassadors
Description:
GROW (Global Reach, Opportunities, and Wisdom) é um projeto social e educacional que acredita que o aprendizado de idiomas pode transformar vidas.

 Nossa missão é democratizar o acesso ao ensino de línguas, oferecendo aulas gratuitas, online e acessíveis para todos que desejam aprender, independentemente de sua condição financeira ou localização geográfica.

Oferecemos cursos e grupos de conversação GROW Speaking em inglês, espanhol, francês, italiano e libras, com foco em prática real, acolhimento e aprendizado ativo. Nossos encontros semanais são conduzidos por voluntários engajados que acreditam no poder da educação como ferramenta de inclusão e crescimento.

Além das aulas regulares, realizamos intensivos temáticos como o Dialektos, voltado para quem busca se aprofundar no idioma com aulas dinâmicas, materiais exclusivos e acompanhamento próximo. Também promovemos experiências multiculturais, oficinas, eventos e formações para voluntários, criando uma rede global de aprendizado colaborativo.

Na GROW, acreditamos que aprender um novo idioma é mais do que adquirir vocabulário, é construir pontes, abrir portas e gerar oportunidades. Nossa comunidade é diversa, acolhedora e feita de pessoas que querem crescer juntas, compartilhando conhecimento, tempo e propósito.

Se você também acredita no poder da educação como ferramenta de transformação, venha com a gente. Seja aluno, voluntário ou parceiro. Juntos, vamos mais longe.

Name: German Institute For Education
Description:

Nous encourageons l’apprentissage tout au long de la vie par le biais de cours de langues de haute qualité, de formations interculturelles, et d’expériences précieuses à l’étranger. Nous sommes également un centre d´examen ECL . 
NOTRE MISSION : 
Nous nous consacrons à la promotion de la compréhension mutuelle des différentes cultures par-delà les frontières. Nous contribuons à surmonter les barrières linguistiques entre les différentes cultures.

Name: Ramses College for Girls
Description:
American College for Girls originated as a trilingual (English, Arabic, and French) missionary school of the United Presbyterian Church of North America. Founded by Miss Ella O.Kyle. Its first building was inaugurated in 1910 by former U.S. president Theodore Roosevelt.[4][5] He said, "I do not believe that any nation can rise to permanent greatness unless its women are fitted to play their part and dignity as man should play his."[6]

In the year 1945, the Helen Martin Library was inaugurated. The Library was one of the many projects the College Alumni Association took part in. The alumni collected ten thousand Egyptian pounds for the construction of the Library.

However, the cost of constructing the Library reached twenty thousand pounds. The graduates and the Egyptian friends of the college paid three quarters of the cost; at that time the highest amount donated by an individual was five hundred pounds. The last quarter of the cost was donated by friends of the colleges, living abroad. The donation was given in the form of money or as materials such as tiles for the floors or furniture for the reading rooms or educational aids.

The library was inaugurated in 1945. The college invited the president of the republic at that time, President Mohamed Naguib to inaugurate the library. In a huge celebration, headed by Dr.Martin and attended by high Authorities in the country and a large number of graduates who participated with their donations in the construction of the library.

The library, as previously mentioned has books in the three languages, Arabic, English and French. It also includes not only ancient and modern literature, but also other publications in the different branches of knowledge. This besides a great number of encyclopedias, different in subjects and languages, researches and circulars.[7]

Name: Spaceclass
Description:
A Spaceclass é uma franqueadora especializada em soluções de ensino de idiomas, oferecendo modelos de franquia estruturados para empreendedores que desejam atuar em um dos setores mais promissores do Brasil. Com uma metodologia inovadora e totalmente online, a Spaceclass proporciona treinamentos de idiomas em tempo real, através de uma plataforma tecnológica avançada que atende tanto indivíduos quanto empresas.

A empresa disponibiliza dois modelos de franquia para investidores: o Franqueado Executivo de Vendas, responsável por conduzir uma venda consultiva de treinamentos de idiomas, e o Franqueado Executivo de Ensino, que lidera os treinamentos, garantindo a entrega eficaz da metodologia Spaceclass. Ambos os modelos oferecem ferramentas de trabalho de ponta, suporte contínuo e um plano de marketing robusto, que inclui investimentos na marca, como campanhas digitais, uniformes e brindes corporativos.

Com baixo custo operacional, flexibilidade geográfica para os franqueados e um elevado potencial de lucratividade, a Spaceclass se destaca no mercado de franchising pela sua eficiência e solidez.

Name: English2B

Nossas aulas online ao vivo são ministradas por professores certificados (incluindo CELTA) que entendem as demandas de quem atua em um mercado global. Trabalhamos para desenvolver sua confiança e habilidades, seja para participar de reuniões com equipes internacionais, se destacar em processos seletivos ou liderar projetos globais.

Se o seu objetivo é dominar o inglês para consultores de TI e se conectar ao mundo, estamos aqui para ajudar você a chegar lá. 

Vamos transformar suas metas profissionais em realidade? Entre em contato para saber mais!

Name: Upaon Idiomas

Cada aula é adaptada de acordo com o objetivo do aluno, seja para fins profissionais, viagens, exames ou para realização pessoal.

Acreditamos que aprender inglês não deve ser uma tarefa difícil ou intimidadora. É por isso que nossa equipe de instrutores qualificados utiliza métodos inovadores para tornar o processo de aprendizagem fácil, acessível e divertido. Queremos que nossos alunos se sintam confiantes e motivados a continuar aprendendo e aprimorando suas habilidades no idioma.

Nosso compromisso é ajudar nossos alunos a alcançar seus objetivos educacionais e estamos sempre buscando maneiras de melhorar e expandir nossa plataforma para fornecer a melhor experiência possível.

Our mission is to help people realize their full potential and help you get started on your way to having a successful career. Name: My English World
Description:
My English World це професійна школа англійської мови, розташована в Харкові, але зараз працює онлайн з усією Україною. Наш підхід до вивчення мови комплексний, орієнтований на розвиток всіх мовних компетенцій одночасно, та який дає реальні результати. 

Ми пропонуємо різноманітні курси, включаючи англійську для дорослих, підлітків, початківців, працівників діжітал сфери та інтенсивні курси. Ми також пропонуємо онлайн індивідуальні уроки для максимальної гнучкості. Кожен курс розроблений, щоб допомогти студентам вчитися говорити англійською мовою з найпершого уроку, використовуючи сучасний словниковий запас і трендовий контент. Водночас наші курси призначені для забезпечення гармонійного розвитку всіх основних мовних навичок, а не тільки розмовної англійської мови та кожен урок є частиною комплексного плану навчання. 

Наша команда лінгвістів і сертифікованих викладачів (Cambridge CELTA, TESOL, TEFL) добре розбираються в структурі мови і розуміють проблеми, з якими стикаються студенти. Вони професійно підбирають навчальні матеріали для забезпечення ефективного опановування ключовими навичками та динамічним темпом уроків.

Також, ми дотримуємося міжнародних стандартів CEFR, гарантуючи, що до кінця курсу ви здобудите необхідні мовні навички (говоріння, письмо, аудіювання, читання) і зможете застосувати свої знання в реальних життєвих ситуаціях. Ми використовуємо перевірені методології, поєднуючи комунікативний метод з лексичним підходом, а також використовуємо підручники всесвітньо відомих видавництв, таких як Cambridge University Press, Oxford University Press, National Geographic Learning та Macmillan.

Ми гарантуємо результат. Якщо після проходження курсу ви набрали менш як 60% на підсумковому тесті (враховуючи, що ви відвідували не менше 90% всіх занять, виконали домашнє завдання, активно брали участь у класі), ми безплатно надамо повторний курс на тому ж рівні.

Приєднуйтесь до нас у My English World та відчуйте різницю професійного та ефективного вивченя мови.

Name: JustSpeak.pl
Description:
Mówienie po angielsku może być proste. Wystarczy zacząć… mówić.
W JustSpeak.pl pomagamy przełamać barierę językową i zacząć mówić swobodnie – bez stresu, bez oceniania, bez nudnych podręczników.

 Kim jesteśmy?
Zespół pasjonatów języka, edukacji i komunikacji. Organizujemy intensywne, immersyjne kursy językowe (tygodniowe oraz weekendowe), które pomagają uczestnikom poczuć się pewnie w angielskim – w pracy, w podróży i w codziennym życiu. A także obozy językowe dla dzieci i młodzieży.

 Co robimy inaczej?
W JustSpeak.pl uczysz się angielskiego tak, jak naturalnie uczymy się języka ojczystego – poprzez konwersacje. Każdy kurs to:
 kontakt z doświadczonymi native speakerami
 100% komunikacji w języku angielskim
 praktyka zamiast teorii
 realne sytuacje zamiast szkolnej rutyny

 Dlaczego to działa?
Bo mówienie to umiejętność, a nie zestaw reguł gramatycznych. A umiejętności rozwijamy przez działanie.
Nasze kursy są nastawione na intensywną komunikację, która skutecznie przełamuje blokady językowe i pozwala ekspresowo podnieść umiejętności komunikacyjne w języku angielskim. 

 Dla firm i specjalistów
Wspieramy działy HR i L&D w rozwoju kompetencji językowych pracowników. Szkolenia JustSpeak podnoszą nie tylko poziom języka, ale też pewność siebie i efektywność w komunikacji międzynarodowej.

 Efekty?
Setki uczestników, którzy po tygodniu kursu mówią płynniej, śmielej i… częściej. Zmieniamy „uczę się angielskiego” na „mówię po angielsku”.

 Dołącz do nas – i przekonaj się, jak wiele możesz powiedzieć po angielsku, gdy przestaniesz się bać mówić.

 www.justspeak.pl
 office@justspeak.pl

Przeczytaj opinie o naszych kursach w opineo.pl (https://www.opineo.pl/opinie/just-speak) , Google oraz na FB

Name: Alliance Française Glasgow
Description:
Welcome to the new Alliance Française Glasgow page!

Established in 1982, the Alliance Française Glasgow is part of the world’s largest network dedicated to promoting French language and Francophone cultures. One of eleven Alliance Française centres in the UK — and the only one in Scotland — it has been based in Glasgow’s historic Park Circus since 2004, sharing a beautiful building with the Goethe-Institut Glasgow, as a remarkable example of European cultural cooperation.

As a local not-for-profit organisation, our mission is to share a genuine passion for the French language and the diversity of Francophone cultures. We offer courses for adults, teenagers and children of all ages and levels, as well as private tuition and tailor-made programmes for schools, businesses and organisations. Many of our courses are also available online to ensure greater flexibility and access.

All our teachers are native French speakers, highly qualified in teaching French as a foreign language. As an official examination centre, we provide internationally recognised certifications such as the DELF/DALF and the TCF, supporting both personal and professional goals.

Our teaching activities are brought to life by a vibrant programme of cultural and social events — from cafés, film screenings and exhibitions to wine tastings, book clubs, talks, concerts, themed workshops and our much-loved guided tours of Glasgow and its surroundings in French! Members also benefit from our modern multimedia library, which offers a broad collection of books, films and learning resources.

More than just a language centre, the Alliance Française Glasgow is a welcoming hub in the West of Scotland for cultural exchange and meaningful connections, offering a glimpse into the rich and vibrant world of French-speaking countries. 

We look forward to welcoming you soon!

Name: Germandrishty
Description:

What we do
• German language training from foundations to advanced communication
• Exam-aligned preparation for Goethe, telc, and ÖSD formats (practice-led, no unrealistic promises)
• German for study, work, and vocational training (Ausbildung) readiness in Germany
• B2B / institutional training programs with structured delivery and reporting

Who we help
Students, professionals, and organisations that need dependable German language training—whether for exam goals, career mobility, or workplace communication.

Why Germandrishty
We build consistency. Live teaching is supported by an LMS that guides learners before, during, and after class (audio/video drills, quizzes, speaking tasks, writing practice, assessments, and progress tracking). This creates a clear learning rhythm and measurable progress for learners and partners.

Explore partnerships or enroll: germandrishty.com | +91 86885 98701

Name: Instituto World Opportunity

Nossa Missão:

• Capacitar alunos para se comunicarem eficazmente em Inglês e Espanhol, promovendo o aprendizado através de aulas online 100% ao vivo.
• Fornecer um ambiente de ensino inclusivo, acessível e personalizado, que permita aos alunos desenvolver habilidades linguísticas de maneira prática e envolvente.
• Promover uma aprendizagem ativa e interativa através de aulas ao vivo.

Nossa Visão:

• Ser a principal referência no ensino de Inglês e Espanhol, reconhecida por nossa abordagem inovadora e aulas ao vivo de alta qualidade, continuando a expansão da nossa presença internacional.

Nossos Valores:

• Excelência: Compromisso com o ensino de qualidade, proporcionando a cada aluno as melhores oportunidades de aprendizado.
• Acessibilidade: Tornar o ensino de idiomas acessível a todos, sem importar sua localização, origem ou recursos financeiros.
• Inovação: Abraçar tecnologias avançadas e práticas pedagógicas modernas para aprimorar constantemente a experiência de ensino.

Name: Key2English
Description:
Key2English (K2E) es una empresa dinámica especializada en la enseñanza del inglés comercial para profesionales españoles. 
Nuestra misión es capacitar a los profesionales españoles con las habilidades lingüísticas necesarias para prosperar en el mundo empresarial globalizado de hoy. Con un equipo de profesores altamente calificados y experimentados, ofrecemos cursos personalizados y orientados a resultados de inglés comercial que se adaptan a las necesidades y objetivos específicos de nuestros clientes.

Key2English se compromete a ofrecer una formación lingüística en línea de alta calidad. Entendemos los desafíos que enfrentan los profesionales españoles al comunicarse efectivamente en inglés, y nos esforzamos por proporcionar soluciones innovadoras y personalizadas para superar estas barreras. A través de nuestro plan de estudios integral, métodos de enseñanza atractivos y recursos de vanguardia, nuestro objetivo es equipar a nuestros clientes con las habilidades lingüísticas esenciales y la comprensión cultural necesaria para tener éxito en entornos empresariales internacionales.

Ofrecemos cursos especializados de inglés comercial diseñados para mejorar las habilidades de comunicación de los profesionales españoles en diversos contextos empresariales. Nuestros cursos abarcan una amplia gama de temas, que incluyen aprendizaje de vocabulario sobre jerga empresarial, prácticas de conversación, presentaciones, mejora de habilidades de lectura y escucha, redacción de correos electrónicos y comunicación intercultural.

K2E proporciona un aprendizaje en línea flexible, permitiendo que los profesionales aprendan a su propio ritmo y conveniencia. Nuestras aulas virtuales interactivas ofrecen experiencias de aprendizaje atractivas e interactivas, independientemente de las limitaciones geográficas.
¿Por qué elegir Key2English?
1. Experiencia y Expertise
2. Enfoque Personalizado
3. Métodos de Enseñanza Innovadores
4. Conciencia Cultural
5. Compromiso con la Excelencia

Name: Rozan School of Persian Learning & Studies
Description:
Before designing this platform, teaching Farsi was all but a job for us. After some time we met with students who were interested in learning more about the Iranian people and their history culture, oriental philosophy and poetry.

We also met with Iranians who were born and raised overseas and who were looking for a way to connect with their roots. During our career, we realized the shortcomings and limitations of educational resources and devised new methods of teaching Farsi to facilitate learning and cultural exchange.

We learned at the beginning of this journey that we alone would not be able to introduce the Persian language and culture to those who are interested and we need to study countries where Persian dialects are spoken. We thus decided to also include these areas in teaching language, culture, literature, art and tourism.

If you have just started learning Persian or are about to do so, do not worry. Our members, like you, are at the beginning of the journey to discover the capabilities of this region and will always be by your side. We hope our website will be a good place for learning Farsi and cultural exchange, and a bridge for communication between Iran and neighbouring countries.

Founded in 2004, Interlinco Formación specializes in language training courses for companies and professionals and language level tests. Our team is made up of talented professionals of diverse nationalities, highly qualified and with experience in the sector.

Our priority is to provide high-quality, personalized, and results-oriented teaching. It is for this reason that Interlinco is the vendor of choice of numerous companies and organizations for providing language training to their employees.

Among the multiple services that we offer some of the most demanded are:
 - High performance intensive language courses
 - Language training for companies
 - Certified language level tests

We work with teachers of all nationalities, rigorously selected and of our total trust. Most teachers are native speakers of the language they teach and with a minimum experience of between 5 and 10 years in teaching language courses in companies.

Interlinco Formación offers both face-to-face training services (in our classrooms and/or at the client’s site) and online learning, having developed our own Digital Learning Platform (Aula Digital). In any case, we always adjust to the needs of each client and guarantee the highest quality in teaching.

Interlinco Formación is certified as an Organizing Entity of FUNDAE, allowing companies to benefit from government’s grants for language training; we support companies process language training grants through FUNDAE at no additional cost to our clients.

Description:

Nous sommes Spécialisés en Anglais Professionnel (emails, rédaction de rapports d'activités, participation et conduite de réunions, présentations professionnelles, networking skills et anglais du téléphone etc...)

Les méthodes traditionnelles d'apprentissage des langues ne fonctionnent pas. Voici comment nous vous aidons à transformer votre anglais et votre carrière : chez TLC Better English, nous utilisons la méthode d'apprentissage mixte, également appelé BLENDED LEARNING. Il s'agit d'une combinaison de travail en autonomie sur une plateforme d'apprentissage en ligne et de renforcement des capacités en face à face avec un Formateur. Nous ne nous contentons pas de dispenser des cours sur-mesure en Business English. Nous vous fournissons tous les meilleurs outils d'apprentissage en ligne pour vous aider à développer l'ensemble des compétences nécessaires pour communiquer efficacement sur votre lieu de travail actuel et avec vos partenaires anglophones où qu'ils se trouvent dans le monde entier.
Nous vous accompagnons également tout au long de votre parcours d'apprentissage grâce à notre système de COACHING PREMIUM, afin que vous ne soyez pas seul à relever le défi de la maîtrise de l'anglais professionnel, mais que vous vous sentiez soutenu et restiez très motivé jour après jour jusqu'à ce que vous atteigniez vos objectifs de maîtrise de l'anglais. Nous vous le garantissons : une maîtrise complète de l'anglais professionnel en 6 mois ou moins. 

Better English,

Better Career!

Name: International House Valencia
Description:
Españolé International House Valencia is a friendly school that offers Spanish courses of the highest quality. Our school is part of the International House World Organization (IHWO) with over 60 years' experience. International House was founded in 1953 to provide an innovative approach to language teaching. Today IHWO is a network of over 150 schools in more than 50 countries. 

Our goal is to teach our students to communicate in Spanish as quickly as possible and, at the same time, to introduce them to Spanish culture and life. We have a wide range of Spanish courses given by a great team of professional teachers. General Spanish (Intensive 20, Intensive 25, Intensive 30, Intensive Plus or Superintensive) Spanish for Business, DELE and SIELE preparation, as well as many specialized courses. Our students learn how people use the language in real life, how they speak to each other on the street, how they socialize. Students develop skills that they can immediately practise outside the classroom. 

We have a dynamic team of teachers who love teaching Spanish. All of them are native Spanish speakers and university graduates. They use modern materials and methods and ensure that the lessons are interesting and entertaining.

International House Valencia is set in the historical Palacio de los Fernández de Córdova building deep in the heart of Valencia's old town, surrounded by shops, historical sites and the energetic Spanish city life.

Name: Online-Sprachschule Selbstbewusst Deutsch Sprechen
Description:
Willkommen bei „Selbstbewusst Deutsch Sprechen“ – der Online-Sprachschule, die Ihnen hilft, angstfrei und selbstbewusst Deutsch zu sprechen!

Man braucht keine Ewigkeit, um Deutsch sprechen zu können, sondern die richtige Strategie. Davon sind wir überzeugt! Um dies zu erreichen, thematisieren wir von Anfang an in unserem Unterricht die deutsche Grammatik. Sie ist zwar eine Herausforderung, aber logisch aufgebaut. Ohne die Beherrschung der deutschen Grammatik werden Sie immer Angst haben, Fehler zu machen und folglich auch nicht sprechen wollen. Was nutzt es aber, wenn Sie Deutsch verstehen, Ihre Meinung jedoch nicht äußern können?

Mit unserer Hilfe werden Sie anfangen, die verschiedenen Wortarten im Deutschen richtig zu mögen. Sie werden feststellen, dass es gar nicht so schwer ist, wie Sie immer dachten. Jedoch sollten Sie sich über eines im Klaren sein: Ihre tägliche Bereitschaft, alles für den Lernerfolg zu geben, ist die Grundvoraussetzung zur Erreichung des Zieles, dieser wunderbaren Sprache eines Tages mächtig zu sein. Hierbei stehen wir Ihnen mit Rat und Tat zur Seite - können aber nicht für Sie lernen. Deshalb arbeitet die Schule auch aus Prinzip nur mit hochmotivierten Studierenden, die bereit sind, über sich hinauszuwachsen!

Die Schule wurde von Frau Daniela Lotzen während ihres DaF Studiums gegründet.

Name: Euroasia
Description:
Euroasia provides European and Asian language education and cross cultural consulting services. 

We specialise in delivering customised intensive language training programmes for professionals who need to acquire basic or survival-level language competency from a zero base, within a short duration (6-8 weeks).  

Over 7000 New Zealanders have completed courses at Euroasia. In 2007, Euroasia was recognised by National Business Review as the third most exciting company in education, for our market-leading work in the cross-cultural field.

We also offer general language programmes for New Zealanders. Languages offered include Chinese, Japanese, French, Spanish. Other European and Asian languages (including Korean, Portuguese, Russian, Dutch etc) are available on request.

Our language teachers are experienced, qualified and dynamic native speakers, who offer an authentic cultural experience. Language course materials are designed for New Zealanders.

Customised training is available to acquaint Kiwis working across cultures with social and business norms and practical aspects of life in different countries. Recent migrants to New Zealand will also benefit from our programmes covering specific skills and information on how to work with New Zealanders.

Description:
Forte de 50 ans d'expérience dans le domaine de la formation linguistique, ASC Languages propose des cours sur mesure à une longue liste de clients tous plus exigeants les uns que les autres. Nos professeurs ont accompagné une centaine d'entreprises parmi les plus importantes de notre région et offrent un enseignement professionnel à plus de 500 apprenants chaque année.

Les cours sont mis en place suite à un audit linguistique approfondi et à une analyse détaillée des besoins du client. L'audit en question est gratuit et sans engagement. Il nous permet de suggérer un programme de formation personnalisé à chacun de nos clients. Nos responsables clients sont disponibles en permanence pour répondre à toutes vos demandes d'ordre administratif ou pédagogique.

ASC Languages a été la première école de langues en Suisse romande à se voir octroyer en 2001 le certificat suisse de qualité EduQua.

------

With over 50 years of specialist experience in corporate language training, ASC Languages offers tailor-made courses to a long list of demanding clients. Our teachers have experience working with 100 of the most important companies in our region and provide professional training to more than 500 students per year.

Courses are only created once an in-depth language audit and detailed needs analysis have been carried out. This audit, conducted free of charge and without engagement, allows us to personalise a training plan for every client. Our dedicated, bilingual Client Managers are always available to answer any administrative or pedagogical query.

ASC Languages was the first school of languages in French-speaking Switzerland to be awarded the Swiss EduQua certificate of quality in 2001.

Name: Groupe Les Petits Bilingues
Description:
Les Petits Bilingues, du groupe Oui Care Education, est avec ses 30 années d’existence, le leader national de l’apprentissage de l’anglais des enfants de 3 à 17 ans avec un réseau mixte de 50 centres en France métropolitaine, sur l'Île de la Réunion et à Casablanca. 15 centres en succursales et 36 centres en franchise. 

Une pédagogie d’excellence est au cœur de toutes nos activités et les moyens d’apprentissage les plus efficaces sont utilisés en plaçant l’oralité au centre des ateliers. Cette pédagogie s’appuie également sur de nombreuses études scientifiques du développement psychomoteur de l’enfant dont l’apprentissage de la langue et la communication font partie intégrante. 

L’anglais est une langue de communication, d’échanges, vivante et riche.

Notre approche pédagogique positive et bienveillante est aussi incarnée par nos animatrices et animateurs, tous anglophones natifs, au quotidien.

Les Petits Bilingues offrent également des solutions personnalisées pour les écoles, les professionnels, les adultes et les étudiants, les aidant à atteindre leurs objectifs en anglais.

Nos objectifs au quotidien ?

🡺	Continuer à développer notre impact dans le domaine de l'apprentissage des langues pour enfants, en élargissant la couverture de notre réseau ;

🡺	Renforcer notre capacité à offrir des programmes vivants et de qualité exceptionnelle ;

🡺	 Développer nos méthodes innovantes et immersives

Vous êtes entrepreneur dans l’âme ? Vous voulez contribuer à la formation des futurs citoyens du monde de demain ? Idéalement, vous êtes vous-même anglophone ou avez un très bon niveau d’anglais ?

Nous offrons des opportunités à des futurs franchisés, motivés et intéressés par l’éducation et la formation sur de très nombreux territoires en France. Ce projet vous intéresse et vous souhaitez en savoir plus ? 
 Contactez-nous au 06 24 83 33 58 ou écrivez-nous à franchiseles petitsbilingues@ouicare.com

Name: Elbilia Language Link
Description:
We enable learners of all ages to develop their language skills and achieve success in their academic, personal, and professional lives.
English is the main focus, for all different specific needs. This service is in alignment with the ambition of Morocco to become the link between Africa and the World.
Academic English, General English, Business English, English for Specific Purposes, all taught as EAL/EFL (English as an Added Language/English as a Foreign Language). We also offer training and exams for English teachers. As of August 14, 2023, we are an authorized Cambridge Exam Centre. 
Our offer:
Personal courses or corporate training, either in small groups or one-to-one sessions. Academic English also encompasses exam preparation both for Cambridge Assessment English (Starters, Movers, Flyers, FCE, CAE, CPE, and IELTS) and ETS exams (TOEFL, TOEIC, SAT, GMAT). All courses can be taken either in the centre or off centre. While the main centre is located on the Boulevard Ziraoui in Casablanca, courses and Cambridge exams will be held in all of the Elbilia school locations throughout Morocco: Rabat, Tangier, Marrakesh, Lissasfa, Bouskoura, Sidi Bernoussi, and Toulout Braicha (Elbilia International School Casa centre).
We also offer a coaching and counseling service for high school students wishing to study in universities abroad, in the USA or in the UK.
For more information, please contact us at (212) 627 48 48 48

Name: The Turkish Program
Description:
Welcome to The Turkish Program, your gateway to mastering the Turkish language, embracing the rich Turkish culture, and unlocking boundless opportunities. 

At The Turkish Program, we understand the significance of language as a powerful bridge that connects individuals, cultures, and global communities. With our comprehensive and tailored approach, we are dedicated to providing exceptional Turkish language education and fostering a deep appreciation for Turkish heritage.

Our experienced and passionate instructors are committed to guiding you on your language journey. Whether you're an expat family, a student, or a professional seeking to expand your language skills, we offer a range of programs designed to meet your unique needs. From immersive group classes to personalized one-on-one tutoring, we ensure a supportive learning environment that nurtures your language growth.

But our commitment goes beyond language proficiency. We believe in the transformative power of cultural understanding. Through our dynamic curriculum, we immerse you in Turkish traditions, history, literature, and contemporary society, fostering a deeper connection to the vibrant Turkish culture.

Join our vibrant community of learners and explore the vast opportunities that await you. Connect with fellow language enthusiasts, participate in cultural events, and expand your network. With 24/7 language support and access to a wealth of resources, we are here to empower you every step of the way.

Whether your goals are personal, academic, or professional, The Turkish Program equips you with the linguistic skills, cultural knowledge, and confidence to navigate the Turkish-speaking world. Embark on a transformative language journey with us and uncover the beauty of the Turkish language and culture.

Are you ready to unlock your Turkish potential? Connect with us on LinkedIn and embark on a language adventure that will change the way you see the world.

Name: inlingua Ancona
Description:
inlingua is one of the world's leading language training organizations with 329 language centers in 38 countries across Europe, Africa, Asia, North and South America.
Millions of private clients and employees of large and small companies, institutions and government offices have benefited from the inlingua method of language training.
Using specially-developed teaching materials, qualified trainers provide communicative language training.
Since we learn languages best by speaking them, a decisive factor for success inherent in the inlingua method is that only the target language is spoken in the classroom.
The inlingua method is based on decades of practical experience. The method continues to be enhanced and perfected through close adaptation to ongoing linguistic and social developments. Language trainers are trained in the universal inlingua methodology. They design their lessons according to standardized training techniques and specially developed training materials, based on internationally recognized level systems. The students’ progress is assessed at regular intervals to make sure that the lessons are carefully tailored to their individual needs.
Quality standards that are uniform all over the world are also the key to the unique inlingua transfer principle: Courses begun on any level can be continued uninterrupted in an inlingua Language Center in another city or country.

Name: Instituto Cervantes Berlin
Description:
Das Instituto Cervantes ist eine gemeinnützige öffentliche Einrichtung, die 1991 vom spanischen Staat zur Förderung der spanischen Sprache und zur Verbreitung der hispanoamerikanischen Kultur gegründet wurde. 
Das Instituto Cervantes Berlin befindet sich seit 2003 in einem denkmalgeschützten Gebäude im Bezirk Mitte, nahe dem Hackeschen Markt. Es gehört zu den größten Häusern des weltweiten Netzes spanischer Kulturinstitute, zu dem in Deutschland auch Institute in Bremen, Frankfurt, Hamburg und München gehören.
Das Instituto Cervantes Berlin bietet:
Kulturveranstaltungen in Zusammenarbeit mit spanischen und lateinamerikanischen Einrichtungen sowie mit Institutionen der Gastländer.
Kompetenten Spanischunterricht für alle Niveaus. Das Angebot der Sprachabteilung umfasst neben allgemeinen Spanischkursen auch Intensivkurse, Spezialkurse, Kurse in den Regionalsprachen Spaniens, Vorbereitungskurse für die DELE-Prüfung, die Onlinekurse AVE GLOBAL, Spanisch für Kinder und ein Fortbildungsprogramm für Spanischlehrkräfte.
Anerkennung von Sprachkenntnissen durch offiziell und international anerkannte Zertifikate. Durchführung der DELE-Prüfungen, der Diplomas Oficiales de Español DELE.
Unterstützung der Arbeit von Hispanisten.
Beteiligung an Projekten und Programmen, die der Verbreitung der spanischen Sprache dienen.
Fundierte Hintergrundinformationen zu Sprache und Kultur ist zudem das Spezialgebiet der Bibliothek Mario Vargas Llosa. Sie ist eine wichtige Anlaufstelle für alle an spanischsprachiger Literatur Interessierten geworden und bietet außerdem aktuelle spanische Tagespresse, Filme, Musik, Nachschlagewerke und E-Books.

Name: Alianza Francesa de La Paz
Description:
La Alianza Francesa de La Paz es una institución cultural y educativa con una profunda historia y un firme compromiso con el desarrollo cultural de la ciudad. Desde su fundación en 1923, ha sido un puente entre Bolivia y Francia, promoviendo el intercambio lingüístico, artístico y cultural. Forma parte de una red internacional presente en más de 130 países, y en Bolivia es reconocida como un actor clave en el fortalecimiento de las relaciones franco-bolivianas.
En el ámbito educativo, ofrece una amplia gama de cursos de francés para todas las edades y niveles: niños, adolescentes y adultos. Estos incluyen talleres de conversación, programas especializados y preparación para exámenes internacionales. Como único centro autorizado en Bolivia, administra los exámenes internacionales DELF, DALF, DELF Junior y TEF, reconocidos mundialmente y que abren oportunidades académicas y profesionales en el mundo francófono.

En el plano cultural, organiza una programación diversa, accesible y gratuita durante todo el año: exposiciones, conciertos, ferias, conferencias, talleres y celebraciones como el Mes de la Francofonía o la Fête de la Musique.
La AF también pone a disposición del público recursos digitales a través de la plataforma Culturethèque y una mediateca abierta a toda la comunidad paceña con diversos recursos en francés.

Nuestra misión se basa en tres pilares fundamentales:
• Impartir cursos de francés para todas las edades.
• Promover el acceso a la cultura francesa.
• Fomentar la diversidad cultural a través de actividades e iniciativas inclusivas.

Colaboramos estrechamente con la Embajada de Francia en Bolivia, instituciones públicas y privadas, empresas y comunidades locales para establecer un diálogo intercultural que enriquezca tanto a nuestros estudiantes como a la sociedad.

Descubre más sobre cómo transformamos el aprendizaje del francés en una experiencia cultural única.

Esnek eğitim modelleri ile dil öğrenme sürecini kişiselleştiriyor, her öğrencinin ihtiyaçlarına ve hedeflerine yönelik özgün bir eğitim deneyimi sağlıyoruz.

Name: Effective German Academy
Description:
"Welcome to Effective German Academy, a leading German academy dedicated to providing exceptional language learning experiences. We specialize in offering comprehensive German language courses tailored to meet the diverse needs of learners at all proficiency levels. Our team of experienced instructors and our immersive teaching approach ensure that students develop strong language skills and cultural understanding."

We offer an intensive German language course, our flagship program, designed for students aiming to make rapid progress. This immersive course covers all language aspects: speaking, listening, reading, and writing.

Additionally, we provide targeted exam preparation courses for German language proficiency exams such as TestDaF, Goethe-Zertifikat, and DSH. Our experienced instructors will guide you through the exam structure and equip you with valuable strategies to optimize your success.

Let's connect to us on this exciting language learning journey.

"Happy Learning!"

Learn German | German Course | German Teacher | German Language

Name: SOAS Language Centre
Description: About us: SOAS Language Centre offers quality teaching in a wide range of languages to SOAS students and the general public through its extensive extramural programme. It also provides bespoke language training for diverse organisations. Its proven expertise lies in making the learning of languages practically useful, highly enjoyable and accessible to people from all walks of life.

Name: faa Language Coaching
Description:
faa Language Coaching offers personalized English language lessons designed to help non-native English speakers excel in business meetings, presentations, and social interactions. By focusing on the unique needs and goals of each client, faa Language Coaching ensures that every lesson is tailored to enhance communication skills, enabling clients to effectively convey their ideas and build confidence in professional and social settings.

Specializing in business and technical English, faa Language Coaching has successfully assisted numerous clients in the chemical and pharmaceutical industries in Basel. 

Language learning extends beyond merely overcoming language barriers; it involves developing cross-cultural awareness, which is a crucial aspect of effective communication. faa Language Coaching embraces this holistic approach by using a fun and friendly teaching method, ensuring that clients not only enhance their language skills but also build the confidence needed to communicate successfully in diverse professional environments.

The aim is to keep on building bridges through effective communication.

We verzorgen maatwerktrajecten voor bedrijven en organisaties. Onze trainingen worden live op locatie of online aangeboden, afhankelijk van wat het beste past bij de werkomgeving en de deelnemers.

We denken actief mee over planningen, ploegendiensten en andere praktische zaken, zodat leren toegankelijk en haalbaar wordt voor iedereen.

Onze aanpak is persoonlijk, flexibel en resultaatgericht en altijd afgestemd op de doelen van zowel de organisatie als de deelnemer.

Vragen? Neem contact met ons op.

Name: Lingue Club

Name: Ordcap - Online-Sprachschule
Description:
Norwegisch, Schwedisch, Dänisch, Isländisch, Finnisch, Niederländisch Englisch: Die Sprachen des europäischen Nordens werden bei uns mit viel Leidenschaft und guter Laune vermittelt. Du entscheidest, ob der flexible und 100 % personalisierbare Einzelunterricht oder die festen und höchst unterhaltsamen Kleingruppenkurse mit 3-4 Teilnehmern besser zu dir und deinen Lerngewohnheiten passen. 

Wir treffen uns online, so dass jeder Schüler beim Lernen in seiner Wohlfühlumgebung bleiben kann, ganz ohne Anfahrtswege und extra Zeitaufwand. Unsere Lehrer sind ebensolche Fans "ihrer" Sprache und Kultur wie unsere Schüler und bringen dies mit Begeisterung, zahlreichen Lerntipps und Insiderinfos an den Kunden.

Ob du einen Urlaub oder gleich das Auswandern planst, die große Liebe aus dem hohen Norden getroffen hast oder dich einfach sprachlich oder beruflich weiterentwickeln möchtest: Du erlebst eine neue Welt, einen neuen Alltag, einen neuen Humor, neue Literatur und Musik und vieles mehr, sobald du dich auf eine Fremdsprache einlässt. Es gibt tausend gute Gründe zum Lernen - wir helfen dir dabei, so dass es ganz einfach geht und du schnell Erfolge siehst! Dein Tempo, dein Zeitplan und deine Interessen gestalten unsere Kurse.

Mehr Skandi-News? Vernetzen wir uns in den Sozialen Medien:

Name: Helen Doron English Albania

Name: Mester szkoła języków skandynawskich Sp. z o.o.
Description: Jesteśmy szkołą językową, specjalizującą się w językach skandynawskich. Zajęcia prowadzone są przez wykwalifikowanych lektorów, mających doświadczenie w nauczaniu, a misją naszej szkoły jest promowanie języków i kultury skandynawskiej oraz przekazywanie wiedzy w niestandardowy sposób.

Name: Mein Segelwind GmbH
Description: Mein Segelwind is your language school and consultant about AZAV-certified training measures for your company. We develop your employees language competence and business skills using future-oriented, state-of-the-art educational technology. We also support you in finding the right educational offer in the area of soft and hard skills to cover the diverse learning needs of your entire team. Our portfolio includes among others: - Business English - Technical English - German as a foreign language - all other languages - Leadership Skills - Soft Skills/Power Skills

Name: English on Mars
Description:
Créé en 2018, English on Mars est un organisme de formation spécialisé dans l’enseignement de l’anglais comme langue étrangère, certifié Qualiopi depuis 2021 et accrédité Green Standard Schools depuis 2023.

Grâce à notre expertise de l’enseignement de l’anglais depuis de nombreuses années, nous formons tous types de publics en anglais général et spécifique, sous la forme de cours individuels sur-mesure ou de cours collectifs par niveau, pour les professionnels et les entreprises, à Marseille et en ligne.

Notre particularité est que notre équipe est composée uniquement de formateurs natifs, hautement diplômés dans l'enseignement de l'anglais (Cambridge CELTA/DELTA) et expérimentés auprès d'apprenants très différents. Cette exigence dans la sélection de nos profils de formateurs et la multiplicité de nos savoirs garantissent l'efficacité, la qualité et le professionnalisme de nos formations.

Notre enseignement est basé sur une approche humaniste via la communication et la participation active, grâce à l'utilisation d'une pluralité de méthodes et d'une pédagogie centrée sur l'apprenant(e). Le développement de nos apprenants est au centre de nos priorités, c'est pourquoi nous privilégions un suivi personnalisé tout au long de la formation avec un(e) même formateur(trice).

Nos compléments d’expérience en business international, marketing, neurolanguage coaching et développement nous aident à mieux comprendre le langage de votre activité professionnelle dans le but d’améliorer votre anglais, votre communication et vos performances. 

Nos formations d’anglais sont éligibles aux différents dispositifs de financement (OPCO, CPF, France Travail...). N’hésitez pas à nous solliciter pour vous aider dans vos démarches de financement.

Contactez-nous à contact@englishonmars.com ou rendez-vous sur notre site www.englishonmars.com/adultes/ pour réserver votre bilan personnalisé gratuit.

See you soon!

Name: Institut français d'Azerbaïdjan
Description:
L'Institut français d'Azerbaïdjan est présent à Bakou depuis plus de 20 ans. Il fait partie du réseau culturel des Instituts français dans le monde. 
Outil de coopération de l'Ambassade de France en Azerbaïdjan, nous menons de nombreux projets dans des domaines très variés (culture, éducation, études supérieures, sciences et techniques, administration, etc.).
L'IFA est aussi un centre de langues pour apprendre et se perfectionner en français. Les cours sont ouverts à tous les niveaux et tous les âges. 
Les examens officiels de langue française (TCF, DELF, DALF) sont organisés par l'IFA.

Name: Worldwide School of English
Description:
We are one of the best schools in New Zealand, rated as "Excellent" and "Category 1" by NZQA.

We have been providing English language education services for more than 30 years, focusing on academic quality and a personalised teaching methods.

Name: OCA Educacional
Description:
A Oca Educacional foi fundada em 2019 com o intuito de oferecer aulas de reforço para filhos de descendentes orientais, pois a sua fundadora também é uma "nissei" e sabe exatamente como é difícil se inserir no ambiente escolar, tendo um background cultural diferente e muitas vezes com dificuldades em português, o que acaba comprometendo o entendimento das matérias, levando ao baixo desempenho e baixa autoestima.

Nosso Reforço Escolar para estrangeiros possui professores de diversas matérias e um professor poliglota para atender os alunos em seu respectivo idioma, caso necessário. Por outro lado, o enfoque é dado na língua portuguesa, pois nosso objetivo é que os alunos alcancem uma maior fluência neste idioma, já que o português será fundamental para a vida escolar, acadêmica e profissional de nossos alunos.

Hoje, após entendermos ainda melhor sobre as dificuldades e necessidades dos alunos, decidimos aperfeiçoar nossa equipe profissional e expandir nossa infraestrutura. Sendo assim, a OCA passou a oferecer também reforço escolar para brasileiros e cursos de idiomas.

O Reforço escolar para brasileiros possui pedagogos especializados em alfabetização e letramento para atender os alunos que apresentam dificuldades em seu desenvolvimento escolar. 

Nossos cursos de idiomas - Português para estrangeiros, inglês, espanhol e mandarim - atendem diferentes idades e são oferecidos em diferentes modalidades.  A metodologia é voltada para a prática e conversação, para que os alunos tenham um rápido desenvolvimento na fluência do idioma que desejam estudar.

Intagram: @oca.educacional
https://www.instagram.com/oca.educacional/

Name: Brooklyn Institute
Description:
At Brooklyn Institute, we are dedicated to redefining English language education. Based in Kenitra, we offer a range of personalized programs designed to build linguistic proficiency and foster holistic development. Our innovative approach goes beyond traditional learning, focusing on individual needs and integrating essential skills such as leadership, communication, and critical thinking.

We provide diverse learning options, including General English, Business English, specialized courses for kids and teens, and tailored programs for specific professions. Our commitment to excellence is supported by flexible learning formats and expert guidance from internationally renowned professionals.

Join us at Brooklyn Institute to unlock your potential and transform your future with a world-class education that prepares you for success in a globalized world.

Name: Abyaas Institute of Foreign Languages
Description: Empowering Communication, Enriching Connections: Discover Abyaas Institute Of Foreign Languages, your gateway to linguistic excellence.  Tailored language programs, skilled instructors, and a supportive community fostering fluency and cultural understanding. Elevate your language skills with us. Let's bridge cultures together! #LanguageLearning #CulturalFluency #GlobalCommunication

Name: Bridges Cultural
Description:
Fundada em São Paulo, Brasil, em 2019, a Bridges Cultural dedica-se diariamente a construir uma melhor compreensão entre pessoas de diferentes origens culturais. Oferecemos cursos de Português como língua estrangeira ou adicional, além de treinamentos de Comunicação Intercultural para empresas e indivíduos que precisam entender e se comunicar no Brasil e com brasileiros.
Aulas de português para estrangeiros in company, remotas ou presenciais.
Aulas One-to-One VIP.
Treinamentos em Comunicação Intercultural.
Mais de 800 alunos atendidos in company remoto para o maior banco digital do mundo o Nubank, com alcance em México, Colômbia, Argentina, Alemanha, Estados Unidos e mais.

Parcerias e Projetos ESG
Instituto Adus: ajudamos mais de 3.000 refugiados de 40 nacionalidades a se integrarem no Brasil por meio de doações ao Programa de Ensino de Português.
Projeto Português na Guiné: iniciado em 2022, expandindo nosso alcance e impacto em parceria com a Plateforme Guinneenne de Formations (Plaguifor), na África Ocidental, e ensinando nosso idioma e cultura para ampliar o acesso a oportunidades de trabalho e educação aos guineenses.
Projeto Pontes com a Ucrânia: um exemplo do nosso compromisso com transformações sociais por meio da inclusão pela língua e cultura do Brasil. Patrocinamos a elaboração de materiais didáticos para um curso de português para ucranianos deslocados da guerra da Rússia que estão no Brasil.

Números e Impacto:
Mais de 1.000 alunos atendidos em cursos corporativos para todos os níveis da empresa.
Crescimento contínuo, com uma equipe dedicada.
Mais de 3.000 refugiados auxiliados no Brasil por meio das parcerias com o Instituto Adus e o Projeto Pontes com a Ucrânia. Mais de 200 horas de educação linguística on-line gratuita para os parceiros da Guiné Conacri, África.
Estamos prontos para atender as necessidades linguísticas e culturais de seus colaboradores estrangeiros, presencial ou remoto. Faça como a startup mais valiosa do mundo e fale conosco!

Name: The Languages Gateway
Description: We aim to provide a one-stop shop for all things languages in the UK, facilitating links between all those interested in languages: learners, families, community groups, teachers, school leaders, academics, policymakers, subject associations. The site to be open and inclusive, a tool for everyone to use and contribute to, building a collective sense of ownership and partnership. Initially envisioned by the British Academy, the British Council, the Association of School & College Leaders, the Arts & Humanities Research Council and Universities UK, The Languages Gateway is the portal representing all those who have an interest in langauges in the UK from Arabic to Welsh, classical and signed languages, and everything in between.

Name: Language In Action - Malvern International

With our programmes, students gain so much more than classroom learning. Our students gain life experience, and a deeper understanding of the culture of the UK.
 
As part of Malvern International, Language in Action is perfectly placed to offer exciting and dynamic study experiences inside and outside the classroom.

Our mission is to provide international students with essential academic and English language skills, cultural experiences, and the support they need to thrive in their academic studies, daily life, and career development.

Description:
Little English is a fun and friendly language school located right in the centre of Gibraltar (just off Main street), just a 5-minute drive from the Spanish border. Our dedicated teachers are degree-level and CELTA qualified with up to 15 years of teaching experience.

Come and join us for some sun, sea, and study! Email info@littleenglish.gi for more information.

Aki no Sora, with the purpose of "re-invent learning", especially for the Japanese Language, is currently operating and providing services in various training programs for Individuals and organizations and giving quality language training to learn the language in a more effective way, also indirectly increasing the qualities of the learner as a person.

Name: Univer Global Language
Description:
Evolucionamos para ti. 
http://www.univer-global.com/
Objetivo

Desarrollar ejecutivos más exitosos, a través de un servicio de calidad en la enseñanza de idiomas, a fin de volverlos más rentables en su desempeño para su empresa.
El esquema económico de nuestros días presenta nuevas exigencias al ejecutivo de las corporaciones de nuestro país. La apertura comercial, así como la globalización de las economías en todo el mundo han modificado nuestra forma de hacer negocios, utilizando como idioma universal de comunicación, el inglés.

El aprendizaje se da a través de varias experiencias culturales y académicas, por medio de las cuales se desarrolla la habilidad de establecer comunicación oral y escrita efectiva (con seguridad, fluidez y corrección gramatical), tanto para la vida diaria como para desenvolverse en el ámbito de los negocios.

Capacitamos a ejecutivos de todos los niveles en la realización de sus actividades comunicativas en relación al uso del inglés en los ámbitos que se requiere. Contando con maestros altamente capacitados en el conocimiento del lenguaje y su cultura.

Univer Global is an exceptional language school, delivering high quality education in our region.

Desarrollar personas más exitosas, através de un servicio de calidad en la enseñanza de idiomas.

Ser la empresa de servicios especializados en idiomas más importante de la región.
