Name: Habitat Academy
Description:
Habitat Academy is a socially conscious institution that teaches English in English via communicative and task-based methods, guided by its well-crafted unique curriculum. This is done in a non-traditional environment with hands-on experience. We aim not just to improve our students’ English level but also to help them evolve into open-minded, virtuous and ethical characters with a global-citizen mindset.

At Habitat, students benefit from our Living Learning English method, specially designed to make English learning fun and everlasting. Activities include cooking, creative drama, blogging, film analysis, filmmaking, storytelling, reading/writing, cultural celebrations, song writing/music, etc.

Method
We teach English in English without a formal textbook via the communicative approach. This is done in a non-traditional environment with hands-on experience.

Evaluation
We are not exam and testing oriented. We evaluate each and every student based on her/his speaking, comprehension, listening and cultural perception abilities. We send out personalized letters in regards to student's progress regularly.

Vision
We aim not just to improve our students’ English level but also to help them evolve into open-minded, virtuous and ethical characters with a global-citizen mindset.

Name: NGLS YABANCI DİL DÜNYASI ANTAKYA
Description: Devamlı yenilenen ve teknoloji çağının hızla değişim gösterdiği alanlarda uyum sağlayıp Türkiye başta olmak üzere diğer ülkelerde de şubeler açmak ve erişimi global hale getirmektir.

Name: Top English Santo André
Description:
A metodologia da Top English é 100% focada na conversação desde a primeira aula. Nossos alunos aprendem a construir frases e se comunicar de maneira prática e eficiente desde o primeiro dia. Com esse método direto e eficaz, conseguimos reduzir o tempo necessário para alcançar uma comunicação satisfatória em inglês.

Aulas Online ao Vivo
Oferecemos aulas online ao vivo com professor exclusivo, que podem ser individuais, em dupla ou no máximo em trio. Name: langolerta
Description:
langolerta
Katharina Amanatidou
2004 in Thessaloniki-Griechenland gegründet, hat die Sprachschule langolerta International Language School ihre Schüler immer mit Erfolg auf die Sprachprüfungen in Deutsch, Englisch, Französisch, Italienisch und Spanisch vorbereitet. Auf die erfolgreichen Ganzjahreskurse folgten jedes Jahr Intensivkurse im Sommer. Schon ab 2007 wurden bei uns interaktive Tafeln verwendet. Im selben Jahr entstanden die ersten Angebote im Sprachreisen-Sektor, dem wir zu dem Zeitpunkt noch nicht weiter nachgegangen sind. Bis 2012  hatte die Schule außerdem auch Computerkurse im Programm, die auf die ECDL-und Cambridge-Prüfungen vorbereiteten oder den Umgang mit Computern lehrten. IIm Jahr 2005 entstanden unsere ersten Sprachseminare, wie speak&go und try&go, sowie weitere Sprachseminare, wie phonetic crash course, stay in touch u.a., die immer innovativ waren.
Ab 2012 fingen wir mit unserem live-online Unterricht an, der daraus entstand, dass viele Kursteilnehmer das Land verließen, um aufgrund der finanziellen Krise in Griechenland eine bessere Perspektive in deutschsprachigen Ländern zu suchen. 2014 und nach zehn Jahren Arbeit in meiner eigenen Sprachschule, fasste ich den Entschluss wieder nach Frankfurt, in meine Geburtsstadt zurück zu kehren und die Schule irgendwann wieder mit neuen Ideen und einem neuen Schwung aufzumachen. Nun ist es soweit, ab September 2017 sollen die Kurse beginnen. Ob das nun live-online Kurse oder Ganzjahreskurse sind, in-house Training in Firmen, Sprachreisen, Sprachseminare, Intensivkurse, Prüfungsvorbereitung, Kinder-oder Jugendkurse, Studenten-oder Erwachsenenkurse sind, unsere Muttersprachler sind alle vom Fach, das Sie unterrichten und Sie in guten Händen.
Wir haben den Namen um den Zusatz Digital Language Travel erweitert, da wir abgesehen von präsenten Sprachreisen auch digitale anbieten. 
Ab 2023 gibt es langolerta nur noch remote.

Name: Hugle Education Niterói
Description: Na Hugle Education ensinamos inglês e espanhol 4x mais rápido que nos métodos tradicionais. Os nossos alunos aprendem com o Método Callan da mesma forma que aprenderam a língua materna em 12 meses.

Name: DLPS
Description:
Nous ne sommes pas une école de langues traditionnelle. Nous ne vous donnerons pas de listes de vocabulaire interminables et nous ne vous apprendrons pas à simplement "parler". 

Notre mission est de résoudre un problème bien plus profond que rencontrent les professionnels ambitieux : le décalage entre leur intelligence et leur capacité à la projeter dans une langue étrangère.

Vous êtes compétent, mais votre hésitation vous fait paraître junior.
Vous connaissez les règles de grammaire, mais vous perdez vos moyens face à un manager.
Vous avez le sentiment que votre voix et votre autorité sont piégées derrière une barrière linguistique.

Chez DLPS, nous traitons la cause, pas seulement les symptômes. Notre méthodologie unique fusionne la psychologie du "mindset" avec des techniques linguistiques de pointe. Nous ne sommes pas des tuteurs ; nous sommes des architectes de la confiance.

Notre système est conçu pour démanteler la peur de parler, recâbler les habitudes mentales qui vous ralentissent (comme la traduction depuis l'arabe), et vous équiper de stratégies de communication pour performer dans les situations à haute pression.

Nous travaillons exclusivement avec :
- Des professionnels ambitieux déterminés à transformer leur impact en réunion.
- Des leaders et des entrepreneurs qui doivent communiquer avec autorité sur la scène internationale.
- Des étudiants brillants visant des carrières mondiales.

Nos programmes de coaching structurés (comme le "Foundations Accelerator" et le "Professional Fluency Mastermind") ne sont pas pour ceux qui cherchent des leçons occasionnelles, mais pour ceux qui s'engagent dans une véritable transformation.

 Suivez cette page pour des analyses pointues sur la psychologie de la performance linguistique.
 Si vous êtes prêt à investir dans un système qui délivre des résultats concrets, envoyez-nous un message privé pour discuter de nos programmes de coaching.

Name: Escola Pública Bilíngue
Description:
ESCOLA PUBLICA BILINGUE LTDA
Sede: AL CAULIM, 115 - Bairro: Ceramica – Municipio: São Caetano do Sul – SP – Cep: 09.531-195

MISSÃO
Desenvolver e disseminar a língua inglesa desde as primeiras idades, em toda sociedade, inspirando a habilidade de aprender outro idioma e respeitando sempre a diversidade e a individualidade, garantindo desta forma um futuro com novas oportunidades, para todos, sem distinção.

VISÃO
Proporcionar e garantir que todo estudante de escola pública tenha fluência na língua inglesa.

OBJETIVO
Através da nossa metodologia inovadora de ensino associada principalmente a nossa plataforma on-line, nosso objetivo é transformar as escolas públicas em escolas públicas bilíngues, garantindo um custo muito reduzido comparado aos métodos tradicionais e atendendo as Diretrizes Nacionais para a Educação Plurilíngue no Brasil (parecer CNE/CEB nº 2/2020, aprovado em 9 de julho de 2020).

Name: Instituto Cervantes Río de Janeiro
Description:
El Instituto Cervantes es la institución creada por España en 1991 para promover universalmente la enseñanza, el estudio y el uso del español y contribuir a la difusión de las culturas hispánicas. Las sedes de la institución se encuentran en Madrid y Alcalá de Henares (Madrid), ciudad natal del escritor Miguel de Cervantes.

El Instituto Cervantes está presente en más de 90 ciudades de 45 países, a través de sus centros, aulas y extensiones, en los cinco continentes, entre los que destaca el Instituto Cervantes de Río de Janeiro, el segundo inaugurado en Brasil. A través de Río de Janeiro también se coordina la red de Centros Asociados y la red de centros adscritos y examen DELE de Argentina, Chile y Perú, siendo nuestra institución responsable de:

- Organizar exámenes para el Diploma de Español como Lengua Extranjera (DELE), así como emitir certificados y diplomas oficiales para los participantes en nuestros cursos.

- Organizar cursos de español.

- Organizar cursos de formación para profesores de español.

- Apoyar a los hispanistas en sus actividades.

- Estimular actividades culturales en colaboración con otras organizaciones.

La labor del Instituto Cervantes está dirigida por representantes del mundo académico, cultural y literario de los campos español e hispanoamericano. Rio de Janeiro colabora con museos, galerías, teatros, editoriales y otras instituciones culturales brasileñas, españolas y latinoamericanas.

Name: Association of Language Schools of the Czech Republic
Description:
Association of Language Schools of the Czech Republic (AJS) is a professional organization of language schools, whose main goal is to promote high-quality language education.

The Association was established in 2015 through the merger of two professional associations: ACERT – the Association of Certified Language Schools, and AJŠA – the Association of Language Schools and Agencies of the Czech Republic.

By joining the Association, member schools commit themselves to upholding the fundamental principles of quality foreign language teaching. Among other things, the purpose of AJS is to bring an ethical dimension into the business environment of language services. The Code of Ethics obliges members to act responsibly and morally towards clients, colleagues, and other business entities.

Association of Language Schools is an associate member of EAQUALS, an international association of institutions and organizations engaged in language education. Its aim is to promote and guarantee high quality in language teaching and learning.

Association of Language Schools is also a member of the Chamber of Commerce of the Czech Republic and is an authorized body of the Czech Chamber of Commerce in the field of education in language schools.

L’Alliance Française est située dans un bel hôtel particulier au centre de Rotterdam, sur la Westersingel 14, l’axe culturel de la ville et sa célèbre promenade de sculptures, à 5 minutes à pied de la gare centrale. Dans notre bâtiment, nous vous accueillons sur quatre étages dans des salles aménagées pour des activités culturelles et linguistiques : un café, une galerie d’art AFKunstruimte, une médiathèque composée d’une bibliothèque et d’un centre de documentation sur la France contemporaine (arts visuels), une bibliothèque culturelle (bibliothèque numérique) et une salle aménagée en salle de cinéma et de conférence. À chaque étage se trouvent plusieurs salles de classe spacieuses.

Nos cours de français, dispensés par des professeurs qualifiés et francophones, sont adaptés à un public international ou à vos besoins spécifiques, par exemple pour les cours en entreprise. Le mercredi après-midi, il y a des cours pour les enfants et des cours de néerlandais pour les francophones. Les cours culturels en français vous permettent d’approfondir vos connaissances en histoire de l’art.

Name: Friederich Idiomas
Description:
A Friederich Idiomas é uma empresa que oferece serviços de ensino de idiomas, incluindo programas "in company". "In company" significa que a empresa fornece aulas diretamente nas instalações da organização cliente, adaptando o conteúdo e a abordagem de ensino às necessidades e aos objetivos específicos da empresa.

Aqui estão alguns dos serviços que a Friederich Idiomas pode oferecer "in company":

Aulas de idiomas personalizadas: A empresa pode criar um programa de ensino personalizado para atender às necessidades específicas da empresa. Isso pode incluir aulas de inglês, espanhol, francês, alemão ou outros idiomas, dependendo da demanda.

Aulas em grupo ou individuais: As aulas podem ser ministradas em formato de grupo, onde vários funcionários da empresa participam juntos, ou em formato individual, para atender às necessidades de aprendizado específicas de um funcionário.

Treinamento de habilidades específicas: Além do ensino do idioma em si, a Friederich Idiomas também pode oferecer treinamento em habilidades específicas relacionadas ao ambiente de negócios, como vocabulário especializado, técnicas de apresentação, habilidades de negociação, comunicação por e-mail, entre outros.

Flexibilidade de horários: A empresa pode adaptar os horários das aulas de acordo com a disponibilidade da equipe da empresa cliente. Isso pode incluir aulas no horário de expediente ou fora do horário de trabalho, de acordo com a preferência e a conveniência da empresa.

Acompanhamento e avaliação do progresso: A Friederich Idiomas pode realizar avaliações regulares do progresso dos participantes, fornecendo relatórios e feedback para a empresa. Isso ajuda a monitorar o desenvolvimento dos funcionários e ajustar o programa de ensino, se necessário.

Alliance Française d’Ahmedabad (AFA) is an Indian association that aims at developing bonds between France and India by promoting French Language, Culture, Science & Technology exchanges. Our Services

Our unique approach allows clients to learn Italian through hands-on activities such as cooking, wine tasting, and exploring local markets, all while embracing the authentic Italian lifestyle. 

Whether in the charming town of Nettuno, near Rome, or visiting the iconic sights of Rome itself, The Italian Journey provides an enriching and enjoyable way to experience Italy. 

It's the perfect way to learn the language in a fun, relaxed environment while creating unforgettable memories. 

We also offer:

Customised Training: Whether you're seeking language instruction for your business or private lessons for yourself or your family, our qualified tutors and intercultural trainers are here to provide education that fits your schedule and goals.

Multilingual Expertise: From Italian to English, French to Spanish, we offer comprehensive language instruction for both adults and children at all proficiency levels. We also specialise in exam preparation for schools and universities.

Immersive Experiences: Discover the beauty of language and culture through our immersive programs. Whether in the UK, Italy, or online, our full immersion experiences offer a unique and engaging way to learn.

Meet Raffaella: With over 19 years of teaching experience and a deep passion for cross-cultural understanding, I, Raffaella, am dedicated to providing exceptional service. Holding a CLTA qualification and a Master’s in Intercultural Communication for Business and Professions, I bring both expertise and enthusiasm to every client interaction.

Name: ŠIAURĖS KRYPTIMI
Description:
The world is growing increasingly fascinated with the Nordic countries.

Education system, welfare state model, lifestyle, design, cuisine, books, movies - everything Scandinavian countries put their spin on has acquired a distinguishing hallmark that increased its value in the eyes of the global market.

The label “Scandinavian” has become a shortcut to brand success. It invites trust by promising quality and good taste.

We are inspired by the simplicity, healthfulness, warmth and happiness of Scandinavian way of life. By founding the School for Nordic Languages, we commit to applying some of the life lessons from them as well.

The school for Nordic languages and the translation centre were founded in 2015. Our focus is major Northern European languages: Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish, and Icelandic. Our community is connected through our shared knowledge and experience gained in Scandinavian schools and universities. “Šiaurės kryptimi” employs tutors and translators who want to share their expertise and work alongside like-minded professionals, bound by their collective drive for lifelong learning, discovery and love for their region of interest.

In 2022 we decided to combine our core values — Scandinavian collectivism, Lithuanian flexibility and Nordic perseverance —  through offering Lithuanian language classes alongside those for the Nordic languages.

Now we are facing the age of upheaval. Technology is becoming an elemental force. There is a need to restore the balance of power between the technology and the human mind. We feel empowered to hold our course and keep soaring through the sea of technology. Our mission is to foster a connection between Nordic and Baltic through harnessing language and cultural knowledge. Our vision is to reach out and be reached.

The College is accredited by the British Council and a member of English UK.  Our goal is to help students reach their full potential fast and effectively and our staff are dedicated to ensuring that students have an enjoyable and valuable stay.

Name: UnionGate Conversation Center
Description:
En UnionGate impartimos clases de Inglés, Francés, Alemán, Portugués, Italiano y Chino (Mandarín), además de español para extranjeros, en ambientes tanto social como de negocios. Nuestro MÉTODO es 100% Conversación Impartido Únicamente por Profesores Extranjeros. La enseñanza es de manera natural y directa, evitando la traducción.

El MATERIAL se selecciona de acuerdo con las necesidades del alumno para desarrollar principalmente su expresión oral pero trabajando también las demás áreas de la comunicación como escritura, ortografía y lectura. No tiene ningún costo extra para el alumno y el profesor lo proporciona al momento de la clase.

NIVELES: Básico (A1, A2) Intermedio (B1, B2) y Avanzado (C1, C2) de acuerdo al “Marco Común Europeo de Referencia para las Lenguas” y cada uno se cursa en aproximadamente 6 meses.

TIPOS DE CLASE:

1.	INDIVIDUAL.  En este curso el estudiante cuenta con la atención de su profesor al 100% con un avance totalmente a su ritmo que permite mucho más rapidez y aprovechamiento. Además, el horario es totalmente flexible que se puede modificar hasta con 12 hrs. de anticipación.

2.	SEMI - PRIVADO.  Clase de 2 ó 3 personas, excelente avance y aprovechamiento, con la ventaja de un horario flexible de acuerdo con la autorización de todos los integrantes.

Name: Alliance Française de Chandigarh
Description:
Founded in 1983, Alliance française “Le Corbusier” Chandigarh is a member of the Alliance Française network, with the support of the French Embassy in India.

Alliance Française network, with more than 815 branches in 135 countries, was founded in 1883 by eminent scientists and philosophers, (Louis Pasteur, Ferdinand de Lesseps, Paul Cambon, Victor Duruy….), its aim is to spread French culture and language. Its action is indifferent to any political or religious opinion. It acts in the respect of freedom, democracy and good citizenship.

Alliance française Chandigarh is an Indo/French cultural center, which provides French courses, official French exams, update of information for the local teachers of French, library, cultural activities, translations, help for the students who wish to study in France, and any advise related to French speaking countries, help for the companies who wish to contact French or French speaking companies.

Alliance française Chandigarh is constituted by local body as everywhere in the world. The board is national, and according to the model of the French Law upon NPO (1901), its constitution is as close as possible to the spirit of this model.

Name: Nihongodekita
Description:
Kon’nichiwa!
Hi, I’m Sayaka! I have a bachelor’s degree in international communication, and a certificate from the graduate program at Washington University in St. Louis – ALLEX Japanese teacher training. After teaching in a college in the US, I founded NihongoDekita to help more people with Japanese.

I have had two life-turning points. The first one was when I was 20, I booked a ticket to California and got on a plane for the first time in my life. Growing up, I was always a shy person. I didn’t know much about the outside world but always knew that I loved languages and cultures. I encountered a lot of culture shocks in the US. “Strangers greeted each other!?” “Being natural is ok?” “Wait, you smile when you make eye contact?” “You can be a college student at 50?” and the list goes on… And all those new findings really opened a new path in my life. I started looking for what I really wanted to do.

On the last day of the program when I observed an oral test of American students who I’ve been with in the program, I immediately started crying. They didn’t know anything and now they’re able to communicate. I got to know how rewarding the job is and decided to pursue a Japanese teacher career.



After spending 7 months in the US, I returned to Japan to finish university. I still didn’t know what career I wanted to pursue and thought “I want to learn business English! In the states!” So I started looking for a scholarship program and found a program that lets me learn in a college and in return, teach Japanese there. That was the second turning point.

I instantly knew that I had to apply for this. Luckily I got accepted and started learning in an intensive Japanese teacher training program. As the days go by, I started to fall in love with teaching.

10 individual lessons online

--------------------------------------------
The idea for SweTeach emerged from a desire to approach language training in a new way. We wanted to move beyond textbooks and standardized tests and instead focus on conversation and practical communication. The result? Language coaching – an effective, flexible, and fun way to learn Swedish!

When we developed our concept for Swedish language training, we took inspiration from the fitness world. Here are a couple of our fitness-inspired setups!

 Group Language Training

Who is it for?
 Companies with at least four international talents who want to improve their language skills together.

Just like in a fitness class, the content is tailored to the group’s level and interests. You’ll meet regularly, either online or in person, to grow your language skills together with your language coach. The sessions provide a clear structure and relevant topics, along with plenty of laughs. Learning a new language should be fun and motivating!

 Language Personal Trainer

Who is it for?
 Individuals seeking a tailored study plan

Sometimes you need a bit more personal support, in both training and language learning. That’s where a personal trainer comes in. With us, you can choose whether you want just guidance and feedback from your language coach or a fully customized study plan with regular language sessions. Flexibility, efficiency, and motivation are key here.

Curious to know more about language coaching?

Get in touch, and we’ll book a meeting!

Description:
Bienvenue à Eden Academy, la nouvelle filiale de notre centre établi à Casablanca (LEXIPRO et LEXIJUNIOR). Nous sommes fiers de notre solide réputation et de notre large base de clients fidèles, témoignant de notre expertise de plus de 10 ans dans la formation des langues étrangères.

Chez Eden Academy, nous nous engageons à fournir une formation de qualité supérieure, en nous appuyant sur le Cadre européen commun de référence pour les langues (CECRL). Nos formateurs, soigneusement sélectionnés pour leur niveau de compétence supérieur, assurent une expérience d'apprentissage enrichissante et efficace.

Ce qui distingue notre académie, c'est notre approche innovante. En plus des cours traditionnels, nous proposons des ateliers, des événements et des workshops couvrant une large gamme de sujets, tels que la communication et le codage. Nous croyons que l'apprentissage d'une langue ne se limite pas à la grammaire et au vocabulaire, mais implique également l'exploration de nouvelles compétences et leur mise en pratique.

Notre espace de formation est moderne et accueillant, offrant un environnement propice à un apprentissage optimal. De plus, nous accompagnons nos apprenants dans la réalisation de leurs objectifs liés à la réussite des tests de langues tels que le TCF, le TOEFL, le TOEIC, l'IELTS, et bien d'autres.

Située au cœur de Kénitra, à seulement 4 minutes de la gare, Eden Academy bénéficie d'une localisation idéale pour tous ceux qui souhaitent développer leurs compétences linguistiques et atteindre leurs objectifs professionnels et personnels. Nous sommes également ravis d'annoncer notre prochaine ouverture à Tanger, offrant aux résidents de cette ville dynamique une opportunité exceptionnelle d'accéder à notre expertise en formation linguistique.

Rejoignez-nous chez Eden Academy pour une expérience d'apprentissage enrichissante, basée sur une formation de qualité, un cadre moderne et un soutien personnalisé. Ensemble, nous concrétiserons vos aspirations.

Name: English Camp
Description: O programa de imersão do English Camp é diferenciado e superintensivo para aquele que quer desenvolver ou melhorar o domínio da língua Inglesa. O programa é especialmente indicado para executivos, empresários e profissionais que tenham dificuldades ou inibição, ou mesmo para aqueles que precisam buscar desenvoltura e segurança para a participação em palestras, convenções ou congressos, viagens ao exterior ou receptivo de estrangeiros. Em um ambiente com conforto, privacidade e segurança, o participante pratica o Inglês por 13 horas diárias, levando o interessado a terminar sua estadia falando, mas principalmente pensando em inglês. Se o participante já tem o domínio da língua, fortalecerá ainda mais sua comunicação, aprendendo novos termos e vocabulários, sofisticando mais seu linguajar. Se o domínio da língua ainda não é o satisfatório, o programa desenvolverá no interessado o conhecimento e, principalmente, o caminho para pensar em inglês.  Entrar em clima de imersão é vivenciar cada situação aprendendo a identificar e associar o que está sendo dito com o que está acontecendo. Participantes de todos os níveis, ao usar exclusivamente o Inglês, mesmo que inicialmente com sentenças incompletas, percebem no decorrer da imersão um desenvolvimento extraordinário de sua fluência e compreensão, superando em geral, toda e qualquer expectativa. No English Camp, as atividades são realizadas durante o dia todo e desta forma motivam, induzem e provocam a comunicação em inglês.

Name: EdVenture School
Description:
EdVenture este o școală de limbi străine și centru oficial de pregătire Cambridge English pentru examenele Cambridge și IELTS. Până în 2022, ne-am numit Road Language Centre. 

EdVenture a fost înființat în 2005 ca departament dedicat pregătirii pentru examene de limba engleză în cadrul Road Language Centre. Organizăm cursuri de engleză și germană pentru copii, cursuri de engleză pentru adulți și cursuri de pregătire pentru examenele Cambridge, IELTS, TOEFL sau SAT. Cursurile se desfășoară atât online, cât și la sediul nostru. De asemenea, organizăm cursuri de engleză pentru companii și programe educaționale speciale precum Școala de Vară.

În 2022 am ales să ne schimbăm numele din Road Language Centre în EdVenture School. Pentru noi, fiecare demers educațional seamănă cu o aventură: experiențe și oameni noi, entuziasm și nerăbdare, îmbogățire profesională și personală. La 16 ani de la înființare suntem pregătiți să intrăm intr-un nou capitol dedicat învățării limbilor străine 

EdVenture este o școală de limbi străine acreditată de Ministerul Muncii și Ministerul Educației prin Autoritatea Națională pentru Calificări (ANC) și este membru British Council Addvantage.

Anual, sute de cursanți aleg să se pregătească pentru examene de limba engleză sau să învețe limbi străine alături de noi. Profesorii foarte bine pregătiți și atmosfera relaxantă și primitoare a școlii sunt doar câteva aspecte apreciate de cursanți.

Name: Cape Studies
Description:
Cape Studies is a privately owned Educational institution 

- you will find much better care for your specific challenges with us than with a public institution. Founded in 1995 as one of the first language schools, we can proudly state that we are not just a founding member of the language travel industry in Cape Town - 

we are Cape Town

Cape Studies is the only language school in South Africa that is fully compliant with BEE (Black Economic Empowerment) Level 2 certification. Para tanto, buscamos propiciar um ambiente educacional interativo, academicamente forte, que encoraja a criatividade, a autoconfiança e a autonomia, garantindo seu desenvolvimento completo: intelectual, físico, social e emocional. 

A Maple Bear é uma escola baseada em valores e, como principais norteadores, destacam-se: 

Academic excellence
Build social values
Caring
Safety

Name: Lingua Franca Language Centre
Description:
Founded in 2012, Lingua Franca  has had  
a vision of transforming and modernizng language learning for every student by making it fun and  highly effective.

Our impeccable reputation based on qualification: all trainers hold a university degree and are certified internationally,
The use of  cutting edge techniques to make teaching more involving and  efficient. 

Students learning English for further edication or work and using it when communicating with their partners all over the world and have proved their language competence internationally. 


Tailor made courses of Business English at Lingua Franca in site in the heart of Chisinau  or online creates the most favorable learning conditions for every student during their English lessons.All the materials are chosen with seamlessly integrated digital content. "Handmade" teaching that involves microlearning leads you to visible results in short time.


Our principle is - the student does NOT do in the classroom what he can easily do on his own. Thus, the teaching is focused on developing productive skills while the reproductive, repetitive part is left for guided self-study provided with anytime at-home help with in-app solutions and mentorship from qualified teachers. 

We don't advertise language learning,
we want to show you a place where you can!

Name: LinGo Immersion
Description:
#LinGo Immersion es la plataforma digital para que estudiantes de idiomas extranjeros conecten con profes de idiomas para la realización de inmersiones lingüísticas y culturales personalizadas en el país nativo. 

¿Qué hace que LinGo Immersion sea mejor que cualquier curso de idiomas?

Los estudiantes pueden vivir como un local disfrutando de auténticas experiencias de inmersión lingüística y cultural de la mano de profesores nativos, no sólo en las ciudades, sino también en zonas rurales con el profesor más adecuado para ellos. De particular a particular.

Los profesores de idiomas pueden conseguir un dinero extra estableciendo libremente su metodología, disponibilidad y tarifa con total flexibilidad, además de reutilizar espacios vacíos.

La #LingoImmersion no se trata sólo de enseñar y aprender un idioma, se trata de descubrir nuevas culturas y viajar de forma sostenible, local y consciente. ¿Estás listo para unirte?

Nous devrions tous apprendre comme les bébés apprennent à parler, en  écoutant, en entendant, en regardant des images...

Name: Stuttaford Academy

Training in Portugal | Spain | Germany | France | Colombia | Brazil | Angola | USA

Name: Apostrophe•Centre de Langue Française•ფრანგული ენის ცენტრი აპოსტროფი
Description:
Créée en 2022 et active dans la formation professionnelle en langue française, Apostrophe c’est aussi une structure commerciale et administrative chargée d’établir une relation de confiance avec le public, qu’il s’agisse des professionnels ou des particuliers. 
Notre approche pédagogique
Apostrophe privilégie une approche communicative et actionnelle, recommandée par le CECRL. Cette démarche vous permet d’améliorer vos aptitudes orales et écrites par des activités issues de votre quotidien.

Nous vous confrontons à des situations qui surviennent dans les domaines variés de la vie sociale, professionnelle et vous aidons à développer des stratégies qui vous permettent de transférer les aptitudes de communication que vous possédez déjà dans votre langue maternelle vers la langue française.

Nous vous aidons à communiquer avec aisance en français et dans un milieu francophone.
Les formateurs passionnés composant le centre de langue française Apostrophe sont réputés pour leur expérience et leur personnalité riche en couleurs. Accompagnés par un responsable pédagogique, ils sauront exploiter tout votre potentiel linguistique et mettre en avant vos qualités.
L’équipe administrative est à votre disposition pour répondre à vos demandes d’information, de tarifs ou de suivi.

Name: Gilgamesh Language Solutions
Description:
In today’s rapidly-expanding Middle Eastern economy, Gilgamesh Language Solutions understands the need for training programs in Arabic Language and Cultural Awareness in the professional world. That’s why we specialize in providing top-tier Arabic language and culture training and consultancy, offering state-of-the-art courses in:

• Business Arabic
• Government & Military Arabic
• Conversational Arabic
• Arab Cultural Awareness 

With the option to concentrate on: 

• Modern Standard Arabic 
• A region-specific dialect: Gulf, Iraqi, Levantine, or Egyptian Arabic 

Tailored to your specific needs, our courses cater to individuals and corporations alike, accommodating any skill level and learning pace. To accommodate the fast-paced lives of busy professionals, classes are conducted online, and you can choose from: 

• One-on-one sessions
• Group classes
• Intensive learning experiences
• Guided self-study

Forget those cookie cutter, one-size-fits-all training programs. Our exclusive and unrivaled training curriculum and materials are expertly created in house  by Gilgamesh Language Solutions' CEO, an esteemed Arabic expert holding a Ph.D. in Linguistics from SOAS, University of London. Our team of seasoned experts combines linguistic mastery, profound knowledge of cultural intricacies, and decades of high-level experience working with international clients spanning a wide array of professional fields, making us the preferred choice for professionals who recognize the value of effective communication and cultural acumen in today's interconnected world. Ready to break language and cultural barriers and expand your horizons? Contact us now to elevate your communication and empower your success!

Name: Rockfeller Dourados
Description:
Escola de Idiomas at Rockfeller Language Center. 
Ensinamos Inglês e Espanhol. 

Fundada em 2004 em Santa Catarina, a Rockfeller surgiu com a concepção de sempre buscar a excelência no ensino de idiomas. Seu crescimento rápido permitiu que, em 2006, a escola abrisse sua primeira franquia, e, em 2008, fosse oficialmente implementado seu modelo de negócios como franqueadora*, levando unidades 
Rockfeller para todo o Brasil. Hoje somos mais de 100 escolas em todas as regiões do país, com alunos e franqueados satisfeitos e uma marca premiada por sua excelência no segmento.
Com uma visão do ensino de idiomas que inicia com uma metodologia exclusiva e comprovadamente eficaz dentro de salas de aula, mas transcende para o aprendizado na vida real, a Rockfeller prepara crianças, jovens e adultos para as oportunidades do mundo que apenas quem é fluente em inglês pode aproveitar. 
Grandes promoções no trabalho, um mundo todo para conhecer e uma jornada acadêmica sempre em evolução: o que quer que seja sucesso para você, só a Rockfeller te ajuda a conquistar.

Name: Kecia Teacher
Description:
Ajudo profissionais e empresas a alcançarem fluência em inglês com segurança e certificação internacional. 
Meu foco é transformar o idioma em uma ferramenta estratégica de carreira!

- Experiência com preparação para TOEFL, IELTS e Cambridge.
- Método baseado em constância e prática real de comunicação. 
- Acompanhamento personalizado para entrevistas, reuniões e apresentações em inglês. 

Mais do que ensinar, meu objetivo é abrir portas para oportunidades globais, para crescimento profissional e para a confiança de se comunicar como quem sabe o que está fazendo.

Vem aprender ou desenvolver inglês comigo!

Description:
Oferecemos aulas e mentorias de inglês sendo VIP e em grupos com foco de serviços ultrapersonalizadas, com o compromisso de 
transformar a comunicação dos nossos alunos em apenas 180 dias.

Nossa abordagem única vai além do ensino tradicional: trabalhamos profundamente os medos, inseguranças e traumas dos alunos em conteúdos durante a aula e pós aula e utilizamos estratégias comprovadas para destraumatizar o aprendizado do inglês. 
Entendemos que medos, inseguranças e experiências passadas podem bloquear o progresso, por isso focamos no lado emocional do aprendizado muito além de cursos de inglês.

Ajudamos nossos alunos a superar essas barreiras e a se comunicar com confiança, seja para alcançar novas oportunidades de emprego ou se integrar melhor em um novo país

Name: Accent Advisor
Description:
Since our founding in 2017, Accent Advisor has become the gold standard for American accent training and pronunciation coaching in the United States & Canada. We empower thousands of students each week - from professionals and actors to dedicated learners across every industry and language background - in their journey toward clear, confident, and authentic communication in American English.

Unmatched Expertise & Flexibility
Our difference is our deep specialization. You train 1-on-1, live online, with seasoned American accent coaches whose instruction and specific feedback are proven to unlock professional opportunities like promotions and new careers. Every lesson is fully customized to neutralize your native language challenges and target your unique speaking habits.

Key Benefits:
* 1-on-1 Custom Coaching: Dedicated, expert attention.
* Available 24/7: Learn on your schedule, worldwide.
* Transformative Results: Achieve professional-grade clarity and confidence.

Our Mission: Speak to Be Heard
At Accent Advisor, we are driven by the belief that everyone deserves to be heard and understood. Our mission is simple: to dismantle communication barriers and equip you with the skills to express yourself with absolute confidence, accuracy, and impact. Join the global community that is mastering the American accent with the world's best.

En Asqua Learning International , entendemos que aprender un nuevo idioma es mucho más que memorizar palabras y reglas gramaticales: es abrir puertas a nuevas culturas, conexiones y oportunidades. Como academia de idiomas, estamos comprometidos en acompañarte en cada paso de este emocionante viaje, ofreciéndote un enfoque personalizado y cercano.
Nuestra metodología innovadora, respaldada por inteligencia artificial, no solo se adapta a tus necesidades, sino que también hace que el aprendizaje sea dinámico y divertido. Ya sea que estés aprendiendo inglés, alemán, italiano, portugués o francés, en Asqua Learning International te proporcionamos las herramientas y el apoyo necesarios para que alcances tus metas con confianza y entusiasmo.

O início das aulas é em qualquer época do ano, não sendo necessário esperar o semestre letivo. 
Nossas turmas são compostas por no máximo 10 alunos, além disso a Twenty conta com uma ferramenta de apoio no ensino de modo online, o TEO (Twenty English On-line) para melhor fixação do conteúdo com interatividade e avaliação de desempenho.

On-line - Aulas on-line e AO VIVO.

Fale inglês. Matriculas sempre abertas!

Description:
The Place to B and B est une grande maison confortable et accueillante dotée de 5 chambres comprenant chacune une salle d’eau privative et une vue magnifique sur la rivière et le lac de Huelgoat. Ici nous vous proposons non seulement des chambres d’hôte mais aussi des stages d’anglais en immersion avec hébergement et restauration de qualité.
Une nouveauté qui réunit tous les éléments d’une formation réussie en anglais :

L’efficacité de nos stages intensifs

L’originalité de nos activités pédagogiques

L’énergie et l’implication de nos formateurs anglophones qualifiés

Les avantages de faire partie d’un groupe d’apprenants motivés ayant le même niveau en anglais

L’expérience enrichissante d’échanger avec des britanniques vivant sur place grâce à des nombreuses activités organisées par nos soins

L’impact positif d’une immersion totale

Les bienfaits d’un environnement reposant

Vous avez aimé nos stages intensifs en centre ville à Brest ?

Vous allez adorer nos formations à la campagne !

Une expérience inédite lors de laquelle vous êtes baignés dans un environnement totalement anglo-saxon et authentique du matin au soir et même la nuit !

En prolongeant l’immersion sur plusieurs jours complets, comme si vous étiez dans un pays anglophone, vous allez améliorer votre expression orale, acquérir une meilleure spontanéité et réactivité en anglais et gagner en confiance.

The Place to B and B :  l’endroit idéal pour profiter de notre pédagogie efficace de manière encore plus intense et plus riche.

Try it, it’s the place to be!

Name: Talk Shop English
Description:
Talk Shop diseña y moldea cada curso para que se adapte a sus objetivos y requisitos.



Ofrecemos clases de inglés para empresas que buscan mejorar su perfil en el mercado internacional. Nuestros cursos tienen precios competitivos y ofrecen una excelente relación calidad-precio. Tenemos una variedad de paquetes que hacen de Talk Shop una inversión que no puede permitirse perder.

Con TALK SHOP English no hay que memorizar ejercicios de gramática largos y aburridos o ser demasiado tímido para "intentarlo", independientemente de su nivel. Te ayudaré a desarrollar una amplia gama de herramientas de conversación para sentirte seguro al comunicarte en todo tipo de situaciones y circunstancias.


Nuestro curso es único y muy diferente a cualquier otro que haya experimentado antes. Nuestros libros son atractivos y apoyan el aprendizaje visual. Nuestra gramática y vocabulario objetivo están estructurados de manera inteligente e integrados en temas interesantes de gran variedad que permiten al alumno absorber nuevas herramientas gramaticales y de vocabulario sin esfuerzo.



Incorporaremos de forma natural modismos, frases fijas y expresiones, mientras dominamos la pronunciación, dando una mayor fluidez a tus conversaciones.
Los temas son relevantes, vibrantes, interesantes y estimulantes. Mi curso está diseñado para profundizar directamente en la conversación, abordando los problemas gramaticales a medida que surgen, evitando así ejercicios gramaticales exhaustivos y minimizando el "tiempo de conversación del maestro". Mi método da como resultado que las clases se adapten a sus necesidades, lo que permite una práctica oral más productiva.

Name: SWITCH School of English
Description:
Our English course combines self-study (24/7 E-Learning platform) with one-to-one or in small groups lessons (online or in presence) with a teacher.

The E-Learning Platform (My Grammar Lab from Pearson Language) is an online homework tool that contains exercises to support the material that it’s covered in each lesson (online or in presence). You acquire functional language and practice all the skills, including writing, listening, grammar and pronunciation when and where you want, getting automatic grades and support from your teacher when needed.
In short, this is what you get:
• One-to-One or in small groups of maximum six other learners lessons (online or in prsence).
• Your personal coach sets personalized learning goals to keep you on track and motivated.
• Students learn, practice and study with unlimited access to self-study activities (My Grammar Lab Platform) on their own time.
• Regular progress reports: At any time throughout the course, we can provide you with in-depth reports about your progress.
Type of lesson:
- In presence lessons
- Remote lessons with Webex
- Group of six or one-to-one lessons

E-learning: for all course participants
- online learning accessible anytime, anywhere
- for PC, Mac and tablets
- multimedia e-learning to improve reading, writing and listening comprehension from Pearson Language
- instant feedback on each task, helping to build confidence and improve on your mistakes.

Personal teacher:
- personal monitoring of your learning progress
- opportunity to ask questions directly to the teacher
- homework and additional assignments 

We are a certified Cambridge Exam Preparation Center: We prepare you for all internationally recognized Cambridge exams: KET, PET, BEC, FCE, CAE, CPE, IELTS, TOEFL.

English for Children
Supervised by native speakers, SWITCH teaches English to children with a lively mix of direct lessons and individual use of the language, cost-effective and entertaining.

- Be safe: segurança para falar

Name: Conversa Spanish Institute - Centro acreditado por el Instituto Cervantes
Description:
Te damos la bienvenida a Conversa Spanish Institute. Aquí no solo enseñamos un idioma; ofrecemos una puerta de entrada a una rica herencia cultural y a una comunidad vibrante que acoge estudiantes de todo el mundo.
 Nuestro método: Con un enfoque personalizado y basado en la inmersión total, nuestro método de enseñanza se adapta a cada estudiante, asegurando una experiencia de aprendizaje efectiva y gratificante. Utilizamos técnicas de enseñanza innovadoras, integrando tecnología de punta y prácticas interactivas para facilitar la comprensión profunda y el uso práctico del español.
 Nuestro equipo: Nuestros educadores son más que maestros; son mentores apasionados y expertos en lingüística, con años de experiencia y un compromiso genuino con el éxito de cada estudiante. Su dedicación y conocimiento hacen de Conversa una institución líder en la enseñanza del español.
 Ubicación privilegiada: Situados en Valencia, nuestros estudiantes disfrutan de la combinación perfecta de aprendizaje y ocio. La ciudad, conocida por su clima ideal, su rica historia y su vibrante vida cultural, ofrece un entorno inigualable para quienes buscan sumergirse en la lengua y cultura españolas.
 Para profesionales yempresas: Ofrecemos programas especializados diseñados para profesionales y empresas que buscan mejorar las habilidades lingüísticas de sus equipos en un contexto globalizado. Nuestros cursos están personalizados para satisfacer las necesidades específicas del mundo empresarial y profesional.
 Una comunidad global: Al elegir Conversa, te unes a una comunidad internacional de estudiantes que, como tú, están emocionados por aprender y explorar. Nuestros eventos, talleres y actividades culturales están diseñados para fomentar amistades duraderas y una comprensión más profunda de la cultura española.
 Explora el idioma español y sumérgete en una experiencia cultural sin igual. En Conversa Spanish Institute, no solo aprenderás español; vivirás el español. Esperamos dar

Name: Berlitz Paraguay
Description:
Berlitz ha ayudado por más de 147 años a varios alumnos a hablar con confianza de manera sencilla, rápida y efectiva estando hoy con más de 500 Centros en más de 70 países en todos los continentes.

Nuestra Orientación Total al Cliente, permite que podamos asesorarte ya sea de manera individual o a tu empresa, escuchando cuáles son tus objetivos y proponiendo una solución efectiva, verdadera y práctica.

Ofrecemos clases de Inglés, Portugués, Francés, Alemán, Italiano y Español para extranjeros, tanto para adultos como para adolescentes y niños. 

Tenemos vasta experiencia en Business English y Social English, a través del método Berlitz, que permite que hables desde el primer día de clases en inglés de manera práctica y fácil, sin tediosas explicaciones.

Ofrecemos clases Presenciales, Online, Privadas, Grupales y Empresariales, ya sea en el Centro Berlitz o en tu empresa.

Te ofrecemos asesoría inicial sin cargo ni compromiso, y una vez inscripto, te seguimos asesorando para que tu experiencia sea excelente y tus objetivos sean cumplidos ya sea a corto o mediano plazo.

Nuestros materiales son 100% digitales, a los que podés acceder a través del Portal del Alumno, que permitirá tener en la palma de tu mano el libro o en tu laptop, desktop o tablet, donde y cuándo quieras. 

Te esperamos!

Name: The Spanish Language Factory
Description:
The Spanish Language Factory provides bespoke online Spanish language courses to professionals. Lessons allow students to use Spanish confidently in a range of contexts and enhance their general and business communication. Moreover, online Spanish lessons enable them to study from any location and at a suitable time.  Students always find lessons motivating and enjoyable!

My name is Silvia and I am a highly qualified native-speaker Spanish Language Coach, Trainer and Teacher, who has more than 12 years’ experience in creating and delivering personalized Spanish classes for professionals.

I have taught students individually and on a group basis to speak fluently in Spanish, allowing them to use Spanish confidently in a range of contexts and improve their general and business communication.  My students come from established companies in Central London, mostly in the financial and insurance sector. These include companies such as Banco Santander, AON, Parthenon-EY or TA Associates.

Being a Spanish Neurolanguage Coach allows me to combine both Neurolanguage and Coaching Techniques to enhance learning process. Through personalized classes,  I create an engaging, motivating and brain-friendly learning environment so that learners can achieve their Spanish language goals in an efficient way.

Name: Callidus Academy for English and Information Technology
Description:
Callidus Academy is an IT and language school. We offer interpretation and translation services related to French and English as well.

At our school, we believe in the power of education to transform lives, and we strive to create a supportive and engaging learning environment for our students. Our experienced and passionate instructors are experts in their fields and are committed to helping our students achieve their language and IT goals.

Whether you're looking to learn a new language, improve your communication skills, or enhance your IT knowledge, we have a wide range of courses and programs to meet your needs. From beginner to advanced levels, our courses are designed to be flexible and customizable, so you can learn at your own pace and according to your own schedule.

We specialize in offering high-quality language solutions for a variety of occasions, ensuring effective communication in both English and French. Whether you are organizing a reunion, hosting an event, or dealing with court proceedings, our professional interpreters are here to bridge the language gap and facilitate smooth interactions.

Description: Wir sprechen inlingua in St. Gallen, Thurgau, Appenzell Ausser - und Innerrhoden.

Name: IFLI Foreign Language Immersion
Description:
The Institute of Foreign Language Immersion (IFLI) was born out of the growing need to learn languages from a perspective other than the conventional one. The world has changed and we face new challenges. Today more than ever, being able to communicate in a foreign language is synonymous with job opportunity, academic and/or professional growth, and without a doubt also personal development.

We are clear that linguistic knowledge no longer belongs solely to the teacher – as it happened in other times – but it is out there available to everyone: in the media, social networks, travelling abroad, YouTube, etc. Therefore, our method is based on facilitating access to that knowledge but in an effective way to guarantee your progress. We give you the map, you make the trip.

With more than 20 years of experience in teaching languages, we know that the key to motivating people to continue learning a language is to ensure that they enjoy the learning process. That is why our proposal is that you stop studying and try language immersion. You will see that you will learn naturally, that your level of motivation will always remain high and that together with us you will be part of a large community of people from all over the world, who, like you, have a common goal: to speak a language.

At IFLI, our mission is to facilitate access to language learning. We want to reach as many people as possible to give them the opportunity to learn languages, either with one of our programs or with the varied offer of free activities. Are you ready to learn a language in a different way? If the answer is yes, then welcome to IFLI.

Name: Enwa Dil Akademi

Senede 750'den fazla öğrenci mezun ediyor, Genel İngilizce, YDS YDT ve IELTS aynı zamanda yalnızca konuşma becerisine yönelik derslerle öğrencilerimizin dil gelişimini sağlıyoruz. Name: Janet's - School of English
Description:
En Janet's somos expertos en la formación de idiomas en empresas y estamos especializados en la lengua inglesa. Aportamos valor a las organizaciones mejorando las competencias comunicativas de los equipos mediante cursos de idiomas efectivos y bonificables a través de Fundae.
Con sede en Castelldefels, nuestro objetivo es ayudar a las organizaciones a superar las barreras del idioma y alcanzar el éxito en un entorno empresarial global.

¿Qué ofrecemos a las empresas?
• Formación  bonificable: Gestionamos íntegramente la bonificación de los créditos formativos a través de Fundae, asegurando el máximo aprovechamiento.
• Programas a medida: Diseñamos cursos adaptados a las necesidades específicas de cada trabajador, empresa y sector.
• Clases flexibles: Disponibles en formato online o presencial, ya sea en nuestras instalaciones o en la empresa , para ajustarnos a los horarios y dinámicas laborales de tu equipo.
• Profesores expertos: Profesionales nativos y bilingües con experiencia en formación empresarial.
• Enfoque práctico: Ideal para mejorar habilidades en reuniones, negociaciones y comunicaciones internacionales.

En Janet's School of English, entendemos que el desarrollo de habilidades lingüísticas es clave para la competitividad empresarial. Agenda una reunión con nosotros y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a formar equipos más preparados y globales. 
Formación en idiomas bonificable para empresas.

Name: Rosario Idiomas
Description:
Rosario Idiomas es una consultora especializada y apasionada por los idiomas.
Somos especialistas apasionados en idiomas. Enseñamos idiomas y hacemos que los aprendas.

Nuestro objetivo es el tuyo: que hables un idioma extranjero

Vos sos único. Y porque queremos personalizar nuestras clases a tus intereses y necesidades es que nuestros cursos son reducidos. También dictamos cursos online.

Somos profesionales y nos capacitamos continuamente para brindarte el mejor servicio. Conocemos las teorías de enseñanza tracidionales, buscamos las vanguardistas y creamos una propia. Incorporamos conocimientos de diversas áreas, como Neuromarketing, PNL, Coaching, Psicología Holística, etc.

Trabajamos con ganas, con pasión, con voluntad, con profesionalismo, con responsabilidad y con seriedad.

Name: D´Agosto Language School
Description:
A D'Agosto Language School é um Centro Autorizado Preparatório para os Exames de Cambridge.Temos a satisfação de termos preparado mais de 100 alunos durante nossos 2 anos de vida 
Somos especializados no ensino online para adultos e adolescentes.
Nossa equipe é formada por professores altamente qualificados,  todos certificados pela Universidade de Cambridge, muito bem remunerados, treinados e alinhados com os princípios e valores da escola: profissionalismo, ética, acolhimento,  personalização, respeito.
Te ajudamos a atingir seus objetivos pessoais e profissionais.

Vem estudar com a gente!

Name: Italiano Fácil
Description:
A Italiano Fácil iniciou como um sonho em 2013 através de aulas particulares e presenciais na cidade de Rio Grande, no Rio Grande do Sul. 

Em 2016 o sonho começou a se tornar realidade através da criação de uma plataforma exclusiva de aulas para levar o idioma mais belo do mundo para o país inteiro, e desde então acumulamos mais de 8 mil alunos no Brasil e no mundo. 

Atualmente a sede da empresa está localizada na cidade de Florença, mas a atuação da empresa é 90% via remota, com uma plataforma exclusiva que permite acesso do lado em qualquer dispositivo e de qualquer lugar do mundo. 

Dessa forma, a Italiano Fácil tem como principal objetivo proporcionar uma experiência completamente única ao aprender um novo idioma.

Name: Centre Point
Description:
En 1995 abre las puertas la primera academia de inglés en la pequeña localidad madrileña de San Martin de la Vega. Con el paso de los años incorporamos la división de Clases de Idiomas para empresas, un servicio “a la carta” en cuestión de idiomas. Con la incorporación de idiomas para empresas vino casi seguido nuestra división de traducciones, servicio especializado en traducciones técnicas industriales, digitales y de marketing. Hoy en día prácticamente trabajamos cualquier tema. A continuación incorporamos nuestra división Escolar trabajando directamente con centros escolares tanto públicos como privados o concertados, o con asociaciones de madres y padres, tanto colegios como institutos. También contamos con una división llamada CAMPAMENTOS donde trabajamos para realizar esas estancias orientadas para adquirir y afianzar el inglés tanto en España como en el extranjero.

En 2017 incorporamos nuestra división ONLINE tanto en Inglés como en Español. Esta división nos ha abierto al mundo entero. Plataforma digital donde poder practicar inglés o Español hablando ya no es excusa. La academia en casa.
Location: San Martín de la Vega, Madrid, Madrid

Name: Experience-Japan
Description:
The Experience Japan Trust, a non-profit organization established in 2011 in India, plays a pivotal role as a conduit for cultural exchange between Japan and India. Its mission is to cultivate mutual understanding and appreciation between the diverse cultures of these two nations. The trust is dedicated to showcasing the rich cultural tapestries of Japan and India, thereby fostering strong ties of friendship and cooperation.

By orchestrating a variety of educational and cultural exchange programs, Experience Japan has become a key player in promoting cross-cultural dialogue and providing avenues for cultural enrichment. The trust's goal is to drive positive change within society by illuminating the unique cultural identities of Japan and India. Experience Japan's initiatives are designed to deepen mutual respect for the distinct traditions, values, and customs that shape these societies.

Through its immersive experiences and educational outreach, Experience Japan seeks to narrow cultural divides, advance international understanding, and nurture a worldwide community that embraces diversity and inclusivity.

Name: Capital Region Language Center
Description:
Do your employees need better phone skills? Help writing clearer emails? Stronger presentations in English or another language? Are they struggling to communicate in video calls with colleagues or customers who speak another language? Is language holding them back from a promotion? 
 
For over 20 years, businesses, public agencies, universities, and unions have relied on Capital Region Language Center (CRLC) for Business English and world language instruction to improve employee communication – and their bottom line. CRLC is a certified New York State WBE (Women-Owned Business Enterprise).

No cookie cutter classes here! Experienced teachers evaluate each student, customizing a curriculum specific to your goals. We can improve grammar, reading, writing, listening, and speaking, or focus on one area.

With one-on-one and small group classes, we teach on-site at your workplace, via video call or at our school in Colonie. Many organizations offer our classes as part of a benefit package to attract and retain employees. CRLC can also provide translation and virtual interpretation, as well as a corporate training and organizational communication workshops for your full team.

Our language classes include:
- English (Business & Second Language) 
- Spanish
- Korean
- Arabic
- Chinese
- German
- American Sign Language
- French
- Japanese
- Latin
- Portuguese

We also offer all levels of language classes for children to adults, for travel, school, or cognitive function.

Name: Świat Języków Obcych daGama
Description:
Świat Języków Obcych da Gama to nowoczesna szkoła językowa o ugruntowanej pozycji na rynku wielkopolskim. Sukces swój zawdzięczamy nowoczesnym metodom nauczania, wykwalifikowanym lektorom, atrakcyjności zajęć oraz łączeniu wiedzy z pasją. Wieloletnia tradycja w prowadzeniu zajęć oraz doświadczeni lektorzy są gwarantem naszej jakości.
Podstawowym zadaniem szkoły jest praktyczna nauka języka w oparciu o metodę komunikacyjną i TPR (metoda reagowania całym ciałem). Przygotowujemy również naszych uczniów do zdania egzaminów maturalnych, gimnazjalnych oraz uzyskania międzynarodowych certyfikatów (FCE, CAE, TOEFL, BEC, TOEIC, ZD, ZMP, ZOP, WidaF, DELE).
Oferujemy: -kursy dla dzieci od lat 6- efektywne kursy dla dzieci i młodzieży- zajęcia indywidualne lub małe grupy- kursy przygotowujące do egzaminów- kursy biznesowe

Name: Wizard Tijuca Premium e Madureira
Description: Wizard é a maior escola de idiomas do mundo com uma metodologia revolucionária e a única que garante o aprendizado através de uma certificação internacional. Temos plano de carreira e queremos profissionais apaixonados pela educação e que acreditem, assim como nós, que através do aprendizado de um segundo idioma podemos ajudar milhares de pessoas a terem um futuro melhor.

Name: SpeakHunt
Description: SpeakHunt: Telegram's next-generation language club - learn, communicate, and grow together in a dynamic conversational community.

Name: Edno School
Description:
Edno School offers high quality training in Bulgarian language and culture for all levels. Delivered in small groups in the heart of Sofia and online by passionate and experienced teachers, our courses will enable you to learn Bulgarian in a fun, relaxing and meaningful way. 
As an addition to the regular language classes, there are monthly social and cultural events for the students of Edno School.

Our most popular courses are:
- Online courses in Bulgarian
-Bulgarian language for beginners (A1)
-Bulgarian language for pre-intermediate students (A2)
-Bulgarian language for intermediate students (B1)
-Bulgarian language for upper-intermediate students (B2)
-Corporate training (all levels)
-Conversational Bulgarian classes (all levels)
-Individual training (1-2-1)

Name: English Only Zone
Description:
A practical, immersive method designed to help professionals break language barriers and thrive in English.

With study and work experience in the U.S. (University of Oregon & ACHR Consulting), we blend real-world communication, clear strategy, and human connection to get you fluent faster.

If you’re ready to unlock your English and expand your opportunities, let’s talk.

Name: Royal Street
Description:
We are an Online English Academy that strongly believes in not only teaching English, but making students feel confident enough to use this language in real life... 
So far, the lessons are delivered via online, but "Royal Street Academy" makes sure that all the students feel as committed, engaged and valued as any student that study face-to-face/ in a classroom. 
We combine traditional and unique methodologies with "fan club" customised lessons delivered by our creative writing, drama, music and history specialised teachers' team... so our students can learn English online in a more immersive, artistic and enthusiastic learning process. Our academy "fan club lessons" can cover themes, such as "The Beatles Journey", "Harry Potter's Magical World" , "A legend called, Queen", "Miss Beatrix Potter", "Dickens' reading", ...etc... 
Learning English must be also fun!
For professional and more formal English, we also teach "Business English" which includes customised lessons containing topics, such as hospitality, health, marketing, costumer service, etc. 
After a minimum of learning hours, we reward our more committed students with our unique/customised digital certificates of completion (min 30h) or assistance (min 20h) granted by Royal Street Academy.  
We are a team of passionate teachers with a common target: "making our students learning process a wonderful experience"
Our promise: YOU WILL ENJOY LEARNING AND YOU WILL SPEAK ENGLISH!

Name: Let's go! English School - Academia de inglés
Description: Academia de Inglés para todos los niveles a partir de los 4 años con profesorado nativo y grupos reducidos. Se preparan exámenes oficiales de Cambridge y Trinity.

Name: Soultaque
Description:
Soultaque specializes in teaching Brazilian Portuguese to foreigners.
With dynamic methods, a strong focus on conversation, and a deep dive into Brazilian culture, we help students from all over the world achieve fluency in a practical, light, and natural way.
 Connect with Brazil. Learn with us!

Name: Mary and Friends
Description: Somos uma escola de inglês especializada no ensino para crianças e adolescentes. Na Mary and Friends, ensinamos inglês de forma natural, divertida e dinâmica, por meio de aulas personalizadas e métodos inovadores, atuando com profissionalismo e paixão pelo ensino.

Name: inlingua School of Languages in Singapore
Description:
With over 250 language centres in 30 countries, inlingua is one of the world’s leading language training organisations. Since 1972, our school in Singapore has helped people across all ages and proficiency levels in their language learning journey. Today, we are the institution of choice for thousands of individuals and organisations.

inlingua Singapore offers language courses in over 20 languages – English, Chinese, French, Korean, Spanish, Thai, German, Japanese, Italian, Malay, Indonesian, Vietnamese, and many more. Our courses are available in a variety of structures and delivery modes, or can be customised to best meet your General, Corporate, Business or Academic needs.

From design to instruction, our team of expert teachers & educators adapt to your learning goals and preferences to help you feel confident about using language effectively in all aspects of your life. Learn to listen, speak, read and write with practical and lifelong language skills.

As an EduTrust certified institution, we are committed to maintaining gold standards that ensures the quality of your education. Come experience the inlingua Method and enjoy a whole new world of learning with us!

Name: ROLANG School
Description:
ROLANG School is a unique institution in Romania that specializes in teaching the Romanian language to international students. Founded in 2009, the school has quickly established itself as a leader in the field of Romanian language education.
The school offers a variety of language courses, including:
- general language courses for all levels of Romanian (physical and online lessons)
- intensive language courses for all levels of Romanian (physical and online lessons)
- conversation courses (physical and online lessons)
- summer school (physical event)
- exam preparation courses for the citizenship exam (physical and online lessons)
- Business Romanian and cultural integration courses (physical and online lessons)
ROLANG School has around 1.000 students / year from all over the world and has helped all of them achieve their language learning goals.  ROLANG is a registered trademark that also has its own publishing house, ROLANG Publishing House.
ROLANG has its course manuals which are delivered all over the world. More info on the "Learn Romanian Manual" page (http://rolang.ro/learn-romanian-manual.php).
"Romanian Verbs" and “Essentials of Romanian Vocabulary & Grammar”: to be published. 
ROLANG instructors are linguists, Ph.D. holders, authors of Romanian manuals for foreigners, teachers with more than 18 years of experience in teaching Romanian to foreigners, and Romanian native speakers. 
ROLANG School is accredited by international organizations, such as ICC – The International Language Association. In November 2022, ROLANG became the first language center in Romania to offer the internationally recognized teacher training program EUROLTA (European Certificate in Language Teaching to Adults).
Awards 
2017/2018 iStudy Global Award for “Language School of the Year”
2018/2019 iStudy Global Award for “Language School of the Year"
2019/2020 iStudy Global Award for “Language School of the Year"
“Top 100 Romania” trophy (2022)
“Golden Company” trophy (2023)

Name: Orouba Language Schools - Maadi
Description: OLS is a Prek-12 school that consistently strives to provide its students with quality education. To achieve our goals, the school continuously engages highly qualified teachers and regularly supports them with quality training and professional development. The latest teaching methodology is applied in all classes, from kindergarten to secondary school. Instruction is also supported by various teaching aids and efficient resources. Teachers have full access to the most up-to-date technological aids, including computer labs, data shows, and smart boards, as well as access to the internet to scaffold effective learning.

Name: Javidan Institute (موسسه جاویدان)
Description:
"Embark on a multilingual journey at our institute where you can immerse yourself in the richness of English, Chinese, Italian, Turkish, German, French and etc .
Our expert instructors and immersive learning environment will guide you to fluency, unlocking new cultures and opportunities along the way. Begin your global communication adventure with us today!"

Name: Facilmente Inglese
Description:
Facilmente Inglese è la prima scuola di inglese online che usa la logica e i 5 sensi per parlare la lingua inglese.
Il percorso utilizza il metodo Facilmenteinglese che esce completamente dagli schemi e dalle regole tradizionali, da sempre utilizzati.

Name: Language Kendra
Description:
*German Language Courses - Your Path to Fluency! 
 *Levels Offered:* A1, A2, B1, B2, C1
 *Goethe Certificate Exam Prep*
 *Free Study Material Included*
 *Live Interactive Sessions*
 *Live Tests and QA*
 *Recorded Classes*
 *Lifetime Access*

 Please explore our social media profiles by clicking https://simple.bio/languagekendra?utm_source=smp_sharemp_share

 *Begin your language journey today!*

Name: Follow Up Idiomas
Description:
Follow-up is a language school specialized in developing fully customized courses. In the market for 20 years, it serves clients who do not fit into regular courses and want a more individualized service.
Our method is known as "Customized English". The student's objective defines the best teaching strategy. The activities are developed and practiced with the aim of working the limitations of each student.
We offer online classes in real time with a teacher present at all times and with the same quality and content as in person classes.
We teach on-on-one classes or small groups, guaranteeing students greater dedication and attention from the teacher. We work with flexible schedules according to the routine and schedule of the students.
Each student is unique and has individual needs. Learn English at your own pace, focusing on your needs and in a fast, practical and effective way.
We work with a variety of courses in order to meet different demands:
• Online classes – classes in real time with the presence of the teacher.
• Business English – practice common situations in the corporate environment (presentations, negotiations, video conferences, emails, etc.). 
• English for 50+ - vocabulary and context based on the student's life experience.
• Customized courses – Personalized courses, directed to the student's area of activity (financial, medical, legal, hotel, etc.).
• Exam preparation - TOEFL, IELTS, CPE, CAE, TOIEC, etc.
• SOS –  Vocabulary needed on travel (airport, restaurant, hotel, etc)
• Kids and teens – English naturally learned through everyday situations of children and adolescents.
• Portuguese for foreigners – our experience applied to the needs of those who want to speak Portuguese naturally.

Name: ISPA - École de langues à Amiens et à Lille
Description:
L’ISPA est un établissement d’enseignement supérieur / organisme de formation professionnelle spécialisé dans la formation en langues :
 Cours de français pour apprenants non francophones
 Cours d'anglais
 Cours de chinois

L'ISPA propose des formations d'immersion avec une équipe qualifiée et dynamique, une pédagogique adaptée permettant d'améliorer son niveau de langue rapidement, ainsi que des cours variés, attachés à la vie quotidienne / professionnelle afin de favoriser l'intégration / l'application dans la vie réelle. 

À Amiens, notre établissement est labellisé Qualité FLE depuis 2015, membre du Groupement FLE et du Forum Campus France depuis 2018 et certifié Qualiopi depuis 2021. 

En 2022, l'école a ouvert son établissement secondaire à Lille et a depuis accueilli une centaine d'apprenants dans ses différents programmes.
En 2024, notre établissement de Lille a lui aussi été labellisé Qualité FLE / QUALIOPI. 

Nos deux écoles proposent le passage de certifications de langues :
Amiens : DELF / TCF / TEF / TOEIC
Lille : TCF / TOEIC

Name: International Language College
Description:
Hello! At International Language College, we are dedicated to making the school a supportive, friendly and inspiring learning environment. 

We work with both local community and international students and believe that everyone from any background should have an equal opportunity to study and learn English.

This principle has helped us create a multicultural learning experience for all our students, providing interesting and practical language learning experiences in one of the most affordable cities in the U.K.

We offer flexible, affordable, high-quality English language lessons from fully qualified teachers and are accredited by the British Council. Our range of classes include General English from A1 Beginner to C2 Advanced level, Business English and exam preparation classes for the IELTS and OET exams. 

We are currently accepting applications for 2022. Enrol today at https://il-centre.co.uk/

We look forward to welcoming you to our school.

Name: GETOKEN S.A.  | Learning English
Description:
En GetOken, ofrecemos capacitaciones de inglés conversacional especializadas para empresas que desean mejorar las habilidades lingüísticas de sus empleados de manera rápida y efectiva. Nuestro enfoque único garantiza resultados efectivos un lapso de 4 a 12 meses, dependiendo del nivel inicial de cada colaborador. 

Estamos comprometidos con la mejora continua, siempre perfeccionando nuestro contenido para ofrecer la mejor enseñanza posible a nuestros estudiantes, quienes son nuestra prioridad. Nuestro enfoque innovador permite que nuestros estudiantes hablen inglés en solo 4 meses y lo dominen en menos de un año. 

Nos especializamos en capacitación de inglés corporativo, adaptando nuestras clases a las necesidades específicas de cada empresa y equipo, con un enfoque en inglés conversacional práctico en situaciones laborales reales. Ya sea que tu equipo necesite mejorar su inglés para reuniones, negociaciones, o para un mejor desempeño en comercio exterior, o agencia de viajes, nuestras clases 100% prácticas les proporcionarán las habilidades necesarias.

Si buscas una forma efectiva de capacitar a tu equipo en inglés y mejorar la proyección de tu empresa, GetOken es la solución ideal.

Palabras clave: capacitaciones de inglés para empresas, inglés corporativo, inglés conversacional, capacitación de inglés para equipos de trabajo, resultados en 4-12 meses.

Name: Flowmore
Description: We are an online Business English platform offering courses and translation services to assist companies and professionals thrive in their businesses and personal lives through their flawless communication in English!

Name: LIGHT CONSULTING
Description: Formez-vous en secrétariat bilingue, développement de l'intelligence financière chez nous. Avec LIGHT CONSULTING, vous devenez des pros de l'anglais. Nous mettons aussi à votre disposition une assistance éducative solide.

Name: Craving Portuguese
Description:
Somos Craving Portuguese, una escuela dedicada a enseñar portugués empresarial de una manera única y efectiva. Si deseas que tus colaboradores dominen el portugués y lo integren en su vida profesional, Craving Portuguese es tu mejor opción.

 Metodología única, entretenida y efectiva
 Clases en línea y en vivo por Zoom
 Sesiones en grupos pequeños (2-6 estudiantes) o individuales
 Profesores nativos y altamente calificados
 Amplia disponibilidad de horarios para adaptarnos a tus necesidades
 Mini retos diarios para practicar el portugués todos los días
 Talleres conversacionales gratuitos para nuestros estudiantes
 Clases grabadas, para que no te pierdas ninguna sesión
 Especialmente diseñadas para empresas y profesionales
 Clases prácticas con un fuerte enfoque conversacional
 Evaluación inicial para medir el nivel de cada participante

Beneficios empresariales:

Mejora la comunicación interna y externa en portugués.
Facilita las negociaciones y relaciones comerciales con empresas de habla portuguesa.
Aumenta la eficiencia y productividad de tus equipos multinacionales.
Proporciona una ventaja competitiva en el mercado global.
Fomenta el desarrollo profesional y el crecimiento de tus colaboradores.
En Craving Portuguese, hacemos del aprendizaje del portugués una experiencia dinámica y adaptada a las necesidades del mundo empresarial. Únete a nosotros y transforma la comunicación en tu empresa!

Name: Mellow Monday
Description:
Mellow Monday to w pełni zdalna szkoła językowa stworzona specjalnie dla freelancerów i zespołów z branży kreatywnej.
Dzięki nam uwolnisz swoją kreatywność po angielsku—będziesz swobodnie prezentować swoje pomysły i prowadzić spotkania z pewnością siebie i profesjonalizmem, również dla międzynarodowego grona odbiorców.
Wiemy, dlaczego tradycyjne kursy językowe nie działają—koncentrują się na ogólnym Business English, który rzadko odpowiada realnym wyzwaniom Twojej codziennej pracy. Nasz zespół łączy zwinną metodykę nauczania języka z praktycznym doświadczeniem w pracy w studiu kreatywnym, aby zapewnić naukę dopasowaną do Twoich potrzeb.

Dla kogo są nasze kursy?
 Graficy i projektanci
  Twórcy gier
  Filmowcy
  Sound designerzy
  Specjaliści od reklamy i marketingu
  UX & UI designerzy
 … oraz wszyscy, którzy chcą wreszcie skutecznie komunikować się po angielsku!
Co wyróżnia Mellow Monday?
 Treści dostosowane do branży kreatywnej – Uczymy poprzez realne sytuacje zawodowe: prezentowanie projektów, negocjowanie kontraktów, przekazywanie feedbacku i prowadzenie spotkań.
  W pełni zdalne, w pełni elastyczne – Wiemy, jak wymagająca jest praca twórcza, dlatego dopasowujemy lekcje do Twojego harmonogramu.
  Nauka skrojona na miarę – Każdy pracuje inaczej, dlatego indywidualnie dostosowujemy kursy do Twoich potrzeb i dynamiki zespołu.
  Regularność ma znaczenie – Bierzemy odpowiedzialność za Twój postęp, dlatego nasze zajęcia są regularne, w dopasowanym do Ciebie wymiarze godzinowym.
 Chcesz dowiedzieć się więcej? Porozmawiajmy!
