YOUR BEST OPTION: We are your best option and the only training Academy that gives you the best and most interactive learner-based lessons you need. Values that fit your bright future Our core values are focused on pulling out the best in you.

Name: ndaab ltd.
Description:
When a language dies, a culture fades. And when a culture fades, we lose a part of who we are.

More than just a language app, ndaab brings African heritage to life through stories, songs, proverbs, and even cartoons. Across the continent and the diaspora, many are losing touch with their native languages and traditions.

Born from the vision of our founders’ father—who once led the Cameroon Center for Music Arts and Culture (CCEMAC)—ndaab uses technology to revive what’s fading.

At ndaab, we don’t just teach language - we reconnect you to your roots, keeping culture alive, one word at a time.

Name: Hablás Inglés
Description: Ayudamos a emprendedores y profesionales a dominar la oralidad en inglés para impactar en el mercado global.

Name: Beils Türkiye
Description:
Beils Türkiye, 30 yılı aşkın süredir İngilizce eğitim materyalleri ile dünya çapında on milyonlarca öğrenci ve 100.000’den fazla öğretmene ulaşan deneyimli lider yayıncı Burlington English grubunun bir parçasıdır. 
Burlington English, uzun yıllar süren geliştirmelerin ardından, 2009 yılında sınıflarında kullandığı İngilizce öğretimi çözümlerini dijital platforma taşımıştır. Geliştirdiği benzersiz online eğitim platformu ile İngilizce öğrenme deneyimini online İngilizce eğitiminde uzman yabancı ve iki dilde ana dil seviyesinde yetkin Türk öğretmenlerden oluşan profesyonel öğretmen kadrosuyla Türkiye’de de 2020 yılında online olarak sunmaya başlamıştır.
Beils online İngilizce eğitimlerinin en önemli öğelerinden olan, patentli sanal konuşma eğitmeni teknolojimiz SpeechTrainer ile öğrenenlerin deneyimli uzman öğretmenlerle online derslerde edindiği İngilizce telaffuz ve dinleme becerisi mükemmelleşir ve akıcı İngilizce hedefine ulaşması için gereken süre azalır.
Online İngilizce eğitiminde dünyanın en gelişmiş platformunu sunan Beils, her seviyeden yetişkinlere genel İngilizce eğitimlerinin yanı sıra, 159 farklı kariyer alanında mesleki İngilizce eğitimleri sunmaktadır.

Name: FLAVIO BACIC LTDA.
Description:
Você busca aprimorar seu inglês com alguém que realmente viveu o idioma e entende as exigências do mundo profissional?

Sou filho de australiano e tive o privilégio de viver por 4 anos na Austrália, onde concluí o ensino médio e cursei dois anos de faculdade em Sydney. Essa imersão me tornou fluente em inglês — habilidade que abriu portas para fundar minha própria escola de idiomas no Brasil e atuar em empresas onde o domínio do idioma é essencial.

Com mais de 30 anos de experiência como professor, sou constantemente procurado por profissionais que precisam de ajuda com revisões de apresentações, traduções (orais e escritas) e aulas de conversação personalizadas.

Além disso, tenho uma sólida trajetória como Especialista em Compras, com mais de três décadas atuando em multinacionais como BOSCH, CNH, Lucent Technologies, COMPAQ, DELL Technologies e Solvay. Sou formado em Economia, com Pós-Graduação em Gestão e Estratégia de Empresas pela Unicamp e possuo a certificação internacional CPSM – Certified Professional in Supply Management pelo Institute of Supply Management (EUA).

Minhas especialidades incluem:

Compras Diretas e Indiretas / Procurement

Gestão de categorias estratégicas e MRO

Relacionamento e desempenho de fornecedores

Negociações estratégicas

Facilities: transporte, alimentação, limpeza e manutenção

Segurança Patrimonial e Escoltas

Manufatura: aquisição de peças e equipamentos mecânicos, elétricos e hidráulicos

Seja para se preparar para entrevistas, fazer apresentações com confiança ou desenvolver conversação voltada ao seu dia a dia profissional, posso te ajudar de forma prática, direta e personalizada.

Vamos conversar?

 WhatsApp: +55 19 99683-2224
 E-mail: bacicflavio@gmail.com
 LinkedIn: in/flávio-bacic

Name: Broadway Languages Club
Description:
BroadClub Languages is not just an online teaching school—it’s a vibrant, global hub for language learners and educators dedicated to transforming the way we connect with the world through language. Founded in 2007 with a passion for bridging cultures and fostering communication, BroadClub Languages has grown into a trusted name in language education, offering a tailored, immersive learning experience that empowers students to achieve fluency and confidence.

With over 16 years of experience, BroadClub Languages takes pride in being at the forefront of modern teaching methodologies, combining cutting-edge technology with proven pedagogical techniques. From mastering essential grammar to cultivating conversational skills, our programs are designed for learners of all levels—whether you’re preparing for TOEFL, sharpening business communication, or diving into a new language for personal growth.

What sets BroadClub Languages apart?
1 Personalized Approach: Every student is unique, and so is their learning path. We craft customized lessons tailored to individual goals, ensuring progress is fast, effective, and engaging.
2 Expert Educators: Our teachers are seasoned professionals passionate about languages, bringing years of experience and cultural insights to every lesson.
3 Interactive & Fun: Through dynamic lessons, storytelling, music, and real-world applications, learning at BroadClub Languages is not just productive—it’s a journey of discovery and connection.
4 Global Community: We’ve created a supportive, inclusive environment where students from around the world come together, exchange ideas, and inspire one another.

Name: LF Idiomas
Description:
Fundada em 1993, o Language Factory, ou LF Idiomas, é um Centro de Idiomas que destaca-se pelo ensino personalizado, adaptado aos objetivos de cada aluno. Oferecemos cursos de inglês, francês, espanhol, italiano, alemão e português para estrangeiros.

Nossa metodologia única valoriza aulas interativas e dinâmicas, planejadas conforme as necessidades específicas de cada estudante. Alunos desfrutam de flexibilidade para participar de aulas em horários e locais que melhor se adequem às suas agendas. Nossas portas estão abertas não só para alunos no Brasil, mas também ao redor do mundo, com aulas de inglês, francês, espanhol, alemão, italiano e português para estrangeiros.

Além disso, atendemos empresas e profissionais, oferecendo aulas dinâmicas, inovadoras, individuais e em grupo, tanto presenciais como online. Nosso objetivo é auxiliar no desenvolvimento das habilidades linguísticas de forma eficiente e prática.

Não limitamos nosso alcance somente a adultos, também temos cursos para crianças a partir de um ano e meio, ensinando o inglês de forma lúdica e sem traumas. Temos parcerias com escolas que terceirizam seu programa de inglês, visando o aprendizado desde cedo.

Comprovamos nosso sucesso e reconhecimento no mercado ao longo dos anos, mantendo nosso compromisso com a excelência no ensino de idiomas. Seja qual for a sua meta linguística, o LF Idiomas está preparado para ajudá-lo a alcançá-la!

Name: Talk at Work
Description:
Talk@Work offers flexible and versatile language courses for expats plus daily life, career and education support for expat family members abroad. 
We create tailor-made programs based on the needs, cognitive styles, interests, and schedules of your expat executives and their families. Our teaching is designed to make sure expats enjoy their language learning experience and have many opportunities to practice along the way.  

 Our Services  
☲☲☲☲☲☲☲☲

➨ Standard Language Courses For Expats: Talk@Work offers professional language courses for expats who need to acquire or want to improve the language of the country they will be living in. 

➨ Business Language Courses For Expats: In our business language courses, expat executives are being trained to communicate in a professional environment abroad: attending meetings, writing emails, holding presentations, negotiating, and giving official speeches. 

➨ Language Support For Expat Families: Our dedicated teachers are always available to teach all expat family members at home. Furthermore, we will make living in a new country much easier for expat families by helping them in everyday life communication. 

➨ Full Immersion Courses: Talk@Work organizes intensive weekly language courses in a city, in the countryside, the mountains or at the coast. 

➨ Language Certifications Preparation: Talk@Work prepares expats and family members for achieving the best possible results in any language certification exam. 

➨ Job Search Services For Partners: After settling into a new country, many expat partners wish to find a job themselves. We offer specific support in the process of searching and applying for a new job abroad. 

➨ Education Support For Expat Kids: Talk@Work supports expat children, teenagers and students to thrive in the local education system. 

➨ Socializing, Traveling & Sightseeing: We organize many social events to help all our expats and students practice their new language in the real world.

Name: Gringo Paul
Description:
Greetings, Mexican business professionals! I'm Paul Heller, aka Gringo Paul, your dedicated English language mentor. For the past three years, I've helped professionals like you to unlock the potential of the English language.

Based in Merida, Mexico, my journey started when a Mexican friend sought my assistance in learning English. Devoting three hours each day for six months, I guided him from a beginner to an advanced English level. Through this transformative experience, I developed a genuine passion for helping Mexican professionals improve their English skills.

Throughout the past two and a half years, I noticed that while my students demonstrate a strong grasp of English grammar, there's a crucial gap in listening, vocabulary, and speaking skills—essential components for communication with native English speakers.

My programs are meticulously designed to address these gaps. Benefits of my programs include:

 Unlock bilingual job offers. 
 Elevate your position for higher salaries and more clients. 
 Forge global connections, partnerships and collaborations. 
 Pronounce English clearly and confidently without hesitation. 
 Grasp English spoken by native speakers in real-world situations.
 Engage seamlessly in day-to-day English interactions with confidence. 
 Reduce your accent and adopt a more native-like tone. 
 Navigate cultural nuances between Mexico, the US, and Canada.

Fluent in Spanish and French, having explored 85 countries, I'm ready to guide you on your English-speaking journey. Whether grappling with complex grammar or navigating cross-cultural nuances, I've got your back. My eclectic method ensures effective communication of your skills and passion in English. With in-depth experiences in the US, Canada, and Mexico, I'm dedicated to helping you collaborate seamlessly with Americans and Canadians. Drawing from real-life business-related experiences count on my insights and a Master's in Public Administration to guide you through

Name: Hallo Deutschschule
Description: We are a German language school in Zurich, Switzerland. Communicative and playful German lessons We place great emphasis on conversation, realistic speaking situations and playful learning. Learning German should be fun and enjoyable. Qualified and experienced German teachers Our team consists of competent and motivated German teachers who have been teaching German for many years. Multimedia German teaching materials Learning is done with the help of videos as well as audiovisual and interactive German exercises. In addition, classic course books are used. These incorporate Swiss and cultural aspects. Learn German in small and homogeneous classes Your classmates are at the same learning level as you, so that you learn German efficiently. Best teaching quality at reasonable prices DaF(German as a foreign language) intensive course daily from only 490 Fr. per month DaF semi intensive course twice a week for only 290 Fr. (5 weeks). Free downloads of German exercises Learners can download free exercises, interactive German learning games and German pronunciation trainings from our homepage so you can learn at home or on the road. Events and cultural excursions We organize a monthly excursion where we offer certificates A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2 Preparation and registration for the exams of the internationally recognized diplomas from the Goethe Institute and Telc. Motivation and joy in learning German is our top priority. We teach with modern methods, where the students learn German actively and speak a lot. Through many dialogue and grammar games, we provide the applied language practice that learning German requires. Cultural realities from life in Switzerland are taken up in the lessons. Excursions and leisure activities encourage social contact. In order to provide quality, we continuously monitor the progress of students in the same class.

Name: Magyarország több nyelven beszél - Nyelvtanulás, 250+ nyelvtanár, 35 nyelv, angol, német, spanyol
Description:
A Magyarország több nyelven beszél egy idegen nyelvi oktatói együttműködés, amihez már számos elismert fordító és tolmács is csatlakozott.

Az MTNB szenvedélyesen elkötelezett amellett, hogy több 10000 magánszemély és KKV életét megváltoztassa azáltal, hogy a tisztelt ügyfeleinknek élvonalbeli nyelvtanulást, fordítást és tolmácsolást biztosítson, amely lehetővé teszi számukra, hogy kiválóan kiszolgáljuk a diákjaink, ügyfeleink igényeit. Ötéves célunk, hogy több mint 10000 ember életét változtassuk meg, és jelentős és tartós hatást gyakoroljunk a nyelvhasználati jelenségre (iparágra).

A nyelvtudás a 21. század belépőkártyája. Mind személyes fejlődésben, mind a cégek életében verseny nélküli versenyelőnyre tesz szert az, aki egy, de inkább több számára releváns idegen nyelvet jól beszél. A számára releváns azt jelenti, hogy személyenként, vállalkozásonként más-más célokkal rendelkezünk, ehhez érdemes igazítani a nyelvtudásunkat. 

A nyelvtudásunk egy életre szól, ha aktívan használjuk, foglalkozzunk vele folyamatosan, mert így válnak elérhetővé más országok tudásanyagai, meghallgathatod a szakmai információkat, szélesebb körben szórakozhatsz, nyugodtan utazhatsz tudván, hogy mindent el tudsz intézni angollal vagy az adott ország nyelvén. 
Egy átlagos európai nyelvet 1.5 év alatt erős középfokú szintre lehet felhozni heti 2-3 hatékony magánórával és otthoni készüléssel (napi fél óra elegendő). Ez a kijelentés akkor igaz, ha a hozzád illő tanárral tanulsz, aminek a kiválasztása nem egyszerű egy laikus számára, itt történik a legtöbb hiba, mert egy nem jó tanár-tanuló kapcsolódás még vissza is vethet a motivációban, de minimum lelassít. 
Számtalan példát éltünk meg a kollégáimmal, amikor a ‘nekem nincsen nyelvérzékem’, ‘én sosem tanulok meg beszélni spanyolul’, ‘nagyon nehezen megy a nyelvtan’ jelmondatokkal jelentkezők másfél év múlva egy újabb idegen nyelvet kezdtek tanulni 

Köszönjük a bizalmat a diá

Name: LinguaRush

Real conversations. Real fast.

 Personalized learning journeys

Name: Instituto Cervantes Roma
Description:
Le attività dell’Instituto Cervantes sono guidate da rappresentanti del mondo accademico, culturale e letterario di ambito spagnolo e ispanoamericano. A Roma collabora con musei, gallerie, teatri, case editrici e altri enti culturali italiani, spagnoli e latinoamericani.
L’Instituto Cervantes di Roma coordina il lavoro dell’Istituzione in Italia, San Marino, Albania e Malta, e presso la Santa Sede. L’area geografica di competenza dell’Instituto Cervantes di Roma è costituita dalle seguenti Regioni: Lazio, Umbria, Toscana, Marche, Sardegna, Abruzzo e le provincie di Forlì-Cesena e Ravenna.

Collabora in modo più stretto con le Ambasciate iberoamericane e con il cluster EUNIC della città, così come con la Real Academia de España a Roma, la Escuela Española de Historia y Arqueología a Roma, il Liceo Español Cervantes di Roma, l’Ufficio Istruzione e l’Ufficio Culturale dell’Ambasciata di Spagna in Italia, così come con l’AISPI (Associazione Ispanisti Italiani) e l’AISI (Associazione Italiana Studi Iberoamericani).

La nostra istituzione sviluppa una politica di collaborazione con il tessuto educativo e culturale locale per incrementare la propria visibilità nelle differenti città della nostra demarcazione. Il risultato di questo lavoro sono le più di 2.000 iscrizioni annuali, gli oltre 8.000 candidati al DELE e i più di 7.000 partecipanti alle attività culturali. Il nostro Istituto promueve inoltre l’uso delle tecnologie della comunicazione come strumento di inclusione educativa.

L’Instituto Cervantes di Roma promueve diversi cicli stabili come «Dialoghi» o «NeroGiallo», una mostra di cinema iberoamericano «Scoprir» e passeggiate letterarie che rievocano la presenza di creatori ispanofoni nella città.

Name: Alliance Française de Houston
Description:
The Alliance Française de Houston, part of a worldwide network founded in Paris in 1883, is a privately funded 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. There exist today over 800 Alliances Françaises in 133 countries. 
Founded in 1923, the Alliance Française of Houston promotes French language and French culture in Houston.

As a member or students of the Alliance Française of Houston, you will take an important step in gaining access to high-quality French classes and French cultural programs. We strive to offer programming in art, language, architecture, cuisine, music, theater, travel, film and much more. 

We offer discounts to our Members on group classes, private or semi-private classes, some workshops, free entrance to our Réunions-Ciné, free access to Culturethèque, an almost limitless online resource for French books, films, learning material and magazines, as well as to our 5,000-volume library, and access to TV5 direct by satellite when you are at the Alliance. 
In addition to discount or free admission to events at the Alliance, our members receive special invitations to social and cultural activities in Houston, such as French film premieres and art openings.
And members can have special discounts on orders of some of our partners.

We are affiliated with the Alliance Française de Paris,  the Fondation Alliance Française, the Federation of Alliance Françaises USA and the US Délégation Générale.

Name: SCH - Shalom Consult House
Description:
Entreprise à vocation linguistique & Technologique spécialisée dans la conception et l'exécution de Programme de Développement Linguistique, la Traduction & l'Interprétariat, la conception et maintenance de Réseaux Informatiques, le Gestion de Projets d'Installation de Progiciel notamment ABB Ellipse.
PROGRAMME PDL (DEVELOPPEMENT LINGUISTIQUE)
Nos Programmes sont conçus pour prendre en compte les besoins même des individus ou entreprises requérantes. Le processus se résume comme suit: (1). Identification de vos besoins linguistiques via un Entretien et/ou Test de Niveau. (2). Elaboration d'un Manuel de Formation qui comble les besoins répertoriés. (3). Exécution de la Formation sur la base du Manuel de Formation et du Programme conçu (au moins 50 heures). (4). Mise en Œuvre du Suivi Post-Formation dès clôture du Programme de Formation (15 heures).
TRADUCTION & INTERPRETARIAT
SCH dispose de traducteurs & Interprètes expérimentés qui en plus de la maitrise des techniques de traduction proviennent de différents domaines couverts. Ils sont capables de rendre non seulement la lettre mais aussi et surtout l’esprit, la pensée originale qui sous-tend le document. SCH exécute des projets de traduction et d’interprétariat dans une variété de langues étrangères Européennes et de langues locales Africaines. Le service linguistique de Traduction et d’Interprétariat couvre non seulement les langues d’origine Africaine mais aussi et surtout d’origine internationale.
GESTION DE PROJETS ABB ELLIPSE
Ellipse est un Progiciel de gestion intégrée et de planification des ressources des entreprises stratégiques grand revenue. Ellipse offre aux entreprises ses services dans la gestion intégrée et la planification des ressources depuis plus de 30 ans.
Ellipse permet aux entreprises d’avoir une visibilité totale dans la gestion globale des ressources des organisations dans les industries essentielles. Installée et activée, Ellipse assure la gestion de tous les domaines de l’entreprise.

Name: MyES - My English School
Description:
My English School is an innovative provider of English language training. We place the real needs of our students at the center of our learning method.
We opened our first school in Florence in 2011, and as a result of the immediate success of our MySmart English method, we were quickly able to open several other centers across Italy. We have experienced continuous growth and now have schools all over the country, in all the major cities, sometimes with more than one school per city. We opened our first school abroad in 2018 and many other new openings are scheduled for the coming months.

Apart from English courses for private students, at My English School we also offer Corporate English courses, and we work very closely with our companies to make sure that their investment is transformed into concrete, instantly usable skills. My English School courses allow for a high level of personalisation and flexibility, as well as full immersion in real life situations. Using technology, our courses can also be provided as distance learning. 

LIVE THE EXPERIENCE!
My English School is able to guarantee teachers who are qualified, flexibility in the organisation of courses, the ability to book lessons according to availability and needs, as well as the possibility to repeat activities and catch up any missed lessons. 
MySmart English is the name of our teaching and learning method, which is both natural and engaging. Our course is constantly updated and in line with the Common European Framework (CEFR), which enables us to track progress and linguistic competence from the beginning of the learning process and as the student moves forward.

Name: Saachi Japanese Language Institute
Description:
Saachi Japanese Language Institute, in Bangalore, India, specializes in teaching Japanese to students of all levels, from beginner to advanced (#JLPT N5 to JLPT N2). We conduct our courses online, attracting students from diverse cities and even other countries eager to learn Japanese. Our USP is that students start speaking Japanese right from the first week.

We offer a wide range of Japanese language courses, including basic and advanced levels, business Japanese, JLPT preparation, and customized courses tailored to the specific needs of students. Our classes are led by experienced and qualified teachers who are N1 certified, with over 18 years of teaching experience and a background in the industry.

Saachi Institute follows a communicative approach to language learning, fostering interactive and engaging lessons. Study materials are provided, regular assessments are conducted, and cultural activities are encouraged to enrich the learning journey.

We aim to deliver top-notch Japanese language education and foster cross-cultural understanding between India and Japan. Join us as we embark on this exciting linguistic adventure!

Name: CLARO Online Spanish courses
Description:
Prove your personal and professional worth in Spanish. 

Experienced Business professional and Spanish Tutor. 
My passion is to work with Companies and Professionals around the world who want to develop their business within the Spanish speaking world. 
HABLANDO CLARO.
My goal is to help people manage their Spanish communication skills within the world of business and enterprise, ensuring that you are able to communicate effectively and in a manner that demonstrates all of your professional worth.

As both a Teacher and an Official Examiner of Spanish with the Instituto Cervantes and International House, I have researched and applied the most effective techniques aimed at developing oral and auditory communication skills.

As an Spanish Language Tutor, I will:
• Motivate you to create and stick to communicative goals.
• Provide resources and support.
• Train you to teach yourself.
• Encourage consistent practice.
• Identify gaps in learning strategies.
• Understand current potential obstacles and provides methods to overcome them.
• Encourage creative solutions to problems.

My previous education includes a Master's Degree in Business Administration (MBA) from IE Business School, Madrid.

I have also had extensive Business experience as a Manager in Multinational corporations as well as being a Founder and Director of my own companies.

With my range of skills and experience including negotiation, analysis, consultation and presentation at multiple levels and in various forms, such as;
Boards of Directors, Financing rounds with investors, Candidate selection processes, Negotiation with suppliers and Commercial visits.

This combination of experiences means that I know exactly what a professional needs when they also need to take up the challenge of learning to speak and undertake business in Spanish.

Name: FDS Freundeskreis Deutsch Sprachinstitut
Description:
Bienvenue au  Freundeskreis Deutsch Sprachinstitut. Nous sommes un institut de langue proposant des cours d'allemand et d'anglais de tous niveaux. Nous sommes également fiers d'être partenaires du Goethe Institut Algerien.
Nos programmes de langue allemande et anglaise sont conçus pour répondre aux besoins des étudiants, qu'ils soient débutants ou avancés. Nous avons des enseignants hautement qualifiés qui ont une grande expérience dans l'enseignement de la langue allemande et anglaise. Nous mettons l'accent sur un enseignement interactif et pratique, en utilisant des scénarios de la vie réelle pour aider les apprenants à développer les compétences nécessaires pour réussir dans leur vie professionnelle.
Nous sommes également fiers d'offrir des programmes de formation en langue étrangère personnalisés pour les entreprises de tous les secteurs. Nos programmes de formation en langue étrangère pour les entreprises sont conçus pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque entreprise. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec les entreprises pour comprendre leurs objectifs et leurs exigences, et nous adaptons nos programmes en conséquence. Nous proposons des cours en groupe ou individuels, selon les besoins de chaque entreprise.
En plus de nos cours d'allemand et d'anglais, nous proposons également des examens officiels PTE en anglais. Les examens PTE sont reconnus dans le monde entier et offrent une évaluation précise des compétences en anglais. Nous sommes fiers d'être en mesure d'offrir cette opportunité à nos étudiants.
En résumé, Sprachinstitut Freundeskreis Deutsch est l'endroit idéal pour apprendre l'allemand et l'anglais.
Contactez-nous pour en savoir plus sur nos programmes de cours et de formation en langue étrangère.
Nous sommes là pour vous aider à réussir dans un monde globalisé en améliorant vos compétences en langue étrangère.

Name: Centre International d'Antibes

Our commitment: to offer quality language immersion perfectly tailored to your needs and aspirations.
 
Whether you are an adult, a student, or a young learner, we have the ideal program to help you achieve your language goals. Choose from a range of standard and intensive courses, suitable for all levels, or opt for official exam preparation (DELF). For young learners aged 6 to 17, our language programs offer 24/7 supervision for a safe and rewarding experience. Additionally, we offer diverse thematic programs such as business French, gastronomy, or culture.
 
Our innovative teaching approach, combined with an exceptional environment, ensures an authentic and enriching language experience. Join us at the Centre International d’Antibes and let yourself be guided to linguistic success in a stimulating and friendly atmosphere!

Name: R.E.D. English Course
Description:
Oi, tudo bem?
Eu me chamo Matheus Deusdará, sou CEO da R.E.D. English Course, e gostaria de te contar algo:
Então, após passar 4 anos da minha vida dentro de salas de aula, percebi que aquilo não era o que eu queria fazer. Não queria estar ensinando algo que, apesar de gostar, não era bem o que acreditava. Então decidi criar a R.E.D.: A soma do que eu acreditava com que eu acredito que deve ser o ensino atualmente, a educação 4.0.
Nela, VOCÊ é o protagonista do ensino, e nossa missão é te fazer falar em inglês desde a primeira aula.
Marca logo essa aula teste, vai!

Apprendimento stimolante ed efficace, creato in collaborazione con prestigiosi partner internazionali ed ispirato all’approccio blended learning che combina lezioni con l’insegnante in classe, attività e-learning da svolgere a casa e lezioni di conversazione. Questo metodo misto permette di creare corsi più integrati e concentrati su tutte le competenze linguistiche (lettura, ascolto, scrittura e parlato) ottenendo risultati sorprendenti in breve tempo. 

L'OFFERTA FORMATIVA e i SERVIZI:
Corsi Kids 3/5 anni, Children 6/10 anni, Junior 11/17 anni
Corsi Adulti 
Corsi per le aziende (anche in formazione finanziata)
Corsi e progetti CLIL per le scuole pubbliche e private
Conversation class
English City Summer Camp 3/14 anni
Viaggi e vacanze studio
Traduzioni ed interpretariato
Pacchetti personalizzati come preparazione cv e job interview.

Ti aspettiamo!
YES! Your English School
La Tua Scuola di Inglese... e di Lingue.

Name: Vancouver Institute
Description:
A Vancouver é muito mais que uma escola de inglês.

Por fazer parte de um grupo educacional internacional, o aluno Vancouver recebe em sala de aula o que há de melhor em termos de educação e técnicas de fluência na língua, que nenhuma outra escola pode oferecer. Aqui todos podem acelerar seu aprendizado com o contato real na imersão na língua. 

Todo o curso é ensinado na língua inglesa e o português não é permitido em sala de aula. Este caráter de imersão real possibilita à escola dar garantia de aprovação em testes internacionais!

Nós somos uma escola de fluência em língua, logo o aluno começa a praticar conversação desde a primeira aula.

Nossos professsores são selecionados entre os melhores do mercado, tanto nacional como internacional.
Para trabalhar na Vancouver, o professor deve provar que não apenas fala o idioma perfeitamente, mas tem didática e dinâmica em sala de aula, administrando aulas criativas onde todos os alunos falam e pariticpam durante a aula.

Name: MaestroMío The Language School
Description: MaestroMío has been teaching Spanish in Málaga since 1980 and is the best rated school in the city.

Name: ICLT - International Center of Languages and Training
Description:
ICLT—International Center of Languages and Training—provides lifelong learning solutions to individuals, businesses and government organizations. 

Here language courses, exam preparation and business skills training courses are designed to enhance employability in today's job market, help with emigration or study abroad plans or improve team efficiency.

Name: Bede's Summer School
Description: Bede's Summer School welcomes children and young adults from over 50 countries each year in July and August.

Name: Diáfano
Description:
Diáfano: Breaking Language Barriers. Empowering Global Communication 

At Diáfano, we’re revolutionizing language learning for the modern world. Whether for corporations, public schools, or global organizations, our innovative, interactive, and highly specialized language programs are designed for real-world impact—empowering employees, students, and professionals to speak with confidence and connect with the world.

Why Choose Diáfano?

 AI-enhanced, student-centered methodology for effective language acquisition
 Customized learning experiences tailored to corporate teams, schools & individuals
 Expert-driven approach focused on fluency & long-term retention
 Bringing multilingualism to life with more than 20 languages and courses in American Sign Language, English/ESL, French, German, Korean, Italian, Japanese, Mandarin, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish, and Ukrainian

 Meet the Visionary Behind Diáfano

Diáfano was founded by Irma Cedeno Verdon—a linguist, educator, and cultural competence strategist on a mission to transform how we learn languages. She’s the creator of "Language Outside the Classroom," a groundbreaking initiative that takes language learning beyond textbooks and into the real world, helping companies and schools build confident, multilingual communities.

 Ready to transform the way your team or school learns languages? Let’s make it happen: https://diafanomethod.com

Name: ES Idiomas
Description:
Aprenda inglês com professores particulares ao vivo no
seu ritmo e de onde estiver. Aulas com horários flexíveis, 100% online.

Name: Arabesk Educational Institute
Description:
"ARABESK" is a multicultural educational center that combines the wisdom and culture of different countries and practicality of the modern world.
The "ARABESK" team gathered together people who are native speakers not only  of the language, but also the culture. This allows you to learn the language in dialogue with the native speaker and give deep knowledge about the environment where the language was born, reveal the traditions and mentality of the people who speak the language, demonstrate the system of values and immerse in the atmosphere of the country from which the language originates.

Name: Spanglish
Description:
Founded in 2004, HEC TV initially served as Canada's premier Spanglish TV Show. Garnering over 1.3 million annual views, our program gained recognition and support from Rogers TV between 2011 and 2014. This collaboration enabled us to extend our influence within Toronto, home to Canada's largest Spanglish community. Today, our television series has evolved into 'Spanglish News,' committed to bridging the linguistic gap between English and Spanish. We meticulously curate top headlines and summaries, tailored for the discerning palate of busy professionals.
---
Fundada en 2004, Hispanos En Canada TV inicialmente se destacó como el principal programa de televisión Spanglish de Canadá. Con más de 1.3 millones de vistas anuales, nuestro programa obtuvo reconocimiento y apoyo de Rogers TV entre 2011 y 2014. Esta colaboración nos permitió extender nuestra influencia en Toronto, hogar de la comunidad Spanglish más grande de Canadá. Hoy en día, nuestra serie de televisión ha evolucionado a 'Spanglish News,' comprometida en cerrar la brecha lingüística entre el inglés y el español. Cuidadosamente curamos las principales noticias y resúmenes, diseñados para el exigente paladar de profesionales ocupados.
---
Created and powered by BHIVE Social Media Labs

Name: Language Teams
Description: For every language need Language Teams offers a customized language training. Language Teams offers online and in-person language courses in Paris. Would you like to learn French, Spanish, English or German in one of our live or in-person intensive classrooms or register for a business French or English course? You can! Language Teams is the language school for expats, professionals, companies and international institutions.

Name: ENGLISHTECH | Inglês Online
Description:
Na ENGLISHTECH, capacitamos profissionais de TI a dominar o inglês de forma eficaz e personalizada.
Oferecemos aulas de Inglês, Espanhol, Alemão e Italiano, com foco no desenvolvimento de habilidades práticas e comunicativas.

Nossa metodologia combina abordagens pedagógicas inovadoras, como a CLT (focada em comunicação real) e técnicas de neurolinguística, garantindo uma aprendizagem acelerada e eficiente. Utilizamos Inteligência Artificial para criar conteúdos exclusivos, feitos sob medida por especialistas em inglês para TI, atendendo às necessidades específicas do setor tecnológico.

Oferecemos suporte contínuo para tirar dúvidas e acompanhar seu progresso ao longo da jornada de aprendizado. Além disso, nossos horários flexíveis se ajustam à sua rotina profissional.

Agende uma aula experimental gratuita e descubra como a ENGLISHTECH pode transformar sua fluência em um diferencial competitivo.

Name: Link Languages
Description:
A Link Languages é mais do que um curso de idiomas, é um parceiro da empresa e de seus funcionários, buscando sempre as melhores ferramentas para proporcionar um aprendizado eficaz e permanente do idioma estrangeiro.

Sempre atenta às necessidades atuais, a Link oferece produtos e serviços direcionados para executivos e profissionais de diversas áreas, como treinamentos para indústria do petróleo, aviação, marítima, hotelaria e cursos de imersão personalizados.

Nossos cursos são direcionados e personalizados, adequando-se a sua necessidade, vem para LINK!

Name: Bremen Center المركز الألماني بطنجة
Description:
At the Bremen Center -Tanger (German Language Center in Tangier) you can successfully learn German for your studies, career, or everyday life. Our team will be happy to help with any questions or concerns you may have. Our committed tutors ensure lively lessons with plenty of variety. We will be happy to help you prepare for the examination of your choice: A1, B1 and B2. 

A Bremen Center, centre de la langue allemande a Tanger, vous pouvez apprendre allemand avec succès pour vos études, votre carrière ou votre vie quotidienne. Notre équipe se fera un plaisir de répondre à toutes vos questions et préoccupations. Nos tuteurs engagés assurent des leçons vivantes et variées. Nous serons heureux de vous aider à vous préparer à l'examen de votre choix: A1, B1et B2.

Name: AFC - Akaye French Center
Description: Ecole de français langue étrangère : français langue de scolarisation, français juridique, hôtellerie, français sur objectifs spécifiques, etc

Name: CNA Idiomas - Inglês Definitivo
Description:
O CNA (Cultural Norte Americano) é uma rede de escolas de idiomas privada brasileira, com foco no ensino de inglês e espanhol, fundada por Luiz Nogueira da Gama Neto.

Luiz Nogueira da Gama Neto, depois de trabalhar como vendedor de tapetes nos Estados Unidos, começou a vender uma coleção de livros de inglês em Porto Alegre. Um dos seus vendedores, por iniciativa própria, passou a oferecer aulas de inglês a quem adquirisse a coleção. Gama Neto gostou da ideia e assim, na década de 1970, começava a história da rede CNA.

Name: Diellëza Academy
Description:
E ardhmja fillon me gjuhën që zgjedh të mësosh! 
Diellëza Academy është vendi ku përgatitja, mundësitë dhe sukseset fillojnë!

 043 561 507 (Viber & WhatsApp)

Name: RécréAnglais, l'anglais en s'amusant pour les 3 à 11 ans
Description:
RécréAnglais est un réseau national de franchise qui regroupe plus de 130 formatrices certifiées, proposant l'anglais en s'amusant aux 3 à 11 ans et ce depuis plus de 14 ans. 

L'apprentissage est basé sur une méthodologie alternative certifiée, "the activity based approach" pour un apprentissage ludique et naturel de l’anglais (jeux, chansons…). Le programme développé par RécréAnglais et tous les supports de cours sont évolutifs s’adaptant à chaque âge et permettant de suivre les kids de 3 à 11 ans.

Nous proposons un projet clé en main permettant de créer sa propre activité, de trouver un équilibre de vie, d'avoir une rémunération motivante, tout en bénéficiant de notre accompagnement, nos formations, notre savoir faire et de tous nos outils. 

Rejoignez un réseau de passionnées, participatif et bienveillant et proposez une méthodologie alternative qui a fait ses preuves !

Name: WindSpeak
Description:
Wind Speak is a fresh initiative designed to empower wind energy professionals by teaching technical English tailored to their industry. 

The app aims to improve communication, enhance safety, and unlock global career opportunities. Founded by a passionate team with extensive experience in renewable energy and education, Wind Speak is on a mission to bridge language gaps and fuel success in the fast-growing wind energy sector.

 Learn on daily basis through simple, quick learning modules.
 Book a Face to Face lesson with a teacher to enhance the learning experience.
 Boost your earning capabilities by enhancing your skills and communication abilities.
 Discover technical, industrial vocabulary specific for wind turbine operation sites.
 Open yourself for global exposition.

Name: Fluente Languages
Description:
Fluente Languages nasce dall’idea di sei professioniste con tanti anni di esperienza nel campo della formazione linguistica che hanno deciso di unirsi nella volontà di cambiare il modo di imparare le lingue. 
«Fluente» è la parola più presente nei curricula quando si parla di lingue. È un sogno e un obiettivo per tanti, un punto di merito per altri. Ma Fluente è anche un metodo, il nostro!

Amiamo definirci una boutique school, un’azienda fatta innanzitutto di persone, che fa del suo metodo di apprendimento Learn Fast, Stress Free la sua bandiera.
Il nostro obiettivo è creare programmi su misura studiati insieme ad aziende e professionisti, language experience personalizzate, percorsi formativi che possono essere erogati in modalità immersive, online o hybrid, basati sul raggiungimento di obiettivi sia linguistici che di soft skills.

Cuore dell’offerta Fluente sono i corsi immersive in meravigliose location in Umbria, la nostra terra d'origine, completati da una fase preliminare conoscitiva di Learning to Learn e da una fase successiva di follow up online.

Che sia per migliorare le proprie skills linguistiche o quelle del proprio team, per prepararsi a un evento importante o per un avanzamento di carriera, siamo sicuri che potremo creare insieme un percorso efficace e un’esperienza decisamente memorabile.

Name: FH Collective - Academy
Description:
FH Collective Academy

Our Academy is the training arm of our organization, committed to empowering members with industry-leading skills. From language proficiency to advanced recruitment strategies, we offer tailored programs designed to enhance expertise and ensure success in diverse, competitive markets.

Why Choose Us?

Expert Network: A team of seasoned recruiters with proven track records.
Tailored Training: Comprehensive courses to upskill and stay ahead.
Global Reach: Access to extensive talent pools across multiple industries.
Local Insights: Expertise in navigating the nuances of EU and Middle East markets.

Our Mission

To redefine training by fostering a community of skilled professionals who deliver excellence and build lasting partnerships. Through our Academy, we aim to raise the bar for industry standards by equipping our members with cutting-edge knowledge and tools.

Join us as we bridge the gap between talent and opportunity, creating a future where expertise meets innovation.

Name: France Madrid - Academia de Francés y Club Cultural
Description:
FRANCE MADRID es una academia especializada en la enseñanza del francés. Situada en Madrid, se creó a principios del 2006, fruto del auge de las necesidades lingüísticas y culturales relacionadas con Francia en Madrid. A través de sus cursos de francés orientados a todo tipo de público y sus actividades culturales, fomenta la difusión de la lengua francesa y la cultura francófona. 

PROFESORADO:
El equipo docente de FRANCE MADRID cuenta con profesores nativos, bilíngües, titulados y con experiencia docente. Imparten clases comunicativas, dinámicas y basadas en pedagogía tradicional y metodología innovadora.  

CULTURA:
Junto a sus actividades de enseñanza, FRANCE MADRID es también un Club cultural, el cual permite una inmersión completa en la cultura francófona mediante una amplia variedad de actividades centradas en el idioma francés.   

CALIDAD:
FRANCE MADRID garantiza seriedad y eficacia, ofreciendo continuidad y flexibilidad en todas sus áreas. La variedad de sus proyectos le permite ir más allá de un simple curso de idioma, permitiendo la integración de muchos aspectos de la realidad francesa y española.

Name: Cambridge English For Life Sdn Bhd
Description:
Cambridge English For Life (CEFL) is Malaysia’s #1 Award Winning English Language Centre. Voted as “Best English Language Programme” and “Best English Language Centre” by parents for 4 years running (Parenthood Magazine (2020 – 2023)) CEFL is proud to be the number one choice for Malaysians. CEFL is also a proud member of the Malaysia Franchise Association having won Franchisee of the year (2021 and 2023) and Franchisor of the Year (Silver) in 2022.

CEFL provides lessons for students of all ages. From preschoolers as young as 5 years old to working adults, we have the right programme to cater to your everyday English needs. Using the CEFL methodology, students will participate in engaging lessons which are designed to keep our students interesting, engaging and fun. CEFL also offers students the opportunity to sit for the Cambridge English Exams which will prove valuable when applying for colleges and universities throughout the world. 

For those who are seeking a teaching position at any of our many centres, CEFL offers a wide variety of opportunities to bolster your own skills as an English Educator. Apart from the standard methodology, pedagogy and syllabus trainings, CEFL offers multiple Professional Development Qualifications (In-house certification) courses while also providing other accredited courses such as Certificate in English Language Teaching (CELT) programme and Cambridge International diploma in Teaching and Learning (CIDTL) programmes. 

With over 70 centres nationwide, CEFL also boasts the largest network of English Langauge centres throughout Malaysia. Whether it is a teaching position in our centres, or supporting our centres at HQ, CEFL is on the lookout for talented people who are passionate in the Education Industry or willing to learn from the best. So come and be part of Malaysia’s #1 Award Winning English Language Centre!

Name: Wise Up
Description: Escola de inglês para jovens e adultos, buscando capacitar profissionais de todas as áreas para grandes oportunidades.

Name: Spazio Italiano - Centro de Língua e Cultura Italiana
Description:
Founded in June 1992, Spazio Italiano has created a new proposal for teaching the Italian language.

In addition to being aimed at the lover of Italian language and culture, it has programs designed to meet the needs of the globalized business world.

Spazio Italiano is host to the CILS exams - Certificazione di Italiano come Lingua Straniera. The certificate is awarded by the Università per Stranieri di Siena and recognized by the Italian Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

Our success is due in large part to the rigorous preparation of our faculty, which is made up of native teachers or high specialization studies in Italy. The permanent exchange with Italian schools, publishers and authors has guaranteed Spazio Italiano the adoption of the latest in teaching methods and materials.

Audiovisual resources produced in Italy, ensuring the legitimacy of phonetics and pronunciation.

Large computerized classrooms connected to an integrated content network.

Methods recognized as the most modern and effective available on the market.

- multimedia laboratory
- circulating  book and film library
- monitoring
- integrated content network.

Auditorium for 120 people with modern audiovisual system.

Free parking with 90 spaces.

Courses designed to meet your needs.

Morning, afternoon, evening and Saturday morning periods.

Individual classes and closed groups in-companies or at the student's residence.

Name: Orange Lingua

Prepare for international exams like TOEFL and IELTS. Join our community for language learning tips and bilingual career opportunities. With Orange Lingua, conquer the world, word by word! #LanguageLearning #English #French #InternationalExams #OnlineClasses #OrangeLingua

انطلقنا من المنامة عاصمة مملكة البحرين منذ 2021، ويُمثل فرعنا الثاني في القاهرة مركز تعليمي متخصص في تقديم دورات لغات عالية الجودة، مع فريق من الخبراء المتميزين الذين يسعون لتقديم تجربة تعليمية مميزة وفعّالة.

Name: British Torino
Description:
World – Class language courses. Awarded the highest rating of “Excellence ” by UK Government Inspectors.

Academic excellence is at the heart of what we do. British Torino has been nominated every year since 2014  for record results in both Cambridge and IELTS international exams in English. We are also an official exam center. 
Our highly qualified and committed body of staff ensures the highest of standards.  Students excel in their language skills.

Our team of native teachers guarantees students achieve excellence in their language skills from absolute beginner to graduate level. 
Our students are our priority learning in a safe and happy environment where we ensure all needs are met in a friendly, caring, and supportive environment.

- International SAT CERTIFICATE
- International culture exchange programs

#englishlearning #britishenglish #englishteachers #englishcertifications #cambridgeenglish

Name: IDIOMAS ADVANTAGE
Description:
En Advantage estamos especializados en la formación de idiomas para altos ejecutivos, directivos y profesionales de compañías de tamaño medio que quieran mejorar sus habilidades de comunicación y sus competencias laborales en un entorno internacional. Formadores de idiomas durante más de 15 años para ESADE, conocemos la importancia del valor del equipo humano dentro de la organización.

Diseñamos a medida formación de idiomas adaptada al entorno y necesidades de cada ejecutivo y organización, ofreciendo cursos de inglés, francés, alemán, italiano, portugués, chino, ruso y español para extranjeros. En Advantage somos la garantía del aprendizaje gracias a establecer objetivos específicos, realizar un seguimiento exhaustivo de la formación y a la aplicación de nuestro método propio e innovador Advantage 3D.

Soporte integral para RRHH;
En Advantage nos encargamos de todas las gestiones y trámites necesarios para la realización de cursos de idiomas diseñados totalmente a medida para directivos y empresas . Somos una empresa cercana, flexible y que ofrece respuestas rápidas.

Name: Mama back to school
Description:
Mama back to school is a language school that accompanies families moving to the city of Barcelona through specific courses and activities in Spanish and Catalan, the languages of Barcelona. 

The school was created in 2024 in the city of London by Sara Boo Tomás, language and literature teacher, mother and expatriate in the past. And these are also the driving forces behind Mama back to school. A school where, above all, there is a balance between work and personal life. It values the work and personal life of both the teacher and the student. That is why we offer two modalities (classroom and online) so that you can choose the one that best suits your life stage (childhood, adolescence, youth, adulthood and old age). And to respond to the objectives, interests and needs of each stage (school, university, work, family and retirement). Sara puts at your service her more than fifteen years of experience in learning and teaching and offers you as much flexibility as possible, as long as it is also compatible with her bimaternity and her work as a teacher of Spanish language and literature in the public education system in Barcelona where she currently lives.

If you decide to learn, continue learning or improve your Spanish or Catalan with Mama back to school, we assure you that here, in this school, you will have a very, very good time. 

Benvingudes i benvinguts.
Bienvenidas y bienvenidos. 
Welcome :)

Name: Ré nao
Description:
Ré nao is the first Online Language School offering a wide range of foreign languages worldwide. Now we come also with new location, physically, in Muharrem Fejza st., Pristina.

Description:

Öğrencilerimizin dil becerilerini geliştirmek amacıyla, kişiselleştirilmiş eğitim yöntemleri, modern eğitim materyalleri ve etkileşimli sınıf ortamları sunuyoruz. İngilizce, Almanca, Fransızca ve diğer 30 Dünya Dilinde kendi hızınızda ve ihtiyaçlarınıza göre öğrenebileceğiniz çeşitli programlarla keşfedin.

Amacımız, öğrencilerimize dilin sadece gramer ve kelimelerden ibaret olmadığını, aynı zamanda bir kültür, bir iletişim aracı ve dünyaya açılan bir kapı olduğunu öğretmektir.

Name: PBC Languages (People Building Connections)

People Building Connections (PBC)
Overview

We’re not a company. We’re not another startup.
We’re a human solution — built by the people who made Babbel Live great: its teachers and its learners.

We offer:

 Subscription-based access with fair teacher pay

 No corporate middlemen, no exploitation

Our goal: to preserve what mattered most — trust, flexibility, and meaningful interaction.
Built in days. Designed to last.

Name: The Mindful Language Experience
Description:
We believe learning a foreign language should be a fun, rewarding experience. If you would love to learn a new language, but the idea of speaking in front of others makes you too nervous and fills you with dread, we hold the solution for you and cannot wait to share it. 

Our first digital product, The Mindful Italian Experience is the first of its kind to tackle the common issue of language anxiety, the fear and nervousness of speaking another language. We will give you the tools to feel relaxed and confident when talking in Italian. 

You will also have access to our exclusive online community, where you will engage with other learners to practise your speaking skills. Ideal for beginners, elementary learners or those who wish to revisit the basics, The Mindful Italian Experience is here to help you and it's accessible from anywhere in the world

Name: Instituto Superior de Idiomas
Description:
Por Resolución Ministerial Nº 522 de fecha 08 de
setiembre de 1961 el actual Instituto Superior de
Idiomas (ISI) inicia sus actividades, con el apoyo de la
Fuerza Aérea de los Estados Unidos, bajo el nombre de
Curso Electrónico de Inglés; con el fin de impartir la
enseñanza de idioma inglés a los miembros de las
FF.AA. A comienzo de los años 70 se admiten los
primeros particulares.
A lo largo de su historia el actual ISI ha sufrido
modificaciones en su nombre pero no en su política
educativa, siendo denominado en 1975 como
Departamento de Enseñanza de Inglés, Instituto de
Idiomas del Ministerio de Defensa Nacional en el
2002, hasta que por Decreto Presidencial Nº
1726/2014 recibe el nombre que ostenta
actualmente. Desde el año 2003 el actual ISI
incorpora a su programa de enseñanza el idioma
Francés, al que posteriormente se sumarian el idioma
Mandarín y Guaraní respectivamente.

Name: Plus Teaching English
Description: On of the oldest but innovative language schools based on Corfu island.

Name: WOW Language Center
Description:
At WOW, we specialize in organizing in-company courses that go beyond traditional language learning. We combine language acquisition with the development of creativity, critical thinking, and teamwork, preparing you and your employees for success in an international environment. We promote inclusion, diversity, and multiculturalism in every class, ensuring that your team not only learns a new language but also gains valuable skills to thrive in a global workplace. 
Let us help your business break down communication barriers and foster a more collaborative and inclusive corporate culture.

Name: Interacting Idiomas
Description:
Potenciamos tu éxito acompañándote en el aprendizaje de inglés.
Que la comunicación en inglés sea tu mejor herramienta!

Facilitamos el aprendizaje de idiomas a personas inquietas y curiosas que no buscan más de lo mismo: quieren resultados a través de propuestas novedosas y divertidas.

Somos un grupo de profesionales jóvenes y con gran experiencia en la enseñanza de idiomas para adultos y en empresas. Nos motiva poder demostrar que aprender idiomas de grandes puede ser divertido y efectivo a la vez. Rompemos las reglas de la enseñanza tradicional y ponemos en escena nuestra creatividad, el conocimiento de nuevas metodologías y el trabajo en equipo, planificando cada clase para que te vayas más motivado de lo que viniste.

The classes are modern and interactive, featuring on-screen exercises that create a dynamic and engaging learning experience.

Yo Spanish is a Spanish and Culture language School!
We teach Spanish as a Foreign Language in a Fun a and Interactive way.
We use the Communicative Approach methodology with FUN to engage our students in real life situations.
At Yo Spanish we strongly believe that Learning a foreign language is a FUN journey to communicate in another language!

Name: BEST Institute Mexico
Description: BEST Institute has been providing English Language services in Mexico since 1993. Throughout these years we have been helping professionals and business people achieve their English Language goals. Our dynamic and experienced teachers combined with our pragmatic programs have successfully achieved their certification needs such as TOEFL, TOEIC, EIKEN, and CAMBRIDGE from YLE to IELTS.

Name: TRADANIM
Description:
TRADANIM accompagne vos enfants dans leur apprentissage des langues de manière ludique. À l'école ou à la maison.

Name: Asociación Dante Alighieri - Comité de Sevilla
Description:
Desde 1954, en el Comité de Sevilla de la Sociedad Dante Alighieri trabajamos para difundir la lengua y la cultura italiana en Andalucía.

Los fundadores de nuestro comité, profesores de la Hispalense como el grandísimo filólogo Francisco López Estrada, quisieron hacernos parte de la vida universitaria de esta ciudad, y así es todavía hoy: el Rector Magnífico de la Universidad de Sevilla es nuestro Presidente Honorario, y es hacia la comunidad universitaria (aunque no sólo a ella) que se dirige nuestra labor.

Somos parte de una institución secular: la Sociedad Dante Alighieri es una organización oficial de enseñanza y difusión de la lengua y la cultura italiana, fundada en Roma en 1889 por un grupo de intelectuales guiado por el grandísimo poeta Giosué Carducci. Su finalidad era y es «cuidar y difundir el idioma y la cultura italianos en el mundo, manteniendo vivas las conexiones espirituales de nuestros compatriotas en el exterior y fomentando en los extranjeros el amor y el culto a la civilización italiana». Es reconocida y respaldada por el Ministerio de Exterior de Italia y la Universidad de Roma La Sapienza y tiene más de 420 sedes en todo el mundo. Además, desde 2009 la “Dante Alighieri” - gracias a un acuerdo con la Fondazione Maria e Goffredo Bellonci - es miembro del jurado del Premio Strega, el más prestigioso reconocimiento literario italiano.

Más informaciones sobre la Sociedad Dante Alighieri en www.dantedesevilla.es

Name: STEP 2 Languages School
Description:
Conexões: são elas que movem o mundo nos dias atuais. Conexões entre pessoas, empresas, países. São elas que abrem portas para novas oportunidades e novos negócios e por isso é necessário estar pronto para fazer estas conexões e não perder nenhuma oportunidade. Por isso, toda empresa, independente do segmento, precisa contar com colaboradores preparados para os mais diversos desafios e, entre eles, fazer contato não apenas com clientes ou fornecedores nacionais, mas também com outros países e assim expandir as chances de negócios.

Neste sentido, a escola de idiomas Step2 foi criada para atender as demandas pessoais de profissionais que querem se preparar para o mercado de trabalho e também de empresas que precisam preparar seus colaboradores para o contato com o exterior.

Criada em 2019, a Step2 School surge no mercado como uma escola com uma metodologia inovadora. A nossa escola tem auxiliado centenas de alunos ao redor do mundo: temos alunos nos Estados Unidos, na Espanha , em Portugal , na Itália, entre outros países. Nossos professores são extremamente capacitados e treinados para propiciar aos alunos um aprendizado leve e significativo, por isso os resultados que obtemos são sempre os melhores: alunos que são aprovados em processos seletivos para a vaga almejada, alunos admitidos em programas de aupair, alunos promovidos, alunos que viajam e conseguem se comunicar sem dificuldades no idioma estudado. Nós da escola Step2 atuamos como parceiros de nossos alunos, sempre trabalhando de acordo com os seus objetivos.

Onde estudar?
Online - Faça o curso online com aulas ao vivo aproveitando ao máximo o seu tempo e estude de onde quiser.
Presencial - Estude na escola, no conforto da sua casa ou em outro lugar previamente acordado. Você decide!
In Company - Aulas individuais ou em grupo no ambiente empresarial.

Nossos cursos:
Inglês
Espanhol
Português para estrangeiros
Business English
Cambridge Exams - Preparatory Course
Conversation Classes
Mini Cursos

Name: DICUNT - Associazione Internazionale di Lingua, Cultura e Ricerca
Description:
DICUNT è una associazione culturale senza fini di lucro.
Essa nasce per coniugare Didattica e Ricerca nell'ambizioso tentativo di dar vita ad un rinnovato ambiente culturale.
L'organizzazione di attività culturali e scientifiche dovrà servire da presupposto all'incontro tra i giovani studenti e gli studiosi.
Uno dei mezzi dell'Associazione volti a tal fine è quello di organizzare attività culturali rivolte contemporaneamente ai giovani, agli studenti, agli studiosi e quanti considerino la cultura un bene sociale e le attività culturali un momento di crescita.

Diversi sono gli Scopi Sociali di DICUNT sia per la natura eclettica degli interessi dei suoi fondatori, sia per la diversa formazione di questi.

Name: The German Language Haus
Description:
The German Language Haus – Learn German Online from A1 to C1

At The German Language Haus, we help learners worldwide master German—starting with German A1 course and progressing through A2 German, B1 German language level, B2 German online, and C1 German course online. Whether you want to learn German A1 online, prepare for the A1 exam German online, or earn your German A1 certificate online, our online German courses are designed to deliver results at every stage.

With expert trainers (4+ years teaching experience), a micro-batch format, and interactive lessons, you’ll get personal attention, daily speaking practice, and real-world communication skills for exams, work, or study in Germany.

Why Choose Us:
	•	Result-Oriented Learning: No shortcuts—just proven methods to pass A1, A2, B1, B2, and C1 German exams.
	•	Engaging Lessons: Role-plays, debates, games, and cultural immersion.
	•	Goal-Focused Training: From Goethe A1 to Goethe C1, travel, work, or study abroad—we tailor your learning journey.
	•	Community Support: Join motivated learners in German A1 online classes, A2 German language sessions, B1 German online classes, B2 German online training, and C1 German live courses.

From A1 level German basics to C1 German language fluency, we guide you every step of the way. Start today with our German A1 full course, A2 German language course, B1 German online classes, B2 German course online, or C1 German language course—and open doors to new opportunities in Germany and beyond.

 Learn anywhere. Speak confidently. Succeed globally.

Name: Alianza Francesa de Córdoba
Description:
La Alianza Francesa de Córdoba es una institución sin fines de lucro cuya misión es la difusión de la lengua y de la cultura francesa. 
En Argentina existen 53 Alianzas que albergan a 15 000 alumnos. Conforman una red que es considerada una de las más extensas y antiguas del mundo. La primera de ellas fue fundada en Buenos Aires en 1893 y hoy es sede también de la Délégation Générale de la Fondation Alliance Française de Paris en Argentine.
La misión de las Alianzas Francesas se basa en tres objetivos esenciales : proponer cursos de francés dirigidos a públicos de todas las edades ; desarrollar el acceso a la cultura francesa ; favorecer la diversidad cultural. 
Para lograr estos objetivos, la Alianza Francesa está en contacto permanente con la embajada de Francia, con Instituciones públicas y privadas, con el mundo empresarial y con el público francófilo (amante de la cultura francesa), de manera de entablar un diálogo permanente con la comunidad local.

Name: Grp ELTA Academy

Tenemos un equipo de 35 profesores de inglés, algunos de los cuales con más de 20 años de experiencia, con una visión clara de los métodos de enseñanza que sí funcionan y de los que no.

Desde el 2019, hemos lanzamos exitosos proyectos de Clases Grupales para Jóvenes-Adultos, Clases Corporativas, Preparación para Exámenes Internacionales y Cursos de Metodología.

Name: Yázigi Viamão
Description:
1ª Franquia de idiomas do Brasil com 72 anos de pioneirismo e 22 anos em Viamão.

O Yázigi quer promover o desenvolvimento das pessoas através do ensino de idiomas de qualidade, contribuindo para os processos de educação e de exercício da cidadania global, sob os princípios de uma gestão socialmente responsável. Queremos mais do que ensinar inglês, buscamos o seu desenvolvimento como aluno e a sua transformação como cidadão do mundo. 

O Yázigi foi a primeira franquia de idiomas a nivelar seus cursos de acordo com o padrão europeu e a primeira escola a integrar internet à sala de aula. Inovações, que como muitas outras, fazem da marca uma das mais admiradas do setor, premiada várias vezes.

Junte-se a nós e descubra o que o mundo tem de melhor.

Description:

Prowadzimy szkolenia dla firm i instytucji zarówno w zakresie języka ogólnego jak i specjalistycznego z różnych dziedzin oraz kursy językowe języka polskiego jako obcego. Pomagamy cudzoziemcom z ponad 60 krajów świata w integracji językowej, kulturowej i zawodowej.

Jesteśmy oficjalnym Centrum Egzaminacyjnym Języka Polskiego Jako Obcego, przygotowujemy do egzaminów certyfikatowych (egzamin państwowy oraz egzamin TELC) z języka polskiego jako obcego.

W naszej codziennej pracy kierujemy się dewizą Jakość – Współpraca – Innowacja, oferując usługi najwyższej jakości we współpracy m.in. z wiodącymi ośrodkami akademickimi, instytucjami państwowymi i organizacjami pozarządowymi przy wykorzystaniu innowacyjnych metod nauczania języków obcych.

Name: Instituto El Punto
Description:
O Instituto El Punto nasceu com uma missão clara: transformar o aprendizado de espanhol em uma experiência prática, acolhedora e poderosa capaz de abrir portas profissionais, culturais e pessoais.

Somos mais do que um curso. Somos uma fábrica de fluência: unimos método, grupo e suporte contínuo para acelerar o desenvolvimento de quem quer falar espanhol com confiança seja para o trabalho, para viagens ou para conexões humanas mais ricas.

Nosso diferencial está na comunidade. Acreditamos que ninguém aprende sozinho. Por isso, nossos alunos contam com turmas reduzidas, aulas em grupo cuidadosamente estruturadas e acompanhamento próximo da nossa equipe de consultoras e professoras.

Aqui, o espanhol é uma ponte para oportunidades.
Nosso compromisso é com o crescimento dos nossos alunos — com uma metodologia moderna, humana e orientada para resultados reais.

Venha para o Instituto El Punto e descubra como é possível falar espanhol de verdade, com leveza, consistência e apoio.

Tipos de clases:
Speak up classes ilimitadas: Habla con profesionales del idioma, mejora tus habilidades de Speaking & Listening.
Vocabulary classes: Aprende nuevo vocabulario todos los días, enfocado a tus necesidades
Gramática inreal context: Conoce las palabras correctas de acuerdo al contexto en el que te encuentres. Nosotros te las enseñamos.
Catch up class: Mide tus avances en el dominio de tu nuevo idioma.
Flexibilidad de horarios: Elije donde y cuando quieras, nosotros estaremos allí para ayudarte cuando lo necesites.
Examenes internacionales: Prepárate para presentar el IELTS, Toefl y Cambridge con nosotros.
Te ofrecemos la mejor experiencia de aprendizaje!
Ofrecemos una gran variedad de cursos y programas en los que aprenderás ingles contando con los mejores profesionales que llevaran tu nivel de ingles hasta nuevos horizontes con nuestra metodología.
Enjoy While Learning.

Name: CIA IDIOMAS
Description:
En CIA Idiomas nos apasiona la enseñanza de idiomas y llevamos más de 35 años ayudando a estudiantes y profesionales a alcanzar sus metas lingüísticas.

Hemos capacitado a empresas internacionales tanto en inglés como portugués, siendo auditados por organismos del exterior, lo cual garantiza la calidad de nuestros servicios.

Fundado en 1990, nuestro instituto se ha consolidado como un referente en la enseñanza de inglés y portugués en Argentina. Nuestro enfoque está centrado en ofrecer una educación de alta calidad que se adapte a las necesidades individuales de cada estudiante.

Nos especializamos en la preparación para exámenes internacionales como Cambridge English y TOEFL, que son esenciales para acceder a oportunidades académicas y laborales a nivel global. Como centro autorizado para la preparación de exámenes Cambridge, garantizamos un estándar elevado de enseñanza y apoyo constante para asegurar el éxito de nuestros estudiantes.

Además de trabajar con individuos, en CIA Idiomas también ofrecemos soluciones lingüísticas para empresas, incluyendo capacitación corporativa y apoyo a los departamentos de recursos humanos en el desarrollo de las competencias idiomáticas de sus equipos.

Sabemos lo importante que es el dominio de idiomas en un mundo cada vez más interconectado, por lo que adaptamos nuestros programas a las necesidades específicas de cada organización.

Nuestros cursos de inglés y portugués están diseñados para todos los niveles, desde principiantes hasta avanzados, y ofrecemos opciones de clases presenciales y online. Entendemos que la flexibilidad es clave, por eso nuestras clases virtuales sincrónicas permiten a los adultos continuar su formación desde cualquier lugar.

En CIA Idiomas, creemos en la educación continua y en el poder transformador de los idiomas. Nos esforzamos por crear un ambiente de aprendizaje motivador y efectivo, donde cada estudiante pueda desarrollar su potencial al máximo.

Name: Unlocking Spanish
Description:
Unlocking Spanish is an online academy that helps English-speaking learners speak real, everyday Spanish with confidence.

We offer small group classes (max. 4 students) — either women-only or mixed groups — through our signature 30/30 Method:
 30 minutes of real-life conversation
 30 minutes of clear, structured grammar

This method helps our students gain fluency faster, build confidence, and speak naturally about topics that matter in daily life.

Our growing international community of 70+ students connects weekly from the UK, the US, Ireland, Australia, Spain, Italy and beyond.
Even though our classes are 100% online, we love creating real connections through our monthly meet-ups in Marbella and Málaga, where learning turns into friendship.

We also provide:
 The “Unlocking Spanish Tenses” eBook — a visual, beginner-friendly guide to mastering Spanish verb tenses.
 Corporate Spanish training for professionals and teams who want to communicate confidently in Spanish.

 Our mission: To help you unlock the Spanish you already have inside you — so you can speak with fluency, confidence and joy.

Name: IRIS LSF - Institut de Recherche et d'Innovation en langue des Signes
Description:
L'association IRIS a pour objectif premier la diffusion et la promotion de la langue des signes pour une meilleure intégration des sourds dans la société.

De ce fait, elle ne cesse d'innover dans cet objectif. En formant au début des particuliers, elle s'est très vite lancée dans la formation en entreprise pour la continuité de ses objectifs.

C'est pourquoi elle propose aux entreprises des formations entièrement sur mesure avec un accompagnement personnalisé. Nous souhaitons accompagner au mieux toutes les entreprises voulant mettre en place des démarches d'accessibilité par la langue des signes. 

Si vous souhaitez former vos équipes à la langue des signes pour intégrer un sourd dans votre équipe, vous ouvrir à un public sourd ou tout autre raison, veuillez nous contacter par mail ou téléphone :

Tel : 09 67 00 93 78
les.iris@wanadoo.fr

Name: Nurses to Germany
Description: Our group is your dedicated support system as you embark on the exciting journey of transitioning your career to Germany. Here, you'll find a caring community ready to guide you through every step of the process, ensuring you feel supported and empowered along the way. Let's make your transition smooth, successful, and filled with camaraderie. Together, we'll thrive in our new professional home!

Name: For You Idiomas
Description:
A FOR YOU IDIOMAS foi fundada em 14/12/2000 na cidade de Brusque com o objetivo de oferecer o aprendizado de uma língua estrangeira de maneira prazerosa, dinâmica e global. A escola apostou na abordagem comunicativa, ensinando simultaneamente as quatro habilidades: ouvir, falar, ler e escrever, em contextos reais do cotidiano.

Em Julho de 2001 a FOR YOU abre sua unidade na cidade de Nova Trento, oferecendo aos Neotrentinos uma opção a mais de aprendizado e profissionalização.

A escola é especializada em seis idiomas: Inglês, Espanhol, Francês, Alemão, Italiano e Coreano ministrados por profissionais experientes, formados em letras ou áreas afins e com vivência internacional, tornando as aulas uma experiência cultural.

Name: San Filipe Idiomas
Description:
O Centro Educational SAN FILIPE IDIOMAS criado em 2004, surgiu a partir do sonho de sua idealizadora, a paulistana Luana Sousa Polli, Diretora da escola, Farmacêutica e Pedagoga, Especialista em Educação, Psicopedagogia, Terceiro Setor e Mestre em Bioquímica .
Sua trajetória inicial dentro da Paróquia São Filipe Neri, local fundamental para sua existência, foi marcada por diversas dificuldades que foram superadas e auxiliaram o seu crescimento. Hoje a escola possui sede própria na Rua Lótus, 175 no parque São Lucas, oferecendo um ambiente muito confortável à todos os nossos alunos.
O curso e materiais didáticos/pedagógicos foram todos desenvolvidos pela diretora e responsável pelo projeto.
Desde o início de seu desenvolvimento o curso foi dirigido àqueles que tivessem interesse no aprendizado e por motivos financeiros não conseguiam custear escolas convencionais. O trabalho desenvolvido é composto de muita seriedade, ética, respeito e conteúdo educacional.

Name: Lingua Learn UK

Name: Feel Good French
Description:
Feel Good French – Premium Language Coaching for Driven Professionals and Expats
Ready to master French and unlock a more confident version of yourself? Feel Good French turns language learning into a journey of personal growth. It’s for those who want more than grammar rules – for those who aspire to speak with authenticity and ease.

With Déborah, language coach and mindset expert, you’ll experience a tailored approach designed for high-achieving professionals and expats seeking confidence and integration.

What Feel Good French Offers:
︎ Premium Language Coaching: Intensive, tailored sessions with personalized support and strategies specific to your field (diplomacy, healthcare, tech, etc.).
︎ Mindset and Performance: Go beyond vocabulary to develop the mental edge needed to excel in French, whether in meetings, networking, or everyday situations.
︎ Feel Good Talks Podcast: Inspiring conversations in French on innovative, positive themes – perfect for practicing while sparking your curiosity.
︎ Meditations and Visualizations: Custom-designed tools to unlock your fluency and set the right mindset before every session.

Who Is It For?
Professionals, expats, and French enthusiasts based in Brussels, Geneva, Paris, Montreal, and beyond. For those who want to speak with confidence, gain fluency, and integrate French as a professional and personal asset.

 Book a session via Calendly to discuss your goals. Together, we’ll make French more than just a language – it will become a tool for transformation and empowerment.

Looking forward to working with you,
Déborah

#FeelGoodFrench #LanguageCoaching #ExpatLife #Empowerment #Confidence

Name: Language & Company
Description:
Com casa em Lísboa, a LAC (Language and Company) surgiu da vontade de oferecer um ensino de línguas que promove as características culturais e a relevância de cada uma. Assim, em 2017 abriu portas e desde então dedica-se à formação de mais de 12 línguas, passando aos alunos uma aprendizagem multicultural, adaptada ao presente.

A LAC é uma marca certificada pela DGERT e uma parte importante da associação cultural ACTM (associação tecla melódica). Esta associação promove a aprendizagem ao longo da vida e propõe uma oferta transversal, ligando duas disciplinas: as línguas e a música. Assim, a ACTM pretende criar espaço para a descoberta de duas linguagens, fomentando o encontro com vários mundos e o desenvolvimento integral da comunidade.

Name: SIGNES’MANCHE
Description:
SIGNES'MANCHE est une association basée à AGNEAUX (50) qui favorise l'inclusion des personnes sourdes, malentendantes et entendantes dans la région de la Manche.

L'association vise à promouvoir la Langue des Signes Française et à sensibiliser le public à la culture sourde.

Grâce à SIGNES'MANCHE, les membres sourds et malentendants ont un espace où ils peuvent se réunir, échanger et partager des expériences. L'association organise des ateliers de langue des signes, des cours de sensibilisation à la surdité et des événements culturels qui mettent en valeur les talents et les contributions des personnes sourdes.

En plus de cela, SIGNES'MANCHE offre des services de traduction en langue des signes pour les personnes sourdes ou malentendantes dans différents domaines tels que les rendez-vous médicaux, les réunions professionnelles et les services administratifs. Cela permet aux membres de l'association de bénéficier d'une communication fluide et égalitaire.

L'association encourage également l'inclusion des personnes entendantes en les sensibilisant à la culture et à la langue des signes. Des cours d'initiation à la langue des signes sont proposés afin de favoriser la communication entre les personnes sourdes, malentendantes et entendantes.

En résumé, SIGNES'MANCHE est une association dynamique qui s'engage à promouvoir l'inclusion, la communication et la compréhension entre les personnes sourdes, malentendantes et entendantes dans la région de la Manche.

Name: LFG Idiomas
Description:
Na LFG Idiomas, acreditamos que o domínio de um novo idioma é mais do que aprender palavras; é sobre descobrir novas culturas, ampliar horizontes e conectar-se globalmente. Somos mais do que uma escola de idiomas; somos uma comunidade apaixonada de aprendizes, professores dedicados e experiências enriquecedoras. 

Aqui, sua jornada para a fluência é cuidadosamente moldada para não apenas ensinar línguas, mas também inspirar confiança e criatividade. Nossos professores altamente qualificados estão aqui para guiá-lo em cada etapa, utilizando métodos inovadores e interativos que tornam o aprendizado envolvente e dinâmico. 

Em um ambiente acolhedor e amigável, onde você terá a oportunidade de praticar suas habilidades linguísticas conosco.
