BEST CJO posiada Akredytację TGLS QL oraz międzynarodową akredytację ELCL QA skupiającą najlepsze szkoły europejskie, jest także centrum egzaminacyjnym ETS Global (sesje otwarte i zamknięte z języka angielskiego i francuskiego w środowisku pracy), LanguageCert (egzaminy z języka angielskiego online), TELC (10 języków europejskich), Pearson Test of English (język angielski ogólny) oraz Francusko-Niemieckiej Izby Handlowej (niemieckie egzaminy WiDAF) a także jest Certyfikowanym Partnerem British Council dla egzaminów Cambridge (m.in. B2 First, C1 Advanced). 

Rocznie BEST CJO szkoli ponad 2000 kursantów z 30 języków świata w tym ponad połowa to klienci korporacyjni, dla których co roku świadczy około 10 tysięcy godzin dydaktycznych. Zaufały nam takie firmy jak Opel, Porsche, Eurofins, Hilton Foods, Nexteer, Hager, voestalpine, Prima Plastic Systems czy Marelli Poland. Od ponad 10 lat BEST CJO specjalizuje się także w nauczaniu online, a od 3 lat prowadzi portal dedykowany online’owym kursom indywidualnym oraz firmowym, a także egzaminom międzynarodowym online pod adresem www.bestcentrum.online .

Vivemos o domínio do inglês como uma das ferramentas de empoderamento na vida e no mercado de trabalho. Por isso, oferecemos valores sociais a minorias e pessoas com limitações financeiras. Também oferecemos turmas, valores especiais e parcerias para empresas.

HOSS is a Spanish Language Immersion Program with our main offices located in Tegucigalpa, Honduras, Central America with branches in the north coast city of TEGUCIGALPA AND LA CEIBA. Spanish is taught on a one-on-one student-teacher ratio, focusing on conversation, grammar, readings, and the vocabulary of the student interest and profession. We work on a weekly basis, 20 hours per week, 4 hours per day, morning and afternoon schedules. All our teachers are certified and must pass an entrance exam in order to work in our school. Name: Great Job Idiomas
Description:
Na Great Job Idiomas, transformamos a comunicação em resultados. Somos especialistas no ensino de idiomas para empresas, executivos e profissionais que buscam fluência com foco em performance corporativa. Atuamos com foco em PMEs, multinacionais e profissionais que precisam se comunicar com segurança em ambientes internacionais.

Desenvolvimos o Método 𝗠𝗔𝗜𝗦:

 𝗠𝗔𝗜𝗦 conversação
 𝗠𝗔𝗜𝗦 prática
 𝗠𝗔𝗜𝗦 fluência
 𝗠𝗔𝗜𝗦 resultados

Acreditamos que aprender um idioma sirva para se comunicar e não para decorar regras.

Nossa metodologia é personalizada e orientada por objetivos claros: imersões práticas, aplicação direta no dia a dia de trabalho, uso de inteligência artificial para acelerar a fluência, e professores nativos com experiência no mundo corporativo. Oferecemos programas específicos para entrevistas, reuniões, apresentações, negociações e certificações como TOEIC, TOEFL, IELTS, CELI e CILS.

Graças ao nosso formato 100% online e ao vivo, atendemos alunos em todo o Brasil e no exterior, com total flexibilidade de horários, eliminação de deslocamentos e foco em aulas sob medida para a realidade profissional de cada aluno ou equipe, sempre priorizando a conversação como ferramenta principal de aprendizado.

Já treinamos colaboradores de empresas como Terna e Verenergia, Enel, entre outras. Nosso foco é gerar ganhos reais de performance, clareza e segurança na comunicação em outro idioma — sempre conectando o conteúdo à realidade profissional de cada aluno.

 Quer transformar a comunicação da sua equipe em uma vantagem competitiva?

Fale com a gente: www.greatjob.com.br ou agende uma conversa aqui: https://tinyurl.com/GreatJobIdiomas

Name: Learn German | Deutsch Lernen
Description:
At Learn German School, we help people learn German while gaining practical skills for careers in digital professions with LingoSprint method. Our bilingual books make language learning simple and professional growth achievable—all at the same time.

Our method is designed for continuing learners who have some German knowledge and want to keep improving while learning about real-world topics like UX Design, Digital Marketing, and Product Management. 

By combining interlinear translations, repetition in context, and professional content, we make it easier to learn German naturally—no memorization or grammar drills required.

What We Offer:
 Dual Learning: Learn German alongside skills in UX Design, Digital Marketing, and other careers.
 Bilingual Books: Texts in German with English translations to make learning clear and stress-free.
 Practical Knowledge: Focused on topics professionals need to succeed in German-speaking workplaces.
 Natural Learning: Absorb grammar and vocabulary through reading and repetition without cramming or rote learning.

Our approach is perfect for professionals preparing to work in Germany or any field where German language skills are valuable. With LingoSprint, you’ll gain confidence reading German while mastering the tools and knowledge for your profession.

Who Is It For?
 Professionals advancing careers in digital fields who need German for work.
 Learners looking for practical resources to improve their German and professional knowledge.
 Anyone wanting a simple, effective way to combine language learning and career growth.

Ready to Learn German and become an expert in Product Design, Marketing, and Communications? Visit learngerman.school to explore our books and see how you can combine language learning with career success.

In the past 7 years JLC has helped over 5,000 students to break down cultural barriers through fun classes include vocabulary, grammar, listening & conversation as well as cultural topics.

Name: Prime Language School
Description:
1. Qual é a missão da Prime Language School?
Na Prime Language School, nossa missão é potencializar as habilidades de comunicação de nossos alunos, proporcionando um aprendizado profundo e prático em Inglês e Espanhol, com foco no uso real desses idiomas no cenário global. 

2. Como a Prime prepara seus alunos para o mundo real?
Nosso ensino vai além da teoria. Fornecemos ferramentas práticas que capacitam nossos alunos a se comunicarem com confiança e eficácia, seja no mercado de trabalho, em viagens internacionais ou em interações cotidianas.

3. O que torna o ensino na Prime único?
A chave do nosso sucesso está na personalização e na flexibilidade do ensino. Adaptamos cada aula para as necessidades individuais de cada aluno, permitindo que eles avancem no seu próprio ritmo e atinjam suas metas com eficiência.

4. Como a Prime cria um ambiente de aprendizado eficaz?
Criamos um ambiente colaborativo e dinâmico, onde nossos alunos se sentem motivados e apoiados em todas as etapas de seu aprendizado. Nosso objetivo é garantir que cada aluno tenha as condições ideais para seu crescimento pessoal e profissional.

5. O que a Prime acredita ser essencial para o aprendizado de idiomas?
Acreditamos que o verdadeiro aprendizado ocorre quando o aluno tem controle sobre seu processo de aprendizagem, recebendo suporte contínuo e sendo desafiado de maneira positiva. Nosso compromisso é com o desenvolvimento integral de cada aluno, para que ele esteja pronto para alcançar seus objetivos, sejam acadêmicos ou profissionais.

Oferta ta skierowana jest do osób, które chcą zdobyć certyfikat potwierdzający znajomość języka na poziomie wymaganym przez NATO. Whether you prefer group interactions or personalized one-on-one sessions, we cater to every learner's needs, emphasizing practical usage and cultural nuances.

Professional Language Evaluations:

Name: De Taalverwervers Accent Graeve
Description:
Als goede professional wil je de taal van je klant spreken of verwerven. De klant ervaart dit als heel sympathiek en empathisch. Niet elke klant kan of wil immers in het Engels bediend worden.  Het is klantvriendelijker je klanten te woord te staan in hun taal. Wie dit niet doet kan zelfs klanten verliezen hierdoor. Vlotte communicatie is een noodzaak. Vandaar dat het erg geapprecieerd zal worden door je klanten dat je je Frans, Nederlands, Spaans, Duits of Italiaans en zo meer bijschaaft. 
In het taalbedrijf Accent-Graeve "verwerven" we taal. We vervangen de term "een taal leren" door "een taal verwerven" via onze neuro-linguïstische aanpak die door onze klanten wordt gesmaakt. We worden graag jullie begeleiders van dit leuke proces.

For over 25 years, LINES has been a leading provider of high-quality Academic Residential English Language Courses with our commitment to excellence reflected in our accreditation by the British Council.

Our programmes are designed to engage and inspire students, fostering their language proficiency while nurturing a sense of community.

We are delighted to be opening a new centre in July 2024, at the prestigious Stowe School in Buckinghamshire, as well as returning once again to the beautiful Queenswood School in Hertfordshire. Both are leading independent schools set in truly impressive surroundings with outstanding facilities. Our 2024 Residential Programme will run at both Stowe and Queenswood from Friday 5th July - Saturday 3rd August.
 
In just a few words, this is what makes us unique:
 
- A 4:1 student – faculty staff ratio.
- Average classes from 7 students (max 10) of the SAME age and the SAME level with a LEARNING and ACQUIRING approach.
- Complete immersion is insisted on at all times.
- Committed and highly motivated students.
- All inclusive programmes: all food and drink, free laundry service, internet access, all educational materials, excursions, sport activities, accommodation,  three cooked meals a day.
- A very international student body with a friendly atmosphere (We limit to max. 15% from the same country).

Name: SPELLIO ACADEMY YABANCI DİL KURSU
Description:
Hakkımızda 

MİSYON

Temel hedefimiz çok dilli ve çok kültürlü bir dünyada başarılı olmak için öğrencilerimize (kursiyerlerimize) en çağdaş teknik, metot ve yaklaşımlarla yabancı dil öğrenme fırsatı sunarak kendi öğrenme stratejilerini geliştirme imkânı sağlamaktır. Bu yoldaki değişmez ilkemiz Spellio Academy nin eğitim kalitesinden ve niteliklerinden ödün vermeden, ayırt edilen bir dil eğitim kurumu olmaktır.
 

VİZYON
Her kökenden ve her yaş aralığından bireyler için dil edinim sürecini geliştirmek amacıyla geleneksel öğretim yöntemlerini modern teknolojilerle birleştirerek kapsamlı ve destekleyici bir öğrenme ortamı yaratarak, öğrencilerin gerekli olan yabancı dil bilgi ve becerilerini kazanmalarını sağlamayı amaçlamaktadır.


**Uzman Eğitim Kadrosu:**

Spellio Academy'ndaki eğitmenlerimiz, POLYGLOT,dil öğretimi konusunda deneyimli ve alanlarında uzman kişilerden oluşmaktadır. Öğrencilerimize dil bilgisi, konuşma pratiği, dinleme anlama, yazma becerileri ve kültürel farkındalık konularında kapsamlı bir eğitim sunarak dil becerilerini en üst düzeye çıkarmayı amaçlıyoruz.

**Geleneksel ile Modern Eğitim Yaklaşımı:**

Spellio Academy  öğrencilerine çağdaş ve etkili bir dil öğrenme deneyimi sunmak için modern ile geleneksel eğitim metotları ve teknolojilerini kullanmaktadır. İnteraktif ders materyalleri, dil pratiği odaklı aktiviteler ve öğrenci merkezli yaklaşımımızla dil öğrenmeyi daha keyifli ve etkili hale getiriyoruz.

**Çeşitli Dil Kursları:**

Spellio Academy, öğrencilerin ihtiyaçlarına uygun çeşitli dil kursları sunmaktadır. Erken,başlangıç seviyesinden ileri düzeye kadar geniş bir yelpazede kurs seçenekleri ile her öğrenciye hitap ediyoruz. İngilizce, Fransızca,Arapça gibi popüler dillerden, Çince, Rusça gibi daha özgün dillere kadar geniş bir dil yelpazemiz bulunmaktadır.

**Öğrenci Dostu Ortam:**

Spellio Academy ,öğrencilerin rahatça öğrenmelerini sağlamak için samimi ve destekleyici bir öğrenme ortamı sunar. Küçük sınıf grupları, bireysel geri bildirimle

Description:

 Formazione linguistica personalizzata per le esigenze aziendali

Siamo specializzati in corsi di inglese su misura per aziende, progettati per migliorare le competenze linguistiche dei dipendenti in base alle esigenze specifiche di ogni impresa. Offriamo un percorso formativo personalizzato con un mix di lezioni individuali o di gruppo sui temi più rilevanti per il business, disponibili sia online che in presenza, o in modalità ibrida.

 I nostri servizi includono:
 Percorsi formativi su misura: Analizziamo le esigenze aziendali per creare un programma ad hoc, con focus su temi pratici come business English, email writing, presentazioni, meeting, negoziazioni e altro ancora.

 Lezioni individuali o di gruppo: Offriamo la possibilità di combinare sessioni individuali per migliorare le competenze specifiche di ogni dipendente con lezioni di gruppo per potenziare la comunicazione interna.

 Certificazioni riconosciute globalmente: Prepariamo i dipendenti per ottenere certificazioni come Cambridge, IELTS, TOEIC, utili sia a livello professionale che personale.

 E-learning per dipendenti: Piattaforma disponibile 24/7 per studiare quando e dove vuoi, con contenuti interattivi e progressi monitorabili.

 Perché scegliere The London Academy?
 Percorsi su misura per ogni livello e settore.
 Massima flessibilità: Lezioni online, in ufficio o in modalità ibrida.
 Docenti qualificati e madrelingua con esperienza nel mondo aziendale.
 Certificazioni ufficiali per garantire un percorso di crescita riconosciuto a livello globale.

 Contattaci per un programma di formazione linguistica adatto alla tua azienda:
info@thelondonacademy.it

The London Academy – Il tuo partner linguistico per il successo globale.

People often inquire about my language learning journey and how I maintain proficiency in German and Chinese Mandarin. The answer lies in the creation of "Langrushi." I endeavor to establish effective language learning tools and methods, extending support to anyone keen on exploring the realms of a foreign language.

Why Langrushi?
Langrushi isn't just an e-learning platform; it's a transformative journey for language enthusiasts, beginners, and seasoned learners alike. My courses are meticulously designed to provide an immersive experience that goes beyond conventional language education.

Your Language Journey Begins Here:
Whether you're starting from scratch, seeking to refine your language skills, or restarting your language journey after a long break, Langrushi offers a comprehensive range of courses equipped with the tools and support you need to thrive. Connect with us and unlock a world of possibilities through language.

We Shape Global Communicators:
At Langrushi, we're not merely teaching languages; we're molding global communicators. Join us today to embark on a language adventure and discover the incredible opportunities that language proficiency can unlock.

Ready to take the first step? Your linguistic journey begins here at Langrushi. Start your language adventure today!

Name: Zohour el yasmeen language school
Description:
Our school was a brilliant idea in Mr. Mohamed Salama's mind. Mr. Mohamed Salama (Allah bless his soul), who had a Bachelor of Fine Arts, Helwan University in 1971 ,  is the founder of our School. He chose a very unique location in New Maadi to offer great educational facilities to several outskirts such as El Basateen, Maadi, Dar El Salam, Zahraa El Maadi and others. Moreover, the school buildings were prepared and designed under his own supervision. Thanks to Mr. Mohamed Salama, the school became a great educational edifice in Maadi. Then, we started to get the necessary legal documents and permissions to complete the legal procedures. We did our best to get the best equipment, furniture, the computer lab and the science lab. All that was supported by the best educational tools. Finally, The dream came true and our dear school was opened in 1987. Our school started its awesome educational services from 1987 up till now.
       Mr. Mohamed Salama gave his wife the responsibility of being the principal of the school in 1987. Mrs. Zeinab Hussein Tawfeek had a Bachelor of Agriculture in 1987. The school started with the pre – elementary stage, meanly with kindergarten and primary one. After that, and due to successful efforts and the increase of the students' numbers, we established a new attached building in 1996. Since that, Zohour El yasmeen Schools had all educational stages: Kindergarten, primary, preparatory and secondary stages. Therefore, the year 1996 was a turning point for our school as it was no longer one school with limited classes but it became a very famous group of schools in Maadi and its nearby places. For that, we pray Allah to bless Mr. Mohamed Salama's soul as he was the one who thought, planned and designed that great educational edifice.

Name: Academia Futaba de Idioma y Cultura Japonesa
Description:
¿Qué es Futaba?

La Academia Futaba es una escuela de japonés con clases presenciales y online, ubicada en Monterrey, México.

¿Qué significa Futaba?

Futaba (双葉) significa retoño  y representa el inicio que todos hemos tenido como estudiantes al conocer la cultura japonesa.

Nuestra misión es cuidar y nutrir ese interés que retoña, para que se convierta en un fuerte árbol.

El método Futaba.

Nuestro método se caracteriza por estar altamente estructurado y actualizado. Esto se refleja en:

* Enfoque de enseñanza INPUT/OUTPUT (comprensión y producción), que desarrolla hablidades cotidianas de comunicación.
* Clases con estructura predefinida semana a semana.
Recursos de clase en mejora continua.
* Capacitación y auditoría constante de maestros.
* Evaluación estandarizada, que asegura el avance homogéneo del grupo.

Name: KWONG KOW CHINESE SCHOOL, INC.
Description:
KKCS was founded in 1916 by the Chinese Merchants Association (the On Leong Merchants Association) to establish an educational institution to help maintain Chinese heritage among overseas Chinese.
 
Our school is the oldest one of its kind in Boston and one of the longest-running Chinese schools on the East Coast. Through our long and distinguished history, we have provided Chinese language and cultural education, academic support, and recreational activity for over 20,000 Chinese children in the Greater Boston area.
 
We became a non-profit in 1981 in order to ensure our sustainability as a community resource. In 2007, our school moved into our first permanent home at 87 Tyler Street.

Operating in the heart of Chinatown, we fill a critical need for quality childcare and enrichment programming for families in our community.

Our organization is committed to two objectives. Firstly, we aim to preserve and promote Chinese language and culture. Secondly, we are devoted to preparing immigrant and first-generation children for mainstream society by making our resources and opportunities accessible to all.

With nearly 17,000 sq. ft., our facility is equipped with state-of-the-art technology; facilities include a multi-function performing arts center, a computer lab, a library, a dance studio, and 13 classrooms.

We offer Chinese language and culture programs, as well as academic curriculums that parallel and complement the Boston public school system. Every summer, we offer a comprehensive 8-week program that is both academically intensive and culturally enriching.

Name: ELP Language School
Description:
Learning Today, Leading Tomorrow

At ELP, we provide high-quality English education for learners aged 7 to 22, guiding them step by step from Cambridge Starters to IELTS. With over 20 years of experience, our mission is to build confidence, open global opportunities, and prepare students for success in international exams and beyond.

Beyond classroom teaching, ELP offers students unique opportunities to study abroad in language schools across the UK, Malta, and Canada. Through these experiences, our learners not only improve their English but also broaden their cultural horizons.

As an international language project main contractor and partner, we actively collaborate with global institutions to deliver innovative educational projects. Our international network enables our students to access diverse learning paths and connect with peers worldwide.

Our alumni continue their education and careers across the globe, especially in Canada, Germany, Belgium, the Netherlands, Austria, and the UK. Their achievements reflect our commitment to preparing students for both academic success and professional growth in today’s interconnected world.

ELP is the place where you don’t just learn English , you also discover your future.

Name: France Ecole Group
Description:
France Ecole Group is a non-profit organization dedicated to setting the standards for French teacher training and certification programs with several entrepreneurial opportunities as a reward for graduation. We achieve this through unique curriculum design and by matching certified teachers with clientele generated from our French Academie Brand. 

French Academie offers private and group instruction, corporate/ executive professional language training, afterschool enrichment programs for all ages, immersive summer camps as well as tutoring and test preparation.  

Mission: To Set New Standards in Culturally Sensitive Curriculum Design and Teacher Training, Certification and Promotion 

Vision: To synthesize the traditional French curriculum and teaching methodologies with modern language instruction techniques so that we can continue to design and deliver programs that enable our students to follow the natural order of the four language acquisition skills (listening, speaking, reading then writing) in an accelerated manner within a learning environment that is adapted to the diverse needs and goals of both native and non-native speakers so the achievement of full linguistic and cultural fluency can be reached quickly and effectively

Prêt à parler couramment le français ? 

Chez CAUSONS ! nous pensons que la meilleure façon de maîtriser le français est de le parler tous les jours et de le pratiquer.  Plongez dans des conversations captivantes, découvrez des conseils utiles et profitez de la joie de parler français en toute confiance. 

Faisons en sorte que « parler français couramment » soit plus qu’un simple rêve. Faisons-en une réalité à chaque conversation.

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Name: IWG Instituutti Oy
Description:
IWG Instituutti on työelämän kielikouluttaja.

Opetustoimintamme päätavoitteena on kehittää asiakkaiden liiketoimintaa parantamalla heidän työntekijöidensä kielellisiä taitoja. Tarjoamme niin yksityis- kuin ryhmäopetusta joko lähi- tai etäopetuksena. Perinteisten kurssien lisäksi tarjoamme erilaisia intensiivi- ja täsmävalmennuksia, aina räätälöidysti asiakkaan tarpeiden ja toiveiden mukaan.

Pyrimme osaltamme vastaamaan työelämän ja kansainvälisen yhteistyön asettamiin vaatimuksiin, kuten monikieliseen viestintään ja kansainvälistymiseen.  Yksilöllisellä opetustavalla huomioimme koulutettavien erilaiset taustat ja oppimistavat, ja pyrimme tukemaan jokaista yksilöä heidän omassa kehityksessään.

Opetamme seuraavia kieliä (ja muitakin on mahdollista järjestää - tiedustele siis rohkeasti!): englanti, ruotsi, saksa, suomi S2, ranska, espanja, italia, venäjä, kiina.

Kouluttajamme ovat sekä suomenkielisiä että syntyperäisiä kohdekielen asiantuntijoita, joilla on asianmukainen pedagoginen koulutus ja vankka kokemus aikuisopetuksesta. 

Kohderyhmämme on eri teollisuusalojen yritykset ja julkishallinnon toimialat. Koulutettavia ovat mm. asiakasyritysten johtoporras, insinöörit ja muut toimihenkilöt, joiden tehtäviin kuuluu tiivis yhteistyö ulkomaalaisten asiakkaiden tai yhteistyökumppaneiden kanssa. 

IWG Instituutti Oy on vuonna 1979 perustettu perheyritys ja on sen jälkeen toiminut menestyksellisesti laajalla ja haastavalla alueella - kielitaidon edistäjänä. Vuonna 1996 yritysmuoto muutettiin osakeyhtiöksi.  IWG:n toimipiste on Tampereella ja olemme laajentaneet toimialueemme koko maan kattavaksi vuodesta 2007 lähtien.

Name: The Bridge Institute
Description:
The Bridge Institute è la scuola di lingue di Rivoli, Torino e Provincia. Il nostro centro linguistico dal 1984 si occupa di formazione linguistica di qualità in aula, presso aziende e anche a distanza, via telefono e webcam, tramite il programma Teleteach. Siamo in grado di offrire lezioni di lingue in aula a livello nazionale e internazionale. Infatti, siamo parte di canSpeak Italy, network di centri linguistici di qualità, specializzati nella formazione linguistica aziendale, con sedi in tutta Italia e non solo. The Bridge Institute rappresenta l’area di Torino e Provincia di CanSpeak Italy.  Organizziamo corsi di lingue finanziati (aziendali collettivi) in tutta Italia senza alcun esborso da parte dell’azienda. Il nostro staff, insieme ai propri consulenti, si occupa, dall’inizio alla fine, di tutto. Il nostro servizio comprende sia la parte organizzativo-didattica, sia quella burocratico-amministrativa.
I nostri servizi comprendono anche interpretariato in simultanea, consecutiva e chuchotage e traduzioni multilingua generiche, tecniche, manuali, legali. Organizziamo corsi intensivi e non, di Business English, Legal, Financial.

Name: Eureka Language Centre
Description:
Cuentan  que  cuando Arquímedes  de  Siracusa  se metió en su bañera y vio que el nivel del agua subía y que, por lo tanto, el volumen de cualquier objeto sumergido equivalía al volumen de agua que ascendía, sintió el "efecto eureka” por primera vez. De ahí que lo que conocemos como el “efecto eureka” se refiera al momento que todos hemos vivido cuando conseguimos comprender de repente algo que nos parecía incomprensible. A lo largo de la historia, la exclamación  “EUREKA!”  ha  sido  usada  para celebrar un descubrimiento o el haber conseguido un objetivo que hemos perseguido con anhelo, esfuerzo y trabajo. 
Y así nació EUREKA Language Centre SCCL, un nuevo centro de idiomas en el corazón de Barcelona, dirigido por un equipo dinámico, joven y lleno de entusiasmo  y  donde  queremos  que  todos  tengáis vuestro propio “efecto eureka”. Con tal objetivo en mente, priorizamos métodos de aprendizaje innova- dores y nos centramos en las necesidades de cada alumno/a.

Name: ISEU - Iser, Eufinger & Partner
Description:
We are the premium provider of highly efficient language and pronunciation courses. Founded in 2008 by Stefan Iser.    
 
We help you to ensure that your employees do not waste time in language training, but reach their goals quickly and efficiently. Our compact course concepts are geared to the needs of highly qualified professionals with limited time. The training is simply structured, clear and sustainable.    

In addition to classic language, pronunciation and exam training, we offer specialized language courses such as German for Doctors, German for Dentists, German for Finance and Business, German for Lawyers, German for Priests, French for Agriculture and Business English. For customers who want to improve individual skills in a focused way, we offer language coaching where they can practice their writing, speaking and presentation skills in a targeted way.     

The individual offers can be taken online or offline as individual or group training.    

"Custom-made" is our strength.   
With passion and expertise, we develop custom solutions that meet your requirements. The basis for this: our in-depth professional knowledge and many years of experience with demanding customers. We know what your employees need.   

We develop your individual language training concept in three steps:   

1. inventory   
2. target formulation   
3. custom-made training concept   

The plan we create individually contains all the components needed to achieve the learning objective.   

Book an appointment via iseu.de for a professional and fair consultation!       

#languagetraining #specializedlanguagecourses #pronunciationtraining #languagecoaching #writingtraining #presentationtraining #examinationtraining

Name: American LIFE Şirinevler
Description:
American Life, İngilizce eğitimi sektörünün yenilikçi kuruluşudur. 2007 yılında kurulmuş ve kısa zamanda ülkemizde dil eğitimi sektörünün öncü kurumu haline gelmiştir.

Yenilikçidir

American Life, en iyi kitaplar, dijital materyaller ve teknolojik donanımla hizmet verir. Dünyanın en önde gelen yayıncı kuruluşlarıyla yaptığımız projelerle öğrencilerimiz vakitlerini en verimli şekilde kullanarak en kısa sürede hedeflerine ulaşır.

Öğrencilerine değer verir

Bizim için öğrenciler her şeyin odak noktasıdır. Tüm bir ekip öğrencinin hedeflerine ulaşması için var gücüyle çalışır. Kalite Yönetimi ve Öğrenci İşleri (QMSR) departmanı sadece öğrenci memnuniyeti için kurulmuştur. QMSR departmanımız kalite konusunu ne kadar önemsediğimizin bir göstergesidir.

Hedeflerinizi bilir

Yurtdışı eğitim, işimizin her zaman önemli bir parçası olmuştur. Dilerseniz eğitiminizin bir bölümünü yurtdışında almanız için uzman ekibimize güvenebilirsiniz.

Öğrencilerine harika ortamlar sunar

Her konuda sektörün bir adım ilerisinde olmayı hedefleriz. Kurumlarımız, sadece öğrencilerimizin eğitim aldıkları yerler değildir. Öğrencilerimiz kurumlarımızda sosyalleşir, yeni arkadaşlar edinirler. Haftada birkaç saatliğine de olsa kurumlarımızda yaşarlar. Bu sebeple dersliklerimiz, kafeteryalarımız, tuvaletlerimiz ve diğer ortak kullanım alanlarımız öğrencilerimizin rahatlığı için düşünülmüştür.

Öğrettiği İngilizceye bir ömür boyu sahip çıkar

Bir kez American Life’tan eğitim alan bir öğrenci bir ömür boyu istediği American Life şubesinde +more derslerine katılma hakkına sahiptir.

Sertifikası Kıymetlidir

American Life sertifikasını, ABD’nin önde gelen üniversitelerinden olan Concordia University, Virginia Wesleyan University, West Virginia State University gibi üniversiteler IELTS ya da TOEFL skoru yerine kabul etmektedirler.

Hedefleri yüksektir

İlk yurtdışı şubemizi Azerbaycan’da açtık. Dünyanın tüm bölgelerinde American Life markasının hakları şirketimize aittir. Yakın gelecekte İngilizce...

Name: Allo Chloé
Description: Allo Chloé est née de l'envie d'une jeune entrepreneuse d'œuvrer quotidiennement pour des formations ciblées et adaptées dans le domaine des langues, qu'elle considère comme des outils de communication puissants. Aujourd’hui, tout le monde a besoin d’apprendre. Nous ne pouvons plus être polyvalents et performants tout au long de notre vie sans nous former régulièrement. Selon une étude, jusqu’à 85% des emplois de 2030 n'existeraient pas encore. Tout va très vite et la formation continue représente donc un réel enjeu pour les particuliers comme pour les entreprises. Il s'agit donc de se former tout au long de la vie, sans pour autant subir les contraintes des formations trop longues, trop intensives, trop générales. Avec Allo Chloé, on va droit au but pour monter en compétences... Répondre à un besoin précis, proposer des outils et un contenu utiles et réexploitables dans votre quotidien. Des formations ciblées donc, et adaptées, parce que malgré la masse de formations sur le marché aujourd’hui, il n’est pas toujours facile de trouver celle qui répondra à nos besoins. Chaque entreprise a un fonctionnement spécifique : Allo Chloé s’adapte à vos besoins pour une formation sur-mesure. Allo Chloé est donc avant tout à votre écoute et propose des services d’ingénierie de formation, d’ingénierie pédagogique, de conseils en appui du numérique dans l’enseignement et l’apprentissage, de formations et d’ateliers pour répondre efficacement à votre demande. Parallèlement, Allo Chloé crée du contenu à visée pédagogique et commerciale pour différentes écoles de Français Langue Étrangère actives sur les réseaux sociaux.

Description:
I teach Italian language to foreigners, for beginners, intermediate and advanced level both online, in Florence and in Siena.

My methodology is:
1) absolutely communicative, because language is communication and being able to speak is essential 
2) it’s student-centered, which means focused on the student, who always has an active role: you will never be a passive listener!
3) practise, practise, practise and again practise

My lessons are tailored on each student, according to the students’ goal and needs.

 I taught for 6 years in an Italian language school in the city center of Florence, both in group course and private lessons. During these years I took part in several european training projects for language teachers about innovative teaching technique an online educational platform.

 I studied and got the DITALS certification, granted by the University for Foreigners of Siena that certifies the competences needed to fulfill the role of teacher of the Italian language to foreigners and in 2020 I became an examiner for CELI, the Italian language certification attesting language knowledge at international level.

Offering three levels of English instruction and specialized business and technology courses, the Institute delivers language courses told through the cultural lens and experiences of the student and designed to promote a culturally sustaining pedagogical approach. 

Pedagogy Design 
The Spoken Word ELT Institute designs culturally relevant English language teaching methods and materials, focusing on Diasporic and Indigenous communities worldwide.  These materials are customized to the needs of the student population and can be commissioned by language instructors, administrators, and educational systems. 

Lectures and Presentations

Name: Learn Portuguese with Lili and Friends
Description:
*Do you wish to learn European Portuguese?*
(as opposed to Brazilian Portuguese. Yes, there’s a difference, especially with pronunciation!). 
This is the right place! *Olá!*
Why did you decide to learn Portuguese?
Did you decide to immigrate to Portugal? Have you fallen in love with a Portuguese? ….maybe you’ve simply fallen in love with the language and the country?…maybe you will be visiting or working in Portuguese speaking African countries?…. Or you just love the Portuguese food and culture?
The Portuguese language is an incredibly beautiful language, and often underrated, but it’s spoken all over the world and right now it’s the 6th most spoken language in the world.
Note that the African Portuguese language structure is the same as the European (also called Continental Portuguese) one. 
Are you a busy person with work, family and other obligations who struggles to find the time and energy for language learning? Don’t let this stop you, our course is perfect for you.
Our course covers all levels — from absolute beginner right up to the very advanced levels. It mainly focuses on self-study, and we often do preparation for your CIPLE exams. 
Here are the three main things that’ll get you from beginner to confident speaker.
1. Continually working on your main skills (reading, writing, listening, grammar, and speaking).
2. Giving extra attention to listening and speaking (two challenging aspects of the language. 
3. Continuously working and going up the levels, ideally up to B2, even though you only need to achieve A2 to pass your CIPLE-CAPLE exam. 

Let me know if we can help!

Name: EP School - Üzleti angol és Interkulturális tréning
Description:
A mai összekapcsolt világban a vállalatok több mint helyi vállalkozások. Egy globális színtér részei, új piacokra terjeszkednek, és a világ minden tájáról találnak tehetségeket. Mi, az EP School-nál, hiszünk abban, hogy a szakmai angol nyelvtudás kulcsfontosságú ebben a folyamatosan változó környezetben.

Kik vagyunk?

Az EP School-nál szenvedéllyel segítjük a szakembereket abban, hogy magabiztosan kommunikáljanak angolul. Célunk, hogy minden tanulónk a lehető legjobb nyelvtudást szerezze meg, és sikeresen navigáljon a nemzetközi üzleti világban.

Mit kínálunk?

 Üzleti angol tanfolyamok: Kifejezetten a nemzetközi üzleti kommunikációra és szakmai helyzetekre szabva.
 Tapasztalt oktatók: Magasan képzett, gyakorlott szakemberek, akik személyre szabott megközelítést alkalmaznak.
 Interaktív tanulás: Valós élethelyzetekre és gyakorlatokra épülő oktatás, amely azonnal alkalmazható tudást nyújt.

Miért válassz minket?

Rugalmasság: Online tanfolyamok, amelyek illeszkednek a te időbeosztásodhoz.

Eredményorientált megközelítés: Minden képzésünk célja a gyakorlati, azonnal alkalmazható tudás megszerzése.

Globális perspektíva: Nemzetközi szinten elismert tananyagok és módszerek.
Légy részese a sikernek!

Csatlakozz hozzánk, és tedd meg az első lépést egy sikeres, globális karrier felé! Akár külföldi ügyfelekkel vagy kollégákkal dolgozol, akár globális projektekben veszel részt, az EP School segítségével magabiztosan kommunikálhatsz angolul.

Name: Società Dante Alighieri - Comitato di Amman
Description:
Amman Committee of “Società Dante Alighieri” is a non for profit association established in 2004 and registered at the Jordanian Minister of Culture, with 25 founder members.

Our main purpose is to encourage learning and appreciation of the Italian language and culture in Jordan, promoting the common cultural heritage of our two countries.

Società Dante Alighieri’s main office is in Rome and has around 500 committees in Italy and around the world.

Our center offers Italian language for adults and children, in-house and out, film seasons, lectures and conferences, music and theater events, and recreational and social activities.

Our association is a cultural benchmark for the Italian community in the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan. We cooperate with the Italian Embassy’s cultural office for the Italian Language week in the world, the Italian Culinary week and to promote the study of Italian in Jordan. Other institutional partners are Italian, local and international cultural associations and organizations in Jordan.

Our Committee is an official center for the PLIDA certificate of language competency, we have a library, with Italian books and DVDs, and we offer a translation service from and to Arabic and English.

Since September 2013 we are part of the EUNIC Jordan cluster, a network of European Union National Institutes for Culture.

We exist to serve the needs of local and international communities by providing language services that educate, inspire, and empower all language learners to become bi-literate and multicultural members of their communities. Our everyday goal is to promote the benefits of being bilingual and normalize bilingualism and multicultural experiences through teaching a second language.

Our staff of Certified Language Instructors facilitate amazing interactive online courses, making learning a new language an accessible and convenient option for busy professionals, teens, and children. 

We invite you to join us and take advantage of the education, mentorship, and support we offer individuals and families about pathways to learn, build, and maintain second language fluency.


My Other Tongue - Your pathway to becoming bilingual.

If the location and the prices fit, we get the answer that the course is already fully booked and the search starts all over again.

We decided to solve this problem. We created a company where you can choose from a wide range of courses and locations and still keep an overview.

A company that is characterized by clear procedures, simplicity and flexibility.

Not sure which course or location would be best for you? Tell us your goals and preferences, and we’ll be happy to advise you!

Name: Mayu's Classroom
Description:
En Mayu’s Classroom creemos que el inglés no se estudia… se vive.
Hemos ayudado a más de 3,000 hispanohablantes a superar bloqueos, ganar confianza y usar el inglés en la vida real.

Nuestro método se apoya en tres pilares: autonomía, mentalidad e inglés de la vida real. Así acompañamos a nuestros alumnos a soltar la lengua y dejar atrás el miedo, para que puedan expresarse con seguridad en entrevistas, reuniones, viajes o conversaciones del día a día.

Más que una academia, somos un movimiento: queremos alzar la vara de lo posible y demostrar que los latinos pueden brillar en cualquier parte del mundo.

Estamos certificados por Cambridge y nuestra misión es clara: impactar a 1 millón de hispanohablantes y que confíen en su inglés, disfruten el proceso y rompan las barreras que los han frenado.

Name: Yázigi - Grupo Alves
Description:
O Grupo Alves, pioneiro no Brasil, não apenas na franquia Yázigi, mas também no sistema de franchising, foi fundado por Sonilton Alves e Maria Olinda de Barros Alves em 1958, em Porto Alegre, RS. O casal desempenhou um papel crucial na formatação do sistema de franquias de serviços no país, expandindo a marca Yázigi pelo sul do Brasil. Os filhos, Martha e Eduardo de Barros Alves, deram continuidade ao legado dos pais, com Nilton liderando a expansão para Belo Horizonte em 1993, e Eduardo e Martha assumindo as operações desde então.

O Grupo Alves é referência, contando com 03 franquias Yázigi em Porto Alegre e 01 em Cachoeirinha, RS. Atendemos anualmente cerca de 2500 alunos, contando com uma equipe de 30 professores. Oferecemos programas de capacitação em inglês para crianças, jovens, adultos e corporativo, tanto presencial quanto online.

A trajetória da família Alves na franquia Yázigi marcou a empresa como pioneira no ensino de idiomas. Com visão empreendedora, Sonilton Filho expandiu para Belo Horizonte, consolidando presença em novos mercados. Atualmente, Eduardo e Martha lideram a empresa, mantendo o compromisso com a excelência.

O Grupo Alves, ao longo dos anos, construiu uma reputação sólida, atendendo às necessidades linguísticas diversificadas. Seu portfólio abrange programas presenciais e online, oferecendo opções adaptáveis para diferentes públicos. A empresa é reconhecida não apenas por sua tradição, mas também por sua inovação constante, proporcionando experiências educacionais de qualidade.

Essa história é um testemunho do comprometimento com a excelência e pioneirismo no setor de franquias e ensino de idiomas no Brasil. O Yázigi - Grupo Alves continua a evoluir, mantendo-se na vanguarda do ensino de idiomas e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento do sistema de franchising no país.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: CLAN CITY
Description:
My, pasjonaci języka angielskiego i nauczania, zdajemy sobie sprawę z istoty znajomości języka angielskiego w dzisiejszym świecie. Angielski jest językiem nauki, biznesu, współpracy międzynarodowej i dyplomacji, umożliwia naukę i studiowanie za granicą, jest niezbędny, aby dostać dobrą pracę w Polsce i poza jej granicami.

Dążymy przede wszystkim do przekazania Wam wiedzy, dlatego lektorzy języka angielskiego prowadzą zajęcia w oparciu o programy i metody cenione nie tylko w Polsce, ale także na świecie. Mamy pewność co do ich skuteczności, dlatego oferujemy Wam testy i egzaminy Cambridge przeprowadzane w naszym Autoryzowanym Centrum Egzaminacyjnym PL277.

CLAN CITY to nie tylko szkoła języka angielskiego, choć w naszej ofercie znajdziecie mnogość kursów języka angielskiego dla dzieci, młodzieży oraz dla osób dorosłych. Do każdego kursanta podchodzimy indywidualnie i kompleksowo z maksymalną dbałością o efekty nauki języka obcego, jakim jest język angielski.

W naszych szkołach w Gliwicach i Zabrzu rocznie uczy się ponad 1000 kursantów. Większość z nich spędziło z nami wiele lat i zdobyło cenne certyfikaty na całe życie. Jesteśmy firmą sporą, ale lokalną i cenimy bliskie relacje z Klientami. 

Nasza misja to:
Grow strong with English and enjoy it!
 
Szkoły Clan City są nie tylko Akredytowanymi Centrami metod Teddy Eddie, Savvy Ed i Edward's League, ale też są ich szkołami macierzystymi - obie u nas powstawały i z naszym udziałem.
 
Posiadamy znak jakości TGLS Quality Alliance!

Zapraszamy w nasze progi!

İZDAF Akademi 32 yıllık öğretmenlik ve eğitimcilik tecrübesine dayanan Cavidan Şenuyar (Yörük) tarafından kurulmuştur.Amacımız Alman dili ve kültürünü en iyi şekilde iletmek, yeni bir dil öğrenmek için çıktığınız bu yolda sizlere rehberlik edip Almanca öğrenmenin ayrıcalıklarını, farkındalıklarını hissettirmektir. Kurslarımız A1 (Başlangıç Temel Basamak) C2 (Yüksek Basamak) düzeyde her seviyede, dalında uzman ve deneyimli öğretmenlerimiz ile interaktif metot, öğrenci odaklı, keşfederek öğrenmeye dayalı yöntem ve tekniklerle modern, güncel ders materyalleri ile yabancı dil Almancayı zevk alarak
öğretmeyi hedeflemektedir. Derslerimizin içeriği sadece dil bilgisinden (Gramer) ibaret olmayıp, yabancı dil öğreniminde 4 Temel Beceri ile adlandırılan; okuma anlama, dinleme anlama, yazma ve konuşma becerilerini içermektedir. Ayrıca derslerimizde kelime ve telaffuz çalışmaları, ülke bilgisi de konularla birlikte işlenir.

Name: UNTREF LINGUA
Description:
UNTREF LINGUA es un laboratorio interdisciplinario de investigación aplicada a la búsqueda de soluciones para las necesidades lingüísticas que se plantean en la vida universitaria, profesional y social. Como tal, su acción se sitúa en diversos campos: principalmente, el académico, el laboral y profesional, el de la sociedad civil, la cooperación internacional. En todos ellos, la finalidad es contribuir al desarrollo equitativo del capital lingüístico de las personas y las instituciones, dado el papel clave que este desempeña en el acceso al conocimiento y la experiencia internacional, en el desarrollo económico, cultural y social. Más específicamente, UNTREF LINGUA se propone:

- Producir conocimiento científico sobre usos, necesidades y problemas referidos al lenguaje y los idiomas entre su público objetivo: prioritariamente, la comunidad de la UNTREF y de su entorno socioeconómico.

- Ofrecer servicios y productos (cursos, capacitaciones, asesoramiento, traducciones, selección y/o desarrollo de herramientas) a medida de las necesidades lingüísticas detectadas. Evaluar su implementación.

- Acompañar procesos de innovación y mejora en el campo de los idiomas en otros organismos, empresas e instituciones. 

- Contribuir a la formación de jóvenes profesionales del área brindando acompañamiento en la ejecución de proyectos.

- Participar en el debate académico nacional, regional e internacional en temas de política y gestión de lenguas.

Adult learners of all levels can join our flexible conversation classes to help them develop their speaking and listening skills. They practice their language skills in order to communicate more confidently with lots of feedback and vocabulary development. 

We also offer private classes (one-to-one, in a pair or a trio) for students who want to achieve  a specific objective or general English for those whose timetables are complicated. In addition to our work in the academy, online classes are also available.

Name: English IN
Description:
Corsi di inglese a Limbiate (Monza Brianza) per adulti, bambini e aziende. Proponiamo corsi di lingua inglese individuali o di gruppo. I gruppi sono piccoli (da 4 a 8 persone).
In tutti i nostri corsi puntiamo sullo speaking (il parlato) per consentire l'allievo di poter esprimersi e dialogare con più sicurezza.
I corsi di lingua per le aziende sono svolti presso la nostra sede a Limbiate o presso la sede dell'azienda. Orari e giorni sono flessibili, facciamo lezioni di inglese di mattina, nella pausa pranzo o di sera. Il programma del corso è personalizzato in base alle necessità dell'azienda a fine di velocizzare il miglioramento e ottenere risultati concreti in breve tempo.
Un corso molto richiesto per gli adulti è il corso di conversazione in inglese di gruppo (sono sempre piccoli gruppi, quindi ognuno può interagire durante la lezione). Durante questi corsi, che si svolgono nella nostra sede a Limbiate o online, gli studenti imparano l'inglese parlato ed informale, usato nel linguaggio quotidiano dalle persone madrelingua inglese. Migliorano anche la comprensione dell'ascolto. Imparano e hanno opportunità di mettere in pratica espressioni dell'inglese parlato, modi di dire. Lavoriamo tanto sui role play games quindi giochi di ruolo, parliamo di attualità, curiosità, commentiamo i brevi video nella lingua inglese.
Corsi individuali invece permettono di focalizzare l'attenzione su un singolo allievo e quindi a velocizzare l'apprendimento. Orari e giorni dei nostri corsi di inglese individuali sono flessibili e si possono fare sia presso la nostra sede a Limbiate sia online (o in entrambi modi in base alle necessità dello studente).
I nostri corsi di inglese per bambini invece sono destinati ai bimbi dai 4 anni in su. I corsi per i più piccoli si basano sui giochi in lingua inglese, semplici lavoretti, canzoni e racconti dei semplici libri.
Per i bambini più grandi invece abbiamo corsi di inglese di gruppo o individuali e usiamo libri e materiali interattivi.

Learn to way - Dil Eğitiminde Yenilikçi Yaklaşım

Merhaba LinkedIn Topluluğu! Biz, Learn to way, dil eğitimini sadece bir öğrenme süreci değil, bir yaşam tarzı haline getiriyoruz.

 Uzman Öğretmen Kadromuz: Anadili İngilizce veya ikinci anadili İngilizce olan, TEFL, TESOL, ESL, TOEIC, TEYL gibi sertifikalara sahip ve minimum 3 yıl deneyime sahip öğretmenlerle çalışıyoruz.

 Gerçek Zamanlı Pratik İmkanı: Dil öğrenmenin en etkili yolu, dilin içinde yaşamak ve pratik yapmaktır. Öğrencilerimize gerçek zamanlı pratik imkanları sunarken, yanlışlarını düzeltip destekleyecek profesyonel öğretmenlerle çalışıyoruz.

 İnsana Dokunan Eğitmen İş Birlikleri: Sadece uzman değil, aynı zamanda insan ilişkilerinde güçlü eğitmenlerle iş birliği yapıyoruz. Sıcak bir ortamda öğrencilerimize samimi bir dil deneyimi sunuyoruz.

 Cesaretin Gücü: Dil öğrenmede en büyük engel cesaretsizliktir. Sizlere korkmanın ve çekinmenin yararsız olduğunu gösteriyor, öğrencilerimizi bir araya getirerek sosyal bir dil deneyimi sunuyoruz.

 Erişilebilir Fiyat ve Kalite: Uygun fiyatlarla en kaliteli eğitimi sunmak için çaba gösteriyor, her dersten sonra geri bildirimlerinizi dinleyip sürekli iyileştirmeler yapıyoruz.

 Online Dünyada Gerçek Hizmet: Online platformda hizmet verirken, gerçek ve ölçülebilir bir eğitim deneyimi sunuyoruz.

Siz de bize katılın, dildeki sınırları birlikte aşalım! learntowayinfo@gmail.com ile bize ulaşın.

#DilEğitimi #OnlineÖğrenme #UzmanEğitim #SosyalDilDeneyimi #İngilizceEğitimi

Name: Özel Lara İngiliz Kültür Yabancı Dil Kursu
Description:
BİZ KİMİZ?
İngiliz Kültür Yabancı Dil Kursları ülkemizde uzun yıllardır eğitim sektöründe güvenin odak noktası olmuştur. 2006 yılından itibaren hizmet veren İngiliz Kültür Yabancı Dil Kursları’nın şu anda yüzü aşkın şubesi bulunmaktadır ve bütün temsilciliklerinde yabancı dil eğitiminde elde ettiği köklü bilgi birikimini sürekli güncelleyerek ve dünya standartlarını yakından takip ederek eşsiz kalitede hizmet vermektedir. İngiliz Kültür Yabancı Dil Kursları, Türkiye’nin en büyük franchising veren kuruluşu olan Markalar Birliği’ne bağlı bir markadır. Müşteri memnuniyeti, eğitim standartları ve diğer kurumsal kurallar çerçevesinde kurumumuz Genel Merkez tarafından sürekli değerlendirilmekte ve denetlenmektedir.

İngiliz Kültür Yabancı Dil Kursu Lara Şubesi olarak 10 yıldan uzun süredir de mevcut lokasyonumuzda bulunmaktayız. Uzman eğitim ve yönetim kadrosu ile çocuk gruplarından yetişkinlere kadar her yaş grubuna hizmet veriyoruz. Kurumumuzda İngilizce başta olmak üzere Almanca, Rusça, İspanyolca, Türkçe dilleri eğitimi de vermekteyiz. Hem yerli hem de yabancı öğretmenlerden (native speaker) oluşan ve her biri alanında uzman bir kadromuz bulunmaktadır. Öğrencilerimiz, İngiliz Kültür Yabancı Dil Kursları sayesinde, evrensel bir dil olan İngilizceyi çok daha rahat ve çok daha kısa bir süre içerisinde öğrenmektedir. Öğrencilerimizi sürekli gözetim altında tutmakta ve dil becerilerinin gelişimini ileriye götürmek için uyguladığımız sistemle, kişiye özgü çözüm önerileri sunmaktayız.

İngiliz Kültür öğrencileri eğitim süreçlerinin sonunda Avrupa Konseyi tarafından 2012.R004 koduyla akredite edilmiş ve bu sayede de uluslararası geçerli hale gelmiş Avrupa Dil Portfolyosu sertifikasını almaya hak kazanırlar.

Name: The Chinese School of Greater Kansas City
Description:
Learning a language is learning about the world! 

The Chinese School of Greater Kansas City is a non-profit, educational institution that offers Mandarin Chinese language classes and cultural activities from preschool age to adults. Currently, we have more than 100 students enrolled in the Chinese School of Greater Kansas City Foundation.

Organization

The Chinese School was founded in 1973. The school consists of the Board of Directors, PTC members, and administration. All the current student families are the general members of the PTC, and the PTC members elect the board members. The seven members of the Board of Directors supervise the school administration and decide major policies. The administration staff manages the routine operations and is formed by the parent volunteers.

Curriculum

The school meets every Sunday afternoon for fall semester and spring semester. See Website Calendar for specific dates.

We offer 3 to 5 years old fun learning “Preschool Sing and Dance class”. It will be children's nursery songs in Chinese, giving an introduction to learning Chinese for the little ones.

For ages 5 and above, we offer two tracks of Chinese language programs:

• Chinese Heritage classes - (Zhuyin, Level 1 to Level 10)

• Chinese as Foreign Language (CFL) classes - (Pinyin, CFL 1 to CFL 10) 

After language classes, the school also offers a variety of cultural activities, such as Chinese yo-yo, Fusion Dance, Go board game and Taekwondo.

How about for adults? Yes, we have started Adults Conversation class! Come join us to learn Chinese!

Name: inlingua Galindo škola stranih jezika

inlingua Galindo je prva privatna škola stranih jezika u Beogradu, osnovana 1990. godine. Više od 20.000 polaznika do sada je završilo kurs engleskog jezika ili nekog drugog stranog jezika u našoj školi.

Ubedljivo najveći deo naših đaka, prijatelja i partnera došao je u inlingua Galindo po preporuci - što najbolje govori o kvalitetu našeg rada i dugoročnoj koristi, koju naši polaznici prepoznaju. Njihovi utisci su naša najveća preporuka.

inlingua Galindo Beograd radi po metodi međunarodnog lanca inlingua international, koji predstavlja najveću globalnu mrežu za učenje stranih jezika. Inlingua international radi u 250 centara, u više od 30 zemalja, na 5 kontinenata. Karakteriše je jedinstveni inlingua Metod.

USLUGE:
-NASTAVA STRANIH JEZIKA 
        Za kompanije i druga pravna lica 
        Za odrasle i studente 
        Za osnovce i srednjoškolce 
        Za predškolski uzrast 

-SEMINARI POSLOVNIH VEŠTINA na stranim jezicima

-PRIPREME ZA MEĐUNARODNE ISPITE:  FCE, CAE, CPE, BEC, IELTS, TOEFL

-IZDAVAŠTVO 
    Rečnici 
    Didaktički materijali za sve uzraste 

inlingua metod: Učimo kroz razgovor
Učenje kroz razgovor osnovna je odlika jedinstvenog inlingua metoda. Jezik učimo kroz konverzaciju, bez učenja samo iz udžbenika. Uz inlingua metod jezik se usvaja prirodno i omogućava da razmišljate na jeziku koji učite. Brzo, lako i zabavno - to je naš metod učenja stranog jezika!

 Enfoque Empresarial y Personal: Estamos convencidos de que el dominio del inglés es una herramienta indispensable en el entorno profesional moderno. Las empresas hoy en día buscan optimizar sus recursos y asegurarse de que sus empleados estén debidamente capacitados. Mr Brown English es el aliado perfecto en este proceso, ofreciendo programas adaptados que cumplen con los más altos estándares de calidad y eficacia.

 Material Exclusivo y Metodología Innovadora: Hemos desarrollado materiales didácticos y recursos exclusivos que responden a las necesidades específicas de nuestros alumnos. Nuestra metodología, probada y perfeccionada a lo largo de los años, asegura un aprendizaje eficiente y un progreso constante. Los alumnos de Mr Brown English no solo aprenden inglés, sino que aplican sus conocimientos, notando una mejora significativa y tangible en su dominio del idioma.

Pour adultes :

Nos programmes de formation en anglais pour adultes sont conçus pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque apprenant. Vous développerez vos compétences en expression et compréhension orale et écrite, et en grammaire. Nos méthodes interactives et votre formatrice expérimentée diplômée de Cambridge vous garantissent des résultats rapides et durables.

Pour enfants :
Pour vos enfants de 3 à 12 ans, nous proposons des ateliers d’anglais adaptés à chaque tranche d’âge. Inscrivez vos petits dès maintenant pour une immersion totale et améliorez leurs compétences en langue.
Chez Langues&Co, l’apprentissage de l’anglais commence dès le plus jeune âge. Nos cours pour enfants sont à la fois divertissants et interactifs, créés pour capter l’intérêt des plus jeunes et les aider à acquérir des connaissances tout en s’amusant. Nous facilitons leur compréhension écrite et leur expression orale.

"Comme vous, nous sommes pleinement conscients du potentiel de vos enfants et nous souhaitons les accompagner dans leurs avancées linguistiques en anglais.
Les formatrices travaillent en collaboration avec vous afin de soutenir vos enfants à chaque étape de leur processus d’apprentissage."

Name: Élő Nyelvek Szemináriuma Kft
Description:
Élő Nyelvek Szemináriuma / Living Languages Seminar has been in business since 1949. It was the first language school to open in Budapest after the Second World War and for many years English, French, German, Spanish, Italian, and Hungarian languages could be learned only in our school. Our native teachers and local teachers guarantee high level in communication focused tuition as well as in business corporate language training either at your company or in our centre in Budapest.
We specialize in teaching foreign languages and during the past decades our school developed many practices which have also been introduced by other schools. Until the 1980s we had been the only independent (not state owned) enterprise in this field. Despite the current lively competition, we are sure we have remained in the forefront of language teaching in Budapest. Being the oldest institution of its kind here, we are naturally well prepared to teach these languages. We are experienced and have extensive subject matter, which is constantly monitored and refreshed. 
ENGLISH: Subject matter: own series of books in English – also considering learning problems of the Hungarians – in the form of six books and supplementary books. Own development and publication of Hungarian-English, English-Hungarian Dictionary.
Our accreditation in five languages as an examination place recognized by the state and our highly qualified staff mean guarantee for students in their studies and preparation for the different examinations.
Our institute has gained the title of Accredited Institute for quality and all our language programs have been accredited and recognized by the appropriate state institutions.
In 2000 we became a state accredited language examination place of the locally most well-known ELTE-Origó examinations in five languages: English, German, French, Italian, and Spanish.
We prepare students for ELTE-Origó, Cambridge, TOEFL, BE exams, Zdf, ZMP, DELE, DELF, and DALF examinations.

Name: Stichting Gilde SamenSpraak Leiden e.o
Description:
Wilt u als anderstalige beter Nederlands leren spreken, of wilt u als vrijwilliger iemand uit een ander land helpen onze taal beter te leren spreken? Dan bent u bij Gilde SamenSpraak Leiden e.o. aan het goede adres!

Onze maatschappij vindt dat anderstaligen snel Nederlands moeten leren om goed te kunnen inburgeren. Dat is niet zo gemakkelijk. Migranten zoeken elkaar op in het dagelijks leven. Daarbij spreken ze vaak hun moedertaal. Zo leren ze geen Nederlands spreken. Nederlanders hebben op hun beurt nauwelijks contact met migranten. Zo leert u elkaar natuurlijk nooit kennen!

Gilde SamenSpraak Leiden e.o. wil daarom anderstaligen en Nederlanders gelegenheid bieden elkaar te ontmoeten om Nederlands te spreken en de cultuur van elkaar te leren kennen. Taalmaatjes spreken een keer per week af om minimaal één uur op ongedwongen wijze Nederlands te spreken en elkaar iets te vertellen over de cultuur in hun vaderland.
Een anderstalige die bij ons hulp zoekt moet al een beetje Nederlands kunnen spreken en wil zijn woordenschat uitbreiden en spreekvaardigheid verbeteren. De vrijwilliger (taalcoach) helpt daarbij, maar is geen docent.

Our institution is committed to fostering a global community where language learners can thrive, engage, and immerse themselves in diverse cultures.

Spanish

Japanese

Russian

And many more!

Tailored Learning Experience
Understanding that each student has unique needs and goals, we provide tailored courses that are customized to fit individual learning styles and objectives. Whether you're preparing for a trip abroad, looking to enhance your professional skills, or simply exploring a new hobby, our flexible and personalized approach ensures that you achieve your language learning goals.

Free Events
Online and In-Person Engagements

Name: THE KIDS CLUB BELO HORIZONTE - PAMPULHA
Description:
No Brasil desde 1994, o THE KIDS CLUB é uma rede de origem inglesa, especializada no ensino de inglês para crianças a partir de 18 meses de idade.
Baseada no aprendizado natural, nossa metodologia prioriza a comunicação em inglês desde a primeira aula. Através de jogos, músicas e muita brincadeira, interagimos com o universo infantil, contextualizando o novo idioma, e criando uma aula divertida onde os alunos aprendem sem perceber.
Com aulas 100% em inglês, nossos professores fluentes e treinados estimulam a participação dos alunos, criando um ambiente acolhedor, onde o uso do novo idioma se torna fácil e prazeroso.
 No THE KIDS CLUB, os alunos aprendem a gostar de inglês! E o que aprenderem aqui, levarão para a vida toda.

Name: Gaudenci School
Description:
A Gaudenci School é uma escola de idiomas especializada em preparar profissionais para oportunidades internacionais e desafios do mercado global. Nosso foco é levar sua carreira ao próximo nível por meio do domínio do inglês com propósito: entrevistas de emprego, certificações, networking, apresentações e reuniões com fluência e confiança.
Oferecemos aulas particulares personalizadas, adaptadas às metas e ao ritmo de cada aluno, ministradas por uma equipe de professores experientes e altamente preparados. Nossa metodologia prática e direcionada garante que o aprendizado seja imediato e aplicável a contextos profissionais reais — tanto no trabalho remoto quanto em ambientes presenciais.

Além do ensino do idioma, atuamos como uma ponte entre nossos alunos e seus objetivos globais. Ajudamos na preparação para processos seletivos internacionais, envio de currículos em inglês, simulações de entrevistas e desenvolvimento da comunicação em áreas técnicas e corporativas.
Na Gaudenci School, o idioma é uma ferramenta para transformar trajetórias. Nossos alunos não aprendem apenas a falar inglês: eles aprendem a usar o inglês estrategicamente para crescer profissionalmente.
Se você busca se destacar no mercado global, conquistar oportunidades no exterior e se comunicar com excelência, a Gaudenci School é o seu próximo passo.

Description: A Explore Your English foi fundada para auxiliar aqueles que procuram transformar a sua vida e ver seus sonhos se tornar realidade através do inglês. Se você está buscando explorar as suas habilidades avançadas em inglês e se tornar sua versão mais confiante, ou se busca conseguir a sua certificação Cambridge em um Centro Preparatório de Cambridge com tutoras altamente qualificadas e com mais de 10 anos de experiência, você veio ao lugar certo!

Name: Holistic Academy RD
Description:
Our methodology is experiential; knowledge is acquired through practice.
Involving positive feelings and emotions in the classroom, using motivation as a learning stimulus. 

We use the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR) to level the linguistic competence of our students. Along with our Holistic methodology, the student acquires the knowledge by integrating it into his or her daily life.

Languages we teach:
English - Spanish - French - German

We specialize in creating curriculums / programs based in our students needs. 

Personalized classes, oriented to your personal and professional goals

Name: KNN Idiomas Marília
Description:
Há muito tempo percebemos que o idioma não é só um item para o currículo. Ele é uma ferramenta de conexão e liberdade e é por isso que nossa missão vai muito além da sala de aula.
Queremos inspirar pessoas a viverem experiências inesquecíveis pelo mundo, para que experimentem a diversidade humana em toda sua grandeza, afinal, não há isolamento maior do que viver cercado por pessoas que pensam igual a você.

Name: Social Languages
Description: Discover a new way to learn languages with Social Languages – where we blend the joy of human connection with proven, interactive teaching methods. Break free from ineffective language classes and impersonal apps and join a community where every conversation is a step towards fluency and cultural exploration.

Name: English2Empower
Description:
A English2Empower é uma escola de inglês online para mulheres brasileiras que querem aprender inglês enquanto debatem e expressam suas opiniões sobre assuntos atuais e relevantes para nós e para o mundo. 

Através da nossa metodologia única, baseada em uma abordagem comunicativa e empoderadora, acreditamos que aprendemos uma língua com um objetivo maior: o da comunicação. Muito além de "aulas de conversação", nossas aulas focam em debates e expressão oral sobre tópicos relevantes, motivadores e necessários. Assim, garantimos um aprendizado de inglês vai ser muito mais motivador e significativo! 

Acreditamos na educação pela reflexão, pelo desenvolvimento do pensamento crítico, pela saída da zona de conforto. Portanto, as aulas da English2Empower são um momento de fazermos tudo isso, em inglês. Não evitamos “assuntos polêmicos”: acreditamos que eles são importantes e essenciais para o desenvolvimento argumentativo em uma língua estrangeira. Não toleramos machismo, racismo, LGBTQIA+fobia, ou qualquer tipo de preconceito, inclusive todos esses tópicos são eventualmente trabalhados e discutidos em aula. A English2Empower é um lugar de empatia e acolhimento.

Name: Tawer Academy
Description:
Tawer Academy is an online English language academy providing high-quality, personalized learning experiences for Arabic-speaking learners of all ages.
We offer live online English courses designed to meet individual learning needs, supported by a structured curriculum aligned with the CEFR framework and enhanced through interactive teaching methods and educational technology.
Our programs focus on clarity, consistency, and measurable progress—whether learners study independently or in small group settings. At Tawer Academy, we are committed to helping learners build confidence, develop real-world language skills, and achieve their English goals in a supportive online environment.

We work with qualified educators who share our commitment to structured, learner-centered education and welcome collaboration with teachers who value quality and impact in online learning.

Name: Niemiecki z Magdą
Description:
Nazywam się Magdalena Szelinger Bożek.
Jestem nauczycielką i metodykiem języka niemieckiego od 13 lat.
W 2015 roku zaczęłam szkolić międzynarodowo i online.

W swojej pracy pomagam moim uczniom dojść do biegłości językowej i osiągać zamierzone cele.
Prowadzę zajęcia z języka ogólnego, przygotowuję do egzaminów , a także bazuję na słownictwie specjalistycznym z różnych dziedzin nauki.
Przede wszystkim z branży: medycznej, psychologicznej, opiekuńczej, prawniczej,
informatycznej (w tym programowanie), prawniczej, elektrycznej, czy automotive.

Pracuję głównie z osobami dorosłymi (klientami indywidualnymi) z całego świata, prowadzę kursy grupowe,
współpracuję z zarządami firm, kadrami menadżerskimi, czy przedsiębiorcami.
Organizuję także audyty językowe, konsultacje przygotowujące do rozmów kwalifikacyjnych oraz warsztaty tematyczne.

Name: Menara Language Centre

Menara Language Centre, Based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. we are a certified language Centre with over 10 yrs of experience in teaching English to students from all over the world. Our main goal is to help you advance your career by Improving your English. Our courses

Name: SkillDom
Description:
SkillDom – Elevating Egyptian Careers in Germany

SkillDom is a startup in its early stages, driven by a bold vision to empower Egyptian professionals with seamless access to thriving career opportunities in Germany. Our mission is to simplify the journey for skilled individuals by providing comprehensive support every step of the way – from language training and job matching to visa assistance and relocation guidance.

Although we are a startup in formation, our ambition is clear: to bridge the gap between Egyptian talent and Germany’s dynamic job market. Through partnerships with leading German recruitment agencies, we aim to connect professionals with exclusive job opportunities that align with their skills and aspirations.

What SkillDom Offers:
	•	End-to-End Career Support: We assist with building professional profiles, interview preparation, and job placement.
	•	German Language Training: Flexible, tailored courses to help professionals achieve the proficiency needed to succeed.
	•	Visa and Documentation Assistance: Expert guidance through the entire immigration process.
	•	Recruitment Partnerships: Collaborations with trusted German agencies to provide access to high-quality job openings.

Why SkillDom?
	•	A dedicated team with expertise in the German labor market.
	•	A strong focus on fairness, accessibility, and empowerment.
	•	A vision to become a leading bridge between Egypt and Germany’s workforce.

SkillDom is just beginning its journey, but our goal is to create lasting impact and success stories for Egyptian professionals. Together, we can shape the future of global careers.

Name: In Situ Languages

Name: FrenchlyPro
Description:
Your personal coach for confident French communication.

At FrenchlyPro, we offer personalized French language coaching designed to help learners of all levels speak with clarity, confidence, and cultural awareness.

Whether you're preparing for official language tests like TCF, TEF, DALF, or looking to improve your professional or everyday communication in French, we tailor each session to your goals, pace, and learning style.

Our key services include:

Linguistic coaching for TCF, TEF, DALF, and Canadian immigration tests

French tutoring for grammar, vocabulary, and structure (Beginner to Intermediate)

Advanced conversation classes to boost fluency, cultural understanding, and expression

We believe that language is connection — and with the right guidance, everyone can succeed.

100% online. Flexible. Human. Effective.

Book your free first consultation today and start your journey with FrenchlyPro.

Name: Alejandro Torres - Spanischlehrer für Deutschsprachige
Description:
Sie möchten Spanisch mit einem Muttersprachler lernen, der auf Deutsch unterrichtet?
Ihr VHS-Kurs wurde schon wieder abgesagt?
Fehlt Ihnen die Übung im Sprechen?

Hola! ¿Cómo está usted? (Hallo! wie geht es Ihnen?)

Ich bin Alejandro, Spanischlehrer aus Mexiko  , eingebürgert in Deutschland  und auf der Suche nach neuen Schüler:innen für meine online Spanischkurse.

In der Sprachschule war ich der Lieblingslehrer aller Schüler:innen und seit 2023 unterrichte ich online meine Muttersprache an Deutschsprachige in Einzel- oder Gruppenunterricht.

Außerdem biete ich Onlinekurse, Podcasts und Lernmaterialen an. So können Sie Spanisch lernen, wann und wo Sie wollen.

Unabhängig davon, ob Sie Spanisch für den Beruf, für Ihren nächsten Urlaub, zum Auswandern, oder zur Kommunikation mit Ihrer neuen Familie und Ihren neuen Freunden brauchen, ich helfe Ihnen dabei.

Schauen Sie sich gerne mein Kursangebot an. Bei Fragen können Sie mich jederzeit kontaktieren!
Hasta pronto! (Bis bald!)

Liebe Grüße
Alejandro Torres
Spanischlehrer für Deutschsprachige

Tel: +49 (0) 176 206 72737
E-Mail: info@spanisch-torres.de
Webseite: www.spanisch-torres.de

PS: Schauen Sie sich gerne das Feedback anderer Kunden auf meinem Profil an.

Name: Lingo Amsterdam
Description:
Welcome to Lingo Amsterdam - your gateway to the Dutch language and culture! 

Lingo Amsterdam is an Amsterdam-based language school for learning Dutch. At Lingo Amsterdam, we believe in the power of language to build bridges, create cultural connections, and unlock new opportunities. We are committed to helping newcomers in the Netherlands not only achieve proficiency in the Dutch language, but also to get to know the culture and history. 

We offer:

In-Company Courses: Language lessons that provide your team with essential language skills for a Dutch professional environment.

In-Company Taalcafé: An interactive and informal setting where your employees can practice and expand their language skills while teambuilding with colleagues.

Private Lessons 1-on-1 and Group Classes: Flexible options customized to individual needs, in both private lessons and small group settings.

Crash Courses: Intensive and engaging programs to boost results and build confidence in daily interactions.

We aim to not only help our students master the language, but also get acquainted with the Dutch way of life. We want help them to feel like residents, not guests.

If you're ready to start your language journey and establish a deeper connection with the Netherlands, contact us. Lingo Amsterdam is here to guide you on this exciting path!

#DutchLanguage #CulturalEnrichment #LanguageLearning #LingoAmsterdam

Name: Marilingo
Description:
Welcome to Marilingo! Embrace intercultural understanding by learning Swedish, or English.

Our language lessons are based on the student's individual knowledge of the chosen language. Marilingo follows the Common European Framework of Reference of Languages (CEFR) guidelines to  determine the student's language levels https://www.coe.int/en/web/common-european-framework-reference-languages/table-1-cefr-3.3-common-reference-levels-global-scale

As a First Time Visitor, we offer a 20 minutes long lesson where we discuss your goal with learning and assess your language level. You receive an individual lesson plan and monthly written feedback.

All our lessons are time-based and you can choose from a 30 or 60 minutes lesson.

The lessons take place on  Zoom as the main communication platform and we teach in all time zones.

Name: el hub spain
Description:
Bienvenidos a El Hub Spain! Somos una empresa especializada en la capacitación personalizada de inglés para empresas y directivos. Nuestro enfoque se centra en ofrecer programas adaptados a las necesidades específicas de cada organización, brindando soluciones lingüísticas integrales que potencian el crecimiento profesional y la comunicación efectiva en un entorno globalizado.

 Con un equipo de formadores altamente calificados y metodologías innovadoras, ayudamos a las empresas a alcanzar sus objetivos estratégicos al mejorar las habilidades lingüísticas de sus equipos. Ya sea a través de clases individuales, grupales o seminarios especializados, nos comprometemos a proporcionar un aprendizaje dinámico y orientado a resultados.

 En un mundo empresarial en constante evolución, el dominio del inglés se ha convertido en un activo indispensable. En El Hub Spain, nos complace trabajar juntos con empresas visionarias que buscan fortalecer sus capacidades lingüísticas para aprovechar al máximo las oportunidades globales y enfrentar los desafíos con confianza.

 ¿Estás listo para llevar tu comunicación empresarial al siguiente nivel? Únete a El Hub Spain y descubre cómo podemos impulsar tu éxito en un mundo cada vez más interconectado!

Name: BUSINESS ENGLISH TRAINING MADAGASCAR
Description:
Bienvenue à notre cours d'anglais spécialement conçu pour les entreprises comme la vôtre ! 
Notre programme n'est pas simplement un autre cours de langue ordinaire ; c'est une expérience interactive et engageante conçue pour renforcer les compétences en communication au sein de votre équipe.

Ce qui nous distingue, c'est notre engagement envers la personnalisation. Nous comprenons que chaque entreprise a des besoins et des objectifs uniques, c'est pourquoi nous adaptons notre programme pour répondre directement à ces exigences. Votre équipe apprendra des compétences directement transférables qu'elle pourra appliquer immédiatement dans ses tâches quotidiennes, rendant notre cours efficace et pertinent.

Nos leçons sont dirigées par des enseignants expérimentés et efficaces, experts dans le domaine de l'anglais des affaires. Ils guideront votre équipe à travers des exercices pratiques et des scénarios réels, garantissant ainsi que 
l'apprentissage soit à la fois agréable et pertinent.

En bonus, nous fournissons gratuitement des matériaux audio et des supports pédagogiques pour compléter l'expérience d'apprentissage, permettant à votre équipe de renforcer ses compétences en dehors de la salle de classe.

Laissez-nous vous aider à améliorer la communication au sein de votre entreprise et à propulser votre entreprise vers de nouveaux sommets ! 

Nos références: OIT, MSH, Radisson Blu, Air France, BRED-X, Camusat, Central Test, Galana, GIZ et bien d'autres encore. 

Contactez-nous au 033 07 265 07, bet@businessenglish-training.com

See you soon!!!!

Name: TutorABC Global Talent Platform
Description:
About Us

At TutorABC Global Talent, we are at the forefront of revolutionizing education and live-streaming technology worldwide. As a leader in online language learning, we empower individuals and organizations to achieve their language proficiency goals through cutting-edge technology and personalized learning experiences.

Our innovative platform spans across the globe, offering tailored English and Chinese language programs that cater to diverse industries—from corporate clients in IT, healthcare, and customer service, to educational institutions and beyond. With over two decades of expertise, we combine AI-driven solutions with world-class teaching to deliver unmatched results.

Our Mission: To transform lives through accessible, high-quality education and interactive experiences, fostering global connections and opportunities.

Our Vision: To be the premier destination for top-tier professionals who are passionate about making a global impact through education and innovation.

Why Join Us?

Global Reach: Be part of a dynamic team that serves millions of learners across continents.

Innovation: Leverage our advanced live-streaming technology and AI-powered tools to create impactful learning experiences.

Growth Opportunities: We offer unparalleled opportunities for professional development and career growth in a fast-paced, global environment.

Diversity and Inclusion: We celebrate diversity, valuing the unique perspectives and talents that each team member brings.

Whether you are a sales professional, a seasoned educator, or an aspiring talent eager to make a difference, TutorABC Global Talent is your gateway to a fulfilling and impactful career. Join us in our mission to empower people and transform futures—one learner at a time.

Name: Polyglot Language School and Creative Hub
Description:
Polyglot Language School and Creative Hub is a leading school for foreign languages and creative arts. We provide training in French, German and Spanish languages through our quality courses with specially designed material which help you achieve excellence in the field.
