Specialities - Online Teaching | Qualified Team | Well experienced

Name: English Club FDSPT
Description:
English Club Fdspt was founded in 2018 with the objective to provide Law students of the Faculty of Law and Political Sciences of Tunis El Manar with the opportunity to practice their English in a casual setting. We organize Workshops, English Conversation Hours, Linguistic Picnics, and Outdoor Activities to make the experience easy, comfortable, and enjoyable. 
English Club FDSPT is an open and unexclusive Club. It is open for everyone with an interest to improve their English to join our activities. We don't have members except for the team members who are working behind the scenes. 
Our Club is also charge-free. We are all volunteers.

Name: 香港德國文化協會 – German Cultural Association Hong Kong
Description:
The German Cultural Association Hong Kong (香港德國文化協會) is a dedicated organization that brings the vibrant language and captivating culture of Germany to the Hong Kong community. With strategically located learning centers in Tsim Sha Tsui, Causeway Bay, and Central Hong Kong, we provide immersive experiences that go beyond language acquisition.

The GCA recognizes the value of personalized learning, which is why we prioritize private and small group lessons. We strongly believe that this customized approach is highly effective for mastering the German language. Our comprehensive courses are designed to meet the specific needs and proficiency levels of children, teenagers, and adults.

In addition to our regular courses, we are thrilled to offer exciting summer programs tailored for kids and teens. These programs provide a unique opportunity for young learners to dive into the German language and culture during their school holidays. Our engaging and interactive curriculum ensures that participants not only develop their language skills but also develop a profound appreciation for Germany's rich heritage and traditions.

Our summer courses, led by a team of highly skilled and native qualified teachers, blend fun activities, cultural exploration, and language learning to create an unforgettable educational experience. From interactive language games to cultural workshops and projects, children and teenagers thrive in a dynamic and stimulating environment that nurtures their linguistic and cultural growth.

Name: EUM Soluções Linguísticas
Description: Nascemos para fazer o que é certo antes do que é fácil na área de consultoria e assessoria linguística, a fim de atender às necessidades dos nossos alunos precisa e transparentemente, por meio de serviços de excelência de quem trabalha com o que gosta, e proporcionar a eles uma jornada inesquecível conosco.

Name: OpenBook Idiomas

Somos uma escola inovadora! Aqui você poderá juntar os melhores métodos para aprender inglês, que são:

1. Um professor particular até 4x por semana. Atenção total para você e suas dificuldades.

2. Aulas em grupo com professor nativo. Para praticar com pessoas no mesmo caminho de aprendizado, sob a direção de um nativo norte-americano. 

Suas aulas poderão focar em suas metas! Sejam elas trabalho, estudo, imigração, viagem ou qualquer que seja! O seu sucesso é o nosso sucesso. 

Seja bem-vindo à melhor escola do Brasil!

Name: تست هلپر | Test Helper
Description:
تستهلپر، اولین پلتفرم ایرانی برای شبیهسازی آزمونهای بینالمللی زبان است.

آزمونهایی مانند تافل (TOEFL)، آیلتس (IELTS)، جیآرای (GRE) و ...

با بیش از ۷ سال سابقه، ما بستری آنلاین و تعاملی فراهم کردهایم تا داوطلبان بتوانند بارها و بارها در محیطی شبیهسازیشده و بدون پرداخت هزینههای سنگین، خود را برای آزمون اصلی آماده کنند.

Name: British School International House Taranto
Description: British School Taranto  l’inglese Garantito dal 1975 La British School di Taranto fa parte del gruppo AIBSE (Associazione Internazionale British Schools of English) Ente Culturale che raggruppa oltre 70 sedi in Italia. Come tutte le altre sedi del gruppo è Autorizzata al funzionamento dal MIUR (Ministero dell’Istruzione, dell’Università e della Ricerca). I locali sono in regola con le norme igienico sanitarie. La British School di Taranto è sede certificata VISION 2000 a norme UNI EN ISO 9001 (Certificato n.3925/4 rilasciato da ICIM ente accreditato SINCERT) Le sedi del gruppo “British Schools of English” sono distribuite su tutto il territorio italiano e sono collegate in rete per garantire la continuità del corso in una sede differente da quella in cui viene attivato in caso di necessità di trasferimento temporaneo o definitivo dello studente. In tal caso la sede di origine si impegnerà a trasferire lo studente senza aggravio di spesa. (elenco ufficiale consultabile sul sito www.britishschool.com).

Name: Interlex Language Studio
Description:
Interlex Language Studio, established in 2016, is a privately owned language school located in Bucharest, Romania. Specializing in delivering premium educational services, the institution offers courses in English and  French, and provides exam preparation for English (Cambridge Exams) and French (DELF/DALF). 
Our exceptional track record boasts a 100% pass rate among candidates, showcasing remarkable achievements. Classes are structured with a maximum of four students, highlighting the advantages of small group sizes to facilitate enhanced learning outcomes, accelerated progress, and superior results.
Activating in a modern and technology-driven learning environment, our educators offer personalized feedback, closely monitoring students' advancements to tailor instruction effectively, fostering a conducive learning atmosphere that promotes significant progress.
Embedded within a close-knit community, students attending ILS courses benefit from highly skilled instructors who adeptly cater to individual requirements.

Name: European Language School
Description:
Da 46 anni la nostra missione è la divulgazione delle Lingue straniere sia attraverso qualificati docenti sia con la didattica più idonea al raggiungimento degli obiettivi concordati con l’allievo. La Scuola offre le tradizionali lezioni in presenza (in sede) individuali/semindividuali e collettive a bambini, ragazzi e adulti. I Corsi collettivi sono stati organizzati con un numero inferiore di allievi rispetto al passato nel rispetto delle norme anti-Covid.

Oltre alle suddette lezioni in presenza abbiamo guardato con più attenzione all’e-learning (apprendimento online): oggi siamo in grado di offrire alla nostra utenza lezioni online sia individuali e semindividuali che collettive.

Oltre alle suddette lezioni online, La Scuola ha provveduto anche all’igienizzazione degli ambienti e ai divisori in plexiglass tra allievi e insegnanti.

Nella nostra Scuola la partecipazione dei docenti sarà sempre garantita: ovviamente sia nelle lezioni in presenza (in sede) ma anche in tutte le lezioni online senza mai lasciare soli gli allievi davanti ad un pc, come purtroppo accade in altri contesti didattici. Per noi le Lingue si apprendono interagendo con gli altri. Inoltre la scelta del docente non avverrà attraverso una foto da piattaforma remota ma, anche per i Corsi online, personalmente con un incontro preliminare con l’insegnante (in sede oppure online a scelta dell’allievo) prima di iniziare le lezioni e, per le lezioni online, con incontri periodici durante il percorso didattico per fare costantemente il punto.

La Scuola è in grado di offrire l’insegnamento delle Lingue più parlate al mondo: Inglese, Francese, Tedesco, Spagnolo, Russo, Cinese, Giapponese, Arabo, ecc.

Per le Certificazioni Internazionali, grazie alla pluriennale esperienza dei nostri Docenti, siamo in grado di offrire preparazione per le Certificazioni di ogni Lingua. Per il PEARSON inglese) siamo anche sede d’esame.

Name: Dubkii India Culture Center
Description:
Dubkii Language & Culture Center is dedicated to bringing the vibrant languages and rich cultural heritage of India to life for learners from around the world. Located in the heart of Goa, our center offers immersive courses in Hindi and English, paired with authentic cultural experiences that provide a deeper understanding of India’s traditions, history, and local lifestyle.

Our programs go beyond conventional learning, integrating language classes with hands-on activities such as traditional arts, cooking, local excursions, and community events. At Dubkii, participants don’t just learn Hindi and English—they engage fully with India’s diverse culture, building meaningful connections and unforgettable memories.

Whether you’re a beginner exploring Hindi or English for the first time or looking to advance your skills, Dubkii offers a supportive and inspiring environment to help you reach your language goals and discover the essence of India. Join us for a truly unique language and cultural journey!

Name: Pass mal auf! Szkoła języka niemieckiego
Description:
Pass mal auf! Butikowa szkoła języka niemieckiego powstała z myślą o nauczaniu profesjonalistów.
W odróżnieniu od wielu szkół językowych koncentrujemy się wyłącznie na kilku branżach – IT, sprzedaży, HR oraz finansach. Stawiamy na nowoczesne narzędzia, tworząc tym samym środowisko do nauki języka online.
Dzięki doświadczeniom w codziennych kontaktach z niemieckojęzycznymi klientami korporacyjnymi nasze lekcje ukierunkowane są na biznes oraz praktyczne wykorzystanie języka.
Niestraszna nam pomoc w bieżących zadaniach naszych kursantów, takich jak np. prezentacje, raporty czy tłumaczenie tekstów i materiałów na język niemiecki.

Name: Tanta Royal International Schools

Grouplex English language school - an innovative online service for teaching English in Poland. Lessons are conducted online, live, by native speakers from all over the world.
In addition to General English courses, we conduct many specialist courses at various levels of advancement: Business English, English for HR, or English for Sales and Purchasing.
With us you will see that learning a language is great fun! You will get rid of the language barrier, become more fluent and feel more confident and meet interesting people with common interests.

Welcome to Lingo Mundo Academy!

1 Diverse Language Offerings: With programs available in over 13 languages, including Spanish, French, Mandarin, Arabic, and more, there's something for everyone!

Name: Clil Catalonia
Description:
Established in 2000, our language school has been dedicated to providing high-quality English language instruction to students of all ages. We specialize in helping children, teenagers, and adults achieve their language goals, whether it be for personal or professional advancement.

Our focus is mainly on FCE, APTIS, IELTS, CAE, PCE and Business English as we understand the importance of these certifications for our students. We understand that each student has unique needs and learning styles, and our experienced teachers are dedicated to providing personalized instruction that caters to each individual.

We strive to create a supportive and inclusive learning environment that encourages our students to be confident, self-motivated and effective communicators. We are committed to helping our students achieve their goals and reach their full potential.

Join our community of dedicated learners and let us help you achieve your language goals today!

Name: English Now
Description:
At English Now, we blend the age-old art of teaching with state-of-the-art technology, delivering an immersive and tailored English learning experience. Our dedicated faculty, all certified by the University of Cambridge, bring with them a wealth of knowledge and an innate understanding of the unique needs of every student.

Our course framework is underpinned by cutting-edge technology and software, ensuring that our students not only learn English but experience it. With a steadfast commitment to excellence, we pride ourselves on offering a first-class teaching quality service that's both modern and effective.

Name: IST - International School of Tucson
Description:
A good education is the best legacy you can leave your child and IST understands that with the world as a global village, education should enhance a child’s ability to excel anywhere in the world. With this in mind, we strive to educate young people to become leaders who will be at the forefront of the rapid economic and social development sweeping through the world.
The demands of living and working in a global economic community necessitates adaptable and flexible young people with the skill-set, knowledge and character to contribute and shape the future and meet the many challenges that lie ahead.
At an early age the learning of a second language develops the brain faster than without, a stress free loving and happy environment means each child has the room to grow as an individual and play whilst they learn. Our Cambridge curriculum then develops the child thinking and inquiry skills whilst continued language learning develops bilingual students confident in their abilities to perform.
We believe that as a child grows their exposure to differing cultures, ideas, language and a world class curriculum means our students are more prepared, better provisioned and ready to face the global village.
IST is the only school in Arizona to use immersive language learning and the Cambridge curriculum for all grades and know we are at the forefront of pedagogical development.
We believe we are the ONLY school in the United States to deliver such a language immersion program combined with a Cambridge curricular from Grade 1 through 8 and our students consistently rank as very good or excellent in Cambridge assessments. 
We offer four immersive languages from age 3 supported by the Cambridge curriculum AND enhanced by the character development curriculum program ‘Teaching Future Leaders’ developed in the UK.
A truly unique school founded in excellent pedagogy, global teaching excellence and above all the enjoyment of learning in a safe and happy environment.

Name: The English Dinosaur
Description:
En The English Dinosaur, creemos que aprender inglés debería ser tan emocionante como explorar un mundo lleno de dinosaurios.  Por eso, hemos creado una academia donde cada clase es una aventura única, llena de diversión y descubrimiento.  Nuestra metodología, basada en la neuroeducación, utiliza juegos y actividades dinámicas que se adaptan a los intereses y necesidades de cada niño/a. Aquí, el aprendizaje es un viaje personalizado, donde respetamos el ritmo de cada pequeño/a explorador/a y celebramos sus logros a cada paso. 

¿Qué nos diferencia? Hablamos siempre en inglés, creando un entorno inmersivo que permite a los niños/as sumergirse por completo en el idioma mientras se divierten.  Con grupos pequeños de 6-8 alumnos/as, garantizamos una atención individualizada y un aprendizaje efectivo. Desde los más pequeños hasta los preadolescentes, en The English Dinosaur transformamos el lenguaje en una experiencia emocionante y llena de significado. 

Ya sea rugiendo en la selva del vocabulario  o cavando en los fósiles de la gramática , tu hijo/a aprenderá inglés como nunca antes! Únete a nosotros y descubre cómo hacer del aprendizaje una aventura diaria, donde cada palabra es un nuevo descubrimiento y cada clase es un paso hacia el dominio del inglés.

Name: Four Bridges English School
Description:
A Four Bridges busca atender quem quer fugir dos padrões tradicionais das escolas de idiomas. Temos como objetivo desindustrializar o ensino de idiomas e torna-lo mais humanizado aos nosso alunos. 

1) Turmas reduzidas
2) Aulas PERSONALIZADAS de acordo com o interesse de cada grupo.
3) Lições focadas em TEMAS.
4) Aplicação do "EXPERIENCE ENGLISH".

VEM VIVER O INGLÊS!

Name: Migr8.co.in
Description: Migr8.co.in is one of the flourishing language school and a study abroad & immigration consultancies in New Delhi, India, that strives to assist students and professionals in fulfilling their dreams of studying in premium International Universities and settling in a country of their choice. We truly believe that knowledge is the greatest power. From analyzing your profile and the right country / university selections, to training you to meet various test requirements like IELTS, German/French Language, GMAT, GRE, SAT to perfect visa documentation and processing, we help you migrate to the best possible country / university.

Name: Learn German Like Natives
Description: While in Germany, I had an amazing time learning the language, navigating through tricky grammar, and fully immersing myself in the culture (yes, I totally did the whole Oktoberfest thing). If you’re excited to dive into German and share some laughs over my culture-shock tales, let’s jump right in!

I don’t just teach English — I help leaders build English language awareness, the missing link between fluency, self-knowledge, and certainty. 

Without awareness, ideas get lost in translation. With it, you stop patching sentences together and start communicating with clarity and authority. 

That shift transforms how others see you. 

The result? 

Empowerment in critical conversations, recognition for your true ideas, and control over how your message lands. Awareness is the lever that flips leadership into English fluency.

Name: London English Academy
Description: Somos un centro de Capacitación y Preparación del Idioma Inglés en Exámenes Cambridge, contamos con excelente beneficios, garantías y prestaciones. Contamos con el reconocimiento en más de 169 países a nivel mundial a través de las certificaciones Cambridge, garantizamos 100% de efectividad en el aprendizaje del idioma inglés. Tenemos el reconocimiento nacional de (Ministerio de Educación y Ministerio del Trabajo) y de manera internacional con universidades del exterior, nuestros certificados son válidos en cualquier parte del mundo, se puede homologar los niveles de inglés con este certificado en cualquier entidad educativa (escuelas, colegios, institutos y universidades) ya que no tiene fecha de caducidad debido al reconocimiento que tienen estos certificados a nivel nacional e internacional, a comparación de las evaluaciones del TOELF e IELTS que tienen una vigencia de tan solo 2 años.

Name: Native English College
Description: Native English College (CRICOS: 04164C) is an English Language training center based in Adelaide, Australia. As a teacher-owned and operated school, our focus is on quality for students. We help students improve their grammar, vocabulary and pronunciation with the goal of attaining the highest level of proficiency possible.

Name: Escuela de Chino Bailaoshi 白老师
Description:
Bai Laoshi es una escuela de chino que no solamente ofrece cursos sobre la lengua china de forma dinámica, divertida y sin utilizar libros, sino cursos sobre cine, música y cultura. A cargo de profesorxs profesionales y canallas. 

La Escuela Bai Laoshi surgió para cubrir las necesidades de estudiantes que quieren aprender chino de manera dinámica, aprendiendo a hablar desde el primer día y con materiales realizados por nuestro propio equipo. La enseñanza que se transmite es para enfrentarnos a la realidad de la vida en China. 



Además, ofrecemos cursos sobre música china, cine chino, traducción y una variedad de cursos donde el principal objetivo es aprender y pasarlo bien. Basta de asociar estudiar chino con algo pesado y aburrido!

Nuestro objetivo es transmitir el conocimiento sobre el idioma chino y la cultura china del mismo modo en que nosotrxs lo vemos. 



Estamos creando comunidad para crear sinergias entre nuestro alumnado y así tener apoyo mutuo y compartir conocimientos entre nosotrxs.

Name: YES Japanese Academy
Description:
Teaching People of All Ages, All Discipline Japanese Language for Academia, Career, Business Travel, & Fun.

Friendly approach to learn the language, we welcome all ages any discipline are welcomed here to explore the Japanese Language and see how this could help in Academia or making a professional career, Jumpstarting the mid career progression or win over the customer.

Language is fascinating and it is not only to make a career but is also for Travel & Fun.

Name: ABC Nederlands
Description:
ABC Nederlands is een ervaren taalschool met een unieke en moderne aanpak voor het leren van de Nederlandse taal. De focus bij ABC Nederlands ligt op Nederlandse taallessen voor migranten uit Oost-Europa. 

In de afgelopen jaren hebben wij vele bedrijven mogen helpen met het scholen van in totaal meer dan 1000 werknemers. 

Heeft u last van taalbarrières en/of misverstanden op de werkvloer? Of wilt u gewoonweg uw medewerkers meer doorgroeimogelijkheden aanbieden? Stuur ons dan gerust een berichtje! Wij antwoorden altijd binnen 24 uur.

Name: Languageium
Description:
Languageium provides you with the holistic tools necessary for a successful mastery of the languages. The focus is not just on the language learning aspect, but on making it an experience to cherish. The classes make learning a new language fun : with role play activities, music, videos, and lots of interaction.

Preparation for international exams such as DELF, IELTS etc.undertaken

The basic premise that was kept in mind while creating  Languageium was that learning a language should not just be an exercise in acquiring the linguistic know-how but it should be about discovering and appreciating a new culture, it should be about learning to look at life differently.

Name: Learning with Ervin
Description: We offer detailed 1 to 1 and group coaching with a focus on efficient and strategic ways to pass PD3 and PD2 Danish exams, as well as Medical Danish written and oral exams for non EU doctors!

Name: Let's Talk Spanish
Description:
I create unforgettable Spanish immersion trips for adult Spanish learners, so they can experience the amazingness of the Spanish-speaking world and take their Spanish to the next level.

Hi, I'm Shandon - after 15 years learning Spanish and visiting 5 Spanish speaking countries, as well as 6 years teaching Spanish, I now organise these trips for learners who want to have unforgettable experiences and finally speak Spanish with confidence.

By guiding learners to Spanish-speaking countries and providing incredible opportunities to immerse themselves in the language and culture as part of a supportive group, I provide life-changing Spanish learning opportunities.

Learning Spanish and interested in coming on my next trip? I’d love to hear from you.

Name: LINGUA FRANCA Language Academy, Indore
Description:
Lingua Franca is an Indore based language training academy. We provide quality education at a very affordable cost. We offer language courses in Spoken English, French, German, Spanish, Japanese, Arabic, Korean etc.

Description:
Speak Well School – це сучасний креативний простір для вивчення англійської мови онлайн та офлайн. 
З 2010 року  у нас вдосконалили англійську більше 20 тисяч студентів. Це діти та дорослі, студенти та досвідчені професіонали; ті, хто обирає англійську для навчання за кордоном, кар’єрного розвитку, міжнародних проектів, подорожей та просто «для себе».
Ми викладаємо загальну англійську та англійську для бізнесу, готуємо до IELTS, НМТ, ЄВІ, пропонуємо різноманіття курсів стандартного та інтенсивного формату, індивідуально та в групах, а вихідні проводимо на розмовних клубах з носіями мови з Британії, США, Канади та Австралії. Нашу англійську дарують друзям та рідним у вигляді сертифікатів, рекомендують колегам за чашкою кави і записують у вішліст на наступний рік. 
У нас затишні та добре обладнані офіси для тих, хто навчається офлайн, та доступ до якісної онлайн-платформи та інших digital-інструментів для онлайн-курсів.

Name: Yazidi@School
Description:
The Yazidi@School offers free online English courses for Yazidis. Yazidi@School is addressing the educational gap created by the 2014 genocide and its aftermath. The NGO is entirely realized by volunteers and aims to enlarge the accessibility to English education to more Yazidi and engage more international volunteers. 

In 2023 the NGO was founded by Margaret Rijkelijkhuizen, a Dutch-American English teacher who had lived in the Yazidi community in the IDP camps in the same year after learning about the Yazidis through the documentary "Daughters of the Sun" by Dutch-Kurdish filmmaker Reber Dosky. 

The students for Yazidi@School work with smartphones. The NGO also ensures that students who cannot afford a smartphone will receive an old smartphone from the Netherlands so that this will not be a barrier to their course. 

Volunteer teachers offer classes 1-3 times per week. Additionally, we offer weekly teacher meetings online to exchange experiences and materials to improve together. The courses cover 3 x 10 weeks per year. Once the students can be tested online for a recognized level (A1 – C2), they will receive an official certificate for which the foundation will pay.

So far, the Yazidi@School Foundation has been running entirely on funds received through GoFundMe. Currently, donations are used to cover costs mainly to send donated electronics to the camps to enable students to participate in the classes.

Do you want to volunteer for us as an English teacher, fundraiser, social media manager or do you want to contribute in other ways? Please reach out to us!

Name: P. City English
Description:
P. City English provides Business English tutoring via teacher Benjamin Pfeifer, a USA-native who studied business and got an MBA from an American university and has over 5 years of Business English tutoring experience.

Why are you taking classes, and what are your language goals?

That will always be my first question to you.

Based on your response, I will customize a class for you, utilizing my proprietary materials as well as relevant online resources to train you to speak with confidence in a business setting.

You may also simply just want to improve, in which case we can do a range of activities to make you more confident in the language.

Either way, I will focus on correcting your mistakes, increasing your vocabulary, improving your accent, turning bad habits into good ones, and generally making you more fluent in English.

Book a free demo with me today by contacting me via my website, by DM, or by emailing ben@pcityenglish.com

Had u vroeger op school moeite met het leren van een taal ? Wees gerust,! wij ontwikkelen de cursus naar uw studieniveau en leertempo.

-          (andere talen zijn beschikbaar op aanvraag)

Bent u er klaar vor om uw tweede taal echt te bemachtigen? Stuur ons een bericht of maak telefonisch kennis met ons. 

info@leereentaal.nl
Tel: 72 540 55 43

Since 1986, Taalinstituut De Wester has served companies large and small in North Holland with their language needs. We connect learners with qualified and experienced teachers for one-on-one language training. Lessons are tailored to the needs and goals of the student(s).

Did you have trouble learning a language during school? No problem! We develop the course to your level and learning ability.

By training with us, you will be able to speak your second language with confidence in the workplace and daily life. Writing an email or picking up the phone will no longer cause stress. You will be able to successfully do business with foreign clients.

We are currently accepting new students for the following languages:
-  English

Name: cultissime.mx
Description:
Je m'appelle Thibaut, je suis publicitaire de formation, amoureux des langues et français. En 2017, je décide de quitter Paris, traverser l'Atlantique et m'installer au Mexique. Mon objectif n'est pas défini, mais je veux apprendre l'espagnol.

Quelques années plus tard, non seulement je parle l'espagnol plutôt correctement, mais en plus, j'ai enseigné le français à plus de 1000+ élèves, principalement "hispano hablantes", mais aussi à des américains, des anglais, des portugais, des brésiliens, des coréens, des nouveaux-zélandais, des australiens, des japonais, des chinois... J'ai eu la chance de partager ma langue et ma culture à des centaines d'apprenants qui m'ont au moins autant enseigné à moi. 

En 2021, j'ai l'idée de développer de nouveaux cours de français : moins centrés sur la langue, moins de grammaire, moins de conjugaison et beaucoup, beaucoup de culture. Sans trop savoir dans quoi je me lançais, j'imagine et designe mon premier cours de culture française en français : le cinéma français, de Méliès à Ladj Ly. Le succès est au rendez-vous, et des dizaines d'étudiants m'écoutent parler de cinéma français et en français. On débat, on échange, on regarde des films et ça marche ! Mes étudiants améliorent leur français et leur culture générale francophone.

Aujourd'hui, cultissime c'est 12 cours de culture française en français (de la littérature contemporaine, de la gastronomie, de la musique, des mouvements sociaux...), des cours intensifs pour apprendre ou améliorer son français, des conférences pour mieux comprendre le système français et un cours dont je suis particulièrement fier : Paris anti-touristique, culture, gastronomie, histoire et architecture selon un parisien.

Name: Bosnian 2GO
Description: Bosnian 2GO is a leading school of Bosnian/Croatian/Serbian as a foreign language, well known among diplomats, other expats living in BiH and all those who wish to learn Bosnian for any reason. We see it as our mission to improve the expats’ quality of life in BiH and to make their stay in our country an enjoyable and memorable experience. Name: Straight from Spain Academy
Description:
Straight from Spain Academy is a premier online educational institution dedicated to providing authentic and immersive Spanish language and cultural education. Founded by Maria Vargas, a native Spanish speaker with extensive teaching experience, our mission is to deeply connect students with the rich culture and language of Spanish-speaking countries.

At the heart of our approach is true Spanish immersion, delivering a "straight from Spain" experience. We emphasize authentic language use and a deep understanding of Spanish culture, all facilitated by our team of expert, professional, and native Spanish-speaking tutors. Our tutors are highly qualified and passionate, specializing in delivering individualized and effective instruction.
We offer comprehensive Spanish tutoring for all ages and levels, from young children (under 5) to adults (over 65), and from complete beginners to advanced learners. Our flexible online intensive and semi-intensive group courses feature small class sizes (maximum 4 students per group) to ensure personalized attention. We also provide individualized private lessons, catering to diverse schedules and learning preferences.
Our curriculum focuses on developing all language skills, aiming for conversational proficiency, full professional fluency, and even native/bilingual fluency. Beyond just language, we integrate cultural connection, helping students learn about the vibrant way of life in Spanish-speaking countries and promoting crucial cross-cultural understanding.

We're incredibly proud to have consistently achieved 5-star reviews, reflecting the high student satisfaction with our teaching methodology, tutor quality, and the transformative learning experience we provide.
Straight from Spain Academy is the ideal choice for anyone serious about mastering Spanish in an authentic, effective, and deeply engaging way, directly from its source.

Name: The Studio Rooms
Description:
The Studio Rooms non è solo una scuola di lingue.
Nasce come la naturale progressione della professionalità del suo fondatore che, dopo aver cominciato a lavorare presso un istituto della città in cui vive, ha deciso di mettersi in proprio. Come tutti i giovani e inesperti insegnanti, pensava che insegnare significasse saper dire agli altri cosa fare, un po’ come a scuola. In realtà si rese col tempo conto che non era così e che veri utenti in realtà sono genitori che hanno a cuore i propri figli, viaggiatori con la voglia di comunicare, adolescenti con la voglia di esplorare qualcosa al di fuori di ciò che lo schermo di un computer può dargli. Da allora The Studio Rooms è diventata una vera e propria casa per amici, famiglie, giovani e più adulti. 
Con l’Inglese il punto non è tanto quanto sia difficile, perché non lo è affatto, ma come lo si indossa, come ci calza.
Lavorare con le persone è una grande fortuna, ti dà la possibilità di apprezzare ciò che ci rende unici e di capire che non esiste un metodo per tutti ma solo un’attitudine al porre ed un atteggiamento al prendere, quando questi due si incontrano, il progresso accade.

Description:
Le Petit Kids İngilizce Akademi olarak, çocukların erken yaşta dil öğrenme süreçlerini keyifli ve etkili hale getiren bir eğitim yaklaşımı sunuyoruz. 12 aylık gruplardan başlayarak çocuklar için özel olarak tasarlanmış programlarımızda, Montessori yöntemiyle İngilizce eğitimi bir araya getiriyoruz.

Küçük gruplar halinde yapılan derslerimizde, çocuklar eğlenerek öğrenirken, dil becerilerini doğal bir şekilde geliştirirler. Etkinliklerimiz, doğa ve sanat temalı çalışmalardan duygusal ve motor becerileri destekleyen oyunlara kadar geniş bir yelpazeye yayılır. Bu sayede çocuklar, özgüvenlerini artırırken İngilizceyi de günlük hayatlarının bir parçası haline getirirler.

Ayrıca, sağlıklı alışkanlıklar kazandırmaya önem veriyoruz. Diş fırçalama alışkanlığını eğlenceli hale getiren Diş Canavarı karakterimiz gibi yaratıcı projelerle çocukların kişisel bakım ve sağlık bilincini destekliyoruz.

Le Petit Kids İngilizce Akademi’de her çocuk, bireysel farklılıkları gözetilerek desteklenir ve öğrenmenin mutluluk verici bir deneyim olduğu bir ortamda büyür. Geleceğin özgüvenli, yaratıcı ve çok dilli bireylerini yetiştirmek için buradayız!

Name: Pro Coach English
Description:
Soy Richard, I specialise in helping leaders to communicate in English with the same authority and confidence as they do in Spanish, which I have been doing for over a decade. 

My background as a Learning & Development professional, as well as my TEFL qualification and hands on experience with learning Spanish later in life, I understand the difficulties of communicating effectively in your target language.   

My coaching will help you break through your mental barriers by combining proven language learning techniques with psychological insights into how the human brain works.

Having spent my career training large audiences, public speaking, and performing stand-up comedy, I understand the art of commanding attention and delivering presentations with confidence. My personalised approach focuses on refining both language and mindset, empowering you to speak English with the same ease and authority you have in Spanish.

Es un placer conocerte!

Name: Abc Idiomas
Description:
At ABC Idiomas, we help individuals and companies communicate with confidence in other languages.

Our academy in Mallorca offers personalized courses in multiple languages taught by experienced native teachers. We work with small groups, private lessons, and corporate programs tailored to each need, including FUNDAE-subsidized training.

We believe learning a language is not about memorizing—it’s about living it: practicing, using, and enjoying it from the very first class. That’s why our goal is for every student, whether a child, adult, or professional, to experience the language as a key that opens new opportunities.

Name: Achieve Japan
Description:
Welcome to Achieve Japan!

 Your Gateway to Mastering Japanese

Achieve Japan specializes in language education and professional training, preparing students, professionals, experts, and engineers for global opportunities. Located in Bangladesh with several branches nationwide, we use innovative methods to offer both online and offline courses.

 Japanese Language Mastery

We offer comprehensive Japanese language courses from beginner to advanced levels (N5 to N2) under the JLPT (Japanese-Language Proficiency Test) framework. Our curriculum is designed to cater to the needs of the Specified Skilled Worker (SSW) program, ensuring candidates are well-prepared for career opportunities in Japan.

 IELTS & TOEFL Preparation

In addition to Japanese, we provide high-quality training in English, focusing on IELTS and TOEFL preparation. These courses are designed to enhance your English language skills, ensuring you excel in academic and professional settings internationally.

 International Student & Professional Placement

As an international student placement service center, Achieve Japan possesses a vast network in Japan and across Western countries, facilitating seamless transitions for students and professionals seeking opportunities abroad.

Join us at Achieve Japan to bridge language barriers and unlock new opportunities in education and employment. Discover how our courses can propel your career forward and help you achieve your global aspirations.

Name: סבתא בישלה שפה
Description:
מיזם המחבר בין מבוגרים דוברי שפה שנייה לבין אנשים המעוניינים לשפר שפה נוספת, דרך שיחות משמעותיות שמחזקות ביטחון בשפה, מפחיתות בדידות ויוצרות נתינה הדדית.
המיזם נולד מתוך חוויה אישית והחל כמפגש אנושי פשוט, וכיום מתפתח ופועל במתכונת של פלטפורמה המאפשרת התאמה בין דוברים מבוגרים ללומדים, במודל שבו שני הצדדים מרוויחים: המבוגרים זוכים בקשר אנושי, תחושת משמעות ושייכות, והלומדים נהנים מתרגול שפה אותנטי וחווייתי.
הרעיון נולד מתוך סיפור אישי. סבתי, נדי שוורץ ז״ל, הייתה דוברת ספרדית, ובשנותיה האחרונות חוותה לעיתים בדידות. פעמיים בשבוע הגיעה אליה צעירה בשם עומר, שביקשה לשפר את הספרדית לפני טיול ארוך בדרום אמריקה. עם הזמן נוצר ביניהן קשר משמעותי: עומר שיפרה את השפה, ונדי זכתה לחברה ולתחושת משמעות בכך שגם בגיל מבוגר יכלה לתרום ולהשפיע

Name: THE PLACE DEBY
Description:
At The Place Deby, we offer a dynamic and welcoming environment where you can learn any language while connecting with people from all over the world.
With a special focus on French, in partnership with the ALLIANCE FRANÇAISE GRENOBLE ALPES, we help you not only speak the language fluently but also understand French culture, traditions, and the real challenges of being a newcomer. Whether you're settling in, traveling, or simply passionate about languages, our expert teachers and interactive learning approach make the journey enjoyable and effective. 
We also offer language examinations, all of which are officially recognised. 
Join us and open the door to endless opportunities.

The Place Deby, c’est un lieu dédié à l’apprentissage des langues avec une attention particulière portée à la langue et à la culture françaises en partenariat avec l'ALLIANCE FRANÇAISE GRENOBLE ALPES. Nous accompagnons les nouveaux arrivants en Isère et les aidons à relever les défis culturels, linguistiques et professionnels liés à l’expatriation.
Nous jouons aussi un rôle clé à Grenoble dans la reconnaissance des compétences linguistiques, essentielles pour les démarches administratives, académiques ou professionnelles et proposons des certifications et examens pour différentes langues, tous officiellement reconnus.

Name: Languitude Academy
Description:
At Languitude Academy, we are dedicated to providing the best possible language education to our clients. We understand that the key to success in language learning is a combination of quality training and proper management. That's why we place a strong emphasis on both training and recruiting the best teachers, as well as providing proper management and job placement for our staff.

Our training program is designed to ensure that our teachers are equipped with the knowledge and skills necessary to provide the highest level of language instruction. We understand that teaching languages is a highly specialized field, and we take the time to ensure that our teachers are fully prepared to provide the best possible education to our students.

We are also committed to recruiting the best teachers in the industry. Our team of teachers are highly qualified, experienced and native speakers. They have a passion for teaching languages and helping students reach their goals.

Proper management and job placement are also important to us at Languitude Academy. We understand that our teachers are the backbone of our organization, and we strive to provide them with the support and resources they need to be successful. This includes regular professional development opportunities, as well as job placement assistance to help our teachers find the perfect position for their skills and experience.

In brevity, at Languitude Academy we are dedicated to providing the best possible language education to our clients and the best possible support to our teachers. We believe that by providing quality training, recruiting the best teachers, and providing proper management and job placement, we can help our students achieve fluency and proficiency in their chosen language. Thank you for considering Languitude Academy for your language education needs.

Name: Daylight Online English
Description:
¿Piensas que aprender un idioma es aprender mil reglas? ¿Sonríes y asientes en las reuniones en inglés? Para ti y para todos los que alguna vez pensaron que el inglés era difícil nace Daylight. Clases online de inglés, para que aprendas desde donde quieras. 100% adaptadas a tus circunstancias y a tu forma de aprender y ser, porque aprender nunca debería ser un esfuerzo.

En Daylight usamos un aprendizaje inductivo y basado en proyectos. ¿Qué quiere decir esto? Que aprenderás sin darte cuenta y que todo lo que aprendas lo usarás de verdad.

¿Quieres saber qué clases puedes elegir?
En grupo: Clases dinámicas y divertidas usando una metodología de aprendizaje inductivo: se acabaron las listas interminables de normas gramaticales. En tu clase habrá un máximo de 5 personas y te prepararás para los exámenes de Cambridge, IELTS, TOEFL... ¿Sabías que hasta ahora el 100% de los alumnos han aprobado?
Individuales: ¿Quieres una clase 100% personalizada? Entonces esta es para ti. Podemos practicar todas las destrezas o focalizarnos en la que tú quieras. ¿Te cuento un secreto? Las clases no solo están adaptadas a tu forma de aprender, sino también a tus gustos y aficiones. El aula será un lugar en el que puedas sentirte cómodo y hablar de lo que más te guste :)
Business english: ¿Sigues poniendo "Best regards" en cada email? Ya es hora de ponerse las pilas con el inglés, ¿no crees? Con este curso ya no hay excusas: no solo está adaptado a los horarios de oficina, sino que, además, tus compañeros serán de sectores afines al tuyo, por lo que la experiencia será muy enriquecedora. ¿Sabes lo mejor? Se acabaron las listas interminables de verbos irregulares. En clase aprenderás a defenderte en contextos reales (reuniones, emails, negociaciones, ferias comerciales...).

No esperes más y pide más información.
Teléfono: 635 79 65 46
Mail: daylightonlineenglish@gmail.com
Instagram: @daylight_english

Na GR LANGUAGES, ajudamos você a transformar o idioma em uma ponte para oportunidades reais.

 GR LANGUAGES — Language & Culture Coaching for Global-Minded Professionals
Business English & Portuguese | Online Classes | Cross-Cultural Training | Professional Translation

GR LANGUAGES is a language consulting service focused on helping professionals thrive in multicultural environments. With international teaching experience and cultural insight, we provide personalized English and Portuguese training for adults in business, tech, marketing, engineering, and more.

What we offer:
• Tailored Business English & Portuguese lessons
• Interview, meeting, and presentation coaching
• Portuguese for foreigners, including CELPE-Bras exam prep
• Expert translation and bilingual proofreading
• Cross-cultural coaching to work and adapt in Brazil or abroad
• Weekday WhatsApp support to keep you moving forward

At GR LANGUAGES, we turn language into a strategic asset for your career and global connections.

Name: LangAid
Description:
LangAid is an initiative established by a group of international students from Boğaziçi University, which aims to support humanitarian causes by offering affordable and diverse language classes for students. Inspired by the Language4Water clubs existing at other universities around the world, we wish to set up weekly fun language classes in as many languages as we can offer to teach, based on our available experience pool. We are proud to be part of the Erasmus Student Network (ESN) at Boğaziçi University. 

From the outset, LangAid will donate all money raised to NGOs which are committed to supporting people affected by the disastrous earthquakes which hit Syria and Turkey on 6th of February 2023. With this initiative, we are hoping to help students reach their language goals and advance in their lives, to kindle curiosity about other languages, countries, and cultures, and to show solidarity with people going through immensely challenging times.

ESN Bogazici project

Name: 24YD Yabancı Dil Kursları
Description:
2011 yılından bu yana Antalya’da Dil Kursu olarak faaliyet gösteren kurumumuz  2016 yılından itibaren dünyada çığır açmış olan bir eğitim modelini Türkiye’de ilk kez uygulayan dil kursu olarak 24YD Yabancı Dil Kursu markasıyla eğitimlerine devam etmektedir. Merkezi Antalya’da bulunan 24YD Yabancı Dil Kursu İngilizce başta olmak üzere, Almanca, Rusça, Fransızca ve İspanyolca eğitimleriyle öğrencilerinin kendilerini geliştirip kariyerlerini şekillendirmeye yardımcı olmayı amaçlamaktadır.
24YD Yabancı Dil Kursu, uzman eğitmenleri tarafından uygulanan Avrupa Dil Portfolyosu ile birleştirilmiş, dünyada çığır açan ve ilk defa Türkiye’de 24YD Dil Kursu tarafından uygulanan 24YD eğitim modeli ile “Herkes İngilizce Konuşabilir” ideali doğrultusunda teknolojik imkanları geliştirdiği bu modern eğitim modeline entegre etmiş ve dil öğrenimini hem kolay hem de eğlenceli bir hale getirmiştir. Dil eğitimini yalnızca sınıf içinde sınırlamayıp öğrencinin tüm hayatına yayarak kalıcılık sağlamayı misyon edinen kuruluş, eğitim sürecini her türlü teknolojik ve yenilikçi materyaller ile zenginleştirerek, öğrencinin dil öğrenimini karşı olan yargılarını yıkarak öğrencinin motivasyonunu en üst düzeyde tutmaktadır. Öğrenciye sadece hedef dili öğretmek ile kalmayıp, aynı zamanda herhangi bir yabancı dili nasıl öğreneceğini de öğretmektedir.


24YD Dil Okulları her bir öğrencisi ile birebire ilgilenerek, bireysel farklılıkları da göz önünde bulundurarak, öğrencilerinin dil gelişimlerini yakından takip etmekte ve öğrencilerine bireysel eğitim sunmaktadır. Kursiyerlerine sunduğu çeşitli avantajlarıyla kolay ve hızlı bir şekilde yabancı dil öğrenme fırsatı sunan 24YD Yabancı Dil Kursu, dil öğrenme sürecinde büyük bir fark yaratmıştır. 24YD Yabancı Dil Kursu Antalya Şubesi’nde yıllar boyu edindiği tecrübeyi bir üst basamağa taşımış ve bunun memnuniyet garantisi ile tamamlamıştır.

Genel İngilizce eğitimlerinin yanı sıra, sınav hazırlık eğitimleri imkanı da sunan 24YD Dil Kursu’nun sınav hazırlık

Name: English Time Başakşehir
Description:
Bazı insanlar dil öğrenmek için doğal bir yeteneğe sahiptir, ancak diğerleri için yeni bir dil öğrenmek zor bir görev olabilir. Yeni bir dil öğrenmenin en iyi yolu, kendi öğrenme stilinize bağlı olarak değişir. İngilizce eğitimi günümüzde tüm dünyada olmazsa olmaz etkinliklerin arasına girmiş durumda. Name: Yeshivat Shalshelet
Description: Yeshivat Shalshelet is an Orthodox Yeshiva day school for children with language-based learning differences, such as, but not limited to, dyslexia. Through Shalshelet’s carefully designed special education dual curriculum, small group learning structures and direct instruction, students will become academically skilled and confident life-long learners. Our program is designed to produce strong self-advocates who can navigate the academic landscape, empowered by their knowledge and self-awareness. With a rich experiential learning program led by strong Torah role models and co-curricular programming, our students will be active members of the Jewish community who are committed to a lifestyle of Torah and mitzvot. Our school emphasizes the ideals of middot and chesed and values the centrality of Israel in our daily lives.  Our mission is to produce students who are poised for academic, spiritual and social-emotional success in a mainstream educational environment.

Name: Ludens: Learning Voyage
Description:
Ludens exists because I believe the way we learn matters just as much as what we learn.
My own journey—born from a deep curiosity for modern technology and a fascination with the beauty of languages—showed me that traditional methods often create more anxiety and struggle than true fluency.

With Ludens, my goal is to offer the opposite: a space of safety, trust, connection, transparency, and real progress.
The idea is to deconstruct language and make it more accessible, creating a learning experience that’s human, empathetic, and tailored to each person.

Remember: your journey to fluency is uniquely yours.
~ Luís Matheus Amorim

Name: Beszélj Gátlások Nélkül Online Nyelvi Műhely
Description:
"Hiszünk abban, hogy mindenki képes új nyelveket megtanulni. Mindenki."

2015 óta tanítunk professzionális digitális háttérrel idegen nyelveket, Magyarország első kizárólag online működő nyelviskolájaként. 

Fő profilunk az egyéni vagy mini csoportban a lehető legmagasabb szakmai színvonalon történő nyelvoktatás mellett a célorientált, strukturált, rövidebb kurzusok:
idegen nyelven folyó prezentáció, 
small talk különböző események szüneteiben, 
állásinterjú felkészítés, 
külföldre költözés
esetén.

Szakterületünk az idegen nyelvek szorongásmentes használatának támogatása minden egyes nyelvi programunkban.

Nyelvi képzéseinktől függetlenül vagy azokkal kombinálva is választható komplex idegen nyelvi kommunikációs tanácsadásunk fókusza a magabiztos idegen nyelven való megszólalás, a nyelvhasználattal és nyelvtanulással kapcsolatos korlátozó hiedelmek körüljárása, és egy olyan személyre szabott hatékony eszközrendszer kialakítása, amely minden helyzetben megteremti a megfelelő magabiztosságot ügyfelünk számára, hogy céljának elérésében sikeres legyen.

Speciális, kifejezetten cégek számára összeállított egyedi ajánlatainkért vegye fel velünk a kapcsolatot az edina@beszeljgatlasoknelkul.hu email címen.

Értéket adunk, hagyományt teremtünk. 
www.beszeljgatlasoknelkul.hu

Pharma → improved GMP compliance, fewer SOP deviations, stronger audit readiness.

We specialize in teaching Japanese Language Proficiency Test (JLPT) levels N5 and N4, offering both live online classes via Zoom and recorded lecture courses for flexible learning.

Our mission is to make Japanese language education accessible and affordable for learners across **Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, the Philippines, and Sri Lanka**, empowering them to pursue careers, education, and cultural exchange in Japan.

Our classes are taught by a native Japanese instructor, ensuring an authentic learning experience focused on communication skills, grammar, vocabulary, and cultural understanding.

 Courses Offered:

 JLPT N5 & N4 Preparation

 Recorded Lecture Courses for Self-Paced Learning

Join us and start your journey toward fluency in Japanese!

i szkoleniowej dla naszych klientów, którymi są zarówno instytucje państwowe, duże przedsiębiorstwa, jak również firmy średniej, małe i mikro- przedsiębiorstwa. Działamy na terenie całej Polski i możemy zapewnić w pełni kompleksową obsługę językową w zakresie:

Name: FUTUR IDIOMES
Description:
En Futur Idiomes creemos que aprender un idioma es mucho más que estudiar gramática: es abrir puertas, crear conexiones y construir oportunidades para el futuro. Somos una academia de idiomas situada en Bellvitge, con una visión moderna y cercana del aprendizaje.

Trabajamos con alumnos de todas las edades, desde niños pequeños (a partir de 2 años) hasta adolescentes y adultos, ofreciendo clases de inglés, ruso y español adaptadas a cada nivel y necesidad. Nuestra metodología es práctica, comunicativa y motivadora: ponemos el foco en que el alumno hable, entienda y disfrute del proceso.

Además, colaboramos con empresas, diseñando programas lingüísticos personalizados para que sus equipos alcancen objetivos concretos de comunicación y desarrollo profesional. Cada curso se ajusta a las metas y al ritmo de la organización, garantizando resultados reales y medibles.

También trabajamos junto a colegios y Asociaciones de Familias de Alumnos (AFAS), ofreciendo talleres y actividades en distintos idiomas que estimulan la curiosidad y la confianza comunicativa desde la infancia.

En Futur Idiomes, acompañamos a cada persona —niño, joven, adulto o profesional— en su camino hacia la fluidez y la confianza, ayudándola a comunicarse con el mundo y a construir su propio futuro a través del lenguaje.

Name: ASUL Ⓡ Academia Superior de Lenguas

PORTUGUÉS | INGLÉS | FRANCÉS | MANDARÍN | RUSO | ITALIANO| ESPAÑOL PARA EXTRANJEROS .
Desarrollamos programas con eficientes técnicas pedagógicas, para enseñar idiomas en forma innovadora, divertida y eficaz.  Nos tomamos muy en serio su meta de aprender un idioma, valoramos su tiempo, esfuerzo y dinero. Usted aprenderá hablar el idioma correctamente desde el primer día. 

Contamos con profesores nativos y nacionales con grado universitario, seleccionados rigurosamente y después entrenados con la metodología ASUL, diferenciada e innovadora. Elegimos cuidadosamente los materiales didácticos y hemos desarrollado obras literarias propias (debidamente registradas) para la enseñanza de idiomas. 

Todos nuestros cursos están equiparados con los diferentes niveles según el Marco Común Europeo de Referencia para las Lenguas.

Spanish Lessons in Costa Rica - Language & Adventure Vacations

KEP GARDENS is a community development project. It is a non-profit, non-government organization with no political or religious affiliations.  Kep Gardens is committed to the training and education of young people in a rural Cambodian community.

WE BELIEVE that education and employment are the two main ingredients to help people improve their living standards.  But this must be sustainable and based on people being able to access opportunities to improve their own futures.  Consequently, all classes and courses at Kep Gardens are free of charge.

WE ARE SITUATED in a rural village about 10 kms from Kep on the south coast of Cambodia, 164 kms south of the capital, Phnom Penh.

OUR VISION is for a self-sustaining site providing education through an Education Centre, Trade Centre and Career Students programme to enable rural youth to gain employment.

Name: Berlitz Lugano
Description:
Benvenuti nella pagina di Berlitz Lugano! Siamo qui per offrirvi soluzioni linguistiche su misura per le vostre esigenze professionali e personali. Con oltre 140 anni di esperienza nell'insegnamento delle lingue, Berlitz è un punto di riferimento globale per coloro che desiderano padroneggiare una nuova lingua in modo efficace ed efficiente.

A Berlitz Lugano, ci impegniamo a offrire corsi di lingua di alta qualità che si adattano al vostro stile di vita sempre in movimento. Sia che siate professionisti impegnati, aziende in cerca di espandere la loro presenza internazionale o semplicemente appassionati di viaggi, i nostri programmi sono progettati per soddisfare le vostre esigenze specifiche.

Cosa ci distingue? La nostra metodologia unica, basata sull'approccio Berlitz, mette al centro l'interazione e la pratica costante della lingua, permettendovi di imparare in modo naturale e intuitivo. I nostri insegnanti altamente qualificati vi guideranno attraverso le vostre lezioni, fornendo un supporto personalizzato per garantire il vostro successo.

Presso il nostro centro a Lugano, offriamo una vasta gamma di corsi, dai corsi individuali a quelli di gruppo, dalle lezioni in presenza a quelle online, per soddisfare le vostre preferenze e necessità di flessibilità. 

Unisciti a noi in questo viaggio verso il successo linguistico! Seguite la nostra pagina per rimanere aggiornati sulle ultime novità, eventi e offerte speciali. Contattateci oggi stesso per una consulenza personalizzata e scoprite come Berlitz Lugano può aiutarvi a raggiungere i vostri obiettivi linguistici. Siamo qui per farvi brillare nel mondo multiculturale di oggi.

Name: RFL Center
Description:
Welcome to the world of language excellence!

At our company, we've been helping people discover the power of language for over a decade. We offer a range of services that connect you with the global community:

 Language Learning: We specialize in teaching languages that matter. Whether you're an individual looking to learn a new language or a company aiming to empower your employees, we have tailor-made solutions for you.

 Translation Services: In today's global market, accurate translation is essential. Our language experts ensure your message is understood, no matter where your audience is. From business documents to creative content, we have your linguistic needs covered.

 Interpretation: When you need seamless communication between languages, our interpreters step in. Whether it's a conference call, international negotiation, or any high-stakes event, our professionals bridge language gaps.

 Publishing Expertise: We help authors and businesses reach a global audience. Our services include publishing books, periodicals, and magazines in multiple languages.

 We understand the power of language as a tool for unity and growth. We specialize in widely spoken languages such as:

English
Spanish
Chinese
French
German
Japanese
Arabic
Swahili
Nearly every language you need to learn

Our mission is simple: to promote connections, understanding, and success across cultures. Join us on your journey to becoming a global communicator. Together, we'll break down barriers and open doors with the power of language.

Name: Alkhalil Arabic

AlKhalil platform for teaching Arabic derives its name from the Omani genius of the language and the poet Al-Khalil bin Ahmad Al-Farahidi (100 AH-170 AH / 718 AD-786 AD), the author of the first Arabic lexicon (Al-Ain lexicon), and the founder of the science of Arud (study of prosody) for poetic rhythm. Al-Khalil had the great favor in adding a symbol for the TANWEEN on the letters and changing the diacritical symbols from the dots to the symbols currently used, which then led to pronounce the Arabic letters in the right way, in order to eliminate the confusion in the similarity between the letters for non-Arabic speakers. AlKhalil e-learning platform specializes in teaching Arabic to native and non-native speakers, and offers general and specialized training courses in the field of language sciences and language skills from a distance.

AlKhalil platform seeks to achieve the ambition of every individual in this vast universe who aspires to acquire the Arabic language and use it in daily communication, academic life and business, through an advanced learning platform, in an easy and interactive way.

Name: King Sejong Institute Dhaka 2, Independent University, Bangladesh (IUB)
Description:
Independent University, Bangladesh established the King Sejong Institute (KSI), Dhaka 2 at IUB in partnership with the King Sejong Institute Foundation (KSIF), South Korea and the Korean Embassy in Bangladesh. The institute offers Bangladeshi students a unique opportunity to learn Korean Language and experience Korean culture here at IUB, Dhaka. Students can learn Korean by taking a Korean course, from beginner to advanced, taught by skilled Korean teachers. 

King Sejong Institute is the brand name of Korean-language institutes established by the South Korean government around the world since 2007. Named after King Sejong who established the Korean alphabet in 1443. King Sejong Institute manages Korean language education abroad and informs foreigners about Korean culture. The institute is supervised by the King Sejong Institute Foundation (KSIF), a public institution under the Ministry of Culture, Sports, and Tourism in South Korea. As of September 2022, there are 244 King Sejong Institutes in 84 countries.

The Institute’s vision is to create a leading Korean language and culture hub, whose faculty and staff, through their teaching, scholarship, and service, offer high-quality education and cultivate in their students the ability to appreciate and analyze freely the Korean language and Korean culture.

Name: Focus Language School
Description:
We are a dynamic, innovative, and visionary institution specialising in language training, and we are committed to providing academic excellence, supportive student services and exceptional learning experiences. Our quality courses are developed in-house with extensive teaching and industry experience, so we can meet the different learning needs of each and every student.

We focus on the practicality and versatility of language learning, ensuring what you learn will actually be helpful to your specific goals, including:
- Improving your English skills to travel or live in Australia
- Finding your pathways to Australian secondary schools, vocational education and training (VET) institutions, and further or higher education
- Refining your English to communicate confidently in specific settings, such as business, hospitality, science, career development etc.

Focus Language School is a registered CRICOS provider (No. 03346E).

COURSES OFFERED:
✓ General English (GE)
✓ English for academic purposes (EAP)
✓ High school preparation (HSP)
✓ Short study programs + Summer Schools

Visit us at focus.edu.au, or find us on Facebook and Instagram @focus.edu.au

Name: Blue Online Tutoring and School
Description: A Blue English é composta por somente uma pessoa, sendo a fundadora, gestora e professora particular, autodidata, pós-graduada em Metodologia do Ensino de Inglês Português e certificada, Ana Clara Machado, que oferece aulas personalizadas, ao vivo ou online, baseadas nas necessidades e objetivos dos alunos, com método assimilação, que compreende melhor o aspecto cognitivo de aprendizagem e garante melhor desenvoltura e confiança ao falar, entender e escrever em inglês.

Name: RUN ENGLISH ACADEMY
Description:
Une équipe pédagogique à votre écoute !

RUN English Academy est un organisme de formation basé à la Réunion et spécialisé dans l’apprentissage de l’anglais.

Notre école d’anglais s’adresse aussi bien aux entreprises qu’aux particuliers.

Nous accompagnons nos élèves à :

 Réaliser leurs projets professionnels en lien avec un pays anglophone ;
 Renforcer leur confiance dans leurs communications professionnelles à l’international ;
 Préparer leur entrée dans le monde universitaire ;
 Être plus à l’aise avec l’anglais de tous les jours, dans le cadre de voyages, etc.

Dans le respect et la bienveillance, nous vous aidons à surmonter vos difficultés d’apprentissage de l’anglais !

Avec la Run English Academy, vous améliorez votre niveau, quelles que soient vos motivations ! Travail, préparations aux examens, voyages ou loisirs… Nous adaptons nos cours à vos rythmes et vos besoins.

Avec nous, vous apprendrez l’anglais de façon conviviale et agréable !

« You can do it »

Name: Lang Boost
Description:
Ayudamos a profesores de idioma y escuelas a conseguir estudiantes a través de estrategias de marketing y un acompañamiento real.

Nuestra misión es simple: empoderar a los profesores de idiomas y dueños de escuelas para que construyan un negocio sostenible, aplicando estrategias de marketing serias — sin promesas vacías, sin atajos, sin fórmulas mágicas.

Creemos que los profes de idioma enseñan una nueva forma de ver el mundo. Impactan en carreras profesionales, culturas, relaciones y mucho más.
Por eso, nuestro propósito es potenciar (BOOST) esta misión hermosa.

 Con un sistema paso a paso, soporte constante y una metodología probada, hemos acompañado a más de 500 profesores en todo el mundo a tomar el control de su captación de estudiantes, aumentar sus precios (al elevar su valor) y, al final, lograr que más personas aprendan un nuevo idioma.

¿Qué ofrecemos?
 Formación en marketing 100% accionable — pensada para profesores en diferentes etapas.
No hacemos foco en el marketing vacío, sino en estrategias reales, sostenibles y efectivas.
 Una comunidad de profes enfocada en crecer y conseguir resultados.
 Sesiones en vivo, acompañamiento personalizado y herramientas prácticas.
 Un sistema probado que integra redes sociales, estrategias de captación y la mejora de su propia oferta.

Creemos en el trabajo bien hecho, el acompañamiento sincero y los resultados a largo plazo — no en las soluciones rápidas.

 Si querés dejar de ser un profe (o escuela) oculto, y mostrarle al mundo lo bueno que sos, este es tu lugar.

PD: No creemos en la competencia.
Creemos en el compañerismo.
En Langboost, los profes no compiten — se acompañan. Porque juntos, se aprende más.

Name: Vanti | Language Institute
Description:
Somos um instituto de excelência especializado no ensino personalizado de idiomas. Acreditamos que dominar o inglês vai além de simplesmente absorver vocabulário e gramática. Trata-se de adquirir as habilidades e a confiança necessárias para se expressar com clareza e impacto em qualquer ambiente.

Por isso, nossos programas de desenvolvimento são cuidadosamente planejados para proporcionar uma experiência completa e imersiva aos nossos alunos, para capacitá-los a atingir o nível de proficiência exigido por seus objetivos individuais.

Name: Erciyes English Academy
Description:
Erciyes English Academy is a dynamic language education center based in Kayseri, dedicated to delivering high-quality English language training for learners of all ages and professional backgrounds.

Our programs cover a wide spectrum - from pre-school English and junior English (ages 7–14), to general English, academic English, and exam preparation for national (YDS, YÖKDİL, YKS-DİL, eTEP) and international qualifications (IELTS, TOEFL). We also specialize in English for Academic Purposes (EAP) and English for Specific Purposes (ESP), offering tailored courses in fields such as Veterinary Medicine, Engineering, Medicine, and more.

With a team of experienced academic advisors and expert instructors, we combine proven teaching methodologies with personalized learning plans to help learners achieve their goals, whether improving everyday communication skills, excelling in academic study, or advancing in professional careers.

Our approach is learner-centered, skills-based, and internationally oriented, offering options from small-group classes to one-on-one coaching. Beyond traditional courses, we provide Speaking Clubs, workshops, and consultancy services for institutions seeking to strengthen their English language education programs.

Erciyes English Academy is committed to fostering confidence, fluency, and global readiness, bringing a fresh, innovative approach to language learning in Kayseri.

Name: francaisavecjose
Description:
Bonjour, bienvenue sur le profil du cours de français "Français Avec José" ! Nous sommes une école de langue en ligne engagée à fournir le meilleur enseignement du français à nos étudiants. En tant que directeur et enseignant de l’école, je m’engage à ce que chaque élève reçoive une attention personnalisée et un environnement d’apprentissage accueillant et encourageant.

Notre objectif est d’aider nos étudiants à atteindre leurs objectifs de maîtrise du français. Nous croyons en l’importance d’apprendre une langue grâce à une approche personnalisée et interactive, ce qui nous permet de suivre de près l’évolution de chaque élève.

Chez "Français Avec José", nous croyons que la responsabilité et le respect sont des valeurs fondamentales qui doivent guider notre travail avec les étudiants. Notre engagement est de fournir à tous nos étudiants les outils et les compétences nécessaires pour devenir des francophones compétents.

Si vous cherchez un cours de français en ligne qui offre la bonne combinaison de qualité, de responsabilité et de respect, alors "Français Avec José" est le bon endroit pour vous. Nous sommes impatients de travailler avec vous sur votre parcours d’apprentissage de la langue française. Contactez-nous pour en savoir plus!

Name: Indian School for Modern Languages
Description:
At the Indian School for Modern Languages (ISML), we believe that language is the key to unlocking global opportunities and cultural understanding. Our mission is to empower individuals with the linguistic skills and cultural insights needed to thrive in an increasingly interconnected world.

What We Offer: ISML offers a wide range of language courses in French, German, and Japanese, designed to cater to learners of all levels, from beginners to advanced. Our programs are carefully crafted to provide a comprehensive learning experience, including:

Master a Language Program: A structured pathway from foundational levels (A1, N5) to advanced proficiency (B2, N2), focusing on vocabulary, grammar, pronunciation, and conversation.
International Diploma Preparation: Tailored courses for students preparing for internationally recognized exams such as DELF, Goethe-Zertifikat, and JLPT.
Immersion Program: A unique blend of language learning and cultural immersion, designed to deepen your understanding of the language through real-life experiences and interactions.

Why Choose ISML?
Expert Faculty: Our experienced instructors are native speakers or highly proficient in the languages they teach, bringing a wealth of knowledge and cultural insights to the classroom.
Personalized Attention: With small class sizes and personalized feedback, we ensure that every student receives the attention they need to succeed.
Flexible Schedules: We offer a variety of schedules, including weekday, weekend, and online classes, to accommodate the busy lives of our students.
Cultural Immersion: Beyond language, we provide opportunities to explore and experience the culture, traditions, and history associated with each language.
Our Vision

To become a leading institution in language education, fostering cross-cultural communication and understanding by equipping our students with the skills needed to engage with the world in new and meaningful ways.

Name: Comuniq-C | Inglês Flexível
Description:
A COMUNIQ-C é uma escola de inglês 100% online, criada para atender adultos que precisam aprender de forma prática, eficiente e flexível. Nosso método é direto, moderno e focado em conversação, permitindo que cada aluno evolua no seu próprio ritmo, sem complicação e sem perda de tempo.

Acreditamos que aprender inglês deve ser simples, acessível e alinhado à rotina real de quem trabalha, empreende ou busca novas oportunidades. Por isso, oferecemos aulas com dinâmica leve, conteúdo útil para o dia a dia e uma experiência projetada para manter o aluno engajado do início ao fim.

Nosso compromisso é entregar evolução real — com clareza, objetividade e resultados percebidos a cada aula.

Início das atividades: março de 2026.

Name: Cinquecento
Description: Somos un Instituto 100% virtual que trabaja desde la Ciudad de Córdoba, Argentina, para ofrecerles cursos anuales e intensivos de italiano. El objetivo de Cinquecento es que puedas aprender el idioma de forma activa y comunicativa mediante un espacio ameno que favorezca el desarrollo de las habilidades lingüísticas que comprenden la oralidad, escritura, lectura y comprensión oral. Nuestros cursos se dividen en niveles según el Marco Común Europeo de Referencia (MCER), que son: A1, A2, B1. B2, C1 Y C2. Podés elegir la modalidad de cursado, sincrónica y asincrónica,  Actualmente tenemos alumnos residentes en todo el territorio argentino, y estudiantes en Uruguay, EE.UU., Francia e Italia.

Name: LETZ Ensino de Idiomas Ltda
Description:
Café com Letras: Aprender pode ser leve!

A Letz Idiomas nasceu da ideia de que aprender um novo idioma não precisa ser difícil, rígido ou intimidador. Aqui, o aprendizado acontece com fluidez, leveza e propósito.

Nosso nome não foi escolhido por acaso. "Letz" vem de "Letras", e o "Z" em forma de xícara representa o café que sempre acompanhou nossas jornadas de ensino.  A inspiração veio de uma observação carinhosa de Samir Mourad, que percebeu como o café estava presente em cada aula, em cada conversa com alunos que buscavam não apenas um idioma, mas uma nova forma de se comunicar com o mundo.

Assim como existem diversos tipos de café para diferentes paladares, reconhecemos que cada aluno tem um jeito único de aprender. É por isso que adotamos o Pós-Método, uma abordagem flexível e personalizada que respeita as necessidades e os objetivos individuais.

 Como funciona o aprendizado na Letz?
Oferecemos cursos 100% digitais e ao vivo, focados na interação real entre professores e alunos. Aqui, você escolhe a melhor jornada para o seu objetivo:

 Cursos Expressos → Super intensivos, voltados para fins específicos como viagens, negócios ou certificações.
 Cursos Curtos → Intensivos gerais, cobrindo níveis do básico ao avançado de forma condensada.
 Cursos Longos → Formação completa, do básico ao avançado, em um ritmo regular.

 Mais do que ensinar idiomas, estamos aqui para:
 Quebrar barreiras linguísticas, tornando a comunicação mais acessível.
 Desconstruir preconceitos, respeitando diferentes sotaques, ritmos e trajetórias.
 Valorizar sua identidade no aprendizado, sem exigir que você "soe como um nativo" para ser fluente.

Na Letz, aprender é um processo natural, sem medo de errar, sem pressão por perfeição – porque aprender pode, sim, ser leve.

 E aí, qual vai ser o seu Café com Letras? 

#AprenderPodeSerLeve #IdiomasComIdentidade #CaféComLetras #LetzIdiomas

Name: Play Language
Description:
At Play Language, we revolutionize language learning by combining the immersive elements of the metaverse with a natural, intuitive approach to language acquisition. Unlike traditional academic methods, our platform mirrors how native speakers learn; through experience, interaction, and real-life scenarios.

We strive to provide a virtual playground where students navigate various life-like situations within various different maps. Our immersive environment seeks to foster learning by doing, allowing students to practice their language skills in context rather than through rote memorization. 

We believe that this experiential approach helps students develop fluency and confidence more naturally, allowing language learning to be fun and enjoyable. 

Currently we are offering classes for English, Spanish, and Korean. We are looking to expand our language offerings and are eager to work with new teachers.

Name: Polyglotte Institute
Description:
You would like to learn a new language, but you always seem to find the perfect excuse? You are incredibly busy? There are no language schools near where you live? You have to stay at home to take care of the children?

Well, hang on, we've got good news for you. 

To learn a language with us, all you need is a good internet connection, a webcam and some enthusiasm. We'll take care of the rest.

However, if you prefer the classroom setting, we've got that covered too. You can learn with us in the center of Zagreb, in Mihanovićeva Street.

Whichever option you choose, you'll be in great hands as all the members of our team are teachers who :
a) love their job and;
b) have plenty of experience teaching at all levels.

Come and join us, we'll have great fun!

We offer online language courses in English, French, German, Spanish, Italian, Russian, Swedish, Dutch, Norwegian, Portuguese, Turkish and Croatian for foreigners. Standard groups of up to 9 people; mini groups of up to six people and one-to-one classes.
