Name: TMT Learning Centre
Description:
Welcome Aboard!

Somos uma escola de inglês virtual comprometida em proporcionar uma experiência dinâmica e facilitada de aprendizado da língua. Nossa missão é capacitar nossos estudantes a alcançarem a fluência no inglês de forma eficaz e envolvente.

Aqui, acreditamos na força da comunicação como uma ferramenta poderosa para se conectar com o mundo, abrir portas para novas oportunidades e ampliar horizontes!

Com abordagens acolhedoras e recursos interativos, oferecemos um ambiente de aprendizado estimulante e personalizado, adaptado às necessidades individuais de cada aluno.

Name: Kasch Online
Description:
KASCH – Inglês para Transformação e Oportunidades
A KASCH é mais do que uma escola de inglês. É um projeto educacional comprometido com a inclusão, a valorização da diversidade e a democratização do ensino de inglês no Brasil. Nosso foco é oferecer um ensino acessível, de qualidade e conectado com a realidade dos nossos alunos, especialmente aqueles historicamente excluídos do aprendizado da língua.

Name: Lingo
Description: Jazykovka, ktorá učí firmy rozprávať v cudzom jazyku. Učíme online aj offline, nastavujeme ciele a oslavujeme výsledky.

Name: D-SCHULE
Description:
The D-SCHULE is an innovative and flexible online language school in the German-speaking part of Switzerland, with our headquarters on Lake Zug. The D-SCHULE was founded in 2009. Online teaching - is the easiest, most convenient and currently also the safest way to learn. Education should never stop! We teach with a lot of passion, patience and joy and want to share our knowledge with you. Learn or improve your chosen language in a varied, creative and playful way.

 Säntisstrasse 9, 6345 Neuheim, Switzerland or Online
 +41 79 730 52 35
 info@d-schule.ch 
 Monday to Sunday: 24h

Name: Language spot
Description:
In Language Spot, there is nothing more fundamental to mastering a language than offering personalized education to our students. We take into account the specific strengths, interests, and needs of each student and create a unique learning experience based on those individual traits.

Our team is truly dedicated to teaching as well as translating. Combining the skill with the speed-efficient technological tools at our disposal, we strive to provide the highest level of accuracy possible. Our translation services are aimed at corporate businesses, organisations, public or private.

Name: NorthAmericanFrench.com
Description:
As learners and teachers of the North American dialects, we've developed a frustration with the lack of coherent and modern North American French resources.

To fill this gap, we've started on a project to provide a textbook, an audio companion, and an online feature rich course for every major dialect of French spoken in North America.

Whether you want to learn French as spoken in Ottawa or the Ozarks, we're here to help.

Name: NomadLingua
Description:
NomadLingua helps students from around the world master Spanish through engaging, personalized lessons designed to fit their goals, interests, and schedule.
We offer a variety of learning paths, from private and conversation lessons to group sessions, all taught by an experienced, native Spanish tutor.

Our mission is to make language learning accessible, enjoyable, and culturally rich—whether you’re preparing for travel, professional growth, or personal enrichment.

 Based in Portugal, teaching worldwide 
Learn Spanish with confidence, wherever you are.

Name: Haven Hall Limited - TEFL courses and Teaching Destinations Abroad. English Language Programs
Description:
Haven Hall is committed to providing immersive English language programs designed for ESOL (English for Speakers of Other Languages) children, teens, and adults. 
Our qualified teachers, who specialise in ESOL instruction, provide personalised attention and utilise innovative teaching methodologies that cater to various learning styles and levels A1 to C2.
We cater for students requiring English exams for work or professional purposes, as well as those requiring English exams ( IELTS and OET) for university admission or visa applications.
Our approach prioritises practical engagement and real-world application, which makes our programs unique and effective. 

TEFL And Employment:
In addition to enhancing the language skills of our students, we believe in nurturing the next generation of educators. Our TEFL (Teaching English as a Foreign Language) training programs are ideal for gap year students and adults looking to combine travel with meaningful work. We provide comprehensive support throughout the training and job placement process, ensuring our participants feel prepared and confident in their new roles. Participants earn accredited TEFL certification.
We facilitate access to over 100 teaching opportunities across vibrant locations in Asia, including Cambodia, where participants can apply their skills and gain valuable international experience and a good salary.

Studying in the UK:
We also proudly partner with a range of esteemed universities across the UK, providing our students with the opportunity to further their education and prepare for global careers.

Name: Navon Global Languages Institute ( NGLI )
Description:
Navon Global Languages Institute aims to provide high-quality language education to Sri Lankans and expats, offering courses in English, Romanian, German, Chinese, Korean, French, Spanish, Russian, Dutch, Arabic, Hindi, Tamil, Sinhala and other popular languages.

The institute will cater to individuals, professionals, and corporate clients, emphasizing personalized learning, cultural immersion, and modern teaching methodologies and modern teaching methodologies.

Name: American House of Languages
Description:
At American House of Languages we recognize that each individual has their unique needs and goals, and we pride ourselves on adapting our lessons to each student. We help our students achieve their professional goals by equipping them with the tools they need to effectively express themselves. Throughout this learning process, students also see personal growth as they make progress toward accomplishing their language learning goals. 

 

To provide students with a truly state-of-the-art language education, we use the best learning materials available and incorporate technological innovations such as virtual reality into our classes. We also believe that we have some of the greatest language teachers in the world! 


We believe that no goal is unreachable, and we are here to help you reach yours.

Name: Natalie's German Academy
Description:
Are you planning to move, work, or start a new chapter in Austria or Germany?

As a native Austrian German teacher, I specialize in helping expats, remote professionals, and language lovers confidently learn both Standard German and Austrian German, with a strong focus on practical, real-life language use.

Whether you're relocating to Germany or Austria, navigating daily life and professional situations in German becomes so much easier with the right foundation.

That’s why I created a beginner-friendly online course, designed to help you go from zero to simple conversations ... with clarity, confidence, and cultural insight.

Ready to learn German from scratch?
No prior experience needed, just the motivation to begin! 

When you join the course, you’ll get access to:

 Engaging video lessons
 Easy-to-follow grammar breakdowns
 Practical vocabulary for everyday use
 Downloadable exercises to learn at your own pace

Whether you're an expat, a traveler, or just passionate about languages, this course is designed to make learning effective, structured, and fun.

And the best part?
You won’t be doing it alone.

Join our German Learners Community to ask questions, get feedback, and connect with fellow learners from around the world 

German made simple. With structure, support, and a native teacher by your side.

Los geht's! :)

Name: SpeakOutChinese
Description:
We'd love to passionately teach you Chinese Mandarin, especially those interested in learning Chinese.
Our approach:
- Student-centered teaching
- I tailor my lessons to meet your individual needs and interests
- Make your understanding easier by combining media, pictures, and text
- Practicing Chinese through exercises will help you master it
We offer:
- Group classes
- One-to-one classes
Lessons:
 - HSK 
 - Comprehensive Chinese
 - Business Chinese
 - Spoken Chinese
I would gladly be your Chinese tutor to help you improve your Chinese level. With me, studying Chinese could be fun and easy.

Name: Wilbert Language Consult
Description:
Wilbert Language Consult is a dynamic language education and consulting firm committed to bridging communication gaps through high-quality language training and cultural exchange. Founded with a passion for empowering individuals through language, we specialize in offering practical, personalized instruction in a range of global languages, including French, German, Dutch, Chinese, Spanish and English.

At Wilbert Language Consult, our mission is to empower students, professionals, and organizations with essential language skills by inspiring passion and interest, enabling them to thrive in today’s globalized world.
We pride ourselves on:
- Expert instructors with native or near-native fluency
- Flexible learning options (online & in-person)
- A learner-centered approach that promotes fluency and confidence
- Support for language certification exams (e.g., HSK, DELF, IELTS)

Join us at Wilbert Language Consult where Language meets opportunity

Name: Camilla’s Language Lab
Description:
Welcome to Camilla’s Language Lab! 

I’m Camilla, a passionate linguist, language teacher, and interpreter with a Bachelor’s degree in Foreign Languages and Literatures and a Master’s degree in Conference Interpreting. 

What I offer in my lab:
 Interpreting services: consecutive, simultaneous,    liaison, chuchotage
 Language courses (both face-to-face and online): personalized lessons for individuals or groups
 Supplementary private lessons for school students (including other subjects)
 Respeaking (IT)
 Subtitling

Languages I work with:
 Italian — Native language
 German — Certified C1 (Goethe Institut)
 Spanish — C1
 French — Certified C1 (DALF Institut français)
 English — Advanced proficiency

My mission is to help people connect across cultures —whether that means facilitating communication at an international event or guiding students to confidently express themselves in a new language  (I have +7 years of experience in teaching foreign languages)

 Want to know more? Feel free to send me a message at camillavigani97@gmail.com 
I’ll be more than happy to answer to your questions and help you!

Name: German Language School of Morris County
Description:
The German Language School of Morris County is dedicated to inspiring cultural understanding and to building bridges through immersion into the German language and culture in the heart of New Jersey. To our students of all ages and backgrounds, we are providing high-quality language instruction that is certified by the German government. We pride ourselves in maintaining a thriving community that shares a common interest in the German culture and that celebrates what it means to be a global citizen.

GLSMC is recognized, accredited and supported by national and international organizations including:

German Language School Conference

Central Agency for  German Schools Abroad (Zentralstelle für das Auslandsschulwesen

German Cultural Ministry (KMK) 

Federal Republic of Germany, Department of Exterior initiative “Schools: Partner for the Future”, where GLSMC was selected as a partner school.

GLSMC is also a member of the German Language School Conference and its German teachers are members of the American Association of German Teachers (AATG).

Name: BeConnect - Escola de Inglês
Description:
Somos uma escola de inglês criada por professores, com a missão de tornar o aprendizado do idioma acessível, prático e eficiente. Oferecemos aulas personalizadas, presenciais ou online, adaptadas às necessidades de cada aluno ou empresa.

Com material didático exclusivo e professores capacitados, nosso foco é proporcionar uma experiência que combina ensino de alta qualidade com um preço justo. Na BeConnect, acreditamos que aprender inglês pode ser descomplicado e transformador.

Venha se conectar ao mundo com a gente!

Name: The Arabic Pro
Description: We make Arabic fun and easy to learn.

Name: Cyko Education
Description:
Se você está procurando uma escola para seu filho que ofereça um ambiente de aprendizado divertido e envolvente, a Cyko Education é a escolha certa. 

Nossa filosofia de ensino é baseada na premissa de "aprender brincando", pois acreditamos que as crianças aprendem melhor quando estão se divertindo.

Nossa abordagem única de imersão em inglês oferece uma experiência inesquecível que não apenas ajudará seu filho a aprender a língua, mas também a se envolver na cultura e na vida cotidiana. 

Nossos alunos têm a oportunidade de praticar suas habilidades de leitura, escrita, fala e escuta enquanto exploram as músicas, a culinária e outras atividades divertidas.

Nossos professores são altamente capacitados e usam técnicas pedagógicas inovadoras para garantir que cada aluno tenha sucesso. Eles trabalham em estreita colaboração com os pais para garantir que cada criança receba a atenção e o suporte de que precisa.

Também, oferecemos aulas para os adultos. Aulas dinâmicas e de pura conversação. Não trabalhamos com nenhum material apostilado, pois nosso foca principal é a conversação. Liberte-se do tradicional e venha conversar com a gente.

Name: Point Language School
Description:
O POINT Language School foi criado em 1991, do desejo de inovar no ensino de língua estrangeira. Aqui, partimos do princípio de que língua só se aprende usando a criatividade e a imaginação.

O conhecimento é vinculado a vivências, sentimentos, expectativas e necessidades de cada um. O ensino inclui atividades que envolvem música, projetos, arte, histórias, culinária e jogos.

E a estrutura do POINT contribui para isso, com salas equipadas com quadros digitais interativos, área de recreação com pingue-pongue, totó, piscina, cozinha e um amplo auditório.

Name: CALIBRI
Description:
Un espace dédié à l’apprentissage, à l’épanouissement et à la réussite

Au cœur de Témara, nous avons créé un lieu unique où l’éducation se conjugue avec passion, modernité et innovation pédagogique. Notre mission : accompagner enfants, adolescents et adultes dans leur parcours scolaire, linguistique et professionnel, en leur offrant un environnement stimulant et des méthodes d’enseignement adaptées à leurs besoins.

 Nos domaines d’expertise :
	•	Soutien scolaire personnalisé : toutes matières et niveaux, avec un suivi individualisé pour garantir des progrès réels et durables.
	•	Enseignement des langues : français, anglais, espagnol, chinois, arabe… des programmes structurés et interactifs pour maîtriser la langue dans un contexte réel.
	•	Formations professionnelles : ateliers, séminaires et programmes sur mesure pour développer des compétences clés dans un cadre adapté.
	•	Activités éducatives et culturelles : jeux d’échecs, théâtre, arts plastiques, études coraniques, ateliers créatifs et développement personnel.

 Un cadre moderne et équipé
Nos salles de formation et notre salle de réunion, d’une capacité allant jusqu’à 30 personnes chacune, sont entièrement rénovées et équipées de technologies récentes : écrans interactifs, datashow, écrans TV, mobilier ergonomique… Un espace pensé pour favoriser la concentration, l’échange et la créativité.

 Notre valeur ajoutée
	•	Une équipe pédagogique qualifiée et passionnée
	•	Des méthodes innovantes alliant rigueur et plaisir d’apprendre
	•	Un suivi personnalisé et des résultats mesurables
	•	Un environnement convivial et inspirant

 Témara – Maroc
Que vous soyez élève, parent, formateur ou entreprise, nous mettons à votre disposition un lieu où apprendre aujourd’hui, c’est réussir demain.

 Contactez-nous pour en savoir plus sur nos programmes, nos partenariats et nos services de location de salles

Name: College English School - OFICIAL
Description:
Com experiência de 30 anos no ensino de língua inglesa, a College English School está localizada a serra gaúcha, com unidades em Caxias do Sul e Flores da Cunha. 
No decorrer destes anos, a escola foi estruturada para atingir um nível de excelência. Nossos professores são profissionais que amam o que fazem e buscam a cada aula ajudar seus alunos a se familiarizarem com a língua inglesa, não só pela forma, mas também pela sua cultura e tradição. 
Nossos cursos são separados por idade e nível de conhecimento e a cada nível que o aluno atinge, ele chega mais perto do seu objetivo final.
Desde a educação infantil até a vida adulta profissional, cada curso é individualizado para que o aluno possa tirar maior proveito do aprendizado de acordo com seus interesses.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Come and Go
Description: A escola foi fundada em 2016 na cidade Arthur Nogueira - São Paulo. No início da pandemia houve a transição de escola física para online e a escola que já contava com muitos alunos, convênios com grandes empresas, diversos professores qualificados e de diferentes nacionalidades, cresceu ainda mais, alcançando alunos residentes em todos os lugares do mundo. Convencidos pelo poder do ensino online, em 2022 decidiu-se fechar a estrutura física, focando assim, na qualidade da estrutura online. A escola também passou por uma mudança de gestão, nome e identidade visual. Atualmente conta com modernas metodologias de ensino, mas mantém de forma mais tradicional a comunicação interna para dar respaldo exclusivo no desenvolvimento de cada aluno, de forma mais personalizada. Oferecemos aulas individuais, em dupla ou grupos. Nosso diferencial é prezar muito mais pela qualidade do que pela quantidade.

Name: HABLA ESPAÑOL Boutique School
Description:
HABLAESPAÑOL is a "boutique" Spanish language school that aims to build your Spanish knowledge through a personalized and interactive process, which is why our motto is "We build your Spanish".
It is a new approach to teaching because first of all it sees each student as an individual entity and builds the course to suit them, using their skills but also adapting the material to their needs.

Podés tomar las clases a cualquier hora, desde cualquier lugar, en cualquiera de estos idiomas: INGLÉS, PORTUGUÉS, FRANCÉS, ESPAÑOL AA e ITALIANO.

40 anni di esperienza nell’insegnamento della lingua inglese, francese, spagnola, tedesca e italiana per stranieri.

I nostri docenti sono esclusivamente madre-lingua con laurea conseguita all’estero, qualifica di insegnamento (Certificato CELTA o TEFL) ed esperienza didattica.

Name: Businessy. Your English language managers.
Description:
Założycielem marki Businessy jest Łukasz Sudyka, od ponad 15 lat związany ściśle z zarządzaniem umiejętnościami posługiwania się językiem angielskim, ale także z szeroko pojętą edukacją i biznesem. Businessy istnieje od 2016 roku i powstało zupełnie ‘na odwrót’, bo z potrzeby obsługi bardzo dużego klienta korporacyjnego. Zaczęliśmy więc od razu na pełnych obrotach, od wzięcia pod swoje skrzydła prawie 100 pracowników i… zrobiliśmy to na tyle dobrze, że nasza współpraca trwa nadal! To, co się zmieniło to stosowane przez nas narzędzia i podejście.

Obecnie wszystkie zajęcia odbywają się online, a nasza unikatowa metodologia ich prowadzenia została przez te lata dopracowana w każdym szczególe tak, by było komfortowo, interesująco i przede wszystkim efektywnie! Do dyspozycji klientów oddajemy managerów języka, często już na starcie rozumiejących branżę, w której działa klient, co tylko ułatwia budowanie relacji i pracę nad pozyskiwaną wiedzą.

Po drodze, podczas współpracy z firmami Elhurt i Sneakerstudio, zbierając feedback z rynku zrozumieliśmy, że na wypełnienie czeka ogromna nisza, w której aktywni zawodowo ludzie poszukują rozwoju i spersonalizowanego podejścia do uczenia się języka angielskiego, używanego jak żaden inny do poszerzania międzynarodowych biznesowych horyzontów. Wypracowaliśmy wtedy bardzo jasno określoną misję: wesprzeć ludzi z wielu branż, najczęściej na wysokich stanowiskach, w walce o lepsze biznesowe jutro. Przez kolejne lata wieść o naszych metodach zarządzania językową wiedzą niosła się w świat, a wraz z nią rósł zasięg naszych działań i eksperckość naszej metody. Dziś, z rozbudowaną kadrą managerów języka jesteśmy gotowi na więcej i z nieukrywanym entuzjazmem podejmujemy się zadania rewolucji podejścia do nauki języka angielskiego.

Name: نادي المترجم
Description:
The Translator’s Club
Overview:
The Translation Club serves as a dynamic hub for aspiring linguists and translators, dedicated to fostering excellence in translation as a bridge between cultures and civilizations. By offering an intellectually stimulating environment, the club enables members to refine their linguistic expertise, explore the nuances of translation, and engage in enriching experiences that blend education with creativity.  

Vision:
Translation is a powerful tool for building bridges of cultural understanding. The club aims to empower translators as key contributors to global dialogue, fostering intellectual exchange and shaping a more interconnected and enlightened world.  

Mission: 
The club is committed to nurturing a new generation of skilled translators who uphold accuracy, cultural sensitivity, and linguistic artistry. Through workshops, seminars, and collaborative projects, it seeks to deepen the understanding of translation as both a science and an art. By bridging linguistic and cultural divides, the club plays a vital role in fostering a more inclusive, informed, and globally connected society.

Name: CLIP CLASES IDIOMAS PERSONALIZADOS
Description:
¿QUIÉNES SOMOS?
En CLIP CLASES IDIOMAS PERSONALIZADOS, creemos que el aprendizaje de idiomas es más que una habilidad; es una puerta hacia un mundo de oportunidades y logros exitosos. Creada en 2018 por la Prof. Yoly Castellano, CLIP comenzó como una actividad profesional con clases de inglés presenciales en la Región de Valparaíso, Chile. En el año 2020 por la pandemia de COVID-19, la demanda de clases online creció exponencialmente, impulsada por estudiantes motivados a alcanzar la fluidez en el inglés.
La metodología exclusiva “POR UN ESTUDIANTE - UN PROFESOR” y los resultados tangibles obtenidos, rápidamente ocuparon toda la capacidad horaria de la profesora, lo que llevó a la creación de la página web CLIP Clases de Inglés Personalizado en 2021. Luego con el apoyo de profesionales experimentados en la enseñanza de idiomas, CLIP expandió su oferta de servicios, y así crecer en este mercado.
En 2022, CLIP se integró en la web, redes sociales y YouTube, ampliando su alcance y atrayendo a estudiantes de Chile, Estados Unidos, Argentina, Panamá y España. La creciente demanda no solo fue por clases de inglés, sino también por otros idiomas. Esto les impulsó a evolucionar de una academia a una Plataforma de Intermediación online en 2023.
Nuestra misión es clara: facilitar que profesionales bilingües y nativos den clases de idiomas online a personas de todo el mundo. En CLIP, cada estudiante recibe una atención 100% personalizada, en un ambiente interactivo donde la motivación, la innovación, el compromiso, la confianza y el respeto son fundamentales. Nos enfocamos en ver resultados tangibles, apoyando a nuestros estudiantes a hablar desde el primer día de clases hasta convertirse en angloparlantes y políglotas.
CLIP se basa en la filosofía del Blue Ocean Strategy, deseando crear espacios únicos en el mercado educativo online, donde la calidad y la personalización de nuestros servicios destaquen por encima de la mayoría. 
Atrévete a ser GLOBAL con CLIP.

Vårt mål er å oppnå to- eller flerspråklighet uten å ofre morsmålet. Vi har implementert denne pedagogiske tilnærmingen med stor suksess i våre opplæringsprogram.

Vi tilbyr et effektivt og tilpasset opplæringsløp i norsk språk og kultur for flyktninger og voksne innvandrere. Løpet bygger på læreplan i norsk og samfunnskunnskap, og det har fire hovedelementer – Grunnkurs, språk - og kulturbad, oppfølging i relevant arbeid eller arbeidspraksis og hverdagsintegrering.

Elementene er satt sammen til et hurtigløp som gjør det mulig for den enkelte å gå fra null kunnskap til A2/B1 løpet av kort tid.

NordicID tilbyr denne type opplæringsløp for flyktninger og arbeidsinnvandrere. 

I samarbeid med arbeids- og inkluderingsbedrifter kan vi tilby NordicID som et effektivt og tilpasset opplæringsløp i norsk språk og kultur for bosatte flyktninger. 
For noen kan dette utgjøre voksenopplærings- og introduksjonsprogrammet, for andre er det en «boost» eller intensiv oppstart på det. Uansett – det er en forutsetning at deltaker har fått vedtak om bosetting.

Name: MILC
Description:
The Bilingual Education System developed at MILC employs a 50/50 teaching method, with half of the classes conducted in a foreign language and the other half in Russian. The Russian portion is more extensive and detailed, as it is the students' native language. However, it thematically mirrors and complements the English portion, enabling children to develop a comprehensive understanding of the world in both languages simultaneously. This approach is less stressful than full immersion in a foreign language environment, reducing the anxiety often associated with beginning foreign language studies. Consequently, students remain engaged and less fatigued during lessons.
The program balances high cognitive activity with rest, promoting the holistic development of a well-rounded personality. It has been observed that children learn languages not only in the classroom but also through exposure to other cultures. To facilitate this, an intercultural exchange program is organized. Students from the MILC Bilingual Kindergarten and MILC Bilingual Early Development School communicate effortlessly with their peers in English, gaining an appreciation for diverse cultures from a young age.

Name: Your Time
Description: In response to the fast-paced and demanding lifestyles of today, we identified the crucial need to focus on the professional and personal development of individuals. This need was the driving force behind the establishment of Your Time, an online English school founded by an English teacher and her students. Your Time offers three modalities of learning - You&I, Class and Casual - and follows a methodology that prioritizes speech in order to teach real English. Through constant dialogue with the teacher and fellow students, we aim to prioritize effective communication and knowledge transfer. We also promote inclusion in the learning process by providing discussions and presentations on relevant topics in American and British culture, as well as fostering diversity and equality. As part of our commitment to inclusivity, we make monthly donations to NGOs and host institutions and provide free English teaching for people in vulnerable situations. Since our inception in 2023, Your Time has already reached over 50 students from all over Brazil, and we aspire to democratize English teaching to reach as many individuals as possible, while also helping those in need.

Name: Right Path International College

RPI College is a privately owned Canadian college with dedicated and highly skilled teaching staff. Conveniently located in the Central Lonsdale area in the heart of North Vancouver, RPI College provides an active, friendly, and engaging environment where you can improve your language skills both inside and outside of the classroom. Our professional and helpful teachers and our wide variety of courses enable you to focus on your areas of interest, improve your language and communication skills, enhance and expand your career options, and open up the world of education.

With the help of supportive and experienced teachers, state of the art facilities, and the very best teaching materials, you'll enjoy a life-changing experience and leave with the skills needed to pursue your dream.

Description: Atuamos há 30 anos no segmento do idioma de inglês. Name: Puntolingua
Description:
Puntolingua Sprachenzentrum "Livia Gereschi" in Berlin
Italienisch Sprachkurse, Konversation, CELI-Sprachzertifikat, Uebersetzungen ins Italienische.
Sie finden uns in der Cornelius-Fredericks-Straße 11 im Wedding (U-Bahn Seestraße).
Für Auskünfte und Anmeldungen stehen wir Ihnen montags bis donnerstags 15 - 17 Uhr oder nach Vereinbarung gern zur Verfügung. Wenn Sie vorhaben, Italienisch zu lernen, sind Sie bei uns genau richtig.
Außer den vom Europäischen Referenzrahmen für Sprachen vorgesehenen Sprachkursen (A1 bis C2) bemühen wir uns, in unserer Kursplanung den verschiedensten Bedürfnissen entgegenzukommen: von gemütlichen Konversationskursen (Literatur, Aktualität und kulturelle Themen) über Lateinkurse bis hin zur Vorbereitung für das CELI-Sprachzertifikat, das von der Università per Stranieri zu Perugia
vergeben wird. Puntolingua ist für das CELI anerkannter Prüfungsort.
Unser umfangreiches didaktisches Angebot ermöglicht es Ihnen, die erlernte Sprache gezielt und auf neue, ungewöhnliche und interessante Art und Weise zu vertiefen. Für fortgeschrittene Teilnehmer/-innen steht außerdem eine kleine Bibliothek mit italienischen Werken zur Verfügung.
Puntolingua bietet seit 2002 auch Online-Dienste, darunter Einzelunterricht via Webcam (Sprachkurs oder Konversation) und kostenlose Online-Sprachübungen.

Name: Cultura Inglesa Uberaba
Description:
Em 20 de janeiro de 1971, Walter Fernandes Pontes e Maria Nilce Martinelli Pontes, professores da língua inglesa, realizam o sonho de abrir sua própria escola. Fundaram a Sociedade Brasileira de Cultura Inglesa de Uberaba, para intensificar precípuas relações culturais entre o Brasil e Inglaterra e difundir o conhecimento da língua inglesa e da cultura britânica no Brasil, contribuindo assim para o fortalecimento da solidariedade intercontinental.

Suas atividades tiveram início na Rua Coronel Manoel Borges no. 44, centro da cidade. Logo o espaço não comportava mais a quantidade de alunos, então  foi necessária a mudança para a Rua Major Eustáquio em um prédio bem maior. O crescimento foi inevitável e logo havia mais de 2.000 alunos.

Visando atender melhor a seus alunos, em 1984, a Cultura Inglesa muda-se para um local amplo com modernas instalações no recém inaugurado Shopping Urbano Salomão.

Em quatro décadas a Cultura Inglesa Uberaba se tornou referência de qualidade no ensino do inglês. Isto se deve à seriedade e ao contínuo treinamento de sua equipe e investimento em tecnologia integrada à aprendizagem.

A Cultura Inglesa oferece o que há de mais moderno no ensino de idiomas. Todas as salas de aula são equipadas com o quadro interativo E-Board, a mais avançada tecnologia a serviço da aprendizagem.

A Cultura Inglesa representa também a Universidade de Cambridge para a realização dos exames que conferem certificados de competência em língua inglesa, internacionalmente reconhecidos.

Name: Lang Lang Barbara Binek-Fenton
Description:
LANG LANG to szkoła języka chińskiego online.

（1）𝐋𝐄𝐊𝐂𝐉𝐄 𝐆𝐑𝐔𝐏𝐎𝐖𝐄 𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐄: organizujemy zajęcia grupowe z języka chińskiego dla Polaków online, lekcje odbywają się w małych grupkach na platformie ZOOM. W LangLang mamy zarówno grupy od podstaw, jak i grupy na poziomach HSK2 i HSK3. 

(2) 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀Ł𝐘 𝐄𝐃𝐔𝐊𝐀𝐂𝐘𝐉𝐍𝐄 𝐃𝐎 𝐍𝐀𝐔𝐊𝐈 𝐂𝐇𝐈Ń𝐒𝐊𝐈𝐄𝐆𝐎：tworzymy interaktywne kursy chińskiego oraz webinary związane z językiem chińskim i kulturą Chin na platformie (http://kursy.langlang.pl) . Oferujemy zeszyty do pisania znaków chińskich.

(3) 𝐒𝐎𝐂𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐌𝐄𝐃𝐈𝐀: na Instagramie, TikToku i Facebooku regularnie dzielimy się treściami związanymi z językiem chińskim i Chinami w formie filmików i postów. Na YouTube skupiamy się na dłuższej formie edukacyjnych treści związanych z językiem chińskim. 

(3)𝐙𝐀𝐉Ę𝐂𝐈𝐀 𝟏:𝟏 : organizujemy zajęcia 1:1 z języka chińskiego od podstaw do HSK 5.

(4)  𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐒𝐙𝐓𝐀𝐓𝐘 𝐃𝐎𝐒𝐙𝐊𝐀𝐋𝐀𝐉Ą𝐂𝐄 𝐈 𝐖𝐄𝐁𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐘: oferujemy doszkalające warsztaty z wymowy, tonów, pinyinu, a także fraz przydatnych przed wyjazdem do Chin.

(5) 𝐋𝐀𝐍𝐆𝐋𝐀𝐍𝐆 𝐃𝐋𝐀 𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐌 : współpracujemy z firmami i organizujemy zajęcia grupowe i indywidualne dla pracowników przygotowujących się do wyjazdu do Chin.

Description: Transforming Learning into an Authentic Experience. The Tandem Program is born out of a passion for uniting communities through language and culture. Designed for native English and Spanish speakers, our approach is based on meaningful peer-to-peer interaction.

Name: MC English
Description:
Aprender inglês não precisa ser uma jornada frustrante. Se você já tentou vários cursos, estudou por anos e ainda sente que não consegue se expressar com confiança, a MC English pode transformar essa experiência.

A Mentoria de Fluência e Comunicação Eficaz em Inglês é um programa individual e personalizado, criado para quem quer superar bloqueios, ganhar naturalidade e finalmente se sentir confortável ao falar inglês. Usamos estratégias baseadas em neurociência e psicologia para tornar o aprendizado mais eficiente e adaptado ao seu dia a dia.

Se você busca um método prático, estruturado e focado em resultados reais, vem com a gente! 
 Entre em contato e descubra como podemos acelerar sua fluência. 
--------------------------------------------------------------
Learning English doesn't have to be frustrating. If you've tried multiple courses, studied for years, and still struggle to express yourself with confidence, MC English is here to change that.

The Fluency & Effective Communication Mentorship is a one-on-one, personalized program, designed for those who want to overcome barriers, gain fluency, and finally feel at ease speaking English. We use neuroscience and psychology-based strategies to make learning more effective and tailored to your routine.

If you're looking for a practical, structured, and results-driven method, let’s make it happen! 
 Get in touch and start your fluency journey today!

Name: Percutz English Specialist
Description:

No modalidade EAD temos aulas on line e ao vivo.

Name: LEMMA -Soluções em Linguística
Description:
O Lemma oferece cursos de Inglês, Espanhol, Francês, Italiano e Português, serviços de tradução, revisão, interpretação e legendagem.

Cursos
Oferecemos cursos de idiomas para todos os níveis, com ou sem uma finalidade específica. Temos cursos para pequenos grupos ou individuais, em nosso escritório ou à distancia. Nossos professores possuem formação em ensino de idiomas, experiência no exterior e anos de experiência na área.  

Deseja obter uma certificação internacional?

Se a sua necessidade é obter uma certificação internacional em um idioma estrangeiro, nós podemos prepará-lo para os mais diversos testes de proficiência. Alguns desses testes são aplicados em nosso escritório, como o Toeic, o Toefl Itp (língua inglesa) e TFI (língua francesa). Entre em contato para obter mais informações. Também oferecemos cursos preparatórios para IELTS, CAMBRIDGE, DELE, CELI, TEAP, etc.

Busca um serviço de tradução, revisão ou interpretação?

No Lemma contamos com profissionais nativos do português (BR), com formação e experiência em tradução, revisão e interpretação do inglês, francês, italiano e espanhol.

Tradução/Localização
Traduzimos textos técnicos, acadêmicos, comerciais, médicos e jurídicos.
Localizamos seu produto ou serviço e seu conteúdo de marketing para o público e o mercado brasileiro.

Revisão
Revisamos seu texto em português e nos idiomas estrangeiros. Trabalhamos juntamente com o autor para a perfeita adequação do texto para publicação. Oferecemos certificado de tradução.

Interpretação
Oferecemos serviço de interpretação em visitas, feiras, apresentações, conferências nos pares de idiomas inglês-português, português-inglês e espanhol-português, português-espanhol.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Libras Convivência

Name: Cosmopolitan Linguistic Solutions

Também atendemos com aulas particulares e serviços sob demanda: tradução e interpretação, consultoria, workshops, treinamentos, e crianção de novos cursos e soluções.

Name: Language Courses Didactic Media Studio
Description:
Our clients are employed by Embassy of Sweden to Moldova, OSCE Mission to Moldova, UK Embassy, USA Embassy, EU Delegation in the Republic of Moldova, Enova Group - international industrial venture, NORLAM/Norwegian Mission of Rule of Law Advisers, SIDA/Agency of Swedish International Development, IOM /International Organization for Migration, various UN agencies.

We teach following a unique methodology, which was developed and applied in very different educational environments throughout decades of experience. With us you will learn easily, and quickly become fluent. Each of our lessons combines speaking practice and training grammar through interactive exercises, card games, role play simulations and many innovative methods that have been proven most efficient in foreign languages learning in the fastest way possible. Learn more and sign up!
SERVICES
Language Training online and in class.
We design and provide individual and in-group trainings to international and local professionals. We conduct trainings on intercultural communication and awareness. We also provide trainings for primary/secondary/high school students on Russian as mother tongue, literature, English, German and other languages.
Assessment
We prepare and conduct placement testing in order to identify gaps in the staff’s knowledge and training needs. We design and organize tests and simulation exercises for professionals to assess preparedness for being deployed in a foreign language environment. We work with pupils and students to test and improve their language skills ahead of examinations.
Consultancy & workshops
We conduct sociolinguistic analysis of speeches and public statements, provide expert assessment of conflict cases related to the use of language in multiethnic and multilingual context, provide hate speech detection at administrative and political levels, analyze accuracy of interpretations in mass media, and design advocacy communication projects on multi-language policies.

Name: Luxembourg Online Education Center - Centre agréé et conventionné
Description:
TEACHING IS OUR JOB:

We're an organisation that's fully-subsidised by the government.
Our learners can benefit from a "Congé de formation" or "flexible working time" to attend our courses, and we accept vouchers from ADEM, ONIS, ONA, MIFA-CAI and social services. 

As we offer online classes, applicants can also register from anywhere and people. It's also perfect for people who have a reduced or no mobility.

Full price: 180€/60 hours - Price with a voucher: 10€/60 hours. 

All our teachers are professional teachers who are certified and approved by the ministry  of education (MENJE - Service de la Formation des Adultes)
We align with the CEFR (CECRL)
The certificates are issued by the Ministry of Education.

Abour us:
Luxembourg Online Education Center is an accredited online training center
designed for adults (whether Luxembourg residents or not, refugees,
immigrants, affiliated with the CNS or not, employees or self-employed, retirees,
those undergoing career transitions, or unemployed).

Our courses are accessible to people with reduced mobility.

The creation of our online training center and the courses offered

The social integration of learners from diverse backgrounds, often as new

Name: Churchill British
Description: Dal 1979 l'inglese a Torino si insegna da noi. Il Churchill British Centre scuola internazionale di lingue autorizzata dal Ministero della Pubblica Istruzione, per la diffusione delle lingue straniere, opera con successo in Torino dal 1979, grazie alla professionalità ed all'alto livello qualitativo dei servizi prestati. Già noto come British Centre ha assunto il nome del grande stratega "Winston Churchill" che ne caratterizza il marchio, ad indicare il suo metodo vincente. L'istituto, infatti, con ricerca continua ed in costante aggiornamento, ha approntato una metodologia che, sperimentata con successo, garantisce una formazione linguistica rapida ed efficace, senza inutili perdite di tempo e di denaro, grazie a specifici corsi su misura ed orari conformi alle piè varie esigenze. La sua qualificata azione nell'ambito del settore scolastico e di quello aziendale trova autorevole conferma nel considerevole numero degli iscritti che, soprattutto consigliati da persone già studenti del nostro istituto, sono in progressivo aumento. Gli insegnanti, tutti di madrelingua ed esperti nell'insegnamento agli stranieri, partecipano periodicamente a stages di aggiornamento sulle più recenti strategie didattiche. Essi sono coordinati da direttori agli studi e dai loro assistenti, tutti costantemente disponibili nel soddisfare le richieste e le esigenze di ogni singolo allievo.

Name: Онлайн-школа англійської для спеціалістів і команд, які хочуть говорити впевнено та професійно.
Description:
Ми допомагаємо фахівцям і компаніям підсилювати робочу комунікацію англійською: на мітингах, у переговорах, у презентаціях та в щоденній бізнес-комунікації. 
Напрями, у яких ми працюємо:

 English for Work
Програма для фахівців, які хочуть впевнено комунікувати в міжнародному середовищі.Практика через реальні сценарії:
• робочі дзвінки
• презентації
• переговори
• professional talks в інших різних ситуаціях

 Індивідуальні заняття
Персоналізоване навчання для швидкого прогресу.Фокус на конкретних цілях студента:
• підготовка до співбесіди
• перехід на міжнародний ринок
• нова посада або більше відповідальності
• регулярні мітинги англійською

 Corporate English для компаній
Ми навчаємо команди з IT, маркетингу, фінансів, sales, HR та виробничих напрямів.Формати:
• групові уроки
• speaking clubs
• індивідуальні заняття для ключових співробітників
• інтенсиви для команд.
Робимо процес структурованим, прозорим та підзвітним HR/менеджменту.

 Language Coaching
Підходить керівникам, тімлідам та фахівцям, яким потрібно звучати сильно та впевнено.Працюємо над:
• подоланням мовного бар’єра
• страхом помилок
• лідерським звучанням англійською
• комунікаційними патернами

Чому Speak?
 Практика замість теорії - працюємо з реальними робочими ситуаціями.
 Вимірюваний результат - прогрес видно після 4–8 тижнів.
 Гнучкість форматів - від персональних програм до навчання команд.
 Підтримка й зворотний зв'язок - студенти не залишаються самі у процесі. Адаптація під бізнес - програми під конкретні ролі, індустрії та цілі.

Для кого Speak?
• фахівців, які працюють у міжнародних командах
• менеджерів і керівників, що презентують, ведуть мітинги чи проводять переговори англійською
• компаній, які хочуть підвищити рівень комунікації команди та зменшити мовні ризики
• спеціалістів, які ростуть і потребують впевненої професійної англійської

Місія Speak
Створювати середовище, у якому люди та команди говорять англійською легко, природно й упевнено.

Name: German Language Courses at the German International School Washington D.C.
Description:
The GLC is one of the largest German Language Saturday Schools in the US for learners of all ages and proficiency levels. Our mission is to provide German language study in a diverse, challenging, and nurturing environment. Classes are divided into three groups to accommodate language learners on all proficiency levels: German for beginners, German as a second language, and German as a first language (native or near-native speakers). With the assistance of our highly qualified teachers, we promote self-motivation and self-discipline while fostering lifelong learning of the German language and its culture.

The GLC is recognized as a Center of Excellence by the American Association of Teachers of German (AATG) and offers the AATG National German Exam for High School Students (NGE). We are accredited as a PASCH school by the German Minister for Foreign Affairs. In cooperation with and under the supervision of the German Educational Ministry, we offer the DSDI and DSDII exams, as well as the ISV A1/A2 exams.

Name: Nassir Foreign Languages Institutes (NFLI)
Description:
Nassir Institute was founded in its permanent establishment (Gohardasht, Dariush St.) by Sir. Mansour Mir Agha, out of his great determination, and Dr. Hessam Mir Agha in 1996. In the initial year, the institute was set up in a four-room house with 35 registered students. Expanding the scope of activities, the institute recruited some top-grade instructors, applied modern educational systems and decided to build large educational complexes throughout Karaj and Tehran. Currently, Nassir Foreign Languages Institutes (NFLI) possess seven branches in Tehran and Alborz and hold worldwide online courses.
The key to the success of any organization is in five principles:
1. Stability
2. Expertise
3. Effort
4. Proper facilities and capital
5. Efficient Human Resources
Having vigorously striven after the above principles, Nassir Foreign Languages Institutes have set a coherent framework through which the path of advancement is paved.
The developmental processes of Nassir Foreign Languages Institutes, since 1996, clearly show that to obtain this pre-eminent position in Alborz and Tehran and to be among the top five Language Institutes across the country, Nassir has followed these five principles.
Presently, Nassir Foreign Languages Institutes hold various types of foreign language courses. It is also noteworthy that NFLI introduced the Online Educational System in 2013—five years prior to the Covid-19 pandemic.
Nassir Foreign Languages Institutes avail themselves of the expertise, advanced facilities, powerful tools, platforms, and infrastructure. Correspondingly, Nassir, which welcomes language learners from all over our beloved Iran, is one of the most prominent online language institutes countrywide and is sure-footed and determined for more extraordinary achievements.
Nassir is tremendously proud of its graduates, the ambassadors of science and knowledge, and now the prestige of Nassir and its perpetual services reach throughout the world.

Name: Co Co Lingua
Description:
Unsere Sprachschule Co Co Lingua wurde 2011 im Herzen von Yaiza, einem sehenswerten malerischen Dorf im Süden von Lanzarote, gegründet. Yaiza wurde bei zahlreichen Gelegenheiten als „das schönste kanarische Dorf“ bezeichnet.
Unsere Philosophie besteht auch heute noch darin, Sprache und Kultur gemeinsam zu fördern, um über Kulturen hinweg Brücken zu schlagen, unser Verständnis für die anderen zu verbessern und unsere eigene Welt zu bereichern. Dabei bieten wir eine Methode, die zugleich Spaß macht und effizient ist, um Spanisch zu lernen – die am zweithäufigsten studierte Sprache der Welt.
Wir sind eine kleine familiäre Schule. Unser Team besteht aus hochqualifizierten Lehrkräften, deren Muttersprache Spanisch ist und die über Deutschkenntnisse verfügen. Wir haben das Glück, an einem einzigartigen Ort dieses Planeten zu leben, auf LANZAROTE, das 1993 zum Biosphärenreservat erklärt wurde.

Co Co Lingua fue fundada en 2011 en el corazón de Yaiza, un bonito pueblo en el sur de Lanzarote. Yaiza ha sido nombrado «Pueblo más bonito de Canarias» en numerosas ocasiones.
Nuestra filosofía sigue vigente hasta hoy, combinar el aprendizaje del lenguaje con experiencias culturales, para construir puentes entre las culturas; mejorar nuestro entendimiento y enriquecer nuestro propio mundo. Ofrecemos un método que es a la vez efectivo y divertido.
Somos una pequeña escuela familiar. Nuestro equipo consiste en profesores altamente cualificados.
Somos afortunados de estar en un lugar único en el mundo, LANZAROTE, que fue declarado Reserva de la Biosfera en 1993.

Name: Pingu's English Savona
Description: Corsi d’inglese per bimbi da 2 a 12 anni, laboratori a tema con cadenza mensile e summer camp con pacchetti personalizzabili per giorni e orario. Tutte le attività della nostra scuola sono basate sull’apprendimento ludico e creativo della lingua inglese. I nostri insegnanti madrelingua e bilingue seguono i bimbi utilizzando per l’insegnamento anche materiali multimediali. La nostra scuola è attenta, inoltre, all’utilizzo di materiali riciclabili per i laboratori creativi, di materiali eco-sostenibili, non infiammabili e adatti a bimbi piccoli.

Name: The Lingo Hub • ლინგო ჰაბი
Description: Welcome to our language-centric community! Comprising passionate teachers and tutors, our team specializes in facilitating language learning. Embracing the online format, our courses cater to learners worldwide, transcending geographical boundaries. Join us in this linguistic journey, Explore, connect, and thrive in our community dedicated to the art of effective communication. Experience language learning redefined with our team, bringing a wealth of native speaker insights to make your educational journey truly immersive.

Name: Sanifu College
Description:
We're a premier language training institute committed to equipping learners with the skills and confidence to succeed in a globalized world. Our comprehensive curriculum covers a wide range of languages, including German, French, Spanish, Mandarin, and IELTS.

With a team of experienced tutors, we provide personalized instruction tailored to your individual needs. Whether you're a student, professional, or simply seeking personal enrichment, our flexible learning options and supportive environment will help you achieve your language goals.

Name: El Loro Club
Description:
We fast track professionals' comfort in conversational Spanish in our supportive online community. We offer plans for businesses, corporations, schools, institutions, nonprofits, associations, and individuals. Members have access to:

 Masterclass Series: Most Thursdays 12-12:45 pm CT. A deep-dive into members' most requested topics. 7 Day Free trial Available: elloroclub.com 

Weekly Conversation Clubs: Tuesdays, 5:30 pm; Wednesdays, 11 am CT. All-levels Spanish conversation clubs focused on everyday conversation and reviewing the masterclass series topics. 

Companies purchasing 12 or more employee memberships have access to one weekly employee-only conversation club at an available time of their choice; one conversation club per every 12 employee memberships.

Club del Libro (Book Club), 1x/month. Livestream reading of a Spanish book w/ a chat discussion and replays available. 

One-on-One Consultation: Members have access to monthly consultations to learn how to make the most of their membership and get individualized advice. 

Curated Learning Resources: Members have 24-7 access to on-demand resources, including conversation guides, masterclass recordings, book club recordings, and community discussion. 

Upcoming Events: 

Spanish tutoring, English tutoring, corporate and group English/ESL classes, and workshops are also available.

Name: Perfect English SARL
Description:
Perfect English SARL est un centre international d’apprentissage de la langue anglaise pour francophones avec aujourd’hui des apprenants dans près de 40 pays à travers le monde.

Nous vous aidons à saisir les meilleures opportunités professionnelles en vous rendant bilingues a travers nos formations en ligne et en présentiel

Name: Nami Japanese Academy
Description: Nami Japanese Academy was established as a Japanese Language School with the aim to provide affordable, high quality Japanese Language Lessons for all. We offer a wide range of courses, from courses in preparation for JLPT to conversational courses.

Name: CaféClatsch - Cours d'allemand
Description:
Le "Kaffeeklatsch" en Allemagne est le "Papotage en prenant le café", souvent associé au traditionnel Kaffee und Kuchen (café - gâteau).

Les cours d'allemand sont ainsi proposés dans une ambiance de convivialité et ont pour objectif de vous accompagner dans votre intégration professionnelle et personnelle en Allemagne.

- dialoguer dans les situations de la vie quotidienne, 
- vous exprimer dans un cadre professionnel, 
- vous acclimater avec la culture du pays 
- et prendre confiance.

Name: Background Cursos de Idiomas
Description: Somos uma escola comprometida em criar cursos customizados de idiomas: inglês, espanhol, português para estrangeiros; para que cada pessoa possa desenvolver habilidades de comunicação para o fim que necessita, seja ele trabalho ou viagem.

Name: Business English One
Description:
A Business English One foi criada para suprir uma necessidade dentro das empresas: o aprendizado do inglês corporativo pelo corpo gerencial. 

Inglês corporativo, ou Business English, refere-se à aplicação da comunicação correta e universalmente aceita no mundo das empresas. Comunicação inclui a terminologia da língua inglesa usada nos negócios, mas também o tom empregado, a ética dos e-mails e memos, a linguagem do PowerPoint, das apresentações e as nuances multiculturais.

O fundador e principal professor é um executivo com experiência de 35 anos em multinacionais (16 dos quais morando no exterior), que vivenciou o universo dos headquarters nos Estados Unidos, Alemanha, França, Japão, México e Panamá. Com essa experiência, a Business English One está capacitada a auxiliar executivas(os) a utilizar o Business English corretamente, aprimorando a comunicação com stakeholders internos e externos, 

A Business English One aporta valor através de:
- Ensino de inglês para negócios (presencial/online)
- Treinamento em técnicas e preparação de apresentação em inglês
- Suporte no preparo de business cases e propostas de negócios
- Acompanhamento e tradução simultânea para a alta direção em viagens internacionais
- Traduções de materiais e comunicações corporativas

Name: Crescenddo Hospitality Institute of Management
Description:
Crescenddo Institute of Hotel Management is a premier hospitality education institution committed to nurturing the next generation of hotel and service industry professionals. With a focus on academic excellence, industry-ready skills, and holistic personality development, the institute prepares students to thrive in the rapidly evolving global hospitality landscape.

Built on the principles of discipline, innovation, and service excellence, Crescenddo offers a blend of theoretical knowledge and practical training. Our programs incorporate real-world learning through modern training kitchens, housekeeping labs, front office simulations, food & beverage service training, and regular hotel internships.

The institute is guided by experienced faculty members and industry experts who bring deep insights from leading hotels and hospitality brands. Our industry partnerships ensure that students gain hands-on exposure, strong placement assistance, and opportunities to build rewarding careers in hotels, restaurants, airlines, cruises, event management, and tourism.

At Crescenddo, we believe in shaping confident, skilled, and responsible hospitality leaders. Through personalized mentoring, professional grooming, and a vibrant campus culture, we help students unlock their potential and step into the world of hospitality with competence and pride.

Name: Advanced Occupational and Foreign Languages Training
Description:
Are you looking to take your language skills to the next level? At Advanced Occupational and Foreign Languages Training (AOFLT), we offer expert language training that prepares you for success in the global market. Our programs are designed to help you achieve your language goals, whether it's to study, work, or live in an English-speaking or European country.

Our experienced teachers provide personalized coaching to help you improve your English language skills and develop the specific strategies needed to excel on IELTS and OET exams. With our E-courses, you can also learn Class I to Class IV languages such as Swedish, Danish, German, Chinese, Norwegian, and more from the comfort of your own home.

Our range of courses is tailored to suit different schedules and learning styles, from intensive E-learning programs to flexible part-time evening and weekend online classes. Our small class sizes ensure that you receive individual attention and feedback, and our state-of-the-art facilities provide a comfortable and supportive learning environment.

With AOFLT, you can be confident that you are receiving the highest quality language training available. Over 90% of our students achieve their target score on IELTS and OET exams, and our graduates have gone on to pursue successful careers in healthcare, education, and business in English-speaking countries.

Take the first step towards a brighter future today and join our community of successful graduates. Whether you are a healthcare professional seeking OET certification, a student looking to improve your IELTS score for university admission, or an individual leaning Class I to IV European languages, AOFLT is here to help you achieve your language goals. Transform your language skills and unlock new opportunities with our personalized coaching and flexible programs.

Name: Debora Languages
Description:
Ze mną hiszpański będzie prosty!
Zajęcia grupowe, indywidualne, konwersacje

kontakt: kontakt@deboralanguages.com
+48 794985856

Name: RS Coaching & Idiomas
Description:
Temos como princípio fundamental a evolução sistêmica, onde o progresso de um deve ser o progresso de todos. De nada vale evoluir sozinho. Estamos todos conectados e servimos uns aos outros. 
Trabalhamos com processos de coaching em grupo e individuais, ensino de idiomas, entre outros serviços.
Temos como missão levar o ser humano uma nova visão do aprendizado, onde a simplicidade e a mente serena levam a evolução consciencial através do desenvolvimento de novas habilidades. 
Acreditamos na unidade, no todo, na coletividade, no avanço progressivo e ascendente de um em favor de todos e de todos em favor de tudo.

Name: Curso Online de Inglés Básico Desde Cero – Especial para Chilenos - Con Brett Wexler
Description:
Soy Brett Wexler, profesor de inglés especializado en enseñar a chilenos desde cero. Trabajo de forma independiente y enseño por Zoom con un enfoque práctico y personalizado.

Mi curso está diseñado para principiantes absolutos, con explicaciones 100% en español, ejemplos reales y acceso fácil a través de Hotmart.

 Curso disponible en Hotmart
 Clases diseñadas por Zoom
 Ideal para chilenos sin experiencia previa
 Aprende a hablar desde el primer día

Name: Uplevel Formation
Description:
FORMATION - CONSEIL - ACCOMPAGNEMENT 
Organisme de formation en Anglais qui met en œuvre des formations en distanciel et en intra entreprise.

Name: B&S Skills Private Institute
Description: معهد B&S Skills هو مركز تكوين متخصص يهدف إلى تطوير المهارات اللغوية والمهنية للمتعلمين. نقدم دورات في الألمانية والإنجليزية مع دعم كامل للحصول على الفيزا، بالإضافة إلى شراكات استراتيجية مع ألمانيا وكندا لتوفير فرص توظيف مميزة. نوفر أيضًا تطبيقًا تعليميًا حديثًا للتكوين الرقمي ونصائح يومية للتطوير الذاتي والمهني. رؤيتنا هي مساعدة كل متعلم على تحقيق أهدافه من خلال تدريب مخصص وشامل.

Name: Онлайн-школа Qlang
Description:
Qlang – это казахстанская онлайн-платформа для изучения казахского и английского языков, которая сочетает доступность и качественное обучение, подходящее для разных групп пользователей. Мы предлагаем структурированные курсы, интерактивные материалы и индивидуальный подход, чтобы сделать изучение казахского языка естественной и комфортной частью повседневной жизни.

Наша миссия – способствовать тому, чтобы казахский язык стал основным языком общения в Казахстане, и для этого мы создаем удобные решения как для индивидуальных студентов, так и для компаний. 

Работая с 2018 года и сотрудничая с ведущими брендами, такими как Air Astana, Philip Morris International, КазМунайГаз, BI Group, Beeline и Halyk Bank, мы знаем, как адаптировать обучение для каждой потребности – от личного развития до корпоративных стандартов.

Name: Rockfeller Betim
Description: Ser fluente em inglês é poder se expressar exatamente do jeito que você quer. Sem aceitar o “é mais ou menos isso”, porque você sabe o “é isso que eu quero”. É pensar no que você quer falar, sem precisar pensar em como você vai falar. A Rockfeller acha mais importante você usar o inglês para se comunicar de verdade do que para apenas saber falar inglês. Por isso, ela é uma escola de inglês comprometida com o ensino do idioma de forma completa e real. Nossos cursos se moldam à rotina e se adaptam à expectativa de cada aluno, atendendo com excelência às diversas necessidades que as pessoas têm quando buscam aprender a falar inglês de verdade. Sabemos que, para conquistar as oportunidades do mundo, sem medo, sem receios e sem truques, é preciso muito mais do que se matricular em uma escola: é preciso querer ser fluente em inglês. E isso nós sabemos ensinar. VAI E MOSTRA PRO MUNDO!

Name: Teacher Rosana Cabral
Description: Nossa missão é ajudar jovens e adultos a tirar o sonho da caixinha e, finalmente, aprender inglês

Name: CNA idiomas | Jaboatão dos Guararapes/Piedade - Recife
Description:
Com 51 anos de experiência no ensino de inglês e espanhol, o CNA é uma das maiores redes de ensino de idiomas do país, com presença em todo o território nacional. Sua metodologia moderna explora elementos presenciais e a distância, além de inovadores recursos tecnológicos, que inserem o idioma no cotidiano do aluno a fim de proporcionar fluência ao falar, ler, escrever e compreender a língua de forma mais natural.

O CNA em Jaboatão dos Guararapes/Piedade chega com a missão de oferecer ensino de qualidade e uma experiência única para quem quer aprender um novo idioma de verdade. Aqui, o aluno encontra um ambiente acolhedor, professores qualificados e uma metodologia que dá resultado.

É a única escola de idiomas da América Latina a contar com material didático exclusivo em parceria com a Disney. Também somos centro aplicador autorizado dos exames internacionais de proficiência na língua inglesa da Universidade de Cambridge e do exame internacional de proficiência em língua espanhola SIELE, desenvolvido pelo Instituto Cervantes em parceria com a Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México (UNAM), a Universidad de Salamanca (USAL) e a Universidad de Buenos Aires (UBA).

Name: Inglês dos Sonhos com Carol
Description:
Somos uma escola de inglês online especializadas em aulas individuais, em duplas e grupos de no máximo 8 alunos. 

Temos uma equipe de professores parceiros que dão aulas com excelência, todos com certificações internacionais. 

Temos um foco em ensino de inglês para adultos, mas temos opções de turmas para seus pequenos também.

Name: Speak Online International
Description:
Inglês para quem quer chegar ao topo! 

O Método Speak foi desenvolvido para alcançar objetivos, quebrar crenças que te impedem de falar outro idioma e te levar a fluência para uma liberdade global.
Aqui você aprende com um plano de aulas exclusivo e personalizado desenvolvido sob medida a partir de uma avaliação inicial.

Name: Ponte a hablar en inglés - Aridane Vilardaga
Description:
Soy Aridane y me licencié en 𝐟𝐢𝐥𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐢́𝐚 𝐀𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐨-𝐆𝐞𝐫𝐦𝐚́𝐧𝐢𝐜𝐚  hace muchosss años en la 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐝 𝐝𝐞 𝐁𝐚𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐧𝐚. Después de acabar mis 𝐝𝐨𝐬 𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐨𝐬 en enseñanza de idiomas, empecé a trabajar como profesora en 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐚𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐝𝐚𝐬 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐨 𝘋𝘦𝘶𝘵𝘴𝘤𝘩𝘦 𝘉𝘢𝘯𝘬, 𝘦𝘭 𝘊𝘰𝘳𝘵𝘦𝘐𝘯𝘨𝘭é𝘴 𝘺 𝘚𝘈𝘗, primero en Barcelona y más tarde en Alemania.

Asimismo fui 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐨𝐫𝐚 de inglés y español en la 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐝 𝐝𝐞 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐡𝐞𝐢𝐦 (𝐀𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐚). 

He aprendido 𝟓 𝐢𝐝𝐢𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐬 con mi propia metodología. 

Eso unido al bagaje que me han proporcionado todos mis años de enseñanza y de corrección lingüística (𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘲𝘶𝘦 𝘵𝘢𝘮𝘣𝘪é𝘯 𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘪𝘥𝘰 𝘤𝘰𝘳𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘰𝘳𝘢 𝘭𝘪𝘯𝘨üí𝘴𝘵𝘪𝘤𝘢 𝘥𝘶𝘳𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘦 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩𝘰𝘴 𝘢ñ𝘰𝘴, 𝘢𝘥𝘦𝘮á𝘴 𝘥𝘦 𝘭𝘢 '𝘓𝘢𝘯𝘨𝘶𝘢𝘨𝘦 𝘓𝘦𝘢𝘥' 𝘥𝘦 𝘦𝘴𝘱𝘢ñ𝘰𝘭 𝘥𝘦 𝘭𝘢 𝘮𝘶𝘭𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘢𝘤𝘪𝘰𝘯𝘢𝘭 𝘚𝘶𝘯𝘔𝘪𝘤𝘳𝘰𝘴𝘺𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘮𝘴) ha culminado en la creación de este método fabuloso pensado para que aprendas inglés de manera rápida y efectiva y lo que no es menos de manera correcta desde el principio. 

𝐒𝐢́𝐠𝐮𝐞𝐦𝐞 𝐲 𝐚𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞 𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐞́𝐬 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐦𝐢𝐠𝐨 𝐝𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚 𝐫𝐚́𝐩𝐢𝐝𝐚, 𝐟𝐚́𝐜𝐢𝐥 𝐲 𝐬𝐢𝐧 𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐬, 𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞́𝐬 𝐝𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐞 𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞́𝐬 𝐲 𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐬 𝐥𝐚 𝐞𝐝𝐚𝐝 𝐪𝐮𝐞 𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐬. 

Y si quieres aún más , échale un vistazo a la academia online: www.ponteahablar.com/academy 

 Estarás hablando desde las primeras clases
 Aprenderás a evitar desde el principio los errores típicos 
 Practicarás a diario tu inglés con mensajes hablados y escritos
 Club de Conversación y Lectura (con correcciones individualizadas)
 3 horas de clases grupales semanales
 Todas las clases quedan grabadas y a tu disposición
 Correcciones individualizadas de lunes a viernes y en las clases
 Ninguna clase queda grabada para respetar tu privacidad
 No hay matrícula ni permanencia, cancela cuando quieras

Name: AG Academy
Description: En AG Academy somos la academia número uno en España, especializada en la preparación exitosa de los exámenes oficiales Aptis. Transformamos la forma en que miles de estudiantes certifican su nivel de inglés, ofreciendo un método probado y efectivo que permite alcanzar objetivos de manera rápida y sin frustraciones.

Name: Papiamentu Language Course
Description: Bon Bini (welcome) to the Papiamentu Language Course – the first and only online course created by a local Curaçaoan to help English speakers master Papiamentu. Our mission is to preserve and promote the rich cultural heritage of Curaçao through the language that reflects its history and diversity.

Name: VAJE
Description: VAJE S.r.l. Innovative Startup is a company that provides innovative solutions for digital language learning. Leveraging advanced technologies like artificial intelligence and augmented reality, VAJE offers an interactive platform with comprehensive courses, personalized lessons, and multimedia learning materials to enhance the learning experience. With a focus on innovation and personalization, the company aims to transform the language education sector, making it more engaging and accessible.

Name: Nova Almanca
Description:
Nova Almanca, A1’den C1’e kadar tüm seviyeler için çevrim içi Almanca kursları sunan bir dijital eğitim platformudur.
Online dersler, birebir danışmanlık, sınav hazırlığı ve göç süreci rehberliği gibi alanlarda özelleştirilmiş çözümler sunuyoruz.
Hedefimiz, Almanca öğrenimini herkes için ulaşılabilir, etkili ve sürdürülebilir hale getirmektir.

Name: Cloudlengua
Description:
Cloudlengua is an online language-learning platform that provides Spanish online courses guided by experienced tutor. Our materials are delivered through our online Spanish classes and also through our informative Instagram contents. 

Cloudlenua's Instagram: @cloudlengua

Name: Minds Pernambuco
Description: Minds English School - Inglês de verdade (8 anos até 90+)

Name: Talk o'clock
Description:
Witaj w szkole językowej, gdzie świat języków staje się dostępny z dowolnego miejsca na ziemi! Jesteśmy pasjonatami połączenia edukacji z innowacyjną technologią, umożliwiającą łamanie barier językowych bez względu na geograficzne ograniczenia.

Talk o'clock to coś więcej niż tylko lekcje online - to interaktywna strefa, w której uczniowie mogą rozwijać swoje umiejętności językowe w sposób elastyczny i wygodny. Dzięki zaawansowanym narzędziom, nasza metodyka skupia się nie tylko na gramatyce i słownictwie, ale także na praktycznym zastosowaniu języka w różnorodnych sytuacjach komunikacyjnych.

Indywidualne podejście, wsparcie i dostosowanie zajęć do potrzeb ucznia to fundamenty, na których budujemy sukces edukacyjny.

Dzięki elastycznym godzinom zajęć, masz pełną kontrolę nad swoim planem nauki. Niezależnie od tego, czy jesteś początkującym czy zaawansowanym kursantem, nasza szkoła oferuje kursy dopasowane do Twojego poziomu, byś mógł osiągnąć swoje cele językowe.

Dołącz do naszej społeczności językowej, gdzie każdy dzień to okazja do poszerzenia swojej wiedzy i umiejętności. Przekonaj się, jak nauka online może być wyjątkowym doświadczeniem, które otwiera drzwi do nowych możliwości i światów!

Nie wierz nam na słowo - dołącz już dziś i sam się przekonaj ;)

Name: English Talks
Description:
English Talks delivers quality teaching and guidance to help students achieve their goal of beginning, advancing or mastering their knowledge of the English language.

English Talks aspire to share model for achievement with franchisees and join us in the continuation of our successful journey.

Name: My Linguistics
Description:
My Linguistics specializes in the creation of cutting-edge language teaching methods. Our Swiss-based language training center serves as a testing ground for our method. We are passionate about helping people unlock the power of language and communication, and we are committed to providing the resources and support needed to achieve fluency.

Learning a new language can open a new world of opportunities, both personal and professional. Join us today and see the results for yourself!

Name: Albassam Institute
Description: منذ عام 1985م ومعاهد البسام تقدم أفضل خدمات التدريب والتعليم في مجال الكمبيوتر واللغة الإنجليزية، حيث تم تطوير المناهج لتواكب متطلبات سوق العمل وتطورات التقنية الحديثة. ويتم ذلك باستخدام أفضل تقنيات التعليم وعن طريق مدربين ومدرسين مؤهلين تأهيلاً عالياً ويحملون شهادات عالمية في مجالي التدريب والتعليم.

Name: Loopify
Description:
Loopify is a vibrant community dedicated to nurturing soft skills and fostering personal growth. With a diverse range of online and offline sessions, competitions, and resources, Loopify empowers individuals to enhance their communication skills and excel in interviews and beyond.

Through engaging workshops and seminars, members of Loopify learn effective communication techniques, public speaking strategies, and interpersonal skills crucial for success in both professional and personal spheres. These sessions are designed to be interactive and immersive, providing practical tools and insights that can be applied immediately.

In addition to skill-building opportunities, Loopify hosts competitions that challenge participants to showcase their communication prowess in various formats, from debates and speeches to storytelling and presentations. These events encourage friendly competition and offer valuable feedback and networking opportunities.

Moreover, Loopify understands the importance of holistic development and offers resources and support to help individuals navigate their career paths and personal aspirations. Whether it's resume writing tips, interview preparation guidance, or advice on achieving work-life balance, the community strives to empower its members to reach their full potential.

By fostering a supportive and inclusive environment, Loopify creates a space where individuals can learn, grow, and connect with like-minded peers who share a passion for personal development. Through its comprehensive approach to soft skills development, Loopify equips its members with the tools and confidence to thrive in interviews, careers, and life.

Name: Liz Aldam - Professeur d’anglais
Description:
Je suis Elizabeth Aldam, également connue sous le nom de Liz Aldam auprès de mes élèves. D’origine anglaise, je vis en France depuis plusieurs années et j’ai aussi eu l’opportunité de vivre deux ans au Brésil. Ce parcours international me permet de communiquer couramment en anglais, français et portugais.

Avec plus de vingt ans d’expérience en tant que professeure d’anglais, j’ai travaillé auprès de grandes entreprises telles que 3M, Forvia, Yamaha Motor France, entre autres. J’ai également occupé le rôle de coordinatrice de formation, où j’ai pu développer des compétences solides en gestion pédagogique et en accompagnement d’équipes.

Aujourd’hui, j’exerce comme professeure indépendante et propose des cours d’anglais en ligne, entièrement personnalisés selon les besoins et les objectifs de chaque apprenant. Mon approche repose sur la flexibilité, la motivation et l’adaptation au rythme de chacun.

Les retours positifs que je reçois de mes élèves, qui constatent de réels progrès dans leur maîtrise de l’anglais, constituent ma plus grande satisfaction professionnelle et la preuve de l’efficacité de ma méthode.

Name: Gaby Holz English for Kids & Teens
Description:
Seit über 20 Jahren bieten wir Englischkurse und Englischnachhilfe in München. Als Native English Speakers oder Profis auf muttersprachlichem Niveau unterrichten wir alle Altersgruppen ab 4 Jahren kontinuierlich bis hin zum Schulabschluss und darüber hinaus. 
Wie bieten Englischkurse und Englischnachhilfe in Kleingruppen und als Einzelunterricht – bei uns, bei Ihnen privat und online. Wir kommen auch in Kitas und Schulen, kontaktieren Sie uns einfach! 
Für Kita-Kids und Erstklässler in München haben wir ein spielerisches, abwechslungsreiches Angebot an wöchentlichen Englischkursen für Kinder sowie Spezialkurse am Wochenende und in den Ferien. 
Unsere Spezialkurse für Schülerinnen und Schüler bereiten optimal auf alle Englisch-Tests und Prüfungen vor, von der Schulaufgabe über Mittlere Reife oder Abitur bis hin zu Sprachtests für das Studium. Unsere Kurse befähigen Schülerinnen und Schüler, selbstbewusst und effektiv auf Englisch zu kommunizieren. Wir optimieren Grammar, Conversation, Aussprache, Hörverstehen, die Writing Skills u.v.m. auch als private Nachhilfe.
Gaby Holz – Englisch für Kids und Teens ist eine von der Regierung von Oberbayern staatlich anerkannte Bildungseinrichtung. Bei unseren Englischkursen und Einzeltrainings orientieren sich unsere Lehrer an den aktuellen Schulbüchern und Englisch-Lehrplänen.
Sie finden uns in München Schwabing. Adresse & Anfahrt: Görresstr. 16, 80798 München, MVV: Josephsplatz (U2, Bus 152, Bus 153). Kontakt: Tel: 089 20 062 062,  info@gabyholz.de. Bürozeiten: Montag bis Freitag 09:30 – 14:30 Uhr.

Scéim spreagtha Gaeilge do scoileanna

Cuireadh tús oifigiúil leis an scéim sa scoilbhliain 2012/13 ag an mbunleibhéal agus bliain níos déanaí ag an iar-bhunleibhéal. Ó shin i leith, tá an scéim i ndiaidh dul i bhfeidhm ar gach saghas scoile ar fud na tíre – ó scoileanna uirbeacha agus tuaithe ina bhfuil gá le beocht a athchur sa teanga iontu, go Gaelscoileanna agus scoileanna Gaeltachta ina bhfuil sí mar phríomhtheanga laethúil.

Name: The English Boutique

	•	Cross-border negotiations and decision-making

What We Do:

 Executive & Board-Level English (C1–C2)

 Preparation for presentations, reporting, and negotiations
 Professional translations aligned with financial, legal, and corporate contexts

Our Method:

We deliver bespoke, confidential, and outcome-driven programs, grounded in:
	•	Communicative methodology
	•	Business and financial literacy
	•	International corporate standards
	•	Absolute discretion

We do not offer generic language courses.
We design tailored linguistic solutions for those who lead, decide, and represent organizations at the highest level.

It is not about “speaking English,” but about:

At The English Boutique, we design bespoke linguistic solutions for those who lead and decide.

Name: Talk Away
Description:
Talk Away is an innovative educational tourism company based in Rio de Janeiro, specializing in immersion experiences for foreigners. We offer learning journeys on foot, combining urban exploration with insights into the Portuguese language, Brazilian culture, and art. Our experiences are led by educators, not traditional tour guides—all professionals with academic, educational, and cultural backgrounds.

In addition to our in-person walking experiences, we are developing a virtual welcoming tour platform that integrates AI with interactive learning. This project connects foreigners to local culture through live virtual tours, a marketplace for language educators, and an interactive memory map that collects personal stories of Rio de Janeiro.

Talk Away is redefining education, tourism, and hospitality, creating a community-driven approach to learning and cultural exchange.

Name: Szkoła Doskonalenia Języka Angielskiego "The Guides"
Description:
Szkoła Doskonalenia Języka Angielskiego "The Guides" powstała w czerwcu 1992 roku, ale już od 1989 roku jej twórcy prowadzili autorskie kursy przygotowujące do egzaminów Uniwersytetu Cambridge i Londyńskiej Izby Przemysłowo-Handlowej w ramach współpracy ze Staropolską Izbą Przemysłowo-Handlową.

Ponad 6300 absolwentów naszej Szkoły zdobyło uznawane na całym świecie dyplomy, które jakże często okazują się paszportem z wizą do sukcesu. Wysokie kompetencje językowe zdobyte w naszej szkole pozwoliły naszym absolwentom studiować na najlepszych uczelniach w Polsce i za granicą, np. SGH, Uniwersytet Warszawski, London School of Economics, Cambridge University, University College London (UCL) oraz otworzyć drzwi do firm międzynarodowych, takich jak Google, Unilever, PwC oraz wielu organizacji, np. World Health Organization, World Trade Organization i instytucji Unii Europejskiej.

In addition to Polish language courses, we organize conversation clubs in toastmasters format, with the help of which our students learn how to conduct conversations, how to ask and answer questions, how to speak on various topics and they try doing it fluently.

We care about the quality of education and the comfort of our students, so we have done a lot of work on the creation of materials that are already included in the cost of education and are produced in electronic form. And for A1 and A2 levels we transferred homework assignments to a set, which allows us to include more students in the learning process and diversify the assignments themselves.
For A1 and A2 levels we've transferred homework assignments to a platform that allows us to include more students in a learning process and it also helps us to diversify hometask itself.
It is important for us not only to help Belarusians who have moved to Poland to learn the Polish language, but also we give them lots of information about Poland, culture and traditions. In our classes, we raise important issues of social, economic and political life of Poland and Belarus. Therefore, outside of the Polish language courses, we have a lot of extra-curricular activities and meetings. We make excursions ( to Krakow, Gdansk), organize  Polish and Belarusian holiday events such as Dziady, Wigilia, Andrzejki, gather our students to watch films, hold open lessons and webinars, where lots of people join to.
