Name: My Lengua Education
Description:
Making Spanish simpler, accessible and enjoyable to all curious, enthusiastic and creative minds!

Learning a second language is not the same as learning your native language. Children learn languages differently than adults. Adults have to use their existing language skills to compare, memorize, and articulate new information. It takes time and effort to reach the point where you can think in a new language. But it is an incredibly rewarding experience.

We are passionate about helping people learn Spanish. We created My Lengua to provide a fun and engaging way to learn this beautiful language. Our flashcards and topics are designed to help you reach your language learning goals, whatever they may be.

Join us on our journey to learn Spanish!

We've been learning and teaching Spanish for over 10 years, and we've learned a lot about how people learn new languages. One of the most effective ways to learn a new language is with flashcards. Flashcards help you memorize vocabulary, learn pronunciation, and make learning fun. But what if you don't live in a place where people speak the language you're trying to learn? How can you get the pronunciation guidance you need?

That's where our new application comes in.

Learning Spanish can be fun and easy with our flashcards! Our flashcards cover basic to advanced vocabulary, pronunciation, and explanations of each concept.

Here's how it works:
- Flip the card over to see the Spanish word or phrase.
- Say the word or phrase out loud.
- Listen to the audio pronunciation to make sure you're saying it correctly.
- Flip the card back over to see the English translation.
- Repeat steps 2-4 until you know the word or phrase.

With our flashcards, you can learn Spanish at your own pace and in a fun and engaging way. So what are you waiting for? Start learning today!

Beyond Business English, we also offer General English courses for those looking to improve their overall fluency, as well as specialized training for IELTS and other proficiency exams. Name: Northeastern Culture and Language Learning Society (NUCALLS)
Description: NUCALLS is a student-run organization that provides student-ambassador language sessions to the Northeastern community. Our sessions are community-oriented, relaxed, and fun! Additionally, we host cultural events and activities throughout the semester.

Name: Portuguese Tutor

The lessons are tailored to your needs, whether for career, travel, or cultural connection. Enjoy the first two hours for free! Start your journey with the most widely spoken language in the Southern Hemisphere!

Name: Follow Me Idiomas - Juiz de Fora
Description: A FOLLOW ME apresenta uma série de oito livros, cada um tendo como cenário e tema principal uma cidade importante dos Estados Unidos. Aspectos culturais, e informações relevantes e curiosidades sobre essas cidades serão apresentados ao longo das aulas. Ao final de cada livro, o aluno terá visitado uma cidade famosa e, ao final do curso, poderá dizer que conhece os Estados Unidos de costa a costa. Nosso material didático próprio é todo planejado, desde a concepção à produção gráfica. Tudo pensado para que a caminhada seja muito empolgante. Na FOLLOW ME, quanto mais o aluno viaja pela cultura americana, mais fica apaixonado e com vontade de explorar o idioma.

Name: Języki z pasją - szkoła języków obcych
Description: Jesteśmy pasjonatami nauki języków obcych. Tworzymy grupę filologów, którzy z pasją i zaangażowaniem uczą języków obcych. Naszym celem jest, aby nauka była dla Was jak najprzyjemniejsza i najłatwiejsza. Proponujemy kursy indywidualne „szyte na miarę” lub kursy stacjonarne i online, w niedużych w grupach, na różnych poziomach zaawansowania. Prowadzimy profesjonalne szkolenia dla firm pod kątem języka biznesu. Wykonujemy tłumaczenia. Organizujemy wydarzenia związane z kulturą wschodnią i polską. Name: Kids&Us Rouen
Description: Kids&Us accompagne les enfants dans leur apprentissage d'une nouvelle langue, depuis les premiers mots jusqu'à la maîtrise de celle-ci. Notre méthodologie consiste à exploiter les ressources innées dont dispose un enfant et à reproduire la manière dont celui-ci apprend sa langue maternelle, grâce à des cours ludiques en immersion et une écoute régulière à la maison. Aujourd'hui, plus de 150.000 enfants apprennent l’anglais dans un des nos 500 centres Kids&Us à travers le monde !

Name: St. Barnabas Greek School
Description:
The Greek Orthodox Community of St Barnabas was established in the year 1965. First services took place in the hall of St Michael of the Anglican Church, Wood Green and later in St Mark’s, the Anglican Church in Gladstone Avenue, Wood Green. Shortly afterwards St Barnabas Church was rented from the Group of Catholic Apostolic churches.
The Greek Cathedral of St Mary, Trinity Road, Wood Green was purchased from the Methodist Church in the year 1970. A few years later the premises of St Barnabas were also purchased.
The School was established in the year 1965. This community was considered the largest community of our Archdiocese. The School started with a small number of children and at one stage reached 1,200 pupils. It now has about three hundred students.
Our school operates weekdays, Tuesdays and Thursdays, 5.30 – 7.30 pm and all day Saturday in two sessions, 9.30 – 1.00 pm and 2.30 – 6.00 pm.
The Secondary School of the Greek Embassy was accommodated in our school premises during the years 1998-2001. They since returned to our premises in September 2012.

Name: GLOBAL EDUCATION AND SERVICES (GENS)
Description: Global Education and Services Co. Ltd, established in 2014, is a fast-growing consulting firm that provides services to international students who are to pursue their studies or internship programs in South Korea. With leading know-how related to services for international students, Global Education and Services established various higher education link programs with many institutions and universities in the USA, Europe, China, Mongolia, and Vietnam. Our company aims to promote the internationalization of higher education and inspire the world by becoming a leading platform where all students connect and explore the possibilities in Korea.

Name: MT idiomas
Description:
Após diversas experiências como professor em escolas tradiconais no Brasil,  a MT Idiomas,  foi idealizada em 2015 com finalidade de proporcionar o aprendizado eficiente e direcionado dos estudantes, por meio de uma metodologia DIFERENTE, com alcance de  resultados reais e mais rápidos.
 
Desde então, a MISSÃO da escola é ajudar os estudantes a atingir a fluência em inglês e em francês, independente do setor em que atuam. Com foco em experiência e nos objetivos de cada pessoa.

Name: British and American English School
Description:
Através do inglês, é possível comunicar-se em qualquer lugar do mundo, e aumentar as suas chances no mercado de trabalho.

A British and American English School é uma escola de inglês com metodologia diferenciada, que enfatiza a prática da conversação e promove o aprendizado de forma dinâmica e eficiente. 

Curso Adults: Curso de inglês em apenas 12 meses, com turmas de no máximo 05 alunos e as aulas ministradas 100% em inglês, com foco total na conversação, aumentando assim o desempenho de cada aluno. Agora, que tal assistir até 7 aulas por semana, sem pagar nada a mais por isso? Ou ainda ter flexibilidade de horário para suas aulas?

Curso Hyper: O curso Hyper é destinado a pessoas que já dominam o idioma inglês e querem potencializar seu conhecimento no idioma e assim, chegar a proficiência.

Curso Start: O curso Start abre portas para qualquer tipo de aluno cujo contato prévio com a língua inglesa tenha sido bastante restrito ou até mesmo nulo. No aprendizado da língua inglesa, confiança na sua capacidade é fundamental e o curso preparatório Start promove exatamente isso aos alunos, ao mesmo tempo que os prepara para o curso de inglês Adults de 12 meses.

Curso Teens: Voltado ao mundo adolescente, o curso Teens é indicado para alunos a partir dos 09 anos de idade. Utilizando uma abordagem que fala a língua dos adolescentes, os teachers promovem uma maior proximidade e interatividade em sala de aula, salas essas que contam com kits multimídia. Caso necessitem os nossos alunos também podem fazer aulas de reforço semanal gratuitamente. Está na hora de você aprender inglês!

Name: Rockfeller Language Center - Araquari
Description: Ser fluente em inglês é poder se expressar exatamente do jeito que você quer. Sem aceitar o “é mais ou menos isso”, porque você sabe o “é isso que eu quero”. É pensar no que você quer falar, sem precisar pensar em como você vai falar. A Rockfeller acha mais importante você usar o inglês para se comunicar de verdade do que para apenas saber falar inglês. Por isso, ela é uma escola de inglês comprometida com o ensino do idioma de forma completa e real. Nossos cursos se moldam à rotina e se adaptam à expectativa de cada aluno, atendendo com excelência às diversas necessidades que as pessoas têm quando buscam aprender a falar inglês de verdade. Sabemos que, para conquistar as oportunidades do mundo, sem medo, sem receios e sem truques, é preciso muito mais do que se matricular em uma escola: é preciso querer ser fluente em inglês. E isso nós sabemos ensinar. Nosso inglês é para o mundo.

Name: Interlead Language Experts

Name: Projeto Brasil Bilíngue by SEDA College
Description:
O projeto BRASIL BILÍNGUE é um programa educacional pioneiro no aprimoramento do ensino da língua inglesa comprometido com a excelência.

Name: Aoi Yume Academy
Description:
AOI YUME ACADEMY - Mewujudkan Impian Anda Menguasai Bahasa Jepang.

Di AOI YUME ACADEMY, kami percaya bahwa kunci sukses belajar bahasa adalah pengajaran yang tepat. Tim pengajar kami terdiri dari profesional yang berkompeten dan berpengalaman dalam mengajar bahasa Jepang. Dengan metode pengajaran yang efektif, kami berkomitmen untuk membantu siswa kami lulus JLPT dan menjadi fasih dalam berkomunikasi dalam bahasa Jepang. Kami menawarkan kelas intensif dan reguler yang fleksibel sesuai dengan kebutuhan setiap siswa. Mari bergabung dan capai impian Anda bersama kami!

At AOI YUME ACADEMY, we believe that the key to successful language learning lies in effective teaching. Our team of instructors is composed of highly competent and experienced professionals in Japanese language education. We are committed to helping our students pass the JLPT and achieve fluency in Japanese communication. We offer both intensive and regular classes that are tailored to meet each student's needs. Join us and achieve your dreams with AOI YUME ACADEMY!

Name: Lin Plus Academy
Description:
Lin Plus Academy’nin yabancı dile yaklaşımı, dilin bir kültür aracı oluşunu bilmesi ve her yönüyle yabancı dili tanıtmasıdır.

Kurumumuz, etkileşimli ve öğrenen merkezli bir yaklaşımla dil öğretimine odaklanan bilimsel olarak denenmiş ve onaylanmış metotlarla bu süreci yürütüyoruz.

Dil becerilerini geliştirmek için interaktif materyaller, pratik aktiviteler ve kişiselleştirilmiş öğrenme süreçleri sunarak, öğrencilerimizin dil yeteneklerini güçlendirmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Kurumumuzda, İspanyolca, İtalyanca, Fransızca, Almanca dillerinde dersler de verilmekte olup aynı vizyonda çalışmalar devam etmektedir.

Lin Plus Academy’de bir yabancı dil öğrenmek demek o dili sadece dil bilgisi kuralları ile öğrenmek demek değil, kültürü ile birlikte dili tanımak demektir. Kültür ise o ülkelere gittiğiniz zaman veya uluslararası bir ortamda bulunduğunuzda aşinalık sahibi olmanız demektir.

Ders içerikleri, dilin yaşayan bir kavram olduğunu, o dili kullanırken hayatın içinden aktarımlar olduğunu bilerek üretilir. Dil öğrenmek ve dili edinmek arasındaki temel fark budur. Bir yabancı dil öğrenmek çoğu kez sınavlarda başarı elde etmek, test çözmek için geçerliyken, bir dili edinmek ve o dile hakim olmak, o dili içselleştirerek 7/24 o dilin bize kattığı becerileri kullanmaktır.

Lin Plus Academy’de Avrupa Dilleri Ortak Çerçeve Programı (CEFR) çerçevesinde akademik seviyede verilen dersler sadece sınav başarısı odaklı değildir. Bu belgede yer alan, uluslararası kabul edilen 6 dil seviyesi (A1-A2-B1-B2-C1-C2) esasında her bir seviyede kişilerin neleri yapabildiği olarak tanımlanır.

Konuşma, dinleme, okuma, yazma becerilerini optimize ederek aslında bireylerin ne kadar iyi bir dil becerisine sahip olduğu kadar, bu becerilenin hangi amaçlar için kullanılabileceğini tanımlar.  

Günümüzün küresel standartlarında süren iş ve sosyal yaşamında yerimizi güçlendirmek için bir yabancı dili, yine uluslararası standartlar çerçevesinde edinmenin kaçınılmazlığına inanıyoruz.

Name: Ancient Language Institute
Description:
Jonathan Roberts and Ryan Hammill founded the Ancient Language Institute in 2019. Ryan built the website and Jonathan taught a Latin class to 12 students. Now, ALI employs over 30 teachers and reaches over 800 students per year in its Latin, Greek, Hebrew, and Old English classes as well as thousands of people every month through its podcast, articles, and publications.

The Ancient Language Institute exists to aid students in their path to proficiency in ancient languages, to improve the way ancient languages are taught, and to foster a rebirth of the humanistic tradition.

We believe that what makes languages distinct is their unique history and literature – not the methods and principles required to learn them.

Through interactive approaches to vocabulary and grammar, graded and extensive exposure to comprehensible input, and accompanied by active use of the target language, students can acquire proficiency in ancient languages as successfully as they do modern ones. Thus, we aim to expose students to the best materials available in order to equip them to read great literature and to reach their linguistic and academic goals.

We are also committed to developing tools in order to help meet the great need there is for effective pedagogical materials for ancient languages.

We do all of this because, like Cicero, we believe that the ancient authors have left us "images of the bravest of men—not merely for contemplating, but also for imitating." Reading the ancient authors in their own words is the best way to gaze upon these images, and in turn to inspire contemplation and imitation of them. This is the essence of the humanistic tradition. We invite you to come join us.

Name: ENGLISH VIP ENSINO DE IDIOMA
Description:
Há mais de 8 anos no mercado, A English VIP é uma escola cristã comprometida em atender cada aluno de forma singular, proporcionando um aprendizado acelerado e envolvente que desperta a paixão pelo estudo.

A missão da English VIP é proporcionar um método de ensino dinâmico e abrangente, projetado para acelerar o aprendizado da língua inglesa de forma envolvente. Nosso enfoque vai além do básico, buscando garantir que os alunos alcancem verdadeira proficiência. Inspirados por princípios bíblicos, nosso método integra práticas inovadoras, materiais envolventes e estratégias interativas para criar uma experiência educacional completa e eficaz.

A English VIP oferece aos alunos a flexibilidade de escolher entre aulas presenciais e online, adaptando-se à sua disponibilidade e proporcionando uma experiência de aprendizado personalizada. Ambos os formatos são igualmente eficazes, permitindo aos alunos escolher o método que melhor se adapta às suas necessidades e garantindo uma educação de qualidade em qualquer modalidade.

Name: Idioma Online LP
Description:
At Idioma Online, we specialize in offering personalized English, Spanish, and Portuguese classes designed to get you speaking the language from the very first lesson. We know that every student is unique, which is why our classes are tailored to your needs and learning pace, whether you're a beginner or looking to perfect your fluency. Our approach is 100% practical and dynamic, with interactive lessons that immerse you in real language use, making for an effective and motivating learning experience.

We offer:

-Personalized and flexible classes: Choose the schedule that best fits your lifestyle.
-Conversational focus from day one: You'll be speaking the language from the first class, practicing in real-life situations.
-Native and highly qualified teachers: They will guide you every step of the way with a practical and enjoyable method.

-Whether you're learning for travel, career advancement, or personal growth, at Idioma Online, we make language learning a transformative and fun experience. 

Join us and start speaking today!

Name: CNA Araruama
Description:
Vivencie uma jornada de aprendizado única enquanto aprende um novo idioma

O CNA Araruama oferece toda a infraestrutura e tecnologia necessárias para que você aprenda inglês ou espanhol dentro e fora da sala de aula. As aulas são dinâmicas e os materiais didáticos do CNA são mais do que livros. Eles estão totalmente integrados a recursos tecnológicos. São aplicativos e conteúdos em redes sociais, atividades com QR codes, realidade aumentada e jogos interativos, que inserem o idioma no cotidiano do aluno, proporcionando fluência ao falar, ler, escrever e compreender a língua mais naturalmente. 

Estude onde e quando quiser

Outro diferencial é o CNA Net - Portal do Aluno, que possui duas “caras” diferentes: uma com interface mais colorida para crianças e adolescentes e outra para adultos. A plataforma conta com uma série de recursos como correção automática nas atividades de escrita e jogos, além de professores online para tirar dúvidas, ajudar com conteúdos trabalhados em sala de aula ou nas tarefas de casa e praticar conversação em inglês ou espanhol onde o aluno estiver.

CNA dá resultado

A qualidade do ensino e aprendizado do aluno são reconhecidos pela realização de prova de certificação internacional ao final dos cursos de inglês e espanhol. O FCE (First Cambridge English), concedido pela Cambridge Assessment English, aos alunos de inglês, e para alunos de espanhol, o SIELE, que é desenvolvido pelo Instituto Cervantes. Esses certificados são aceitos por mais de 20 mil empresas, instituições e universidades no mundo inteiro.

Magia em sala de aula

Você sabia que o CNA é única escola de idiomas da América Latina a ter material didático exclusivo em parceria com a Disney? Fazem parte do curso atividades como contar histórias e praticar jogos, além de vídeos e músicas com inspiração nas histórias e ilustrações dos personagens da Disney.

Name: Voxy Language School
Description:
A Voxy English é uma escola de inglês online dedicada a transformar o aprendizado da língua em uma experiência envolvente e prática para alunos de todos os níveis.

Oferecemos aulas personalizadas para crianças jovens e adultos, desde o básico ao avançado, focando em conversação, gramática e desenvolvimento de fluência efetiva.

Nosso objetivo é tornar o inglês acessível, moderno e divertido, conectando estudantes de qualquer nível com professores qualificados e apaixonados por ensinar.

Na Voxy English, cada aula é planejada para inspirar confiança e autonomia no aprendizado da língua, garantindo que todos os alunos progridam no seu próprio ritmo, do "hello" às discussões mais complexas.

Name: Planet English Association
Description: Planet English Association is an English language teaching school based in Salé Morocco. Founded in 2023, the aim is to help our community access the global community by providing English language classes for all students. We offer many plans for most language needs like our conversational English course, English after school, English for Juniors, and Professional English. There is a striking need for English language skills in the 21st century. To become global citizens we need to be able to communicate in the world's most famous language.

Name: Ninaatigoons Learning
Description: Dedicated to Anishinaabemowin. We run classes, develop resources, document language, and support communities to revitalize Anishinaabemowin.

Name: ETR | Inglês, Espanhol, Francês e Italiano
Description:
Apresentamos a ETR Academy, uma escola inovadora de aprendizado de Inglês, Espanhol e Francês, projetada para proporcionar uma experiência contemporânea e altamente eficiente. personalizada para você. 

Com nosso time de professores experientes e certificados, oferecemos aulas ao vivo, garantindo uma imersão completa nas línguas estudadas, enriquecidas com o uso de tecnologia de ponta. 

Nossos cursos abrangem desde o nível básico até o avançado, proporcionando um crescimento contínuo para todos os alunos.

Vamos além do ensino tradicional e oferecemos mensalmente três aulas extras para nossos alunos : conversação, musical e de foco no desenvolvimento das habilidades. Essas aulas complementares têm como objetivo aprimorar ainda mais suas habilidades linguísticas e tornar o aprendizado ainda mais diversificado e divertido.

Para embarcar nessa jornada emocionante rumo à fluência em Inglês e Espanhol, basta entrar em contato com a secretaria do curso pelo WhatsApp: (21) 98885-8619 ou pelo e-mail: secretaria@englishtorise.com. 

Estamos ansiosos para fornecer todas as informações necessárias e agendar sua aula experimental. Venha voar alto com o ETR e alcance o domínio dessas línguas tão valiosas!

Name: Flavio Moura Consultoria
Description:
Um profissional engajado, que facilitou a comunicação em inglês a mais de 10.000 pessoas em centenas de empresas nacionais e multinacionais em São Paulo e Grande São Paulo. E, nos últimos 13 anos trabalhando com empresas de todos os portes da região do Alto Tietê e Vale do Paraíba.

Professor por aptidão, apaixonado pelo que faz, com 39 anos de experiência e um propósito de vida em prol da educação. Com sua Consultoria de Idiomas reconhecida pela Cambridge University Press como parceiro da educação.

Tradutor e Intérprete por formação e talentos desenvolvidos e aprimorados nos 28 anos de serviços prestados.

Um estudioso entusiasmado pelo comportamento humano e Neurociência, trazendo toda uma nova visão sobre o aprendizado de idiomas.

Um Consultor em Análise Comportamental por decorrência dos aprendizados e aplicações do conhecimento adquirido.

Com o propósito de tornar o inglês uma língua popular, buscou o novo de maneira bem simples, estudando, criando, aplicando e ajustando, até chegar a um modelo comportamental a ser aplicado ao método de aprendizado:

PROCESSO COMPORTAMENTAL + PROGRAMA DE INGLÊS = RESULTADO

Name: Centro Universitario de Idiomas UNFV
Description:
Centro Universitario de Idiomas - UNFV

Našim cílem je probudit v lidech lásku ke studiu cizích jazyků a pomáhat jim se neustále zlepšovat a posouvat. 
Pravidelně zveme lektory ze zahraničí, pořádáme zábavné aktivity pro děti a účastníme se kulturního života. Rádi naučíme naše studenty anglicky, španělsky, německy, francouzsky, italsky, rusky, portugalsky a klidně i česky.

Name: Nathalia Costa Cursos
Description:
Na NCC, acreditamos que aprender inglês pode (e deve) ser leve, eficaz e conectado com o que você ama, inclusive suas referências da cultura pop.

Missão
Proporcionar liberdade (geográfica, financeira e de comunicação) com o inglês, por meio da capacitação de pessoas reais, com rotinas corridas, agendas cheias e muita vontade de aprender, a se comunicarem com mais segurança e independência em inglês, seja no trabalho, nas viagens ou no dia a dia.

Visão
Ser referência no ensino de inglês personalizado e acolhedor no Brasil, conectando cultura, propósito e prática de forma significativa e trazendo o aprendizado de forma divertida e autêntica.

Valores
Humanização, empatia, escuta ativa, leveza, comprometimento e paixão pelo ensino.

Nada de fórmulas engessadas. O aprendizado é moldado para você, com estratégias que combinam técnica e prazer em aprender. Usamos referências reais do seu mundo, como músicas, séries, filmes, fofocas e memes, para tornar o inglês mais natural, prático e envolvente.

Por que escolher a NCC?
Porque aqui o inglês é para a vida real, com humor, propósito e cultura pop como ponte para uma comunicação mais autêntica.

Se você quer aprender inglês de um jeito mais leve, divertido e conectado com o que você ama, entre em contato e comece agora sua jornada com a gente!

Name: ASL Breaking Barriers
Description:
About
ASL Breaking Barriers was founded in 2018 as an extension to My Smart Hands London which came to be in 2004, ASL Breaking Barriers is an advanced, current and thriving American Sign Language corporation based in London, Ontario. Our clients consist of individuals, to seniors to business’s (both small and large). Being accessible today is a vital part of any business with inclusivity awareness is more predominant than ever before. We are committed to assisting you in being known as a leader who supports accessibility and inclusivity. With years of experience in signing, involvement in the Deaf community compiled with having Deaf instructors it’s fair to say we are knowledgeable about sign language services!

Also, an expert in Guest Lecturing on the benefits of using sign language as a means of communication to those with, APHASIA, AUTISM, CEREBRAL PALSY, DOWN SYNDROME, TRAUMA, and other speech and/or brain disorders. Through the amazing benefits of ASL you can help give most anyone a “voice”.
Charlene is also the proprietor of My Smart Hands London

Her experience working with children with diverse levels of hearing loss comes from her volunteer work at Robarts School for the Deaf. Seeing many deaf children who have hearing parents, she noticed the need, and desire, for hearing parents to bridge the communication gap between themselves and their child.

My Smart Hands is a group of baby sign language instructors that use 100% ASL signs to teach parents how to communicate with their hearing babies. Our classes are full of fun and energy and are filled will music, games, books and more!

My Smart Hands has been featured in many media outlets such as Chatelaine, Chicago Tribune, Global news, Globe & Mail ROB, Front page of the Toronto Star, MacLean's Magazine, App Central and more.

My Smart Hands was listed as a resource in the top 101 Quality Hearing Loss Resources for Speech Therapists. For more information please visit our Communication Barriers page.

Name: Leader School - Centrala | Twoja szkoła językowa | Praca z angielskim i niemieckim | Franczyza
Description:
Leader School – szkoła językowa dla dzieci i dorosłych

Uczymy języka angielskiego i niemieckiego w 42 miastach w całej Polsce. Osobom przedsiębiorczym dajemy szansę na prowadzenie rozpoznawalnej szkoły językowej dzięki naszej ofercie franczyzowej. A tym, którzy chcą uczyć się języków, oferujemy systematyczną naukę z wykwalifikowanymi lektorami stosującymi skuteczne metody nauczania.

W sieci szkół językowych Leader School prowadzimy zajęcia dla dzieci od 3. roku życia. Sprawiamy, że najmłodsi oswajają się z językiem, korzystając z niego w zabawie i eksplorowaniu świata. Język angielski jest dziś podstawą w szkole i pracy, a jego wpływ na kulturę i wszelkie zawodowe branże stale rośnie – umożliwiając maluchom naukę języków obcych, zapewniamy im lepszy start.

Pracujemy również ze starszymi dziećmi, młodzieżą i dorosłymi. Nauka języka angielskiego oraz niemieckiego w Leader School jest przyjemnością i odbywa się na wszystkich poziomach – możesz zapisać się na nasze zajęcia, gdy znasz język obcy i chcesz go szlifować, ale także wtedy, gdy planujesz naukę od podstaw.

Dostęp do skutecznej nauki języka niemieckiego i angielskiego powinien mieć każdy – niezależnie od miejsca zamieszkania. Dlatego szkoły językowe Leader School znajdziesz w miastach wojewódzkich oraz małych miejscowościach.

Za tę wszechstronność i obecność na terenie całego kraju odpowiadają nasi franczyzobiorcy. Szukasz satysfakcjonującej pracy dla nauczyciela języka angielskiego bądź niemieckiego? Masz dryg do zarządzania, ale boisz się, że nie pozyskasz klientów, jeśli założysz szkołę języków obcych? Skorzystaj z oferty franczyzowej szkoły językowej Leader School. Działając pod wiarygodną, zaufaną marką, nie musisz obawiać się o brak klientów. Zapewnimy Ci niezbędne narzędzia oraz know-how prowadzenia językowego biznesu. A Ty zyskasz satysfakcjonującą pracę z językiem obcym i głodnymi wiedzy ludźmi, możliwość rozwoju oraz własną firmę – wiarygodną, pewną i bezpieczną.

- bezpośredni kontakt z ekspertami: ludźmi, którzy znają Norwegię i norweski od podszewki

- motywującą atmosferę nauki - z zajęć wyjdziesz po prostu zadowolony i pełen energii :)
- praktyczne wskazówki zarówno odnośnie życia w Norwegii jak i pracy w Polsce z wykorzystaniem języka norweskiego

NASZA OFERTA DLA CIEBIE
- nauka indywidualna lub w parze na wszystkich poziomach zaawansowania
- spotkania z lektorem w formie on-line
- trening językowy dostosowany do Twoich celów i potrzeb (np. komunikacja w miejscu pracy, przygotowanie do egzaminów, funkcjonowanie w skandynawskim społeczeństwie...)

W TROLLTUNGA jesteśmy zafascynowani możliwościami ludzkiego umysłu. Wiemy, że każdy człowiek jest w stanie nauczyć się nowego języka - niezależnie od wieku, doświadczenia i wykształcenia. Chcemy podzielić się z Tobą naszą wiedzą.

Name: Hello Scuola Di Inglese
Description:
Benvenuti alla Hello Scuola di Lingue, fondata con la visione di offrire un'esperienza educativa di eccellenza, Hello si impegna a rendere l'apprendimento delle lingue un viaggio coinvolgente e personalizzato per ogni studente.

Ambiente Amichevole e Inclusivo:
Il cuore della nostra scuola è un ambiente caldo e accogliente, dove studenti di ogni età e background si sentono a casa. Siamo orgogliosi di essere una comunità inclusiva, dove la diversità è celebrata e ogni voce è ascoltata.

Programmi Personalizzati:
Crediamo che l'apprendimento sia più efficace quando è su misura. Ogni studente è unico, e così dovrebbe essere il suo percorso di apprendimento. I nostri programmi personalizzati sono progettati per adattarsi alle esigenze specifiche, agli obiettivi e al ritmo di apprendimento di ciascuno, sia che si tratti di lezioni individuali o di gruppi piccoli e coesi.

Insegnanti Esperti e Qualificati:
La nostra squadra di insegnanti è il nostro orgoglio: professionisti esperti e qualificati provenienti da tutto il mondo. Ogni insegnante porta con sé un bagaglio di esperienze e competenze uniche, garantendo un insegnamento di qualità e un approccio diversificato alle lingue.

Materiali Didattici Interattivi e Divertenti:
L'apprendimento deve essere una gioia, non un compito. Per questo, utilizziamo materiali didattici interattivi e divertenti, che stimolano la curiosità e mantengono alto l'interesse degli studenti. 

Esperienza Completa e Professionale:
L'obiettivo di Hello è fornire un'esperienza di apprendimento linguistico completa e professionale. Che tu stia cercando di imparare una lingua per lavoro, studio o semplicemente per passione personale, abbiamo le risorse e l'expertise per supportarti in ogni fase del tuo percorso.

Unisciti a Noi:
Siamo più che una scuola di lingue; siamo una famiglia che cresce insieme attraverso la scoperta e l'amore per le lingue. Ti invitiamo a unirti alla nostra famiglia!

Name: Ewelina Biernacka - Angielski dla IT
Description:
Mam na imię Ewelina i pomagam osobom z IT przygotować się do spotkań po angielsku, zdobyć pracę i pokonać blokadę mówienia. 

Jestem aktywna na moim profilu imiennym (https://www.linkedin.com/in/trenerkaangielskiego/) i do niedawna nie rozwijałam strony firmowej, stąd świeci ona jeszcze pustkami.

Pracowałam w IT i rozumiem specyfikę pracy programistów, UX designerów, testerów, PM-ów czy analityków. Wiem jak wyglądają prawdziwe spotkania projektowe, dlatego uczę tego co naprawdę potrzebne w tej pracy.

Jestem byłą Project Managerką, studentką psychologii, a od kilku lat trenerką angielskiego. W ciągu 14 lat pracy zawodowej poprowadziłam tysiące spotkań po angielsku.

O moim podejściu do nauczaniu dowiesz się więcej z podcastu , w którym opowiadam o tym, jak samodzielnie uczyć się mówienia po angielsku. Więcej informacji: https://ewelinabiernacka.com/

Alliance Française de Chittagong is the only institution in Chittagong officially accredited to offer French Courses and hold internationally recognized French language examinations approved by the French government and approved for other governments' official use.

All diplomas and tests are based on a system that uses the global scale of linguistic competencies recognized worldwide. All professors of Alliance Française de Chittagong are certified by the French Ministry of Education, and they are updated by regular training in French.



What are the benefits of learning French?

-- Study in French --
Campus France is the French Public Agency for the promotion of higher education, international mobility, Campus France can help you to choose your programme, look for scholarship and prepare your stay in France. Campus France Dhaka makes regular visits to the Alliance Française de Chittagong
-- Be part of the global community --
French is the official language of 29 countries, spoken by 274 million people worldwide.

-- Get better job opportunities --
French is one of the UN's official languages. After completing A2, you can get a job in the UN or another international organization.

-- Enjoy French art, literature, cinema, etc --
French culture is one of the richest in the world.

Get an edge in Canadian Immigration with TCF Canada and TCF Quebec or French nationality/family reunification with TCF INR.

The Alliance Française Phuket is a French cultural centre in the south of Thailand, we offer French language classes, as well as a translation service, so you can have all your documents translated from/into French, Thai, and English.

Founded in 1983 by former French ambassador Gérard André, the Alliance Française de Phuket's primary aim is to promote the French language, French-speaking cultures and cultural diversity.

Name: Deutschothek Sprachschule
Description:
Deutschothek is a modern and innovative language school in Vienna specializing in quality German courses and company trainings. In our language school you find a positive and friendly atmosphere, where you will love to learn German.

Course programme

We offer German courses on all levels. Our course programme includes intensive courses in the morning and afternoon, half-intensive courses in the evening, conversation courses, grammar courses, courses for business German, perfection courses, Saturday courses, private lessons and business trainings.


Small groups

We are convinced that the group size in the German course is a decisive factor for your learning progress. Therefore, in the German courses of our language school in Vienna the group size is limited to 5 to maximum 10 participants. This way you will be able speak more and the teacher can better cater for the students’ individual needs.


Excellent teachers

Excellent native teachers provide the best conditions for learning German fast and successfully. That is why we apply strict criteria in selecting our German teachers according to experience, personality and qualification.


Multilingual customer service

We love learning languages ourselves. So not only do we all speak native German,  but we also offer customer service in English, Italian, Russian, Spanish, Slovak, Dutch or Hungarian. If you have any questions please do not hesitate to contact us. We are looking forward to welcoming you in our language school at Vienna Westbahnhof.

Nas turmas regulares e intensivas, as aulas acontecem ao vivo via google meet, com no máximo 6 (seis) pessoas. Além disso, dispomos do grupo do Whatsapp e da turma no google classroom para organização e distribuição do conteúdo e recursos complementares (vídeos, livros do médiathèque etc).
Nas aulas particulares, agendamos os encontros de acordo com a disponibilidade de ambos (aluno e professor), e o conteúdo pode ser direcionado pra alguma necessidade específica: teste de proficiência, conversação, situações específicas.

Name: DeLingvo UG
Description:
DeLingvo UG ist eine Sprachschule mit Sitz in Hamburg, die sich auf Deutschkurse und Integrationsmaßnahmen spezialisiert hat. Unser Ziel ist es, Menschen aus verschiedenen Kulturen die deutsche Sprache näherzubringen und ihnen zu helfen, sich im beruflichen und privaten Alltag in Deutschland sicher und selbstbewusst zu bewegen. 


Unsere Angebote umfassen:

Sprachkurse: Von Anfänger- bis Fortgeschrittenenkursen bieten wir flexible Deutschkurse an, die auf die individuellen Bedürfnisse unserer Teilnehmer zugeschnitten sind. 

Prüfungsvorbereitung: Spezielle Vorbereitungskurse für Prüfungen wie TestDaF, DSH, Goethe und Telc steigern gezielt Ihre Erfolgschancen. 

Kulturelle Integration: Workshops und Aktivitäten erleichtern den Einstieg in die deutsche Kultur und fördern ein schnelleres Einleben. 


Berufliches Coaching und Weiterbildung: Wir unterstützen Ihre berufliche Entwicklung mit Maßnahmen, die sowohl in Präsenz als auch virtuell stattfinden. Die AZAV Maßnahmen werden vom Jobcenter oder von der Agentur für Arbeit gefördert.


Unser engagiertes Team besteht aus qualifizierten Sprachlehrern und Coaches, die Wert auf individuelle Betreuung und maßgeschneiderte Lernpläne legen. Wir begleiten Sie von Anfang an und stehen Ihnen bei Fragen zum Leben und Arbeiten in Deutschland zur Seite. 


Besuchen Sie unsere Website für weitere Informationen und aktuelle Kursangebote: https://delingvo.de

Kontaktieren Sie uns gerne per E-Mail unter info@delingvo.de oder telefonisch unter 040 23813117. 


DeLingvo UG – Ihr Partner für Sprachkurse und Integration in Deutschland.

Name: Ashreinu School
Description:
Our name says it all. “Ashreinu” literally means “we’re happy” — and we are! How could we not be? We’ve been given a heritage that goes beyond culture and ritual; it’s a sacred mission. Our job as Jewish people is to illuminate the world with the light and love of G-d! Our culture and rituals are intended to be the manual for living out that holy calling, which Messiah Yeshua exemplified perfectly. Finding joy in who we were made to be enables us to emulate the Messiah more each day. 

Ashreinu School is an online academy of Hebrew language—the heartbeat of our holy texts, our prayers, and the everyday vernacular of those of us who have returned to our homeland. Our language is the key to unlocking many other aspects of our culture, history, and faith. As such, Hebrew literacy is a foundational right for child who is part of the Jewish community, and we intend to make that right readily available to any Jewish child or children who are part of the Messianic Jewish community. Together, let’s embrace the joy that G-d has woven into the very fabric of our happy heritage!

 https://student.flexge.com/v2/placement/sipidiomas

Na SIP English, acreditamos que aprender inglês deve ser leve, acessível e conectado à vida real. Nossa missão é oferecer aulas claras, práticas e envolventes — sem material físico, com o apoio da tecnologia e um toque humano em cada conversa.

Aqui, cada aluno aprende no seu ritmo, com respeito, transparência e propósito. Nossas aulas vão muito além do livro: falamos sobre Bitcoin, bebê reborn, o caso do metanol e tudo o que faz parte do mundo de verdade — porque é assim que o inglês se torna natural.

 O inglês que cabe na sua rotina.
Vem tomar um “sip” de inglês com a gente!

Name: Andy Cameron English
Description: Small and friendly academy with the same dedicated native teachers all year that specialises in exam preparation. Our flexible "drop in" timetable and "no class = no payment" system is unique in Zaragoza. YOU decide how much you want to spend. YOU decide when you want to come. Our excellent reputation and results are second to none.

Name: Bridge Beyond English
Description:
We help professionals in Japan connect with the changing world in English. 

This is done through using English to expand creative thinking, global awareness, and cross-cultural communication skills.

Having lived in six countries and worked across cultures and organizations for 15+ years, I (David Nagai) am passionate about helping people embrace diversity and creativity to imagine new possibilities. I've done this through NGO and private sectors, and of course through my current classes and seminars.

If you or your organization would like to foster deeper connection and creativity inside your organization and globally, I will be glad to serve you.

Main specializations: 

Cross-Cultural Communication | Group Facilitation | Critical Thinking | Conflict Management | Diversity & Inclusion | Gender Equality | Creative Thinking | Brainstorming & Problem Solving

Name: Nour Cortoba Academy معهد نور قرطبة
Description:
As a language learning establishment, we offer the possibility to learn a new language to people of any age/ background, either in one of our classrooms (to local learners) or online (learners from all over the world) with the possibility of studying individually (VIP classes) or within a group.
We have experienced, certified and regularly trained teachers who will see the students through their learning journey, using modern, out of the box methods.
Our ESP (English for Specific Purposes) courses will help professionals get exactly what they need for a better profile or greater career opportunities, in 
By providing quality  teaching, we can give university students and researchers the chance to have access to the large number of resources and papers that are published each year in English.
Our teachers prepare future immigrants and overseas students to pass the different language tests that they need for their applications.
We also support young students and help them go through their school year with methods and tips that will make their lives easier.

Name: Centrum Językowe Macarena's World
Description:
Centrum Językowe Macarena's World oferuje zajęcia indywidualne oraz grupowe z języka angielskiego i języka hiszpańskiego. 

 Realizujemy metody National Geographic Leerning oraz Colorin Colorado. 

 Uczymy w systemie stacjonarnie oraz online przystosowując się do Twoich potrzeb. 

 Prowadzimy kursy dla dzieci, młodzieży i dorosłych, w tym profesjonalne kursy dla firm uwzględniające słownictwo branżowe. 

 Przeprowadzamy rozmowy kwalifikacyjne z potencjalnymi kandydatami na stanowiska wymagające znajomości języków obcych.

Skontaktuj się z nami aby otrzymać spersonalizowaną ofertę dla Ciebie i Twojej firmy: biuro@macarenasworld.pl

Name: Expedition Deutsch
Description:
WE ARE ... a team of enthusiastic and experienced teachers who worked for the Goethe Institute for many years.
WE OFFER ... high-quality language courses, with a focus on your individual needs, and a pleasant and safe learning environment.

OUR GERMAN COURSES
Immerse yourself in the world of German language learning with our comprehensive range of courses designed to improve your language skills and achieve your goals.

- Our courses cover all levels of proficiency A1, A2, B1, B2, C1 and C2 of the CEFRL which is the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages. For further information: https://www.coe.int/en/web/common-european-framework-reference-languages/level-descriptions

- We offer business German courses and individual tailor-made courses, as well. Request a quote by email: info@expeditiondeutsch.nl

Name: Kreis 6 English
Description:
Kreis 6 English is a small, professional language school based in Zurich with a vision of making language learning easy and engaging for all. 

We do this by putting questions at the heart of learning, stimulating curiosity and ultimately giving students the research skills they need to be successful.

We believe that learning should be open to all so our website includes simple explanations, quick tips and links to useful resources to help language learners all over the world.

Our students are mostly from the Zurich area and come to in-person classes or learn online.  All of our classes are aimed at developing the confidence of our students, young or old. In particular, we specialise in Cambridge exam-preparation courses, conversation classes and business English.

Name: Ankipedia
Description:
Ankipedia provides free courses to help learn Dutch from your own language (English, Arabic, Turkish, Tigrinya currently supported). 

The foundation is a vocabulary booster with the 2000 most used words. This is available for the popular memorisation app Anki. (Ankidroid in Android). 

There is also an email course on https://subscribepage.io/VDUFkk

Name: Deutsch Coaching
Description:
Learn German that pushes you ahead in your life!

There is only one official language in Germany, that's German. To be successful and be included, one needs to learn German and master it. The faster you become comfortable with it, the faster you'll be integrated.

We pride ourselves in helping our students achieve real German-speaking skills. Our students see a fast and noticeable impact on their career growth and positive change in their personal interactions with the natives.

Name: Lengi
Description: We help people to keep learning foreign languages by making the process of learning interesting and engaging.

Name: Number One Gutierrez
Description:
𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐬 𝐮𝐦𝐚 𝐞𝐬𝐜𝐨𝐥𝐚 𝐝𝐞 𝐢𝐝𝐢𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐚 𝐧𝐚 𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐜̧𝐚̃𝐨 𝐚𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞̂𝐦𝐢𝐜𝐚 𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥.

A Number One Gutierrez oferece cursos de Inglês e Espanhol para crianças, adolescentes e adultos, com uma metodologia prática, dinâmica e alinhada às exigências do mercado atual.

 Inglês para carreira e negócios
 Inglês acadêmico e preparatório
 Comunicação real para o dia a dia e viagens

Acreditamos que mudam os cargos, mudam os planos — mas o inglês continua abrindo caminhos.
Por isso, nosso foco é desenvolver alunos confiantes, capazes de se comunicar com clareza e segurança em diferentes contextos pessoais e profissionais.

 Também atuamos com parcerias educacionais e empresariais, oferecendo soluções personalizadas para escolas, empresas e instituições que valorizam o desenvolvimento linguístico como diferencial competitivo.

 Unidade Gutierrez – Belo Horizonte
 Entre em contato e descubra como o idioma pode abrir novos caminhos para você ou sua organização.

Name: Academias A Plus Idiomas
Description:
Clases de inglés para todas las edades y todos los niveles en Almendralejo. 
Impartimos clases en empresas y tenemos amplia experiencia en clases tanto presenciales como online. 
Trabajamos con grupos reducidos, porque creemos que una atención personalizada repercute en una mejora de la calidad de la enseñanza y una mayor eficacia en el aprendizaje de idiomas.
Contamos con docentes profesionales con amplia experiencia en el sector.

Name: The City School of English
Description:
The City School of English is a small, independent language centre in northern Italy, offering a community-focused environment for learning English. Each school has one or two classrooms, enabling teachers to tailor lessons to individual goals.

All teachers hold a Cambridge CELTA, a globally recognised qualification ensuring the highest standards in English teaching. The school combines these trained instructors with practical methods to help local residents and seasonal workers gain confidence in professional, hospitality, and everyday contexts.

Name: Inglês Oxford Pampulha
Description: Inglês Oxford Pampulha is a company based out of Av Coronel José Dias Bicalho 303, Belo Horizonte, Mg, Brazil.

Name: IELTS Samples Language Academy
Description:
Initially founded in 2017 to provide IELTS candidates with reliable speaking and writing model answers, IELTS Samples Language Academy is now an educational platform seeking to offer quality services to English learners.
Under the direction of Dr. Moghadasi, our school now upgrades your English proficiency and test-taking skills in the fastest route possible through either  online or regular face-to-face courses, at your request.
We pride ourselves on the highest rate of graduates with IELTS 7-Bands sore or higher. 
Our policy dictates that our class seats never exceed 9 to ensure quality learning takes place in a class with optimum number of learners.

IELTS Samples is underpinned by 3 core principles:

1. Proficiency: Apart from focusing on teaching methodology, we also put a premium on the proficiency of the trainers, making sure that they all have sat the exam themselves and have a C2 proficiency level.

2. Quality: We have always adhered to the principles of high quality assessment, an example of which is our small-sized classes.

3. Output: IELTS Samples has adopted an output-oriented approach to help students achieve their desired scores in the shortest span of time, the proof of which is clearly evident in our Hall of Fame.

Name: Central Language Improvement
Description: An organization dedicated to learning foreign languages, with a primary focus on English. The organization aims to enhance language proficiency through interactive classes, workshops, and cultural exchange activities, providing members with opportunities to practice and improve their language skills in a supportive environment.

Name: Imtiyaz El Djazaïr
Description: School of English with native teachers and IELTS exam center agreed by the British Council.

Name: Med Mundo Afora
Description:
Med Mundo a Fora é uma Escola de Idiomas fundada por Luana Moury Fernandes Sanchez.

Luana é Médica em NYC e professora de inglês há mais de 8 anos! 

Atualmente, através do Medical English ajuda médicos e estudantes de medicina a conquistarem todas as oportunidades que a Medicina pode oferecer e dar o primeiro passo para se destacar em qualquer lugar do mundo.

Name: Wave on
Description:
Na Wave, estamos redefinindo a experiência de aprendizado de idiomas. Iniciamos como um curso online em 2019, e desde então, temos auxiliado milhares de alunos a desbloquearem seu potencial linguístico.

Nosso compromisso é ir além das fronteiras convencionais do ensino de idiomas. Somos mais do que uma escola; somos um hub de inovação e diversidade. Com aulas 100% online, interativas e práticas, simplificamos o processo de aprendizado.

Na Wave, valorizamos a individualidade de cada aluno. Nossa abordagem descomplicada e focada na inovação destaca-se em um mundo conectado. Estamos em constante crescimento e à procura de mentes inspiradoras para se juntarem à nossa jornada.

Se você busca desafios, inovação e faz parte de algo além de uma escola de idiomas, venha se juntar a nós na Wave. Vamos criar juntos ondas de transformação e fluência!
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Kaiser Language Project Inc.
Description:
Since Kaiser Language Project Inc. opened its doors in 2018, learning a language has been more than just studying it. It means discovering the culture of different realities in a world where understanding diversity is increasingly essential. We offer the possibility of learning a foreign language in person or remotely. In addition, we offer flexibility, be it in a group or private classes, to adapt to your availability and objectives. 

Expedite your career growth. ENROLL NOW!

Name: You Can Camp Italy
Description:
You Can Camp programs allow candidates to become camp counselors in Italy while living a great and very rewarding experience.
Thanks to your help, young Italian students will be able to improve their English level and get to know your culture.
Become a part of the local community and have the chance to create an incredible bond with the kids and teens taking part in the program.
You will have the possibility of meeting other tutors from around the world, who share your same desire to discover the Italian culture and travel around Europe or Italy after the program.

Name: Centre linguistique Babylone
Description:
Une équipe soudée de professeurs diplômés natifs et compétents vous propose des cours de langues adaptés à votre niveau, personnalisés et ludiques pour faciliter l'apprentissage d'une langue étrangère:
Allemand - Anglais - Arabe - Espagnol - Français (FLE) - Polonais - Russe

Name: The Smart Method
Description:
Aprende idiomas con metodologías eficientes e innovadoras, que se adapten al perfil del estudiante o del grupo. 
Podrás visualizar tu progreso de estudiante con nuestro medidor de aprendizaje!

Name: K-talk Korean Learning Center
Description: We are a Korean school located in the heart of Long Island City, Queens, New York. We are dedicated to providing a modern and immersive Korean language program for students of all ages and levels. We believe that language learning should be fun and unique. We offer both group and private learning sessions

Name: Nova Linguae
Description: Escuela de idiomas Bilbao, Casco Viejo. Ingles, Español, Francés y Alemán. Idiomas para niños, adolescentes y adultos. Aprende de una forma divertida y amena. Comunicación y soltura. Preparación de los exámenes oficiales. Aptis, Cambridge, Trinity, Escuela de idiomas, Goethe, Delf y Dalf, Dele. Idiomas para viajes y trabajo. Extraescolares y idiomas para empresas. Suéltate por fin! Método propio.

Name: Uptime Caxias do Sul - Comunicação em Inglês
Description:
UPTIME - Comunicação em Inglês revolucionou o mercado brasileiro por meio de sua metodologia inovadora e de seus diferenciais únicos.

Desde a sua fundação, em 2001, a empresa se tornou sinônimo de inovação no ensino do idioma inglês, e é considerada a marca mais premiada da década. Com um modelo de incentivo ao empreendedorismo (franchising) e à formação de líderes, a franqueadora possui altos índices de satisfação e crescimento.

A UPTIME pertence ao UPTIME Group, grupo composto por nove empresas que verticalizaram suas operações. É uma estrutura organizacional arrojada e verticalizada, que proporciona resultados expressivos para a marca.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Learning English 365
Description: We offer online English language courses, taught live by our expert teachers to help you read, write and speak English fluently.

Name: Beaverton Literacy Council
Description:
Beaverton Literacy Council (BLC) is a community-based, all-volunteer organization. 

It began in the 1960's with four volunteers who tutored students one-on-one. In 1984, small group tutoring was started at the old Beaverton Library. Today, BLC has over 80 volunteers teaching English to over 350 students from more than 25 nations. Classes take place online (and hopefully soon in locations around Beaverton).

Mission
To empower and support adult learners by teaching English and building community. 

Vision
For learners to have the confidence and skills to participate fully in their communities. 

Core Values
We believe in:
Focusing on what students want and need 
Building community 
Empowering students to be confident and independent
Enabling fair access and outcomes   
Supporting volunteers and students as lifelong learners 
Interacting with honesty, empathy, and respect 
Teaching and learning with enthusiasm and joy

Name: Centrum Językowo Szkoleniowe Na Językach
Description:
Centrum Językowo-Szkoleniowe „Na językach” różni się od innych szkół językowych.

 Trenujemy w praktyce! 
 Nauka odbywa się w sposób naturalny, niewymuszony tak jakby „przy okazji”. 
 Posiadamy dedykowane szkolenia dla firm (General English/Business English/ Legal English/IT English). 
Są to kursy autorskie, skrojone na miarę potrzeb różnych branż.
 Prowadzone są przez native speakerów posiadających doświadczenie biznesowe, jak również lektorów polskojęzycznych – w zależności od potrzeb naszych Klientów.

Name: The True Language Learning
Description: The True Language Learning se basa en que para aprender idiomas, el mejor profesor eres tú.

Name: SKILLS CENTRO DE IDIOMAS
Description:
SKILLS es un centro de idiomas ubicado en Castellón de la Plana con cuatro décadas de experiencia en la impartición de clases de inglés para todos los niveles, que comenzó su andadura en el año 1984.

En SKILLS siempre nos hemos centrado en mejorar el nivel de inglés de nuestros alumnos y proveerles con una certificación que avalase dicho nivel. Con este objetivo, SKILLS apostó desde sus inicios por los exámenes oficiales de Cambridge (YLE, KET, PET, FCE, CAE y CPE) lo que nos ha llevado en la actualidad a ser el Centro Oficial Cambridge para la provincia de Castellón, elevando así a la máxima calidad todos nuestros servicios en materia de estudio y preparación de estos exámenes.

Name: Falar Brasileiro - Português para Estrangeiros
Description: Aulas de Português brasileiro para estrangeiros.

Name: 4 IDIOMAS PARA TI
Description:
Bienvenus à 4IPT, un univers crée par Paula Bolado Lera dans lequel vous trouverez :
ÉCOLE DE LANGUES (Espagnol ELE, Français FLE, Anglais et Italien).
AVS & AESH + Soutien Scolaire et Aide aux Devoirs.
EXPERIENCES LINGUISTIQUES (Voyages, Retraites, Ateliers)
INTERPRETATION & TRADUCTION

Name: Raum für Sprache
Description:
Sprachkurse &
Kommunikationsunterricht

Unser Angebot beinhaltet Sprachkurse, sowie Kommunikationsunterricht auf allen Niveaus (A1-C1), in den Sprachen Deutsch, Spanisch, Italienisch und Englisch. Je nach Wunsch finden die Kurseinheiten als Einzel- oder Gruppenunterricht statt, dabei sind diese flexibel vereinbar.

Prüfungsvorbereitung &
Spezielle Lerntrainings

Es steht eine wichtige Prüfung an?
Entdecke mit uns, wie schnell und einfach du durch die richtige Lernmethode deine Ziele erreichen kannst. Für Prüfungsvorbereitung bieten wir Intensivkurse an, mit Fokus auf spezielle Lerninhalte. Die von uns individuell gestalteten Lerntrainings werden persönlich auf dich zugeschnitten und bereiten dich auf angestrebte Fachinhalte vor.

Förderunterricht &
Hausaufgabenhilfe

Mit personalisierten Lernkonzepten begeistern wir auch Kinder für Sprache und Kultur und bieten Hilfe in den Fächern: Englisch, Deutsch und Spanisch an.

Übersetzungsservice

Unser Service umfasst qualifizierte Übersetzungsdienstleistungen in und aus den oben genannten Sprachen durch erfahrene, professionelle Muttersprachler.

Name: BuzyBeeTeaching International
Description:
Welcome to BuzyBeeTeaching International – where language learning leaps into the future. Finally, a revolution in language education that's tailored, engaging, and as unique as you are. Say goodbye to traditional methods; say hello to a language adventure designed just for you!

At BuzyBeeTeaching International, we're on a mission to break free from the mundane. Language learning should be more than textbooks and rigid structures; it should be an exploration, an immersion, and an exhilarating journey.


Themed Learning Unleashed
Explore our themed lessons, from Mini Therapy sessions to Business English Mastery – because learning should be as diverse as life itself.

Flexibility Beyond Limits
Choose from 4, 8, or 12 lessons per month, giving you the freedom to learn at your pace, on your terms.

What Sets Us A Buzz Above

Engagement Redefined
Every session is a conversation, an experience that's immersive, enjoyable, and far from the ordinary.

Empowerment at its Core
Beyond language skills, we empower you – building confidence, encouraging self-expression, and unlocking your linguistic potential.

Flexibility as Standard
Personalized courses and flexible packages adapt to your unique learning style, pace, and preferences.

Inclusivity Personified
A space for every learner, embracing diversity, fostering a supportive community, and redefining what it means to learn together.

Embark on Your Language Revolution
Join BuzyBeeTeaching International and break free from the language-learning norm. Your fluency, your way – because the future of language education is buzzing!

Name: Nedjma School
Description: Établissement dédié à l'enseignement des langues, à la préparation des tests internationaux et au coaching en informatique. Nous développons les compétences à travers des ateliers de prise de parole en public et des formations en soroban japonais (calcul mental). Nous organisons également des événements scientifiques et économiques, tels que des conférences et des compétitions sportives. Rejoignez-nous pour un apprentissage et un développement multidimensionnels !

Name: Asia's English
Description:
Asia's English offers 
*mindfulness workshops, 
*experiential and development English courses for women, 
*individual lessons with language coaching elements
*one-time consulations for job intervew preparations and business meetings. 

Schedule a free 30 minute call with me: asia@asiasenglish.cz or czech my availability on calendly at www.asiasenglish.cz

I am a passionate English teacher, traveler, HR specialist, a language and mindfulness coach. I believe that foreign languages are not only a gateway to the outside world but also a tool for self-discovery. I also believe that learning languages should be fun and in my lessons I motivate my students to look for their own ways of exploring the world of English. We experience activities in English, share inspiring and interesting content, learn and develop together. Read more about who I am: https://asiasenglish.cz/o-mne/

I have 15 years of professional experience in the HR field as a specialist and consultant, a masters degree and years of experience in English language aquisition, complete MBSR (Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction) and Roční Akademě Mindfulness certifications.

Name: Here2Grow Int. School
Description: Here2Grow School Great Place to Grow

Name: Actenglish Academy
Description: Somos una academia de inglés, para niños de entre 1 y 16 años, con una metodología propia basada en la interpretación como herramienta de aprendizaje, teniendo en cuenta las etapas para aprender una lengua de forma natural: escuchar, hablar, leer y por último, escribir.

Name: Nerd Speak Academy
Description:
Na Nerd Speak Academy, você aprende inglês de forma divertida, com aulas de conversação que abordam temas atuais, curiosos e relevantes para o mundo moderno. Aqui, o aprendizado é leve, dinâmico e conectado ao seu dia a dia.
Com aulas particulares ou em grupo, com foco em fluência para você ou sua empresa

Name: LingoSuccess Language Academy
Description:
Discover a practical and engaging way to master the French language. Our online French classes focus on real conversations rather than grammar drills, so you build the confidence to speak naturally. Whether your goal is to succeed in the professional exams for immigrating to Canada, prepare for masters in France, pursue career opportunities overseas or just want to discover the language, we guide you step by step in your French journey.

At LingoSuccess, we know learning French can feel overwhelming. So we make it simple. We don’t just throw rules at you, we help you talk and understand real French. You will learn step-by-step until you can speak with confidence.

How we support your journey?

Our way of teaching is all about helping you actually use what you learn. You will be solving curated exercises for the relevant topic covered along with personalised notes.

Name: English Globe
Description: Inglês para falar, interagir e entender o mundo.

Name: Deed Language
Description: We are a leading language learning institution dedicated to empowering ambitious learners with the tools to master the English language.  Our innovative approach combines comprehensive content, AI-powered resources, and personalized feedback to elevate your English proficiency.  Join our vibrant community of language enthusiasts and unlock a world of opportunities. Whether you're preparing for exams, immigration, or simply want to enhance your communication skills, we've got you covered.  Let's embark on this exciting language journey together! #EnglishAcademy #LanguageLearning #IELTS #TOEFL"

Name: The Arabic Moallema
Description:
The Arabic Moallema has been serving it’s students from 2019. You can learn Arabic very well from wherever you are, at a very affordable price. Once all the courses are completed, you will get your Arabic Diploma Certification.
In our online courses, we combine classical teaching methods with updated modern education techniques and technology while ensuring the use of effective and up to date resources necessary for language learning. We aim to lead the way in language teaching by providing services to a diverse audience from children to all ages around the world.

Name: Triangular Idiomas
Description: Ensino on-line de Inglês e Português para adultos Surdos e Ouvintes.

Name: The Concepts
Description: The Concepts is one of the best coaching institutes offering comprehensive training programs for IELTS, English speaking, French, Personality Development, and Interview Preparation.

Name: Nova Dil Okulları | IELTS | TOEFL | TOEIC | OET | Proficiency etc. | Official Exam Prep Center
Description:
Nova Dil Okulları yabancı dil eğitimindeki yarım asra yaklaşan tecrübesini modern eğitim metotlarıyla birleştirerek 2016 yılından itibaren Türkiye'de dünya standartlarına uygun yabancı dil hizmeti vermeye başlamıştır. 

Türkiye'de İzmir ve Bursa şehirlerinde yerinde hizmet veren firmamız aynı zamanda Londra'daki genel merkez ofisi ile online eğitim ve yurtdışı danışmanlığı hizmetleri sunmaktadır.

Bünyemizde bulunan Nova Kurumsal ekibimiz, çeşitli sektörlerde bulunan firmalar ve sivil toplum örgütlerine profesyonel yabancı dil çözümleri sağlamaktadır. Dil Becerileri Değerlendirme modülümüz sayesinde firmaların işe alım süreçlerinin yönetilmesi, adayların yabancı dil sınavlarının raporlanarak firmaya gönderilmesi başta olmak üzere bunu yanı sıra kurum içi, online ve hibrit kurumsal eğitim çözümlerimiz bulunmaktadır.

HİZMETLERİMİZ
-Genel Dil Eğitimleri (İngilizce, Almanca, Felemenkçe, İspanyolca, Fransızca, İtalyanca)
-Sınav Hazırlık Eğitimleri (IELTS, TOEFL, TOEIC, TOLES, OET, PTE, YDS, YÖKDİL, Almanca Sertifika Sınavları, TestDaF, ÖSD)
-Kurumsal Eğitimler
-Değerlendirme İşlemleri (Sınav ve Sertifikasyon)
-Çocuk Grupları
-Online Eğitimler
-Yurtdışı Danışmanlık

Name: Academia de las Lenguas Mayas de Guatemala
Description: ALMG es la máxima entidad rectora para la promoción y desarrollo de las lenguas mayas en el país, y como tal podrá darse sus propias autoridades, ejercer por medio de ellas la administración de sus intereses, y emitir sus reglamentos, resoluciones, acuerdos y demás disposiciones sobre la materia de su competencia.

Name: English Warrior
Description: Az English Warrior egy dinamikus digitális oktatási platform, amely az angol nyelv elsajátítását helyezi középpontba. Különleges módszereivel és interaktív eszközeivel hatékonyan segíti a tanulókat abban, hogy magabiztosan használják az angolt a mindennapi és szakmai életben egyaránt.

Name: Ardevaz School of Language
Description: Cours de français de débutant à avancé.

Name: Partout Languages
Description:
Partout Languages is a unique language school offering courses for clients expecting the highest quality of service. We specialize in an individual approach to learning, tailored to the needs and goals of each student. Our offer is aimed at various groups, including businesses, children, and medical professionals, with an emphasis on long-term educational effects and advanced teaching methods.

Distinctive Features:

Premium Quality: We offer language courses at the highest level, focusing on quality and efficiency in learning.
Individual Approach: Each course is carefully tailored to the individual needs of the student.
Proprietary Educational Materials: We have our own teaching materials that are continuously updated.

Name: SPRACHLINGUA
Description:
Sprachlingua is a revolutionary foreign language school that takes a unique approach to language learning. Unlike traditional methods that rely heavily on textbooks and memorization, Sprachlingua embraces an algorithmic approach to teaching languages.

At Sprachlingua, students immerse themselves in the language from day one, engaging in interactive activities and real-life scenarios designed to simulate authentic language use. The curriculum is carefully crafted to build upon each student's individual learning pace and preferences, ensuring a customized and effective learning experience.

One of the key principles of Sprachlingua is the absence of textbooks. Instead, students learn through dynamic multimedia resources, including audio recordings, videos, and interactive software. This approach allows for a more immersive and engaging learning environment, where students can develop their listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills simultaneously.

The classroom setting at Sprachlingua is vibrant and collaborative, with instructors serving as facilitators rather than lecturers. Students are encouraged to actively participate in discussions, role-plays, and group activities, fostering a sense of community and mutual support.

Another distinctive feature of Sprachlingua is its emphasis on real-world application. Rather than focusing solely on grammar rules and vocabulary lists, students learn how to use the language in practical situations, such as ordering food in a restaurant, navigating public transportation, or engaging in conversations with native speakers.

Sprachlingua offers a wide range of language courses including German, Spanish, Chinese, French, Dutch, Swedish, Italian and Japanese. catering to learners of all levels and backgrounds. Whether you're a complete beginner or an advanced speaker looking to refine your skills, there's a course suited to your needs.

The Academy focuses primarily on the English language, offering a variety of courses the teaching methodologies for which have been developed through years of experience teaching students in international companies, universities in Ukraine, and abroad.

Name: Learning Spanish Academy
Description:
Learning Spanish Academy is an online platform designed to help intermediate learners (B1 and above) improve their Spanish through passive listening, real conversations, and practical content that fits naturally into a busy daily routine.

 On our YouTube channel, you’ll find long passive-listening audios, real-life stories, natural conversations, guided reading, and listening practice created to help Spanish “sink in” effortlessly — while you work, drive, cook, or go about your day. No pressure, no complicated exercises: just real, useful, and consistent exposure.

 Our approach combines:
 Authentic conversations between native speakers
 Real-life topics for everyday and professional contexts
 Natural rhythms of real spoken Spanish
 Grammar applied to real situations
 Stress-free listening training

 Our content is created for learners who feel that textbook Spanish doesn’t reflect real life — and who want to hear how Spanish is truly spoken to gain confidence, fluency, and natural expression.

 We also offer:
 Self-paced online courses
 Interactive grammar guides
 Educational podcasts
 Exclusive members-only materials

 Vivian Ayala, founder of Learning Spanish Academy, is a certified Spanish teacher (ELE) and digital creator. Her mission is to make learning Spanish lighter, more practical, and more accessible through real listening and comprehensible input.

 Our community includes learners from the United States, Spain, Brazil, the United Kingdom, Germany, and many more — all with the same goal: to understand and speak Spanish with clarity, confidence, and ease.

 If you want to strengthen your listening skills, improve your comprehension, and progress without stress, you’re in the right place. Welcome to Learning Spanish Academy — where learning feels easier, more real, and more human.

Name: Jasmine Verges - Deine Englischlovestory
Description:
,,Wenn Freunde oder Kolleg*innen mir beim Englischsprechen zuhören, geht gar nichts mehr. Ich traue mich einfach nicht, zu sprechen.”

Sätze wie diese habe ich oft gehört, und sie machen was mit mir. Nicht nur, weil ich Englischlehrerin bin. Vielmehr, weil ich weiß, dass die englische Sprache Türen öffnen kann - zu neuen Freiheiten und zu (lang ersehnten), ganz persönlichen Lebensträumen!

Aber was, wenn man bis jetzt keinen guten Draht zu Englisch hat und die Sprache einen im Alltag noch gar nicht wirklich begleitet?
 
Um das zu ändern, schaffen wir bei "Deine Englischlovestory" die, meiner Meinung nach, absolute BASIS für das gute Gefühl beim Englischsprechen: 

Begeisterung für die Sprache - eine gute Beziehung zu Englisch! 

Dazu habe ich meine eigene Methode entwickelt, die meine erwachsenen Teilnehmenden dabei unterstützt, im ersten Schritt einen guten Zugang zur Sprache zu gewinnen - um sie dann im zweiten Schritt mit besserem Gefühl zu sprechen. 

In meinem 8-wöchigen Kurs "Deine Englischlovestory: Das Englisch-Wohlfühlpaket" starten die Teilnehmer*innen ihre eigene Englischlovestory und werden dabei begleitet, mit lockeren Übungen von Woche zu Woche mehr Sicherheit beim Englischprechen zu gewinnen! 

Das Englischcoaching ist im Einzelcoaching oder in einer kleinen Gruppe möglich. Für Unternehmen werden von mir auch individuelle Workshops angeboten.

Hier ein tolles, begeistertes Kundenfeedback: 
"Ich durfte schon dabei sein und kann es allen nur ganz doll empfehlen, die Hemmungen haben, Englisch zu sprechen oder schlechte Erfahrungen mit Englisch gemacht haben. Es lohnt sich. Name: People-Places-Things
Description:
People-Places-Things (P-P-T) began in 2008, with a vision of community building through language and culture.

At first we were mainly interested in teaching English to immigrants and refugees. And at first, grammar was the focus of our instruction. We worked very hard to try to create relevant, real-world activities for grammar practice. But we kept getting frustrated that our grammar activities wouldn’t fit neatly into the real world.

So we turned our focus to real-world themes. We had a pilot class in an industrial kitchen and learned some crucial lessons about situating language learning in a real-world setting:

The language that seems important is not always the language that is important
The real world contains a lot of communicative ambiguity
The difficulty of real-world tasks doesn’t match the difficulty of the language structures used to describe them
Learners are highly engaged if the learning environment is relevant to their needs
The real world is a multilevel environment – anyone can participate, and people work together to achieve goals
Spending time with people is crucial to language learning - language is a social skill
Every culture has different expectations about learning and those differences do not always fit together

One of the main reasons why people take so long to learn a language is they are often practicing unreal language, in unreal locations, in an unreal way. So instead of trying to simplify the real world to make it fit our language teaching approach, we began to use real-world artifacts and settings to practice the relevant communication.

We went from trying to explain grammar through cultural examples; to exploring culture through language practice.

The skills sets that we developed are Intercultural Communication and Cultural Navigation, which encompasses code switching, lived experience, empathy and a desire to connect across difference.

U Nas:
- przygotujemy Twoje dziecko do egzaminu ósmoklasisty czy do matury (na każdym poziomie),
- przygotujemy Cię do zdania certyfikatu językowego,
- zaczniesz w końcu mówić po angielsku,
- nauczysz się podstaw języka hiszpańskiego,
- masz do wyboru dwie lokalizacje zajęć stacjonarnych (Cieszanów albo Lubaczów) bądź opcję wybrania zajęć on-line.

Jeśli:
- masz słomiany zapał, który minie po pierwszych zajęciach,
- oczekujesz cudów w rodzaju płynnej komunikacji po tygodniu,
- wiesz, że nie będziesz się przygotowywał do zajęć,
NIE PISZ DO NAS! Na rynku funkcjonuje wiele podobnych firm, które przyjmą Cię z otwartymi ramionami. "Progress" do nich nie należy.

Αυτό που μας ξεχωρίζει είναι η διαδραστική μέθοδος διδασκαλίας που κρατά τους μαθητές ενεργούς και εμπνευσμένους σε κάθε μάθημα. Επιπλέον, το συγκριτικό μας πλεονέκτημα είναι ότι πετυχαίνουμε την απόκτηση πτυχίων σε σύντομο χρονικό διάστημα, δίνοντας στους μαθητές μας το προβάδισμα που χρειάζονται.

Με εμπειρία σχεδόν μιας δεκαετίας και δέσμευση για συνεχή εξέλιξη, στο Language Academy προσφέρουμε ένα περιβάλλον όπου οι μαθητές όχι μόνο μαθαίνουν αγγλικά αλλά χτίζουν και τη βάση για ένα καλύτερο μέλλον.

 Επικοινωνήστε μαζί μας και ανακαλύψτε πώς μπορούμε να σας βοηθήσουμε να πετύχετε!

Name: CI platform Europe
Description:
Welcome to CI Platform Europe! 
Are you a language educator, passionate about natural language acquisition? Welcome to your European home for all things Comprehensible Input (CI)! We believe that language is acquired, not just learned, and we are here to support you in bringing that magic to your classroom.

Our Community
Join a vibrant and growing community of innovative teachers from across Europe. Whether you are a seasoned CI practitioner or just starting your journey with TPRS, MovieTalk, or Story-Listening, you’ll find a supportive network of peers ready to share their passion and experiences.

What We Offer:
* Dynamic Exchange of Information: We facilitate the constant exchange of information regarding the latest research, pedagogical breakthroughs, and classroom-proven strategies to make your lessons more compelling and effective.
* Inspiring Resources: Discover a curated collection of products, from leveled readers and visual aids to ready-to-use lesson plans designed to provide high-quality input for your students.
* Professional Growth: Participate in interactive workshops, webinars, and regional meetups focused on refining your CI techniques in a low-stress, collaborative environment.
* Collaborative Innovation: Be part of a movement that is reshaping language education in Europe by prioritizing meaning over memorization.

Let’s transform language learning together. Connect with our community, dive into the exchange of information, and empower your students to acquire language naturally!
#ComprehensibleInput #LanguageTeaching #CIEurope #NaturalAcquisition #TeacherCommunity #CIplatform #CIplatformEurope

Our commitment to detail and individualized instruction has won the hearts of countless students, evident in the glowing reviews from our clients and their trust in our expertise.
