Our service offering is extensive, encompassing Polish language instruction, advisory services, certified translations, and legal consultations. We are a registered training institution, authorized to provide courses with visa support. Our dedicated team of instructors is both empathetic and professional, fluent in various foreign languages including English, Ukrainian, Russian, French, and Chinese. We prepare our students for state exams, the Polish Charter, Residence Card exams, and job interviews. Challenges are opportunities for growth, and we embrace them with enthusiasm. With a wealth of experience working with European and local businesses, we also provide corporate training and customized solutions for teams.

Our approach to teaching the Polish language is modern and practical, with a focus on real-world proficiency. If you're considering learning or improving your Polish language skills, we invite you to connect with us and explore the possibilities of collaboration.

Let's embark on a language learning journey together at Global School.

Follow us on INSTAGRAM: @GLOBAL.SCHOOL.POLSKA

Name: CCAA Barueri
Description:
Somos uma das maiores redes de ensino de idiomas do país, com mais de 60 anos de atuação no mercado. Contamos hoje com mais de 700 franquias, no Brasil e no exterior.
Com uma metodologia exclusiva de ensino criada por nosso fundador Waldyr Lima e aperfeiçoada constantemente até os dias de hoje, o CCAA foi pioneiro em diversos momentos de inovação e tecnologia na educação no Brasil.
O CCAA foi a primeira escola de idiomas a implementar o uso de
computadores em aula, antes mesmo da popularização da internet.
O pioneirismo do CCAA no campo da tecnologia é tão grande que em 2000, nosso site foi eleito um dos cinco melhores sites educacionais pelo Ibest, o único entre os cursos de idiomas.
Por conta da nossa metodologia de ensino ímpar, desde 2016 nossos alunos são os que obtêm a melhor média no TOEFLITP no Brasil.
Recentemente o CCAA alcançou o primeiro lugar no segmento escolas de idiomas como, a marca mais admirada entre os cariocas, na pesquisa Marcas Cariocas do jornal O Globo.
Mesmo com todas as dificuldades apresentadas durante a pandemia o CCAA buscou entregar as melhores condições para seus alunos, priorizando sempre sua segurança, com isso em mente, de forma inovadora o CCAA passou a contar com o modelo de aulas híbridas, em que o aluno decide, a cada aula em qual ambiente é mais conveniente aprender, seja em casa, no trabalho ou em uma unidade CCAA. A resposta dos alunos foi tão positiva que a solução passou a ser parte do
modelo.

Name: Interação School
Description:
Interação School: Uma Proposta Diferenciada de Ensino de Inglês

A Interação School foi idealizada e fundada em 2006 partindo de um pressuposto simples e poderoso: ensinar cada habilidade linguística de forma específica, usando materiais autênticos (filmes, seriados, jornais, textos literários) para criar experiências reais de aprendizagem.

Nossa missão é, através de um ambiente acolhedor, formar cidadãos do mundo com competência linguística, compreensão cultural e tolerância.

Como fazemos isso? Com uma proposta pedagógica que prima por:

Turmas reduzidas e número limitado de alunos por sala.

Material próprio, constantemente atualizado e adequado ao ritmo de cada grupo.

Professores com formação acadêmica e competência linguística sólida.

Valorização de um ambiente escolar onde o aluno se sente acolhido e motivado.

Atividades extracurriculares que levam o inglês para além da sala de aula, incluindo nosso programa oficial de intercâmbio de estudos no Canadá, acompanhado de perto por nossa diretoria.

Nosso material didático é desenvolvido para ultrapassar a artificialidade dos livros tradicionais. Trabalhamos com unidades temáticas baseadas na cultura real, tornando a aprendizagem significativa e preparando os alunos para interagir com confiança no cenário internacional.

A Interação School se construiu com a participação de todos que se encantaram com esta proposta. Aqui, o aluno é parte integrante do processo, em um clima de valorização do indivíduo e de constante interação social.

Name: Novista English
Description:
Novista English olarak, eğitim politikamızı kişiye özel öğrenme deneyimleri üzerine odaklanarak şekillendiriyoruz.
 Genel İngilizce, sınav İngilizcesi, mülakat İngilizcesi, iş İngilizcesi ve diğer alanlarda özelleştirilmiş eğitim programlarıyla, öğrencilerimizi IELTS, TOEFL, PTE, iTEP, YDS ve YÖKDİL gibi sınavlara hazırlıyoruz. Öğretmenlerimiz, İngilizce Öğretmenliği mezunu ve uluslararası sertifikalara sahip, deneyimli uzmanlardır.

Her öğrencinin benzersiz ihtiyaçlarına, yeteneklerine ve öğrenme stillerine uygun olarak tasarlanmış programlar sunuyoruz.
Biliyoruz ki her öğrenci farklı öğrenme stillerine ve dil becerilerine sahiptir. Ayrıca, kültürel farklılıklar, motivasyon seviyeleri ve öğrenme ortamları gibi faktörler de dil öğrenimini etkileyebilir. Bu farkındalıkla, her öğrencinin bireysel ihtiyaçlarını anlamak ve onlara uygun öğrenme ortamları ve materyaller sunmak için çaba gösteriyoruz.

Öğrencilerimize kur programı yerine daha esnek olan ders saati paketleri öneriyoruz.
Böylece, her öğrencinin kendi hızında ve ihtiyaçlarına uygun bir şekilde ilerlemesini sağlıyoruz. Bu yaklaşım, öğrencilerimizin öğrenme potansiyelini en üst düzeye çıkarmak ve onları hedeflerine ulaştırmak için temel prensibimizdir.

Soy nativa rusa y llevo 10 años  dando clases de ruso como el idioma extranjero.

Me encanta compartir la cultura, historia y lenga rusa con mis alumnos.

He trabajado en Alemania durante 1 año impartiendo clases de ruso. 
En el año 2023 me certifiqué en el nivel C2 de alemán. 
 He trabajado en México en Oaxaca, Tampico y Guanajuato impartiendo clases de inglés para niños y estudiantes, alemán para adultos, ruso para adultos. 
 En el año 2020 empecé con mi escuela en línea Idiomas con Anastasiia

Te invito a conocer el idioma ruso y la cultura rusa conmigo!

Con oltre quarant'anni di esperienza, è riconosciuta Cambridge International School per il suo progetto formativo ad indirizzo linguistico che prepara gli studenti a diventare cittadini globali competenti e responsabili. La peculiarità dell'Istituto è l'apprendimento precoce della lingua inglese, curato fin dalla più tenera età, in un ambiente sicuro e stimolante per lo sviluppo dei bambini.

Name: Linguaviva in Monferrato

Whether you start as an absolute beginner or you wish to improve your Italian language skills, we offer engaging and personalised language lessons according to your specific needs and interests.

Name: EngLab Language Academy
Description:
EngLab Language Academy is an English school designed for professionals, entrepreneurs, and expats who want to speak confidently, connect globally, and grow personally and professionally.

We offer small-group and private lessons that focus on real-life communication, career-focused language skills, and speaking confidence. Lessons are available online, in person, or in-company. We offer the flexibility busy adults need.

Our approach blends modern teaching methods with a supportive, culturally aware learning environment. Whether you’re preparing for interviews, joining international meetings, or simply improving your everyday English, we help you find your voice and use it with impact.

What we offer:

- Tailored lessons
- Real-world communication
- Flexible delivery: online, in-person, or in-company
- Supportive, expert teachers

While we primarily serve adults, lessons for children and teenagers are also available upon request.

About the founder:
EngLab was founded by Merve, a certified English teacher and academic with over 5 years of experience. After completing two master's degrees and working with learners from diverse backgrounds, she created EngLab to provide meaningful, high-quality English education that supports personal and professional growth. As a woman-led business, EngLab values inclusive, flexible learning tailored to today’s global learners.

Let your English open doors. Join EngLab and grow your confidence today.

We are well aware that employee development is the key to the future of the company and its competitiveness in the international market. That is why our courses are:

Our clients' goals become our goals, and we make every effort to ensure that our training meets expectations and brings tangible results.

Name: TalkWise
Description:
TalkWise is an English language school and training partner based in Kraków. We deliver 1:1 tutoring, small-group courses, and in-company programs focused on fluency, pronunciation and practical outcomes. Beyond general and exam prep (Cambridge/IELTS/TOEIC), we coach high-stakes communication: investor roadshows, analyst/LP briefings, Q&A, and trade-show talks with deck tightening, demo scripting, booth flow and speaker coaching.
We also provide Language Quality Assurance for business decks (tone, clarity, data storytelling, decisive CTAs) and lead localization programs, terminology & style guides, LQA, CAT-assisted workflows, so your materials stay consistent across markets. 
Our teaching is evidence-based and continuously improved through current academic literature, so learners progress faster and teams communicate with impact.

Name: Alianza Francesa México
Description:
Con más de 135 años en México, la Alianza Francesa de  es un centro cultural franco-mexicano de enseñanza de la lengua francesa reconocido por el gobierno francés. Promueve la cultura de ambos países mediante un dinámico programa de actividades como: cine, teatro, conciertos, exposiciones, conferencias, festivales y más.
La Alianza Francesa es una institución presente en más de 138 países. En México se ha encargado desde 1948 de acercar a México y Francia a través de la difusión de la lengua y la cultura francesas en México y de un fuerte trabajo de promoción intercultural a través de sus 41 sucursales y 17 centros asociados.
En Morelia, somos la organización más completa para la difusión del idioma francés, a través de nuestro personal, instalaciones, cursos, talleres, clubes y eventos culturales, concursos y nexos internacionales, asesorías, certificaciones nacionales e internacionales.
El objetivo principal de esta carta, no es de ninguna manera aburrirte, sino explicarte de la manera más clara posible el funcionamiento y políticas de esta institución a fin de que te integres a nuestro equipo más fácilmente y estés al corriente de las oportunidades que tienes al pertenecer a la Alianza Francesa de Morelia.

Name: Tani Language Foundation
Description:
Welcome to the Lhoba Language Foundation! Established with a solemn commitment to cultural preservation, our organization stands at the forefront of safeguarding the Lhoba language, an intrinsic element of the rich heritage spanning regions including Medog, Lhunze, Mainling, Yunnan in China, and Arunachal, Assam in India. With a focus on the revitalization and promotion of this unique linguistic treasure, we tirelessly endeavor to ensure its perpetuation for generations to come.

Through collaborative efforts encompassing research, education, and community engagement, we aim to counteract the encroaching threat of language loss and foster a renewed appreciation for the Lhoba language's profound cultural significance. Our initiatives are designed to empower Lhoba-speaking communities, providing them with the resources and support needed to preserve their linguistic identity and heritage.

Join us in our noble endeavor to elevate the status of the Lhoba language, celebrating its distinctiveness and reinforcing its vital role in shaping cultural identity and cohesion. Let's embark on a journey of cultural preservation, where every word spoken in the Lhoba language serves as a testament to our collective commitment to honor and cherish our linguistic heritage.

Name: CONFLULANGUES
Description:
Le français n’est plus une barrière, c’est votre tremplin

Au cœur de notre histoire se trouve une conviction forte : apprendre la langue d’un pays, c’est bien plus qu’assimiler des mots – c’est s’ouvrir à un univers entier.
C’est cette idée qui guide notre mission : faire du français un levier de réussite pour celles et ceux qui souhaitent étudier, travailler ou s’installer durablement en France.

Notre vocation
Accompagner étudiants, professionnels, entreprises et institutions dans leurs projets francophones. Chaque parcours est unique, chaque objectif mérite un accompagnement sur-mesure.

Notre approche
 Analyse personnalisée des projets (études, emploi, installation)
 Formations qui vont au-delà de la langue : codes sociaux, démarches administratives, intégration culturelle
 Communauté bienveillante et ressources adaptées pour soutenir chaque étape
 Modules modulaires et flexibles selon le rythme et les objectifs de chacun

Nos services
 Préparation à l’installation et à la vie en France
 Modules spécialisés pour réussir ses études dans l’enseignement supérieur français
 Préparation aux certifications officielles (DELF/DALF, TCF)
 Accompagnement professionnel et formations en entreprise
 Cours de français général (FLE), ateliers pratiques (oral, écrit, communication professionnelle)

Notre mission
Donner les clés linguistiques et culturelles pour faciliter l’intégration, développer l’autonomie et transformer chaque projet en réussite durable.

 Envie de collaborer ? Que vous soyez étudiant, salarié, recruteur ou entreprise internationale, rejoignez-nous et construisons ensemble votre réussite en France.

Spécialistes certifiés FLE – plus de 20 ans d’expérience en formation linguistique et civique – accompagnement personnalisé pour étudiants, professionnels et entreprises.

#FLE #FrançaisLangueÉtrangère #DELF #DALF #TCF #ÉtudierEnFrance #TravaillerEnFrance #FormationLinguistique #FormationCivique #AccompagnementInternational

Name: Rede Click Aqui

Ambos possuem mais de 20 Anos de experiência na área de cursos e macro captação por todo Brasil. A Escola nasceu com o intuito de tornar acessível cursos de informática e profissionalizantes para todos da Região de Goiânia, e Grande Goiânia, hoje, Inclusive já expandiu sua presença para o Estado de Tocantins. Somos uma das maiores Escolas da Região Centro-Oeste, com mais de 30 Mil Alunos Formados.

Name: Aliança Francesa São Carlos
Description:
Fundada há 28 anos na cidade, a Aliança Francesa de São Carlos exerce o papel de centro cultural e de curso de língua francesa. Muito mais que ensinar o idioma, promovemos a cultura francófona com intercâmbios, atividades, exposições e etc.

Por que somos diferentes?
A única escola reconhecida pelo Ministério da Educação da França, com acesso exclusivo à Culturethèque (biblioteca digital) e aplicação de exames de proficiência em francês.

A língua francesa é a nossa língua, nossa ferramenta de trabalho e nossa paixão.
Utilizamos os métodos pedagógicos e os recursos técnicos mais avançados no ensino do francês: abordagem comunicativa, materiais autênticos (jornais, revistas), ferramentas multimídia, áudio e vídeo.

Aqui oferecemos um ensino de qualidade!

Name: British College of Education
Description:
With over two decades of experience in the realm of education, we take pride in our association with the British College of Education, a distinguished institution nestled in the vibrant landscape of Sri Lanka. Our unwavering commitment to delivering top-tier language education has positioned us as a beacon of excellence in the field.
With a profound commitment to the advancement of language education, we have had the privilege of contributing to the growth and success of countless individuals. Our institution, the British College of Education, stands as a beacon of excellence in the realm of education, particularly in language education.
Throughout our careers, we have witnessed the transformative power of language education, enabling students to communicate effectively, bridge cultural gaps, and excel in their personal and professional lives. Our journey has afforded us the opportunity to observe the profound impact that quality education can have on individuals and communities alike.
As an official IDP referral agent for IELTS exams, we stand at the forefront of language proficiency assessment. Our role extends beyond education; we provide comprehensive coaching and support to ensure our students reach their highest potential.
At the British College of Education, we are dedicated to providing individuals with the linguistic tools they require to thrive in an ever more globalized world. Our path has been characterized by an unwavering commitment to educational innovation, allowing us to provide the pinnacle of language education.
Join us in our mission to empower individuals with the skills and knowledge they need to excel. Let's connect and explore opportunities for collaboration in shaping the future of language education.
For more information, please visit: https://bceonline.info

Name: Instituto de Línguas - APAR
Description:
O Instituto de Línguas APAR, situado em Penafiel há mais de 40 anos, destaca-se pela excelência no ensino de línguas. Com uma oferta diversificada de cursos, incluindo Inglês, Francês, Alemão e Espanhol, o instituto atende a alunos de todas as idades. Fundado oficialmente em 2014, é reconhecido como Centro Certificado por Cambridge e prepara para certificações internacionais do Goethe Institut, Alliance Française e Instituto Cervantes. A equipa pedagógica é composta por profissionais qualificados e dedicados, comprometidos com a inovação educativa e o desenvolvimento pessoal e profissional dos alunos. Além disso, o instituto oferece serviços de tradução certificados, reafirmando o seu compromisso com a qualidade e a excelência.

A Nossa Missão
A missão do Instituto de Línguas APAR é proporcionar um ensino de qualidade, preparando os alunos para os desafios globais e expandindo as suas oportunidades. Com um foco na inovação e na adaptação às necessidades dos estudantes, o instituto transforma vidas através da educação, impulsionando o crescimento pessoal e profissional dos seus alunos.

Para mais informações, visite nosso site.

Name: P. S. Virtual English
Description:
Nuestro foco se encuentra en brindar practicidad y resultados en la enseñanza de inglés. 

Las clases, dictadas 100% online, ofrecen una interacción real con la profesora a cargo.

Apuntamos a que el alumno disfrute del proceso de aprendizaje en un entorno cómodo, en grupos reducidos que potencian la confianza para expresarse con libertad en la segunda lengua. 

Nuestras clases abarcan las 4 habilidades del idioma extranjero, writing, listening, reading and speaking, haciendo énfasis en el método comunicativo a fin de desarrollar el habla del mismo con más eficacia. 

Las clases incluyen diversos materiales y recursos didácticos que se adaptan a cada necesidad y nivel. Se considera fundamental que, para avanzar en el aprendizaje del idioma, se deben tomar dos clases semanales de una hora y treinta minutos reloj o una hora atendiendo así las particularidades de cada grupo.

Los cursos se dictan de acuerdo al Marco Común de Referencia Europea. 

Creemos que el Inglés es la llave que nos conduce al éxito independientemente de nuestra profesión.

"Education is the key to success"

Name: PSHS American College Arcus
Description: PSHS American College Arcus is a licensed institution of elementary education (5th to 7th grade) and secondary education teaching students from grades 8 through 12. The College adheres to a curriculum largely dictated by the Bulgarian Ministry of Education and Science, which is similar to the curriculum of most European high schools. The curriculum is designed on the basis of rigid academic requirements, combined with strict behavioural expectations stated in the Interior Rules and Regulations manual of the school. Both the curricular and extracurricular activities have been planned to help the students achieve high levels of proficiency in all areas of study and develop the knowledge that will make them well-rounded individuals and responsible citizens.

Name: M & M English School
Description:
The core policy of our school is "Top priority is teaching the most important skills in English". 
By these skills Students will be able to use English smoothly and normally in their work and hobbies in the future.

Name: Lingufy
Description:
La presencia de China en América Latina está creciendo, con más de 2.000 empresas chinas ya operando en la región. Esto abre nuevas oportunidades, pero el verdadero éxito requiere confianza y comunicación efectiva en  su idioma que parece casi imposible.
Maca o 潘䓺晴 es una hablante nativa de español de Argentina que vivió más de seis años en China y Taiwán. Allí descubrió lo difícil que es aprender chino para hispanohablantes, ya que la mayoría de los recursos están en inglés.  En el camino se encontró con Ione o 陈巧颖 y juntas decidieron cambiar esta realidad.
Ione es una hablante nativa de chino y profesora con experiencia, originaria de Taiwán. Sabe cómo conectar con profesionales latinoamericanos y ayudar a superar las diferencias culturales con claridad y empatía.
Juntas fundaron Lingufy, una plataforma que ayuda a profesionales de habla hispana a aprender chino con confianza y a comprender la cultura empresarial china. No solo enseñamos el idioma, sino que te ayudamos a construir relaciones duraderas y basadas en la confianza. Nuestro enfoque combina el conocimiento idiomático con aspectos culturales relevantes, diseñando una experiencia de aprendizaje que no solo te enseña un idioma, sino que te prepara para usarlo como una herramienta para alcanzar tus metas personales y profesionales.

Si quieres fortalecer tus lazos con socios chinos, estaremos encantadas de apoyarte.
Únete a nosotras y lleva tus objetivos al siguiente nivel!

Name: Cartier Professional Language Academy

On April 20, 1534, explorer Jacques Cartier set sail from Saint-Malo France on the expedition of a lifetime.  His goal was to cross the Atlantic Ocean and find the Northwest passage to Asia; thus establishing a lucrative trade route between Europe and Asia.  This was not one of the routine trade voyages of the day. Upon Cartier’s arrival at his destination, today known as Canada, his purpose was exploration, to learn about the new world, create new opportunities and connect people around this new world.
Much like Jacques Cartier’s search for the Northwest Passage, learning a new language is a means of creating new opportunities and connecting the world.  Whether you’re just setting sail on your journey, well on your way, or into the exploration phase, Cartier Professional Language Academy is here to help you navigate your way.

Description:
✧ ללימוד השפה המרוקאית העכשווית המדוברת ✧

ֿהשיטה של הקורס תתמקד בלימוד פרקטי של השפה- בדגש על לדבר כמה שיותר. השיעורים יהיו מועשרים בתכנים תרבותיים והיסטוריים. הלימוד יועבר באופן אינטראקטיבי, בין היתר דרך שירים, ביטויים ומפגשים עם דוברי השפה המרוקאית. אין צורך להגיע עם ידע מוקדם בשפה הערבית! השפה המרוקאית (דאריז׳ה) שונה בתכליתה מהערבית של המזרח התיכון.

 שימו לב שבקורס לא נתמקד בלמידת אותיות השפה הערבית אלא יהיה שימוש באותיות לטיניות. לדוגמה:
 ״ajiw ta'almu darija״ במקום ״أجيو تتعلمو الدارجة״ שזה אומר ״בואו ללמוד מרוקאית״. הדגש הוא על הדיבור- בואו עם ראש פתוח!

  קצת עליי, שמי יונה אבידור ואני אעביר את הקורס. נולדתי וגדלתי במרוקו. אני דוקטורנט במחלקה ללימודי המזרח התיכון באוניברסיטת בן גוריון בנגב ובמחלקה לסוציולוגיה באוניברסיטת סיינס פו בורדו (צרפת). אני מומחה להוראת שפות עם תעודה מאוניברסיטת קיימברידג’, ובעל ניסיון רב בלימוד אנגלית ועברית במסגרת מוסדות יוקרתיים.

Name: Korean Language, BRAC Institute of Languages (BIL), BRACU
Description:
Welcome to the Korean Language Program at BRAC Institute of Languages (BIL), BRAC University, Bangladesh! We are proud to offer the best Korean language learning and TOPIK Preparatory Courses in the country.

Our program is designed to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of the Korean language and culture. We offer a range of courses to cater to students at different levels of proficiency. Whether you are a beginner or an advanced learner, we have a course that will meet your needs.

Our courses are taught by qualified Korean Language Teachers with extensive experience in teaching Korean to international students. They will guide you through the learning process and provide you with the support you need to succeed.

We offer a Beginner's Korean Language course for students who have no prior knowledge of Korean. This course covers the basics of the language, including pronunciation, grammar, and vocabulary.

For those who are interested in working in Korea, we offer a Special EPS-TOPIK course, which prepares students for the EPS-TOPIK test. This test is mandatory for those who want to work in Korea under the Employment Permit System (EPS).

We also offer an Advanced EPS-TOPIK course for students who want to further improve their Korean language skills and prepare for the advanced level of the EPS-TOPIK test.

At BIL, we believe that learning a language is not just about learning vocabulary and grammar rules. It is also about understanding the culture and traditions of the people who speak that language. Our courses are designed to provide students with a well-rounded understanding of the Korean language and culture.

So, if you want to learn Korean from qualified teachers in Bangladesh, enroll in our Korean Language Program at BIL today!

Name: Fuzi Education - Hantalk
Description:
HanTalk (founded in 2017, headquartered in Singapore) is a comprehensive digital platform dedicated to teaching Chinese to international learners and training Chinese language educators. With a founding team bringing over 20 years of expertise, HanTalk combines innovative online technology, self-developed learning tools, and a professional teaching & R&D team to deliver personalized, flexible Chinese learning experiences.
We provide tutoring across all levels—Basic Chinese, HSK, Business Chinese, and industry-specific courses—through flexible formats including 1-on-1, small groups (2–6), and large groups (7+), accessible anytime, anywhere.

Name: NYC Global Center
Description:
NYC Global Center was established in 2022 by a team of educators with more than 20 years of teaching and administrative experience. From the beginning, it was clear that a large number of students needed to improve both their spoken and written, English-language skills. To meet this need, NYC made the transition from being a preparatory school to become an institute for English as a Second Language.

NYC Global Center is now located in a newly-renovated, facility in Forest Hills, New York, offering a comprehensive program of communicative, English-language courses at beginner, intermediate, and advanced levels to serve the needs of English language learners.

Name: Bénédict International Language & Business School GmbH
Description:
Wir sind die Sprachschule für Deutsch mitten in Köln.

Stehen Sie beim Deutschlernen noch ganz am Anfang oder wollen Sie Ihre Sprachkenntnisse weiter ausbauen? Welches Ziel Sie auch verfolgen: Wir machen Sie fit für den Alltag, die Uni oder den Beruf.

Bereits seit über 30 Jahren ermöglichen wir Menschen unterschiedlicher Herkunft einen optimalen Einstieg in die deutsche Sprache und Kultur. Bei unseren erfahrenen Dozentinnen und Dozenten lernen Sie in einer persönlichen Atmosphäre, im Austausch mit anderen und mit einem starken Bezug zum Alltag. Dabei kombinieren wir Erfahrung mit modernster Technik. Alle unsere Unterrichtsräume sind mit ActivPanels ausgestattet, kostenloses WLAN inklusive.

Wir sind mehr als nur eine Sprachschule. Überzeugen Sie sich selbst und lernen Sie uns kennen. Wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Name: multipla languages
Description: Learning English made easy. Our mission is to provide simple and easy-to-follow English lessons to destroy the obstacles language learning may pose, and to get you speaking in the blink of an eye. We provide various courses depending on the goals of our students.

Name: GOT PRIME IDIOMAS
Description:
Desde março de 2019, Got Prime Idiomas se destaca como um curso de idiomas inovador, oferecendo aulas particulares dinâmicas e personalizadas que vão além do convencional. Nossa missão é empoderar mais de 300 alunos com habilidades linguísticas essenciais, prepará-los para desafios reais e conectar-se com o mundo.

Com uma equipe de professores altamente qualificados e uma metodologia focada na prática da língua em contextos reais, garantimos que nossos alunos aprendam não apenas palavras, mas sim como se comunicar efetivamente em entrevistas de emprego, reuniões e situações cotidianas.

Nossas aulas são online, interativas e envolventes, utilizando jogos e atividades que tornam o aprendizado prazeroso e eficaz. Além disso, oferecemos experiências únicas, como simulações de entrevistas e aulas de conversação em grupo, que ajudam nossos alunos a ganhar confiança e se destacar em ambientes profissionais.

Com acesso à nossa plataforma repleta de mais de 1.000 atividades práticas, cada aluno tem a oportunidade de aprender todos os dias com materiais modernos e atualizados, adaptando-se às suas necessidades e ritmo de aprendizado.

Junte-se a nós e seja parte de um grupo que não apenas aprende, mas transforma suas vidas com o poder da comunicação. A fluência está a um passo de distância!

A fluência está a um passo de distância!

Name: @learngerman_rk
Description:
"Learn German with Rasleen" is a comprehensive and accessible language learning initiative designed to immerse learners in the richness of the German language and culture. This free-of-cost program offers a structured curriculum that covers essential language skills, including grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, and conversation practice.
Led by Rasleen, a passionate educator with a deep appreciation for languages, this initiative aims to make German learning accessible to all, regardless of financial constraints. Through engaging lessons, interactive activities, and personalized guidance, learners are empowered to progress at their own pace and achieve their language learning goals.
With a focus on fostering a supportive learning community, "Learn German with Rasleen" provides ample opportunities for learners to interact with fellow students, practice their language skills, and receive feedback from Rasleen herself.
Whether you're a complete beginner or looking to enhance your existing German skills, this initiative offers a welcoming and inclusive environment where learners can explore the intricacies of the German language while gaining insights into its vibrant cultural heritage.
Join "Learn German with Rasleen" today and embark on a rewarding journey of language discovery, where learning is not just accessible but also enjoyable and fulfilling.

Name: Simply Idiomas Online
Description:
A Simply Idiomas é uma escola de idiomas online que busca simplificar o seu aprendizado.

As aulas são focadas na conversação e o método de ensino é o ESP
(English for Specific Purposes), ou seja, as aulas são preparadas para atender às necessidades específicas de cada aluno. 

Aulas individuais, em dupla ou em grupo; do básico ao avançado; e até preparatórios para exames de proficiência.

Utilizamos a plataforma OFF2CLASS e material didático; além de disponibilizarmos material extra no Google Classroom.

Atualmente contamos com uma equipe de 6 professores altamente capacitados para ministrar as aulas online.

Agende uma entrevista e conheça nossa equipe, plataforma, metodologia e um plano de ensino traçado para você! 

WhatsApp: (11) 93202-4253

Name: Brain Up Teaching
Description: Na Brain Up, transformamos o aprendizado em uma experiência única e interativa! Acreditamos que desenvolver habilidades vai além de aprender — trata-se de se conectar, se divertir e crescer. Nossa escola oferece um ambiente aconchegante, onde o foco está na conversação e no contato próximo com os alunos, quase como uma amizade. Aqui, aprender é leve, natural e, acima de tudo, significativo. Sem materiais caros e sem enrolação. Apenda e fale! Venha viver o inglês de forma autêntica e confiante, preparado para se comunicar em qualquer lugar do mundo!

Name: Szkoła Języków Obcych Cosmopolitan
Description:

W trakcie 31 lat pracy udało się nam wykształcić wielu uczniów z różnych grup wiekowych i zyskać renomę profesjonalnej placówki edukacyjnej. Dowodem wysokiej skuteczności organizowanych przez nas kursów jest, z jednej strony wysoki  poziom zdawalności egzaminów państwowych przez naszych uczniów, z drugiej często wyrażana wdzięczność za przełamanie bariery w porozumiewaniu się językiem obcym.

Name: CHANGE School of English
Description:
Escola de ensino do idioma inglês, fundada em 12 de março de 2012. Lecionamos um método direto onde qualquer aluno terá o inglês como sua segunda língua ao final do curso, com previsão de término em mais ou menos 24 meses. Garantimos em contrato!!! Inglês do básico ao avançado, aulas de Conversação voltadas para o Inglês de negócios. 

Tivemos como parceiros a MODINE do Brasil Sistemas Térmicos (2007-2014), MAHLE BEHR Gerenciamento Térmico Brasil Ltda (2009-2016), Aços SACCHELLI (2009-2012), HOBART, do grupo ITWFEG, (2013-2017), EATON Corporation, Guarulhos, (2008-2011), VISTA AZUL Indústria Comércio Metais (2009-2012), MULTIPLUS- Recicladora de Gesso (2016-2019), Grupo RENOVA (2016-2019), CLIQX (2022-2023).

English language teaching school, founded on March 12, 2012. We teach a direct method where any student will have English as their second language at the end of the course, expected to end in approximately 24 months. We guarantee it in contract!!!

We had as partners MODINE do Brasil Sistemas Térmicos (2007-2014), MAHLE BEHR Gerenciamento Térmico Brasil Ltda (2009-2016), Aços SACCHELLI (2009-2012), HOBART, do grupo ITWFEG, (2013-2017), EATON Corporation, Guarulhos, (2008-2011), VISTA AZUL Indústria Comércio Metais (2009-2012), MULTIPLUS- Recicladora de Gesso (2016-2019), Grupo RENOVA (2016-2019), CLIQX (2022-2023).

Name: Astro Learning
Description:
Where's your favorite spot for remote learning? The coffee shop or the couch? 

 Explore the universe of languages with Astro Learning, and seize stellar opportunities through strategic language mastery!

From individual to group sessions, we offer affordable, AI-assisted lesson plans crafted to address your unique learning needs. Regardless of your profession or passion – we have you covered.

 Flexible scheduling options: Easily schedule and reschedule when unexpected events happen.

 Comfortable and accessible, yet collaborative: From coffee shops to couches, your best learning space awaits you.

 No long-term contracts or recurring charges: Study another language without the stress of long-term payments.

 To schedule a free 1-hour session with our CEO and Lead Instructor, Forrest Moulin, please email us at contact@astrolearning.app.

Name: Empower English
Description:
O Método Empower English foca em inglês para negócios (Business English) e resultados rápidos, seguindo o CEFR, padrão internacional de proficiência adotado por gigantes como Google, Unilever, IBM, Amazon e universidades como USP, Harvard e Oxford.
Este é o seu passaporte para o sucesso global. Garanta o inglês para trabalho à altura das maiores oportunidades: domine entrevistas, apresentações e expanda sua carreira.

Empower English: Fluência rápida para sua carreira.

Name: PYGMALION Language School
Description:
Pygmalion działa nieprzerwanie od 1990 roku i jest jedną z najlepiej rozpoznawalnych szkół językowych na warszawskim Bródnie i Targówku – z 3 lokalizacjami w pobliżu stacji metra Bródno, Kondratowicza i Targówek Mieszkaniowy.

Uczymy angielskiego, niemieckiego, hiszpańskiego, francuskiego i rosyjskiego – nowocześnie, praktycznie i z naciskiem na realną komunikację. Jesteśmy Centrum Przygotowawczym Cambridge, ale przede wszystkim miejscem, gdzie lektorzy czują się częścią zespołu, rozwijają się i mają realny wpływ na edukację swoich kursantów.

Jeśli chcesz pracować w przyjaznej atmosferze, z zaangażowanym zespołem i elastycznym podejściem do grafiku – odezwij się do nas!

 Bródno i Targówek, Warszawa
 www.pygmalion.pl

Pygmalion – uczymy z pasją, jesteśmy blisko.

Name: Vicolo Italiano - Zakątek Języka Włoskiego
Description:
Atmosferę Zakątka, jak każdego innego miejsca, tworzą przede wszystkim ludzie. Prawdziwi fascynaci tego pięknego kraju, jakim są Włochy, którzy noszą go w sercu. To widać, słychać, a może nawet czuć. Kiedy już zdecydujesz się na italoprzygodę z Zakątkiem, poczujesz się prawdziwie zaopiekowany i poprowadzony.
Oddajemy Cię w dobre ręce. Ale uwaga: przekroczenie progu Vicolo Italiano – niezwykłej szkoły języka włoskiego, grozi uzależnieniem i niechęcią do opuszczenia tego miejsca!
Vicolo Italiano to nie tylko nauka włoskiego…
· RELAKS
W naszej szkole nie tylko zdobędziesz nową wiedzę, ale i odpoczniesz. Masz ochotę wtopić się w klimat Zakątka przed lekcją? Nie chcesz spacerować bez celu kiedy Twoje dziecko przyswaja nową wiedzę? Zapraszamy do naszej mini kawiarenki! Rozkoszuj się smakiem, zapachem i chłoń klimat!

· WYGODA
Każda z naszych sal stanowi swoistą strefę KOMFORTU: huśtawki, pufy, leżaki… (spokojnie, wygodne krzesła również mamy!). By móc z tego skorzystać w pełni, sale są strefą bez obuwia i odzieży wierzchniej. Buty i kurtki zostawiasz w wyznaczonym do tego miejscu. W ten sposób naprawdę możesz poczuć się jak w domu!

· BIBLIOTEKA Vicolo Italiano
Prasa, włoskojęzyczne książki dla utrwalenia języka, ale też książki w naszym rodzimym języku z Włochami w tle. Obiecujemy wciąż rozbudowywać naszą biblioteczkę tak, by każdy mógł znaleźć coś dla siebie, coś, na co w danym momencie ma ochotę – przy filiżance herbaty w naszym Zakątku lub w zaciszu domowym.

W Vicolo Italiano praktykujemy żywe techniki nauczania: jak najwięcej praktyki, jak najmniej teorii. Ograniczamy używanie j. polskiego do minimum, nawet w grupach, które dopiero rozpoczynają swoją przygodę językową. Ale spokojnie i bez obaw – nasi prowadzący doskonale wiedza jak się komunikować, żebyś zrozumiał/a jak najwięcej, żebyś w trakcie lekcji odczuwał/a same przyjemne emocje, żebyś nie poczuł/a żadnego stresu!

Name: Wizard Pernambuco
Description:
A Wizard by Pearson é a maior rede de ensino de idiomas do mundo, presente em todo o Brasil e com mais de 1.200 unidades. Fundada em 1987, a marca faz parte do grupo Pearson, líder global em educação, levando inovação e qualidade no aprendizado de idiomas para milhões de alunos.

Com uma metodologia exclusiva e materiais didáticos de ponta, a Wizard prepara pessoas de todas as idades para se comunicarem com confiança em inglês, espanhol, francês, alemão, italiano, japonês, chinês, entre outros idiomas.

Nosso propósito é transformar vidas por meio da educação, conectando pessoas a novas culturas, oportunidades acadêmicas e profissionais.

Name: Beyond the Questions
Description:
"Beyond the Questions" is a collab between industry vet with 30 years of experience Debbie Mertiris and techie language nerd Gaby Van Horn. 

We are dedicated to empowering English proficiency test-takers with holistic preparation strategies. We provide actionable tips and tricks for exams like IELTS, TOEFL, GMAT, GRE, and OET while addressing the emotional challenges of test-taking, such as overcoming anxiety and building confidence.

Our mission is to guide test-takers beyond simply answering questions by fostering a deeper understanding of the testing process, effective preparation techniques, and mindset strategies for success. Whether you’re aiming for academic admissions, professional certifications, or migration goals, we’re here to help you excel with clarity and focus.

Join us for expert insights, relatable discussions, and practical advice to conquer your next exam!

Name: języki.biz
Description:
W języki.biz pomagamy firmom rozwijać kompetencje językowe zespołów w sposób skuteczny, elastyczny i dopasowany do realnych potrzeb biznesowych. Specjalizujemy się w kursach językowych dla dorosłych – od szkoleń indywidualnych po kompleksowe programy dla firm.

 Uczymy języka w kontekście codziennych i zawodowych sytuacji.
 Dostosowujemy formę, treści i tempo nauki do stylu pracy i poziomu uczestników.
 Wspieramy nie tylko w nauce, ale też w budowaniu pewności siebie w komunikacji.

Nasze kursy to nie „szkoła jak każda inna” – to konkretne narzędzie do lepszej komunikacji w środowisku pracy.

 Zajęcia online
 Lektorzy z doświadczeniem w pracy z dorosłymi
 Programy szkoleniowe dopasowane do branży

Chcesz, żeby Twój zespół mówił swobodnie w języku obcym? Porozmawiajmy!
 kontakt@jezyki.biz

Name: Método Bloom
Description: -> Método de ensino da língua inglesa, onde crianças (a partir de 2 anos) aprendem inglês, manifestando artisticamente os conteúdos trabalhados em multimídia. Tem como objetivo alicerçar a aprendizagem da língua inglesa através da experimentação do mundo natural em suas inter-relações, fazendo com que os estudantes aprendam criando e criem aprendendo, se apropriando de técnicas da Arteterapia, em tempo que o desenvolvimento do seu psiquismo é potencializado.

Name: Raintree International School
Description:
Raintree is an international school offering a bespoke early childhood programme for children aged 1.5 to 5 years old.  While our curriculum is based on the British Early Year Foundation Stage, our approach is also inspired by international best practices and principles of Reggio Emilia, with a unique emphasis on fostering a community of creative lifelong learners.
Our school, opened in August 2017, is ideally located in the heart of Bangkok (Thailand) in a high end residential area and within 5 minutes drive of the CBD and diplomatic district. We aim to offer the highest quality learning experience with small size classes to ensure each and every child gets the attention and care they deserve. Our child-centred school with maximum capacity of approximately 120 children is purposefully designed to inspire learning through curiosity and exploration of the natural world. Our facilities are carefully designed according to international early years best practices, with curated outdoor playstations that are innovative and stimulating.
Our young and dynamic team is passionate about education and and committed to the highest standards and positively impacting the surrounding community.

Name: Masat Al-Elm International Schools
Description:
Vision:
Empowering students to reach their full potentials, contribute positively to society, and lead with integrity and ethics.

Mission:
We are committed to empowering students to become ethical leaders who positively impact their communities and the world through a holistic education that emphasizes character development, critical thinking, and practical skills to lead with integrity and compassion.

Name: Excel Language Center
Description:
Excel Language Center is a premier language education institution dedicated to empowering individuals through language proficiency. Located in Seri Kembangan, Malaysia, we offer a wide range of English language courses designed for learners of all ages, from children to adults.

Our center provides internationally recognized certifications, including accreditations from leading educational organizations such as the European Organization Education (EOEA), ISO certifications, and more. With a strong focus on communication skills and cultural understanding, we prepare our students for success in both personal and professional environments.

At Excel Language Center, we believe in a personalized approach to teaching, ensuring that each learner receives the support and attention they need to achieve their goals. Our team of experienced instructors is committed to delivering high-quality education, making learning enjoyable and impactful.

Whether you're looking to enhance your career prospects, improve your academic performance, or simply expand your language skills, Excel Language Center is your trusted partner on the journey to mastering English.

Name: Academia Hakanai
Description:
Clases de japonés online a través de videollamadas en tiempo real. 
Se trabajan todos los aspectos importantes del idioma con materiales auténticos y Manuales de Clase originales basados en libros oficiales. 

Hay varios niveles:

-Iniciación (desde cero)
-Básico I y Básico II (equivalente a N5)
-Básico III y Básico IV (equivalente a N4)
-Intermedio I e Intermedio II (equivalente a N3)
-Avanzado (N2)

El horario de las clases es flexible (se consulta a cada estudiante) y, en caso de grupos, son de máximo 6 personas de nivel similar y cuyos horarios coincidan.

Si necesitáis apoyo para aprobar alguna asignatura de la universidad o de EOI, queréis sacaros algún título oficial (JLPT-Noken) o si os interesa Japón y queréis empezar de cero, no dudéis en poneros en contacto!

we create a fun environment where kids can learn, play and grow confidently in English.

Name: Excellent Global São Paulo
Description: "Excellent Global is a language education institution that employs an innovative and unconventional methodology. Developed on Japanese soil after extensive research, this approach has undergone rigorous testing and refinement to cater to a wide range of learning scenarios, For only R$80h/class  (with an average completion time of 18 months). The course offers a language education program that provides students with a profound understanding and mastery of the foreign language. What truly stands out are the adaptive procedures incorporated into our instructional materials. The techniques employed harness the brain's bilateral capacity, making this program a remarkable success! Additionally, students benefit from the invaluable guidance of our teachers.

Name: Oxford Cursos
Description:
A Oxford tem como objetivo o ensino do inglês, espanhol e informática de maneira séria, responsável, agradável, natural e divertida, respeitando as necessidades de cada aluno e favorecendo a compreensão e interação com o mundo. 

 Desde 1996, temos como principal objetivo preparar jovens para o mercado de trabalho, diante disso, desenvolvemos cursos dinâmicos e profissionalizantes. Como premissa, trabalhamos com valores acessíveis, com o intuito de possibilitar o ingresso de todos no mercado de trabalho, mas sempre focados na qualidade de ensino. O material didático é desenvolvido com qualidade pela nossa equipe, prezando pela qualidade do conteúdo abordado. 

A metodologia Oxford
 Todas as habilidades linguísticas são praticadas e desenvolvidas de modo que, as habilidades de leitura, escrita e compreensão auditiva sejam usadas como suporte para a habilidade mais importante: a fala. Assim, você aprenderá de forma gradual e progressiva. Esta abordagem está sedimentada no princípio de que a segunda língua é aprendida por meio da comunicação. Aprende-se melhor a língua estrangeira quando o aluno tenta comunicar algo que realmente deseja ou precisa dizer.
 Divididos em módulos, as atividades comunicativas são oportunidades para os alunos praticarem o idioma e desenvolverem sua fluência. E, se essas atividades forem relacionadas com sua vida real, o aprendizado é mais fácil e

Our comprehensive suite of ASL Language Education courses and course materials cater to diverse audiences, including consumers, businesses, homeschoolers, public schools, and institutions of higher education.

Name: Pangea Academy for Global Languages
Description:
Pangea Academy for Global Languages specializes in comprehensive language training, powered by over 20 years of experience as a Global Trainer. We offer expert instruction in an unparalleled 20 languages to a diverse clientele, including the Corporate Sector, In-Campus Schools & Colleges, and various other Institutes.

Our programs are delivered flexibly through Online & Offline classes. Crucially, our curriculum mastery spans virtually all educational systems—including State, CBSE, ICSE, CISCE, IGCSE, IB, CAIE, and NIOS—along with syllabus requirements for Intermediate, Graduation, and Masters levels, and preparation for any Certificate/Diploma examinations.

We offer proficiency in a wide range of global languages, including: French, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, German, Czech, Dutch, Danish, Russian, Swedish, Turkish, Korean, Latin, Urdu, Arabic, Persian, Telugu, Sanskrit, Hindi, and English.

Name: La sorcière du français
Description:
Ao contrário do que dizem por aí, aprende ruma língua não é um passe de mágica. Mas guarda algumas similaridades: é preciso muito estudo e prática para tornar-se um "feiticeiro" experiente, capaz de abrir todas as portas para seu futuro e encantar a todos ao seu redor. 
La sorcière du français (a feiticeira do francês) é um projeto de ensino da língua francesa de modo intuitivo, prático e alinhado com seu ritmo e dificuldades, rumo aos seus sonhos. Com material próprio e a experiência de quase uma década, posso guiar sua jornada e amparar suas descobertas enquanto te desafio àquilo que é mais importante para quem aprende uma língua: falar!

Name: Spanglish Language School
Description: We are a Language School in Valencia, teaching English and Spanish to adults and kids. Our mission is to provide personalized, high-quality education in a friendly, community. Our mission is to create a supportive learning environment where each student receives a personalized approach tailored to their individual needs. Our highly qualified teachers ensure that you get the best education! We offer supportive learning environment, a welcoming atmosphere that fosters growth, personalized approach, customized lessons to meet individual goals. Join us at Spanglish Language School and embark on a rewarding language learning journey!

Name: L'institut de Langues d'Affaires
Description:
Une formation professionnelle, pratique, flexible et très ciblée, dispensée par des gens d'affaires pour des gens d'affaires.
L'Institut de Langues d'Affaires est le spécialiste de la formation en anglais des affaires et en langues étrangères pour le marché des entreprises. Nous concevons et proposons des solutions de formation linguistique sur mesure pour aider les professionnels à progresser dans leur carrière, à développer de nouveaux marchés, à conclure davantage de contrats et à développer des relations avec des partenaires du monde entier. 


COURS ENRICHISSANTS
Libérez votre potentiel grâce à nos programmes professionnels qui vous permettront d’acquérir la maîtrise des subtilités et des spécificités de l’anglais des affaires, vous procurant ainsi la confiance nécessaire pour faire des affaires dans votre langue seconde et exceller dans divers environnements d'entreprise.

PLANS D'ACTION INDIVIDUELS
Nous fournissons des plans d'action personnalisés afin de parvenir aux résultats souhaités plus rapidement.

HORAIRES FLEXIBLES
Notre équipe de formateurs professionnels est disponible pour travailler avec vous en personne ou à distance via Teams afin de s'adapter à votre horaire chargé.

ÉVALUATION PRÉCISE
Des rapports d'étape sont fournis régulièrement pour identifier les opportunités d'apprentissage tout au long de votre formation.

ACCRÉDITÉ PAR EMPLOI-QUÉBEC 
Nos formateurs sont accrédités par la Commission des partenaires du marché du travail aux fins de la Loi favorisant le développement et la reconnaissance des compétences de la main-d'œuvre.

Name: Talencoach
Description:
Albert Both, founder of Talencoach helps people to feel more confident and at ease while speaking Dutch, so that they can live a richer life.  That is why Talencoach teaches how to learn Dutch a lot faster, while having outrageous fun!

Has  the thought ever come to you that speaking Dutch could somehow add positive things to your life? Great! 

The only problem is that for many people speaking Dutch about anything that you like, while feeling at ease about it, is often not that easy :( 

Talencoach can help you to discover that speaking Dutch does not have to be that complicated and difficult. From the very first start, you can follow a clear path where you discover many things about Dutch as a language and about yourself, how you can move forward a lot faster as a Dutch language learner....

One great resource could be a Dutch Brainwash Course, a 7 day program that transforms you thinking and how you feel about Dutch, so that soon enough you can speak much more Dutch with far more ease 

If you like, you can discover for free what would be possible for you. 2 eBooks are waiting for you.... 
1 Why You Hate Learning Dutch & 7 Secrets To Change It (www.talencoach.nl) 
2 Don't Worry Speak Dutch, 3 Steps To Dutch Flow 

If somehow you can imagine that speaking Dutch can improve the quality of your life, then at least read these 2 eBooks or contact me when you would like to have a chat!

Description:
Bilinguist Language School offers language education aligned with CEFR standards (Common European Framework of Reference for Languages). We specialize in English, Montenegrin, German, French & Russian, with a strong focus on speaking and listening skills for adults, teenagers, and children.

In addition, Bilinguist provides English for Specific Purposes (ESP) programs, tailored to meet the needs of various institutions and professional fields. These include:

 Business English – Business communication, correspondence, meetings, and presentation skills
 Tourism English – Customer service and guiding skills for tourism professionals
 English for International Law – Legal terminology, contract language, and communication in legal contexts
 Medical English – Medical terminology and patient interaction for healthcare professionals

Whether you're an individual learner or an organization, we help you build the language skills you need to succeed!

Name: englishforpros.net
Description:

Let’s elevate your English so your voice leads with purpose.

Name: Golden Palm Academy
Description: Acreditamos que o inglês é uma porta de acesso às melhores oportunidades do mercado. Pensando nisso, desenvolvemos um método fundamentado na abordagem comunicativa, estimulando a conversação desde a primeira aula e construindo, nos nossos "conversation clubs", possibilidades reais de prática do idioma atráves do planejamento de eventos de naturezas diversas.

Name: CanSpeak Sprachschule
Description:
Willkommen in unserer Sprachschule Mannheim

Sie möchten Englisch oder Deutsch in der Sprachschule Mannheim lernen und bauen dabei auf einen starken Partner an Ihrer Seite. Wir bieten Englisch- und Deutschkurse für Anfänger und Fortgeschrittene, die Ihre Sprachkenntnisse vertiefen möchten. Unsere Schule unterstützt Sie beim Lernen der Fremdsprachen und hält hierfür hochwertige A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, TestDaF und DSH Sprachkurse bereit. Sie können in Mannheim Deutsch und Englisch im Sprachkurs in höchster pädagogischer Qualität verbessern. Unsere Deutschkurse in Mannheim werden von kompetenten Dozenten abgehalten, die Deutsch und Englisch an den Universitäten Mannheim sowie Heidelberg unterrichten. Die Kurse in unserer Sprachschule zeichnen sich neben exzellentem Inhalt durch eine angenehme Lernatmosphäre. Dadurch erlangen unsere Lehrkräfte schnell einen persönlichen Zugang zu den Teilnehmern. Reibungslose Kommunikation und das solide Erlernen der Fremdsprache durch die Kursteilnehmer ist der Hauptziel unserer Kurse.

Name: DEUTSCH&MEHR
Description:
Professionelle Sprachvermittlung des Deutschen ist unsere Berufung. Unser kompetentes Team steht Ihnen für individuelle Beratung, flexible Zeiteinteilung und vor allem für zielorientiertes Lernen gerne zur Verfügung.
Wir arbeiten kompetenzorientiert, methodisch vielfältig und abwechslungsreich. 

Motivation, Alter und sprachliches Umfeld unserer Lernenden sind nur einige Faktoren, die die Unterrichtsgestaltung beeinflussen.  Der Einsatz von professionellen Unterlagen und kompetenten Trainer/innen garantiert erfolgsversprechenden Spracherwerb. Der Unterricht bezieht alle vier sprachlichen Modalitäten  (Lesen, Schreiben, Hören, Sprechen) in angemessener Weise mit ein.

Unser Angebot richtet sich an alle, deren Muttersprache nicht Deutsch ist und die ihre Deutschkenntnisse verbessern möchten. 

Wir differenzieren in unseren Angeboten und unseren Lehrinhalten zwischen dem Lernen an sich und dem ganzheitlichen Erwerb des Deutschen. Lernen beinhaltet bewusste kognitive Auseinandersetzung mit der zu lernenden Materie, wie zum Beispiel das Auswendiglernen von Vokabeln und Grammatikregeln. Im Gegensatz dazu passiert der Erwerb einer Sprache oft unbewusst, spielerisch und quasi nebenbei als learning by doing. Die Besonderheit unserer didaktischen Vorgehensweise besteht aus genau dieser Mischung zwischen Sprache lernen und Sprache erleben.

Neben dem Sprachinstitut führen wir auch den DEUTSCH&MEHR – Verein zur Förderung des interkulturellen Dialogs. Das Ziel der Vereinsarbeit ist die Unterstützung und Förderung der Gleichbehandlung und Integration von Menschen mit Migrationshintergrund. 

Schwerpunktsetzungen gibt es im Bereich der sprachlichen und elementaren Kinderbildung genauso wie im Sozial- und Gesundheitsbereich.

Name: Jibreel International School
Description:
Who we are ? What is JIS?

Jibreel International School (JIS) stands as a distinguished English Medium School, committed to nurturing holistic development in students through a comprehensive curriculum that blends academic rigor, moral education, and cultural understanding. At JIS, we embrace modernity while upholding ethical values, equipping students with the tools they need to excel academically and ethically.

Syllabus and Curriculum:
Aligned with the standards set by CISCE (New Delhi), JIS offers a robust syllabus that encompasses General Studies subjects of the highest quality. Our curriculum extends beyond academics to include Moral Education and Scripture Studies for Muslim students.

Infrastructure:
JIS is dedicated to creating an environment that supports optimal learning. Our modern facilities and advanced technology empower students to reach their fullest potential.

Affiliation
The school is in the process of getting affiliation from a recognised National Board, preferably CISCE (New Delhi). The school is currently following the ICSE Curriculum.

Name: Code-Switching 3.0
Description: Code-Switching 3.0 isn't just an English course; it's a revolution in language learning for Italians. Merging the Montessori Method with cutting-edge techniques, we offer a path to genuine bilingualism. Created and led by Fabrizia Zorzenon, this program transforms students into confident English speakers, breaking down barriers and immersing them in a new cultural identity. With us, you're not just learning English—you're living it. Welcome to the future of language learning, where becoming bilingual is a journey to rediscovering yourself.

Name: ACES English
Description:
Olá! Eu sou professor Willy, professor norte-americano em Palmas, Tocantins, Brasil, e eu gostaria de compartilhar a minha paixão contigo. O fato é que tenho uma paixão por ensinar inglês. Deus me deu a vontade de compartilhar o que eu aprendi da minha língua mãe com todas as pessoas que desejam aprender. Esta jornada começou quando eu comecei a dar aula pela primeira vez no Brasil em 2000.  Eu descobri que tenho um jeito que os alunos gostavam, e mais que isso, que foi uma coisa que gostava de fazer mais do que quase qualquer outra coisa. Foi então que decidi estudar linguística e me aprofundar mais na língua inglesa. 

Foi baseada nesta paixão que eu e minha esposa abrimos a nossa escola em Palmas em 2015, e o crescimento desta paixão que me levou a começar um canal do YouTube. Eu convido você a fazer parte da comunidade que estamos construindo de pessoas com um proposito serio de melhor falar esta língua que se tornou a língua internacional.  Assista as nossas aulas e veja se essa paixão não aquece algo dento de você. Venha e deixe que façamos parte da sua jornada de aprender inglês. Que Deus abençoe os seus estudos.

Teacher Willy

Um dos projetos da rede que evidencia este diferencial, o premiado Speaking Exchange, recebeu 10 Leões no Festival Cannes Lions 2014. 

Em 2020, o CNA foi escolhido Franqueador do Ano pela Associação Brasileira de Franchising (ABF).  É também a única rede a obter por 30 vezes de forma consecutiva o Selo de Excelência em Franchising. Está na lista Top 25 do Franchising Brasileiro organizada pelo Grupo Bittencourt desde sua primeira edição. O CNA Administração Nacional também está na lista da Great Place to Work de melhores empresas para se trabalhar.

Também é centro aplicador autorizado dos exames internacionais de proficiência na língua inglesa da Universidade de Cambridge e do exame internacional de proficiência em língua espanhola SIELE, desenvolvido pelo Instituto Cervantes em parceria com a Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México (UNAM), a Universidad de Salamanca (USAL) e a Universidad de Buenos Aires (UBA). Name: The Portuguese Online Center
Description:
Since 2020, we provide flexible learning options for all types of passionate learners.

We aim to provide options that cater to individuals who want a customizable learning experience, yet still, prioritize receiving a high-level education. 

Our two courses are tailored for both General Purposes Portuguese and Business Oriented Portuguese. Each course is offered the possibility of taking the "Brazilian Culture Course"  and the "Brazilian Culture Course for Business and Negotiation" (for PT Business students) which can help you create meaningful and successful interactions with Brazilians, socially, personally, and business-wise. It examines the values, attitudes, and systems that shape the identity of Brazil and its people.

These Courses are based on Anthropological, Social, and Cultural Academic Research, with actual data from real-life studies and results collected and analyzed by Brazilian Specialists. 

As an example, research conducted by Friederike Konstanze Trautmann concluded that Brazilians are short-term oriented, whereas Germans are highly long-term oriented. Another finding was the fact that Brazilians were not more likely to display outcome orientation, and neither were Germans more likely to display process orientation. Surprisingly, Germans scored as high on short-term orientation as Brazilians. 

For business people who may be interested only in the Brazilian Culture of Business and Negotiation, please contact me. 

If you have any questions or are interested in enrolling in our Online Course, please don’t hesitate to get in touch.

Name: Centrum Języków Obcych Sherlock
Description:
Sherlock Holmes to dla wielu człowiek rozpoznawalny jako postać fikcyjna, bohater powieści i opowiadań kryminalnych sir Arthura Conana Doyle’a. Dla nas jednak jest to postać, która dzięki swojej charakterystyce zbudowała wizję do powstania Centrum Języków Obcych Sherlock. 

Sherlock to genialny detektyw, który to swoje śledztwa opierał na umiejętności obserwacji, logicznym myśleniu, analizie, a także dużej wiedzy na temat wielu kultur i religii.  W swoich działaniach kierował się również intuicją. 

Idąc dalej tym tropem, możemy śmiało wysnuć teorię, że w nauce języka obcego właśnie o takie elementy chodzi. Potrzebujemy obserwacji, konwersacji, analizy, logicznego myślenia, współpracy, szeroko pojętej wiedzy, intuicji i śmiałości. 

Centrum Języków Obcych Sherlock, to szkoła językowa, która na mapie Kobyłki, łączy w sobie te wszystkie elementy. Prowadząc zajęcia z języka angielskiego, hiszpańskiego, niemieckiego, francuskiego oraz włoskiego, przyświeca nam ten sam, spójny cel: "Uczymy przyszłych turystów, nie  profesorów!". 

Chcemy, aby nasi uczniowie, detektywi i odkrywcy – można by powiedzieć, stawali się obywatelami XXI w., zdolnymi do bycia odpowiedzialnymi i zaangażowanymi, takimi, którzy rozumieją otaczający ich świata i umieją się w nim swobodnie odnajdywać.

Chcemy uczyć ich oraz skłaniać do:
- myślenia kreatywnego;
- współpracy w zespole;
- swobodnej komunikacji w języku obcym.

Komunikacja oraz otwartość to w naszych czasach klucz do sukcesu.

language education for anyone who wants to bring their linguistic skills to the next level.

More than 375 million people use English language as a medium of communication across the world and there are more than 50 nations in the world that uses English as their official language. English has been the medium to do business as well as standard dual language of communication here in Malaysia. English has been widely regarded as Malaysia's second language.

COVENTRY provides a comfortable study environment that caters to the needs and the requirements of students who seek to develop their English language skills, both written and orally. Our classes are lined with activities to create an interactive learning environment and it is also a place for international students to share their culture while learning the local culture within. We believe that the key to global mutual understanding is through the understanding of the English language.

Szkoła Językowa Quality została założona w 2004 roku i mieści się przy ul. Mehoffera 118A na Choszczówce, skąd jest doskonałe połączenie komunikacyjne na Tarchomin oraz do Białołęki Dworskiej. 
Od wielu lat niezmiennie oferujemy kursy języka angielskiego, hiszpańskiego, francuskiego oraz niemieckiego. Przez ostatnie dwa lata wzbogaciliśmy naszą ofertę o naukę języka polskiego dla obcokrajowców. 
Oprócz nauczania języków, proponujemy także zajęcia z zakresu plastyki, usługi logopedyczne i psychologiczne, jak również warsztaty rozwijające umiejętności społeczne. Dodatkowo, oferujemy zajęcia z przedmiotów szkolnych, takich jak matematyka czy język polski. 
Zajęcia odbywają się zarówno stacjonarnie, jak i online. Prowadzimy nauczanie w naszej placówce, a także dojeżdżamy do zorganizowanych grup, takich jak firmy czy szkoły. 
Wśród naszych uczniów znajdują się również dzieci objęte edukacją domową. Współpracujemy z placówką edukacyjną Szkoła w Chmurze, podpisując odpowiednie umowy.

Name: Home of Bears
Description:
Jesteśmy dla Was już od 2009 roku. Idea, która przyświecała nam od początku działaności edukacyjnej jest niezmienna - chcemy innej edukacji, chcemy zmiany - i sukcesyjnie ją wprowadzamy.
Rozwój językowy Home of Bears to miejsce inne niż wszystko co znasz z edukacyjnego świata.

Jesteśmy grupą ludzi, których łączy podążanie do celu jakim jest towarzyszenie dzieciom i młodzieży w zdobywaniu nowych umiejętności językowych w sposób bezpieczny dla ich rozwoju społecznego i emocjonalnego. U nas, zajęcia przepełnione są akceptacją i uwagą. To właśnie wtedy tworzy się między nami więź, która stanowi podstawę edukacji w Home of Bears. Chcemy aby dzieci, młodzież i dorośli (tutaj mam na myśli rodziców i mentorów) tworzyli jedność, bo tylko wtedy unikniemy niszczącej statyki, a zanurzymy się w budującym ruchu zmian i współdoskonalenia.

Nasze zajęcia językowe to nie tylko rozwój kompetencji językowych, lecz również kompetencji komunikacyjnych oraz emocjonalnych.

A Wizard é a maior escola de idiomas do mundo. Além de estar presente em todos os estados brasileiros, com mais de 1.200 escolas, ainda leva o aprendizado de idiomas para os Estados Unidos, Japão, Costa Rica e Paraguai.

Ciente de que pode levar as pessoas aonde elas sonham chegar, a Wizard selou um compromisso: transformar o Brasil em uma #nacaobilingue! Name: Kati Schiller
Description:
As an experienced Dutch language trainer, I work with private students, language schools and companies to provide customized language training that not only equips international employees with language skills but also supports cultural integration within the organization.

With over 15 years of experience, I have guided hundreds of students and provided language trainings for various organizations such as MSD Biotech, Roozen van Hoppe Groep, Hydro Extrusion BV, International Language Centre (ILC), DHL, Fontys University of Applied Sciences, and Yomema BV, where I developed special programs for diverse business needs and the healthcare sector. My work with municipal organizations like the Municipality of Den Bosch and various educational institutions such as the Volksuniversiteit 's-Hertogenbosch has contributed to my in-depth knowledge of language education and cultural integration.

This is what you can expect:
*A safe learning environment: With personal attention and culturally sensitive interaction.
*Language learning with cultural integration: Cherishing your own cultural identity while helping you understand and appreciate the Dutch language and culture.
*Boost of self-confidence and enjoyment in learning: Through interactive lessons that increase your motivation. We laugh a lot and celebrate your successes together.
*Customized teaching materials: Every aspect of the course is specially designed to meet your unique needs and learning goals.
*Sustainable connection with the community: I help you build connections with Dutch people and the local culture, making you feel at home faster.
*Cultural exchange: Through activities that introduce you to various aspects of Dutch society and allow you to share your own cultural experiences. 

How does your organization support the integration of international employees? Let’s work together to create an environment that not only supports the improvement of language skills but also fosters a sense of belonging.

Name: Impetus English Academy
Description:
Impetus English Academy delivers authentic, contemporary courses, alongside our enrollment and comprehensive internal reporting. Our online service model allows us to deliver exceptional, high quality and professional classes for both individuals and groups while being able to monitor the course’s progression closely. And all delivered at a fair price.
Our Mission
To provide an expert language learning experience adept at advancing comprehension and usage of the target language by employing dynamic, learner-centred materials and methodology. Our mission was to create a language academy that specialised in providing innovative, engaging, high-quality English language programs. And, by employing inspiring, dedicated and well-trained language instructors, we can fulfil our mission where students feel special, welcome and provided with a learning experience second to none.

Our Vision
To build a unique and special language school underpinned by respect, responsibility and caring where students are provided with all the assistance necessary to achieve their goals.

Relevant & Relatable

Many factors may alter the relevance and relatability of a language course for the student: different ages, life experiences, and even stages in a professional career significantly alter the student’s perception of the course book materials and teaching methodology. Rigid formats are not the solution for many students, as some students will find the lesson somehow not very inspiring.  

Going through the motions - like a spent rock/pop band performance, will leave the audience disengaged. Conversely, a fresh and animated performance gives the audience something to take home and want to return for more!

At Impetus Language, we are passionate about helping our customers grow their businesses through language education.
