Tanehongo adalah tempat Belajar Bahasa Jepang dari NOL secara live & online, Tanehongo juga memiliki Komunitas Bahasa Jepang untuk teman-teman yang ingin belajar secara terus menerus.

Tanehongo sangat cocok untuk orang yang baru ingin belajar bahasa Jepang, orang yang ingin bekerja di Jepang & orang yang ingin belajar di Jepang.

Name: Anglais B2
Description:
AnglaisB2 est une école spécialisée dans l’apprentissage de l’anglais professionnel et certifiant, 100 % éligible au CPF .
Notre mission : aider les adultes à gagner en confiance, en fluidité et en crédibilité à l’international, grâce à des formations personnalisées et orientées résultats.

Nos engagements :
 Formations certifiantes (TOEIC, Bright, Linguaskill…)
 Cours individuels ou en petits groupes
 Formateurs natifs et expérimentés
 Parcours 100 % en ligne ou hybride
 Accompagnement complet pour mobiliser votre CPF

 Chez AnglaisB2, nous croyons qu’apprendre l’anglais n’est pas une contrainte, mais un levier d’évolution personnelle et professionnelle.

 Contactez-nous pour découvrir la formation la plus adaptée à votre niveau et à vos objectifs.
#anglais #CPF #formationprofessionnelle #TOEIC #carrière #eLearning #anglaisB2

Name: Lingus Centro Global De Idiomas
Description: Somos un centro de idiomas especializado en brindar una enseñanza de calidad en diversas lenguas extranjeras. Ofrecemos cursos en Inglés, Alemán, Chino, Portugués, Francés, Italiano y Español para extranjeros.

Name: Corporate BE
Description:
Für jeden Anspruch das passende Sprachtraining:
Geschäftsenglisch ist nicht für jede Branche gleich. Wir berücksichtigen die branchenspezifischen Sprachanforderungen. Wir passen unsere Coaching-Formate gezielt auf Ihre Bedürfnisse und heben Ihre Sprachkenntnisse so auf das nächste Level.
Online-Coaching – bequem und zeitlich flexibel vom Büro oder Home-Office aus teilnehmen. Zudem können sich Kursteilnehmer aus ganz Deutschland in den Unterricht einschalten.
Kerndienstleistung
Business English Trainings
Vorbereitung auf englische Besprechungen/Webcasts/Präsentationen
Englisch-Übersetzung und Redaktion

Name: BeeWise Escola de Inglês
Description:
Ensinar inglês de maneira simples e
divertida, criando um ambiente onde
cada aluno se sinta seguro para se
comunicar e crescer. Nosso foco está
em tornar o aprendizado acessível e
constante, preparando os alunos para
expressarem suas ideias com
confiança e fluência na vida real.

Name: Rye School
Description:
Rye School es una escuela especializada en la enseñanza del inglés cuya misión es fomentar el gusto por el inglés, facilitar una adquisición superior del idioma e impulsar a los alumnos a entender y disfrutar de la cultura Británica. 

Estamos ubicados en la ciudad de León, Guanajuato. 

Además somos el Centro Autorizado para Cambridge English exams No. MX117.

Name: ESTudiar
Description: Somos una escuela de español en línea basada en Estonia, aunque contamos con estudiantes de muchas otras nacionalidades. Pese a que somos una empresa joven, nuestros profesores tienen mucha experiencia en la enseñanza de español a extranjeros y de apoyo para estudiantes de Lengua y Literatura en España y en el sistema de Bachillerato Internacional. Además, ofrecemos traducciones juradas entre inglés y español, cursos especializados en cultura española y clases de español con fines profesionales.

Name: Suit Academy
Description: Somos una escuela de idiomas fundada en 2012. En 2018, nos enfocamos en la digitalización del proceso de aprendizaje de nuestros alumnos, por lo que ahora, estando en Talavera de la Reina (Toledo), podemos enseñar y evaluar fácilmente a nuestros alumnos en toda España.

Name: Languissimo
Description:
We help Canadian public servants with the Public Service tests (French and English)
We help professionals, youth and retirees with French, English, Spanish, Portuguese, Mandarin and Arabic.
We help new immigrants with the immigration TEF test.
We provide youth and professionals with financial education workshops.

Name: Talkeo LLP
Description:
Gone are the days of stressful grammar classes and yawn-inducing language sessions.

Talkeo offers a fun way to learn any language anywhere online with the help of a personal mentor. We remove everything that stands between you and your fluency. We turn you into a smart language learner, igniting your interest to explore languages further.

Want to experience Talkeo and level up your language skills?

Visit our website now.
www.talkeo.org

Name: Elektor Centrum Nauki Online
Description:
Powstaliśmy, aby sprostać potrzebom naszych kursantów!
Niezależnie od tego, gdzie mieszkasz, czym zajmujesz się zawodowo, jesteśmy do Twojej
dyspozycji.
Prowadząc zajęcia widzimy, czego nasi kursanci potrzebują najbardziej, a następnie
dostosowujemy nasz program tak, aby nauka szła szybko i sprawnie, a wiedza, którą
przekazujemy praktycznie od pierwszych zajęć pomagała w codziennym życiu.
Rozumiemy, że każdy jest inny, potrzebuje więcej lub mnie czasu na przyswojenie wiedzy,
dlatego nie wprowadzamy sztywnych reguł, a nasze zajęcia są dopasowane czasowo do indywidualnych potrzeb uczestników. 
Jeśli chodzi o zajęcia, nie jesteś  zobligowany do wykupienia wielomiesięcznego kursu.
Możesz wykupić jedną, dwie, pięć, dziesięć, 100 lekcji - wybór należy do Ciebie, a im więcej lekcji wykupujesz, tym mniej płacisz :-).

Z naszej strony pomożemy Ci dobrać optymalną ilość zajęć do Twoich potrzeb, aby nauka była jak najbardziej efektywna.

Name: HIVE Online Japanese School
Description:
HIVE International Co., Ltd. (Yokohama, Japan) operates an online Japanese language school.
We offer online Japanese lessons for Indian learners, taught in Hindi and English.
Our goal is to create a school where both teachers and students can enjoy learning together.

Name: Özel Antalya Falez Dil Kursu
Description: '' Sadece bir dil öğrenme, yeni bir dili nasıl öğrenebileceğini öğren !'' mottosuyla çıktığımız bu yolda Antalya Falez Yabancı Dil kursu ailesi olarak öğrencimizin öğrenme yaklaşımını analiz ediyor ve en uygun müfredatı hazırlıyoruz. Konuşma ağırlıklı sistem ile öğrencilerimize İNGİLİZCE, ALMANCA VE RUSÇA eğitimi vermekteyiz.

Name: Le Feu -Learn French Made Easy
Description:
With 7 years of experience in the industry, a unique blend of modern and traditional teaching style and cultural awareness of both the nations; we believe in providing you with the best of our services at the comfort of your home. 

Learn French at your own pace and ace the language game with us! 

Come on folks, #LETSFRENCHITUP!

Name: Wizard by Pearson - Carapicuíba
Description: Fazemos parte da maior rede de ensino de idiomas do mundo. Estamos no mercado a mais de 30 anos trazendo o melhor do ensino com qualidade e excelência.

Name: UPTIME São Leopoldo
Description:
A UPTIME - Comunicação em Inglês revolucionou o mercado brasileiro por meio de sua metodologia inovadora e de seus diferenciais únicos.

Desde a sua fundação, em 2001, a empresa se tornou sinônimo de inovação no ensino do idioma inglês, e é considerada a marca mais premiada da década. Com um modelo de incentivo ao empreendedorismo (franchising) e à formação de líderes, a franqueadora possui altos índices de satisfação e crescimento.

A UPTIME pertence ao UPTIME Group, grupo composto por nove empresas que verticalizaram suas operações. É uma estrutura organizacional arrojada e verticalizada, que proporciona resultados expressivos para a marca.
Location: São Leopoldo, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: BasaBasa Learning Centre
Description: BasaBasa Learning Centre is your best partner to learn Indonesian. We provide effective Indonesian language learning through creative digital platforms and professional native Indonesian teachers with extensive teaching experience. We offer you the opportunity to learn Indonesian in the way that suits you best. With lesson times that suit your schedule and learning materials that are up to date with today's world, we make sure that you can learn Indonesian in an easy, fun and effective way.

Name: The Nomadic Linguist
Description:
Vous rêvez de voyager sereinement tout en maîtrisant l’anglais spécifique à votre destination ?
Vous souhaitez explorer le monde avec plus de confiance, mieux comprendre les locaux et vous sentir réellement à l’aise dans toutes les situations du voyage ?

Je suis Lara, formatrice spécialisée en anglais de destination — l’anglais pratique, concret et adapté aux lieux où vous partez. J’accompagne les voyageurs grâce à un coaching en ligne flexible et personnalisé, pour vous permettre de communiquer avec aisance là où vous en aurez vraiment besoin.

 Ce que je propose :
	•	Un accompagnement individuel/en duo/en groupe basé sur vos objectifs, votre niveau et vos futures destinations.
	•	L’apprentissage du vocabulaire essentiel, de la prononciation et des spécificités de la variété d’anglais parlée dans votre destination (accents, expressions locales, usages culturels).
	•	Des outils concrets et des mises en situation réalistes pour maîtriser les dialogues essentiels propres à votre destination (aéroports, hôtels, restaurants, transports, activités locales, etc.).

Name: Partout - Escola de Idiomas
Description:
A Partout é uma escola que trata a aquisição de um idioma como algo muito maior do que um processo técnico. 

Das turmas iniciantes às mais avançadas, compartilhamos com os alunos uma cuidadosa curadoria de conteúdo, sempre antenada com questões contemporâneas relevantes. Temos profundo respeito por nossos alunos: respeitamos o ritmo e o histórico de cada um no processo de aquisição, com sensibilidade para auxiliá-los, quando necessário, a fazer as pazes com traumas do passado relacionados a processos anteriores de aquisição. 

Além disso, nos empenhamos sempre em criar um ambiente agradável para despertar prazer em estudar e descobrir coisas novas.

Name: Eagles School
Description:
Specjalizujemy się w nauce języków obcych online oraz z dojazdem do firm i klientów indywidualnych. 
CO NAS WYRÓŻNIA?
✓ indywidualne zajęcia
✓ indywidualne podejście

CO GWARANTUJEMY?

Name: Alingua Language School
Description: Alingua Language School provides children and adults with language courses and is located within the European School, Bergen. This is of benefit to both institutions since the tailor-made courses of Alingua and the rich learning environment of the school complement each other greatly.

Name: AiLin
Description: AILIN is an online platform that offers personalized tutoring to help you improve your communication skills. Our highly efficient tutors will guide you through the process, preparing you for competitive exams such as IELTS and TOEFL. With AILIN, learning English communication has never been easier.

Name: Online Deutschakademie
Description:
Language-Learners in distress and for those who want to learn german fast and easy Breaking News:

Say goodbye to German Classes that don't work for you!

Struggling with the enigma of the German language? Tired of traditional classes that move slower than a snail on vacation?

Do you find yourself wrestling with German grammar, feeling more lost than a tourist without a map in the Black Forest?

Ever tried German programs that promised to be the Autobahn to fluency but turned out to be more like a traffic jam?

Is your schedule packed like the Oktoberfest, leaving no room for old-school language classes?

Do you scratch your head wondering how to pronounce German words correctly?

Does the thought of speaking German in a group scare you more than a ghost story in the Brothers Grimm's castle?

Admit it, isn’t learning German sometimes as bewildering as trying to order a Döner in Dresden without a word of Deutsch?

We helped more than 70,000 happy students around the world to improve their German. Are you next? 

Welcome to Online-Deutschakademie. 
Learn clear, on point. German!

Name: Phenom Idiomas Itabira
Description: Desenvolvemos um método de ensino extremamente eficiente, que veio para provar que um curso de idiomas não precisa custar caro para ser bom.

Name: Wizard Itaipava
Description:
Oferecemos o melhor e o mais tecnológico em ensino de idiomas para os nossos alunos, aulas interativas, metodologia avançada e tecnológica com material didático exclusivo e interativo.

Oferecemos cursos de Inglês, Espanhol, Francês, Italiano, Alemão, Japonês, Português para estrangeiros e Chinês.

Name: Accademia Internazionale
Description:
All'Accademia Internazionale, dal 1997 combiniamo l'eccellenza accademica con un'affascinante immersione culturale. 
Situata nella splendida città medievale di Ascoli Piceno, la nostra Accademia offre agli studenti internazionali un ambiente ideale per apprendere diverse lingue, tra cui italiano, inglese, francese, rumeno, portoghese, albanese, polacco, tedesco, russo, cinese, spagnolo e arabo, arricchendo l'apprendimento con esperienze culturali autentiche e un contesto unico.

I nostri punti di forza:

Programmi personalizzati, progettati in base agli obiettivi accademici o professionali degli studenti 
Lingue occidentali e europee
Piccoli gruppi  (3-6 studenti) che garantiscono un'attenzione individuale ottimale
Insegnanti qualificati che utilizzano metodi moderni come scenari interattivi e lezioni all'aperto
Offriamo:

Corsi standard o intensivi per ogni livello 
Corsi specialistici (preparazione a l’accesso alle università italiane, cultura italiana) 
Corsi specifici per il conseguimento di certificazioni linguistiche internazionali
Corsi specifici con uso di linguaggio specialistico (medico, giuridico, turistico, ecc.)
Corsi speciali (storia dell’arte politica italiana, della letteratura)
Che tu voglia migliorare le tue competenze linguistiche per la tua carriera o semplicemente scoprire la ricca cultura italiana, vieni all’Accademia internazionale per un'esperienza indimenticabile!

Name: SMK Pertanian Pembangunan Negeri Asahan
Description:
Asahan State Agricultural Development Committee was founded on January 15, 1964 by Mr. Alm. H. Abdul Manan Simatupang (formerly Bupati Asahan) who was then named as SPMA of the Asahan District. Further on January 1, 1970 with the Sign of Registration No.43/Drh/69 by the Director-General of Agriculture, SPM of the Assahan District with POLIVALEN status, is located in Sentang - Kisaran.

The school year 1986 - 1987 moved the location to the village of Rawang Market V district of Meranti and the status is still registered with the Food Plant Study Programme and Farming led by Ir. Abdul Kasar. The school years 1988 - 1989 status was upgraded to ANNOUNCED for the field Programme of Study of Food Plants led by I. Asnan Pasaribu. In 2001, Asahan District SPMA changed its name to Asahan State SPMA.

In 2002 the name changed to SMKN SPP Asahan and became the Coordinator of SMK SPP State/Swasta in the North Sumatra Territory with the status of DISAMAKAN. As for the State SPP that became the establishment of the ASEAN SPP: SPP Tapanuli State South, SPP Labuhan Stone State, Tapanoli North State, Private SPP Putera Jaya Stabat Langkat, SNAKMA Tanjung Anom Langkat. Then on July 31, 2008, a joint agreement was signed between the Minister of Agriculture and the Minister for National Education. About the construction of small and medium-sized agricultural companies, then the nomenclature is "Secondary School of Agriculture Development of Asahan State.

Name: Mizzou School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures
Description: SLLC offers training in languages, literatures, and cultures from all corners of the globe, giving Mizzou students the opportunity to become cross-cultural experts in an ever more internationalized world.

Name: Hello, Universe! English Experience
Description:
Hello, Universe! – Treinamento premium para quem decide e lidera!
Centenas de profissionais já conquistaram promoções e oportunidades globais conosco.

Com mais de 14 anos de experiência, temos ajudado profissionais a destravarem o inglês com aulas personalizadas e materiais exclusivos. Nosso foco é acelerar resultados para quem precisa se comunicar com confiança em ambientes acadêmicos, corporativos, entrevistas, reuniões e projetos internacionais.
O que oferecemos:
 Aulas individuais e em grupo, 100% online
 Conteúdo adaptado à sua área de atuação
 Metodologia prática e direta ao ponto
 Recursos exclusivos para inglês profissional
Para quem é:
Atendemos com excelência acadêmicos, executivos, profissionais de tecnologia, saúde, engenharia, negócios e todos que querem transformar o inglês em uma ferramenta estratégica para crescimento.

 Quer saber como podemos ajudar sua carreira?
Entre em contato para agendar uma aula teste gratuita.

Name: Next English Institute
Description:
NEXT INGLES es una red de institutos de inglés que opera a través del sistema de franquicias desde sus inicios. La empresa posee presencia en Argentina y países limítrofes. Actualmente se encuentra trabajando en potenciar el proceso de expansión, no solo a países limítrofes, sino también al resto de Latinoamérica.

Nuestra misión es formar parte activa del proceso de aprendizaje de los alumnos que desean y anhelan expandir sus fronteras a través del aprendizaje de una lengua extranjera. Promovemos el aprendizaje activo, colaborativo y socio participativo, generando espacios que estimulen la creatividad a través de la enseñanza del idioma inglés.

La vasta experiencia y trayectoria que el equipo directivo de NEXT posee en el ámbito de las franquicias, hace posible que podamos abordar el concepto de negocio que se propone de una manera simple de implementar y fácil de operar.

Name: Verbum Novum - German Language school
Description:
Deutschkurse und telc Prüfungen in Mainz bei Verbum Novum
Sprachreisen für Schülergruppen nach Mainz, Berlin, Nürnberg, München
High School Programme
Summer camps für Jugendliche 
Full Immersion Programme (Wohnen und lernen beim Lehrer)

Name: Yorkston Language Academy
Description:
We are a local language academy based in El Prat de Llobregat, offering personalized English and Spanish courses for children, teens, and adults.

Our goal is to make learning languages engaging, practical, and confidence-building.

We also collaborate with companies to provide specialized Business English and communication training, helping professionals improve their skills in real-world contexts.

Whether online or face-to-face, every class is designed to inspire, motivate, and make language learning a natural part of life.

Name: Macle Institute (Online Language School)
Description:
Individual, highly-personalized classes for adults, teenagers and children.

At Macle Institute, our mission is to help our students improve their speaking, listening, reading and writing skills in the language of their choice (English, French or Spanish).

We will make sure to match you with an experienced teacher who specializes in teaching students who are at your level and have similar goals and needs.
Your lessons are conducted in the target language from day one and each activity focuses on a specific learning goal tailored to your needs.

Each class is planned specifically for you.
Learn at your own pace while following a schedule that suits you best.

Name: Dylingo: Dial into Linguistics
Description:
At Dylingo, we are creating a platform where you can become part of exclusive communities, including future scientists, founders, and business owners. 
Here, you'll have the opportunity to learn a lot from premium communities and, most importantly, teach languages and earn jobs.

Learn a language while you earn with Dylingo!

Name: Levitator Norge
Description:
Norskopplæring for voksne. 
Perioden når du går på norskkurs skal være en god tid med effektiv læring, en opplevelse av mestring, sosiale eventer, tett kontakt med læreren din og et nettverk av engasjerte elever rundt deg. Det er dette vi jobber for å skape hos Levitator. 

Vi jobber workshopbasert og repeterer de grunnleggende ferdighetene i norsk hver kursdag. Dette gjør at vi kan ha løpende opptak av elever og at elevene våre kan bruke så kort, eller lang tid de trenger for å beherske norsk. 

Hos Levitator jobber vi med penn og papir, hjertet og whiteboard. 
I tillegg til fokuset på "gammeldags" læring i de fysiske kursene våre, utvikler vi videoer og nettressurser til tiden mellom kursdagene.

Name: The French Coach
Description: The French Coach provides tailored, high-quality French lessons for professionals, students, and ambitious learners worldwide. We specialize in Business French, Exam Preparation (DELF, DALF, TEF, TCF), and French for Specific Purposes. With over 17 years of international teaching experience, I help learners gain confidence, fluency, and practical communication skills for real-life success.

Name: Capaz Chile English
Description:
Establecido en 2015 por Canadiense, Capaz Chile SpA es tu puerta de entrada para dominar el inglés. Nuestra vibrante empresa ubicada en tres comuna de Santiago, ofrece una variedad de servicios adaptados a tus necesidades de aprendizaje de idiomas:

✓Clases Dinámicas: Experimenta lecciones atractivas e interactivas adaptadas a tu nivel de competencia, ya sea que prefieras sesiones individuales o en grupo.

✓Clases Presenciales Personalizadas: Ofrecemos clases presenciales en la comodidad de tu hogar, oficina o en nuestras instalaciones al lado estacion de metro Tobalaba y metro Manquehue.

✓Aprendizaje Online Conveniente: Accede a instrucción de idiomas de clase mundial desde la comodidad de tu hogar atraves zoom, meet, etc.

✓Pruebas de Nivel Virtuales: Descubre tu nivel actual de competencia lingüística con nuestras pruebas virtuales gratuitas disponibles en nuestro sitio web fácil de usar.

✓Servicios de Monitoreo Expertos: Potencia tu viaje de aprendizaje con pruebas supervisadas, disponibles en persona u online, por una tarifa nominal.

✓Soluciones Corporativas: Potencia a tu fuerza laboral con programas de capacitación lingüística personalizados diseñados para mejorar las habilidades de comunicación dentro de tu empresa.

✓Equipo Docente Diverso: Benefíciate de la experiencia de hablantes nativos* y profesionales internacionalmente reconocidos, garantizando una experiencia de aprendizaje integral.

✓Preparación para el IELTS: Prepárate para el éxito en exámenes de competencia en inglés con coaching especializado y orientación.

✓Ubicaciones Convenientes: Elige entre nuestros dos sedes convenientemente ubicados al lado estaciones de metros Tobalaba y Manquehue, brindando accesibilidad y flexibilidad a nuestros estudiantes.

Únete a nosotros en el Instituto de Idiomas Capaz Chile SpA y desbloquea todo tu potencial lingüístico en un entorno de aprendizaje dinámico y de apoyo. Embarquemos juntos en este viaje para abrirnos el mundo!

Name: Prisma English
Description: English Lessons for IT Professionals

Name: French Coaching Faridabad
Description:
French Coaching Faridabad is the premier destination for high-quality French language instruction in Delhi NCR. Our institute offers a wide range of programs and courses designed to help individuals of all ages and skill levels develop their French language proficiency.

We are passionate about providing a personalized and results-oriented approach to language instruction, which means that we work closely with each student to understand their individual needs and learning style. Our experienced and qualified teachers use a variety of teaching methods and materials, including the use of technology, to create a dynamic and engaging learning environment.

Our institute offers French language courses for kids, school students, and professionals. Whether you are a beginner or an advanced learner, we have a course that will meet your needs. Our courses cover all aspects of French language instruction, including grammar, vocabulary, reading, writing, listening, and speaking.

Name: Global Mandarin Academy
Description: Global Mandarin Academy is a premier language institute offering high-quality Mandarin Chinese instruction for professionals, executives, and global learners. With expert instructors, a culturally immersive curriculum, and flexible online and in-person learning options, we empower students to achieve fluency, cultural competence, and global success.

Name: Rede Virelo
Description: Somos uma rede de ensino de idiomas focada em aulas particulares on-line.

Name: Then voor Taal
Description:
Opzoek naar taalondersteuning? Of is het op zoek? Met taalondersteuning van Then voor Taal schudt u deze kennis voortaan uit uw mouw. Correcte en passende taaluitingen zijn uw visitekaartje en ik denk hierin graag met u mee.

Then voor Taal biedt taalondersteuning op maat voor zowel zakelijke als particuliere klanten. U kunt hierbij denken aan het verzorgen van lessen (Nederlands) op zowel VO als MBO, redigeren, tekstschrijven en bijles. 

Moeten uw werknemers richting een bepaald taalniveau? Behoeft de mailetiquette op de werkvloer aandacht? Of bent u te veel bezig met het corrigeren van teksten? Incompany taaltrainingen op maat zijn mogelijk! 

Ook het redigeren van websites, nieuwsbrieven en andere bedrijfsuitingen behoren tot mijn werkzaamheden. Het is toch prettig als uw visitekaartje de juiste toon en spelling bevat.

U kunt vrijblijvend contact met me opnemen via LinkedIn of via thenvoortaal@gmail.com.

Name: Dover Nyelvi Centrum
Description: Dover Nyelvi Centrum - Nyelviskola a belváros szívében

Name: Jaci - Language Services
Description: Unlock Global Fluency: Learn French, English, Portuguese!

Name: LINGUATON Szkoła Języka angielskiego
Description:
Uczymy już ponad 30 lat i mamy się czym pochwalić. Stawiamy sobie i Tobie wysoką poprzeczkę. Jesteśmy specjalistami, zajmujemy się tylko językiem angielskim, a nasi lektorzy to najlepsi z najlepszych. Dostosujemy naukę do Ciebie i, jeśli tylko pozwolisz, zarazimy Cię naszą pasją do angielskiego. Przekonamy Cię, że nauka języka może być prawdziwą przygodą.

Nauczymy Cię jak skutecznie komunikować się z ludźmi z całego świata. Po naszych kursach zdasz egzamin, zrobisz wrażenie na rozmowie kwalifikacyjnej, poradzisz sobie w pracy, zdobędziesz szanse na awans i poznasz mnóstwo nowych osób. Pomożemy Ci odkryć całkiem nowy świat.

Linguaton to przede wszystkim ludzie – ciekawi, aktywni i pełni energii. Nasza szkoła to tętniąca życiem społeczność. Organizujemy mnóstwo imprez, koncertów i spotkań z wyjątkowymi osobami. Uczymy się od siebie nawzajem i świetnie się przy tym bawimy.

Name: Kenny Business English
Description:

I have been assisting executives and business professionals from more than 50 different countries to become more confident, comfortable, and effective in their business communications. I ensure my clients are well-prepared and feel at ease in any circumstances, such as presentations, pitches, public speaking engagements, meetings, conference calls, multinational collaboration, job interviews, and more.

You'll sharpen your English conversation skills by discussing current and relevant topics drawn from TED Talks, podcasts and current news reports. At every step along the way, you'll receive personalized VIP attention with my targeted feedback and guidance. 

Choose from a variety of flexible training options:
- Business English Conversation Classes (Gain fluency in spontaneous conversation with other highly-motivated professionals from around the world. Seating limited to a maximum of 4 students per session.)
- One-on-One Classes (Highly-customized, private sessions with Kenny, providing intensive speaking practice and goal-specific learning methods.)
- Interactive, Self-Study Course (Watch short videos, learn key vocabulary and take quizzes to prepare for topic-based conversation.)

Throughout my career, I have helped hundreds of professionals achieve their personal and career goals. If you're ready to open doors to a world of new opportunities and career advancements, I can help you too. Let's get to work!

Name: Princeton in Beijing
Description:
Princeton in Beijing is a high-quality intensive program in intermediate and advanced Chinese language study for the serious language student. The faculty from Princeton brings to this effort more than three decades of leadership in the pioneering of intensive "total immersion" summer Chinese language programs in the United States; in addition to more than three decades of experience in producing Chinese language textbooks at Princeton University's Chinese Linguistics Project. To this experience is added the ultimate Chinese language environment -- China's capital city of Beijing.

The Princeton Chinese Language Program has established its own distinctive pedagogy while developing a series of Chinese language textbooks based on the belief that a strong foundation with an emphasis on accurate pronunciation and grammar is absolutely necessary for language mastery. The "total immersion" approach includes such special features as: a student pledge to speak no language other than Mandarin Chinese throughout the session; individual tutorial sessions in the afternoons; constant contact with faculty and other students in campus life; and special lectures on aspects of China studies. 

Princeton in Beijing is unique among in-country Chinese language programs in its use of an American model, the Princeton University model. All teaching materials and methods, as well as techniques of testing, grading, and course evaluation, are from Princeton University. The teaching faculty in charge of courses is also from the United States. The Princeton in Beijing faculty combines this approach with their years of experience to provide students with an intensive learning atmosphere within the natural language environment of mainland China.

Creemos que todos podemos y debemos aprender inglés, para lo cual te mostramos la forma correcta de usarlo conociendo y desarrollando las áreas y habilidades de dicho idioma de una manera significativa y dinámica desde un inicio, lo que da como resultado la aplicación correcta de la lengua.

Name: integra – Der Bildungsträger GmbH
Description:
Als Bildungsträger übernehmen wir einen wichtigen, gesellschaftlichen Auftrag. Wir unterstützen Menschen dabei, sich neue berufliche Perspektiven zu erarbeiten. Bildung verstehen wir dabei nicht nur als Wissensvermittlung, sondern auch als persönliche Entwicklung. Jeder Mensch hat Potenziale, die geweckt werden können. Bildung ist der Schlüssel, um die eigenen Potenziale zu entdecken und zu entfalten.

Integra steht für berufliches Weiterkommen durch Bildung. Was Ihrem beruflichen Weiterkommen auch im Wege steht: ob Bewerbung, persönliche Herausforderungen, berufliche Weiterbildung, Umschulung oder Sprache. Wir sind für Sie da und finden passgenaue Lösungen.

Auf Ihrem weiteren, beruflichen Weg wollen wir Sie optimal unterstützen. Das bedeutet für uns, Sie individuell zu beraten. Uns leitet dabei die Frage: Wie können wir Ihnen helfen, Ihre Ziele zu erreichen? Wir legen daher besonders großen Wert auf eine eingehende Bildungsberatung. Vereinbaren Sie jetzt einen Termin, damit wir gemeinsam besprechen können, wie Sie sich beruflich weiterentwickeln können.

Name: Hello NIAN

Name: Just_Jazykovka
Description:
Věříme, že jazyková výuka nemá být jen další benefit vedle Multisportky nebo ovoce v kuchyňce. Je to investice do lidí, která obohatí nejen jejich kariéru, ale i jejich život mimo práci.

Jak se lišíme od ostatních jazykovek?

U nás můžete mít až 6 jazyků v jedné smlouvě. To znamená, že každý z vašeho týmu si vybere jazyk, který mu dává největší smysl – klidně i dva naráz. Někdo s českým lektorem, někdo s rodilým mluvčím. Nejsme postavení na jednom učiteli, který se stará o všechno. Fungujeme jako tým lektorů, a proto se o vás staráme společně. Díky tomu si každý z týmu může nastavit kombinaci přesně podle svých cílů – třeba angličtinu s rodilým, španělštinu s českým lektorem a k tomu ještě němčinu s někým dalším.

A výuka u nás nekončí jen v hodinách. Nepožadujeme po vašich lidech, aby si sami kupovali učebnice nebo sháněli materiály. Všichni od nás dostanou plný přístup k platformě JustShop.cz s videokurzy, e-booky a dalšími materiály k samostudiu. Díky tomu se mohou posouvat v jazyce i mimo lekce, kdykoliv chtějí.

Proč to děláme?

Protože chceme, aby jazykové vzdělávání bylo pro firmy víc než jen „další hodina angličtiny“. Naším cílem je, aby vaši lidé získali sebevědomí komunikovat v cizím jazyce a to nejen v práci, ale i v životě. Jazyková výuka není jen o slovíčkách. Je to společný zážitek, který tým stmelí, protože všichni překonávají osobní výzvu mimo běžnou pracovní rutinu.

Name: Boulder School for German Language & Culture

All our classes and activities are open to the public. The Boulder School for German Language and Culture provides support regardless of race, color, religion, national and ethnic origin for the establishment of educational centers that are open to the general public.

Name: Dr. Wang Sprachenschule
Description:
Dr. Wang Sprachenschule ist ein nach AZAV zertifizierter Bildungsträger. Wir bieten vor allem online Einzeln-Bewerbungstraining für ausländische Arbeitssuchende inkl. Abbau sprachlicher Barrieren und berufsvorbereitende Deutschkurse B2/C1 oder B1+/B2 an. Mit dem Gutschein der Agentur für Arbeit (AVGS）ist die Teilnahme komplett kostenfrei. Wie kann man einen AVGS beantragen? Wir beraten Sie gern.

Neben Deutschkursen und Chinesischkursen bieten wir noch weitere sprachliche Dienstleistungen an: Übersetzen/Dolmetschen und Lektorat/Korrektur für Deutsch, Chinesisch und Englisch.

Die Inhaberin der Sprachenschule, eine promovierte Germanistin aus China, seit über 10 Jahren in Deutschland ansässig, bewegt sich jeden Tag zwischen deutscher und chinesischer Sprache bzw. Kultur und sieht sich deswegen dazu berufen, mit ihren Sprachdienstleistungen zur erfolgreichen Begegnung und Kommunikation zwischen Chinesen und Deutschen beizutragen.

Name: Centrum Języków Obcych "GERMANIA"
Description: Nasza szkoła językowa specjalizuje się w nauczaniu języka niemieckiego przydatnego w życiu codziennym, jak i w środowisku zawodowym. Skupiamy się na edukacji dorosłych, dostarczając im umiejętności językowych, które otwierają nowe możliwości kariery i poprawiają komunikację międzynarodową. Nasze kursy są dostosowane do potrzeb współczesnego rynku pracy, łącząc praktyczną naukę języka z wykorzystaniem nowoczesnych technologii edukacyjnych. Jesteśmy zobowiązani do zapewnienia naszym uczniom wysokiej jakości doświadczeń edukacyjnych, które nie tylko wzbogacą ich wiedzę językową, ale także zainspirują do ciągłego rozwoju i odkrywania nowych horyzontów.

Name: Centrum Języków Obcych, Biuro Tłumaczeń "Gerlang"
Description: Nieprzerwanie od roku 2002 organizujemy kursy języka angielskiego i niemieckiego. Od początku naszej działalności jesteśmy z Wami na Gdańskiej Zaspie. Przez kilka lat organizowaliśmy kursy językowe w Domu Kultury „Młyniec”. W ciągu ostatnich 15 lat nasza siedziba mieściła się przy ul. Żwirki i Wigury, a od września 2021 w nowej, większej siedzibie w Galerii Zaspa. Prowadzimy również nasze kursy w szkołach podstawowych nr 5 i 92 na Zaspie. Szkoła Językowa Gerlang od kilku już lat jest akredytowanym Centrum nauczania metodami Teddy Eddie i Savvy Ed, a od tego roku autoryzowanym Centrum Egzaminacyjnym Cambridge Assessment English PL277. Poza działalnością edukacyjną oferujemy również tłumaczenia przysięgłe i zwykłe dla większości języków. Nasze drugie biuro (tylko tłumaczeniowe) znajduje się w C.H. Batory w Gdyni.

Name: Time for English San Fernando
Description:
English academy with years of experience in the industry. We offer classes for all ages, from children as young as four to adults. We prepare students for the official Cambridge exams up to level C1.

With qualified, native, experienced teachers, our classes are conducted entirely in English, providing a fully immersive language experience. We cover all aspects of English learning, including reading comprehension, writing, listening, speaking, and grammar. But we also have fun in class with songs, games, and culture!

Name: e4devs
Description:
Impulsione Sua Carreira em Tecnologia com o E4Devs - Inglês para Desenvolvedores! 

Olá, Comunidade de Desenvolvedores!

É hora de levar sua carreira para o palco global com o E4Devs, nosso curso de inglês feito sob medida para você, desenvolvedor de software. Em um mundo onde a tecnologia não conhece fronteiras, suas habilidades linguísticas também não devem ter!

Por que Escolher o E4Devs?

Contexto Relevante: Todos os nossos exemplos e estudos de caso são cuidadosamente escolhidos do mundo da tecnologia. Aqui, você aprende o inglês que realmente usa no seu dia a dia de desenvolvedor!
Foco em Aplicações Práticas: Preparamos você para brilhar em apresentações pessoais, ter sucesso em entrevistas de emprego em inglês, explicar códigos complexos e discutir layouts com fluência e confiança.
Inglês para Negócios e Tecnologia: Mergulhe em jargões e vocabulários específicos das áreas de TI e negócios. Fale a língua do seu setor com a mesma habilidade que você programa!
Transforme Sua Comunicação

Aulas dinâmicas e interativas.
Professores experientes em tecnologia e linguística.
Networking com outros profissionais da área.

Name: CNA Rio Bonito
Description:
Uma das maiores e mais tradicionais redes de escolas de idiomas do Brasil. O CNA está há 49 anos de atuação no mercado (1973). Em Rio Bonito a marca está presente desde 2009. Somos 679
escolas em todo Brasil e uma das redes mais premiadas do franchising brasileiro. Todos os alunos formando são preparados para Certificações Internacionais (Cambridge e SIELE) que atestam o conhecimento.

Name: BE Language
Description:
BE#LANGUAGE no es una academia de idiomas tradicional. Fue creada con el objetivo de capacitar a nuestros alumnos para conseguir una certificación oficial de manera más rápida y accesible.

BE#LANGUAGE dispone de un método propio de aprendizaje que permite conseguir las certificaciones requeridas en un plazo corto. Además disponemos de otros cursos que ayudan a consolidar conocimientos y ganar seguridad en el uso de lenguas. Todos ellos adaptados a las necesidades de nuestros alumnos.

Name: Lingua Lab
Description: Somos una academia situada en el barrio de Prosperidad, Madrid, y nos dedicamos a ofrecer clases de idiomas de alta calidad para estudiantes de todas las edades. Ofrecemos clases de inglés, francés y alemán, principalmente. Nuestro enfoque se basa en profesores nativos altamente cualificados y métodos de enseñanza efectivos. Además, organizamos campamentos urbanos de inglés durante el verano. Únete a nosotros y descubre una experiencia educativa de calidad para el aprendizaje de idiomas.

Name: CapPig - English School
Description:
Spice up your English with CapPig! 

Hi there! I'm Bartek, your future English teacher. My passion for foreign languages and teaching experience make every lesson not just learning, but also great fun!

 Why CapPig? There's an old saying that the future belongs to those who focus on conversation. Instead of cramming unnecessary vocabulary, I'll show you how to use English in practice, here and now! My individual approach to each student and a fun atmosphere make learning with me a piece of cake. See for yourself and come to a free trial lesson!

 Who is it for? I specialize in teaching adults, seniors, and high school students. Whether you're just starting your English adventure or want to polish your skills, I'm happy to help!

 Business English: Do you work in a corporation? Need language skills for business contacts? I offer specialized training for companies. I'll teach you how to shine at international meetings, negotiate contracts, and conquer the world!

 Certificates? No problem! I'll professionally prepare you for exams like FCE, CAE, TOEFL, TOEIC. Am I effective? Ask my students who confidently achieved C1/C1+ certifications.

Description: A Aliança Francesa São Gonçalo faz parte de uma rede de ensino internacionalmente reconhecida por sua tradição e pela qualidade de ensino. Description: The Kinshasa School of Lingala is an online school dedicated to the teaching of Lingala. Our teachers are all native speakers with deep experience in online and language teaching.

Name: Edu Dialect
Description:
Edu Dialect is a volunteer-driven non-profit organization committed to providing underprivileged children around the world with educational opportunities and essential resources. Through our innovative English language program, fluent speakers can connect with individuals from diverse backgrounds and support our mission of building stronger, more inclusive communities. Our advanced English language classes provide experiential learning opportunities that encourage participants to apply their knowledge and actively engage with the language, while also supporting our charitable endeavours. 

By partnering with Edu Dialect, volunteers and learners alike can make a real difference in the lives of children and families in need, and help create a more equitable world for all.

Name: Fine Idiomas
Description:
Fluência em 8 meses - O caminho rápido para o inglês perfeito!

Seu destino para a fluência em inglês em apenas 8 meses! Aprenda de forma rápida e eficaz com nossos cursos especializados, professores experientes e metodologia comprovada. Prepare-se para abrir portas para novas oportunidades profissionais, acadêmicas e de viagens. Junte-se a nós e descubra o poder de se comunicar em inglês de maneira fluente e confiante. Invista no seu futuro com Fine Idiomas, a escola que transforma o aprendizado em resultados tangíveis!
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: 800Arabia.org
Description:
Eight Hundred Arabia is a pioneering initiative under the umbrella of Eight Hundred SAT Center, committed to making the Arabic language and culture accessible to everyone, no matter where they are in the world. Our mission goes beyond just teaching the Arabic language; we aim to provide an immersive experience that brings the richness of Arab culture to life through our comprehensive programs. Eight Hundred Arabia operates with a vision to bridge cultural gaps and foster understanding by offering Arabic language courses tailored to all proficiency levels. Whether you are a beginner looking to learn the basics, an intermediate student seeking to improve your skills, or an advanced learner aiming to master the language, we have the right course for you. Our curriculum is designed to not only teach the language but also to introduce students to the diverse and vibrant cultures of the Arab world.
Through our classes, we offer insights into Arabic music, poetry, theater, film, media, and culinary traditions, providing a holistic learning experience. Additionally, we create opportunities for cultural exchange, enabling our students to engage with the Arab world in meaningful and impactful ways. We are proud to have a global presence, with branches in Amman-Jordan, Riyadh-Saudi Arabia, Abu Dhabi-UAE, Dusseldorf-Germany, Windsor-Ontario(Canada), and Cairo-Egypt. Our locations are strategically chosen to provide the best learning environments and resources, ensuring that our students receive top-quality education wherever they are. At Eight Hundred Arabia, we believe that learning Arabic is not just about mastering a language—it’s about connecting with a culture, a history, and a way of life that is both ancient and dynamic. Join us on this journey and discover the beauty of the Arabic language and the richness of Arab culture

Name: OÜ Hispaania Maja
Description:
Is so much more than just a language school. We don’t only teach Spanish, but take you to a journey to unveil a whole world of Spanish culture, enabling you to experience the language in a completely new way. 

Hispaania Maja is situated in the 18th century Sprinckthal manor house in the heart of Tondi neighbourhood, being within easy reach from the city centre, but also the surrounding neighbourhoods. 

Over the years, we have built our centre for Spanish language and culture, turning it into a place so rich in diversity as the Spanish language itself. Hispaania Maja is a language school for adults and children, a bookstore, a private teacher, an arranger of intensive courses in Spain and Latin America, a direct importer of study materials, a teacher trainer, a Spanish food and wine promoter, a virtual teacher on your computer screen or just a place to meet friendly faces. Even this list does not cover everything, but one thing is for sure – our doors are always open to every Spanish language and culture enthusiast.

We have three classrooms: one on the ground floor for up to ten students, a spacious attic classroom for up to 12 students and a porch full of light to give private lessons for up to five students. We also house the biggest bookshop in Estonia dedicated to Spanish language and culture, offering study books, grammar books, dictionaries, literature and cookbooks at the best prices. 

Our new centre, a 18th century manor house with a spacious veranda and even a fully equipped professional kitchen, is the perfect place to celebrate events and short courses. And as it is extremely important for us to bring Northern and Spanish cultures closer together, we also offer a wide range of translated literature: Spanish literature in Estonian; and Estonian, Finnish, Norwegian and Swedish literature in Spanish.

Name: Centro de Idiomas TEC Campus Monterrey
Description: El Centro de Idiomas del Tecnológico de Monterrey ofrece programas de idiomas de alta calidad, enfocados en la práctica y la inmersión del idioma, lo que permite adquirir sólidos conocimientos lingüísticos y mejorar su perfil profesional.

Name: DAR AL RAHMAH LTD
Description: Dar Al Rahmah (pronounced Dar-Ar-Rahmah) was founded by Ustadha Zeenat in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia in 1999. Its purpose is to teach Tajweed and Islamic studies to students of all ages. It is a centre of excellence in Islamic education and has rigorously devoted efforts to provide our students with the best teaching and highly trained teachers. We have developed our own programme and curriculum to meet the needs of the students in various fields of Islam, especially Qur’an recitation, Tajweed, translation, fiqh, aqeedah, duah & Arabic language.

Beyond the classroom, we offer enriching activities that immerse our students in the local culture and daily life. This hands-on approach allows for a deeper understanding of the language and fosters a true connection to the community.

Join us at our English language school and embark on a transformative language journey. Let us guide you towards fluency and equip you with the tools you need to succeed in today's globalized world.

Name: Learn Chinese Language
Description:
At Learn Chinese Language, our mission is to make Mandarin simple, practical, and accessible for everyone. Whether you are just starting your journey or looking for a full structured program, we provide the right resources for you. If you want to learn Chinese for beginners, our step-by-step lessons are designed to build a strong foundation with easy vocabulary, grammar, and daily phrases.
We also offer unique ways to practice, including techniques to learn Chinese while you sleep, helping you improve listening skills and retention effortlessly. Our carefully designed learn Chinese language full course in Urdu is ideal for learners in Pakistan and other Urdu-speaking communities, making Mandarin understandable without language barriers. For international students, we also provide a Chinese language course in English so that anyone can learn Chinese language with confidence.

Our platform is built for modern learners — students, professionals, and travelers who want to explore opportunities in China or connect globally. With structured lessons, interactive exercises, and cultural insights, we make Chinese language learning engaging and effective. Whether you are interested in a quick introduction or a complete Chinese language course in Urdu, you’ll find the right tools here.

Name: Academia Árabe
Description:
Nuestra filosofía es sencilla: queremos que nuestros alumnos pasen de estudiar árabe a hablar árabe. El árabe es una lengua que a menudo se ve encadenada a unos métodos de enseñanza arcaicos, repetitivos e ineficaces. Resultado de ello es que los alumnos pasan años aprendiendo árabe sin ser capaces de mantener la conversación más sencilla, lo que provoca su desmotivación y, en muchos casos, el abandono.

Nosotros luchamos contra esto centrándonos en el alumno, en sus necesidades y en sus motivaciones. Buscamos que nuestros alumnos se apasionen por este idioma y esta cultura tan enriquecedores, para que formen parte integral de ellos. Que su aprendizaje en nuestras aulas les sea útil y productivo, tanto en su entorno laboral como para sus inquietudes personales. Que su formación en nuestros cursos de árabe sea amena y dinámica. Que gracias a nuestro profesorado cualificado los alumnos salgan motivados por aprender la lengua árabe y quieran seguir ampliando sus conocimientos. Buscamos, en definitiva, que nuestros alumnos aprendan a hablar árabe y lo pasen bien haciéndolo

Name: RAINBOW PLAYSCHOOL
Description: Rainbow Playschool è una Scuola dell’infanzia Internazionale Montessoriana che nasce con lo scopo di integrare la lingua Inglese al Metodo Montessori.

Name: WinWords English School
Description:
WinWords English School é uma escola de inglês online especializada em oferecer uma experiência personalizada para diferentes perfis de alunos. Atendemos desde atletas que buscam bolsas no exterior até profissionais de empresas que precisam do inglês no dia a dia. Também oferecemos aulas de General English para quem quer desenvolver fluência com segurança e autonomia.

Nosso programa de preparatório para provas internacionais abrange exames como SAT, TOEFL, IELTS e Duolingo, com estratégias eficazes e foco nos objetivos individuais de cada aluno.

Flexibilidade, acompanhamento próximo e resultados reais: esse é o nosso compromisso.

Name: Inglês Leve Up
Description: A Inglês Leve Up está no mercado para descomplicar o estudo do inglês. Se você já tentou antes e não conseguiu, permita-se vivenciar uma experiência positiva. A Teacher Isa com 22 anos de experiência consegue desvendar como você aprende melhor e traçar um plano de estudos personalizado para você. Temos flexibilidade de metodologia e material. Aprenda inglês de maneira leve!

Name: Oaklearn Center

Selain menyediakan pembelajaran dengan settingan kelas, OAKLEARN CENTER juga menyediakan pembelajaran dengan settingan privat yang dikhususkan untuk pelajar dengan sillabus yang dikostumisasi.

OakLearn juga menyediakan kelas Online maupun Offline untuk mengakomodasi kebutuhan setiap individu di manapun lokasi mereka.

Visi Oaklearn

Name: Riverton English Academy
Description: We connect global citizens with unique needs through professionalism and cultural diversity by providing supportive programs which help them achieve their goals. Located in the heart of Brisbane, our academy is more than just a place to learn – it's a community where students from all over the world come together.

Name: Professor Jan
Description:
Brasileiro com nome holandês, professor de Inglês para Negócios  experiente, com formação em administração e 30 anos de experiência de gestão e projetos nas áreas de Recursos Humanos, Administração Geral e Logística, e atuação em Consultoria de Seleção. Name: Eazy Academy
Description: Na Eazy Academy, acreditamos que a educação do futuro é híbrida, humana e inspirada. Não importa se você está procurando dominar um novo idioma ou expandir seus horizontes, aqui você encontrará um espaço onde a tecnologia e a conexão humana se unem para transformar vidas.

Name: EURIDIS Deutsche Sprache
Description:
Die Euridis gGmbH ist ein führendes europäisches Institut für die deutsche Sprache, das sich der Förderung, Erforschung und Vermittlung des Deutschen als Fremd- und Zweitsprache widmet. Unser interdisziplinäres Team aus Sprachwissenschaftlern, Didaktik-Experten und Technologie-Spezialisten entwickelt innovative Lehrmethoden und digitale Lösungen für den modernen Sprachunterricht.

Wir kombinieren persönlichen Sprachunterricht mit hochqualifizierten, motivierten Deutschlehrern mit den Möglichkeiten neuester Technologien. Durch den gezielten Einsatz von KI-gestützten Avataren und humanoiden Robotern schaffen wir interaktive, immersive Lernumgebungen, die den Spracherwerb erleichtern und den Lernprozess individuell anpassen. Diese zukunftsweisenden Ansätze ermöglichen eine lebendige, praxisnahe und nachhaltige Sprachvermittlung.
Wir sind in Düsseldorf und KÖln im Einsatz und bieten speziell für Unternehmen maßgeschneiderte Sprachkurse an, um deren Beschäftigte gezielt beim Erwerb der deutschen Sprache zu unterstützen. Unsere Inhouse-Schulungen ermöglichen es Unternehmen, ihren Mitarbeitenden praxisnahe Sprachtrainings direkt am Arbeitsplatz anzubieten.

Mit Partnern aus Wissenschaft, Bildung und Wirtschaft setzen wir uns für die Verbreitung und Weiterentwicklung der deutschen Sprache ein. Unser Angebot umfasst Sprachkurse, Forschung, Lehrmaterialien und Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten für Lehrkräfte. Gemeinsam gestalten wir die Zukunft der Sprachvermittlung in einer globalisierten Welt.

Name: Language & Culture
Description:
Language & Culture est une société basée en Occitanie qui propose des immersions linguistiques et culturelles pour des adultes qui apprennent le français dans leur pays d'origine. Ces immersions prévoient que les stagiaires soient hébergés une ou deux semaines au choix dans une famille d'accueil à Toulouse, la capitale de la région Occitanie  ou à Nîmes, la ville romaine. Ils suivent 20 heures de cours de Français Langue Etrangère par semaine le matin et visitent les environs de leur ville d'accueil et participent à des activités culturelles l'après-midi. 

Language & Culture is a company based in the Occitanie region that offers language and cultural immersion courses for adults learning French in their home country. During these immersions, students stay with a host family for one or two weeks in Toulouse, the capital of the Occitanie region, or in Nîmes, the Roman city. They attend 20 hours of French as a Foreign Language lessons a week in the mornings, and visit the area around their host city and take part in cultural activities in the afternoons.

Name: MHS - Student Homestay
Description:
At Medway Homestay we have over 20 years experience of providing well organised school trips, and homestay accommodation in Kent and London. 

We have three centres across Kent and London, which are all an easy commute to the popular tourist destinations such as, Central London, Brighton & Cambridge.

Our warm and welcoming homestay families and qualified English language tutors provide fun, culture and a lifelong memories for every student.

Name: Lerno Academy
Description:
Lerno Academy | Apprendre l’allemand. Bâtir son avenir.

Name: LSN: SWAHILI MADE EASY APP
Description:
We help professionals and teams communicate clearly, confidently, and culturally-smart in Swahili, without wasting time.

If your company operates in East Africa, Swahili isn’t just “nice to have”, it’s a strategic advantage.

At LSN: Swahili Made Easy, we specialize in helping busy professionals learn practical Swahili fast, so they can lead meetings, build trust with local partners, and navigate daily interactions with ease.

Our no-fluff, real-world approach cuts through the overwhelm and delivers:
 Clear, time-efficient lessons designed for working adults
 Business-relevant vocabulary & conversation practice
 Cultural context to avoid costly miscommunication
 Options for individual learners and team training

Whether you’re in international development, logistics, tourism, health, education, or corporate expansion, language barriers don’t have to hold you back.

Let’s make Swahili a bridge, not a barrier.

 On-demand courses + private coaching
 Team workshops & onboarding support
 Swahili for business, travel, and diplomacy
 Trusted by professionals across sectors

 Ready to equip your team with the language skills to thrive in East Africa?

Name: DirLingua Language House
Description:
At DirLingua Language House, we believe language is more than words; it’s an international passport to people, perspectives and endless possibilities.

From classrooms to clubs, our learners don’t just pick up phrases, they pick up confidence, curiosity and cultural flair! Whether you’re looking to polish your professional pitch or chat over a cuppa with friends abroad, we turn language learning into an adventure where every conversation is a stepping stone to fluency and fun.

We strive to make language a bridge, not a barrier. We mix clever coaching with cultural connection and a pinch of playful practice so every learner becomes a confident communicator and a global citizen.

At DirLingua, we don’t just teach languages: we live them, laugh with them and watch doors open syllable by syllable.

Name: ViviaIdiomas
Description:
VIVIA es una comunidad educativa que enseña inglés, español, francés, alemán e italiano mediante un modelo híbrido que combina tecnología con experiencias reales y humanas. Utilizamos una plataforma de aprendizaje con inteligencia artificial disponible 24/7, que permite al estudiante practicar en cualquier momento, complementada con sesiones conversacionales en vivo, actividades presenciales y conexiones globales que fortalecen el uso real del idioma en contextos culturales diversos.

Cada estudiante cuenta con un plan de aprendizaje totalmente personalizado, diseñado según su nivel, sus objetivos personales o profesionales y el tiempo que tenga disponible. A lo largo del proceso, un gestor motivacional lo acompaña, guiando su progreso, resolviendo dudas y ayudando a mantener el compromiso con el aprendizaje.

Nuestro modelo es flexible, sin contratos ni cláusulas de permanencia, lo que permite a cada persona avanzar a su ritmo y según sus necesidades. En VIVIA creemos que aprender un idioma no debe ser una obligación, sino una experiencia transformadora.

Te invitamos a conocer cómo funciona nuestro modelo en una sesión conversacional gratuita, donde podrás experimentar de primera mano cómo combinamos tecnología, conexión humana y cultura para que aprender un idioma sea realmente significativo. No tomes la decisión sin vivirlo antes. Descúbrelo con nosotros!

Name: Inglés Para Veterinarios
Description: Somos especialistas en veterinaria e inglés, nos interesa que los médicos veterinarios adquieran la habilidad y confianza de desempeñar su carrera en otro idioma.

Name: Seu Inglês Nativo.online
Description: Se a sua desculpa para não estudar inglês é não ter tempo, chegou a hora de mudar essa situação. Venha ser nativo conosco sem precisar sair do conforto de sua casa! Temos horários flexíveis que se encaixam na sua rotina.

Name: NewEnglish - inglês para brasileiros
Description:
O "NewEnglish - Inglês para brasileiros" surgiu há 5 anos, em Sergipe, como um sistema de delivery de inglês para adultos e apenas uma professora. Depois de mais de 130 alunos, Ms. Vera se especializou no ensino de inglês para adultos e desenvolveu uma metodologia que utiliza o melhor do conhecimento que cada indivíduo já carrega em si para acelerar o processo de aprendizado do idioma, respeitando a rotina e a disponibilidade de cada um.

Hoje, o curso adotou o formato 100% online e possui a missão de levar a melhor experiência de ensino de inglês para tornar fluentes brasileiros ao redor do mundo, através de uma metodologia onde a comunicação é ativa e o ensino é fomentado com empatia e acolhimento. 

Em 2023, o curso recebe novos professores capacitados com a nossa cultura e todos os nossos valores para ensinar inglês como segunda língua - que é para você que não é nativo e deseja aprender o idioma, sabe?


Assim, queremos reconhecidos como uma empresa de excelência no ensino de inglês online, na qual o aluno se sente a parte principal do aprendizado. Além disso, esperamos contribuir com um ambiente em que há a valorização e estímulo de todos os profissionais envolvidos, com o compromisso de aperfeiçoamento contínuo dos nossos métodos para buscar o que há de mais eficiente para o mercado.

Name: Edtech Aloha
Description:
A Edtech Aloha é uma franquia do Grupo Wiser Educação. A empresa foi fundada em 2024 e é pertencente ao grupo e Holding de Flávio Augusto - GERAÇÃO DE VALOR. Trabalhamos com serviços de venda direta dos produtos digitais do Grupo Wiser: Wise Up Online e Wise Up LIVE.

Nosso objetivo é a mudança de vida de pessoas através de nossos produtos de inglês. Além disso, transformar a carreira de pessoas que estejam em busca de um caminho de crescimento e impacto na sociedade. O intraempreendedorismo é incentivado na empresa através de um plano de carreira bem estruturado, visando trazer os colaboradores para um outro nível profissional, formando líderes e protagonistas, com a possibilidade de se tornarem futuros sócios.

Name: C3 English
Description: We make learning effective and enriching through evidence-based methods like Comparative Linguistics, Spaced Repetition, and Task-Based Learning. We enhance pronunciation using theater and speech therapy techniques, leveraging techniques traditionally used in acting to improve speech clarity, intonation, and expressiveness in English learners. This innovative approach incorporates exercises and practices from the world of theater, such as voice modulation, breath control, and articulation drills, to help students overcome pronunciation barriers. ensuring every lesson improves your communication skills.

Name: Mentra Plus
Description:
MentraPlus is a modern online learning platform designed to help learners across Southeast Asia unlock their potential through practical, results-driven English education.

We believe that English is more than just a language — it’s a life skill that opens doors to academic achievement, career opportunities, and global connection. Our mission is to make high-quality English learning accessible, affordable, and effective for students, young professionals, and anyone with ambition beyond borders.

At MentraPlus, we specialize in self-paced, pre-recorded English training that fits into busy lives without compromising on quality. Our initial focus is on IELTS — one of the most widely recognized English proficiency tests — but our long-term vision goes much further. We are building a growing library of content that covers the essential skills learners need to succeed: Speaking, Writing, Listening, and Reading, plus professional communication, academic English, and real-life fluency.

Each MentraPlus course is designed by expert educators and built around one clear idea: to deliver smart, structured learning that works. No fluff. No outdated methods. Just content that delivers results.

Name: Russian Language Program
Description:
Welcome to The Russian Program, your gateway to mastering the Russian language.

At The Russian Program, we understand the significance of language as a powerful bridge that connects individuals, cultures, and global communities. With our comprehensive and tailored approach, we are dedicated to providing exceptional Russian language education.

Our experienced and passionate instructors are committed to guiding you on your language journey. Whether you're an expat family, a student, or a professional seeking to expand your language skills, we offer a range of programs designed to meet your unique needs. From immersive group classes to personalized one-on-one tutoring, we ensure a supportive learning environment that nurtures your language growth.

But our commitment goes beyond language proficiency. We believe in the transformative power of cultural understanding. Through our dynamic curriculum, we immerse you in Russian traditions, history, literature, and contemporary society, fostering a deeper connection to the vibrant Russian culture.

Join our vibrant community of learners and explore the vast opportunities that await you. Connect with fellow language enthusiasts, participate in cultural events, and expand your network. With 24/7 language support and access to a wealth of resources, we are here to empower you every step of the way.

Whether your goals are personal, academic, or professional, The Russian Program equips you with the linguistic skills, cultural knowledge, and confidence to navigate the vast Russian-speaking world. Embark on a transformative language journey with us and uncover the beauty of the Russian language.

Are you ready to unlock your Russian language skills potential? Connect with us on LinkedIn and embark on a language adventure that will change the way you see the world.

Name: ausgesprochen gut
Description:
Your situation:
You’ve attended so many language courses , tried countless learning apps , and watched tons of YouTube videos , yet your German still isn’t where you need it to be? At work, you can’t use your German, or maybe you don’t dare to speak it? You’re simply not making any progress? Sometimes your pronunciation is a barrier to being understood? 

Your path:
It’s not about WHAT you learn, but HOW you learn. YOUR NEEDS must be the focus, YOUR MOTIVATION must be found, YOUR GOALS must be identified. Then, you’ll soon master German on a whole new level. 

Your solution:
I’m happy to accompany you on the path to YOUR GOAL and show you, with my extensive know-how, how you can shape YOUR learning journey —sometimes in unconventional ways. I will learn with you in the way YOU need, whether face-to-face, online, or a mix of both depending on your available time, but always with movement , brain-efficient methods , and with the content YOU need. WITHOUT fixed content from textbooks !

Feel free to contact me for a free consultation.

Name: Connecting Us Academy
Description:
En Connecting Us, unimos personas y culturas a través del poder de los idiomas. Somos más que una academia; somos una comunidad global que busca trascender las barreras del lenguaje y abrir un mundo de oportunidades. 
Nuestra metodología única y efectiva se basa en la neurociencia y la mnemotecnia, dos pilares científicos que potencian la capacidad natural del cerebro para aprender y recordar. A través de un entendimiento profundo de cómo se adquiere el conocimiento, aplicamos estrategias pedagógicas que garantizan un aprendizaje duradero, más allá del aula. La mnemotecnia permite que nuestros estudiantes conecten de manera efectiva el nuevo idioma con su memoria a largo plazo, facilitando su dominio y uso en situaciones prácticas.
Desde los más pequeños hasta los más adultos, Connecting Us tiene un lugar para todos. Comenzamos a sembrar el amor por los idiomas desde los 3 años, a través de una enseñanza lúdica y efectiva que inspira la curiosidad y promueve el aprendizaje natural.
Para aquellos que buscan mejorar sus habilidades lingüísticas con objetivos específicos, ofrecemos cursos de preparación para el TOEFL, guiados por expertos que proporcionan las herramientas necesarias para lograr resultados sobresalientes.
Asimismo, contamos con cursos especializados para call centers, preparando a profesionales para destacar en un mundo globalizado, mejorando no solo sus habilidades de comunicación, sino también su confianza y rendimiento en el entorno laboral.
Nuestros programas están diseñados para adaptarse a tu ritmo y necesidades, y lo mejor de todo es que son completamente online, con clases en vivo. Te brindamos la posibilidad de aprender desde la comodidad de tu hogar, sin renunciar a la interacción en tiempo real con instructores y compañeros.
En Connecting Us, te invitamos a embarcarte en un viaje de aprendizaje y descubrimiento, donde cada nuevo idioma que aprendes es una nueva puerta que se abre hacia oportunidades y experiencias enriquecedoras.

Name: Wise Up Guarulhos

A Wise Up é a escola de inglês para adultos 100% focada em fluência e resultados rápidos. 

Fundada em 1995, a Wise Up revolucionou o ensino de inglês com uma metodologia que garante fluência em apenas 18 meses. Nossos alunos desenvolvem habilidades reais, aprendendo inglês para o dia a dia e para o mundo dos negócios.  

Atualmente, contamos com 90 escolas distribuídas em 13 estados por todo o Brasil, oferecendo as modalidades de estudo presencial e online. Com 80 mil alunos ativos no ensino presencial e mais 60 mil na modalidade online, estamos comprometidos em garantir resultados e crescimento profissional.

Na Wise Up, você alcança a fluência e fala com o mundo.

Ace Your Language Test with Confidence!

 Expert-Designed Mock Tests – Simulate real exam conditions.

Name: Las Maestras - Ensino de Espanhol
Description:
A Las Maestras nasceu do encontro de duas brasileiras que compartilham uma paixão em comum: o espanhol. Beatriz e Giovana se conheceram na Universidade, se tornaram amigas e decidiram transformar o que amavam em um trabalho com propósito.

Mais do que ensinar um idioma, nossa missão é abrir caminhos. Criamos uma forma de aprender espanhol que foge do óbvio: viva, leve, aplicada à vida real. Acreditamos que o espanhol não é só uma habilidade, é uma ponte para conexões, oportunidades e segurança em ambientes pessoais e profissionais.

Com aulas online, materiais pensados com carinho e uma comunidade que acolhe, acompanhamos brasileiros que querem ir além do “me viro bem”. Aqui, você aprende a se expressar com confiança, mesmo sem sair do Brasil.

Porque falar espanhol vai muito além de saber conjugar verbos. É sobre se sentir capaz de ocupar espaços, participar de conversas importantes e se posicionar com clareza. E é isso que construímos com cada aluno, no seu ritmo, do seu jeito.

Quer aprender com propósito e leveza, mas com resultados reais? Vem com a gente!

Name: Language Mentors
Description:
Welcome to Language Mentors, where we believe in the power of language to connect people, cultures, and opportunities. Our mission is to provide comprehensive, personalized, and engaging language learning experiences that cater to your individual needs and goals.
Who We Are: Language Mentors is a team of dedicated language professionals with a passion for teaching and a commitment to excellence. We understand the challenges of learning a new language and are here to support you every step of the way.

Our Services:

* Live Interactive Classes: Participate in real-time classes with expert mentors and fellow learners, creating a dynamic and supportive learning environment.
* Personalized Tutoring: Enjoy one-on-one sessions tailored to your pace, goals, and learning style, ensuring the best possible outcomes.
* Flexible Schedules: Take advantage of our self-paced courses and flexible class timings to fit language learning into your busy life.
* Certification Programs: Earn recognized certifications that can enhance your career prospects and academic achievements.
* Cultural Immersion: Experience language learning beyond the classroom with cultural activities and virtual exchanges that broaden your understanding and appreciation of different cultures.

Why Choose Us?

* Expert Mentors: Learn from highly qualified and passionate language professionals who are dedicated to your success.
* Innovative Approach: Our blend of traditional methods and cutting-edge technology ensures an effective and enjoyable learning process.
* Global Community: Join a diverse community of learners from around the world, expanding your horizons and making new connections.
* Proven Success: Countless students have achieved their language goals with us. Your success story could be next!

Embark on your linguistic journey with Language Mentors today. Whether you're looking to enhance your career, travel the world, or connect with new cultures, we're here to guide you every step of the way. Let's

Name: Polka - Polish Language School
Description:
Cześć! Hello!
If you’d like to learn the Polish language from scratch or continue studying at a higher level, you’ve come to the right place!
- We teach the language using the communicative method.
- We conduct classes in small, intimate groups.
- We are preparing for the state certification exam.
- We conduct face-to-face classes.
- We conduct online courses.

For more information check https://www.szkola-polka.pl

Name: CNA Sacramento
Description:
Fomos pioneiros em Sacramento abrindo em 1991 a primeira escola de inglês de Sacramento, sempre no mesmo endereço. Até fins de 2011 fomos uma escola franqueada de outra rede de idiomas. 
No início de 2012 nos tornamos CNA, somos parte de uma das maiores redes de escola de idiomas do Brasil, com mais de 50 anos de experiência e mais de 700 escolas em todo o Brasil. Sua metodologia moderna explora elementos presenciais e a distância, além de inovadores recursos tecnológicos, que inserem o idioma no cotidiano do aluno a fim de proporcionar fluência ao falar, ler, escrever e compreender a língua mais naturalmente. 
Um dos projetos da rede que evidencia este diferencial, o premiado Speaking Exchange, recebeu 10 Leões no Festival Cannes Lions 2014. 

Em 2020, o CNA foi escolhido Franqueador do Ano pela Associação Brasileira de Franchising (ABF).  É também a única rede a obter por mais de 30 vezes de forma consecutiva o Selo de Excelência em Franchising. Está na lista Top 25 do Franchising Brasileiro organizada pelo Grupo Bittencourt desde sua primeira edição.

É a única escola de idiomas da América Latina a ter material didático exclusivo em parceria com a Disney. Também é centro aplicador autorizado dos exames internacionais de proficiência na língua inglesa da Universidade de Cambridge e do exame internacional de proficiência em língua espanhola SIELE, desenvolvido pelo Instituto Cervantes em parceria com a Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México (UNAM), a Universidad de Salamanca (USAL) e a Universidad de Buenos Aires (UBA). Autónoma de México (UNAM), a Universidad de Salamanca (USAL) e a Universidad de Buenos Aires (UBA).

Welcome to Dialog School of Polish, where language barriers become bridges to communication. Our school specializes in teaching Polish as a foreign language,
offering immersive experiences that foster cultural understanding and fluency. Join our community of 
learners from around the world and embark on a linguistic journey enriched with interactive lessons, 
cultural insights and personal guidance. Let’s unlock the power of Polish together at Dialog School of 
Polish!

Name: Spielerisch Englisch erleben
Description:
Kinder ab 4 Jahren erleben bei uns direkt in der jeweiligen KiTa oder Grundschule in einer Gruppe von 5-9 Kindern, spielerisch Englisch. 
Der Fokus liegt dabei eindeutig darauf Kinder für die englische Sprache zu begeistern und ihnen den Mut zu geben sich auf Englisch altersgerecht auszudrücken. 

Bewegungs- und Klatschspiele, Lieder und Reime, Lesen und Vorlesen, Basteln und Malen helfen uns mit viel Spaß anwendbares Wissen zu vermitteln und das Interesse an einer neue Sprache zu fördern.

Haben Sie noch Fragen oder möchten Sie ihr Kind zu einer kostenlosen Probestunde anmelden? Dann melden Sie sich bei uns.

Name: HOP Experience
Description: Com a Hop House Experience você aprende inglês de uma forma totalmente alternativa através de experiências reais onde você desenvolve a estrutura, vocabulário e som de forma natural. Com ferramentas como o storytelling e gamificação, você vai do zero à conversação em 6 meses, sendo capaz de entender e se comunicar nas situações do cotidiano.

Name: Komorebi Clases de Japonés

Name: Sprachschule accént

Name: Mundus International
Description:
En Mundus International ayudamos a empresas a eliminar la barrera del idioma para que sus equipos crezcan personal y profesionalmente. Ofrecemos una formación lingüística práctica, personalizada y basada en situaciones reales de negocio, diseñada para naturalizar el idioma y aplicarlo con seguridad en entornos laborales multiculturales. 

Más que una escuela, somos un puente hacia nuevas oportunidades globales.

At Mundus International, we empower companies to overcome language barriers, enabling their teams to thrive both personally and professionally. Our language training programs are practical, tailored, and rooted in real-world business scenarios, helping learners internalize the language and communicate confidently in multicultural settings. 

More than just a language school, we are a gateway to global opportunity.

Name: Mingle & Speak
Description:
The MINGLED approach incorporates several key elements:
M - Mix & Mingle: Immerse yourself in the language by mingling with a dynamic community of learners and native speakers. 
I - Interact: Regularly interact with other learners and native speakers. This social interaction deepens understanding and facilitates practical use of the language.
N - Novelty: Constantly expose yourself to new content, whether it's words, phrases, or cultural contexts. Diverse exposure reinforces learning and keeps your interest alive.
G - Guidance: Benefit from the guidance and feedback of tutors and native speakers to correct mistakes and refine your skills.
L - Ludic: Learn through fun with role-playing, interactive activities, and real-life simulations. Enjoyable learning increases motivation and information retention.
E - Exchange: Participate in language exchanges where you can practise with native speakers of your target language, while helping others learn your native tongue.
D - Development: Commit to continuous skill development through regular resources, advanced courses, and challenges that push your boundaries.

Name: First Prime
Description: Somos uma escola de idiomas que trabalha para fazer com que os nossos alunos aprendam de maneira interativa e dinâmica em um ambiente completamente imerso em tecnologia e inovação.

Name: What's up? Inglés
Description:
Contamos con un proceso de aprendizaje que respeta la etapa evolutiva de edad: brindamos cursos para no lectores, niñ@s, pre adolescentes, adolescentes y adultos. 

Creemos que aprendemos en comunidad, contemplando los intereses y metas de nuestr@s alumn@s;  y de manera efectiva, utilizando la metodología adecuada. 

Nuestra principal herramienta de trabajo es el juego, ya que fortalece los vínculos y es medio para aplicar los conocimientos aprendidos.

Contamos con un convenio con la UTN para certificar el nivel de nuestr@s alumn@s. Este certificado esta avalado por el Ministerio de Educación y la UTN, por ello tiene validez nacional. 

Contamos con una plataforma educativa donde se enceuntra la información, material y clases de nuestros cursos.

Description:

Flexibilidade e Acessibilidade: As aulas são online, oferecendo a flexibilidade de aprender de onde estiver. Também ofereço uma agenda fixa, para que você possa se organizar e ter regularidade no aprendizado.

Name: All In One Experience
Description:
Nacimos con el propósito de acercar el inglés y otros idiomas a la vida real, creando espacios dinámicos, cercanos y colaborativos donde se aprende hablando, compartiendo y conectando.

 Contamos con facilitadores bilingües y nativos que guían talleres de conversación, programas personalizados, clubes de lectura, experiencias culturales y espacios de networking profesional en distintas ciudades de Latinoamérica.

From beginner to advanced levels, our experienced instructors ensure effective language training to help you achieve your goals.

Name: My Language Institute
Description:
We teach Modern Standard Arabic as well as Gulf Dialect to non-native Arabic speakers from around the world through immersive programs, annual intensives, private lessons, and/or online study. 

 

Programs for learning Modern Standard Arabic are widely available, but very few of these programs teach local dialects, and even fewer of them teach Gulf dialects. We do both! Consider the options below to see which one might be right for you.
