Name: TULIP Academy Languages
Description: TULIP stands for "Teaching Unified Learners with Innovation and Passion." That is our goal. We have a unique approach to teaching where small class size is maintained and classes are constructed around the specific needs of the students. There is no general curriculum or program as every class is different from the rest since every student and their deeds are different from the rest. Lessons always have a large element of conversation practice to hep students of all levels become more comfortable speaking.

Description:

Our mission? “To share our passion for Latin”

Name: Causeway Languages
Description: Causeway Languages, located in Coleraine, Northern Ireland, is an opportunity for children aged 8-18 years old to learn the English language from experienced teachers perfecting both oral and written skills in a relaxed and welcoming atmosphere.  We believe that the best way to learn a language is by immersing yourself in an environment where you can learn both inside the classroom through educational games and activities, and outside the classroom by living in a beach house with other students, going sightseeing and speaking to locals.

Name: CNA Vl Formosa
Description:
Bem-vindo ao CNA Vila Formosa! 

No CNA Vila Formosa, estamos comprometidos em oferecer a melhor experiência de aprendizado de idiomas. Nosso objetivo é capacitar nossos alunos com habilidades linguísticas que abrem portas para novas oportunidades e horizontes.

Nossos Serviços:

Description: General English - Corporate English - English - German - French - Russian - Turkish - IELTS - TOEFL - YDS - YÖKDİL

Name: KEJ Kataluna Esperanto-Junularo
Description:
[Katalune sube]
Ni estas la organizo kiu kunigas junajn esperantistojn el la teritorioj de la kataluna lingvo.
La celoj de nia asocio estas:
- Grupigi la junajn esperantistojn de la kataluna lingvo teritorioj.

Name: iSPEAK Language Learning Program Inc
Description: iSPEAK is a Language Program is the first program of its kind designed to expand and preserve indigenous languages across the world by teaching children and their families. The iSPEAK method introduces language using immersion and engages learners in a way that encourages them to make meaningful connections between the language sounds and the ideas they represent... quite like the way we learn our first language. iSPEAK focuses on African languages (Kiswahili, Twi, Yoruba, Amharic, etc) and plans to expand to introduce other indigenous languages from around the world. Lessons are in real time with real educators who use the target language everyday. From heritage language learners to those wanting to expand their world view, all iSPEAK learners will begin speaking their new language from the first class! Children from 3 to 103 are encouraged to learn a language with iSPEAK!

Name: Institute of South Asian Language Studies
Description:
ISALS offers a modern approach to traditional learning that meets the needs of geopolitical professionals, students, and regional enthusiasts at all learning levels

Our mission is to provide fully virtual, in-depth language learning experiences to students committed to developing skills in South Asian languages. We don’t just teach language; we teach culture so that our students can converse and immerse with confidence. We offer language learners of all levels with high-quality instruction, delivered by experienced instructors, that will prepare them for personal and professional endeavors, including the ILR and ACTFL exams, international relations work, and more.
We seek to help people from all backgrounds as they reach for any language goal.  Whether you have a passion for languages, are looking for a job or a scholarship that requires proficiency in a certain language, or you are looking to connect with a family heritage, or any other reason, we look forward to working with you!

Name: Cōzette French Classes
Description:
Cōzette is YOUR Haven for French Language! 

We are a friendly and inclusive boutique-style French school offering online and in-person classes for adults. At the heart of Cōzette is our holistic learning approach that combines quality instruction with opportunities to connect with other Francophiles through our classes, events and workshops. 

We believe that acquiring a new language should be a comfortable and enjoyable experience. We want our students to feel relaxed and at ease while they learn and we strive to create an environment that encourages conversation and interaction. 

The name, Cōzette, represents our cozy and welcoming atmosphere and laid-back instructional approach. We balance the teaching of foundational skills with opportunities to ‘chat’ in the way French is actually spoken today. We like to have fun, don’t take ourselves too seriously, and invite you to do the same!


Locating in the heart of the famed Northeast Minneapolis Arts District, our studio is a warm and welcoming space that is conducive to your best learning. The minute you step through our doors, you will feel like you are in France. We have crafted a magical space, carefully curated to evoke a French-like ambiance. 

Cōzette caters to those looking for a familial atmosphere where learning is relaxed and where connections are easily made with others who share a passion for Francophone culture. The convenient studio location, just steps from shops, cafés, and breweries offers free parking and an accessible, street-level entrance.

Do you live outside the Twin Cities area or simply wish for a more convenient option? Join us online for the same fun and inviting vibe that you would find in our in-person classes.

The minute you walk through our doors or join an online class, you will be welcomed by an amazing team of bilingual French teachers. Our instructors have experience living and/or working abroad and understand the joys and challenges of learning a foreign language.

Name: Business English Today
Description:
A Business English Today é um curso que oferece aulas online personalizadas, voltadas para os interesses e necessidades profissionais dos alunos.

Contamos com a experiência profissional e acadêmica para elevar o seu nível de inglês e prepará-lo para os desafios da sua carreira. Conte conosco!

Name: The English Station
Description:
The English Station es una academia de inglés en funcionamiento desde 2012, que gracias a su capacidad de cambio ha conseguido superar la pandemia mediante la implantación de enseñanza híbrida (online+presencial).

Enseñamos inglés a través de una inmersión en el idioma, de la mano de nuestro profesorado nativo, mediante juegos y actividades que aportan dinamismo a la clase.

Ofrecemos tanto clases particulares como clases en grupo, ya sea de inglés general o de preparación para exámenes oficiales, así como entrevistas de trabajo. Además, el alumnado puede escoger entre modalidad online o presencial, adaptándonos siempre a su horario. 

Y, por último pero no menos importante, el ambiente de trabajo es el que todos desearíamos tener, pues nos esforzamos por ser un equipo en constante evolución, retroalimentándonos mutuamente cada día.

Name: Legacy Idiomas e Reforço Escolar
Description:
We are the Legacy Languages and School Tutoring family.

Our journey has been making history for over 22 years when we were franchisees. Today, with our own methods, we are extremely proud to have trained students with languages and school tutoring who are or have already gone around the world leaving their legacy.

Come and be part of our history too.

Name: Reduca Company
Description:
A Reduca surgiu para ensinar inglês de maneira descomplicada, ajudando na evolução da sua carreira e transformando a sua vida.

Acreditamos que através da educação podemos ter um mundo de oportunidades!

Reduzimos a complexidade, proporcionando uma experiência de aprendizagem mais prazerosa e objetiva para você alcançar melhores resultados.

Name: CCAA Carapicuíba
Description:
Somos uma das maiores redes de ensino de idiomas do país, com mais de 60 anos de atuação no mercado. Contamos hoje com mais de 700 franquias, no Brasil e no exterior.
Com uma metodologia exclusiva de ensino criada por nosso fundador Waldyr Lima e aperfeiçoada constantemente até os dias de hoje, o CCAA foi pioneiro em diversos momentos de inovação e tecnologia na educação no Brasil.
O CCAA foi a primeira escola de idiomas a implementar o uso de
computadores em aula, antes mesmo da popularização da internet.
O pioneirismo do CCAA no campo da tecnologia é tão grande que em 2000, nosso site foi eleito um dos cinco melhores sites educacionais pelo Ibest, o único entre os cursos de idiomas.
Por conta da nossa metodologia de ensino ímpar, desde 2016 nossos alunos são os que obtêm a melhor média no TOEFLITP no Brasil.
Recentemente o CCAA alcançou o primeiro lugar no segmento escolas de idiomas como, a marca mais admirada entre os cariocas, na pesquisa Marcas Cariocas do jornal O Globo.
Mesmo com todas as dificuldades apresentadas durante a pandemia o CCAA buscou entregar as melhores condições para seus alunos, priorizando sempre sua segurança, com isso em mente, de forma inovadora o CCAA passou a contar com o modelo de aulas híbridas, em que o aluno decide, a cada aula em qual ambiente é mais conveniente aprender, seja em casa, no trabalho ou em uma unidade CCAA. A resposta dos alunos foi tão positiva que a solução passou a ser parte do
modelo.

Name: Simmonds Sprachdienste - Business English for your Job
Description: We offer English lessons for private learners and companies, Online and at your Business premisses.

Name: Instituto Nacional para las Lenguas Originarias
Description:
Inalo (Instituto Nacional para las Lenguas Originarias) es una entidad dedicada a la enseñanza de lenguas originarias (quechua, aimara, ashaninca) como segunda lengua o lengua peruana; así mismo, tiene como objetivo ser un referente en la traducción. edición, producción y comercialización textos en lenguas originarias, principalmente el quechua, el aimara y el ashaninca. 

Misión
Ofrecer una formación académica integral y de calidad en la enseñanza de idiomas originarios, de manera que el alumno haga uso efectivo, funcional y autosuficiente de los mismos.
Promover el aprendizaje y uso de las lenguas originarias del país en los espacios públicos y privados a través de la enseñanza, la traducción, asesoría, edición y producción de textos. 
Visión
Ser una institución referente para el aprendizaje de las lenguas y culturas de los pueblos originarios del país, brindando servicios educativos de calidad y excelencia académica con el fin de revitalizar y afianzar la identidad lingüística y cultural de los ciudadanos. 
Ser una entidad referente para la traducción, edición y producción de textos en lenguas originarias. 
Tender puentes entre los pueblos originarios del tawantinsuyu (Perú, Argentina, Ecuador, Bolivia, Colombia, Chile) y de América con el fin de cooperar en proyectos colaborativos que promuevan el debate, la reflexión, el aprendizaje, uso y ejercicio de los derechos lingüísticos y culturales.

Name: InterCamps Brasil
Description:
Na InterCamps, nos dedicamos a proporcionar uma experiência incomparável para jovens estudantes que buscam aprimorar suas habilidades em idiomas. Nossa paixão reside em criar acampamentos de férias vibrantes e transformadores que combinam a aquisição de idiomas com aventuras inesquecíveis. Além da proficiência no idioma, a InterCamps capacita os participantes com habilidades inestimáveis para a vida. Da consciência cultural ao trabalho em equipe, nossos programas incutem qualidades que vão muito além da sala de aula.

Junte-se a nós na InterCamps, onde o aprendizado de idiomas encontra a aventura, e cada estadia se torna uma história que vale a pena contar.

Name: Intensive English for Internationals
Description: The Intensive English for Internationals (IEI) program at the University of Memphis offers comprehensive English language study for students from around the world. It prepares students for graduate and undergraduate programs in the U.S. and provides English courses for international professionals in the Memphis area. The program includes five 8-week sessions throughout the year and offers three levels of instruction: basic, intermediate, and advanced. Full-time students study 23 hours per week, and F-1 visa students must enroll full-time. Classes focus on speaking, listening, reading, and writing, with morning grammar and reading/writing sessions, and afternoon listening/speaking modules. The program is both rigorous and interactive, with opportunities for field trips and social activities.

Name: Fluent Lingo Academy
Description:
Welcome to Fluent Lingo Academy! We're passionate about teaching English to non-native speakers and helping individuals achieve their language goals. Our experienced tutors provide personalized lessons and engaging conversation practice that make learning fun and accessible.

At Fluent Lingo Academy, we believe that language learning should be enjoyable and stress-free. Our supportive and encouraging environment helps students improve their language skills and gain confidence in their abilities.

We offer flexible scheduling and customized lesson plans to fit your busy lifestyle, whether you're a beginner or an advanced learner. Our range of courses and programs can help you achieve your English language goals for work, school, or personal reasons.

Join our community of language learners today and start speaking English with confidence!

Name: LYCEUM The English Academy
Description: Lyceum work towards enabling everyone grow beyond the barriers of English language. Our team aspire to open the world of international language to every commoner at affordable prices. We work together with you to achieve your dreams and success. Be it an interview that you want to crack or an English test you want to pass or just to improve your language skills, we are committed in supporting you through the entire journey.

Name: Facultad de lenguas extranjeras Universidad de Colima
Description: Provide superior educational services, in its different modalities, that ensure the comprehensive training of students, scientists and creators of excellence; the promotion of the generation, application, preservation and dissemination of scientific knowledge, technological development and the different manifestations of art and culture, to contribute to the transformation of society, in a framework of transparency and timely accountability .

Name: Matilda - English 4 fun!
Description:
Matilda et son équipe accueillent:
les enfants dès 6 ans
les collégiens et lycéens
les adultes 
 Afin de leur donner l'envie et les moyens de parler anglais.

Mini-groupes de 4 à 8 personnes
Enseignants qualifiés et passionnés 
En présentiel dans le centre de Bois-Colombes
Méthode conviviale et efficace

Et si vous appreniez l’anglais autrement?

Name: Idiomas Guay | Inglês, Português e Espanhol |
Description:
Bem-vindo à Idiomas Guay, a escola de idiomas  que está transformando a forma como as pessoas aprendem e se comunicam! totalmente ON-LINE, somos uma escola dedicada a proporcionar a fluência linguística de alto nível, com um foco especial no campo de negócios.

Na Idiomas Guay, reconhecemos a importância de um mundo cada vez mais conectado, onde a habilidade de se comunicar efetivamente em diferentes idiomas é uma vantagem competitiva essencial. É por isso que temos o orgulho de contar com alunos da renomada empresa Tractian, que reconhecem a necessidade de se destacar globalmente e buscam aprimorar suas habilidades linguísticas conosco.

Oferecemos cursos especializados em espanhol, português e inglês, as três línguas mais influentes nos negócios internacionais. Nossos instrutores altamente qualificados são nativos ou têm fluência nativa nessas línguas, trazendo consigo uma riqueza cultural única que enriquece a experiência de aprendizado.

Na Idiomas Guay, acreditamos em um ensino dinâmico e envolvente, que vai além da sala de aula tradicional. Nossos alunos têm a oportunidade de praticar suas habilidades linguísticas em situações de negócios simuladas, onde podem aplicar seu conhecimento em cenários do mundo real. Além disso, oferecemos recursos exclusivos, como materiais didáticos atualizados, aulas interativas e tecnologia de ponta para facilitar o aprendizado.

Estamos comprometidos em fornecer uma experiência personalizada e adaptada às necessidades individuais de cada aluno. Com turmas reduzidas, garantimos atenção individualizada e um ambiente de aprendizado acolhedor. Nosso objetivo é capacitar nossos alunos a se sentirem confiantes e competentes ao se comunicarem em qualquer ambiente profissional.

Na Idiomas Guay, acreditamos que o aprendizado de idiomas é uma jornada emocionante e gratificante. Estamos comprometidos em ajudar nossos alunos a alcançarem seus objetivos profissionais e pessoais, abrindo portas para oportunidades globais.

Name: Jeff Costa Languages
Description:
Hello, this is Jeff Costa. Language and literature educator, student of consultancy, researcher on adolescence, promoter of world cultures, movie buffs and bad things. Brazilian from São Paulo, I have an ambition: to help teenagers and young adults with the challenges of today's world.

I graduated in Modern Languages (Portuguese and English) by the University City of São Paulo, I am a student of the English language since 20 years ago and with more than 7 years of experience in the teaching area. Polyglot (Portuguese, English, Spanish and French) I have great knowledge both in language teaching and in learning.

Um dos projetos da rede que evidencia este diferencial, o premiado Speaking Exchange, recebeu 10 Leões no Festival Cannes Lions 2014. 

Em 2020, o CNA foi escolhido Franqueador do Ano pela Associação Brasileira de Franchising (ABF).  É também a única rede a obter por 30 vezes de forma consecutiva o Selo de Excelência em Franchising. O CNA Administração Nacional também está na lista da Great Place to Work de melhores empresas para se trabalhar.

Der Österreichische Integrationsfonds (ÖIF) als Fördergeber kommt mit dem gegenständlichen Projekt Startpaket Deutsch 2023 einerseits der in seiner Satzung definierten Aufgabe, Maßnahmen der sprachlichen Integration und der Vermittlung der deutschen Sprache zu setzen, nach und andererseits werden die im Integrationsgesetz vorgesehenen Deutschkurse für Asyl- und subsidiär Schutzberechtigte sowie Vertriebene umgesetzt.

Welcome to VLTS Language and Translation Limited! Explore a cutting-edge platform dedicated to English language education. O Hablarte é um projeto social criado para democratizar o acesso ao ensino de idiomas para pessoas de baixa renda.  Aprenda do zero com uma base sólida
 Preparatório para certificações internacionais

Vem mudar o mundo com a gente?

Name: English Boss
Description:
Na English Boss, acreditamos que inglês é muito mais do que um idioma. É liberdade, autonomia e poder de escolha. 

Somos uma escola de inglês feita por mulheres e para mulheres. Surgimos do desejo de criar um espaço seguro, acolhedor e eficiente, onde mulheres adultas pudessem aprender inglês sem medo, sem vergonha e sem se sentirem inadequadas. 

Nossa fundadora, Virgínia Brasil, percebeu que os métodos tradicionais não consideravam a realidade das mulheres adultas — uma vida corrida, cheia de demandas, autocobrança, desafios emocionais e uma sensação constante de “dever dar conta de tudo”. Foi exatamente por isso que nasceu a EB.

Aqui, unimos três pilares que tornam nossa metodologia única:
 Comunicação: você aprende inglês para falar, se expressar e se sentir confiante, sem ficar presa só na gramática.
 Autoconhecimento: entendemos que seu desenvolvimento emocional impacta diretamente seu aprendizado. Trabalhamos juntas sua autoconfiança e sua mentalidade.
 Rotina: inglês precisa caber na sua vida — e não o contrário. Por isso, te ajudamos a criar uma jornada que se encaixe na sua rotina, de forma prática, leve e contínua.

A English Boss é mais que uma escola de inglês. Somos uma comunidade de mulheres que se apoiam, se fortalecem e crescem juntas, dentro e fora do inglês.

Se você já tentou aprender inglês antes, se sente travada, insegura ou acha que não nasceu para isso, nós te mostramos que sim, é possível. Aqui, você não vai se sentir sozinha nesse processo.

 Quer saber como podemos caminhar juntas nessa jornada?
Mande uma mensagem para a gente aqui no LinkedIn ou acesse nosso site/Instagram para saber mais sobre nossos cursos, consultorias e programas. Estamos prontas para te ajudar a destravar o inglês e a sua voz no mundo.

Name: YOU-C Brasil
Description:
A YOU-C é uma rede de escolas no mercado de ensino do idioma inglês.
O grupo de diretores com 26 anos de experiência desenvolveu uma metodologia prática na qual o aluno torna-se fluente em um curto período de tempo.
O projeto de ensino do idioma inglês teve inicio no ano de 2014 com o objetivo de levar qualidade e rapidez aos alunos no aprendizado do novo idioma. Durante 2 anos foram feitos os testes necessários para a nova metodologia. 
A marca nasceu em 2016 trazendo técnicas de PNL e memorização, facilitando assim, o aprendizado dos alunos.
A YOU-C veio para mudar o mercado de ensino do inglês, trabalhando a conversação desde o primeiro dia de aula. Na YOU-C o aluno aprende o idioma de maneira rápida.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Fastpass Idiomas
Description: A Fastpass Idiomas busca ser referência brasileira no ensino de inglês para adultos que desejam crescer em suas carreiras, aliando a aprendizagem do inglês enquanto desenvolvem as chamadas "soft skills", como habilidades de liderança, carreira, negociação e empreendedorismo. Conta com professores criativos e habilidosos em personalizar o processo de ensino-aprendizagem, os quais recebem treinamento constante e possuem plano de carreira para seu crescimento junto à empresa.

Name: המדרשה לערבית וביטחון
Description:
המדרשה לערבית וביטחון הוקמה כדי לתת מענה לצורך הלאומי בהכשרת דוברי ערבית איכותיים אשר יוכלו להשתלב בעשייה איכותית במדינת ישראל.
אנו במדרשה לערבית וביטחון מבינים, שלימוד השפה הערבית והכרת התרבות הערבית, מהווים אבן יסוד משמעותית בארצנו.
העברית והערבית חולקות ביניהן קווי דמיון רבים, דבר המקל על דוברי עברית הבאים ללמוד את השפה הערבית. ידיעת השפה והתרבות הערבית מסייעת רבות להעמקת האינטראקציה עם דוברי הערבית, להכרת תרבותם ומשמש גשר ליצירת קשרי שכנות טובה וקשרים עסקיים ותרבותיים בין יהודים לערבים בארץ ובעולם.

Name: Stepping Stones Preschool & Primary School
Description:
At Stepping Stones, our priority is to instil self-confidence, curiosity and autonomy in each child.

Embedded within a bilingual environment (English/French), our teaching method combines the Montessori approach with collaborative and traditional teaching methods. This unique pedagogy is rooted in the belief that all children have immense potential, and that above all the role of an educator and parent is to activate this potential in the child.  The combination of these teaching methods offers each child the structure and freedom to explore. As a consequence, guided by attentive teachers, our students are given the opportunity to develop and progress in harmony with their own rhythm.

The French learning programmes are aligned with that of the “Fédération Wallonie Bruxelles”, while the English programme is the primary programme duplicated in English immersion but assessed by “Cambridge English”.

Gain a competitive edge in today's global market by mastering Italian for business purposes. Our dedicated Italian citizenship exam preparation courses provide comprehensive training to help you pass the language proficiency test with flying colors. Our expert tutors are qualified examiners for the B1-Italian language exam for citizenship, and will guide you through all aspects of the exam, ensuring you are fully prepared to demonstrate your Italian language skills and embark on your journey to citizenship. We are successful in preparing students for their A-Level, GCSE, IB exam in Italian. Should you need to get ready for any certificate and level of Italian Language exam, look no further!

Atualmente possui cerca de 1.000 unidades em funcionamento espalhadas por todos os estados e pelas principais cidades brasileiras, além de unidades em Angola, Argentina, Japão, Paraguai e Bolívia.

Além disso, somos a única franqueadora da área de educação que recebeu duas vezes o título de Franqueadora do Ano da Associação Brasileira de Franquias (ABF). São mais de 15 milhões de pessoas que já estudaram na Fisk e a consagraram como um dos maiores centros de ensino do mundo.

Description:

GEG| Language Institute is the offspring of a visionary step undertaken by an academic with a view to helping both young and adult individuals to learn the increasing importance of English language in all spheres of life as well as encouraging them to try and improve their English language skills. The institute heartily welcomes

At GEG Language Institute we promise to offer a competitively more congenial, learner-friendly, and student-centered classroom, where students will not only learn with a highly experienced instructor but also find themselves exposed to place where they will have a genuine flavor of an English-speaking environment, whereby they can achieve a near-native level in their English with regard to pronunciation, accent, and fluency in all four skills. The students will not only learn here but also be able to learn how to use their English through regular group work and practice sessions based on  practical contexts. Hence, they will never forget what they learn once.
The courses offered at GEG are tailored in such a way that they are able to meet the standard benchmarks set by the International Testing Systems like British Council and IDP or Cambridge and Edexcel. Name: TEACHERS
Description:
Jesteśmy wysoko cenionym dostawcą autorskich materiałów edukacyjnych, oferującym planery motywacyjne do nauki języków obcych oraz e-booki. Nasza linia produktów, My English Improver, dedykowana jest zarówno dorosłym, jak i dzieciom. Wyróżniamy się nowoczesnym i eleganckim designem naszych planerów, które zostały starannie zaprojektowane, zachowując przy tym naszą dbałość o ekologię, używając przyjaznych środowisku materiałów.

Nasze planery motywacyjne stawiają na systematyczną naukę i zachęcają do codziennego postępu w opanowywaniu języka. Liczne moduły leksykalne i gramatyczne w naszych planerach dodają urozmaicenia procesowi nauki. Linia dla dorosłych prezentuje się w kolorach pudrowego różu POWDER PINK, jasnoniebieskiego BABY BLUE oraz granatu NAVY BLUE. Z kolei planery dla dzieci łączą naukę z zabawą, pobudzając wyobraźnię i zachęcając do kreatywnych zadań, dostępne w kolorach: pudrowego różu POWDER PINK, jasnoniebieskiego BABY BLUE oraz słonecznej żółci SUNNY YELLOW.

Nasza oferta nie ogranicza się tylko do planerów, ale obejmuje również wyjątkowe świeczki sojowe. W ofercie mamy zestawy zawierające planer motywacyjny wraz ze świecą, które stanowią idealny prezent. Dbamy o to, by nasi klienci mogli zrelaksować się przy unikalnym zapachu naturalnych świec o różnych aromatach, takich jak różowa czekolada czy smoothie z mango.

Dla osób rozpoczynających swoją przygodę z językiem angielskim lub pragnących usystematyzować podstawową gramatykę, oferujemy nasz e-book gramatyczny, My English E-BOOK - GRAMMAR ELEMENTARY LEVEL. E-booki występują w czterech wersjach kolorystycznych: pudrowego różu POWDER PINK, jasnoniebieskiego BABY BLUE, słonecznej żółci SUNNY YELLOW oraz granatu NAVY BLUE.

W naszym sklepie internetowym regularnie pojawiają się również edycje limitowane planerów, idealne na okazje takie jak Walentynki czy Boże Narodzenie.

Zapraszamy do odkrycia naszej unikalnej kolekcji autorskich materiałów edukacyjnych, która inspiruje do rozwoju.

Name: SprachHorizont-Hannover
Description:
SprachHorizont Hannover ist eine Sprachschule mit dem Schwerpunkt Deutsch im Beruf.

Wir begleiten Menschen beim sprachlichen Lernen im beruflichen Kontext mit Zeit, Struktur und Wertschätzung.

Unser Fokus liegt auf praxisnaher Sprachförderung, individueller Begleitung und sicheren Lernräumen, in denen Sprache wachsen darf. Dazu gehört auch der berufsspezifische Wortschatz, z. B. in der Pflege, sowie die Vermittlung passender Kommunikationsstrukturen für Gespräche mit Kund:innen, Patient:innen, Angehörigen und Kolleg:innen.

Wir stellen Redemittel und sprachliche Handlungsmuster zur Verfügung, damit neuer Wortschatz direkt angewendet und in praxisnahen Übungen und Rollenspielen erprobt werden kann.

Darüber hinaus begleiten wir Lernende bei der sprachlichen Vorbereitung auf Prüfungen sowie im Bewerbungsprozess, z. B. bei der Erstellung von Bewerbungsunterlagen und der Vorbereitung auf Gespräche.

Lernen verstehen wir nicht als Beschleunigung, sondern als Prozess, der Orientierung, Vertrauen und nachhaltige Entwicklung ermöglicht.

Name: IN ITALIANO
Description:
This school offers complete courses, lessons and online conversations with native speakers expert in teaching Italian language. About ten teachers work with us.

COURSES
The offer includes Italian language course for foreigners at all levels, Italian literature course, history of art, business Italian, CILS exam preparation, lessons and conversations personalized to specific topics, individual o for small groups.

ONLINE LESSONS
Lessons take place via Skype or Google Meet with a communicative method, through direct communication with the teacher, which stimulates conversation in Italian as a living language. We use the webcam and chat to talk, write and share text, images, audio and video files. We recommend textbooks and grammar exercises.

OUR METHOD
Our method enables you to learn in an effective, fun and interactive way thanks to direct communication with native Italian-speaking teachers who live in Italy and by using our excellent study materials. Whether you are a beginner or an advanced student of Italian, we offer lessons, conversation or courses to suit your specific requirements.

We will assess your level of proficiency in Italian free of charge when you first contact us. You may then decide if you wish to study with us, how many lessons you wish to buy and, over time, if and when to continue studying with our school.

Our teachers will always be at your side, indicating the topics and objectives of the lesson, proposing actitivites, correcting your mistakes and sending you additional practice exercises.  Above all, they will speak to you in Italian − right from the very first lesson − in order to stimulate a learning process based on conversation, which will be fine-tuned to your personal requirements and characteristics. This is because it is important to know how to communicate.

We have selected textbooks, CDs and DVDs produced by publishers specialising in Italian teaching. These are useful both for classes activities and for individual studying

Name: English for Fun Ticino
Description:
English for Fun è una scuola di lingua inglese situata a Lugano, Svizzera, specializzata nell'insegnamento dell'inglese ai bambini. Offriamo programmi divertenti e coinvolgenti che aiutano i giovani studenti a sviluppare le loro competenze linguistiche attraverso giochi, attività interattive e lezioni stimolanti. Il nostro obiettivo è rendere l'apprendimento dell'inglese un'esperienza piacevole e gratificante, preparando i bambini per il loro futuro accademico e professionale.

Abbiamo cinque sedi e offriamo corsi per bambini da 1 a 3 anni, da 3 a 6 anni e per studenti delle scuole elementari. Usiamo la filosofia del Total Physical Response, che combina movimento fisico e linguaggio per facilitare l'apprendimento in modo naturale e coinvolgente. Con docenti qualificati,  garantiamo un'istruzione di altissima qualità.

Name: Language Farm
Description:
ABENTEUER SPRACHE
Die Alternative zu Sprachreisen ins Ausland

Englisch-Sprachcamps für Kinder, Jugendliche, Erwachsene, Familien und Schulklassen.

Englisch lernen in einer Atmosphäre, in der sich alle wohl fühlen, begeistert seit vielen Jahren Kinder, Jugendliche und auch Erwachsene, die uns besuchen. 

Die Idee ist, Begegnungen zwischen hauptsächlich deutschen Kindern und jungen Muttersprachler*innen aus der ganzen Welt zu schaffen und bei vielfältigen Aktivitäten eine Fremdsprache subtil zu erlernen und dabei Abenteuer und Spaß zu erleben. 

Unterricht in der herkömmlichen Form gibt es bei uns nicht!

Unsere Philosophie
 Learning by doing - Wir nähern uns der Fremdsprache durch Aktivitäten, die Spaß machen.
 In English please - Wir legen großen Wert auf Konversation auf Englisch!
 kleine Gruppen - kleine Sprachgruppen von 4-5 Kindern, die je ein*e Muttersprachler*in betreut.
 ökologischer Fußabdruck - Es ist uns sehr wichtig, unsere Camps Hand in Hand mit der Natur stattfinden zu lassen.
 selbst gekocht - In allen unsere Camps werden die Kinder direkt in die Essenzubereitung einbezogen.
 für alle etwas dabei - Wir aber kombinieren das Sprachenlernen mit Dingen, die den Kindern Freude bereiten, wie: Reiten, Kunst, Sport, Kanu fahren oder Kochen und schaffen somit für alle Anknüpfungspunkte…

Unsere Saison dauert von März bis Ende Oktober und in den Oster-, Pfingst-, Sommer- und Herbstferien bieten wir ein buntes Programm aus Englischen Sprachkursen an.

Wann besucht Ihr Kind die Language Farm?
Melden Sie Ihre Kind jetzt bei uns an!

Name: British School Brindisi
Description:
British School Brindisi, l’inglese Garantito dal 1985.

La British School di Brindisi fa parte del gruppo AIBSE (Associazione Internazionale British Schools of English) Ente Culturale che raggruppa oltre 70 sedi in Italia. Come tutte le altre sedi del gruppo è Autorizzata al funzionamento dal MIUR (Ministero dell’Istruzione, dell’Università e della Ricerca). I locali sono in regola con le norme igienico sanitarie. La British School di Brindisi è sede certificata VISION 2000 a norme UNI EN ISO 9001 (Certificato n.3925/4 rilasciato da ICIM ente accreditato SINCERT) Le sedi del gruppo “British Schools of English” sono distribuite su tutto il territorio italiano e sono collegate in rete per garantire la continuità del corso in una sede differente da quella in cui viene attivato in caso di necessità di trasferimento temporaneo o definitivo dello studente. In tal caso la sede di origine si impegnerà a trasferire lo studente senza aggravio di spesa. (elenco ufficiale consultabile sul sito www.britishschool.com).

Name: Welcome Tuition UK (part of Welcome Homestay UK)
Description:
Welcome Tuition UK is a part of Welcome Homestay UK and specialises in delivering fun and interactive English lessons for UK and international clients. We are experts in improving English language skills, which helps individuals communicate confidently, leading to strong conversation skills, reading, and writing skills, and business skills. We pride ourselves in providing high quality teaching and a modern way of learning for students.

Welcome Tuition UK has years of experience delivering English lessons and throughout the years we have developed a technique of teaching that focuses on providing fun and interactive ways to engage students. We have been trusted by students from all over the world and we offer great value for money. Our current courses are CPD accredited.

We have experienced and qualified tutors from varying backgrounds and we are experts in delivering flexible, virtual English programmes. For employers, we create bespoke courses, tailored to any industry, matching language that is often used in the workplace. We can improve discussion skills, verbal and written communication skills, social skills as well as presentation skills.

Name: In Good Company Escola de Idiomas
Description:
A In Good Company oferece às empresas e profissionais aulas online individuais com professores de idiomas certificados.

Os cursos da In Good Company, são todos voltados para o universo corporativo, o que ajuda muito o aluno em seu dia a dia dentro da empresa nos vários departamentos. Já atendemos empresas de diversos setores, como profissionais da Aviação, Finanças, Advogados, Engenheiros, Médicos, Tecnologia/TI entre outros. Nos orgulhamos, pois temos um número bem grande de casos de sucesso total!!!

Nestes 25 anos de trabalho junto às empresas da Região Metropolitana de Campinas pudemos conhecer as reais necessidades de cada aluno e trabalhar para juntos podermos sanar as deficiências e prepará-los para as futuras demandas. Além disso, através de uma comunicação direta e efetiva junto aos gestores dos nossos alunos, conseguimos total comprometimento da parte de cada um no desenvolvimento do funcionário.  

Além do ensino, também nos comprometemos em monitorar o progresso do aluno, através de relatórios que são enviados a cada trimestre para o gestor e RH, informando sobre seu desenvolvimento e dedicação ao curso.

Atuamos em 6 idiomas, inglês, português para estrangeiros, espanhol, italiano, francês e alemão, entretanto o inglês, o espanhol e português para estrangeiros são nosso carro chefe nas demandas.

Somos muito atentos aos problemas e ao desenvolvimento de nossos alunos parceiros e nos mantemos sempre muito atualizados do que acontece no universo corporativo, para oferecer o melhor!

Alguns de nossos parceiros nestes anos de trabalho: Motorola, Kärcher, EMS, Dell computers, Shell Aviation, TetraPak, IBM, Tradeworks, Bayer, Deif do Brasil, Solenis, Cristália, Tradecorp, Honda, CPFL, Rhodia, Boeringer (Merial), Kerry Food and Nutrition, Johnson and Johnson, Edwards, Eagle Burgman, Sabic, Gevisa, Pirelly, DMC agência de propaganda e marketing, Azul, Samsung, Nestlé, Laboratórios Sincroton, Robert Bosch do Brasil, CAISM (Unicamp) entre outras.

Name: Montañita Spanish School
Description:
Did you know that Montañita Spanish School is officially recognized as a Bildungsurlaub provider in Berlin, Rheinland-Pfalz, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Hamburg, Niedersachsen, Brandenburg, Sachsen-Anhalt and Schleswig-Holstein, and newly Hessen state since 2024? 
As an employee in Germany, you might be entitled to up to 5 days of paid educational leave each year, OR 10 days per 2 years? Discover how you can use this opportunity to learn Spanish with us!

Bildungsurlaub is a German government-supported program that allows nearly everyone to take a break from work for educational purposes while still receiving a full salary and without using any vacation days. 
This initiative is designed to help individuals to grow both professionally and personally by providing a fantastic opportunity to combine education with travel.

Bildungsurlaub at Montañita Spanish School is an investment in both your career and your personal growth. Learning Spanish can create new career opportunities while enhancing your personal journey.

¿Listo para aprender Español en Montañita? Contact us!

Name: Matesi Idiomas
Description:
Somos uma escola de idiomas on-line perfeita pra você estudar em casa e alcançar o seu objetivo. 

Nossa metodologia é focada na comunicação trabalhando as 4 habilidades comunicativas. Além disso, fazemos questão de inserirmos a cultura no ensino do idioma. 

Para nós, é muito importante que o aluno aprenda não só o que está nos livros, mas entenda como a cultura funciona, pois dessa forma a internalização da língua acontece de forma mais eficiente.

Trabalhamos tanto com as aulas em grupo de até 6 alunos e com aulas exclusivas que são individuais. 

O plano de estudos é desenvolvido com base nas metas SMART, por isso sempre perguntamos qual é o objetivo do aluno com o idioma. Com esse direcionamento, conseguimos montar um cronograma personalizado baseado na necessidade do estudante, de forma que ele consiga cumprir seu objetivo e que atenda os seus horários.

Description:
Texas Mandarin Tutoring is the leader in the personalized tutoring business. We offer mandarin tutoring to business people who need to talk to Chinese clients or Chinese co-workers, and we also help our clients deep understand the Chinese Business Culture, so they can build the kind of rapport and trust, that results in longe-term profitable relationships.

We customize the lesson for each client according to the client's industry, specific learning needs, personality, and learning style. 

We believe Language learning is a natural process.  We apply for CI (Comprehensible Input) strategy in our teaching. Comprehensible input is a critical concept for second-language development for students with and without learning difficulties. Comprehensible input means that students should be able to understand the essence of what is being said or presented to them.

This does not mean, however, that teachers must use only words students understand. In fact, instruction can be incomprehensible even when students know all of the words. Students learn a new language best when they receive input that is just a bit more difficult than they can easily understand. In other words, students may understand most, but not all, words the teacher is using.

Name: Endlich Englisch
Description:
Wie lange ist es her, dass du Englisch in der Schule hattest? 
Und jetzt sollst du wieder regelmäßig Englisch sprechen? 
Englisch ist heutzutage eine Grundvoraussetzung im Arbeitsleben. Es ist mehr als Business-Englisch Vokabeln zu beherrschen, sondern es geht darum wirklich kommunizieren zu können, auf dein Gegenüber eingehen zu können, ohne dir dabei ständig Gedanken machen zu müssen, wie du den nächsten Satz beginnst.
Deswegen habe ich ein Konzept entwickelt, das dir ganz individuell den Wiedereinstieg in die englische Sprache ermöglichen und die Freude am Englisch-Sprechen zurückgeben soll.  

Bei mir bekommst du:

- Speziell an dich angepasste Kurse
- Individuelle Themenauswahl
- Basiswortschatz, der für sämtliche Situationen geeignet ist
- Tipps wie du mit nur 4 (von insgesamt 13) englischen Zeiten über alles reden kannst
- Echte Gespräche
- 1:1 Sprechtraining
- Lernvideos
- Lernanalyse
- Lernzielsetzung

Name: Basha
Description:
We are a free service that gives you the tools to learn languages that are less common or lack adequate resources. With Basha, you are empowered to crowdsource learning from your local community.  

Our methodology and tools center around Spaced Repetition Learning (SRL) - recognized by most polyglots as the ideal way to begin a language-learning journey (think flashcards). You provide the translator and the will to learn, and we offer a comprehensive Anki deck of translatable phrases and a platform for your translator to record and export their audio.  

Why are we giving this away for free? Languages are going extinct at a rapid rate; the World Atlas of Languages warns that not only does an endangered language die every two weeks, but 1/3 of the remaining languages also have fewer than 1,000 speakers. This crisis is caused in part by the ‘melting pot’ mindset wherein immigrants and their children are expected to speak the host nation’s language exclusively.  

Basha is 100% free for all users because we care about saving these languages. We believe that when people have the tools to preserve their linguistic history, we can do our part to reverse the trend. Also, and you'll have to excuse our blasphemy, we don't believe that everything on the internet has to be monetized .

À PROPOS DU CPAB
Depuis 45 ans, le CPAB propose des formations et délivre des diplômes reconnus légalement, en tant que membre du réseau d’enseignement libre non-confessionnel de la Fédération Wallonie-Bruxelles.

Les cours sont organisés pendant toute l’année scolaire, le jour et le soir, sous forme de sessions appelées « modules », d’une durée de plusieurs semaines.

Chaque module de cours du jour ou de cours du soir comporte un temps d’évaluation initiale de votre niveau de connaissance, les heures de cours et un temps d’évaluation finale.

Pour des raisons pédagogiques ou pratiques, le CPAB propose des modules de respectivement 40, 80 et 120 « périodes ». Une période équivaut à 50 minutes, soit à peu près une heure.

Selon le nombre de périodes de chaque module, les cours ont lieu une, deux ou trois fois par semaine.

Description:
A Espanhol Minuto é uma empresa fundada em 2020 que oferece aulas e serviços diversos de língua e cultura espanhola e hispano-americana. 
O nosso propósito é simples, mas também desafiador: ensinar Espanhol com objetivos bem definidos e personalizados, mas de forma divertida. 
Além disso, com o intuito de flexibilizar e ampliar, territorialmente, o acesso ao ensino de idiomas, a Espanhol Minuto funciona majoritariamente na modalidade remota, possibilitando que nossos alunos e professores, em qualquer lugar do mundo, tenham autonomia no momento da escolha do horário de suas aulas. 
Também trabalhamos com traduções acadêmicas (resumos, dissertações e teses), tradução simultânea para eventos e tradução de vídeos e posts para redes sociais. 
Para alcançarmos tudo isso, contamos com um time de professores e tradutores formados em universidades de renome, com experiência acadêmica e de trabalho no exterior e, principalmente, apaixonados pelo que escolheram fazer.  
Dessa maneira, garantimos a aprendizagem assertiva e funcional do idioma e qualidade em nossas traduções, levando em consideração o contexto e a realidade de cada aluno e cliente da Espanhol Minuto.

Osiągamy te cele dzięki umiejętności dostosowania się do indywidualnych potrzeb i wymagań naszych klientów, świetnej kadrze lektorów, zastosowaniu profesjonalnych programów nauczania nastawionych na komunikację oraz systemowi ciągłej kontroli jakości prowadzonych przez nas kursów.

U nas nauczysz się w inspirującej atmosferze języka angielskiego, hiszpańskiego, włoskiego, francuskiego, niemieckiego, szwedzkiego, norweskiego, rosyjskiego oraz polskiego dla obcokrajowców, a także innych, mniej typowych języków europejskich.

Ponadto oferta kursów wzbogacona jest o największy w Krakowie bezpłatny pakiet zajęć dodatkowych oraz szereg atrakcyjnych bonusów.

Uczymy skutecznie i efektywnie, bo języki obce są w nas!

Pořádáme individuální, skupinové a firemní kurzy v Ostravě, v Opavě a okolí v angličtině, italštině, španělštině i v dalších jazycích. Méně obvyklé jazyky jako jsou řečtina, chorvatština, turečtina, apod. učíme především online.

- pochopit "nový" svět, "novou" kulturu a "nové" myšlení

Name: Learn English For Tomorrow
Description:
Communicative English is essential as it can help a student see the value of their studies meaningfully. Strengthening your communication skills in English is necessary and is a powerful tool that can be used for business, travel, or conversation in a different country.
There are four main parts of learning any language:
1 - Know how to communicate
2 - Speaking
3 - Listening
4 -  Reading and
5- Grammar
Sadly, most countries, especially Bangladesh, force students to focus on reading and grammar almost exclusively. Well, sometimes that brings good marks in exams, but in the actual view, they are not learning English at all cause if you cannot communicate with people in English, the whole education is a significant waste.
The solution to the problem is simple: Focus on speaking and listening. However, often, simple solutions to problems are ignored by people, institutions and governments alike. We have so many reasons behind this, But whatever the case, if you or your children want to learn English, The best way is to listen and speak in English!
We are developing our communicative English by talking in English, attending basic free and premium classes every week and helping each other develop our English communication skills, which is helping us to communicate domestically and internationally with our clients and other professional sectors like doing freelancing and attending a job interview or working abroad for work or study.

We also post informative content like videos and articles on how to learn Communicative English naturally without memorizing much-complicated stuff.

Our teaching methods are unique, easy and practical to learn communicative English quickly. If you follow our simple steps and practice them daily, English will be straightforward, and you can talk in English fluently like your mother tongue.

Name: Centro de Línguas Germania
Description:
CLG, sigla para Centro de Línguas Germania, é uma escola de línguas estrangeiras com sede física em Ponta Grossa/PR, mas que também abrange o universo online. Criada no final de 2018, conta ela com alemão, inglês, espanhol, italiano e francês. 

Nossa missão é oportunizar, a partir do estudo de cada língua estrangeira, uma imersão linguístico-cultural que envolta a uma nova visão de mundo. Desde à sua criação, fizemos com que o CLG não fosse um simples "negócio" impessoal, mas uma combinação de excelência profissional com uma abordagem de proximidade, mais convidativa, a fim de entender melhor as aspirações dos nossos alunos(as). Não para menos, muitos fazem do CLG a extensão da própria casa.  

Contando com uma equipe pedagógica com muita experiência dentro da área de ensino e vivência no exterior, contando inclusive com docentes nativos, o resultado disso é que ao longo dos anos vemos frequentemente frutos disso tudo. Crescimento profissional, acadêmico e cultural. A continuidade de estudo no estrangeiro, os cargos em multinacionais e viagens são apenas alguns dos casos.

À parte do trabalho no quesito de ensino de idiomas, temos ainda em nosso espaço muitas palestras, workshops, eventos de música e culinária, lançamentos de livros, fazemos excursões e intercâmbios culturais, eventos de conversação, eventos profissionalizantes e ainda livestreams com convidados estrangeiros.

Na Germania, língua e cultura caminham de mãos dadas.

Name: Linguistics Placement Cell, Aligarh Muslim University
Description:
A language is not just words. It's a culture, a tradition, a unification of a community, a whole history that creates what a community is. It's all embodied in a language.

          ~ Noam Chomsky

The Department of Linguistics was founded by Prof. Masud Husain Khan, Professor Emeritus in the year 1968 followed by the establishment of Training & Placement Office of Linguistics in the year 2015-16 by Dr. Pallav Vishnu under the chairmanship of Professor A.R. Fatihi .Since its inception, the Department has been providing excellent teaching and indepth research in Linguistics with special reference to Urdu.

By completing the degree in Linguistics students have interdisciplinary job opportunities wherein they work as Linguist, Forensic Linguist, Computational Linguist, Lexicographer, Accent coach, Translator, Interpretor, Speech pathologist and others. 

The Linguistics' Placement Cell playing a pivotal role in grabbing the right spot to instill the great knowledge of Linguistics . 

• Missions of The Linguistics' Department

~ To produce trained linguists to describe the various notions of language(s)who will be able to protect and transmit these to future generations to serve the mankind.

~ To contribute on language policy and planning and aspire to promote and protect the languages of linguistic minorities of the subcontinent.

~ To make policies and provide excellent teaching and research facilities to attract and retain the best faculty members who are specialized in their respective fields.


Email : pvishnu.ln@amu.ac.com
Phone : +917302484565 ( Departmental Volunteer)

Name: Universite Virtuelle du Burundi
Description:
L'Université Virtuelle du Burundi (UVB) est une institution d'enseignement supérieur en ligne basée au Burundi. Elle a été créée dans le but d'offrir des programmes d'études accessibles à tous, en utilisant les technologies numériques et les méthodes d'apprentissage à distance. L'UVB s'engage à fournir une éducation de qualité qui repose sur la recherche, la créativité, l'innovation et le leadership.

Mission :
La mission de l'UVB est de permettre à tous les citoyens burundais d'accéder à des opportunités d'apprentissage et de développement des compétences, en offrant une éducation supérieure accessible et de haute qualité, grâce à l'utilisation des technologies numériques.

Vision :
La vision de l'UVB est de devenir un leader régional dans l'enseignement supérieur en ligne, en proposant des programmes innovants qui répondent aux besoins du marché du travail et contribuent au développement durable du Burundi.

Objectif global :
L'objectif global de l'UVB est de transformer l'accès à l'enseignement supérieur au Burundi en utilisant les technologies numériques, afin de favoriser l'égalité des chances, l'innovation et le développement du pays.

Name: SMAN 1 Berau
Description:
SMA Negeri 1 Berau (SMANSA Berau) adalah sekolah menengah atas negeri yang berdiri sejak 1981 dan menjadi salah satu institusi pendidikan terbaik di Kabupaten Berau, Kalimantan Timur. Dengan akreditasi A dan sistem full-day school, kami berkomitmen mencetak lulusan yang unggul secara akademik, berkarakter kuat, serta peduli terhadap lingkungan dan masyarakat.

Didukung oleh tenaga pendidik profesional dan fasilitas lengkap seperti laboratorium IPA, perpustakaan aktif, ruang komputer, dan sarana olahraga, SMANSA Berau mendorong siswa untuk berkembang secara holistik melalui program akademik dan kegiatan ekstrakurikuler yang beragam.

Kami membanggakan prestasi siswa di tingkat nasional, termasuk peringkat ke-479 dalam UTBK LTMPT 2022, serta aktif dalam lomba sains, debat, dan literasi. Alumni kami tersebar di berbagai universitas ternama di Indonesia dan berkiprah di berbagai bidang profesional.

SMANSA Berau juga menjalin kolaborasi erat dengan orang tua, alumni, serta institusi pemerintah dan masyarakat untuk menciptakan lingkungan belajar yang kondusif dan berkelanjutan.

Visi: Mewujudkan peserta didik yang unggul dalam prestasi, berakhlak mulia, dan peduli lingkungan.
Misi: Menyediakan pendidikan berkualitas, membentuk karakter positif, meningkatkan prestasi, dan mendorong budaya literasi.

Our expert teachers bring a wealth of knowledge and proven methodologies to help students not only build a strong language foundation but also confidently clear their Canadian language proficiency exams. They specialise in intensive preparation for TEF Canada, TCF Canada, TEFAQ, e-TEF, IELTS, CELPIP, and PTE, offering focused training in speaking, writing, listening, and reading. Lubię się uczyć i robię to stale biorąc udział w szkoleniach wybitnych metodyków, trenerów językowych a także trenerów NVC, psychologów biznesu. Moim głównym założeniem jest realizacja konkretnego, określonego w czasie celu, wspólnie uzgodnionego z Klientem.

Name: ESTA language school
Description:
It’s the leading language school to child&adult people with an innovative methodology and the best didactic material in the market, ESTA offers the students the possibility of speaking foreign languages in just 12 months.

In a World where distance have become shorter each day and relations among countries are not limited to geographic boundaries anymore, languages are an essential tool for personal success within the professional market. ESTA offers this course, for those professionals who must learn languages quickly and efficiently. The minimum course duration is 12 months and it works with the concept of global communication. Material, methodology, class organization, teachers’ training, class ambience. Everything in the 12-month course has been created to offer the adult audience the best in language teaching.

Name: LeHua
Description:
LeHua propose des formations à la carte qui répondent aux besoins
des particuliers ou des entreprises.

Cours collectifs :


Ces cours combinent l’apprentissage oral et l’écriture des caractères. Les cours ont lieu chaque semaine (hors vacances scolaires) à raison de 1h30 par semaine (45 heures par an). Les cours sont répartis en plusieurs niveaux.

    Cours Élémentaire

Ce cours s’adresse aux débutants. L’apprentissage se déroule sur 3 ans : il permet de reconnaître 400 caractères soit environ 50% des caractères d’une lecture courante.

 

    Cours Intermédiaire

Le niveau intermédiaire est fortement orienté vers l’oral, avec des dialogues et des thèmes pratiques, issus de la vie courante (loisirs, transports, conversation téléphonique…).

    Cours Avancé

Dans la continuité de l’apprentissage, ce cours est à destination des personnes ayant déjà une compétence écrite solide et une bonne aisance orale. 


Cours individuels :


    Chinois business

Vous possédez déjà des bases en chinois et souhaitez apprendre du vocabulaire utile pour vos relations professionnelles ? Ce cours aborde divers aspects de la vie professionnelle : présentations formelles, vocabulaire des affaires et du commerce, rédaction d’emails, formules de courtoisie, etc…

    Préparation au HSK, BAC, DCL (Diplôme de Compétence en Langue)

Le HSK est de plus en plus reconnu de par le monde du travail. Ce test conçu sous l’autorité de l’éducation de la République populaire de Chine est la seule mesure objective du niveau de chinois sur le plan international. LeHua propose une préparation au test HSK à la demande.

    Visio-cours
    Cours de chinois
    Kit de survie pour business(wo)man
    Stage intensif, communication interculturelle, remise à niveau, préparation au voyage

Ces cours peuvent se dérouler dans les locaux de LeHua ou au sein de l’entreprise. Ils sont donnés soit en petits groupes afin de favoriser la participation effective des apprenants soit en particulier. Ils ont lieu en jou

Name: Learn Farsi with Khaleh Farnoosh
Description:
* I have designed all of the lessons myself based on a grade 1 level Farsi book.
* All of my lessons are designed with English translations.
* For each Farsi letter and sound, I have included examples and blank lines to practice writing. 
* Students will increase their Farsi vocabulary progressively as they learn new letters and sounds. 
* Students will then practice forming sentences with the new vocabulary that they have learned. 
* My lessons are custom-designed and adapted based on each student’s personal interests.

Name: iWorld Learning SG

Our courses range from beginner to advanced levels, catering to students of different English proficiency levels. Mastering good English skills can bring significant advantages in career, education, social interactions, cultural understanding, and personal development. We are committed to providing high-quality English education to help students achieve personal growth and professional success.

Name: Universitas Islam Negeri Syarif Hidayatullah Jakarta

Campus 2 is on Kertamukti Street, only several hundred meters from Campus 1. Campus 3, is on Tarumanegara Street, only several hundred meters from Campus 2. It consists of Faculty of Adab and Humanities and Clinic.

Name: La Dante Rio - Comitato RJ Società Dante Alighieri
Description:
Quem Somos:
Parte integrante do Comitato Rio de Janeiro da Società Dante Alighieri, nossa missão é preservar e disseminar a riqueza da língua e cultura italiana no Brasil. Em colaboração com o governo italiano, fazemos parte de uma rede internacional fundada em 1889, presente em mais de 80 países. Conheça mais em https://riodejaneiro.dante.global/.

La Dante Rio - Nossa História:
Conhecida carinhosamente como La Dante Rio, nossa instituição, inaugurada em 2023, propõe uma abordagem inclusiva para o ensino da cultura e língua italianas. Guiados pelos valores de inovação, participação e respeito à diversidade, oferecemos cursos, certificações PLIDA, palestras e muito mais! Explore conosco as diversas facetas da Italianidade.

Cursos de Língua Italiana:
Apaixonado pela cultura e língua italiana? La Dante Rio oferece cursos online para todos os níveis (básico, intermediário, avançado), em turmas regulares, breves, individuais ou pequenos grupos. Desde métodos tradicionais até abordagens inovadoras com música e gastronomia, nosso objetivo é tornar o aprendizado eficaz, prazeroso e acessível a todo o Brasil. Matricule-se e descubra o encanto do italiano!

Cursos de Cultura em Italiano e Português:
Desvende a riqueza da história italiana em nossos cursos de cultura. Seja através de cinema, séries, literatura ou eventos históricos, oferecemos uma imersão profunda na cultura italiana. Além disso, proporcionamos cursos em língua portuguesa para aqueles que desejam explorar o patrimônio italiano sem fluência no idioma. Our Teaching Approaches
We believe in a student-centered approach emphasizing hands-on, experiential learning. Our teachers use a variety of teaching methods and technologies to meet each student's needs. We emphasize collaboration and project-based learning, striving to create an engaging, challenging, and inspiring learning environment for all students.

Name: BTtalk Language School
Description:
Idea BTtalk zrodziła się z obserwacji i z buntu...

Z obserwacji jak ludzie radzą sobie z językiem angielskim w praktyce. Nakreśliliśmy w ten sposób pewien wspólny zbiór problemów z jakimi się wszyscy borykają. Zauważyliśmy, że większość z nas zmaga się z tymi samymi trudnościami, które dotyczą głównie wypowiedzi ustnej po angielsku.
Dlatego w naszej szkole chcemy przede wszystkim nauczyć Cię płynnie mówić i szybko myśleć… po angielsku.

Z buntu wobec nauczania języka obcego, które polega przede wszystkim na analizowaniu zawartości książki oraz zeszytu ćwiczeń, gdzie większość czasu wszyscy spędzają …..w smętnej ciszy.
Dlatego w BTtalk zgodnie z jedną z naszych zasad „silence is not golden” staramy tak wykorzystać czas na zajęciach, aby pobudzić słuchaczy do jak najbardziej aktywnego uczestnictwa.

Uczymy zarówno dzieci jak i dorosłych. Prowadzimy kursy od przedszkolaków, przez dzieci szkolne, także w ramach świetlicy aż po Business English i kursy dla firm

Name: Elita Szkoła Języków Obcych
Description:
Jesteśmy najstarszą szkołą językowa w Chorzowie i z dumą możemy powiedzieć, że działamy nieprzerwanie już od 30 lat. W 2015 roku przenieśliśmy się z chorzowskiego Słowaka do niezależnego lokum mieszczącego się przy ulicy Wolności. Nasze motto: Profesjonalnie i z Pasją towarzyszy nam podczas każdych zajęć. Wykorzystując nabyte doświadczenie w nauczaniu języków obcych potrafimy konsekwentnie realizować wyznaczone cele edukacyjne. Specjalizujemy się w nauczaniu języka angielskiego i przygotowaniu naszych kursantów do uzyskania międzynarodowych certyfikatów takich jak FCE i CAE. Od roku szkolnego 2017/2018 zapraszamy również na zajęcia z języka hiszpańskiego na wszystkich poziomach zaawansowania.

Nasi lektorzy to osoby z wykształceniem kierunkowym i doświadczeniem w nauczaniu języków obcych. Większość z nich współpracuje z nami od wielu lat. To ich zaangażowanie, kreatywność i energia sprawiają, że nasi uczniowie szybko zaczynają komunikować się w języku obcym, poszerzają swoje horyzonty (nie tylko językowe), są ciekawi świata i innych kultur. Bardzo cenimy sobie bezpośredni i serdeczny kontakt z kursantami, a w szczególności z rodzicami naszych najmłodszych podopiecznych. Dzięki przyjaznej atmosferze panującej w Elicie dzieci czują się u nas pewnie i bezpiecznie, co umożliwia jeszcze szybsze postępy w nauce.

Name: MARKS Centar for English

Classes follow international curricula established in Cambridge, and are given one-to-one, in groups or online. We are based in the heart of the capital, 20 minutes' drive from the airport, close the major education, business and political centres. 

Our dedicated team of teachers is comprised of English native speakers, and highly trained, fluent local staff

Alongside this, we are constant providers of translation services both in Sarajevo, but also across the country. We draw from the city's top talent to provide elite-level written and both consecutive and instantaneous translation services. We provide services in almost all European languages, as well as Turkish, Arabic, Russian and Mandarin.

For more information on pricing and programmes, visit our website, contact us via info@markscentar.ba or call us on the number given below. 

We look forward to hearing from you!

Name: InFlux English School
Description:
A inFlux English School é uma rede de escolas de idiomas que trabalha desde 2004 unindo inovação e compromisso com o aprendizado. Possui mais de 140 franquias em todas as regiões do Brasil e atende mais de 45 mil alunos.

O formato de negócio da inFlux foi feito para ajudar você a brilhar como empresário e entrar para o seleto grupo de franqueados mais satisfeitos do Brasil. Além de ter um rápido retorno sobre o investimento (18 a 24 meses), a lucratividade de uma franquia pode superar os 40% - com um investimento inicial que gira em torno de R$250 mil. 

A qualidade ainda é comprovada pelos prêmios conquistados pela Rede: 

- Rede 5 estrelas da revista Pequenas Empresas & Grandes Negócios.

- Selo de Excelência em Franchising da ABF (Associação Brasileira de Franquias) conquistados de 2009 a 2016.

- A única a receber por sete vezes o “Destaque Selo de Excelência da ABF”. O prêmio mais respeitado do franchising brasileiro, concedido para apenas três das quase 3000 franquias atuantes no país.

- Eleita a franqueadora do ano de 2017 pela ABF.

Além disso, a inFlux é a única que oferece aos alunos o Compromisso de Aprendizado: uma garantia, firmada em contrato, de que em 2 anos e meio ele alcança inglês avançado, comprovado pela certificação internacional TOEIC. No fim do curso, o aluno atinge 700 pontos ou mais no teste. Caso não alcance este resultado, pode continuar estudando de graça até que a pontuação seja atingida.

Bem-vindo ao mundo do sucesso. Venha para a inFlux!

Description:
We partner with tour operators to offer international students, sports clubs and music associations an unforgettable educational and cultural experience in Paris.
We welcome students from all over the world in our boarding schools to create an all-in-one experience: accommodations inside the school, French lessons, sports tournaments with local French students, catering and visits of the French capital. 

French lessons: 
-All our French teachers are native teacher Certified FLE
-We can organize meetings with our French students onsite
-All classes include group projects & fun activities to learn French (Theater plays, games, songs etc.) 
-Assessment upon arrival to define class level & learning objectives 
-Curriculum based on each group's learning objectives (French arts, Sports, History, Literature etc.)

Campus Accommodations:
We offer campus accommodations inside boarding schools around Paris to welcome students and associations all year long. This is a unique occasion for international students (6 to 18 year old) to visit Paris, learn French (optional), while staying in typical French school facilities. The facilities have local agreements to welcome underage students (Agrément Jeunesse et Sport).
accommodations include: 
-Single, Twin or Triple bedrooms with ensuite bathroom
-Cafetaria onsite 
-Sports equipments & facilities for tournaments 
-Classrooms 
-Lecture Hall 
-Parking onsite 
-Direct access to Paris RER station

Visits: 
campus accommodations are ideally located around Paris to facilitate sightseeing through Metro, RER or Bus. 
We also help you facilitate a private bus transportations at additional cost. 
Based on your educational tour objective (music, language, sports, arts etc.), we can also help you design an optimal visit schedule including the most relevant monuments & activities (N.B. Tours & tickets should be booked by schools or Tour operators)

Name: Parlez Provence
Description:
Parlez Provence is a premier French language tutoring service based in the heart of Provence, France. Founded by Principal and Lead Educator Mathilde Bonardi, we offer tailored instruction for non-native speakers across all levels — from primary and secondary school learners to GCSE and A-Level students, as well as adult and casual learners.

What sets us apart? Our immersive approach. In addition to high-quality tutoring, Parlez Provence offers residential retreats for adults seeking to deepen their language skills while experiencing the culture, cuisine, and natural beauty of one of France’s most iconic regions. Set among vineyards, lavender fields, and olive groves, our retreats blend education with inspiration.

Whether you're preparing for exams, rediscovering your love of languages, or simply dreaming of speaking French with confidence, Parlez Provence is your gateway to mastering the language — and living it.

Parlez Provence. Where language meets lifestyle.

Name: My Language Class
Description:
At My Language Class, we offer expert Spanish and English language lessons to help professionals all over the globe reach their linguistic goals. 

We firmly believe that motivation is key to successful language learning. That is why we focus on creating dynamic and enjoyable lessons in a relaxed and safe environment where mistakes are seen as evidence of learning.

Our humanistic approach to teaching means that we recognize the uniqueness of each of our students and tailor our teaching methods to suit individual learning styles. Our communicative approach focuses on developing real-life communication skills, with a special emphasis on speaking, while also covering reading, writing and listening.

All of our teachers are highly qualified professionals with a deep understanding of language acquisition and we are committed to providing first-class education to all our students. 

Whether you're looking to improve your Spanish or English language skills, join us at My Language Class and experience the joy of learning a new language!

Description: The school was founded in the year 2021 and we are proud to be home to students both locally and internationally, those that are interested in learning our local language. We offer different languages and we have different mentors from different communities to mentor our learners and impact them on the diverse values and traditions In our current changing world communication is key because it enables understanding and running of daily activities. Despite the use of the student’s local dialect in Education, it also increases social awareness, psychic and language development of learners. In our modern society cultural exchange has become essential part of development. These courses ensure full exposure to the language while encouraging collaboration and teamwork.

PRIVATE LESSONS FOR ADULTS
If you are looking for a way to improve your Spanish, making the most of each of your lessons, progressing at your own pace, and focusing on what interests you the most, private classes for adults are your best option.

PRIVATE LESSONS FOR CHILDREN
If you want your child to learn Spanish in a relaxed atmosphere, these courses are designed especially for them.
Learning Spanish from an early age can open educational, professional, and cultural opportunities, in addition to improving their communication skills.

Additionally, we can also help you with other specific needs like: DELE Preparation, Spanish for Travel, Spanish for Business, Culture and Literature, etc.

Fell free to contact us to discuss your needs. We will be happy to listen to your needs and design a personalized learning proposal.

Happy Spanish!

Name: Houston Nihongo Kai - Japanese Language Meetup
Description:
We are Houston Nihongo Kai
Bringing people together through Japanese language, culture, and community in Houston and Greater Houston! 

A Little Bit About Our History....
Our group has been around since the 1990s. Founded by local Japanese language learners and throughout the years we were able to keep this group going mostly consistently with at least once a month meeting. From the last 10 years the group has gone through many changes, hurdles and challenges. With the covid19 pandemic being our biggest challenge (moving us online for 2 years), yet we are still here and stronger than ever.

Our Mission
Houston Nihongo Kai is dedicated to Japanese language learning and cultural exchange through immersion , social events, and community connections.

What We Strive For
Bring People Together
Creating a welcoming space for meaningful language exchange and friendships between Japanese and English speakers.

Celebrate Culture
Providing authentic experiences that connect communities and inspire global curiosity.

Support Personal Growth
Offering educational opportunities, mentorship, and leadership experiences to strengthen language skills and cultural understanding. 

Foster Inclusivity
Ensuring learners of all backgrounds and skill levels feel encouraged, supported, and at home.

Give Back
Engaging in volunteer initiatives and cultural outreach to build stronger ties between Japanese and local Houston communities.
We have also partnered up with local businesses such as this minority owned cafe by holding events there and bringing in revenue for the cafe owner.

Houston Nihongo Kai is a registered non-profit corporation registered under Texas Secretary of State.

Name: Austrian School in Prague
Description:
The Austrian School in Prague was founded in 1991 as a Czech private school and in 1993 it was incorporated into the Czech public school system. The ÖGP is a six-year secondary school. In the first two years (which correlate with the 8th and 9th grade in the Czech school system) a strong emphasis is put on teaching German and English, so that the students are well prepared for the final four years, when most of the subjects are taught in German. Thanks to this thorough preparation the German language skills of most students are of a very high standard. Only some subjects (Czech, Sports, Arts and parts of Social Sciences and History) are taught in Czech.

Another focus of the ÖGP is the acquisition of several other important languages of the European Union (French and Spanish). Furthermore, from the 3rd grade onwards emphasis is put on Informatics and Communication Technology, which is taught in German. Additionally, the ÖGP offers several special subjects and voluntary optional subjects, such as Latin, international language certificates, basic knowledge in business administration and economics.


Moreover, the ÖGP is a certified examination centre for the „Österreichische Sprachdiplom Deutsch“ (an internationally recognized certificate for the German language). Furthermore, the school offers preparatory courses for the DELE and DELF, also internationally recognized certificates for the Spanish and French language, respectively, and if requested, for the BEC (Business English Certificate) within the framework of the English seminars, in which students are prepared for the oral school-leaving exam in English, but also focus on business English.

Name: Pathfinders School of English
Description:
A Pathfinders School of English é uma plataforma online de ensino da língua inglesa que tem como base o Standard British English (inglês britânico padrão).

A série Desbravando a Língua Inglesa é o nosso mais novo lançamento. Feita sob os quatro pilares do método Pathfinders, seu objetivo é levar o aluno à proficiência (Nível C2 - Common European Framework of Reference for Languages) em 21 módulos.

Os Quatro Pilares do Método Pathfinders são:
1. Hierarquia de importância: aprender, antes de mais nada, aquilo que é o mais relevante.
2. Vocabulário útil: construir um vocabulário com palavras de alta frequência.
3. Repetição consistente: provar ao cérebro que o que foi aprendido não deve ser esquecido.
4. Imersão: máxima exposição possível ao idioma, integrando teoria e vida real.

Um 'pathfinder' é alguém que acha ou cria um caminho, que descobre e experimenta novas maneiras e métodos, expandindo o seu conhecimento. Essa é a essência de um desbravador, e esperamos que, com ela, você também possa desbravar a língua inglesa.

Keep to the path | Mantenha-se no caminho.

Nossa metodologia é voltada para o ambiente corporativo e oferece um aprendizado prático, que vai além das regras gramaticais, priorizando a comunicação real e a confiança ao falar.

Oferecemos aulas em grupos reduzidos de até 6 alunos, combinando interação personalizada e práticas intensivas para acelerar o progresso de cada um. Nossa plataforma exclusiva permite acesso diário aos conteúdos, garantindo que o estudo seja contínuo e acessível.

Quer avançar na carreira, expandir negócios ou ter mais oportunidades internacionais? A TrueBlue English está aqui para te ajudar a alcançar seus objetivos com eficiência e resultados garantidos.

TrueBlue English – Transformando a Comunicação, Elevando Carreiras.

Description:
Desde 2008 ajudamos nossos alunos a alcançarem seus objetivos pessoais e profissionais por meio da aprendizagem de idiomas.

Acreditamos que o ensino-aprendizagem é um processo contínuo, que pode ser leve e tranquilo. Além disso, para ser fluente em um idioma, é preciso falar. Nossas aulas promovem o uso do inglês na prática, desde o início dos cursos.

Name: Betterİng
Description:
Our mission is simple; to empower students to learn English and broaden their horizons, as we believe that language learning is a key to unlocking opportunities in the global workforce and fostering cross-cultural understanding.

At Better İngilizce, we offer a range of classes to help students achieve their goals, including IELTS and TOEFL preparatory classes, business English classes, English speaking lessons, general English lessons, and more. Our experienced teachers are dedicated to providing personalised instruction that meets the unique needs of each student, and we use cutting-edge technologies and teaching methods to ensure that our students stay engaged and motivated.

Our commitment to education goes far beyond simply language learning. We also believe in educating people on different cultures and broadening their mindsets, so that they can navigate the complexities of the globalised world with confidence and empathy.

If you're looking to learn English or improve your language skills, Better İngilizce is here to help. Join our community of motivated learners today and unlock a world of opportunities!

Name: Key Point Languages
Description:
En Key Point Languages creemos que los idiomas son la llave que abre la puerta a tu futuro de nuevas oportunidades académicas, profesionales y personales. Somos una empresa de soluciones lingüísticas con presencia Online y en Almería en nuestros centros asociados, comprometida con ofrecer una enseñanza innovadora, flexible y de calidad.

Nuestros servicios incluyen:
- Cursos presenciales en centros educativos asociados (infantil, primaria, secundaria y adultos).
- Formación online en vivo, adaptadas al nivel y objetivos del alumno. 
- Preparación de exámenes oficiales (Aptis, Trinity y Cambridge)
- Programas para empresas y profesionales, centrados en inglés para los negocios y la comunicación internacional.
- Actividades culturales y talleres de idiomas, fomentando la inmersión lingüística real.

Nos diferenciamos por:

- Una metodología dinámica y personalizada, que combina innovación tecnológica con cercanía humana.

- Un equipo docente cualificado y motivado.

- Flexibilidad en formatos y horarios, pensando en las necesidades de cada estudiante.

En Key Point Languages tenemos la llave para tu futuro hablando inglés.

Our first big step? We’ve developed a unique English grammar book that makes tricky concepts clear and practical. And this is only the beginning. We’re building a community where Arab learners can master English with ease and joy.
