Name: Hello Deutsch Language Training Center
Description:
Hello Deutsch Language Training Center is a professional German language school based in Cebu City, Philippines, specializing in CEFR-aligned German language education for individuals and organizations preparing for opportunities in Germany.

We provide structured German language programs from A1 to B1, designed to build not only exam readiness but also real-world communication skills required for successful integration into German workplaces and society. Our training emphasizes consistency, progression, and practical application of language in professional and everyday contexts.

A core focus of our work is preparing healthcare professionals, Ausbildung candidates, and career-oriented learners for employment, training, and long-term pathways in Germany. Our programs are developed to support language competence, confidence, and sustainability—key factors in workforce integration and retention.

In addition to individual training, Hello Deutsch Language Training Center collaborates with recruitment agencies, healthcare institutions, and corporate partners to deliver customized language programs aligned with international standards and workforce mobility requirements.

At Hello Deutsch Language Training Center, we believe language is more than a requirement—it is the foundation for integration, professional growth, and long-term success.

Name: Jezikovna šola Xenia

Je namreč način, kako razumeti in sprejeti različne kulture, hkrati pa priložnost za spoznavanje drugih ljudi in medsebojno deljenje različnih izkušenj. Tako kot je pri starih Grkih beseda "xenia" označevala gostoljubnost, ki se je redno vzpostavljala med gostom in gostiteljem, tako boste tudi vi na naših jezikovnih tečajih našli toplo in gostoljubno okolje, kjer se vsak učenec počuti kot doma.

Pridružite se nam in začnite svoje popotovanje po svetu tujih jezikov!

Name: VHS Bhaktapur
Description:
VHS Bhaktapur is a community learning center based in Nepal’s capital city Kathmandu. As a Social Business, VHS engages itself to fill in the educational gaps existing in the nation. Social Entrepreneurship training, Global Citizenship Education, Cultural Introduction Seminar, Nepali and German Language courses, Regenerative-Sustainability and Alternative Economy initiatives and International Volunteering are its main activities. 

Along with formal learning, VHS Bhaktapur focuses heavily on promoting non-formal activities to expand the learning outcomes of Nepali youths. Since its establishment (2011), VHS has provided its services to thousands of students and youths in Nepal. As a youth hub, VHS Bhaktapur regularly organizes community events, workshops, talk programs, formal training and language courses. Due to its focus in non-formal learning and its young team, it is one of the most innovative youth-led youth organizations in Nepal.

Name: Wizard Planalto
Description: A partir de uma simples escola iniciou-se a construção de uma grandiosa rede de ensino, que já atravessou as fronteiras do nosso país. Com uma metodologia totalmente diferenciada, a Wizard aposta em cursos que acompanham as características particulares de cada aluno, preparando-o para aproveitar totalmente o seu aprendizado. Desta forma, sempre procurando valorizar o aluno, a Wizard continua a ser a principal rede de ensino de idiomas do Brasil. Já ultrapassou a marca de 1200 escolas e não para de crescer.  Os alunos Wizard conseguem se qualificar rapidamente no mercado de trabalho e ficam devidamente preparados para a vida bilíngue. A metodologia exclusiva de ensino, aliada à tecnologia possibilita um aprendizado contínuo e simplificado.   O objetivo educacional da metodologia pedagógica Wizard é promover o desenvolvimento completo das habilidades de comunicação: fala, audição, leitura e escrita. Com um método pedagógico completo e alinhado a inúmeras experiências de sucesso, os alunos têm a oportunidade de conhecer muito mais do que um idioma. Por meio de avançadas técnicas de ensino, os alunos desenvolvem os aspectos pessoais, culturais e acadêmicos, além de liderança e automotivação. Assim, são estimulados a se expressar livremente, vencendo suas inibições e bloqueios durante o aprendizado.

Name: Alliance Française di Venezia
Description:
L’Alliance Française di Venezia, associazione culturale, è stata creata nella sua forma attuale nel 1987. Si dedica da più di 30 anni a promuovere la lingua e la cultura francese nella provincia di Venezia ed è diventata un punto di riferimento in questo campo.

Offre corsi di francese online e in presenza per adulti e bambini, adattati al livello di ciascuno. Inoltre è un istituto ufficiale per l’ottenimento delle certificazioni DELF-DALF e TCF per tutti i livelli di conoscenza della lingua francese. Queste certificazioni sono rilasciate dal Ministero dell’Istruzione francese e sono riconosciute a livello internazionale. 

Propone inoltre un importante programma di manifestazioni culturali aperte a tutti e l’accesso alla mediateca per i soci. Ha stretti rapporti con associazioni, organizzazioni e istituzioni culturali veneziane con obiettivi simili.

L’Alliance Française di Venezia ha sede dal 1987 a pochi passi da Piazza San Marco, tra le mura storiche del Casino Venier, gioiello dell’architettura settecentesca che ha a cuore di preservare.

Name: We Talent Education
Description:
We Talent Education được thành lập bởi một nhóm các bạn du học sinh Đức. Sau quá trình học tập và làm việc tại Đức, chúng tôi trở về Việt Nam và thành lập nên We Talent Education, với mong muốn đưa tiếng Đức phổ biến hơn, chắp cánh ước mơ du học Đức của các bạn trẻ Việt.

Chân giá trị
Chúng tôi hiểu rằng, Giáo dục trước hết là ở chữ Tâm. Đội ngũ giáo viên cũng như nhân của We Talent đều làm việc nhiệt tình, tận tình giúp đỡ học viên mọi lúc có thể.

Có thể nói We Talent làm công việc làm dâu trăm họ. Có học viên học tiếng Đức là để đi du học. Người khác thì xin visa để sang đoàn tụ với gia đình. Nhiều em lại chỉ học cho biết, Với mỗi nhu cầu khác nhau, thật khó có thể xếp tất cả vào cùng một lớp. Chính vì thế, mỗi giáo viên đều phải quan tâm sát sao đến từng học viên để kịp thời chỉ bảo, nhằm giúp các em đạt được mục tiêu riêng của mình. Đó có lẽ chính là thành công lớn nhất của We Talent cho đến giờ phút này.

Nhưng điều chúng tôi tự tin nhất về bản thân mình phải nói đến chế độ chăm sóc khách hàng. Với các chương trình du học hay Aupair, nhiều trung tâm khác sẽ kết thúc hợp đồng sau khi đưa các bạn sang nước ngoài học tập. Tuy nhiên We Talent luôn quan tâm đến các em học sinh, trước, trong và sau mỗi chuyến đi. Các bạn cảm thấy ngành học chưa phù hợp? Chúng tôi sẽ hướng dẫn cách xin đổi ngành học. Aupair cảm thấy không thoải mái với gia đình nuôi? Chúng tôi cũng giúp đổi gia đình khác. Tất cả những điều này đều được cam kết bằng văn bản. Phụ huynh và các em học sinh hoàn toàn yên tâm về lộ trình du học của mình.

Bên cạnh đó chúng tôi cũng xác định môi trường tại We Talent là luôn luôn học hỏi và đổi mới hàng ngày. Các nhân viên, trợ giảng và kể cả đội ngũ giáo viên cũng phải trau dồi, nâng cao kiến thức hàng ngày. Chúng tôi tin rằng, xã hội luôn thay đổi, đứng lại có nghĩa là tụt hậu. Sự đam mê phát triển bản thân là cốt lõi cho sự tồn tại của We Talent.

Description:

Nossos professores são altamente qualificados e possuem ampla experiência no ensino de alemão como língua estrangeira. Eles usam metodologias interativas e dinâmicas para garantir que os alunos estejam envolvidos e motivados a aprender. Além disso, nossos cursos são totalmente personalizados para atender às necessidades e objetivos individuais de cada aluno.

Nós oferecemos uma ampla gama de opções de aulas particulares, desde lições básicas para iniciantes até treinamento avançado para falantes fluentes.
Nossa plataforma de ensino online é fácil de usar e permite que os alunos acessem suas aulas de qualquer lugar, a qualquer hora. Isso significa que os alunos podem aprender a seu próprio ritmo e em seu próprio horário, sem precisar se preocupar com deslocamentos ou restrições de horário.

Se você está procurando uma forma eficiente e acessível de aprender alemão, então nós gostaríamos de lhe dar as boas-vindas à nossa escola! Nós estamos ansiosos para acompanhar seu progresso e ajudá-lo a alcançar seus objetivos linguísticos.

Name: Wonderland Online
Description:
Nuestra experiencia

Con años de experiencia en la enseñanza del inglés, hemos ayudado a cientos de profesionales a alcanzar sus metas laborales y personales. Desde entrevistas exitosas hasta presentaciones impecables, nuestro enfoque práctico ha demostrado ser altamente efectivo.
Queremos ser el puente que conecta a los profesionales con el mundo global a través del dominio del inglés y que cada alumno pueda alcanzar sus objetivos , utilizando el inglés como herramienta principal para destacarse en el mercado internacional. 
Nuestra visión

Empoderarte para que puedas comunicarte con confianza, abrir puertas a nuevas oportunidades y superar las barreras idiomáticas.

Nuestra misión
Transformar el aprendizaje del inglés en una experiencia efectiva, personalizada y orientada a resultados. Nos comprometemos a:
•	Brindar un método comunicativo que permita a nuestros alumnos ganar fluidez y comprensión de manera práctica.
•	Diseñar programas que simulen situaciones reales del ámbito profesional, como entrevistas, reuniones y presentaciones.
•	Ofrecer un acompañamiento continuo que motive, guíe y asegure el progreso de cada estudiante.
Creemos firmemente que aprender inglés no es solo una habilidad, sino una herramienta clave para acceder a mejores oportunidades laborales, conectarse con culturas globales y alcanzar metas personales y profesionales. Ayudamos a nuestros alumnos a superar las barreras del idioma, ganando confianza y fluidez con nuestro innovador Método Fénix.

¿Qué es el Método Fénix?
Es un método comunicativo, diseñado para mejorar tu fluidez, comprensión y nivel de inglés de manera notable en tan solo 6 meses.

¿A quién está dirigido?
A todos los que:
Necesiten mejorar su fluidez para su trabajo diario.
Quieran prepararse para entrevistas laborales en inglés.
Busquen hablar inglés con confianza en reuniones.
Deseen ofrecer sus servicios profesionales en el exterior 

Agendá tu llamada hoy!

Name: Perth Finnish School Inc. (Perthin Suomi-koulu ry)
Description:
Perth Finnish School introduces Finnish language and culture to children and youth, while also offering adult classes. It provides an opportunity for individuals (whether first- or multi-generation Finns) in Australia to connect. Children have the chance to learn and speak Finnish with their peers in a fun and engaging way, using songs, games, play, arts, and crafts. Perth Finnish School is held fortnightly on Saturdays from 2:00 to 3:30 pm at the Immanuel Finnish Lutheran Church of Perth in Parkwood. The school follows the Western Australian school term calendar. For inquiries about vacancies, email us at suomikouluperth@gmail.com. 

Suomi-koulu tutustuttaa lapset Suomen kieleen ja kulttuuriin. Siellä on mahdollisuus tavata muita Australian-suomalaisia ja lapset saavat mahdollisuuden oppia ja käyttää suomen kieltä saman ikäisten kanssa. Oppiminen on tehty hauskaksi mm. laulujen, leikkien ja askartelun varjolla.  Suomi-koulu kokoontuu joka toinen lauantai klo 14-15.30 Suomi-kirkolla, Parkwoodissa. Koulun lukukaudet ovat yhtenäiset Länsi-Australian koulujen kanssa. Vapaita paikkoja voi tiedustella sähköpostitse: suomikouluperth@gmail.com.

Name: 4Lingua
Description:
Szkoła Językowa 4 Lingua

W ramach prowadzonej działalności zachęcamy i pozytywnie motywujemy dzieci do nauki języka angielskiego. Stosujemy różnego rodzaju narzędzia dydaktyczne wspierane przez kreatywnych lektorów żeby pomóc dzieciom poznawać otaczający je świat przełamując istniejące bariery językowe.
Poza silnym naciskiem na umiejętność komunikacji i sprawne posługiwanie się językiem obcym w mowie i piśmie uczymy czerpania radości i satysfakcji ze zdobywania kolejnych etapów pogłębiania wiedzy językowej. Dzięki połączeniu wieloletnich doświadczeń w nauczaniu, szkoleniach i zarządzaniu oraz odpowiadając na Państwa potrzeby stworzyliśmy szkołę językową, która oferuje zajęcia ukierunkowane na pełny rozwój dziecka w zakresie swobodnej komunikacji językowej. Mamy nadzieję, że wysiłek jaki wkładamy w odpowiedni dobór materiałów edukacyjnych, rozwój lektorów, dbałość o każdy szczegół prowadzonych zajęć spełni Państwa oczekiwania i przyniesie wiele radości.

Z zamiłowania do języków rekomendujemy zajęcia dzieciom od najmłodszych lat oferując kursy językowe dla dzieci i młodzieży w naszych oddziałach zlokalizowanych w szkołach podstawowych na terenie Śląska. Aktywnie promujemy znajomość języka angielskiego w biznesie oraz celach turystycznych. Posiadamy kadrę lektorów prowadzących zajęcia indywidualnie i grupowo w zakresie języka hiszpańskiego, niemieckiego, francuskiego, włoskiego, rosyjskiego.

Nasi lektorzy to przede wszystkim nauczyciele z pasją, których cechuje komunikatywność, kreatywność i zaangażowanie. Każdy z nich posiada odpowiednie kwalifikacje i doświadczenie w prowadzeniu zajęć. Stosujemy naszym zdaniem najbardziej efektywną metodę nauczania jaką jest Direct Method. Skuteczność tej metody polega na przełamaniu bariery mówienia poprzez konwersację już od pierwszych zajęć!

Name: Right English Course, LLC
Description:
The Right English Course was created by an experienced ESL teacher on a mission to improve her students SPOKEN English. In her first years of teaching, Tiffany couldn't figure out why--although they were making steady progress with reading and writing--her students' speaking skills were lagging behind. 

With time, she realized that many of her intelligent, well-written students couldn't speak English effectively because their accents were getting in the way (of course!). She scoured the internet but couldn't seem to find the right pronunciation resources to get her students the results they needed. But she couldn't give up. 

Through research, experimentation, and close assessment of her students' progress, Tiffany has amassed a treasure trove of tips, tricks, and knowledge that she wants to share with ESL/EFL teachers and learners who are feeling as "stuck" as she was. And Tiffany created the Right English Course, that perfect resource she had been searching for.

With Tiffany's clear explanations, comprehensive practice activities, and individualized feedback, her students now experience REAL improvement in their spoken English. Better pronunciation has allowed them to speak confidently at work and present the very best version of themselves to the world.

If you or your employees struggle to communicate effectively in English or want to refine your American English accent, please send us a message! Tiffany offers both free and premium (paid) courses as well as one-to-one and group coaching for businesses and individuals who need to speak clearer English. Her courses are designed for English learners with intermediate to advanced English language skills, but she has coached students with great results at all English levels.

Remember, you don't need to practice English MORE; you need to practice English RIGHT. Join the Right English Course today, and finally speak English fluently and confidently!

Name: Erfolg Zentrum : Cours d'Allemand
Description:
Erfolg-Zentrum est une école de langues dynamique située au Cameroun, avec trois campus : deux à Douala (Cité CICAM et Logpom) et un à Yaoundé (Melen). Nous créons un environnement d’apprentissage chaleureux et personnalisé, alliant plaisir et réussite pour favoriser l'apprentissage de l'allemand.

Depuis plus de 10 ans, nous avons bâti une solide réputation grâce à notre offre diversifiée de cours d'Allemand Langue Étrangère (Deutsch als Fremdsprache). Nous proposons des cours intensifs en présentiel (matin, après-midi et soir) et en ligne. Nos programmes incluent également des préparations aux examens du Goethe Institut, de l’ÖSD et de l’ECL. Nous pouvons aussi offrir  des cours particuliers adaptés aux besoins spécifiques de l'étudiant.

En plus de l’enseignement, nous offrons un accompagnement complet pour les procédures de voyage vers l’Allemagne. Grâce à notre réseau de correspondants et de consultants sur place, nous fournissons des services tels que l'orientation et les conseils, l'assistance pour les visas, l'ouverture de comptes bloqués, la réservation de logements, ainsi que la recherche de contrats de travail et de séjour au pair. Nos étudiants ont un accès direct à nos consultants en Allemagne, leur permettant de bénéficier d’un soutien personnalisé et de réponses rapides à toutes leurs questions.

Nos valeurs :

1. Excellence : Nous nous engageons à fournir une formation de haute qualité pour préparer nos étudiants à réussir leur projet de voyage.

2. Respect : Nous plaçons l’Homme au cœur de nos préoccupations, témoignant un profond respect envers nos étudiants, collaborateurs et partenaires.

3. Innovation : Nous nous réinventons chaque jour pour répondre aux attentes de nos clients en adoptant les dernières technologies et meilleures pratiques en matière de formation.

Rejoignez Erfolg-Zentrum pour une expérience d’apprentissage enrichissante, où votre réussite est notre priorité !

Name: SUCCESS ACADEMY English School
Description:
Метод ESL - Английский как второй язык - 2015
Английский язык является одним из самых простых языков в мире. В то же время существующие методы изучения английского языка для иностранцев кажутся долгими и неэффективными, и потребуются годы, чтобы начать свободно говорить в рамках такой системы. Чувствуя все это на себе, Наталья Сенатская пыталась найти новые методы обучения, которые позволили бы ей всего за несколько месяцев приобрести теоретические знания и практические речевые навыки. Находясь в России, в одной из своих многочисленных командировок Наталья узнает о методе ESL – «Английский как второй язык». Изучая новый метод, она узнала, что он уже успешно применяется более чем в 40 странах. Ознакомившись с результатами изучения английского языка теми людьми, которые уже используют метод ESL, он оценил все преимущества и решил попробовать новый эффективный метод в Молдове. Наталья Сенатская первой начала преподавать английский язык в Молдове по методу ESL.
С 2013 года школа прошла большой путь. Учителей подготовило большое количество школьников, студентов и взрослых. Удалось организовать курсы английского языка в Кишиневе: курсы английского языка в Чокане, открытие школы английского языка в Ботанике. Авторская методика преподавания английского языка помогла многим родителям увидеть долгожданные результаты обучения своих детей. Курсы английского языка помогли старшеклассникам подготовиться к экзаменам, в том числе к экзамену TOEFL. Это самая современная языковая онлайн-школа в Кишиневе. Академия Успеха создала и запустила уникальные онлайн-курсы английского языка в марте 2020 года. Преподаватели английского языка помогали и продолжают совершенствовать навыки владения английским языком школьникам, студентам, сотрудникам крупных корпораций и тем, кто заинтересован в изучении английского языка. Приглашаем Вас на курсы английского языка в Кишиневе - давайте говорить по-английски вместе!

Name: Al Assyea Private School
Description: The Assyea School is considered the first private school in Syria, established in 1873 in Damascus by the initiative of the Orthodox Patriarch Ignatius Jacob II, with the assistance of religious figures and Orthodox merchants. The school aimed to teach languages, sciences, arts, and religious education to students from all sects and religions. The school became famous for the quality of its education and its graduates, who included influential figures in Syrian society such as Michel Aflaq, Anton Saadeh, Fares al-Khoury, and others. The school also played an important role in spreading culture and national awareness among the Syrian people during the French colonial period. The school continues to operate to this day, with branches in Bab Tuma and Jaramana.

Name: Kalamazoo Chinese Academy
Description:
Kalamazoo Chinese Academy (KCA) is a 501c(3) non-profit educational organization dedicated to providing Chinese language and cultural experiences to youth from all cultural, racial, and ethnic backgrounds in the greater Kalamazoo area.

KCA is proud to host the 2022-23 KCA STARTALK Institute Chinese program, a year-round student engagement program, from spring 2022 to spring 2023. STARTALK is a federal grant program funded by the National Security Agency (NSA).

KCA offers:
Language - Heritage Chinese classes and non-heritage Chinese classes
Performing arts - Dance classes, lion dance practice sessions, and Chinese YoYo practice sessions
Martial arts - Youth martial arts class and adult Tai Chi class

School Mission
To provide Chinese language and cultural experiences to K-12 students from all cultural, racial, and ethnic backgrounds in the greater Kalamazoo community.

School Vision
To bridge the culture gap and enhance the community's understanding of Chinese culture. To prepare students for meaningful and successful participation in the global environment.

Uważamy, że lekcje powinny być zróżnicowane i angażujące. Dlatego zajęcia opieramy nie tylko na zadaniach ze słuchu, podręcznikach, ćwiczeniach gramatycznych, ale także na materiałach z życia codziennego takich jak: wiadomości, filmy, seriale, muzyka i podcasty. Podczas zajęć mówimy jak najwięcej w języku, którego uczymy. Nie jesteśmy zwolennikami szybkiego nauczania i realizowania lekcji za lekcją z podręcznika. Jesteśmy po to, żeby wszystko na spokojnie wytłumaczyć i dlatego dopasowujemy się do potrzeb wszystkich naszych uczniów.

Name: Prof. Carlos Sanchez
Description:
Crescer não é fácil, mas é possível para quem entra de corpo, alma e coração naquilo que se propõe a fazer para gerar valor ao próximo. A minha missão é ajudar pessoas aprender espanhol e desde 2016 eu venho progredindo meteoricamente nessa jornada, transformando a minha própria vida através dos benefícios que pude gerar na vida de outras pessoas com o meu método de ensino. 

Iniciei minha história como professor trabalhando para escolas de renomes como Wizard, CNA, Fisk, onde pude adquirir muita experiência metodológica e a partir daí questionar, refletir e desenvolver minhas próprias técnicas de levar o conhecimento aos estudantes do idioma como língua estrangeira. 

Nesse mesmo período iniciei o atendimento com aulas particulares, onde pude testar e comprovar a eficiência das minhas ideias metodológicas. É isso mesmo! Sou um professor idealista e perfeccionista, além de me aprimorar, estou sempre buscando ampliar os meus recursos e capacidade de ensinar com qualidade. 

Essa postura oportunizou meu ingresso em grandes empresas e desde 2018 eu passei a ser disputado em grandes companhias e através do meu próprio método eu pude ajudar centenas de colaboradores a crescerem e gerarem mais negócios para suas firmas. 

A alta demanda e solicitação dos meus serviços me possibilitou dar um passo a mais e evoluir para Consultoria de idiomas. Hoje sou um dos idealizadores da EL MUNDO HABLANTE, empresa que eu criei para mediar aulas de outros idiomas e que atua diretamente na necessidade das pessoas, setor ou departamento em qualquer segmento de mercado. 

E não pense que encerrei o atendimento com aulas particulares. Dar aulas é o único meio de eu progredir na arte de ensinar e por essa razão essa atividade estará sempre presente na minha vida. 

Agradeço a Deus todos os dias por fazer o que eu amo e ajudar muitas pessoas, e quem sabe um dia eu possa fazer parte da sua história e ter você como mais uma conquista com um final feliz na minha.

中部インターナショナルスクールへようこそ。



英語を母国語とする人口、英語が母国語ではないけど話せる人口を合わせると、地球の半分以上の人口になります。英語が使える事によって広がる世界の広さは計り知れないのです。英語が話せたらと思うとワクワクしませんか？私達は多くの人に英語でコミュニケーションができるようになって欲しいという思いと、これから世界を舞台に活躍できる人材を育成するために、中部インターナショナルスクールを設立しました。私達が住む半田市、中部地方、日本そして世界へと、人との輪を広げ楽しく学べ、グローバルレベルの実力をつけられる学校を目指しています。



We decided to build a school where everyone can and will have fun learning English to communicate with one another. While we are based in Handa, it is our desire that our community will eventually expand through Aichi to the entire Chubu Region.



CIS also offers educational consulting service that cater to many needs and situations. For adults and children who are considering short-term study abroad, families that are relocating, and college bound students who will study in English, we can assist you in your preparation and transition.

Thank you for your interest and time. Please do not hesitate to contact us.



Itoko and Paul Richardson

Name: DOBRA SZKOŁA Centrum Języków Obcych
Description:
Kursy językowe, które otworzą przed Tobą świat nowych możliwości. 

Ucząc się angielskiego, niemieckiego, hiszpańskiego, włoskiego, duńskiego, arabskiego, polskiego dla obcokrajowców, francuskiego czy rosyjskiego, zyskasz nie tylko biegłość w komunikacji, ale również klucz do globalnego zrozumienia i międzynarodowej współpracy.

Kursy, prowadzone przez wykwalifikowanych nauczycieli, są dostosowane do Twoich indywidualnych potrzeb i celów. Skupiamy się na praktycznym zastosowaniu języka, co pozwala szybko osiągnąć płynność w mówieniu i pewność siebie. Dzięki naszym zajęciom, będziesz mógł efektywnie komunikować się w pracy, podróży, czy w kontaktach międzynarodowych.

Dodatkowo, oferujemy specjalistyczne kursy dla firm, które chcą podnieść kompetencje językowe swoich pracowników, co przekłada się na lepsze wyniki w biznesie międzynarodowym. Nauka języków w naszej szkole to inwestycja w Twój rozwój osobisty i zawodowy, otwierająca drzwi do nowych kultur, doświadczeń i możliwości.

Name: Royal English Academy
Description:

En un mundo globalizado, el aprendizaje del inglés se torna cada vez más significativo debido a que el manejo del lenguaje indudablemente abre las puertas al mundo, genera ventajas competitivas a la hora de buscar trabajo y posibilita la comunicación en caso de viajar al exterior o emigrar.

La finalidad del proyecto educativo de nuestra Academia es el compromiso de ser formadores de personas en el manejo del idioma inglés, incentivar a los estudiantes a aprender aprendiendo, capacitarse, perfeccionarse y desarrollar sus capacidades para con la lengua inglesa en un espacio formativo bilingüe.

Name: The Beeline Campus
Description:
Senior Beeliners
We contemplate it is our privilege and honor to have you as our alumni. It is nothing but the contribution of our esteemed alumni that we have come to achieving so much and become one of the premier institutions in the field. They always share their pride in being part of the Beeline family by recommending us with no hesitation as the best English Course in the country and have been shouldering the prestige of the Beeline excellence. In a nut shell, if not for the seniors, no Beeline would be found.
ABOUT US
Being an unparalleled adept at teaching English, The BEELINE is known as a highly esteemed English course that has been leading the field primarily in the Southern Province in Sri Lanka for over 11 consecutive years.
The Beeline was set in motion in 2005, and to date, we have been stepping towards 15 years of our glorious existence facilitating more or less 10 000 students to quench their thirst of English.
We are registered under the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka (PV 79307) and those who consummate the curriculum can procure a valuable certificate as well.
Our Vision
We discern that our precious assets are our quality of service and the “Word of mouth” referrals. The role of a teacher must be quite different from the role of a businessman.
In Sri Lanka, as you are aware, students learn English for about 13 years at school, still the majority of school levers are not in a position to work in English and are not confident enough to speak in English. Although English classes and courses are mushrooming, this significant issue remains undisturbed to their great disappointment.
Under the circumstances, our cardinal objective would be to provide the young generation with sound English knowledge to get through their future events and follow their higher education in English medium where English is considered mandatory. In that sense, we ought to launch a unique and proven program so that the students’ dreams may come true.

Name: Webster School of English
Description:
Un lugar de excelencia con más de 30 años de trayectoria, Webster School of English es un referente líder en la enseñanza de Inglés en la Zona Norte del Gran Buenos Aires. Se distingue por su enseñanza personalizada y el fuerte lazo que se genera entre los docentes y los alumnos.

Nacimos en 1987, hace más de 30 años. No como un Instituto de inglés tradicional, sino como un espacio en donde aprender el idioma debía ir de la mano del juego, la música y la actuación. Marcamos la diferencia desde un principio, con un sello propio que muy pronto se hizo conocido mediante la referencia de boca en boca, y así comenzamos a crecer.

Fuimos sumando profesores y profesoras con las más altas credenciales: egresados de los Profesorados Nacionales (Lenguas Vivas y Joaquín. V. González) y también Profesores de Lengua Inglesa del Reino Unido, formando así un staff docente estable que trabaja en equipo para brindar una enseñanza de excelencia con seguimiento tanto dentro como fuera de clase.

Es por eso que hoy como ayer nuestros alumnos y exalumnos siguen en contacto y sienten a Webster como un lugar referencial en sus vidas.

Are adults too old to learn a language?
This is just a prejudice to the cognitive ability of adult people.
A scientific research says “The brain remains flexible enough to learn a new language well into adulthood, even if nailing the accent might get harder with age”.
We not only agree on this but also we support in our own teaching experience; for all that, we decided to offer to them a collaborative and professional language service.
LSLS use different methods because our teaching style suits the student’s learning abilities. For this reason, we use the plan of improvisation as a learning method, since the lessons are not subjected to a rigid scripted framework.
The school name is LIVE since it focuses on the action of the language using the task-bases since the objective is that the students achieve to develop their grammar, reading, listening and speaking skills based on a concept involving total immersion in Spanish culture and language in a lively, fun and relaxing atmosphere.   
Do you dare to be Spanish bilingual and use the language to explore and learn Latino American Culture by yourself?
If yes, email at livespanishlanguageschool@gmail.com or text and ask us for our affordable prices and a free Spanish Placement Test!

Name: The International Linguistic Society
Description:
The International Linguistic Society is a global, non-profit organization dedicated to advancing the study of language through research, innovative conferences, and educational initiatives. Our work is built on a rich legacy that began in 1997 and evolved over time through pioneering events—most notably, our evolution into the ExLing Society in 2019. As the daughter organization of the ExLing Society (our mother organization), we benefit from its established foundation in experimental linguistics, while forging our own path to standardize methodologies and foster interdisciplinary dialogue.

Our core activities include:
-Events & Conferences: We host a variety of events throughout the year— 
 including the International Linguistic Conference (ILC), a biennial gathering 
 showcasing innovative approaches to linguistic research and applications, as 
 well as specialized Thematic Linguistic Conferences.
-Publications: We publish high-quality conference proceedings that 
 disseminate the latest findings in linguistic research.
-Educational Initiatives: We sponsor lecture series, seminars, and publications 
 to support the academic and professional growth of linguists at all career 
 stages.

By providing a welcoming, inclusive space for researchers—from established experts to emerging scholars—we aim to bridge gaps between diverse research traditions and make a tangible impact on scientific progress and quality of life worldwide.

Name: Campus German
Description:
Welcome to Campus German – learn German from native Germans in Germany.

We are happy to welcome you to our language school in Bremen, a city that perfectly reflects who we are: student-friendly, open, diverse and full of culture. Our mission is simple and clear: we want to turn German learning into a real-life experience, not just a classroom routine.

At Campus German, you won’t only learn grammar and vocabulary – you will live the language. With native-speaking teachers, small groups and interactive lessons, we focus on speaking, understanding and using German in everyday situations. We believe that languages grow stronger through people, stories and shared experiences.

Bremen is the ideal place for this journey. It is a safe, bicycle-friendly student city, famous for the Bremen Town Musicians and its historic old town. Here you hear clear Hochdeutsch, which makes it easier to build a solid and clean language foundation. After class, the city itself becomes your second classroom: in cafés, on the streets, by the river and in conversations with locals.

We are building an international community where diversity is a strength and every student feels seen and supported. Whether you are here for studies, career or a new chapter in life, we are ready to guide you.

Welcome to Bremen.
Welcome to Campus German.
Your German story starts here.

Name: Hey Hi Hello sp. z o.o.
Description:
Early Stage jest szkołą języka angielskiego, która powstała z pasji do uczenia, potrzeby rozwoju oraz autentycznego kontaktu z dziećmi i młodzieżą. W zeszłym roku Early Stage skończyło okrągłe 30 lat! Oddziały Early Stage w całej Polsce tworzą osoby, którym bliskie są te wartości. Obecnie blisko 140 franczyzobiorców naszej metodyki i modelu biznesowego, prowadzi 850 szkół w całej Polsce, ucząc języka angielskiego blisko 55.000 dzieci, a my przymierzamy się do podboju rynków zagranicznych.
W oddziale Early Stage Wola II Woli uczymy już od ponad 10 lat, mamy zgrany i zaangażowany zespół. Zajęcia odbywają się w SP 225, SP 388, oraz w naszym lokalu znajdującym się przy ulicy Ciołka 35.

Kurs języka angielskiego dedykowany jest dla dzieci i młodzieży w wieku od 3 do 19 lat.  Zajęcia prowadzimy w grupach liczących nie więcej niż 12 osób (w grupach przedszkolnych max. 10), dostosowanych do wieku i umiejętności uczniów. Uczymy bazując na naszych autorskich materiałach. Oprócz lekcji nasi uczniowie mają możliwość uczestnictwa w dodatkowych warsztatach oraz mogą korzystać z bogatej bazy materiałów online.
Naszym nauczycielom zapewniamy bezpieczeństwo i stabilność zatrudnienia. Oferujemy również jasno określoną ścieżkę rozwoju i awansu, opartą o program rozwojowy “Talent Booster”. Dbamy o to, aby nasi lektorzy rośli razem z naszą szkołą i zdobywali nowe kompetencje i rozwijali swoje umiejętności zarządcze. Zapraszamy do współpracy!

Name: Rockfeller Araucária
Description:
Ser fluente em inglês é poder se expressar exatamente do jeito que você quer. Sem aceitar o “é mais ou menos isso”, porque você sabe o “é isso que eu quero”. 

É pensar no que você quer falar, sem precisar pensar em como você vai falar. A Rockfeller acha mais importante você usar o inglês para se comunicar de verdade do que para apenas saber falar inglês. 

Por isso, ela é uma escola de inglês comprometida com o ensino do idioma de forma completa e real. 

Nossos cursos se moldam à rotina e se adaptam à expectativa de cada aluno, atendendo com excelência às diversas necessidades que as pessoas têm quando buscam aprender a falar inglês de verdade. 

Sabemos que, para conquistar as oportunidades do mundo, sem medo, sem receios e sem truques, é preciso muito mais do que se matricular em uma escola: é preciso querer ser fluente em inglês. E isso nós sabemos ensinar. VAI E MOSTRA PRO MUNDO!

Name: Ceyda’nın Dersleri
Description:
Online Eğitim; evinizden çıkmadan uzman eğitmenlerden fransızca öğrenin.
Yabancı dil öğreniminin zorluklarını fark edilmek ve dil öğrenme stratejilerine hakim olabilmek için bireyin dil öğrenme serüvenine başlaması gerekmektedir. Bu kapsamda dil öğrenme serüvenine başlamış öğrencilerin karşısında, 4 dil bilen ve her birini farklı şekilde öğrenerek kendi de bu süreçleri yakından deneyimlemiş olan Ceyda Gemici uygulamış olduğu stratejik eğitim sistemi ile öğrencilerin ön yargılarını yıkacak düzeyde sistematik bir şekilde eğitime yön veren bir öğretmendir. Dil öğreniminin oldukça ciddi bir eğitim süreci olduğu, bireysel farklılıklarının ve öğrenme eksiklerinin var olabileceğinin bilincinde olarak çalışma ortamları hazırlamaktadır.

Yabancı dil eğitimdeki başarısızlığın en önemli nedeni ise gramer öğretimiyle yetiniyor olmaktır. Yabancı dil eğitim problemleri neredeyse her ülkede benzer şekilde görülebilmektedir. Burada önemli olan etkili dil öğretimi için bu problemler detaylı analizler yapılarak çözümler geliştirebilmektir. Daha sonrasında ise gerekli motivasyon ortamı oluşturarak öğrencilerin dili aktif şekilde kullanabilmeleri desteklenmektedir.

Bir öğretmeni farklı kılan mesleğinde var olan motivasyonudur. Bu mesleği bir iş bakış açısı gibi değil de her daim tutku ve azimle yapan Ceyda Gemici, bireylere yeni bilgi ve yaşam tecrübeleri sunmak, onların kendilerini öğrendikleri dilde kendilerini geliştirebilmek O’nun en büyük motivasyon kaynaklarından bir tanesidir. Teknolojinin hızla geliştiği bilim çağında yabancı dilin önemi ve gerekliliğin bilincinde hareket ederek ve kişisel gelişim için de bir parçası olduğunu düşünerek eğitim faaliyetlerini yürütmektedir. Öğrencilerin eğlenerek, kesintisiz bir şekilde Fransızca öğrenimlerini gerçekleştirmek için Fransızca dil eğitiminde öğrenme güçlüğü çeken bireylere özel metotlar uygulamaktadır.
Daha fazla bilgi için: www.ceydanindersleri.com

Name: Sier
Description:
A Sier é uma escola de conversação em inglês e mandarim, focada em fluência prática, comunicação real e preparação para o mercado de trabalho. Nosso objetivo é tornar o aprendizado de idiomas mais acessível, direto e aplicável ao dia a dia profissional, sem burocracia ou modelos tradicionais de ensino.

Criamos um formato que prioriza a prática constante da conversação, conectando alunos a falantes fluentes de inglês e mandarim. Trabalhamos exclusivamente com esses dois idiomas por acreditarmos que eles são as línguas do novo mundo, fundamentais para quem busca crescimento profissional, melhores oportunidades e inserção em um mercado cada vez mais global.

Acreditamos que a fluência se desenvolve principalmente por meio da exposição ao idioma, da repetição e da vivência de situações reais de comunicação, especialmente aquelas presentes no ambiente de trabalho, em reuniões, apresentações, entrevistas e interações profissionais do dia a dia.

Atualmente, oferecemos aulas de conversação em formato online, com encontros semanais focados em desenvolver confiança, vocabulário funcional e naturalidade ao falar. Nosso modelo atende pessoas que já tiveram contato com o idioma, mas precisam se comunicar melhor em contextos profissionais ou não tiveram oportunidades acessíveis para praticar conversação de forma consistente.

Na Sier, você pratica o idioma de forma simples, acessível e real — e se prepara para conversar com o mercado e com o mundo.

Description: Spanish Language Services Ltd. (SLS) was created with the aim of providing first class Spanish and English language services to both corporate and individual clients. Our services include language tuition, English Pronunciation and Communication skills and language support for relocated corporate clients and their families. Whilst we are primarily based in London and the South East of the UK we have associate tutors, all over the country.

Name: HKU SPACE English Programme
Description:
At HKU SPACE, we design and offer courses to meet your goals for General English, Business English and English for the Professions. These range from 30 hours to 90 hours and cover a broad spectrum of levels.

*HKU SPACE is a non-profit making University company limited by guarantee

Name: Rifioriamo Italiano
Description: A Rifioriamo Italiano é uma escola de idiomas on-line que oferece aulas de italiano ao vivo por meio da plataforma Google Meet. O nosso objetivo é estimular o pensamento crítico dos alunos e proporcionar uma transformação por meio do aprendizado de um novo idioma.

Name: Speak up · Academia de idiomas
Description:
Bienvenido a Speak Up, tu academia de idiomas en San Vicente del Raspeig.

En un mundo cada vez más conectado, dominar varios idiomas no solo abre puertas profesionales, sino que también te permite disfrutar de nuevas experiencias, culturas y oportunidades. En Speak Up te ayudamos a conseguirlo con un método dinámico, práctico y adaptado a ti.

 ¿Qué ofrecemos?

Inglés, alemán y español para extranjeros.

Inglés para oposiciones, enfocado en niveles A2–B1 para pruebas oficiales como Guardia Civil, Policía Nacional, ADIF y más.

Clases para niños desde 8 años, adolescentes, universitarios y adultos.

Preparación de exámenes oficiales: Cambridge (inglés) y Goethe (alemán).

 Nuestra metodología:

Grupos reducidos para una atención personalizada.

Clases dinámicas y divertidas, diseñadas para mantener la motivación.

Modalidad presencial y online, para adaptarnos a tu ritmo de vida.

Enfoque en la conversación: desde el primer día te ayudamos a hablar y ganar confianza en el idioma.

 Nuestro objetivo
En Speak Up creemos que aprender un idioma no debe ser aburrido ni difícil. Por eso, combinamos recursos modernos, actividades prácticas y un entorno cercano y profesional, para que aprender sea una experiencia agradable y efectiva.

 Ubicación: Estamos en San Vicente del Raspeig, en la calle San Pablo, muy cerca del colegio La Huerta.

 ¿Por qué elegirnos?
Porque ofrecemos más que clases: te damos acompañamiento, motivación y herramientas para que alcances tus metas lingüísticas, ya sea aprobar un examen oficial, superar una oposición o mejorar tus oportunidades laborales y académicas.

 Habla, aprende y progresa con nosotros!
Con nuestro enfoque conversacional y práctico, empezarás a usar el idioma desde el primer día.

 Conéctate con nosotros aquí en LinkedIn, visítanos en nuestra academia o escríbenos para más información. En Speak Up, tu éxito es nuestro objetivo!

Name: Worticca
Description:
Clases de alemán para todos los niveles 
Profesores con +15 años de experiencia.
Inscríbete y comienza a transformar tu futuro.

Name: Online Turkish Office
Description:
Hello there! let's learn Turkish from expert educators.
Contact us private lessons.

Name: Mistrz Języków
Description:
Oferujemy:

ZAJĘCIA INDYWIDUALNE to najbardziej intensywna oraz przynosząca zadowalające efekty forma nauki języka. Propozycja dla osób zapracowanych, ambitnych i wymagających, a także tych, które cenią sobie komfort nauczania.

ZAJĘCIA GRUPOWE 
Jeśli preferujesz naukę w gronie znajomych, przyjaciół, rodziny to zajęcia grupowa są najlepszym wyborem.

KURSY DLA FIRM
Oferujemy nowoczesne formy szkoleń językowych dla prawników.

Nie każdy przedsiębiorca jest przekonany o tym, że poszerzanie kompetencji i umiejętności pracowników to inwestowanie w kapitał firmy. Chcesz być o krok przed konkurencją zapisz swojego pracownika na kurs językowy.

Posiadamy duże doświadczenie w zakresie współpracy z firmami o zróżnicowanym profilu działalności. Współpracujemy między innymi z takimi firmami jak: Norsped, brightOne, Isogon Fenstersysteme, Volkswagen, Scania.

Proponujemy kursy specjalistyczne z elementami języka biznesowego, hotelarskiego, logistycznego, medycznego, prawniczego, finansowego, technicznego i turystycznego.

Program tworzymy według potrzeb klienta. Do tej pory zaufało nam wiele przedsiębiorstw prywatnych i państwowych. Spróbuj i TY!

Name: Rise Language Solutions
Description:
Na Rise Language Solutions, a gente ensina inglês do jeito que você realmente precisa: para o trabalho, para viver fora do país, para viajar ou para crescer na carreira.

Sem fórmulas prontas, sem enrolação — cada aluno aprende com aulas feitas sob medida para sua vida.

Name: C-FIL Strasbourg
Description:
Nestled in the heart of Strasbourg, near the majestic cathedral and the picturesque Petite France district, C-FIL Strasbourg is a language school offering courses throughout the year. 

Our primary goal is to support students in mastering foreign languages while ensuring that their experience both at the school and in the charming city of Strasbourg is unforgettable. 

Cultural Immersion in the Heart of Strasbourg

Our school is ideally located in the heart of this beautiful city, offering an inspiring environment for a memorable learning experience.

Quality Education

We emphasize a communicative approach to learning foreign languages. 

Students are actively encouraged to participate in grammar, vocabulary, and idiomatic expression lessons. This method is complemented by a task-based approach, providing students with an authentic learning experience where they learn by doing, as if working in a real-world environment.

Dynamic Methodology

We prioritize an interactive teaching approach that encourages active student participation. This method, combined with task-based learning, offers a truly immersive experience. 

We also ensure our teachers receive continuous professional development, keeping them up to date with the latest standards set by the Council of Europe.

Name: Mosaic Academy || Canada
Description: Mosaic Academy is a unique educational institution that embraces a trilingual approach, offering courses in French, English, and Arabic. We believe in the power of multilingualism to enhance cognitive abilities and cultural understanding. Our curriculum prepares students for a diverse world, emphasizing the importance of proficiency in French for non-francophones and English for those in French-language schools. Additionally, learning Arabic helps students connect with their cultural heritage, fostering a rich and inclusive educational environment.

Name: CELES UCAM Indonesia
Description:
CELES UCAM lahir dengan tujuan menjadi sebuah pusat studi bahasa Spanyol dan budaya Hispanik yang mengakomodir kerinduan masyarakat Indonesia untuk belajar bahasa Spanyol dan mendekatkan kepada kekayaan cultural yang dimiliki oleh 21 negara yang berbahasa Spanyol pada saat ini. Ingin menjadi wadah pertukaran dan relasi diantara Negara Indonesia dengan Negara-Negara yang berbahasa Spanyol, sekaligus menjadi tempat informasi peluang - peluang baik di bidang studi, teknologi, sosial, politik dan ekonomi dalam hubungan multilateral. 
Kiranya CELES UCAM memberikan kontribusi yang positif kepada Negara Indonesia dengan mempersiapkan SDM yang lebih berkualitas dan siap bersaing di dunia global dewasa ini. Spanyol sebagai bahasa bisnis internasional kedua di dunia pada saat ini, dapat memberikan value tambahan kepada SDM yang dapat berbahasa Spanyol secara mahir dan comprehensive.
Akhir kata CELES berharap dukungan oleh kedutaan-kedutaan besar di Indonesia yang berbahasa Spanyol (Mexico, Colombia, Spanyol, Peru, Panama, dll) dan juga dari berbagai pihak untuk dapat membantu promosikan CELES UCAM sebagai Pusat Studi Bahasa Spanyol dan Budaya Hispanik yang hadir di Jakarta.

Name: Lexicon Academy
Description:
آکادمی زبان لکسیکان مجموعهای پیشرو در زمینه آموزش زبان انگلیسی تجاری و سازمانی است. 
دورههای آموزش زبان انگلیسی تجاری و سازمانی ما با رویکردی کاربردی، مهارتهای لازم برای مکاتبات رسمی، مذاکرات، ارائهها و جلسات کاری را به شما آموزش میدهد.

Name: Swahili Students Association
Description: The Swahili Students Associations (SWASA) is one of the many prestigious associations at the Department of Modern Languages. Students and faculty have come together to form vibrant clubs that allow students the opportunity to pursue their academic interests outside of the classroom. The clubs also engage students in continuously culturally relevant, challenging and entertaining activities.

Name: Rockfeller Guaramirim
Description:
O método inovador validado em mais de 100 escolas pelo Brasil coloca a conversação e o desempenho do aluno como o centro da aprendizagem.
A tecnologia, a estrutura em sala de aula com turmas reduzidas e a qualificação dos professores, potencializam a imersão e interação dos alunos no inglês e promovem o aprendizado de maneira natural.

Name: TheGerminds - Cursuri de Germană
Description: Cursuri de germană personalizate. Înveți germană așa cum îți place.

Name: Prism Studios
Description:
Prism Studios | L’apprentissage des langues autrement - personnalisé, engagé, et humain.

Prism Studios regroupe plusieurs pôles d’action autour des langues :
 Studio d'apprentissage des langues – Cours personnalisés en anglais et français (conversation, examens, pro, confiance)
 Formation des enseignants – Accompagnement pédagogique et ateliers pour approfondir ses méthodologies
 Studio de recherche – Études sur la confiance en soi en apprenant ou en enseignant une langue, l'environnement "open-world" dans l'éducation des langues
 Studio d’engagement communautaire – Ateliers gratuits, propositions de stages, observations des cours, clubs de film ou de lecture, bourses, podcast en anglais, le Café des Langues de Rennes, des cours hebdomadaires gratuits

Notre priorité : une approche humaine, flexible et ancrée dans la réalité du terrain. Nous croyons que la langue ne s’apprend pas uniquement en classe, mais se vit, se construit, et se partage.

#coursdelangue #formationenseignants #pédagogieimmersive #apprentissagesurmesure #confianceensoi #coursgratuits #anglais #français #éducation inclusive #OWLE #businessEnglish #apprendreautrement #PrismStudios

Name: Joylingua
Description:
At Joylingua Language Coaching School we offer tailored German language coaching for individuals and businesses,

We help you get in flow with your German!
At Joylingua we provide you with a joyful experience, stepping away from rigid and old-school teaching approaches. No boring text books or vocabulary lists. 

This is why we have developed our unique Joylingua method. Our learner-centric, empathetic approach will empower you to accelerate your German in an easy and natural way. 

Our team of wonderful highly qualified language coaches can understand and connect with any learner, thanks to their experience, expert knowledge, and international backgrounds. We can break down and explain German grammar in plain English.

Our learning materials are adapted to Swiss language and culture. We specialise in preparation for the Swiss exam to obtain permits and citizenship. So far, we have had a 100% pass rate!

Our mission is to help you with your language skills and to create a positive mindset, so you can achieve the freedom and self-confidence you deserve, so you can feel joyful and excited in your new Swiss home. 

Book a clarity call do discover your language needs here:
https://joylingua.as.me/schedule.php

Name: Way Up English School
Description:
Way Up English School es un centro de formación en idiomas que combina el entusiasmo del nuevo comienzo con la extensa trayectoria profesional de su equipo de docentes.

Somos los expertos en exámenes de Cambridge de la zona de Tudela y la Ribera, contamos con 15 años de experiencia enseñando inglés, preparando a alumnos para exámenes oficiales, ofreciendo formación específica a empresas, ayudando a estudiantes y profesionales a impulsar su carrera.

En Way Up School ofrecemos cursos para alumnos de todos los niveles y todos los ámbitos profesionales:

- Niños
- Adolescentes
- Adultos
- Estudiantes
- Cursos intensivos
- Empresas

Conocemos en detalle los secretos de los exámenes oficiales de Cambridge. Hemos ayudado a cientos de personas a conseguir el certificado internacional que avala su nivel de inglés y así mejorar su futuro.

Ofrecemos también clases a empresas en sus propias instalaciones. 

Somos un equipo joven y dinámico que cuenta con amplia experiencia en el sector de la enseñanza.

Name: Spanish Education Hub
Description: Welcome to Spanish Education Hub! We are a premium Spanish tutoring agency with over 4 years of experience and hundresds of statisfied students!  with our unique method of teaching we ensure fun, practical and engagin lessons to reach your full potential.

Name: Fârsi Bâ Amin
Description:
Fârsi bâ Amin est un espace d’apprentissage du persan fondé sur la rigueur linguistique, la passion pour la langue et la présence humaine.

Cours particuliers, formations interculturelles et accompagnement linguistique pour particuliers et institutions.

Name: Lexii
Description:
At Lexii, we are committed to revolutionising language education by providing a holistic, technology-driven, and culturally immersive experience. Our goal is to empower individuals to communicate effectively across linguistic and cultural boundaries, fostering global understanding and connection.

About Us: We acknowledge the limitations of traditional language education and are dedicated to bridging the gap between classroom learning and real-world communication needs. Our innovative approach combines AI-powered personalised learning, cultural immersion programmes, and VR/AR technologies to create engaging and effective language learning experiences.

Key Offerings:
AI-Powered Courses: Adaptive learning algorithms tailored to individual learning styles and goals.
Cultural Immersion Programmes: Interactive events and workshops that enhance language skills in authentic cultural contexts.
VR/AR Experiences: Immersive lessons and virtual tours simulating real-life scenarios.
Global Network: Connect with learners and cultural enthusiasts through online platforms and local events.
Partnerships & Collaborations: We partner with local universities, businesses, and cultural organisations to provide authentic experiences and expand our reach.

Join Our Journey: Be part of a community that values language as a bridge to cultural understanding and global connection. Follow us for updates on new courses, events, and insights into language learning and cultural immersion.

Name: Alemán con Ñ
Description:
Alemán con Ñ se dedica a enseñar alemán con español como lengua vehicular. Comprendemos la dificultad que tienen los hispanohablantes a la hora de comprender la gramática, vocabulario y fonética alemana ayudándoles a superar los obstáculos que suponen este aprendizaje.

Todo el profesorado es bilingüe alemán-español por lo que la comunicación en español está permitida. 

Los cursos presenciales se imparten en nuestra sede de Zürich y los cursos online están disponibles en amplios horarios para que cualquier persona pueda asistir.

Name: Fluencia Institute
Description: Fluencia is redefining language learning for busy adults. We combine live weekly classes with native teachers (max 4 students per group) and AI-guided daily practice through our custom app. No more choosing between time-consuming academies or accountability-free apps like Duolingo. Our hybrid model delivers real progress in just 3 hours per week—structured, human-guided, and flexible enough to fit your life. Whether you're advancing your career or pursuing a personal goal, Fluencia gives you the accountability and expertise you need without taking over your schedule. Learn smarter, not harder.

Name: Lingo-Star Sp. z o. o.
Description: Lingo-Star. Szkoła jęz. obcych is a company based out of Brzegowa 3, Ożarów Mazowiecki, Woj Mazowieckie, Poland.

Name: Select 4 Kids
Description: Select has been offering a unique solution for parents who want to give their children a strong start in learning foreign languages but struggle to find time for after-school classes in their busy schedules.

Name: Deutsch Meister
Description:
Deutsch Meister is a dedicated German language institute committed to helping learners achieve real fluency and confidence. 

We offer structured courses from A1 to B2, personalized instruction, and practical speaking training designed to meet academic, professional, and everyday needs.

Our mission is to provide high-quality German education through expert instructors, modern teaching methods, and an engaging learning experience.

Name: Fluentify English
Description:
Welcome to Fluentify English – Your Gateway to Mastering English with Confidence! 

At Fluentify English, we believe that language is more than just words; it’s the key to unlocking opportunities, building connections, and achieving your dreams. Whether you're preparing for a career boost, acing exams, or simply want to communicate fluently in English, we’re here to guide you every step of the way.

Name: Ukrainian School of Orange County
Description:
Our school is a place where children can immerse themselves in the Ukrainian language, culture, and history. We offer classes for children aged 4 to 18, as well as adults seeking to enhance their knowledge of the Ukrainian language.
   With our experienced instructors, who have years of experience working with both children and adults, we are dedicated to helping every student succeed in their learning journey. We employ modern teaching methods to make the learning process engaging and exciting.
   Our comprehensive program covers the study of the Ukrainian language, grammar, reading, and writing, along with an exploration of Ukrainian culture and history. We also organize cultural events and celebrations to allow children to experience Ukrainian traditions and customs firsthand.
   Our mission is to preserve and promote the Ukrainian language and culture among children and adults in Orange County and its surrounding areas. We firmly believe that knowledge of the Ukrainian language and culture is an essential component of national identity and contributes to personal growth.
   If you are seeking a place where your children can learn the Ukrainian language and culture, or if you wish to enhance your own Ukrainian language skills, we invite you to join our school. We would be delighted to welcome you as part of our student community!

Name: ALFA Lyon
Description:
Plongez dans le français vivant, dans les rues de Lyon, Nice ou Paris.
Apprenez la langue au cœur de la culture.

Name: Alemannia Die Deutschschule
Description: Somos uma escola especializada no ensino de alemão com aulas 100% online, individuais e personalizadas. Atuamos com cursos extensivos, intensivos, preparação para exames e aulas particulares para adultos e crianças. Nosso foco é ensinar com acolhimento, método e resultados reais, mesmo para quem começa do zero.

Name: Yenka French
Description:
With Yenka French, you can learn the french language from the comfort of your home!  We are an advanced French course that makes it easy for students of all levels.  As english speakers who have lived among french speakers, we discovered the simplest and fun ways to learn the language and created an online learning platform that mimics the classroom experience, in the best of ways but one that is much more flexible and interactive.

We are dedicated to helping students learn french language by providing them with practical commands and teaching them how to use these commands in everyday situations. Students can practice their skills through the interactive exercises in and out of class.

Name: Curso de Extensão em Língua Espanhola (CELES)
Description: O Curso de Extensão em Língua Espanhola (CELES) oferece cursos de espanhol a preços acessíveis à comunidade

Name: Sprachenzentrum UZH / ETH Zürich
Description:
Bei uns erweitern Hochschulangehörige ihre Mehrsprachigkeit und wissenschaftlichen Kommunikationskompetenzen in Studium und Forschung. Unsere flexiblen Lernformate sind auf die individuellen Bedürfnisse unseres Publikums zugeschnitten und basieren auf aktuellen Erkenntnissen der Spracherwerbsforschung und der angewandten Linguistik.

Darüber hinaus fördern unsere Angebote die interdisziplinäre Vernetzung, die sprachliche und soziale Integration und bereiten unsere Teilnehmenden auf die Anforderungen des nationalen und internationalen Arbeitsmarktes vor.

Name: Valeria  |  Español Rioplatense
Description:
I'm a journalist from Buenos Aires, passionate about teaching Spanish while traveling the world as a digital nomad. I’m a certified Spanish teacher, and since 2020, I’ve specialized in Rioplatense Spanish – the unique variety spoken in Argentina and Uruguay. This means I can teach you the language of legends like Messi and Maradona!
In my lessons, I love sharing the culture of Buenos Aires and Latin America because it's not just where I come from – it’s where I belong. Teaching about my culture is something I deeply enjoy, and I’m excited to bring you into the world of Argentine Spanish and culture.
If you want to master this beautiful accent and immerse yourself in my vibrant culture, I’m here to guide you every step of the way!

Name: People English Centre
Description: Somos una academia de idiomas. Enseñamos a niños, jóvenes y adultos inglés, francés o chino mandarín

Name: English by Teacher Fidel Helfer
Description: Para você que deseja aprender inglês fora dos padrões tradicionais de ensino e está em busca da tão desejada fluência, venha estudar inglês de forma totalmente on-line e descomplicada com o Teacher Fidel Helfer. O TFH tem aulas dinâmicas e descontraídas, focadas em aprimorar o seu domínio da língua inglesa. Seja qual for seu propósito o TFH está aqui para lhe ajudar a alcançá-lo.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Escola Ofá de Ouro
Description:
Somos uma escola especializada no ensino da Libras e facilitadora da educação básica, para todos as idades.

“Sempre haverá um surdo precisando de você” Prof. Ton

Name: Immediate English
Description:
Você alguma já vez se perguntou porque é que algumas pessoas parecem ser capazes de falar bem inglês enquanto você luta para ser compreendido? É porque compreendem como devem se comunicar em inglês de forma concisa.

Compreendem que a comunicação é simples, que é um conjunto de frases ou frases curtas que têm uma pessoa a falar e outra a ouvir.

O Inglês Imediato é um método simples que lhe ensina a falar inglês da forma prática e eficaz. Você aprende a se comunicar com confiança usando um vocabulário muito pequeno e os verbos, adjetivos e substantivos certos.

O Inglês Imediato te mostra como falar inglês de forma conversacional, não gramaticalmente.

Name: Strive Language Center
Description:
Somos uma escola digital de inglês que oferece aulas individuais (1:1) com professores nativos e brasileiros com certificação internacional. Nosso time é formado por profissionais altamente qualificados — incluindo engenheiros, educadores e especialistas em comunicação — o que garante um aprendizado prático, contextualizado e voltado para resultados reais.

Com uma metodologia moderna, personalizada e flexível, ajudamos nossos alunos a desenvolverem fluência, confiança e independência na comunicação em inglês. Todas as aulas são adaptadas à rotina, aos objetivos e à área de atuação de cada estudante.

Serviços

Aulas individuais (1:1) com professores nativos e brasileiros certificados internacionalmente

Inglês para engenheiros de todas as áreas (civil, elétrica, mecânica, software, etc.)

Inglês geral, acadêmico e instrumental

Preparatórios para testes de proficiência internacional: IELTS, TOEIC, CAMBRIDGE, EF SET, WIDA e TOEFL

Programas personalizados para profissionais e empresas

Treinamentos de comunicação e conversação para o ambiente de trabalho

Preparação para entrevistas, apresentações e reuniões internacionais

Mentorias de aprendizado e acompanhamento de progresso

Name: Korean Institute of Spain

Name: LABORATOIRE DE LANGUES DE LIBREVILLE
Description:
Le Laboratoire de Langues de Libreville est une SARL qui propose des formations en langues étrangères dans le but de rehausser le niveau linguistique de nos élèves, étudiants et même nos professionnels.
Nos différents services sont:
- Un test de niveau standardisé en Anglais (Imperial English UK)
- des formations en standards et intensifs en langues étrangères
- Un centre agréé TOEFL
-Mise à disposition d'un système de sonorisation de conférence: cabines, micros de table, système d'interprétation simultané, sonorisation, casques et receveurs etc.
-Traduction des documents à moindre coûts.
-Accompagnement pour les études aux Royaumes Unis et au Canada
-Mise à disposition d'interprètes pour vos réunions

Nossa metodologia é centrada na fala, ajudando nossos alunos a se expressarem como nativos desde o primeiro dia, com aulas práticas e dinâmicas para fluência de forma natural e eficiente

Name: Seroma Christian High School
Description: Seroma Christian High School is a leading Christian-based educational institution dedicated to academic excellence, spiritual growth, and holistic student development. Our mission is to nurture future leaders through a strong foundation in faith, discipline, and knowledge.

Name: English Roots Arabic

Name: Little England English Immersion
Description: We have helped clients (private and corporate) with interviews, presentations, meetings and conference calls in the English language. More than 10,000 clients from most multinationals and many large national corporations

Name: Dream Institute of Languages
Description: We are the bridge to your dream language. Our teachers are highly qualified, motivated and passionate who go any limit to make sure your dream comes into reality.

Name: Mayrit Spanish
Description:
Mayrit es un método de autoaprendizaje de español dirigido a japoneses. Se trata de un método en línea no convencional con el que el estudiante puede adquirir las bases para comprender y hacerse comprender hablando español.

El método es actual y divertido, y lo mejor de todo es que es totalmente gratuito! No solo enseña la lengua española sino que también muestra cómo es la cultura española, compartiendo curiosidades que lo hacen mucho más atractivo que los métodos de autoaprendizaje tradicionales.

Al ser un método en línea el alumno puede conectarse a Mayrit desde cualquier lugar, ya sea con su móvil, ordenador, portátil o tablet en cualquier momento.

Name: Iguana Abroad
Description:
Iguana Abroad offers a Spanish immersion course in Mexico designed for people who want to learn Spanish fast by living the language, not just studying it.

Founded in January 2020, we’ve grown into one of the leading Spanish immersion programs in Mexico, combining intensive Spanish tuition with real cultural immersion.

Our Spanish immersion courses include 30–60 hours of structured Spanish classes, a carefully designed cultural immersion programme, and guided excursions to diverse and inspiring locations across Mexico. Students don’t just learn Spanish — they live it, every day.

Find out more at:
www.iguanaabroad.com
https://www.instagram.com/iguanaabroad/

Name: Bright Future Academy
Description:
Na Bright Future Academy (bfa), ajudamos jovens e adultos ao redor do mundo a transformar sonhos em realidades por meio da capacitação em Inglês e Tecnologia. 

Com cursos especializados e uma abordagem prática, preparamos nossos alunos para se destacarem no mercado internacional, permitindo que estejam prontos para as oportunidades globais.

Name: Chinese Language School

At our Chinese Language School, we understand that language learning is more than just studying words and phrases; it's about immersing yourself in the rich tapestry of Chinese culture. We offer a holistic learning experience, allowing you to explore the cultural nuances that make the language come to life. From traditional customs to contemporary trends, our courses encompass a comprehensive understanding of Chinese society. Join us to not only enhance your language skills but also gain insights into the traditions, history, and heritage of China.

Enrolling in our Chinese Language School opens doors to exciting opportunities. Whether you're planning to travel, conduct business, or simply connect with the global Chinese-speaking community, proficiency in Chinese will be a valuable asset. Our school's flexible schedules and convenient location make it easy for you to fit language learning into your busy life. Take the first step towards fluency and cultural enrichment by enrolling in our courses today. Contact us to embark on a transformative journey into the captivating world of the Chinese language.

Name: INTERLINK INTERNATIONAL INSTITUTES - BRASIL
Description:
A INTERLINK oferece ensino intensivo de inglês, preparação acadêmica e treinamento intercultural, para capacitar os alunos a terem sucesso nos domínios acadêmico, profissional e pessoal. Usando abordagens humanizadas e baseadas em descobertas, ajudamos os alunos a se concentrarem em suas habilidades linguísticas, ajuste cultural, pensamento crítico e aprendizagem autônoma. Com padrões de qualidade e justiça como nossos guias, promovemos um aprendizado aprimorado e habilidades de pensamento de alto nível, baseadas em um espírito de serviço.

Com centros nos EUA e na Arábia Saudita e uma parceria com o Consórcio Americano de Universidades, a INTERLINK leva adiante esta missão concentrando-se no sucesso dos estudantes e trabalhando com múltiplas universidades, sistemas escolares e empresas.

Todas as nossas ações estão enraizadas na atenção disciplinada às necessidades dos alunos. Nosso corpo docente incorpora os mais altos padrões de profissionalismo, temperados com cuidado, preocupação e comprometimento. Nossos administradores agem com o conhecimento prévio de que lideram melhor ao servir e servem melhor ao se esforçarem constantemente pelo sucesso acadêmico e profissional dos alunos. Os ativos mais preciosos da INTERLINK são os seus diversos alunos, o corpo docente que os nutre e os líderes capazes e dispostos a ajudar todos a florescer.

 Dil Bilgisi: Dil merkezimizde dil bilgisini anlamak artık karmaşık değil! Adım adım anlatımlar ve örneklerle dil bilgisini öğrenmek hiç bu kadar kolay olmamıştı. 
 Telaffuz: Doğru telaffuz, iletişim kurarken büyük bir öneme sahiptir. Eğitimli öğretmenlerimiz sayesinde doğru telaffuzları öğrenerek, kendinizi daha güvenli ifade edebilirsiniz.
 Pratik Örnek Cümleler: Dil öğrenmenin en keyifli yolu, günlük hayatta kullanabileceğiniz örnek cümleleri öğrenmektir. Pratik örnek cümleler ile dili gerçek hayatta kullanmak için hazırlıklı olacaksınız.
 Kelime Öğrenim Teknikleri: Yeni kelimeleri hızla öğrenmek için etkili teknikler ile tanışın. Kelimeleri akılda tutmanın ve kullanmanın yollarını keşfedin.  Deneyimli ve Eğitimli Öğretmenler: Size yol gösterecek deneyimli öğretmenlerimiz, her adımda sizinle birlikte olacak. Sorularınızı sormaktan çekinmeyin, öğrenme süreciniz bizim için önemli!
 İstediğiniz Zaman, İstediğiniz Yerden: Hayatın yoğun temposunda esnek olmanızı sağlıyoruz. İstediğiniz zaman ve istediğiniz yerden eğitim alabilirsiniz. 
Öğrenmeye uygun zamanı siz belirleyin!
Fransızca Dil Merkezi'ne katılarak, yeni bir dil öğrenmenin keyfini çıkarın. Kendinizi daha iyi ifade edin, farklı kültürlerle iletişim kurun ve dünyayı keşfedin! Siz de bu dil macerasına katılabilirsiniz.  Daha fazla bilgi için: www.fransizcadilmerkezi.com

Attualmente le nostre sedi si trovano a Reggio Emilia e a Modena, ma presto arriveremo nelle città italiane più importanti. Offriamo anche corsi online, sia individuali che di gruppo.

Name: Ver-Steh-Café
Description:
Das Ver‑Steh‑Café ist die Online-Community, die internationale Mitarbeitende beim Ankommen in Deutschland gezielt unterstützt - sprachlich, kulturell und emotional. 

Unser Programm ist flexibel, persönlich und individuell: Mitglieder können ortsunabhängig teilnehmen. Ideal als begleitende Maßnahme im Onboarding oder zur Retention internationaler Talente.

 Warum es wichtig ist:
Viele internationale Fachkräfte verfügen über Sprachkenntnisse, fühlen sich im Arbeitsalltag aber unsicher oder isoliert. Das führt zu Missverständnissen, ungenutztem Potenzial und höherer Fluktuation - und belastet HR.

 Unser Ansatz:

Praxisnahe Sprachförderung: Live-Sessions für freies Sprechen, Alltags- und Berufssprache

Interkulturelle Impulse: Sensibilisierung für kulturelle Unterschiede, Förderung von Intercultural Competence und erfolgreichem Cultural Fit

Emotionale Begleitung: Individuelle Gespräche, Community-Support und Reflexion, um Sicherheit & Selbstvertrauen zu stärken

 Der Unternehmensnutzen:

Schnellere Integration & reibungslosere Teamkommunikation

Förderung einer offenen, inklusiven Teamkultur (Inclusive Workplace)

 Das Ver‑Steh‑Café sorgt dafür, dass internationale Mitarbeitende nicht nur Deutsch sprechen, sondern sich wirklich zu Hause fühlen - ein messbarer Beitrag zur Employee Experience und nachhaltigen Integration Success.

Wir trinken zusammen einen Kaffee, lachen, üben Deutsch für ein wichtiges Gespräch und sprechen über das, was dich bewegt.
Kein Stress mit Grammatik oder Prüfungen. Sondern echtes Ankommen.
Deutsch sprechen mit Freude und Herz.

 Du kannst hier sein, wie du bist.  Fragen stellen.  Neues ausprobieren.  Ich bin für dich da.

Du bist nicht allein. Du musst das nicht allein schaffen.
Lass uns einfach mal sprechen – ich freue mich auf dich.

Name: Day by Day Nyelvstúdió
Description:
"You live and learn. At any rate, you live." Avagy szabad fordításban "Tanulsz és élsz, de minimum élsz", jegyezte meg szellemesen Douglas Adams angol író. 2023-as megalakulásunkkor mi a "live" és a "learn" ötvözését tűztük ki célul, azaz, hogy nálunk a nyelvtanulás legyen élettel teli. Azóta is arra törekszünk, hogy a diákjaink ne csak okosabban, de vidámabban is álljanak fel a padból.

Általános nyelvi képzések mellett tartunk nemzeti és nemzetközi nyelvvizsga-kurzusokat, érettségire való felkészítést, korrepetálást, és 2024 eleje óta céges tanfolyamokat is. A diák "nyelvén" tartjuk az órát, kérdezésre és önálló munkára egyaránt buzdítunk, és nem félünk újra elmagyarázni, ha azt kell. Mindezt kellemes, napsütéses környezetben.

Name: EASY WAY IDIOMAS

Somos apaixonados pelo ensino de idiomas e acreditamos que dominar uma segunda língua abre portas para um mundo de possibilidades. É exatamente isso que sonhamos proporcionar aos nossos alunos: um universo repleto de oportunidades.

Com 25 anos de atuação, consolidamos nossa posição como referência no ensino de idiomas. Contamos com uma estrutura completa, material didático de alta qualidade e uma equipe altamente qualificada. Além disso, destacamos a importância da troca cultural que oferecemos por meio de nossos professores nativos, enriquecendo ainda mais a experiência de aprendizado.

Nosso compromisso vai além de ensinar uma língua estrangeira; buscamos inspirar e capacitar nossos alunos a conquistarem seus objetivos e alcançarem o sucesso em um cenário globalizado. Valorizamos a diversidade e a interculturalidade como componentes essenciais do aprendizado de idiomas.

Seja parte dessa jornada conosco e descubra como podemos juntos expandir horizontes, construir um futuro brilhante e promover uma troca cultural enriquecedora através do aprendizado de idiomas. #Educação #EnsinoDeIdiomas #IntercâmbioCultural #Oportunidades #SucessoGlobal

Name: Wise Words For Life
Description:
I’m a qualified English Language teacher with 14 years of experience. As a Business English trainer and specialist IELTS Band 7+ coach, I help non-native English speakers express themselves fluently, with confidence and clarity — whether in presentations, consultations, interviews, meetings, team projects, reports, emails, or English exams.

Over the last four years, I’ve helped hundreds of learners to achieve an IELTS band 7+, enabling them to study abroad or emigrate to Australia, New Zealand, Canada, and the UK. 

I’m a fluency doctor who treats your communication and grammar issues by designing highly personalised lessons that target your areas of weakness, enabling you to speak confidently, write flawlessly, and communicate with clarity and precision. I tailor each lesson to align with your job, studies, proficiency level, interests, and English goals. 

Within the Healthcare industry, I enable doctors, nurses, and medical students to use English for patient-centred care through my signature programme, The Language of Care, helping them communicate with empathy, clarity, and professionalism. I also support them in achieving IELTS Band 7+ for registration with international medical councils.

I hold a Bachelor of Humanities (cum laude) in English and Psychology, a Postgraduate Certificate in Education, a 190-hour TESOL, and certifications in IELTS Coaching and Proofreading.

My Coaching Programmes:

 English for Healthcare Workers – The Language of Care 10-week Programme
- Use patient-friendly medical English
- OET speaking & writing fluency 

 IELTS Band 7+ Success Programme (Academic & General): a highly successful 6- or 12-week coaching programme for IELTS writing, speaking, listening, and reading.

 Business English Coaching tailored to your industry, role, goals, and level (A2–C2).

 English for Project Managers: meetings, delegating tasks, managing schedules, tracking progress, giving updates, discussing KPIs, full project management cycle

Name: Real Spanish for All
Description:
Hola! Welcome to Real Spanish for All! 

I'm Sara, and I'm the driving force behind this vibrant language-learning community. As a native Spanish teacher, I bring my passion for the Spanish language to life through Real Spanish for All.

With a foundation laid at the Universidad de Navarra in Pamplona, I've spent years in the United Kingdom, gaining invaluable insights into the challenges that English speakers face when they embrace Spanish as a foreign language.

Real Spanish for All is a dream realized. It's about bridging the gap between language learners and a world of opportunities. My approach is grounded in a methodology I've crafted through years of experience—an approach that adapts seamlessly to all cultures. Here, we make learning Spanish enjoyable, interactive, effective, and refreshingly simple.

What sets us apart? Our commitment to offering online lessons and courses that align with the way I wished to have learned English. We understand that everyone's journey is unique, and our lessons are tailored to suit your goals, whether you're starting from scratch or reaching for advanced proficiency.

Real Spanish for All isn't just about learning a language; it's about unlocking doors to endless possibilities, whether it's for business, travel, personal enrichment, or sheer passion.

Join us on this adventure. Let's embark on a learning journey that's memorable, rewarding, and most importantly, real. Real Spanish for All invites you to embrace the beauty, the culture, and the vast potential that the Spanish language offers. Let's make your language learning experience truly unforgettable.
